Name: Suzano
Description:
Suzano, the company resulting from the merger of Suzano Pulp & Paper and Fibria, is committed to being a global reference in the sustainable use of natural resources. The world's leading producer of eucalyptus pulp and one of Latin America’s largest paper producers, Suzano exports to more than 80 countries and, through its products, plays a part in the lives of over two billion people. With ten mills and the joint operation Veracel, Suzano has annual installed capacity of 10,9 million tons of market pulp and 1.4 million tons of paper. Suzano has more than 35,000 direct and indirect employees and for over 90 years has invested in innovative solutions based on eucalyptus cultivation that enable it to substitute the use of fossil-based materials with renewable bio-based materials. The company adopts the highest standards of corporate governance on the exchanges where its stock is traded, namely the B3 in Brazil and the NYSE in the United States.

Check our job opportunities at https://jobs.kenoby.com/suzanointernational

Name: Klabin
Description:
Somos a maior produtora e exportadora de papéis para embalagens do Brasil, líderes nos mercados de embalagens de papelão ondulado, sacos industriais e papel-cartão e a única indústria do País a oferecer soluções em celuloses de fibra curta, fibra longa e fluff. Com mais de 120 anos de história, temos 22 unidades industriais no Brasil e uma na Argentina e uma capacidade produtiva anual de 4,5 milhões de toneladas de celulose de mercado e papéis.
 
Toda a gestão da Klabin está orientada para o desenvolvimento sustentável e buscamos crescimento integrado e responsável, que une rentabilidade, desenvolvimento social e compromisso ambiental. Desde 2014 integramos o Índice de Sustentabilidade Empresarial (ISE) da B3 e, desde 2020, o Índice Dow Jones Best-in-Class, com participação na carteira Global e de Mercados Emergentes.
 
Saiba mais sobre a nossa atuação em klabin.com.br. 
 
 Atenção! A Klabin e seus parceiros de recrutamento não cobram qualquer valor dos candidatos em seus processos seletivos.

Name: Bracell
Description: Bracell is one of the world's largest dissolving pulp and special cellulose producers with two main operations in Brazil in Camaçari, Bahia and in Lençóis Paulista, São Paulo. By the time its São Paulo expansion known as ‘Project Star’ completes in 2021, Bracell will have annual production capacity of approximately 2.0 million tons of dissolving pulp, and will employ approximately 7,300 direct and indirect employees. In addition to its Brazil mill operations, Bracell Group holds a management office in Singapore and sales offices in Asia, Europe and the United States.

Name: APP Group
Description:
APP serves as the holding company for multiple Indonesia pulp and paper manufacturing as well as forestry entities, catering to the increasing global need for high-quality tissue, packaging, and paper. Our products reach over 150 countries spanning six continents. APP Group serves as group name of pulp, paper and forestry entities under APP and its affiliates including the pulp and paper and forestry operation in China.

Driven by a dedication to sustainability and ethical practices, we prioritize the well-being of our employees, society, and environment. Our approach involves harnessing technological advancements and fostering innovation, collaborating closely with communities, and upholding internationally recognized business and operational standards throughout our production and supply chain.

Aligned with the Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles, our Sustainability Roadmap Vision 2030 steers our actions toward safeguarding environment, bolstering local communities, preserving biodiversity, and striving for carbon neutrality in all our endeavors.
Location: Central Jakarta, Special Capital Region of Jakarta

Name: International Paper
Description:
International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC) is the global leader in sustainable packaging solutions. With company headquarters in Memphis, Tennessee, USA, and EMEA (Europe, Middle East and Africa) headquarters in London, UK, we employ more than 65,000 team members and serve customers around the world with operations in more than 30 countries. Together with our customers, we make the world safer and more productive, one sustainable packaging solution at a time.

Learn more at internationalpaper.com.

Name: Eldorado Brasil Celulose S/A
Description:
Eldorado Brasil stands out as one of the largest and most efficient producers of pulp in the world, combining high productivity with a strong commitment to sustainability. With 285,000 hectares of planted forests in Mato Grosso do Sul and a production capacity of 1.8 million tons of pulp per year, we export to over 40 countries.

Our difference lies in #NossaGente, a dedicated team that drives our continuous innovation and transformation in the industry. Every step of our production process, from forest management to logistics, is guided by sustainable practices and innovative solutions, ensuring a better future for everyone.
Location: Três Lagoas, Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: CMPC
Description:
We are one of the global leaders in the pulp industry, present in 12 countries and exporting to more than 50 markets. Recognized by the Dow Jones Sustainability Index as the most sustainable forestry company in the world, we produce pulp, paper, packaging, and wood products with innovation, efficiency, and respect for the environment.

Our commitment is clear: to combine operational excellence, social and environmental responsibility, and the strength of our people to turn our purpose —we make natural fibers for a better future — into reality for communities and the planet.

Name: Sappi
Description:
We strive to use every part of the tree to make world-class products for customers in over 150 countries. From paper and pulp to cosmetics, medicine and more, we are driving the bio-based circular economy alongside our partners to help build a thriving, more sustainable world. 

We operate woodfibre manufacturing facilities on three continents (ten production facilities in Western Europe, four in North America and five in Southern Africa). Our scale magnifies our impact. Every year we produce 5.7 million tons of paper, 2.4 million tons of paper pulp, and 1.4 million tons per year of dissolving pulp. 

The success of our business is built on the ingenuity, energy and tenacity of more than 11,400 employees spread across 35+ countries. We champion our people, and the unique qualities they bring. Every idea, collaboration and perspective creates breakthroughs for us all — on the path to a better future. A career at Sappi is an opportunity to put down roots where it matters.  

Find out more about our products, impact, people and careers on our website.

Name: APRIL
Description:
Asia Pacific Resources International Limited (APRIL) Group is one of the largest, most technologically advanced and efficient makers of pulp and paper products in the world.

We make products that are used by millions of people every day in liquid packaging, printing and writing paper, tissues, shopping bags, food packaging, magazines and books.

Our products, including our flagship PaperOneTM office paper, are proudly marketed and sold in more than 70 countries around the world.

Our business is built on a Sustainable Forest Management Policy. Our operations include a state-of-the-art pulp and paper mill and plantation forests in Riau Province, Sumatra, Indonesia. APRIL employs around 9,000 people directly and provides indirect employment to 90,000. Today, the residential townsite houses up to 7,000 employees and their families.

https://www.instagram.com/discoverapril/
https://twitter.com/APRILpulp
www.aprilasia.com

Name: ARAUCO
Description:
Ser un referente mundial en el desarrollo sustentable de productos forestales es la visión que ha impulsado a ARAUCO durante más de 40 años de trayectoria. En este tiempo hemos alcanzado una sólida posición como una de las mayores empresas forestales del mundo, no sólo en términos de superficie, rendimiento y producción de calidad, sino también en cuanto a innovación, responsabilidad ambiental y compromiso social.

Los productos y servicios de nuestras cinco áreas de negocio son el reflejo de una gestión sostenible que combina el manejo responsable y eficiente de nuestros recursos naturales y humanos junto con el uso de la más alta tecnología, para entregar producción de calidad a nuestros clientes en más de 75 países alrededor del mundo.

El éxito de nuestra gestión de negocio se basa no sólo en satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes, sino en saber equilibrar las necesidades de la compañía y las de nuestros trabajadores con las necesidades ambientales y sociales del entorno. Desde aquí nace el manejo responsable y eficiente de los recursos naturales, el cuidado integral por la salud y seguridad ocupacional de quienes trabajan para la empresa, y nuestra contribución activa al desarrollo de las comunidades en las cuales mantenemos operaciones.

Video Corporativo.
http://www.arauco.cl/informacion.asp?idq=245&parent=243&ca_submenu=243

Name: Georgia-Pacific LLC
Description: Georgia-Pacific and its subsidiaries are among the world’s leading manufacturers and marketers of bath tissue, paper towels and napkins, tableware, paper-based packaging, cellulose, specialty fibers and building products. The company operates more than 150 facilities and employs approximately 30,000 people directly and creates more than 89,000 jobs indirectly.

Name: RGE
Description:
Headquartered in Singapore, RGE is a global group of companies in the bio-based resources and energy sectors, serving over 100 markets worldwide. With more than US$40 billion in assets and a workforce of 80,000 employees, our operations span across Indonesia, China, Brazil, Canada, Spain, and Malaysia. As a global leader in sustainable natural fibres, edible oils, green packaging, and cleaner energy solutions, we play a vital role in feeding, clothing, and improving the lives of billions every day.

We build lasting businesses by integrating sustainability as an enabler of growth, while advancing a nature-positive, greener future. Established in 1973, we have remained committed to sustainable development, conservation, and community empowerment, guided by our 5Cs philosophy of doing what is good for the Community, Country, Climate, Customer, and only then will it be good for the Company.

Name: ARAUCO Brasil
Description:
Há 45 anos inovamos e criamos tendências.
Somos líderes em painéis de madeira nas Américas.
Possuímos negócios em mais de 75 países e plantas industriais no Brasil, Chile, Argentina, Uruguai, Estados Unidos e Canadá.
Nossa busca por soluções sustentáveis nos faz a maior companhia florestal do hemisfério sul.
Referência mundial em painéis que aliam inovação, sustentabilidade e elegância.

Name: Stora Enso
Description:
Part of the global bioeconomy, Stora Enso is a leading provider of renewable products in packaging, biomaterials, wooden construction and paper, and one of the largest private forest owners in the world. We believe that everything that is made from fossil-based materials today can be made from a tree tomorrow. Sustainability and responsible business practices are deeply embedded in our strategy.

Our low-carbon, fiber-based products are renewable and recyclable. They offer solutions to climate change and promote positive impacts on the environment, thus enabling our customers to become more eco-friendly. We employ some 20,000 people. Our shares are listed on the Helsinki (STEAV, STERV) and Stockholm (STE A, STE R) stock exchanges. In addition, the shares are traded in the USA as ADRs.

Name: Papelesa Cia. Ltda.
Description:
Papelesa, fundada en 1970, es la industria fabricante de cuadernos con una trayectoria de innovación y excelencia gráfica que ha llevado a nuestra marca bandera ESTILO a ser reconocida como SUPERBRAND del Ecuador en el 2009 y así, entre las 50 marcas más importantes del país. 

Además de la fabricación de nuestros cuadernos, somos líderes en la importación directa, distribución y comercialización de los mejores productos ampliando nuestro portafolio para surtir mejor su negocio, ofertando productos ganadores en la línea: Escolar, Escritura, Papeles & Cartulina, Tecnología, Aseo e Higiene, Oficina, Fotocopia, Arte & Diseño y Empaque. 

Papelesa, junto con su marca ESTILO KIDS y ESTILO OFFICE ha incorporado productos para surtir las necesidades de todos nuestros clientes con excelencia. 

Nuestro negocio es surtir su negocio!

Name: LD Celulose S. A.
Description:
A LD Celulose nasceu de uma parceria entre a austríaca Lenzing e a brasileira Dexco, com o propósito de construir uma das maiores fábricas de celulose solúvel do mundo. Localizada  no Triângulo Mineiro, entre os municípios de Araguari e Indianópolis, a fábrica tem capacidade nominal de 500 mil toneladas ao ano e usa matéria prima oriunda de florestas 100% certificadas. As áreas florestais utilizadas pela empresa têm uma infraestrutura robusta de monitoramento e proteção.

Toda a celulose solúvel produzida é exportada para fábricas da Lenzing, onde é transformada em fibra de baixo impacto ambiental, para ser usada em fios e tecidos para roupas, além de outras aplicações, como lenços umedecidos, máscaras faciais e produtos de higiene.

A LD Celulose incluiu o Triângulo Mineiro na lista dos maiores produtores de celulose solúvel do mundo, um fator de desenvolvimento socioeconômico para toda a região.

Name: Fibria
Description:
A Fibria é uma empresa brasileira com forte presença no mercado global de produtos florestais. Somos líderes mundiais na produção de celulose de eucalipto a partir de florestas plantadas. Somos inspirados a acreditar que as empresas são parte da construção de soluções para uma sociedade mais justa e sustentável. Acreditamos que com a diversidade de pessoas, experiências e culturas, somos capazes de enriquecer as ideias e as soluções para o negócio.
Valorizamos a floresta plantada como fonte de vida, geração de riqueza compartilhada e do bem-estar das pessoas. É para isso que existimos. A companhia possui 1,092 milhão de hectares de florestas, sendo 656 mil hectares de florestas plantadas, 374 mil hectares de áreas de preservação e de conservação ambiental e 61 mil hectares destinados a outros usos. A celulose produzida pela Fibria é exportada para mais de 35 países.
Nosso time é composto por cerca de 18.300 profissionais, entre próprios e terceirizados. Estamos presentes com unidades industriais localizadas em Aracruz (ES), Jacareí (SP) e Três Lagoas (MS), além de Eunápolis (BA), onde mantém a Veracel em joint-operation com a Stora Enso. Atualmente com a inauguração da nova linha de produção em Três lagoas (MS) ampliamos a capacidade produtiva para 7,25 milhões de toneladas de celulose por ano.


Saiba mais em www.fibria.com.br

Name: Irani S.A.
Description:
Somos uma das principais indústrias nacionais de embalagens sustentáveis a base de papel e papelão ondulado. 

Há mais de 80 anos, fabricamos produtos provenientes de base florestal renovável, 100% recicláveis, com absoluto respeito às pessoas e ao meio ambiente.

Nossa produção é integrada, das florestas aos produtos finais, assegurando excelente qualidade. Estamos presentes em quatro estados brasileiros. As nossas unidades produzem papel para embalagem, caixas e chapas de papelão ondulado, breu e terebintina.

Atualmente, empregamos mais de 2 mil colaboradores diretos e valorizamos a diversidade onde todos são bem-vindos, independentemente de gênero, idade, etnia, religião, nacionalidade, estado civil, orientação sexual e deficiência de qualquer natureza. 

Nosso modelo de gestão é a sustentabilidade - balizador para que as atitudes resultem em ações éticas, transparentes e entendíveis do conhecimento de todos os envolvidos.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: J.D. Irving, Limited
Description:
J.D. Irving, Limited (JDI) is a diverse family owned company with operations in Canada and the United States. Since 1882 our focus has been on providing quality products and superior service to customers around the world. Our head offices are in Saint John and Moncton, New Brunswick, Canada. J.D. Irving, Limited is made up of a diverse group of companies in various business segments: 

Forestry & Forest Products 
Transportation 
Shipbuilding & Industrial Marine
Retail & Distribution 
Industrial Equipment, Construction Services & Building Materials
Specialty Printing  
Consumer Packaged Goods 
Food Processing 

At J.D. Irving, Limited our core values form the foundation of our company’s story and how we operate on a daily basis. J.D. Irving, Limited is committed to growing leaders and providing them with challenging and rewarding career opportunities. With a focus on creating an aligned and engaged workforce across various industries, JDI offers both internal and external competency based development tailored to individual needs. Our external partners are recognized as world-class, assisting us in creating one of the best leadership pipelines in the country. We partner with some of the top educational and training development schools in Canada who are considered to be "leaders in developing leaders".

Name: WestRock Brasil
Description:
WestRock makes consumer and corrugated packaging solutions that give our customers a winning edge in the global marketplace. We partner closely with customers on everything from beverage packs and pizza boxes to trigger sprayers and fragrance pumps to paperboard used for a wide variety of packaging and shipping containers. We consider ourselves to be part of their team – as we strive for continuous improvement together. Every day, our 42,000 team members combine practical innovations and rigorous execution in about 275 operating and business facilities across North America, South America, Europe and Asia-Pacific to deliver products and services that answer unique local needs. We expect to win as a company and lead the industry by achieving success together with our customers, employees and investors.
I

Name: Weyerhaeuser
Description:
We manage forests and manufacture products that make the world a better place. We’re serious about safety, driven to achieve excellence, and proud of what we do. With multiple business lines in locations around the world, we offer a range of exciting careers opportunities for smart, talented people who are passionate about making a difference.

Be sure to follow us on Twitter and Instagram: @Weyerhaeuser

Name: CENIBRA - Celulose Nipo Brasileira S. A.
Description:
CENIBRA was set up on September 13, 1973. Located in east Minas Gerais, it’s the result of the entrepreneurial spirit of Companhia Vale do Rio Doce - CVRD and Japan Brazil Paper and Pulp Resources Development Co., Ltd. – JBP, which had a dream of building a large forest-based company.

Upon CVRD’s decision of disposing of its interests in forest-related companies in July 2001, JBP became the only shareholder of CENIBRA. JBP is a group of Japanese companies with broad experience and corporate relations in Brazil.

CENIBRA runs its operations in 54 counties, in which it implements a number of social and environmental projects with an aim to foster the region’s development.

Name: SCA
Description:
Europe’s largest private forest owner manufacturing wood products, pulp, packaging paper and renewable energy. 

The core of SCA’s business is the growing forest, Europe’s largest private forest holding. Around this unique resource, we have built a well-developed value chain based on renewable raw material from our own and others’ forests. We offer packaging paper, pulp, wood products, renewable energy, services for forest owners and efficient transport solutions. 

2024 the forest products company SCA had approximately 3,400 employees and sales amounted to approximately SEK 20 bn. SCA was founded in 1929 and has its headquarters in Sundsvall, Sweden. 

Offcial LinkedIn account for SCA.

Name: Domtar
Description:
Domtar is a leading, privately held manufacturer of diversified forest products, with a workforce of roughly 14,000 employees in more than 40 locations across North America. The company has an annual capacity of 9.1 million metric tons of pulp, paper, packaging and tissue annually, and has an annual production capacity of about 3 billion board feet of lumber and other wood products. Formerly known as the Paper Excellence Group, Domtar is comprised of legacy businesses Paper Excellence Canada Holdings Corporation, Domtar Corporation and Resolute Forest Products.
 
Domtar prides itself on operational excellence, delivering sustainable, high-quality, and cost-effective products to meet and exceed customer needs globally. The company is committed to turning sustainable wood fiber into everyday essential products.

Domtar est l'un des principaux fabricants privés de produits forestiers diversifiés, avec un effectif d'environ 14 000 employés répartis sur plus de 40 sites en Amérique du Nord. L'entreprise a une capacité annuelle de 9,1 millions de tonnes métriques de pâte, de papier, d'emballage et de papier tissu, ainsi qu'une capacité de production annuelle d'environ 3 milliards de pieds-planche de bois d'œuvre et d'autres produits du bois. Anciennement connu sous le nom de Paper Excellence Group, Domtar est composé des entreprises Paper Excellence Canada Holdings Corporation, Domtar Corporation et Produits forestiers Résolu.
 
Domtar est fière de son excellence opérationnelle, de ses produits durables, de haute qualité et rentables qui répondent aux besoins de ses clients à l'échelle mondiale et les dépassent. L'entreprise s'engage à transformer la fibre de bois durable en produits essentiels à la vie de tous les jours.

Name: The Navigator Company
Description:
The Navigator Company is an integrated producer of forest, pulp, paper, tissue, sustainable packaging solutions and bioenergy, whose activity is based on state-of-the-art factories worldwide, with cutting-edge technology. It is recognised as a benchmark for quality in the sector worldwide.

Inspired by people, their quality of life and the future of the planet, the Company is committed to creating sustainable value for its shareholders and society as a whole, leaving future generations a better planet through sustainable, natural, recyclable and biodegradable products and solutions that contribute to carbon sequestration, oxygen production, biodiversity protection, soil formation and the fight against climate change.

The Company's ongoing commitment and investment in improving its ESG performance is also reflected in the positive external assessment made by independent entities. Navigator was recognised by Sustainalytics as a ‘2025 ESG Industry Top-Rated Company’, reaffirming its leadership in the forestry and paper sector. This recognition places the Company on the prestigious global list of ‘2025 ESG Top-Rated Companies’, consolidating its position as one of the companies with the best environmental, social and governance (ESG) practices worldwide.

Name: JK Paper Ltd.
Description:
We make sustainable Paper solutions for your needs!
 JK Paper makes sustainable Paper solutions, from paper which is produced via Social Farm Forestry without harming a single forest tree. Our paper based solutions are 100% bio-degradable and recyclable which provide a choice of switching to a Sustainable future. 
		
  Our legacy goes back to 1938 with setting up of Straw Products ltd. in Bhopal. 
In the year 1962, Unit JKPM at Rayagada (Odhisa) was established. Today we are a leading Indian player in Office Papers, Coated Papers, Writing and Printing Papers and High-end Packaging Boards. 
We have three integrated Pulp and Paper Mills viz; Unit JKPM at Rayagada (Odisha) near the Eastern coast of India and Unit CPM at Songadh (Gujarat) on the Western coast & Unit SPM at Kagaznagar, Telangana. With our recently concluded 170,000 TPA capacity expansion in Packaging Board at Unit CPM, our present installed capacity is 761,000 TPA.
From being the pioneer of branded Paper in India the company today is a leading Sustainable Paper Product Solutions Provider. 
     
Customer Connect:
   We have a worldwide footprint with customer in over 60 countries covering USA, Middle East, Europe, South-east Asia, and Africa.
   In India we service our customers through an extensive distribution network of over 300 trade partners over 4,000 dealers, 15 depots & 4 regional marketing offices.

Commitment for a Sustainable future:  

  We have a larger commitment & respect for the environment & the community; under our Social Farm Forestry program we have sustained our efforts for increasing the green cover within 200 Km area from our plant sites. We have helped in planting close to 465,000 Acres of land under this programme. The programme not just helps in greening the environment but also provide livelihood to marginal farmers. More than 65,000  farmers have been benefitted through our farm forestry model.

Name: Kronospan
Description:
Kronospan is a one of the leading producers of wood-based panels and value-added products for the furniture, interior design, and construction industries. Since 1897, we have grown from a single sawmill into a worldwide network of 40+ production sites and 17 distribution centers across 28 countries, employing over 15,000 people.
We combine innovation, quality, and sustainability to deliver reliable solutions for our partners. By integrating design, technology, and environmental responsibility, we continue to set standards in the industry and support our customers’ success worldwide.
Our LinkedIn Community

This page is a place to share insights, news, ideas, and stories from the world of design, innovation, and sustainability. We welcome your comments, questions, and perspectives - and we look forward to engaging in meaningful conversations with professionals from across our industry.
To ensure respectful and constructive dialogue, please keep in mind:
• Treat others with respect and professionalism.
• Keep discussions focused on topics relevant to our business, industry, and community.
• We reserve the right to remove offensive, misleading, or promotional content that does not align with our values.
• Please note that our responses may not always be immediate, but we do read and value all contributions.

At Kronospan, we believe in open, professional, and inspiring conversations. Thank you for being part of our community.

Name: Kastamonu Entegre
Description:
As a company that started production in Kastamonu with one hundred percent domestic capital, the company has been in continuous production in the wood-based panel sector for more than half a century. Kastamonu Entegre, with production facilities in six locations domestically including Kastamonu, Gebze, Balıkesir, Samsun, Tarsus, and Adana, has become a global brand that employs 7,000 people through investments in Romania, Bulgaria, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Russia, Italy, and Turkey, being the first company in its sector to invest abroad. The company also has a branch in the United States through which it manages wood particleboard supply and logistics processes.


Kastamonu Entegre, with its foreign investments continuing for over 25 years, has become the fifth-largest company in the wood-based panel sector globally and is among the top three producers in Europe. It is one of the four largest producers in the world in each of its main product groups: MDF, particleboard, laminate flooring, and door panel products. It alone produces 6% of the world's laminate flooring products. Holding the title of "Italy's Largest Turkish Investor," Kastamonu Entegre is also Russia's largest MDF producer and exporter. Being the sector leader in Turkey with a 30% market share, Kastamonu Entegre exports to 100 countries across six continents, from China to the United States and Australia to Canada.

Operating with a mission to preserve natural balance and contribute to society, the company has prepared the first sustainability report of the Turkish wood-based panel sector. At the R&D center established at Technopark Istanbul in aims to improve future technologies, it conducts studies on product and process development, efficiency increase, effective resource utilization, and advanced material technologies.

Name: CMPC Brasil
Description:
CMPC é um dos grupos da indústria de celulose e papel mais importantes do mundo. A empresa comercializa e exporta produtos florestais, celulose, itens de higiene e embalagens para mais de 50 países.

Atualmente a CMPC opera em 9 países: Chile (matriz), Brasil, Argentina, Uruguai, EUA, México, Colômbia, Peru e Equador.  Produzindo e comercializando celulose nas suas quatro fábricas (três delas localizadas no sul do Chile e uma no Estado do Rio Grande do Sul, no Brasil) com uma produção de 2,5 milhões de toneladas anuais. Possui mais de 200 clientes em 40 países.
Também produz e comercializa papelão, papel ondulado, papel seda, caixas de papelão ondulado e sacos de papel. 

Além disso, conta com uma área especializada na distribuição de papéis e outra que visa a reciclagem. E sua filial CMPC Maderas desenvolve e comercializa produtos de madeira sólida, madeira serrada, compensados e remanufatura. 

Exporta seus produtos para países da América, Europa e Ásia. 

Com operações industriais no Chile, Argentina, Uruguai, Peru, Brasil, Colômbia, Equador e México, também produz para comercialização, produtos de papel higiênico, papel toalha, guardanapo, lenços de papel, fraldas para crianças e adultos e absorventes femininos.

Unidades no Brasil:
•	Guaíba – RS
•	São José dos Pinhais – PR
•	Piraí do Sul – PR
•	Campos Novos – SC

Name: Metsä Group
Description:
Enter a new era in your career, welcome to Metsä Group!

Metsä Group is a successful forest industry group with roots in the Finnish forest – Our parent company is a cooperative of over 90,000 forest owners. 

We welcome people from diverse backgrounds and different stages of life. Metsä has space and opportunities for many kinds of talent, regardless of age, gender, ethnic background, sexual orientation, disability or other characteristics – Metsä is for all. Read more: metsagroup.com/metsaforall.

Name: UPM Uruguay
Description:
Our operations are distributed throughout the entire country. We are an innovative, committed, and passionate team that makes all our operations possible.
 
Continuous improvement, long-term vision, and sustainability permeate all our actoins. In Fray Bentos and Paso de los Toros cities, we operate two of the most modern and efficient pulp mills in the world.
 
Our forestry operations require intense long-term planning and continuous investment in research and development. In Uruguay, we have UPM's first Forestry Research Center in the world, and three state-of-the-art nurseries located in Paysandú, Guichón, and Sarandí del Yí communities.
 
Our logistics include road, rail, sea, and river transport, making it a competitive and flexible multimodal platform. The pulp terminal located in the port of Montevideo, connected to the Central Railroad, creates an efficient supply chain to global markets.
 
Through the UPM Foundation, we seek to be an enabler that contributes to the long-term strengthening of communities. To achieve this, we promote projects and offer educational training scholarships in the interior of the country.
 
Together, we create a Future Beyond Fossils.

Name: SUPARMA, PT TBK
Description: PT. Suparma Tbk. is a paper & tissue manufacturer based in Surabaya, Indonesia

Name: Fedrigoni Group
Description:
From the very beginning, our Group has been immersed in the world of specialty papers, captivated by their unrivaled performance and mesmerizing aesthetics. 

Today, Fedrigoni has become synonymous with excellence in premium papers, catering to packaging, labels,  graphics, art & drawing, publishing, printing, RFID and the self-adhesive materials market. With an unwavering commitment to innovation, we have ceaselessly pushed the boundaries, infusing our craft with cutting-edge technology and honing our expertise. 

These efforts have propelled us to offer our solutions across the globe, reaching every corner of creativity.

We operate under the ethos of "Making Progress," embodying a genuine commitment to daily improvement. By rethinking our practices and collaborating with the entire ecosystem in which we operate, we strive for genuine sustainability.

At Fedrigoni, every day, we do our best to be the first choice for brands, printers, designers, converters. We make materials the source of creative possibilities to brands everywhere.  #elevatingcreativity.

Name: Sofidel S.p.A.
Description: The Sofidel Group, headquartered in Porcari (Lucca, Italy), is one of the leading manufacturers of paper for hygienic and household use worldwide. Established in 1966, the Group is active in 13 countries, 12 in Europe and the United States (12 States following the Royal Paper’s assets acquisition), with approximately 9,500 employees and a production capacity of 1,913,000 metric tons per year (following the Royal Paper’s assets acquisition). In 2024, the Group had Net Sales of 3.225 billion Euros. “Regina”, its most well-known brand, is present on almost all the reference markets. Other brands include: Sopalin, Le Trèfle, Hakle, Softis, Nalys, Cosynel, KittenSoft, Nicky and Papernet. Sofidel is committed to reaching Net-Zero carbon emissions by the end of 2050.

Name: Saudi Paper Group
Description:
Welcome to Saudi Paper Group (SPG) – the leading tissue paper manufacturing company in the GCC, producing superior quality products that cater to both local and international requirements. Saudi Paper was established in the year 1989 as a small individual firm. It started manufacturing large paper rolls in 1991 and set up the first production unit with a capacity of 16,000 tons in 1992. SPG has constantly expanded over the span of 29 years to affirm itself as nothing short of an empire, committed to offering affordable, world-class, quality products that cater to the varied needs of our customers. The vertical integration of the 3 main pillars of our business – Jumbo Rolls Manufacturing, Tissue Converting , and Paper Recycling, has vested in us the skill and expertise to set new standards in paper manufacturing. Our growth as a predominant tissue manufacturing company in the GCC is the result of innovative solutions that are centered around customer needs and preferences. Whether it is the mother jumbo roll or paper tissues, everything that stems from SPG, carries a mark of quality and trust. Head-quartered in Dammam, Saudi Arabia, we reach out to both domestic and international markets with our exceptional line of products. By bringing passion and innovation into practice, SPG is certainly the fastest growing tissue manufacturing company in the region.

THE TISSUE PAPER SPECIALISTS
We are Saudi Paper Group. By combining the efficiency of a large organization with the customer-centric attributes of small-scale company, we at SPG have earned the expertise of orchestrating a phenomenal paper empire. We are driven by a belief that quality is never an accident; it is the result of dedication and passion. At SPG, quality and customer satisfaction lie at the heart of everything we do. Which is why, we are recognized and acknowledged as high-quality paper manufacturers and suppliers across the Kingdom.

Name: Resolute Forest Products
Description:
Domtar est l'un des principaux fabricants privés de produits forestiers diversifiés, avec un effectif d'environ 14 000 employés répartis sur plus de 40 sites en Amérique du Nord. L'entreprise a une capacité annuelle de 9,1 millions de tonnes métriques de pâte, de papier, d'emballage et de papier tissu, ainsi qu'une capacité de production annuelle d'environ 3 milliards de pieds-planche de bois d'œuvre et d'autres produits du bois. Anciennement connu sous le nom de Paper Excellence Group, Domtar est composé des entreprises Paper Excellence Canada Holdings Corporation, Domtar Corporation et Produits forestiers Résolu.
 
Domtar est fière de son excellence opérationnelle, de ses produits durables, de haute qualité et rentables qui répondent aux besoins de ses clients à l'échelle mondiale et les dépassent. L'entreprise s'engage à transformer la fibre de bois durable en produits essentiels à la vie de tous les jours.

Domtar is a leading, privately held manufacturer of diversified forest products, with a workforce of roughly 14,000 employees in more than 40 locations across North America. The company has an annual capacity of 9.1 million metric tons of pulp, paper, packaging and tissue annually, and has an annual production capacity of about 3 billion board feet of lumber and other wood products. Formerly known as the Paper Excellence Group, Domtar is comprised of legacy businesses Paper Excellence Canada Holdings Corporation, Domtar Corporation and Resolute Forest Products.
 
Domtar prides itself on operational excellence, delivering sustainable, high-quality, and cost-effective products to meet and exceed customer needs globally. The company is committed to turning sustainable wood fiber into everyday essential products.

Name: Ahlstrom
Description:
Ahlstrom is a global leader in fiber-based materials, supplying innovative and sustainable solutions to its customers. Our vision is to be the Preferred Sustainable Specialty Materials Company for all our stakeholders.  

Ahlstrom's purpose is to Purify and Protect, with Every Fiber, for a Sustainable World. We aim to be the Preferred Sustainable Specialty Materials Company for all our stakeholders. Our three divisions, Filtration and Life Sciences, Food and Consumer Packaging, and Protective Materials along with Performance Materials Cluster, address global trends with safe and sustainable solutions. Our net sales in 2024 amounted to EUR 3.0 billion and we employ some 7,000 people.

#WePurifyandProtect #BetterWay #BetterAhlstromforEveryone

Name: West Fraser
Description: West Fraser is a diversified wood products company with facilities in Canada, the U.S., the U.K. and Europe, manufacturing, marketing, selling and distributing lumber, engineered wood products (OSB, LVL, MDF, plywood, particleboard), Northern bleached softwood kraft pulp, paper, wood chips and other residuals.

Name: Lila Kağıt
Description:
Our journey, which spans nearly a century, began with a weaving facility established by the Öğücü family in 1930. By the early 2000s, we had grown continuously to become one of Turkey's largest integrated yarn facilities.
In 2006, to meet the hygienic cleaning paper needs of Türkiye and its surrounding regions, we founded Lila Kağıt with 100% Turkish capital.

Today, we stand among the leading companies in the hygienic cleaning paper industry, favored by consumers for our brands Sofia, Maylo, Ultra Berrak, and Nua, our jumbo roll production, and our private label products.

With over 1,000 employees, exports to more than 80 countries across five continents, a gross paper production capacity exceeding 270,000 tons, and our sustainable growth performance, we proudly feature in the "Largest Companies" and "Top Exporters" lists published annually.

Since 2010, we have been contributing to the Turkish Education Volunteers Foundation (TEGV) through our Maylo brand, connecting children with quality education, and with our environmentally conscious Sofia brand, we donate thousands of saplings and seeds every year, working towards leaving a better world for future generations.

Name: Paper Excellence Brasil
Description: Paper Excellence is a diversified manufacturer of pulp and paper, including printing and writing, packaging, and specialty papers. We believe in the enduring value of wood-based products in global markets and have built a large network of mills and chipping plants to produce them competitively. Through our distinct approach to operational excellence, we deliver high-quality and cost-effective products to international customers. We manufacture high-quality softwood and hardwood kraft chemical pulps, and chemi-thermo-mechanical pulps, that in turn are used to make packaging, papers, tissues, towels, and other specialty products. Our Catalyst facilities manufacture superior-quality specialty, printing and writing, and packaging papers for retailers, commercial printers, publishers, and customers who convert our products into their own. We have a significant economic impact in Canada, where our operations are important drivers of local and regional economies. We create approximately $4 billion annually in economic activity through wages, tax payments, purchases of goods and services, and support of indirect employment. So much of what we have accomplished is thanks to our incredible team of talented individuals who work tirelessly to set the industry standard and raise the bar. We warmly invite you to learn more about our company and the opportunities we have in store for you.

Name: Papirus Indústria de Papel S.A.
Description:
Há 50 anos, a Papirus descobriu sua verdadeira vocação, quando passou a produzir papelcartão a partir de aparas de papéis cuidadosamente selecionados. São diferentes linhas, desde a 100% reciclada até a 100% produzida a partir de celulose.

Atualmente a Papirus conta com 370 colaboradores e cerca de 50 terceiros e uma produção de 90.000 toneladas líquidas por ano de papelcartão, que comercializa no Brasil e exporta para países da Europa, Ásia, América do Norte, África e especialmente América Latina.

As linhas de produtos da Papirus foram reformuladas, mantendo alguns vínculos com as identidades anteriores, com a agregação do prefixo “Vita” em todos os seus produtos. O Vita serve para dar unidade de marca e reforçar o comprometimento da Papirus em trabalhar para transformar as vidas das pessoas que de uma forma ou outra interagem com a empresa. 


A linha Vita é inspirada na vida. A Papirus criou os produtos pensando nas diferentes pessoas que interagem com eles. São mais de 50 anos de experiência e a certeza de que é preciso transformar a forma de atuação Papirus para oferecer soluções cada vez melhores, com tecnologia e muito desenvolvimento. As aparas de papéis, importantes matéria-primas, utilizadas na maior parte dos processos, provêm de empresas atacadistas de aparas e de cooperativas de catadores. O incentivo ao trabalho das cooperativas , além de ajudar o meio ambiente, oferece mais dignidade à vida de muita gente.

Name: Sylvamo
Description:
We believe in the promise of paper to educate, communicate and entertain. Paper connects us to one another and is an enduring bond to renewable natural resources.

Our purpose is to produce the paper you need in the most responsible and sustainable ways. We aim high, innovate and create value for our customers and investors.

The future of paper deserves a company committed to the success of the entire ecosystem. From the forests we love, to the communities where we live, to those who rely on our paper, we know the well-being of each depends on the well-being of all.

We are Sylvamo, built to help the world realize the promise of paper. 

Sylvamo. The world’s paper company.

Name: Montes del Plata
Description:
Empresa forestal fundada en el 2009, a partir de la fusión de la empresa sueco finlandesa Stora Enso y la chilena Arauco, en un 50/50. Estas dos empresas tenían operaciones en Uruguay previo a la fusión y a partir de esta, adquirieron a su vez, parte del Grupo Ence en Uruguay. 

Ha obtendio la actualización de la Autorización Ambiental Previa (AAP) para la realización de la Planta de Celulosa en Punta Pereira, a 6 km de Conchillas y se está esperando la confirmación del Directorio de la empresa sobre la realización de la misma.

Name: Yıldız Entegre
Description:
Orman ürünleri sektöründe 130 yılı aşkın bilgi ve deneyime sahip olan Yıldız Entegre, girişimci ruhu, sürekli büyüme hedefiyle hayata geçirdiği yatırımlar ve faaliyet gösterdiği her alanda teknoloji-tasarım geliştirme yetkinliğiyle dünyanın en büyük üreticilerinden biri.

Türkiye, Romanya ve Slovenya'da toplam 8 üretim tesisi, 1 depo ve 1 liman ile toplamda 2.077.000 metrekare kurulu alanda, 3.000’i aşkın çalışanıyla faaliyetlerini sürdüren Yıldız Entegre, aynı zamanda Türkiye’nin en büyük 27. sanayi şirketi konumunda. Bugün 80’in üzerinde ülkeye ihracat yapan Yıldız Entegre, Türkiye ekonomisine önemli ihracat geliri kazandırıyor.

Dünyanın en saygın parke üreticilerini buluşturan Avrupa Laminat Üreticileri Derneği’ne (EPLF) üye olan Yıldız Entegre, sahip olduğu CE belgesiyle yüksek kalite ve tüketicilerin korunması konusundaki yaklaşımını dünyaya kanıtlıyor.

Tüm ürünlerini doğadan aldığı ilhamla tasarlayan Yıldız Entegre, faaliyetlerini ‘doğaya ve insana’ saygı ilkesiyle sürdürüyor. Ağacın verdiği enerjiyi yaşam alanlarına taşırken, beslendiği bu alanı koruma misyonunu büyük sorumluluk bilinciyle üstleniyor. ‘Ağacın İzinde’ yaklaşımıyla sektörün gelişimine katkı sağlıyor, sanata, tasarıma ve eğitime yatırım yapıyor, geçmişteki değerleri sahiplenerek geleceğe ulaştırıyor. 

Hem bugünkü hem de gelecek kuşaklar için sorumluluk bilinciyle çalışan Yıldız Entegre, kendi kaynaklarıyla gerçekleştirdiği binlerce ağaç dikiminin yanı sıra sivil toplum kuruluşlarıyla beraberce birçok çevreci, toplumsal ve kültürel etkinliğe imza atıyor.

Orman ürünleri sektöründe dünyanın ve Türkiye’nin sayılı üreticileri arasında yer alan Yıldız Entegre, dünyada ve Türkiye’de ulaştığı büyüklüğü, ‘Sürdürülebilir İyiliğin İzinde’ parolasıyla toplumsal faydaya dönüştürmek için çalışıyor.

Bir Yıldızlar Yatırım Holding kuruluşudur.

Name: Général Emballage
Description:
Choisir son fournisseur d’emballages n’est pas chose aisée, surtout quand la bonne marche de votre entreprise est en jeu, voici 7 bonnes raisons de nous faire confiance et à nous seulement. 

1- Numéro 1 en Algérie, Général Emballage est un formidable potentiel de production de 500.000.000 m2/an de carton ondulé.

2-	La triple implantation de notre infrastructure industrielle à l’équilibre régional assure :

-	Une commutativité entre les 3 usines (Akbou, Oran et Sétif) qui élimine pratiquement tout aléas de production :
Votre commande est, au besoin, replacée sur les lignes de production d’une autre usine pour vous être livrée dans les délais. 
Nous vous offrons ainsi l'opportunité d'un mono-sourcing unifié et sécurisé 

-	Une proximité gage d’une meilleure écoute et d’une rapidité de livraison. 

- Un "circuit court"  de fabrication-livraison qui réduit votre impact Carbone. 

3-	Nous rachetons vos rebuts et déchets carton pour les réinscrire dans de nouveaux cycles de production. 

4-	Des offres à la pointe de la technologie comme l'impression Haute Résolution ou le paraffinage du carton.

5-	Une livraison du "dernier kilomètre "en Algérie et en Tunisie. 

6-	Un système de management intégré certifié ISO  9001, 14001 & 45001 et un système financier noté COFACE @@@, preuve s'il en est d'une rigoureuse intégrité fiscale et d'un engagement écologique et citoyen sans faille.  

7- Suivant nombre d’infrastructures éco-responsables (récupération des déchets process, stations d’épuration des eaux industrielles et ménagères, centrales de traitement d’air, utilisation d’énergies propres, etc.), Général Emballage s’affirme comme un process complet de développement durable intégrant l’approvisionnement, la récupération et le pré-recyclage dans une traçabilité inscrite dans le répertoire normatif ISO 14001 : 2015

Name: Ence - Energía y Celulosa
Description: Somos líderes europeos en producción de celulosa de eucalipto y la primera empresa de España en generación de energía renovable con biomasa agroforestal. Trabajamos bajo un modelo de gestión integral y responsable de superficies y cultivos forestales.

Name: Melhoramentos
Description:
Com uma trajetória de mais de 130 anos, somos uma companhia multinegócios de capital aberto, atuando de forma diversificada e estratégica em diferentes setores: Editorial (Editora Melhoramentos), Cultivo e Manejo de Florestas e produção de Fibras de Celulose de Alto Rendimento (Melhoramentos Florestal), embalagens sustentáveis à base de fibra de celulose e Desenvolvimento Imobiliário (Altea).

Guiados pelo propósito de “Fazer Crescer para Melhorar o Amanhã”, somos uma Empresa B certificada e nos posicionamos como agentes de transformação, empreendendo, inovando e liderando iniciativas que impactam positivamente o futuro. 

Nosso compromisso com o desenvolvimento sustentável do Brasil reflete-se na criação de valor por meio de produtos, serviços e empreendimentos que promovem o equilíbrio entre progresso e sustentabilidade.

Nossa sede está localizada em São Paulo, com operações em Camanducaia (MG), Bragança Paulista (SP) e Caieiras (SP).

Saiba mais em: www.melhoramentos.com.br

Name: IPEL - Papel
Description:
A IPEL nasceu há mais de 40 anos, a partir do sonho de duas pessoas e um guardanapo. Desde então, evoluímos continuamente, transformando visão empreendedora em uma indústria sólida, inovadora e preparada para o futuro.

Atuamos na fabricação de papel tissue, com forte presença nos segmentos professional e varejista. Ao longo da nossa trajetória, ampliamos nosso parque fabril, incorporamos tecnologia de ponta, conquistamos a certificação ISO 9001 e FSC e investimos de forma consistente em qualidade, eficiência operacional e inovação.

A partir de 2021, fortalecemos nossa governança e profissionalização da gestão, consolidando uma organização orientada por estratégia, dados e pessoas. Em 2024, revisamos nossos norteadores estratégicos, reforçando o papel da Gestão de Pessoas como pilar do crescimento sustentável.

Hoje, somos mais de 850 colaboradores unidos por um propósito claro:

Fazer do Papel a arte de Promover Saúde!

Nossa cultura é vivida por pessoas que fazem acontecer:
Gente Inovadora
Gente Proativa
Gente Sustentável 
Gente Inclusiva e 
Gente Íntegra.

Aqui, cada colaborador é guardião da cultura e protagonista do nosso futuro.

Seguimos construindo o futuro com responsabilidade, inovação e pessoas no centro da estratégia.

Name: Toba Pulp Lestari
Description: PT Toba Pulp Lestari Tbk adalah perusahaan global menghasilkan pulp; mendirikan , melaksanakan dan mengembangkan konsesi industri kehutanan dan industri lain untuk mendukung bahan baku untuk membangun dan pasar semua produk terdiri dari bahan bahan itu.

Name: Trombini Embalagens S.A.
Description:
Há mais de 60 anos no mercado brasileiro de papel e papelão ondulado.

 3ª maior produtora de embalagens de papelão ondulado do Brasil.

 Uma das maiores recicladoras do país, mais de 27 mil toneladas/mês.

 7 plantas industriais com tecnologia de ponta.

Name: Xanita
Description:
Xanita's proprietary manufacturing process converts recycled kraft paper fibre waste into high-strength, lightweight, non-toxic, low density fibreboard. 

Xanita board, in various structural, print-receptive and surface decorative finishes, is specified by designers and architects and increasingly used by sustainability-focussed exhibition and set-builders, industrial flatbed printers, retail display and exhibition booth manufacturers, hobbyists, joiners, furniture manufacturers, yacht builders, coffin manufacturers and shop fitters.

Name: Morcon Tissue
Description:
Morcon is a leading converter of napkin, towel, tissue and specialty products for the Away-From-Home market. For more than 30 years, Morcon has been providing quality products and top-tier support to customers in a wide-range of markets, including food service, commercial, porta-potty, industrial, healthcare, and more. As a family owned and operated business, we're a paper company you can trust.

Visit morcontissue.com or call 518-677-8511 to learn more about the exciting changes happening at Morcon!  

Company Culture

Morcon believes in first-class customer service. In order to achieve that, we want to encourage a culture where our employees are happy and successful. If we have happy and successful employees, we will have satisfied customers. Our core values, RESPECT, CREATIVITY and RESPONSIBILITY, help set the tone for our thriving employee environment. We are seeking employees who possess the following skills and characteristics:

- Team Player
- Manufacturing Background
- Dependable
- Adaptable
- Safety Focused
- Quality Focused
- Engaged

If you want to work for a company who genuinely cares about each employee, Morcon may be a fit for you!

Name: LC Paper Group
Description:
LC Paper is a catalan group specialised in tissue paper and kraft paper manufacturing. The main plant, located in the town of Besalu, features three machines: the MP3, a crescent-former tissue machine which produces 30.000tn/year at 2,76m of width; the MP2, a fourdrinier tissue machine with 3,05m of width and a production capacity of 40.000tn/year; and the MP4, a tissue converting machine. 

LC Paper has achieved the lowest levels of energy and water savings in the paper industry. A water consumption of 2.5 m3/t along with a power consumption of 1,350 kWh/t  led LC Paper to obtain the prestigious Pulp and Paper International Award in 2011. On the top of that, LC Paper has also developed an in-house tissue manufacturing process called OnePly. It is an eco-friendly, single-layer tissue product with fewer fibers, less energy & water consumption but the same absorption capacity than traditional tissue paper.

Besides our parent company, our group is also comprised by GironaPaper, a paper bags manufacturer based in the town of Sarrià de Ter; and Confirel, a company dedicated to the management of cogeneration power plants. Together, we are driven forward by a team of more than 140 individuals.

Name: Papelera Tucumán S.A.
Description:
Con una filosofía orientada hacia la innovación y la calidad del servicio al cliente, producimos papel para Argentina, Mercosur y el mundo.

Esto es posible gracias a nuestro potencial humano especializado, técnicos y profesionales que se perfeccionan día a día, a la inversión constante en tecnología de última generación para la planta productora y al compromiso asumido con el cuidado del medio ambiente, mediante la utilización de cartón reciclado uno de los principales recursos renovables.

Name: Archidply Industries Ltd.
Description: Archidply - one of the best manufacturers & suppliers of Plywood, laminate sheets, HPL cladding and more.

Name: Norra Skog
Description: Norra Skogsägarna är ett expanderande skogsföretag som ägs av 16 000 privata skogsägare i norra Sverige. Den skogliga organisationen omfattar åtta virkesområden, från Ångermanland i söder till Tornedalen i norr. Huvudkontoret ligger i Umeå. Koncernen omsätter cirka 1,8 miljarder kronor, driver fyra träförädlingsindustrier och har drygt 360 anställda. Den totala virkesfångsten uppgår till cirka 1,5 miljoner fastkubikmeter.

Name: Oğuz Ambalaj
Description:
Oğuz Oluklu Mukavva ve Ambalaj San. Tic. A.Ş. has been operating in the corrugated cardboard industry since 1982 and has demonstrated consistent growth at its modern production facilities in Esenyurt since 1993.

The facility spans 16,000 m², of which 11,000 m² is dedicated to enclosed production space, and has an annual production capacity of 55,000 tons. Our company maintains a continuous investment program in state-of-the-art machinery and technology to ensure efficiency, reliability, and competitiveness.

We hold internationally recognized certifications, including ISO 9001 Quality Management, ISO 14001 Environmental Management, OHSAS 18001 Occupational Health and Safety, and BRC Packaging, reflecting our commitment to Total Quality principles and sustainable growth.

Oğuz Oluklu Mukavva ve Ambalaj San. Tic. A.Ş.  1982 yılında başladığı oluklu mukavva üretim faaliyetlerine 1993 senesinden beri Esenyurt’taki modern üretim tesislerinde sürekli büyüyerek devam etmektedir. 

Firmamız müşteri memnuniyetine verdiği önem, çalışanına sağladığı eğitim, ürün kalitesinden ödün vermeksizin ulaştığı verimlilik ile TOPLAM BAŞARI ilkesini benimsemiştir. 

Tesisimiz 16.000 m2 arazi üzerinde kurulu 11.000 m2 kapalı alana sahiptir. Teknolojik gelişmeleri yakından takip ederek makine parkını sürekli genişletmekte ve yenilemekte olan firmamızın kurulu kapasitesi 55.000 ton/yıl’dır. 

Dinamik ve yenilikçi yönetim anlayışı, güvenilir ve itibarlı konumuyla oluklu mukavva ve kutu sektöründe önde gelen kuruluşlar arasında yer almaktadır.

Firmamız 2002 yılında aldığı ISO 9001 Kalite Sistem Belgesine,  ISO 14001 Çevre Yönetim Belgesi, Ohsas 18001 ISG Belgesi ve BRC Pack Belgesini ekleyerek Toplam Kalite olgusunu belgelendirmiştir.

Name: PRT Growing Services Ltd.
Description:
With over 50 years of experience and 6 billion seedlings grown, we provide the scale and expertise required to meet North America's most pressing reforestation needs. Since 1971, PRT has been at the forefront of reforestation, evolving from a visionary startup into the continent’s largest producer of forest seedlings.

Our Network & Scale: With a vast geographical reach stretching from the rugged landscapes of Northern Canada to the Southeastern United States, we operate the most robust reforestation network in North America:  27 Strategic Nurseries  14 State-of-the-Art Seed Orchards  3 Regional Hubs  1 Dedicated Seed Processing Facility

The PRT Difference: Our success is rooted in our people—a dedicated team of growers, scientists, and experts who bring our mission to life every day. By combining decades of expertise with advanced genetics and customized growing solutions, we help foresters and landowners maximize long-term yields and restore diverse ecosystems. Whether it is a small specialized order or a multi-million seedling contract, our regional experts ensure every seedling is conditioned for its specific destination.

Join us as we continue to lead the way in sustainable forestry, one seedling at a time.

#Reforestation #Sustainability #Forestry #PRTGrowingServices #Seedlings



Trusted to grow

Name: MIAC - Paper Industry Exhibition - Lucca/Italy
Description:
MIAC is a 3-day event which take place every October in Lucca (Italy). Machinery and plants for the production of Paper and Paperboard and for the converting of Tissue Paper. 

Visiting MIAC Exhibition means obtaining a full overview of the technology and equipment available to the paper industry sector (production of Paper and Paperboard and converting of Tissue Paper) thanks to the constant participation of the leading companies in the sector which present the latest developments in machines, systems and avant-garde solutions to improve the management of the various stages in the paper production cycle.

MIAC Exhibition is an international meeting point that allows you to compare the technologies and business proposals of 250 companies present at the Exhibitiom. Taking part in MIAC means being one of 6,000 Visitors from across the globe who meet in Lucca in October of each year

Name: Centre Technique du Papier
Description:
CTP is your French industrial partner (Pulp, Paper, Board, Printing, Processing and Packaging ) for Applied Research, Consultancy, Testing Laboratories and Training Courses… CTP is independent and impartial, with high level of Scientific Expertise in:
-	Lignocelluloses Plant Chemistry
-	Health and safety applications
-	Packaging of the Future
-	Printed electronics - Smart paper
-	New value for recovered Paper & Board
-	Water - Energy
-	Printed communication
-	Industrial performance

CTP helps innovative products & processes at lab, pilot and industrial scale; develops knowledge and makes you more competitive!

Name: Samling Group of Companies
Description:
Samling Group of Companies is a Malaysian conglomerate with diverse business interests from forest resource management to oil palm plantation, property development and automotive business in various countries globally. Established in 1963 and headquartered in Sarawak, we have more than 20,000 dedicated employees across our international footprint.

The Group’s core business is in the management of forest resource and manufacturing of wood products. Our integrated timber business covers the entire supply chain, from the management and harvesting of forest resources to transportation, processing, manufacturing and sales and distribution of wood products in different regions around the world. Other significant businesses within the Group include oil palm plantations and a notable property development project in Kuala Lumpur.

Up to early 2013, there were three public listed companies under the Group, namely Samling, Lingui Developments Berhad and Glenealy Plantations (Malaya) Berhad. Samling was listed in Hong Kong while Lingui Developments and Glenealy Plantations were listed on Bursa Malaysia. A privatization exercise was undertaken in 2012-2013 with the objective of achieving a more efficient and effective utilization of resources within the Group, and will allow for the introduction of a structure that will facilitate the future growth of our businesses in the long run.

Today, there are three flagship companies in the Samling Group – Samling Strategic Corporation Sdn Bhd (timber-based), Glenealy Plantations (Malaya) Berhad (oil palm based) and Perdana ParkCity Sdn Bhd (property development).

Backed by a strong track record, the Group is forging ahead, strengthening existing businesses while exploring new opportunities to enhance its sustainability.

Name: Santher - Fábrica de Papel Santa Therezinha S/A
Description: Santher - Fábrica de Papel Santa Therezinha S/A is a paper & forest products company based out of AVENIDA EUSEBIO MATOSO, 1375, 9 ANDAR, Sao Paulo, São Paulo, Brazil.

Name: ambar:
Description:
Ambar: A brand that stands for affirmation of values such as quality, innovation and design.
Interacting with their customers, in response to the daily needs of consumers looking to highlight the difference and the ability to reinvent every collection of products. 
Organized in three business areas - school, home and office.
Ambar is a 100% Portuguese company whose long experience in the processing of paper manufacturing allows a strong presence in all channels of national and international distribution, with special relevance in the Spanish market and several countries in Europe, Africa and Middle East.

Name: Grupo Rio Branco
Description:
A Brazilian company, founded in 1978, Rio Branco Papéis started its business in the market of paper ditribution to printing industry.

With 40 years in the market, Rio Branco Papéis has been building a successful history, expanding business with strenght and transparency. 

Troughout its course, the company created, consolidated and manager 5 strong brands, which are positioned in different Market segment, becoming a business conglomerate - Rio Branco Group.

Name: Tamilnadu Newsprint and PapersLimtied
Description: tamilnadu newsprint and papers limited

Name: Clampitt Paper Company
Description: Clampitt Paper Company is a privately held paper merchant that was founded in 1941 and is based out of Dallas, TX.  Clampitt Paper has nine locations total with offices in Austin, Ft. Worth, Houston, San Antonio, Oklahoma City, New Mexico and our newest location in Springfield, Mo.  You may also visit any of the 12 FasClampitt Paper stores throughout Texas. or our Paper Station store in Overland Park, Kansas. Be sure to visit our Creative Center and Sample Room located at the Dallas headquarters and find the paper that inspires you. In addition our large selection of paper products, we also offer education through our Paper School. Please visit www.clampitt.com for more information.

Name: Kronospan Luxembourg S.A.
Description:
Kronospan manufactures and distributes wood-based panels. Globally we are the leading manufacturer of:


Particleboard (PB)
Medium density fibreboard (MDF)
Laminate flooring
UF, MUF and MF resins for wood-based panels
The number one manufacturer of oriented strand board (OSB) in Europe

Kronospan also produces speciality and decorative paper as well as other associated value added products, such as melamine-faced panels, worktops, wall panels, window sills, lacquered HDF, compact boards, high pressure laminates (HPL) and others. Kronospan manufactures wood-based panels at more than 30 sites and is local in many countries. We employ over 11,000 people with 70% of total product sales generated in Emerging Markets.

Name: Cartones del Pacífico SAC
Description: Empresa Peruana en plena expansión, de primer nivel, en el rubro de la producción de embalajes y aditivos de cartón corrugado para agroindustria, alimenticia, agropecuaria, pesquera y otros tipos de industria.

Name: Euroforest Ltd
Description:
Euroforest is the leading provider of harvesting and marketing services to the UK forest industry.
 
Established in 1991 we have grown our company from modest beginnings to now handling over 2.1 million cubic metres of round timber. 

Our expanding client base consists of large and small woodland owners with our service tailored to suit your specific needs. 

Our customer base is nationwide and this combined with a network of experienced managers located throughout the UK means we are ideally placed to turn your trees into income.

Name: Precious Woods
Description: Precious Woods is a global leader in the certified and sustainable management of tropical forests.  We manage more than 1.1 million hectares of forest in accordance with strict international criteria, and we trade in a broad range of certified tropical timber products.

Name: INCAPE - Indústria Catarinense de Papéis Especiais
Description: A INCAPE é nacionalmente reconhecida no mercado de papéis especiais. Atuante a produção é voltada para fábricas tissue, convertedoras de papel higiênico e toalha. Nossos produtos variam de gramatura entre 135 g/m² a 400 g/m², tanto pardo como colorido, sempre se adaptando às necessidades dos clientes. Também desenvolvemos projetos especiais: Como papéis com impressão colorida, para empresas que queiram agregar mais valor ao seu produto final, entre outras soluções

Name: DECOR IN PRINTING Srl
Description:
Our target is to serve with highest quality of products and services the market of decorative papers, printed and impregnated for the furniture industry based on the long experience, more then fifty years, of the shareholders of the company.
We want to set new reference in terms of capability for innovation, flexibility, service and quality of the products.  
Long experience and high quality of our management staff, together with highest machinery technology, allow us to present ourselves in the market as qualified and reliable supplier. 

DIGIR&S digital lab:

This is our “creative center”, builded to follow new trends and to put in place all processes so that from an idea we can come to a printed roll of paper. Including DIGITALLY PRINTED PAPERS till width 2200 mm.
Digir&s department is fully available for our customers who want to develop and study new themes and decorative subjects; highly specialised staff and most advanced technologies allow to acquire directly from original surfaces and materials images, to modify depending on the result we want to achieve, to make separation and coloring in order to reach final engraving stage of rotogravure cylinders. 

Rotogravure Printing department:

Our rotogravure department, has been set in order to fully satisfy most strict technical parameters, both in terms of quality and quantity matched with maximum flexibility.
We are therefore capable to print till a maximum width of 2220 mm also in very small quantities thanks to very fast and efficient changing of machine set-up (cylinders/inks/pressure rollers).

Impregnation department:

Our new impregnation lines have been developed, based on our specific needs and experiences, from leader suppliers and operate with very high efficiencies and fully guarantee our customer about quality.
Most important international chemical companies supply raw materials with the lighest quality to enable us to guarantee to our customers reliable products.

Name: DELSCI GmbH
Description:
We’re a team of scientists and product developers with the crystal-clear mission to reinvent paper for sustainable food packaging solutions.

With state-of-the-art lab and pilot-production equipment we design smart paper that offers a realistic alternative to plastic. 

For sure our most powerful USP is our team spirit, which comes along with an agile and designthinking mindset. Being part of the big delfort family, a world leading group of paper production and converting mills, we openly collaborate with partners all along our value chain to give our paper superpowers!
  
Learn more about who we are and how our philosophy drives our mission.

contact@delsci.com

Name: Rottneros AB
Description:
Welcome to Rottneros! With over 100 years of experience in pulp production, Rottneros is today a globally leading player in selected niche markets. Our products are used in products where purity and high pulp quality are essential, such as insulation materials for electrical products, food packaging, air and liquid filters. Beyond pulp, we are driving innovation through advanced packaging solutions, primarily focusing on the fast-growing market for fibre-based food trays. 

As an employee at Rottneros, you have great opportunities to influence, grow, and contribute to a future-focused industry that makes a difference for both people and the planet. We continuously develop our offerings in line with market needs. In addition to the high quality of our products, we are appreciated for our technical expertise, flexibility, and innovation focus.

The Rottneros Group has an annual turnover of approximately SEK 2.8 billion and produces over 350,000 tonnes of pulp each year. 

Rottneros shares have been listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 1987 and are classified as a company share in the Basic Resources Mid Cap segment.

Name: Pudumjee Paper Products Ltd
Description:
We are a global specialty paper solutions provider with nearly 60 years of excellence in manufacturing customised specialty-grade papers tailored to meet our clients’ unique needs. With a ‘sell and make’ boutique approach, our mission is to become a world leader in eco-friendly, technologically advanced specialty papers. Our offerings comprise a diverse range of products including food packaging, decor grades, pharmaceutical-grade papers, supercalendered papers, crepe tissue, towels, and high-opacity low grammage printing papers.

As the world of packaging applications transforms rapidly, we bring a world of experience and knowledge in addressing complex needs with research-driven solutions. By focusing on our clients' diverse requirements, we enhance value for all our stakeholders, fostering brand strength and business sustainability.

Name: Indústria de Papelão Hörlle
Description:
Empresa Paranaense fundada inicialmente no ramo de madeiras em 1946, participando no mercado interno até 1970, quando houve a mudança de ramo para papel, atuando na área de Cartão Cinza e Cartão Marmorizado desde 1971, materiais usado como matéria prima por diversas indústrias brasileiras e estrangeiras.

Nossa empresa recebe como matéria prima aparas de papel (usado) e transforma em papelão da espécie cartão rígido, conhecido também como cartão pardo. Na produção não utilizamos produtos químicos que agridam o meio ambiente, e da mesma forma a água que captamos para produção, é tratada e reutilizada; dentro de um processo de depuração de resíduos, acompanhado por empresa especializada na área ambiental. Assim não há emissão de poluentes hídricos, garantindo a preservação do meio ambiente.

Name: OneFortyOne
Description:
OneFortyOne is a forestry and sawmill business. We operate throughout the Green Triangle region of Australia and the Nelson, Tasman and Marlborough regions of New Zealand (Top of the South).

We manage over 160,000 hectares of land including pine plantation and conservation areas, and plant over six million seedlings every year, renewably replacing the trees that we harvest. 

The timber processed at OneFortyOne Jubilee and Kaituna sawmills is turned into products that help people build and renovate their homes, construct fences on their farms, and support the landscaping in their gardens.

OneFortyOne acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of Country throughout Australia and their deep connections to land, water, and community. We pay our respect to Elders past and present and extend that respect to all First Nations people today.

Reconciliation is an ongoing journey for OneFortyOne and we recognise that meaningful change takes consistent effort. We are committed to strengthening our relationships with First Nations people and being guided by their knowledge of and connection to the land on which we live, work, and learn.
In Aotearoa New Zealand, Māori communities have a strong spiritual connection between people and the land – the wellbeing of one sustains the wellbeing of the other. 

We strive to build meaningful relationships with iwi as tangata whenua (people of the land/region), to be responsible intergenerational kaitiaki (stewards/guardians) of the land where our forests grow.

Name: Interpac, Egypt
Description: Interpac - A major part of MM Paper & Packaging Group, Egypt - A leading supplier of sustainable corrugated packaging papers and carton boxes in Egypt, Africa, the MENA Region..........and beyond

Name: The New Forests Company
Description:
The New Forests Company (NFC) is an African based responsibly managed forestry company with established, rapidly growing plantations in East Africa and timber processing assets which deliver a diversified product base for local and regional export markets. NFC strives to deliver both attractive returns to investors and significant social benefits to communities and environmental benefits in the geographies where we operate.

Look for our FSC certified products: FSC C001823 │ FSC C131488 │FSC C124444 │ FSC C162788

Name: Morcon Tissue
Description:
Morcon is a leading converter of napkin, towel, tissue and specialty products for the Away-From-Home market. For more than 30 years, Morcon has been providing quality products and top-tier support to customers in a wide-range of markets, including food service, commercial, porta-potty, industrial, healthcare, and more. As a family owned and operated business, we're a paper company you can trust.

Visit morcontissue.com or call 518-677-8511 to learn more about the exciting changes happening at Morcon!  

Company Culture

Morcon believes in first-class customer service. In order to achieve that, we want to encourage a culture where our employees are happy and successful. If we have happy and successful employees, we will have satisfied customers. Our core values, RESPECT, CREATIVITY and RESPONSIBILITY, help set the tone for our thriving employee environment. We are seeking employees who possess the following skills and characteristics:

- Team Player
- Manufacturing Background
- Dependable
- Adaptable
- Safety Focused
- Quality Focused
- Engaged

If you want to work for a company who genuinely cares about each employee, Morcon may be a fit for you!

Name: Orient Paper & Industries Limited
Description:
Incorporated in 1936, Orient Paper & Industries Ltd. is a multi-product company headquartered in Kolkata. Orient Paper & Industries produces a wide range of writing, printing, industrial and specialty papers, paper products and boards. It is the leading tissue paper manufacturer in India.

The company zealously monitors production for quality from raw material to delivery. It deploys advanced technology and high-speed paper machines at its fully integrated production facilities.

An eco-friendly enterprise, Orient Paper and Industries undertakes reforestation and other restorative measures. The manufacturing unit is ISO 14001 certified and has received several awards for environmental excellence. It is one of a select few to have received the ECO mark license from the Government of India. It is also certified for FSC-COC (Forest Stewardship Council Chain of Custody), denoting compliance with all norms related to raw materials in paper production. Orient paper and paper products are exported to countries across the world.

Name: Paper world Ltd.
Description:
‘Paper World Limited’ was formed as a ‘Private’ Company limited, under the Companies Act 1994 and after being incorporated, Paper world Limited commenced its commercial operation on 6th March 2012.

We took the first leading step towards our vision in 2001. Since then, our journey has come into a new shape by importing paper products – specially, serving top quality papers and commodity Paper. In the process, we have become the premier traders of fine paper and paper boards in Bangladesh.

With hard working and an uncompromising work ethics, we have established ‘’Paper world Limited’’ as one of the most trusted paper merchants in the country. We have built esteemed associations with internationally renowned mills like Cordenons, Italy; Hansol, Korea; TPG, China amongst many others. We have earned the reputation of being one of the largest commodity paper trading merchant in Bangladesh.

We exclusively deal with the Branded Fine Paper, Ivory boards, Kraft paper/ board, art paper/ board (gloss/matt), duplex board, security paper, cheque paper , fine paper, color paper / board, tracing/ translucent paper, embossed paper, grey board, laid papers, tags paper / board , poster paper, recycled coated paper & board, release papers, watermarked papers, thermal paper, test liner , handmade papers, inkjet papers ,photo paper, textured papers & boards & boards and packaging paper products etc .

Name: José Neves Group
Description:
Com experiência no mercado nacional e internacional desde 1983, a José Neves é líder de mercado na oferta de soluções de embalagem específicas para cada setor de atividade.
Trabalhamos diariamente para garantir a satisfação dos nossos Clientes, sendo precursores na busca ativa e contínua de respostas e modelos de negócio inovadores, estratégicos e alternativos que agreguem utilidade e valor acrescentado ao seu negócio.
Somos conhecidos no mercado pela qualidade e diferenciação dos nossos produtos e serviços, cada vez mais ancorados na personalização à medida, na sustentabilidade ambiental e inovação tecnológica.
Além dos diversos prémios e distinções que nos têm atribuído ao longo do nosso percurso no setor do papel e da embalagem, contamos com certificações no âmbito na qualidade, ambiente e gestão das florestas.
