We're certified by NP EN ISO 9001, NP EN ISO 14001, FSC  and PEFC .

Name: NCASI, Inc.
Description: The National Council for Air and Stream Improvement, Inc. (NCASI) is an independent, tax-exempt research institute that focuses on environmental topics of interest to the forest products industry. Established in 1943, NCASI is recognized as the leading source of reliable data on environmental and sustainability issues affecting this industry.

Name: Industrias del Papel SA
Description:
Somos parte de la unidad de negocio de papel de Grupo JLB, contamos con más de 60 años de experiencia en la fabricación de papel y el diseño de productos de papel a partir de fibra reciclada. Trabajamos dentro de una economía circular aprovechando todos nuestros recursos: reducimos - reutilizamos – reciclamos. 

Contamos con el equipo humano de mayor experiencia en el mercado y con un profundo conocimiento de la industria. 

Nuestra Planta Industrial de 42 mil metros cuadrados ubicada estratégicamente al este de Lima, nos permite fabricar hasta 35mil TM de papel anualmente, además de contar con una planta de tratamiento de aguas residuales y uso de gas natural como combustible con cero emisiones de carbono.

Name: Pölkky Oy
Description:
Member of the Pfeifer Group. 

The Austrian Pfeifer Holding GmbH was founded in 1948 and is now family-run in the third generation. It employs 2,600 people at thirteen locations in Austria, Germany, the Czech Republic and Finland. The company headquarter is located in Imst (Tyrol/Austria). 

In the fully integrated sawmills of the Group, around 5.4 million solid meters of wood are cut annually and processed along the entire value chain into sawn timber and planed goods, concrete formwork panels, formwork girders, cross laminated timber (CLT), glued laminated timber, glued solid wood panels as well as pallet blocks, briquettes, pellets and bio electricity. 

Imprint:
https://www.pfeifergroup.com/de/servicenavigation/impressum/

Privacy Policy:
https://www.pfeifergroup.com/de/servicenavigation/datenschutzerklaerung/

Name: Rotochopper, Inc.
Description:
We specialize in solutions that transform waste materials into valuable end products like colored landscape mulch, animal bedding, compost, and more. 

As a factory-direct company, we focus on customer success by combining the right industry knowledge, the right equipment, and the right customer support.

We launched the Rotochopper brand with a philosophy that waste materials are opportunities, along with a mission to create sustainable solutions for releasing their value.

Name: Trevo Bahia Florestal
Description: Pautada por um conjunto de princípios que visa à referência em inovações, padrões de operações, qualidade de atendimento, obtendo assim a satisfação plena dos nossos clientes. O nosso compromisso com a saúde e segurança está em primeiro lugar, bem como a preservação do meio ambiente.

Name: Picfare Industries Ltd
Description:
As Uganda’s leading stationery & printing company, Picfare Industries inspires trust through innovative oﬀerings, quality products at aﬀordable prices.

We serve more than 20 million students in Uganda and the region with quality exercise books and stationery and almost all the major Corporates and Government institutions with varied printing services.

We are on a rigorous development track - increasing our product range, by the day. We have ventured into the printing business - commercial and security - and have appeared as the ﬁrst government approved “Security Printing Company.

We have developed our own design studio with a highly qualiﬁed team. Today our products and services are not only available across the country but also in number of African countries.

To serve our growing clientele needs, we have acquired a state-of-the-art Flexo printing press which has expanded our printing capabilities to label printing

Our latest is the addition of Pic Hygiene to carter for hygienic requirements like Tissue products .

Name: TOREN PAPERS
Description:
Toren Papers | Recycled Kraft Paper Manufacturer (120–300 GSM | 18–28 BF)

Toren Papers is the renewed identity of Spento Papers, now exclusively focused on manufacturing high-performance recycled kraft paper. Based in Morbi, Gujarat, we are committed to delivering sustainable, reliable paper solutions tailored for today’s global packaging needs.

We specialize in kraft paper production with the following specifications:

 GSM Range: 120 to 300
 Burst Factor: 18 to 28
 Raw Material: 100% Recycled Fiber

Our kraft paper is ideal for:

Corrugated box manufacturing

Paper bags & envelopes

Protective wrapping

Liner & partition sheets

E-commerce & industrial packaging


With a fully integrated plant and export-ready infrastructure, we ensure consistent quality, calibrated GSM, and high BF strength across every batch.


Why Toren Papers?
 100% recycled kraft paper
 Stronger GSM-BF combinations
 Eco-conscious production practices
 On-time delivery & responsive service
 Trusted by domestic and international buyers

We’ve transitioned from coated duplex to kraft to support the shift toward eco-friendly, recyclable, and durable packaging materials. The same team, the same values — now with a sharper focus on sustainability and performance.


 Located in Morbi, Gujarat
 Marketing@torenpapers.com


Let’s build sustainable packaging solutions — together.

#TorenPapers #RecycledKraftPaper #KraftPaperManufacturer #PaperWithPurpose #SustainablePackaging #MadeInIndia #CorrugatedPackaging # #EcoFriendlyPaper #IndiaExports #B2BManufacturing

Name: PWT
Description:
At PWT, we believe in building something stronger—not just engineered wood products, but lasting partnerships that shape the future of construction. As an established leader in North America's engineered wood industry, we've built our reputation on innovation, sustainability and the unwavering belief that true partnership benefits both sides of a handshake.

From our headquarters in Burlington, Washington, to operations across the United States and Canada, we manufacture premium engineered wood products, including I-Joists, LVL beams and headers, LVL columns and treated LVL solutions. However, our real strength lies in how we partner with thousands of builders, manufacturers and industry professionals who trust us to deliver products that outperform.

Building Relationships That Last: We don't just make transactions—we forge partnerships. Every handshake represents our commitment to understanding your challenges, anticipating your needs, and working together to make the impossible a reality. When we build together, success goes further, faster.

Committed to Sustainable Stewardship: Innovation and environmental responsibility go hand in hand. We continuously push the boundaries of what's possible with engineered wood while maintaining our commitment to forest stewardship for generations to come.

Quality You Can Count On: Our products are third-party certified by APA–The Engineered Wood Association and evaluated for code compliance by the ICC Evaluation Service, ensuring every product meets the highest industry standards.

Ready to build something stronger together? Discover how PWT's partnership approach can elevate your business.

Connect with us: pwtewp.com

Name: Rama Paper Mills
Description: Established in 1985, Rama Paper Mills Limited is a forward-thinking industrial complex dedicated to manufacturing newsprints, duplex board, and writing/printing paper through the sustainable process of recycling waste paper. As a public limited company, our commitment to growth is reinforced by our own 6 MW biomass-based co-generation power plant, registered with UNFCCC for CERs benefits. At RPML, we foster a culture of dedication and learning, continuously offering diverse opportunities for our team's development.

Name: YFY Inc.
Description:
Founded in 1924, Taipei based YFY Group is one of the oldest and largest business groups in Greater China.  Centered around Taiwan listed holding company YFY Paper, the group controls over 100 subsidiaries in pulp and paper, printing, electronic components, financial service, bio-tech, and other industries.  Among others, YFY owns Greater China's No. 1 packaging company (YFY Packaging), Greater China's largest commerical printing group, Taiwan 4th private-sector financial service company (SinoPac Holdings), and the world-leading E-Paper dispaly manufacturer (Prime View Int'l).

永豐餘造紙横跨文化用紙、工紙紙器、家庭用紙三大事業領域，擁有上游（林業、紙漿）中游（造紙）下游（印刷、包裝、設計）完整產業鏈，貫徹林、漿、紙、設計、印刷垂直整合，發揮整合綜效，目前已為全球前50大造紙企業。

隨著大環境不斷演變，永豐餘步伐穩健，一路從造紙、科技、金融、生技、公益教育五大事業群發展，具備創新、突破、轉型，將持續以造紙為核心本業，各事業獨立專精，推升靈活經營，活化資產、資源的有效經營，樹立企業永續經營的典範。

員工就是家人

照顧員工是我們堅定的承諾，我們致力於營造如家般的溫暖與安定感受，員工的「安全」與「健康」是絕對的第一優先，同時堅守公司誠信經營的原則，希望讓員工和正直、穩健、永續的永豐餘一同成長。

Name: Valot SA
Description:
Fundada en 1965, con la invención de un novedoso portajabón "Practibón Valot", actualmente, somos líderes en la creación de soluciones a la problemática de la higiene y limpieza institucional.

Nuestro foco está en convertir todos los baños de uso común del país, en baños amigables, confortables y saludables.

Nos ocupamos de todo el proceso que comienza con la materia prima básica, pasando por la fabricación, comercialización y distribución, hasta el producto final en manos del usuario directo. Así, ofrecemos un servicio integral adaptado a las necesidades de cada negocio, lo cual nos permite tener presencia también, en el mercado internacional.

Más de 400 empleados estamos orgullosos de tener la oportunidad de desarrollarnos acompañando el crecimiento de la compañía. Si querés sumarte a nuestro staff mandanos tu cv a busqueda@valot.com.ar o ingresalo en http://goo.gl/XcmPa 

Para informes y ventas: (+5411) 4383-0041 ó 0800-88-VALOT(82568) de lunes a viernes, de 9 a 18h;  o manoslimpias@evalot.com.ar

Name: Temple-Inland
Description:
Temple-Inland is a low-cost, highly efficient manufacturing company focused on corrugated packaging and building products.

Our mission is to be the best by consistently exceeding customer expectations, maximizing asset utilization, lowering costs and improving efficiency.

Name: Rolland
Description:
De nos racines dans un petit moulin en 1882, Rolland est devenu un fournisseur international de papier durable. Aujourd'hui, cet engagement envers l'innovation significative se poursuit alors que Rolland opère désormais sous la marque unifiée Sustana. Découvrez comment nous continuons à offrir des solutions durables @Sustana, propres en la matière.

From our roots at a small mill in 1882, Rolland has grown into an international sustainable paper manufacturer. Today, this commitment to meaningful innovation continues as Rolland is now operating under a united Sustana brand. Discover how we continue to provide sustainable solutions through clean materials @Sustana.

Name: PT Surabaya Mekabox
Description:
Established in 1973, Surabaya Mekabox is a well-known paper packaging manufacturing company in Indonesia. We started the journey as a corrugated carton box manufacturer and in 1983, we had our first paper mill and became one of the integrated paper packaging companies in Indonesia.                   
Within 50 years of experience, we have been evolving and thriving to produce high-quality packaging paper and carton boxes.

Sustainability is our priority. Using post-consumer corrugated carton boxes, we recycle and produce medium and test liner paper. Years of experience dealing with recycled fiber makes our products an ideal choice where environmental considerations are priorities.

Name: Revita Ambiental
Description: A REVITA é uma indústria que, desde 2003, trabalha exclusivamente com  reciclagem de embalagens Longa Vida, com certificação FSC. A capacidade produtiva mensal é de 900 toneladas de fibra de celulose reciclada, que são utilizadas pelas indústrias de Papel e de Telhas de Fibrocimento. E 300 toneladas/mês de alumínio e plástico reciclados, que são utilizados na fabricação de Telhas e chapas Ecológicas. A Empresa recicla aproximadamente 39 milhões de embalagens Longa Vida mensalmente, apoiando a coleta seletiva e as cooperativas de reciclagem.

Name: Confor: Confederation of Forest Industries (UK)
Description: Confor is a membership organisation that promotes sustainable forestry and wood-using businesses. We represent the whole forestry and wood supply chain in the UK, focusing on the strategic issues that are vital to the success and sustainable future of the sector.

Name: America Chung Nam
Description:
Ever wondered where all that paper and plastic to be recycled goes? America Chung Nam is the world's largest exporter of recovered paper in the US and a leading exporter in Europe and Asia. The company exports recovered fiber sources to Chinese paper mills where they can be converted into fiberboard, cardboard, and packaging. It also collects and exports a number of grades of post-consumer plastics. The company sources its materials through exclusive relationships with recycling facilities, waste management companies, and distribution centers.

America Chung Nam engages in the export of recovered paper in America, Europe, Asia, and China. It provides kraft grades, de-ink grades, pulp substitutes, groundwood grades, polyethylene terephthalate, high density polyethylene, polypropylene, and low density polyethylene. Every year, we ship enough recovered paper to save:

-153 million trees
-27 million barrels of oil
-63 billion gallons of water
-18,500 acres of landfill

We have been consistently recognized as the top American exporter to China since 2001 for 18 years in a row. America Chung Nam was founded in 1990 and is based in City of Industry, California with additional offices in New Jersey, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Japan, South Korea, and China.

Name: Mosaic Forest Management
Description:
Mosaic Forest Management (Mosaic) is a timberlands management company. We are passionate about sustainable forestry and giving back to the communities where we live, work and play. 

Sustainability is at the heart of everything Mosaic does. Ensuring that forests are there for future generations is critical to the long-term health of our company and local communities. Every year, Mosaic plants over10 million healthy, naturally occurring seedlings. 

Mosaic is committed to being a leader in sustainable forest management. We were the first forest company in Canada to be certified by the globally recognized Sustainable Forestry Initiative. In 2023, the Canadian Council of Indigenous Business recognized Mosaic with the Progressive Accreditation in Indigenous Relations Gold certification, making it the first and only timberlands owner in Canada to achieve this standard of excellence.  

Mosaic's success is built on our company's exceptional team of professionals and talented contractor workforce. We were honoured to be recognized as one of BC's Top Employers in 2022, 2023 and 2024. 

To learn more, visit MosaicForests.com.

Name: Vandecasteele Houtimport
Description:
Vandecasteele Houtimport was founded in 1883. Its experience and dynamism have made it one of the leading timber companies in Belgium and Europe.

Extensive stocks are kept in 16 ha of undercover storage on a 60 ha site in Aalbeke.

The company is specialized in importing tropical hardwoods from Africa, South America and East Asia. Vandecasteele Houtimport also imports European softwoods and hardwoods, softwoods and temperate hardwoods from North America. Several species are available with FSC, PEFC, OLB, or Legal SourceTM. 

licence : FSC-C018601

Name: Ibersul Industria de Papel e Celulose Ltda.
Description:
Ibersul Industria de Papel e Celulose Ltda. 
Indústria do Setor de Papel e Celulose produzindo papéis Testliner, Capa reciclada, Miolo e WTL nas gramaturas de 100 a 220 g/m², a partir de fibras recicladas, para a fabricação de embalagens de papelão ondulado.
Localidade: Quedas do Iguaçú - Paraná

Name: Reflore-MS
Description:
A Reflore/MS é a Associação Sul-Mato-Grossense de Produtores e Consumidores de Florestas Plantadas que reúne importantes empresas da cadeia produtiva da floresta com sede ou filial em Mato Grosso do Sul.

Missão: Congregar, representar, promover e defender os interesses coletivos das Empresas Associadas que se dedicam ao Desenvolvimento Sustentável com base em Florestas Plantadas.

Name: A. W. Jenkinson Forest Products
Description:
A.W. Jenkinson Forest Products, founded in the 1960s by Allan Jenkinson in Cumbria, is a market leader. With our network of associated businesses, we handle more than 3.5 million tonnes of roundwood, chips, shavings, sawdust, bark, greenwaste and other timber co-products every year. We collect from forestry sites, sawmills and wood processing industries right across the UK and Ireland.  

A.W. Jenkinson’s services link the forestry, sawmilling, wood processing, building and demolition sectors with the pulp, paper and panel manufacture, horticulture, amenity and biomass markets. Our products can be found across a broad spectrum of applications, from zoos to farms, and from world-famous gardens to children’s playgrounds.  

We use every bit of a tree, from stemwood to branches and tops, and we operate whole tree recovery of valuable fibre from dead, dying and diseased trees. 

We are closely linked to and supported by A.W. Jenkinson Transport Limited, one of the UK’s largest providers of haulage, distribution and logistics services.

Name: Latvijas Finieris AS
Description:
Mūsu finieru un bērza saplākšņu rūpnīcas atrodas Latvijā, Lietuvā, Igaunijā un Somijā. Mēs esam pārliecināti, ka saplākšņa produkti ir un būs viens no labākajiem un ekonomiski izdevīgākajiem bērza koksnes izmantošanas veidiem rūpniecībā. Vienlaikus arī pārējiem bērza izcelsmes produktiem būs pieaugoša loma bioekonomikas attīstībā. 

„Latvijas Finieris” eksportē aptuveni 95% no saražotā bērza saplākšņa, kas nonāk pie industriālajiem klientiem 70 pasaules valstīs. Individuālu servisu nodrošina mūsu 12 “Riga Wood” produktu attīstības un tirdzniecības  uzņēmumi Eiropā un ārpus tās.
Bērza saplāksni izmanto dažādās jomās: celtniecībā – iekšējām un ārējām sienām, grīdām, sastatnēm, platformām, betonēšanas veidņiem; transporta industrijā – treileru, autobusu un mikroautobusu grīdām, treileru sienu un griestu apšuvumam; kuģu būvē u.c. 

Citi nozīmīgākie koncerna darbības veidi ir mežsaimniecība un mežizstrāde, ķīmiskā rūpniecība, kā arī mašīnbūve un metālapstrāde. Kopumā koncerna “Latvijas Finieris” uzņēmumi dod darbu 2450 cilvēkiem.

Mēs esam daļa no Ziemeļeiropas reģiona – globālā līdera ilgtspējas jautājumos. “Latvijas Finiera” misija ir veidot ilgtermiņa attiecības ar produkcijas pircējiem, meža īpašniekiem, sadarbības partneriem, uzņēmumā strādājošajiem un citām iesaistītajām pusēm – atbildīgi strādāt, atbildīgi pelnīt un atbildīgi ieguldīt nopelnīto.

Name: Biond - Forest Fibers from Portugal
Papier- und Kartonfabrik Varel
Description: Die Papier- u. Kartonfabrik Varel ist ein mittelständisches Familienunternehmen mit ca. 500 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern. Wir produzieren auf Altpapierbasis mit modernsten umweltfreundlichen Technologien Karton und Wellpappenpapiere für die deutsche und internationale Verpackungsindustrie. Sie sind das Herz der Verpackungslösungen vieler bekannter Produkte.

Name: Essentials : impression et fabrication de vos jeux 100% Français
Description:
Ecoessentials est un fabricant français spécialisé dans la conception, la fabrication et l’impression de jeux de société, jeux pédagogiques, jeux de plateaux et jeux de cartes.
Nous produisons en France des cartes à jouer, plateaux, boîtes, coffrets, mallettes et accessoires 100 % personnalisés pour les entreprises, collectivités, associations, auteurs et éditeurs de jeux.
Notre production 100 % Made in France garantit des jeux durables, responsables et conformes aux normes EN71.
Ecoessentials accompagne ses clients de A à Z : conception, mécanique de jeu, choix des matières, prototypage, fabrication, impression, assemblage, stockage et expédition.
 Expertise matières et éco-conception
Spécialisés dans les matières biosourcées, l’éco-conception et les procédés responsables, nous intégrons une approche éthique, RSE et territoriale dans chaque projet.
 Fabrication de prototypes et production en petites, moyennes et grandes séries
Que ce soit pour un prototype unique ou une production à grande échelle, Ecoessentials garantit un accompagnement complet et une qualité irréprochable.
 Accompagnement sur les normes jeux enfants (EN71)
Nous guidons nos clients dans la conformité et la sécurité de leurs jeux.
 Services complets
Stockage, assemblage, logistique, expédition.
Ecoessentials est un fabricant et imprimeur 100 % français, engagé dans une démarche éthique, circulaire, inclusive et responsable.
Notre objectif : faire de votre projet un succès à 100 %.
 Spécialisations
Boîtes, coffrets, cartes, plateaux, pions, punchboards, supports ludiques sur mesure.
 Clients
Entreprises, collectivités, écoles, associations, éditeurs, auteurs.
 Fabrication locale – Haute qualité – Accompagnement complet
 Contact : joeffrey@ecoessentials.fr

Name: BC Council of Forest Industries
Description:
The BC Council of Forest Industries (COFI) represents the majority of lumber, pulp and paper, and manufactured wood producers across the province – an industry that remains a cornerstone of the economy, supporting good jobs and a better quality of life for British Columbians.
 
COFI advocates for the interests of its members and works with government, First Nations, communities, labour and other partners to promote a healthy, diversified and sustainable forest industry that benefits people and families across BC.
 
As BC’s forest industry continues to adapt and evolve, our vision is to be a globally competitive forest sector that continues to deliver low-carbon products that are good for the planet and is a model for the world in environmental care, product innovation and technological advances.
 
To achieve this vision, we recognize our environmental, social, governance and economic performance must reflect the evolving priorities of our communities of interests, including employees, communities, Indigenous Peoples, supply chain partners, customers, shareholders, investors and governments.
 
Guiding us in the work we do each day is our Statement of Sustainability Commitments and Statement on Reconciliation.

Name: Sihl Group
Description:
What defines us

Sihl is a strong partner for future-orientated industries and creates innovative solutions with its premium coatings.

With more than 400 employees in the Sihl Group, we contribute to the success of our customers from a wide range of industries in almost every country in the world. From automotive and tourism, from packaging and labels through to printing and logistics, customers trust our premium coatings and technological expertise. As a specialist for future-proof products, Sihl lays the foundations for innovative trends and promotes sustainable results. In short, Sihl is simply the better solution!

Find out more and visit us at http://www.sihl.com

 https://sihl.com/en/privacy-policy-social-media/

Name: CORDOVA PUBLICATIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: CORDOVA PUBLICATIONS PRIVATE LIMITED is a paper & forest products company based out of B-13 GROUND FLOORNIZAMUDDIN WEST NEW, DELHI, Delhi, India.

Name: heinzelpaper
Description:
Heinzelpaper is a leading company in the Austrian paper industry. Know-how, commitment, customer orientation and the quality and environmental awareness of our employees are the pillars of our success.

The history of paper production in Laakirchen goes back to the middle of the 19th century. Founded in 1867 and 1868, the paper mills in Laakirchen and Steyrermühl have developed from a small papermaker on the Traun river to an internationally successful paper producer and an important employer in the region. The Steyrermühl sawmill has been in existence for over 30 years and supplies customers in Europe, Asia and North Africa with sawn timber.
 
In Laakirchen, we produce high-quality and environmentally friendly corrugated base paper for stable packaging solutions - all in a sustainable and resource-saving manner. In Steyrermühl, we produce sawn timber products in our sawmill and, from mid-2024, high-quality kraft paper for bags and shoppers.

Our daily focus is on the highest product quality, perfect runability and personal service for our customers.
 
We actively contribute to creating a circular economy by protecting valuable resources and making recycling an integral part of our business.

Link to Imprint: https://heinzelpaper.com/en/imprint-legal-notice/
Link to Heinzel Group: https://www.heinzel.com/en/

Name: Saica Pack Türkiye
Description:
1943 yılında İspanya Zaragoza'da kurulan Saica Grup bünyesinde bulunan Saica Pack, Türkiye'de 3 lokasyonda faaliyet göstermektedir. 

Saica Pack Türkiye, İstanbul merkez ofisi, Eskişehir ve Sakarya’da yıllık toplam 250 milyon metrekarelik üretim kapasitesine sahip üretim tesisleriyle son 3 yıl içerisinde 80 milyon TL’lik yatırım gerçekleştirmiştir.

Müşterilerinin her bir değer zinciri aşamasında yaşadığı sorunlara yönelik kişiselleştirilmiş çözümler sunan Saica Pack Türkiye, bünyesinde Offset / High Quality Printing ve Flexo baskı çeşitlerini barındırmakta olup; yoğunlukla tüm gıda çeşitleri, içecek grupları, hazır gıda, hızlı tüketim grubu (FMCG), yaş sebze meyve, temizlik ürünleri, otomotiv ve diğer endüstri kollarına hizmet vermektedir.

Name: West Coast Paper Mills Ltd (WCPM)
Description: West Coast Paper Mills Ltd (WCPM) is a paper and forest products company based out of Chandra Kiran 4th Floor, 10/A Kasturba Road, Bangalore, 560 001, India, dandeli, karnataka, India.

Name: COPAMEX
Description: Copamex, líder en la fabricación de papeles kraft, especiales y escritura e impresión con presencia nacional e internacionalmente. Con ingresos de $500 millones de dlls en el 2018.  Y el único grupo papelero de capital privado con un centro de innovación y una máquina piloto de papel a nivel América continental. Con una ventaja competitiva por integración a SIR y un portafolio diversificado que nos permite diferenciarnos por nuestro compromiso en desarrollar soluciones para los clientes.
Location: San Nicolás de los Garza, Nuevo León

Name: ONDUPACK
Description:
ONDUPACK S.A.U. (perteneciente a CL Grupo Industrial) nació en 1996 y actualmente tiene una de las mayores fábricas de envases y embalajes de cartón ondulado de España (situada en Almendralejo, Badajoz), con una larga trayectoria y experiencia profesional en el sector.

El equipo humano de ONDUPACK posee las cualidades y las virtudes profesionales de los equipos jóvenes, pero con la mayor experiencia y la formación más cualificada, centrando sus esfuerzos en los objetivos prioritarios de la empresa: el éxito comercial y la plena satisfacción de los clientes.

Desde sus inicios, ONDUPACK fundamenta su filosofía empresarial en ofrecer el mejor servicio y la máxima calidad a todos sus clientes, respaldado además con un precio altamente competitivo.

En base a esta filosofía, ONDUPACK creó su marca FreePack 20, que trata de recoger y transmitir su compromiso total con el desarrollo técnico de cajas específicas para el sector agrícola.

Name: Lemit Papers LLP
Description: Lemit Papers LLP is one of the biggest player in duplex board paper industry in India with Production capacity of 400 mts/day. We have one of finest technology/machines from KADANT LAMORT, USA and CELLWOOD, SWEDEN. Our product line includes HWC, LWC, coated and uncoated duplex board in various thickness.

Name: Ilim Group
Description:
Ilim Group is Russia’s largest pulp and paper company. Its production and forestry assets are located in Koryazhma (Arkhangelsk Region), Bratsk, and Ust Ilimsk (Irkutsk Region), Leningrad and Moscow Regions. The Company’s total annual pulp and paper output is about 3 million tonnes.

Under the Company’s current development strategy and business plan, over the next five years Ilim Group will increase its production volume by over 500,000 tonnes per year.

The strategic partner of Ilim Group and the owner of 50% of its shares is International Paper, the world’s largest pulp and paper company. Ilim Group is headquartered in St. Petersburg.

Name: AV Group NB
Description: Our Mission : To be the global leader in dissolving grade pulp production by adhering to the highest standards of safety, quality, and responsible sustainability.

Name: PAGED Plywood S.A.
Description:
With almost a century of experience, Paged is a renowned plywood manufacturer with its own research and development centre, Paged LabTech. We supply our products to many locations in Europe and around the world, offering raw, film-faced, fireproof, waterproof, ultra-thin, reinforced, flexible and specialised plywood. We produce them from certified hardwoods (birch, alder, beech) and softwoods (pine), ensuring their wide range of applications in construction, transport, rail, boatbuilding, furniture, packaging and events. Our products are used, among others, for flooring, doors, platforms for car trailers, walls, boats, exhibition stands, roofs, packaging, lamps, toys, shuttering and scaffolding platforms and events. 
The Paged Group consists of Paged Morąg, Paged Eesti, Paged Trade, Paged Meble, Paged LabTech, Paged Deutschland, BUK Ltd. and is part of the Thumos Group - a private Polish industrial and investment consortium.

Name: Hahnemühle FineArt - Paper 'Made in Germany' since 1584
Description:
Hahnemühle FineArt has been producing artist paper since 1584, thus being one of Germany’s oldest paper manufacturers. In addition to the manufactoring of traditional artist papers, Hahnemühle today focuses on producing refined papers for digital print. The company invented the digital Fine Art Paper made of geniune artist paper with the finest inkjet coating, haptical surfaces, structures and highest longivity in the industry. A growing part of business is the development and production of technical specialty papers and filtration papers for industry and research. The company based in Dassel, Southern Lower Saxony, has some 150 employees worldwide.
Subsidiaries are located in the US, UK, France, Spain and China.

For Hahnemühle Traditional FineArt Papers please visit: http://www.hahnemuehle.com/site/en/194/traditional-fineart.html

Hahnemühle´s Digital FineArt Collection is introduced here: http://www.hahnemuehle.com/site/en/210/digital-fineart.html

Papers and paperproducts for filtration and technical applications are online here: http://www.hahnemuehle.com/site/en/227/filtration-technical-applications.html

Company Chanel on YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IYyTnCTsRfk

Hahnemühle_DE on Twitter: http://twitter.com/#!/Hahnemuehle_DE

Hahnemühle Fanpage on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/hahnemuehle

Our newsletter for Traditional or Digital users: http://www.hahnemuehle.com/site/en/782/newsletter.html

Name: OJI HOLDINGS CORPORATION
Description:
Oji Holdings Corporation (王子ホールディングス株式会社 ) is a Japanese pulp and paper company. The company has 156 subsidiaries worldwide, and was ranked the third such largest company in the world in 2012. 
It has approximately 27,360 employees and is headquartered in Ginza Tokyo, Japan. 

Oji Holdings Corporation is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is a constituent of the Nikkei 225 stock index. The company has 86 production sites throughout Japan, and forestry operations in Australia, Brazil, Canada, China, Germany, New Zealand, and other countries worldwide.

Name: Flexcoat Produtos Autoadesivos S.A.
Description: Lamination of self-pressure sensitive papers and flexible films.

Name: BiOrigin Specialty Products
Description: BSP is transforming the world with paper. For 100 years we've been manufacturing specialty paper and tissue products for a number of markets. From food service to the medical field to the industrial playground, we provide sustainable solutions for niche applications. Our network of 6 paper mills in the US and Canada host smaller machines and a team of master papermakers ready to take on any unique project you throw at us, and much more quickly than traditional manufacturers. Visit our website to learn more about how we're making a difference with paper.

Name: GPA
Description:
GPA expands brand potential, providing substrates to help our partners and clients innovate and shape the printing industry. Collaborations with strategic partners, creatives and printers help facilitate ideas through our substrates. Our Global Fedrigoni Network team manufactures and distributes an unparalleled range of products in support of Digital, Offset and Flexo press technologies.

Brand Beliefs: Passion. Care. Reliable. Innovation. Experts.

Name: Novakraft
Description: A Novakraft foi a primeira recicladora da América Latina a produzir papel com qualidade e em larga escala a partir de embalagens longa vida pós consumo, desafio reconhecido mundialmente. Desde a fundação, em 2004, a empresa Novakraft vem disputando mercado com grandes empresas nacionais, com o diferencial de oferecer “soluções ambientais em papéis”, com um produto de qualidade produzido com aparas 100% certificadas. Com soluções inovadoras, trazemos de volta ao ciclo produtivo materiais que seriam descartados pela sociedade, como lixo urbano e industrial, solucionando problemas ambientais importantes e gerando sustentabilidade econômica. Estamos localizados na cidade de Potim - SP.

Description:
Fabricant français de fournitures scolaires, de bureau et artistiques.

Name: Aktül Kağıt
Description:
Aktül Kağıt, Türkiye pazarında ilk defa kullanılan "ViscoNipTeknolojisi" ile Eylül 2011'de %100 saf selülozdan temizlik kağıdı üretimine başlamıştır.
Aktül Kağıt, Pamukova/Sakarya'da 200.000 m² lik alan üzerine kurulu Kağıt Üretim ve Konverting tesislerinde faaliyet göstermektedir. Yıllık kağıt üretim kapasitesi 140.000 ton, Konverting üretim kapasitesi ise 120.000 tondur.
Yatırımlarında en yüksek teknolojiyi modern üretim ve yönetim sistemleri ile entegre eden Aktül Kağıt, zincir marketler için market markalı ürün (Private Label) üretimi yapmaktadır. Ayrıca yurt içi ve yurt dışı konverting tesisleri için tercih edilen, kaliteli yarı ürün tedarikçisidir.

Name: UPM Timber
Description:
UPM Timber is a significant Nordic sawn timber producer. We have four sawmills in Finland, and they produce 1.4 million cubic meters of redwood and whitewood sawn timber annually. 

We are committed to sustainability and all our sawmills run on 100% fossil-free energy. Customers worldwide within various industries trust in our professional service and stable quality. We use certified Finnish wood raw material and latest sawmilling techniques to produce high quality products to fulfil your requirements.

With our competitive and efficient sawmills as well as our skilled global sales and logistics network we supply you with the right sawn timber at the right time.

Name: Tradecom and Unisource
Description:
About Tradecom:
Tradecom was founded in 1988 with a singular vision in mind – to help our planet recover by pioneering the recovered and recycled paper industry in India. Mr. Aurora set about working towards his goal by bringing the best recycled and recovered papers as well as wood pulp from across the world to India.

With our unique combination of dedication, discipline, and drive, we’ve grown from strength to strength globally and are now one of the leading names in the industry.

In 2004, we expanded our operations by opening an office in Delhi dedicated to supplying wood pulp to various paper mills across India.

At Tradecom, we’ve perfected the perfect complement of services that offer our customers a range of unique advantages that has made us one of the most trusted partners for fibre sourcing needs in India.

We take as much pride in our products as we take in our personnel, which shows in a wide range of recovered papers and wood pulps that reflect our commitment to the environment.

About Unisource: 
Unisource is where you turn a new page and meet a team of committed individuals who have evolved beyond mere indenting and offer customised, current solutions to the Indian packaging industry.

Founded in 2007, we trade in the best quality of papers and paperboards manufactured by global and domestic majors, customise them via state-of- the-art equipment at our facilities in western and northern India, and finish them with our trademark after sales service.

Unisource Papers was set up by the vision of Inder Aurora, who then handpicked a team of the best minds to help turn his dream into a reality. Today, he is joined at the helm by his daughter Garima, who will ensure that the company adheres to the values and principles it was founded on.

For more details: https://unipaper.in/

Name: Two Sides North America
Description: Two Sides is a global non-profit organization dedicated to promoting the uniquely sustainable qualities of print and paper products and to dispelling common environmental misconceptions about the production and use of paper in its many forms.

Name: Howe Sound Pulp and Paper Corporation
Description:
Howe Sound Pulp and Paper Corporation is one of the most progressive Kraft & Pulp manufacturers in the world, leading the industry in product quality, efficiency and environmental protection. Based in Port Mellon on the BC’s beautiful Sunshine Coast, Howe Sound Pulp and Paper is an industry leader in product quality, efficiency and environmental protection.

Howe Sound is one of seven mills in Canada owned by the Paper Excellence Group (www.paperexcellence.com), Canada’s largest producer of pulp by tonnage. Since 2010, Paper Excellence has grown from a single mill to a multinational company producing 2.5 million tonnes of paper and pulp with over 2,500 employees.

Name: WEIG-Gruppe
Description:
WEIG, a renowned family-owned business group in the international paper and cardboard industry, employs 1,900 people across locations in Europe and South America. With a turnover of 730 million euros, their portfolio encompasses a closed value chain, starting from waste paper recycling to the production and marketing of paper and cardboard, as well as cardboard products like folding cartons and plasterboard. Their business model is founded on an efficient circular system and a clear commitment to sustainability and resource conservation. Through direct customer contact, WEIG continuously develops its products to meet the expectations of their respective customer groups.

DE:
WEIG, eine anerkannte, inhabergeführte Unternehmensgruppe in der internationalen Papier- und Kartonindustrie, beschäftigt 1.900 Mitarbeiter an Standorten in Europa und Südamerika. Mit einem Umsatz von 730 Millionen Euro umfasst ihr Portfolio einen geschlossenen Wertschöpfungskreislauf, beginnend beim Altpapier-Recycling bis zur Herstellung und Vermarktung von Papier- und Karton und Kartonprodukten wie Faltschachteln und Gipskarton. Ihr Geschäftsmodell basiert auf einem effizienten Kreislaufsystem und einem klaren Engagement für Nachhaltigkeit und Ressourcenschonung. Durch direkten Kundenkontakt entwickelt WEIG seine Produkte gemäß den Erwartungen der jeweiligen Kundengruppen stetig weiter.

Name: Crown Van Gelder International B.V.
Description:
Crown Van Gelder is a versatile medium-sized paper mill, based in The Netherlands. We make specialty paper for graphical and industrial applications. Our wood-free uncoated and single coated papers are performing daily at customers around the world. Our papers enable optimal performance in different applications. We deliver high-speed inkjet paper for transactional, publishing and promotional print as well as paper for self-adhesive labelling and specific uses in packaging and technical applications. 

For over 120 years, we deliver outstanding paper and focus on value creation and partnership. Although much has changed in over a hundred years, other things remain the same. We will continue to be ambitious and maintain our responsible attitude towards market, customers and surrounding communities.

Name: PaperShell
Description:
100% biogenic and fossil carbon free — carbon negative if circulated. Inspired by nature’s 3.8 billion years of R&D, we rebuild paper into load bearing wood ”sheet metal”:
stronger than plastics, as versatile as fiber composites, and lighter than aluminium.

Designed for material substitution — from flat 2D to medium complex 3D components. Aiming for circular bio economy — from forest to forest. Helping out customers to achieve >90% CO2e reduction in new or existing products. 

At PaperShell, sustainability = resilience and science = democracy. We merge design, science, and automation to industrialise bio-intelligent materials together with Fortune 500 companies and avant-garde brands.

Not another panel talk or sustainability theatre — real industrial action. Where science meets art and finance supports nature - People, Planet, Profit, Pleasure!

Name: PMT Condition Monitoring
Description: We are condition monitoring experts. We provide bespoke services to all our customers in Paper and Tissue and a variety of industries including power generation, food and beverage, packaging and timber. Vibration analysis and special investigations into machine problems is our passion and specialty.

Name: Africaine Paper Mills (APM)
Description:
Welcome to Africaine Paper Mills,,,

We are one of the leaders manufacturers of tissue paper jumbo rolls in MENA region.

APM has a production  capacity of 35,000 tons of tissue paper annually.

Our ANDRITZ Prime line compact with shoe press produces premium quality tissue in various grades with high Softness, Bulk and Absorbency.

Name: Kadant Black Clawson LLC
Description:
Kadant Black Clawson develops and manufactures custom-engineered systems and equipment, as well as standard individual components for pulping, de-inking, screening, cleaning, and refining primarily recycled fiber for production of virgin pulp for entry into the paper machine. 

Kadant Black Clawson LLC is part of Kadant Inc. (Westford, MA, USA). To see what's new, go to http://www.linkedin.com/company/kadant-inc

Established in 2008, our objective is to build a premier, next-generation forest company that is a world leader in responsibly maximizing fiber value.

Corporate Office: Vancouver, BC
Operation: Mackenzie, BC
Regional Office: Prince George, BC

Name: ITC Limited, Now part of Elders
Description:
ITC Limited has a proud history of sustaiable commercial plantation forestry in Australia with circa 175,000 hectares of diverse plantations under management.

ITC became a wholly owned subsidiary of Elders in 2006 and has been renamed as Elders Forestry Limited

For more information regarding ITC Limited  / Elders Forestry please refer to 

www.itclimited.com.au or www.eldersforestry.com.au

Name: PotlatchDeltic Corporation
Description: PotlatchDeltic is a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) that owns nearly 2.2 million acres of timberland in Alabama, Arkansas, Georgia, Idaho, Louisiana, Mississippi, and South Carolina. Through its taxable REIT subsidiary, the company also operates six sawmills, an industrial-grade plywood mill, a residential and commercial real estate development business and a rural timberland sales program. PotlatchDeltic, a leader in sustainable forest practices, is committed to environmental and social responsibility and to responsible governance.

Name: Stimson Lumber Company
Description:
Like generations before us, we are committed to growing trees and operating mills to create value for Stimson and the communities in which we operate.

Stimson has been in business since the 1850’s and is one of the largest privately family owned forest products companies in the United States.  We own 500,000 plus acres of forest land in the Western United States.  Stimson has over 700 employees and several locations in Idaho, Oregon, Washington and Montana.

Name: Jodhani Papers Private Limited
Description:
“Quality means doing it right when no one is looking.”

Jodhani Group was founded as a paper trading company by Late Mr. GD Ji Jodhani in 1972. The group ventured into food processing in 1998 and since 2003, the group started paper manufacturing in Bangalore. Since then, the group has also invested in Wind Power, Coal, iron-ore and oil trading.

In 2021, the group has come up with one of the most technically advanced and fastest & largest kraft paper making units in the country, with a capacity of 500 tons per day. This unit has expertise in manufacturing brown packaging paper for corrugation and paperbags. the GSM range between 60-180 GSM.


Our Group envisages providing solutions that help our customers to facilitate maximum benefits from our products. Our vision to offer paper for corrugation at ultra-high strength and lower GSM ensures a superior strength-to-weight ratio. This allows our customers to manufacture more corrugated boxes at less weight, thereby enabling them to produce premium quality boxes at the most reasonable rates.

Another key USPs is that we guarantee our paper to be odorless on both sides. We are one of the few manufacturers in this industry who can give this assurance. We are confident that these features will enhance your customer satisfaction score and improve the perceived value of your brand.

We are known for the detail-oriented approach, and the exceptional client care each customer gets. We have a Machine width of 5200 -5300 mm and manufacture paper in natural shade and GYT shade. Some of the key attributes that our paper provides are:

We are a sustainable and environmentally friendly enterprise who invite you to be a part of this circular economy. Our company has certification for ISO 9001-2015, FSC, ROHS and FDA certified.

Name: Papelera Reyes S.A.C.
Description:
PAPELERA REYES S.A.C. es una empresa que desde sus inicios se ha dedicado a la Fabricación de Papel Higiénico, Servilletas y Afines. Para ello cuenta con una planta ubicada en la Av. Néstor Gambeta 6693 en el distrito del Callao.

Los límites son: Hacia el norte y el sur con diversas industrias colindantes a la Av. Néstor Gambeta; hacia el este con el asentamiento humano Piedra Liza y el cerro La Regla; y al oeste con el Océano Pacífico a unos 800 m.

Las maquinarias, equipos e instalaciones del campo fabril de nuestra empresa se han ido renovando acorde con las actuales exigencias del mercado, pues hoy en día el mercado exige mejoras de calidad sin elevar costos.

Sobre una extensión de 12,000 metros cuadrados aproximados de área construida se levantan nuestras instalaciones.

Hemos estructurado y desarrollado diversos proyectos en nuestra planta de papel higiénico tissue, que han concluido en la realización de importaciones de nuevos equipamientos y maquinarias para nuestra planta de fabricación de papel con el objeto de elevar los volúmenes de producción; además, está en ejecución el proyecto de ampliación de nuestra planta de preparación de pasta para garantizar un abastecimiento adecuado a las máquinas papeleras con masa de mejor calidad y costos competitivos.

Asimismo, en nuestra Planta de Conversión nos encontramos ejecutando proyectos de ampliación de capacidad instalada con el fin de incrementar nuestro portafolio de productos y mejorar nuestros indicadores de rentabilidad haciendo uso de tecnología de punta.

PAPELERA REYES S.A.C. es una empresa comprometida con el cuidado de nuestro planeta. Utilizando empaques de plásticos Biodegradables, contribuyendo en la preservación del Medio Ambiente al no emplear plásticos convencionales que tardan 400 años en degradarse. Siendo la única marca de papel higiénico en el Perú en utilizar la tecnología de plásticos de vida útil controlada, generando menos contaminación en nuestro planeta.

Name: Cartones del Caribe, S. A. S.
Description: Desde 1995, tus aliados en soluciones de cartón corrugado para tus empaques, bajo estándares de calidad internacional y valores de protección medio ambientales.

Name: Flora Tissues
Description:
Pee Bee Management Services (Private) Limited, founded in 1979, has established itself as a premier provider of soft disposable tissue paper products in Sri Lanka. The company's flagship brand, Flora Tissues, commands an impressive 60% market share and offers a diverse range of hygienic soft tissue products, including toilet tissues, facial tissues, paper serviettes and hand towels. The brand's principal strength lies in delivering consistently high-quality products that foster strong customer loyalty and effectively meet consumers' needs.

The company initially operated from rented factory premises in Ratmalana but expanded to its own facilities in the Katuwana Industrial Zone in Homagama in 1985. This expansion allowed for the establishment of robust infrastructure encompassing Production, Storage, and Distribution capabilities. Our organization is backed by a dedicated Top Management that drives our vision and mission, and we currently employ over 300 individuals. Measuring brand performance is a fundamental aspect of our management policy. We have a committed team focused on new product development, which is crucial to our ongoing success. 

Flora Tissues has been acknowledged by the Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) for its exemplary quality and standardization across a range of products, including Toilet Paper, Facial Tissues, Paper Hand Towels, and Paper Serviettes. The company has garnered numerous certifications and accolades, such as the SLS product certifications, the “SUPERBRAND” Certification, the APEA Award, and recognition as a Top SME in Asia. Additionally, Flora Tissues was honored with the titles of Asia’s Greatest Brands and Leaders 2017, Asia’s Best Performing Companies 2024 at the Asia Corporate Excellence and Sustainability Awards, and Best Hygienic Disposables Brand of the Year 2024 at the Pinnacle Awards, MUGP International.

Name: BN Papéis
Description:
Fundada em 2001, a BN Papéis está localizada no município de Benedito Novo (SC) e atua na fabricação e comercialização de papéis especiais para aplicações em empresas de diferentes segmentos, tendo a preocupação de levar a todos os seus clientes o melhor em seus produtos e serviços.

Idealizada de maneira ecológica, a empresa mantém seus valores socioambientais e segue desenvolvendo projetos e alternativas sustentáveis em sua atuação.  Após ganhar por 5 anos consecutivos o prêmio Great Place To Work em Santa Catarina, a BN Papéis foi reconhecida em 2017 como uma das melhores empresas para se trabalhar no Brasil.

Name: SOFi Products
Description:
For a long time, making environmentally aware purchases meant spending a bonkers amount of money or settling for painfully substandard products. 

This model of sustainability... wasn’t sustainable. 

At SOFi Products, we believe protecting the planet should be straightforward, safe, and simple.

All of our products are made with real paper and without buzzwords.

They’re the type of compostable that doesn’t require a special separate facility.

And the type of biodegradable that you learned about in science class. (Put it in the ground, and it goes away in 60 days.)

And the type of paper that doesn’t absolutely deteriorate the second it gets wet. Because... you know… nobody should have to drink coffee with that ish.

Making people’s lives a little easier and the planet’s life a little longer?

We’ll drink to that. (or at least, we’ll drink out of it) 

Visit our website sofiproducts.com to learn more.

Name: Cartiere di Trevi (Trevi Paper Mill)
Description:
We are Italian paper mill and we delivery goods all over the world in Reels, Strips and Sheets.

Packaging paper: 
==============
Fluting, Medium, Use-semichemical, TL2, T3 Gsm from 120 up to 250. 


Coreboard: 
=========
GreyBoard Use-Kraftboard from 200 up to 550 Joule from 180 up to 600 Gsm. 


Special papers:
============
WhiteBoard, Honeycomb board from 140-600 gsm, Colored Cardboard Yellow, green, pink, magenta, violet, blu. Laminated cardboard white-gold-silver-trasparent.


All Cartiere di Trevi paper and cardboard is made from recycled recovered paper. Maximum product quality is guaranteed by a careful selection process, innovative technological solutions, personnel with excellent experience and a cutting edge test laboratory equipped with a treatment system that meets the Italian Aticelca standards.

The Graziosi family has been working in the paper industry for four generations. 

It founded Cartiere di Trevi in 1960, adopting a policy focussed on technological development and based on providing products which meet the real needs of the market.

Thanks mainly to its intuition to acquire technically versatile production equipment, management has been able to progressively diversify production over to years, and at present is able to offer 60,000 tons per year of 5 different types of top quality paper and cardboard, with different technical contents and end use.

Although the company has always focussed on meeting the needs of Italian companies, it has recently developed a commercial strategy which has made it possible to reach markets throughout Europe and in Turkey, the United Arab Emirates and China. It currently has a widespread sales network with agents working in all the countries it exports to.

Name: Cartiere di Guarcino S.p.A. - Gruppo Neodecortech
Description: Cartiere di Guarcino has specialized since its origins in the production of decorative paper for both high and low-pressure applications, as well as for the flooring industry. The product range includes Unicolor papers, Balancing papers, Print Base papers, and Underlay papers. The Cartiere di Guarcino plant is located in Italy, in the Lazio region, covering an area of 144,000 m², of which 21,000 m² are covered. The production capacity amounts to 50,000 tons of paper per year. The workforce consists of 170 employees. A qualified team dedicated to consultancy and customer support is constantly committed to achieving the highest level of customer satisfaction, which is the company's primary goal. The company’s strong focus on innovation and sustainability led, in 2006, through its subsidiary BEG Srl and thanks to a €30 million investment, to the construction of a cogeneration plant for the production of electrical and thermal energy powered by biomass.

Name: Imola Legno S.p.A.
Description:
Imola Legno is one of the leading distributers of forest products and particularly of panels and timber; moreover, on demand the company carries out primary wood processing.
Imola Legno was founded in 1977 and has since established itself as one of the biggest wholesale distributors of forest products. In the beginning the company was specialized in panels but has then extended its product range to timber.
The turning point came in 1998: following the buy-out of the company Feltrinelli by Corà (market leader) important sales people left the first and joined Imola Legno. Since then, the sales staff has increased to about 30 sales executives who cover the whole Italian territory.
Today, registering a turnover of Euro 105 mil., 300.000 m3 of sold products and holding 4 warehouses in differents parts of Italy, Imola Legno is the first player in the wholesale distribution of forest products in Italy.

Name: Wizpaper
Description:
Installé à Wizernes dans le Pas-De-Calais, WIZPAPER a pour vocation principale la fabrication du PPO à partir de vieux papier recyclé, qui réduit grandement l’impact environnemental. Le site emploie actuellement plus de 120 salariés pour satisfaire au mieux les besoins des clients.

L’entreprise est spécialisée dans le papier pour ondulé et, grâce à sa technologie, produit un papier 15% léger avec les mêmes caractéristiques qu’un papier classique.

Name: ICMA Sartorial Paper
Description: Icma Sartorial Paper has been transforming and finishing paper since 1933. Ethics, dignity at work, and attention to product quality are the values that have long driven the women leading the Mandello del Lario company. Today, creativity and sustainability go hand in hand, thanks to innovative circular economy paper manufacturing processes for customers sensitive to environmental issues in the packaging sector.

Name: Simka Paper
Description:
Our facility, which started its operations in 1989 as the first paper factory of the Kayseri Region for the production of corrugated cardboard and paper, which is the main raw material of the packaging industry, continues its production in a total area of 21,000 m2 and a closed area of 8,350 m2.
Based on the awareness that the prerequisite for sustainable growth and development and the permanence of customer reputation is always customer satisfaction, our institution takes customer requests and suggestions into consideration and develops its product profile and machinery park by constantly following innovations and changes.

For this purpose, in order to provide a wider range of needs of the corrugated cardboard industry, of which it is the main supplier, it completed its investment in a new 2,800 mm wide paper machine in 2012 and was put into operation in 2013 with an annual production capacity of 50,000 tons from 100% recycled waste paper.

As a holder of ISO 9001:2000 Quality Management System Certificate, Simka guarantees the service it provides to its customers and adopts the philosophy of continuous service by taking into account customer requests and suggestions at every point of sales.

Name: Rainbow Professional Ltd
Description:
Shaping Your Environment......

Rainbow Professional is a leading UK manufacturer of Bio tree care, landscaping edging and horticultural products, supplying a wide network of professional distributors throughout the UK and worldwide. 

We are always looking for new companies within the UK & around the world both to stock & distribute our products, please contact us for more information.

Name: Idempapers
Description:
Until June 2017, Idempapers did produce and market high-value specialty papers such as carbonless and one-side coated products. With its industrial tradition and a highly qualified workforce, Idempapers had earned a reputation for producing innovative and quality products.

Idempapers was a newly independent paper company located in Belgium’s Walloon Brabant region (Virginal) and had a long and rich industrial heritage.

Name: NEFAB MÉXICO SA DE CV
Description: NEFAB DE MÉXICO SA DE CV is a paper & forest products company based out of Zapopan, Mexico.

Name: CHAPAS NORTE
Description:
CHAPAS NORTE SA is a company with more than 50 years in the wood industry, which exports to more than 30 countries.

In its wood VENEER Division - NORTE Chapas - it has extensive facilities with more than 11,000 sqm for control, storage, inspection and grading. It offers a wide and varied selection of natural species, along with an extensive range of cutting-edge designs of engineered veneer. With a strict process of grading by measurements, texture, color and figure, they intend exhaustively to take care of all the process of selection and production of the veneer, from the origin up to the delivery to our customers.

The main activity of NORTE in its LUMBER Division - NORTE Maderas - is the import and marketing of logs, sawed wood and other wood products coming from African, American, European and Asian markets.

In the EDGE-BANDING Division - NORTE Cantos - it has excellent facilities with up-to-date machinery, which allows them to meet quickly and efficiently any need of their customers. In our purpose of providing the highest level of service to our customers, in NORTE we have decided to expand the PVC edge banding product line, introducing new designs for the last collections of the main Spanish board manufacturers.

NORTE is aware that we all have a responsibility with our planet, that is why in each of its sections they strive to work in a friendly way with the environment.

Name: Woodspin
Description:
Woodspin is a joint venture between Finnish fibre technology start-up Spinnova and Suzano, the world’s largest producer of sustainable eucalyptus pulp. The company’s mission is to be the most sustainable textile fibre source in the world with its fully biodegradable, zero waste, circular, wood-based fibre, SPINNOVA.

Woodspin is the exclusive producer and distributor of wood-based SPINNOVA fibre to fashion houses, brand holders, and their supply chain partners. The fibre can be spun into clothing, home textiles, non-woven materials, composites, and car parts, amongst other uses. SPINNOVA fibre has already been used in clothing collections by fashion brands, including Adidas, H&M Group, Marimekko, and Bergans, amongst others.

Woodspin’s unique product and process fuse the responsibly grown eucalyptus hardwood of Suzano with the pioneering technology of Spinnova. This process requires no harmful chemicals or leaves behind materials releasing microplastics. It also uses 99.5% less water than cotton over its production cycle, with a carbon footprint that is 72% smaller. By sourcing all materials from Suzano’s sustainable eucalyptus farms, the company can verify its supply chain from field to factory to fibre.

Woodspin is based in Jyväskylä, Finland, where the first SPINNOVA fibre factory is being built. The company aims to scale its annual wood-based SPINNOVA production capacity to 1m tons by 2033.

Name: binderholz France
Description:
binderholz transforme le bois, matière première renouvelable, à 100%.

De la culture des plants et la gestion des forêts à la récolte du bois en passant par la transformation dans les scieries, la fabrication de produits en bois massif pour le bricolage, l’élaboration solutions de construction innovantes et la réalisation de logements abordables, c’est toute la chaîne de création de valeur qui est mise en œuvre avec une grande cohérence. Les chutes de bois issues de la production sont recyclées en biocombustibles, électricité verte, palettes en aggloméré et autres dés en aggloméré.

Dans la filière bois, le nom Binder est synonyme de tradition et d’intégrité, mais également de haute technologie et d’innovation. Depuis la petite scierie édifiée voilà plus de 70 ans, binderholz a parcouru bien du chemin pour devenir aujourd’hui un groupe d’entreprises pleinement intégré, armé des technologies et procédés de fabrication les plus modernes.

Name: Nova Tissue UK
Description:
Nova Tissue is a family-run UK paper converter and manufacturer of quality toilet tissue and kitchen towel, based in the North West of England (established in 1984 as Rose Tissues)

At our purpose built, well-maintained 35,000 sq ft facility, we convert 450 tonnes of paper per month into disposable household products for the consumer and ‘away-from-home’ markets across Europe. This includes both our own brand products and bespoke private label products, which enable customers to sell our toilet tissue and kitchen towel as their own.

We know it’s a bit sad, but we’re really passionate about paper conversion and we really enjoy what we do – and this rubs off on our customers. Our team of just under 50 staff, from full time engineers and health & safety managers, to machine operators and warehouse assistants, are always looking out for what others in the industry are doing and how we can do it better.

Because we’ve been in the business of making toilet tissue and kitchen towel for so long, we know what works/sells and what doesn’t when it comes to product, packaging, pack format and branding. For example, the price marked packs we produce result in a 12% increase in sales.

We are on first name terms with our customers who are spread across Europe and include buyers from retail multiples, wholesalers, cash and carry outlets, janitorial supplies companies, facilities management companies and hotel/pub/leisure chains, and offer them a responsive, reliable delivery service to ensure they get what they need, when they need it. We are happy to quote in Euros or GBP.

We are working towards gaining the ‘FSC Chain of Custody’ accreditation so that we can label our FSC products to enable consumers to identify products that support responsible forest management. We are also looking into carbon offsetting schemes to help to minimise our impact on the environment.

Description:

In addition to producing fence boards and pallet stock lumber, Alta's zero-wood-waste sawmills produce by-products such as wood chips, sawdust, mulch and bio-fuel.

Headquartered in centrally-located Chehalis, Washington, Alta operates fence board sawmills in four other rural communities in the region:  Morton, WA; Shelton, WA; Amanda Park, WA, and Naples, ID.

Alta’s fence boards can be purchased throughout the U.S. at home improvement retailers such as The Home Depot , as well as through local fence installers who buy from Alta’s nation-wide network of lumber and fence materials distributors.

Vi tillverkar förnybar energi i form av pellets i bulk och säck samt träpulver. Våra produkter värmer villor och hushåll och ger energi till företag och offentliga verksamheter, samt driver produktionen i små och stora industrier. Scandbio tillverkar även stallpellets, som används som strö i boxar för hästar och andra djur.

Hela vår tillverkningsprocess, från råvara till färdig produkt, övervakas dagligen och kontrolleras löpande. Vi är certifierade enligt ISO 9001 och 14001.

Vi har fem egna fabriker i Sverige och en fabrik i Lettland, vilket gör att vi kan erbjuda Scandbio pellets på pall och bulk för hemleverans från Ystad till Sundsvall.

Pohjolan karuissa olosuhteissa kasvaa tiukkasyistä ja lujaa mäntyä ja kuusta. Käyttämämme raaka-aine on parasta pohjoisen puuta, joka on peräisin kestävästi hoidetuista Kainuun metsistä. Puu on uusiutuva luonnonmateriaali, joka voidaan elinkaarensa päätteeksi hävittää polttamalla ja hyödyntää siten bioenergiana.

Tuottamamme sahatavara tunnetaan URSUS-laivausmerkistä. Syyrakenteeltaan ja visuaaliselta ulkonäöltään kaunis kuhmolainen puu soveltuu erinomaisesti sisustusmateriaalien raaka-aineeksi mm. puusepän- ja huonekaluteollisuudessa. Lujuusominaisuuksiensa puolesta tuotteemme soveltuvat myös rakentamisen vaativiin tarpeisiin niin kantavissa rakenteissa kuin rakennustuoteteollisuudessa.

Name: Miscancell
Description:
Sustainably produced raw materials from Miscanthus
At Miscancell, we are taking a significant step toward a biobased future. Through our unique refining technology, we sustainably extract high-quality cellulose and lignin from Miscanthus, a fast-growing crop with an exceptionally low environmental footprint.

 Cellulose from Miscanthus is a valuable raw material used in paper, packaging, filtration products, and bioplastics — applications that often still rely on wood or fossil-based sources.
 Lignin, the natural "glue" of the plant, is a sustainable alternative to fossil-based phenols in adhesives, coatings, composites, bitumen replacements in asphalt, and even cosmetics.

 Using Miscanthus not only delivers high-performance materials, but also significantly reduces environmental impact thanks to local cultivation, CO₂ capture, and efficient processing.

 From fossil-based to biobased — we're proving it's possible.
 Interested in collaboration or applying biobased materials? Let’s connect.

Name: Red Leaf Pulp
Description:
Red Leaf Pulp is reimagining the future of fiber. 

We’re building North America’s first large-scale non-wood pulp mill. Using Canadian wheat straw not trees, to produce premium pulp for sustainable packaging, tissue, and molded products.
Our first facility in Regina, Saskatchewan, will deliver 220,000 tonnes of pulp annually by 2028 while generating renewable power and producing high-value, sulfur-free lignin.
With proprietary process innovation, a circular design, and a climate-positive footprint, we convert underused agricultural residue into a cost-advantaged alternative to forest-based pulp. Construction begins in 2026.

We support customers across commercial print, publishing and carton manufacturing, while also providing trade conversion and refurbishment services, covering everything from newsprint to high-caliper packaging boards.
