Fagus Suisse SA exploite un centre de production automatisé pour la production de lamellé-collé à partir de hêtre et d'autres bois feuillus.

Name: Papelão União Indústria e Comércio Ltda.
Description:
A Papelão União foi fundada em 06 de dezembro de 1988, pelos sócios Sr. João Cerniftcü e Sr. Antonio J. S. Lima. O nome surgiu de um diálogo entre os sócios, pois foram reunidas todas as forças financeiras para a compra. Por ser uma empresa familiar, nos primeiros anos de vida, a Papelão União contou com a colaboração de duas pessoas: a Sra. Nelly Ducatti Cerniftcü, esposa do Sr. João Cerniftcü, e a Sra. Tânia M. Cerniftcü Lima, esposa do Sr. Antonio J. S. Lima. Essas duas mulheres foram de grande importância para o sucesso da empresa. No ano de 1996, mais um sócio, o Sr. Milton José Cerniftcü, assumiu a administração comercial.

 

    Com mais de 30 anos de atuação, a Papelão União sempre buscou o aprimoramento constante dos seus serviços. Atualmente, vive um momento fundamental para o futuro da empresa e de seus colaboradores. A Papelão atravessa uma renovação, que contempla novas diretrizes, novos processos de gestão e novos patamares de crescimento econômico, social e ambiental. 

    Alinhada a uma nova realidade de mercado, a Papelão União é referência no setor, sendo considerada uma das melhores do país no segmento de produção de papéis com material 100% reciclado. Atende vários clientes de expressão nacional: mercado caderneiro, gráficas, estofados e outros.

 

    A empresa conta com uma equipe de profissionais comprometidos com a qualidade. O empenho de cada um leva a um reconhecimento e crescimento dentro da corporação. Em cada kg de papel fabricado, a papelão União vai escrevendo a sua história, superando obstáculos, com ética e profissionalismo.

Name: MARCA Representação Ltda
Description:
Temos Know-how em embalagens, displays e peças promocionais confeccionados em papelão ondulado, gráfica e a nova tecnologia de impressão digital diretamente em papelão ondulado.
REDUZA CUSTOS! 
Faça uma cotação conosco marca@marcarepresentacao.com.br

Name: Euroforest Ireland Ltd
Description:
Euroforest Ireland is a dynamic provider of harvesting and marketing services to the Irish forest industry.
 
Established in January 2018, but building on in excess of 25 years’ experience we are growing our company from modest beginnings, to providing a countrywide service, along with handling increasing quantities of round timber. 

Our expanding client base consists of large and small forest owners with our unique service tailored to suit their specific needs. 

Euroforest Ireland supplies customers in the entire Irish log market and this combined with a developing network of managers located throughout Ireland means we are ideally placed to respond quickly, meet with you and help turn your trees into income.

Name: COTOPAXI
Description:
Aglomerados Cotopaxi S.A.'s mission is to provide customers with the best solutions in wood products while fostering human development and sustainable management of forestry resources.
Aglomerados Cotopaxi has over 30 years of existence and a consolidated leadership as the largest lumber industry in Ecuador with an annual production exceeding 130,000 cubic meters.
It has forestry assets of 14,000 hectares with 11,000 hectares planted with radiata and patula pine, and the remaining 20% allocated to preservation of the areas’ own ecosystems, native forests, protection of hydrographic basins and other environmental benefits.

Name: STIGA RM
Description:
STIGA RM Ltd., founded in 1994, is one of the leading forestry companies in Latvia. Latvia, being the 4th most forest-covered country in Europe, is recognized for its thriving plywood industry, particularly the well-known Baltic birch. STIGA RM Ltd. owns and manages its own forest lands, focusing on sustainable and environmentally friendly long-term management practices. The company holds all relevant certifications for its forest management and wood products, ensuring sustainability and responsibility.

Historically, STIGA RM Ltd.'s core businesses were in forestry, logging, and timber transportation. However, since 2016, the company has shifted its primary focus to birch plywood production and sales, becoming a global supplier in this field. STIGA RM Ltd. has invested €38 million into its plywood business, equipping its facilities with advanced Raute production lines. Their birch plywood is bonded using waterproof phenol resin adhesive and manufactured to meet stringent European standards, using high-quality raw materials to ensure durability and reliability.

Name: Orient Paper Mills
Description: Orient Paper Mills is a paper & forest products company based out of India.

Name: Elof Hansson Trade
Description:
Elof Hansson Trade, The Global Business Facilitator, which makes life easier for buyers and sellers of pulp, paper, timber and recovered materials. 

Elof Hansson Trade is an international trading house founded in 1897 by Merchant Elof Hansson. We source forest products from leading suppliers in Europe, Asia and the Americas to customers all over the world. We sell not only a product, but an added-value package of financing, risk management, shipping and marketing. To put it simply – we provide business expertise that makes life easier for buyers and sellers of pulp, paper, timber and recovered materials.

Name: Idalen SA
Description:
Idalen es una empresa de capitales uruguayos que opera en el sector forestal desde 1990.
Nos dedicamos a la comercialización de productos forestales en el mercado internacional, y a la prestación de servicios forestales de cosecha y logística.

Name: Brandpack
Description:
En Brandpack nos dedicamos a la fabricación de bolsas de papel personalizadas, utilizando materiales 100% biodegradables. Creemos en la importancia de la sostenibilidad y el cuidado del medio ambiente, por eso nos esforzamos por ofrecer productos ecológicos y duraderos que satisfagan las necesidades de nuestros clientes. 
Somos una de las fábricas más importantes de Latinoamérica. Contamos con una planta equipada con la más alta tecnología disponible a nivel mundial. Distribuimos a todos los puntos de Argentina y contamos con representantes en Latinoamérica.
Algunas de las marcas que han confiado en nosotros incluyen empresas líderes como Laboratorio Gador, Baliarda, Rapsodia, Cheeky, Mimo, Kosiuko, Advanced, Pedidos YA, Kevingston, Legacy, Sarkany, Topper, Wanama, Telecom, Puma, Rappi, Volkswagen, entre otros. Trabajamos día a día para brindar un servicio excepcional y productos sostenibles que superen las expectativas.

Name: Hellas Paper Ltd
Description:
Historical Throwback

Hellas Paper Ltd. was founded in 1999 and started to be active in the processing of tissue paper and specifically in the production of toilet paper, kitchen towels, napkins for household and professional use. In 2006 the company moved its headquarters to privately owned facilities in the Industrial Area of Sindos with a total area of 6,000 sq.m. and since then it has invested significantly in its infrastructure and mechanical equipment, to be able to meet its ever-increasing needs. The increased needs led the company to expand the facilities in 2017 by 3,500 sq.m., with the result that the company today has building facilities with a total area of 9,500 sq.m.


Vision

Having invested in recent years in both infrastructure and training of our human resources, our strategic goal is to consolidate and at the same time expand our activities, both in the Greek market and create a more extroverted profile.


Εxports

Hellas Paper Ltd. intensifies its effort to become an extroverted company, expanding its export activity every year, exporting its products to more than 10 countries. Our aim is to expand our export profile through strategic partnerships with foreign companies, providing them with top quality products.


Community

Hellas Paper Ltd. always responds to the call of society, being at all times ready to selflessly offer its goods to social groceries and charities.


Environment

As a company we have a strong sense of responsibility towards the environment and this is evidenced by a series of green actions in which we participate. We do not know if climate change can be avoided, but what we do know for sure is that its effects can be mitigated. Hellas Paper Ltd., in terms of its own share, is moving in this direction because we believe that it is our duty to pass on the planet to future generations exactly as we received it.

Name: Duratex Florestal Ltda.
Description: Duratex Florestal Ltda. is a paper & forest products company based out of AVENIDA PAULISTA, Nº 1938, 9º ANDAR, BELA VISTA, São Paulo, São Paulo, Brazil.

Name: Harmac Pacific, Nanaimo Forest Products, Ltd.
Description:
Harmac Pacific is a distinguished Canadian-based pulp & paper company that has firmly established itself as a leader in the industry. With a strong commitment to excellence, Harmac operates under the guiding principle that quality is the key to success. Since its revival in 2008, the company has remained self-owned, allowing for a focus on long-term sustainability and unwavering dedication to its customers.

At Harmac Pacific, the production of high-quality pulp products is at the core of its operations. With the aid of cutting-edge technology and a wonderful team of highly skilled professionals, the company consistently delivers superior products that meet and exceed industry standards. Harmac Pacific offers a diverse range of pulp grades to cater to the specific needs of its global clientele. Harmac Pacific is also deeply committed to environmental stewardship and the implementation of sustainable practices throughout its operations and aims to contribute to a greener future for the pulp and paper industry.

Being a self-owned company, Harmac Pacific has a unique advantage in decision-making and strategic planning. This autonomy empowers Harmac to make strategic decisions that prioritize customer satisfaction, environmental sustainability, and has cultivated a culture of accountability and a pursuit of excellence. We strive to exceed expectations and deliver exceptional products while upholding our core values of quality, sustainability, and collaborative teamwork.

Name: Moschetti S/A Embalagens
Description:
Moschetti S / A Embalagens is a company with long experience in the production of paper packaging, standing out for the quality and security of supply.
The manufactured products are mainly intended for the food sector, such as flour, sugars, coffee and others.

Name: Tradelink Wood Products Ltd
Description:
Dedicated to procuring, shipping, manufacturing, warehousing and marketing hardwoods, plywood and allied timber products. 
Sales Offices in 7 countries: Canada, China, France, Portugal, South Africa, United Kingdom and United States of America.
Procurement Offices in South America, North America, Malaysia, Singapore & China.
Manufacturing Plant (Flooring, Decking, Components) in Brazil.
We have a Responsible Purchasing Policy which is third party audited by the UK Timber Trade Federation and ensure environmental compliance in accordance with the USA’s Lacey Act and the EU Timber Regulation. All our offices around the world have FSC and PEFC chain of custody certification.

Name: Cartão Sbravati Ltda.
Description:
By the end of 1957, from the work and vision of Mr. Aldo Sbravati, Indústria de Cartão Sbravati Ltda. was founded, located in the heart of the state of Santa Catarina at the city of Curitibanos, in Brazil.
 
Today, with a total area of 20.000 m², being 9.000 m² of gross floor area, the company employs 110 associates and has a capacity of  processing 1500 tons of paper per month.
 
In 2008, Cartão Sbravati began manufacturing spiral paper tubes. The initiative focuses on serving the market demands from tube, plastic films, textiles and other industries. By producing its own paper for the tubes, the quality standard of the final product is reassured.
 
The company has already over 50 years of tradition, supplying products for the market of paper barrels, tubes and angles, besides manufacturing its own tubes.
 
Cartão Sbravati has cutting edge equipment, qualified personnel and a tight quality control to produce its high quality paper and tubes.
Company
The company recycles over 15'000 tons of paper every year, using only recycled paper fibers.
 
To assure the origin of the timber used, the steam generation relies on wood chips produced from the company's own reforestation.
 
The process water stays in a closed-loop circuit, being recycled and reused. If the water is eventually returned to the river, it undergoes a water treatment system to remove any remaining paper fibers.

Name: Fiber-X Finland (Not active anymore)
Description:
Fiber-X is proud to be part of Nordic Pilot Center, the world’s leading pilot facility, helping companies across industries globally scale innovations from concept to industrial production.  

We offer three core services. Our engineering services specialize in production optimization, EPCM plant projects, feasibility studies, troubleshooting, and reducing water, energy, and resource consumption. Our pilot services include proof-of-concept testing, equipment development, material research, agrofiber innovation, and side and waste stream testing. Additionally, our training services focus on knowledge development, problem-solving, workforce training, and combining deep theoretical insights with hands-on experience on a live paper machine.  

Backed by a team with decades of industrial expertise, we’re committed to supporting businesses in achieving success. Fiber-X is here to assist in scaling solutions, optimizing processes, and developing skills to meet the demands of tomorrow.  

Let’s collaborate to make your vision a reality!

Name: Paris Corporation
Description:
Paris Corporation- Making it Better Since 1964

Many have wondered how a “paper company” could successfully compete in intensely competitive fields like computer peripherals and batteries.  A big part of the answer lies in our people, our culture, and our patent capital.

Paris People

Service is what really sets Paris apart from the competition. Our people really make the difference. We support our customers by providing the finest customer service, sales assistance, expert advice, marketing support and fast, reliable nationwide deliveries. We are committed to quality and service– not just to our customers but also to our suppliers. 

Paris Culture 

Our culture is what differentiates us from our competition. We look for talented, hardworking, goal-oriented individuals who are eager to learn, grow and that demonstrate a can do attitude to overcome challenges. Ours is an environment that encourages innovative thinking, teamwork and the willingness to take ownership of what you do.

Paris Products

From paper to poly, to portable power, we focus on quality, service, and reliability. We continue to innovate and strive through changes in the market to deliver high quality, reliable products. Our portfolio allows us to participate in a number of diverse consumer and commercial marketplaces. Our customers are a “Who’s Who” in 50,000+ food, drug, mass market, electronics and specialty retailers as well as office products wholesalers and distributors, paper merchants and forms distributors.

If you are looking for a company where you can make a difference, this is the one. Learn more at https://pariscorp.com/job-openings/.

Name: European Tissue Symposium
Description:
The European Tissue Symposium (ETS) is a Brussels based trade association of the European tissue paper industry. Its members represent the majority of the tissue production throughout the EU.

 The objectives of ETS are:

- To monitor topics, events and developments which are of importance to the European tissue paper industry.

- To inform and advise the members of these events and developments.

- To research and develop issues and policies which have an impact on the tissue industry and to develop a greater understanding of the sector and its products. This includes the collection of technical and scientific information and the ordering of studies.

- Ancillary to these main activities, to liaison with other non-governmental associations, including industry trade associations, as well as with European and international institutions and authorities.


ETS operates through its advisory board, members plenary, various technical taskforces and links with national associations.

Name: Shree Rama Newsprint Limited
Description:
Shree Rama Newsprint Limited (Shree Rama ) is one of India’s largest manufacturers of recycled paper-based writing and printing paper and Newsprint. Established in 1993, the company is listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange and National Stock Exchange.

The company has a state-of-the-art manufacturing plant with an installed annual capacity of 150,000 MT and is spread over an area of 230 acres in Surat, Gujarat, and is strategically located near the Hazira Port.

Name: Corruchecsa
Description: CORRUCHECSA, Corrugados Chilenos Ecuatorianos, es la Empresa de conversión de cajas de cartón corrugadas, presente en importantes industrias, el cual, tenemos el orgullo de servir a varias transnacionales. Veintisiete años acreditan nuestra permanencia en el mercado ecuatoriano.

Name: Kruger Packaging - Elizabethtown Plant
Description: A North American leader in eco-friendly packaging, Kruger Packaging delivers better boxes and smarter solutions for today’s fast-changing marketplace.

Name: MLJ Industries Limited
Description:
MLJ was founded to expand into international markets for all paper and film products as a part of legacy Mitthanjee Group (1933). We manufacture the best in industry with stringent quality control, uninterrupted supply because of our financial strength, 95 years of industry know-how, relations and our own polyextrusion manufacturing units.

12 Million Sq mt.- Label Stock, ~2600 tonnes/month (cup stock / silicone liners)

We strategically partner with our clients from the “first concept” to market ready products with a 100% focus on quality, logistical excellence and market requirement fit. We aim to create ease by becoming the only place you need to go for ALL your paper needs.
 
Industries we have already served: Retail | Wine & Spirits | Pharmaceutical | Food & Beverage | Personal Care | Oil & Industrial | Bakery & Confectionary | Tapes &  Adhesives

Paper products focus: Label Stock | Poly Coated Cup Stock |Barcode Labels | Siliconized Release Liners | Sheets Range

For enquiries and partnerships mail: enquiry@mljindustries.com

Name: Mistra Digital Forest
Description:
Mistra Digital Forest is a research program aimed at promoting sustainable development in forestry through digitalisation. The program develops methods, models, and digital tools to create a digital forest value chain and promote a circular bioeconomy. The program has a total budget of 224 million SEK for the period 2019-2027. The program is funded by Mistra and participating corporate partners.

Participating organizations in the program include Swedish Forest Industries Federation, Swedish University of Agricultural Sciences (SLU), Umeå University, IVL Swedish Environmental Institute, Skogforsk, Billerud, Holmen, Kopparfors skogar, SCA, Stora Enso, Sveaskog, and Södra.

Name: Forest Landowners Association
Description:
Forest Landowners Association (FLA) is a 501(c)5 organization. FLA is the leading advocate promoting the rights of all private landowners—regardless of size, corporate structure, location, certification status, or tax classification. FLA's efforts to protect, promote, and advocate for all private landowners expand beyond lobbying to telling landowners' stories to policy makers in terms of economic impact, jobs created, family legacy and great stewards of the resource.

Since 1941, FLA has provided its members, who own and operate more than 40 million acres of forestland in 48 states, with education, information, and national grassroots advocacy, which enables them to sustain their forestlands across generations. FLA’s outreach on behalf of private forest landowners nationwide enhances their forestland management practices and stewardship, and provides peace of mind that they have an advocate working to bring them richly deserved compensation for their work that safeguards America’s forestlands.

FLA provides advice, support and information to policy makers, educating them on how proposed legislation could affect private forest management, stewardship and owners’ rights. We continually represent forest owners’ interests.

Our hearts are in the forests, but our feet are on the streets of D.C. and state capitals, because that’s where we need to be to protect our members’ rights. Politicians will always have their fiery debates, but we’ll be there to keep you from getting burned.

Name: Bridge View Paper Company, LLC
Description: Bridge View Paper opened for business in May 2005 and is partnered with Newman & Company, Inc., a leading paperboard mill established in 1919. Bridge View Paper’s North American Headquarters has grown from doing business as a paper merchant and broker, into a family of companies which also include Tissue & Towel and Nonwoven Divisions, all located on the Newman Paper mill 48 acre campus in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.

Name: Cheema Papers Ltd.
Description:
Cheema Papers Ltd. is an award winning & leading paper company based out of Uttarakhand, India that has been producing high-quality paper products for over 3 decades. Our state-of-the-art facilities and experienced team ensure that we consistently deliver top-performing paper products to our customers.

At Cheema Papers Ltd., every single employee is committed to develop the best products using cutting edge technology while focusing on sustainability and environmental responsibility. We aim at using sustainable practises and prioritise reduced wastage and re usability of pulp hence aiming at reducing the carbon foot print.

Our product range includes a variety of paper types, including Duplex board used predominantly in the packaging industry, MG Poster Paper and High BF Kraft used in brown paper bags. Our customer portfolio includes a wide range of reputed multinational corporates and well reputed home grown companies. We take pride in providing customized solutions to meet the unique needs of each customer.
Our company strongly values innovation, sustainability, and customer satisfaction.

Name: Middle East Printing & Packaging
Description: Middle East Press is a commercial offset printing press that was established in 1972 with branches in Riyadh and Jeddah. The press specializes in the design and printing of business literature including advertising and marketing materials, newsletters, posters, and catalogues etc.

Name: N R Agarwal Industries Ltd
Description: Paper

Name: Grupo Volta Grande
Description:
NOSSA HISTÓRIA
Com mais de 80 anos de atuação, a CVG adquiriu uma rica experiência industrial e mercadológica.
O início dessa história foi em 1937, com a instalação da Indústria na região denominada Volta Grande, distante 37 quilômetros do centro de Rio Negrinho-SC. Antes de encontrar sua verdadeira vocação, a empresa produziu madeira, fécula de mandioca e batata, papelão e pasta mecânica.

Após já estar consolidada no mercado de papéis descartáveis, em 1995 surgiu a Cahdam Volta Grande S.A., que instalou uma moderna fábrica no distrito industrial de Rio Negrinho-SC para fazer a conversão das bobinas em produtos direcionados ao mercado consumidor, atuando também no mercado de madeiras, atendendo em especial as indústrias de móveis da região.

Name: Zambaiti Parati
Description:
Zambaiti Parati Spa is a leader in the production of high-end wall coverings, an Italian company between tradition and innovation. Zambaiti's vision is based on ‘Made in Italy’ values, expressed by technological innovation and Italian creativity. Zambaiti Parati can count on a network of distributors in almost all countries of the world, with a prevalent vocation for export and a constant collaboration with the traditional distribution channels, consisting of specialized showrooms. An important step was the opening of a factory in China in 1998 and another one in Russia in 2014, alongside the opening of direct branches in France, Great Britain, and other countries. Today wallpaper has undergone a radical evolution, moving from building material to a decorative and design outcome.  The industrial product behind the success of Zambaiti Parati is an embossed register vinyl made in large volumes. Nowadays, the company has a Contract Division,  in constant dialogue with architects and interior designers, with an increasingly marked approach to the hospitality industry.  The brand ‘Zambaiti Contract’, strongly custom-oriented, offers other types of supports, natural, on fabric, and proposes itself as the ideal partner for developing a high-end personalized product.  Zambaiti Parati runs a creative Research & Development department. Alongside people with a long experience gained in the furniture and design sector, the team also boasts young resources with creative talent and a great growth potential. Zambaiti Parati has important licenses and collaborations with relevant brands of the fashion and automotive industry. 
All Zambaiti products meet the standards set by European Quality regulations UNI EN 233:1999 and UNI EN 259-1:2001 that define the products quality guidelines and guarantee the respect of chemical components limits, so as to protect the environment and the end users.

Name: Cartesar spa
Description:
La storia dell’azienda affonda le radici nella Costa d'Amalfi dove ancora oggi la famiglia de Iuliis gestisce l’Antica Cartiera Amalfitana, un gioiello industriale del ‘700 che da allora produce ancora carta a mano.

Nel 1974 abbiamo lanciato la nostra sfida dell’innovazione attraverso la ricerca. Nasce così la produzione di carte riciclate per ondulatori dalle alte performance utilizzando come materia prima esclusivamente carta da macero. Da allora sono trascorsi 40 anni. Da allora la crescita dell’azienda non si è mai più arrestata.

Name: JaksPel
Description:
Jakspel: Indústria Líder em Conversão de Papel Tissue no Norte do Brasil.

Há 15 anos transformando o mercado de papéis com qualidade, inovação e sustentabilidade. Desde 2008, em Manaus (AM), somos a referência em Conversão de Papel Tissue, com atuação de excelência nos mercados Doméstico, Comercial e Institucional.

Impacto e Presença Regional
Nossa atuação gera impacto significativo, com presença consolidada em 5 estados do Norte e mais de 3 milhões de produtos vendidos anualmente. Promovemos prosperidade com uma produção genuinamente brasileira.

Excelência Técnica e Performance
Nosso diferencial é a precisão na manufatura. Garantimos máxima qualidade e volume por meio de:
- Tecnologia: Linhas de conversão avançadas otimizando corte, gofragem e embalagem.
- Gestão: Foco rigoroso em OEE e Melhoria Contínua para máxima rentabilidade.

Valores e Crescimento
Operamos na Amazônia com responsabilidade e pioneirismo. Nosso crescimento é guiado pela Valorização das Pessoas e pela Qualidade certificada.

Seja um Distribuidor Jakspel
Buscamos parceiros estratégicos para levar a força de nossas marcas ao mercado com alto giro e margem competitiva. 
Conecte-se e expanda seu portfólio!

Name: PNG Forest Products Ltd.
Description: PNG Forest Products offer a complete range of complementary plantation pine timber and plywood products, including marine ply, concrete formply, general structural grade plywood, sawn timber products and round poles. We also manufacture ACQ treated and CCA pressure-treated pine products at our TLTV certified production plant in Bulolo Province Papua New Guinea.

Name: Alabama Forestry Association
Description: The Alabama Forestry Association was formed in 1949 to represent the interests of the state’s sawmill companies and soon expanded to include forestry members from the stump to the mill.  Today, AFA is a membership organization comprised of forest products companies, landowners, loggers, wood suppliers, foresters, and others with a stake in Alabama’s forest economy.

Name: OMKATAŞ Oluklu Mukavva Koli Ambalaj A.Ş
Description:
Sektöre 2006 yılında başlangıç yapan firmamız hergeçen yıl elde ettiği tecrübe ve birikimleri ile sektöründe oldukça saygın ve tanınmış bir konumdadır.

Omkataş; siz değerli müşterilerine oluklu mukavva ambalaj üretimi ile birlikte %100 müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı hizmet vermeyi amaç edinmiştir.

PRENSİPLERİMİZ
Verilen hizmette dürüstlük, üretimde kalite, zamanında teslimat ve uygun fiyat firmamızın değişmez prensipleri olmuştur.

HİZMETLERİMİZ
5.500 m2 açık, 9.500 m2 kapalı alana sahip tesislerimizde; ihtiyaca göre her ebat oluklu mukavva safiha ile birlikte koli veya kutu, istenilen kalite ve uygun fiyat seçenekleriyle; baskılı-baskısız, yapıştırmalı, dikişli, kesimli ve tava şeklinde seri olarak üretilmektedir.

En büyük hizmetimiz ve bizi sektörümüzdeki diğer firmalardan ayıran farkımız %100 müşteri memnuniyetine verdiğimiz önem ve müşterinin ihtiyaçlarına en hızlı ve olumlu şekilde çözüm üretmektir.

Name: Spaziani1952
Description:
Spaziani1952 is specialized in the design and manufacture of colored embossed wrapping papers for boxes, shoppers, cases, and all other products for luxury packaging and quality. Our products are designed for elegant and sophisticated customers. They are a true masterpiece of Italian design. 

Spaziani1952 is a Chartularia srl brand.

Name: Koninklijke VNP
Description:
De VNP is de branchevereniging van 17 Nederlandse papier- en kartonproducenten. Dat doen we door middel van belangenbehartiging in Den Haag, Brussel en op provinciaal niveau. We helpen onze leden op het gebied van milieu, energie, innovatie human talent en communicatie. Daarnaast is veilig werken een gezamenlijk speerpunt: onze sector ontwikkelde zich de afgelopen jaren tot één van de veiligste van Nederland. We zijn een sector die hightech en duurzaam is en producten maakt die iedereen 24 uur per dag, 7 dagen per week gebruikt.  

Geïnteresseerd in samenwerking met onze sector? Kijk op vnp.nl en bel of mail ons.

Name: Jujo Thermal Ltd.
Description:
Jujo Thermal Ltd., established in 1992, is one of the world’s leading suppliers of direct thermal and coated-one-side papers. We also manufacture recyclable barrier paper for flexible packaging. The production and R&D are located in Kauttua, Finland. With its 200 employees, the company makes a turnover of about 100 million euros. The extensive sales network takes care of global customer service. Known for its consistent product quality, innovation and excellent service, Jujo Thermal is accredited by the ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 22000 and OHSAS 18001 certificates, and holds the FSC and PEFC chain of custody licenses. Jujo Thermal is fully owned by Nippon Paper Industries. 

Jujo Thermal –  A Subsidiary of Nippon Paper Group. www.jujothermal.com. 

Contact info: 
Sales: jujosales@jujothermal.com 
Career: https://www.jujothermal.com/careers/

Name: San Group - Global Leader in Canadian lumber
Description: San Group and companies have 30+ years of experience of manufacturing lumber from harvest to home. Our Canadian made lumber projects have won us the Exporter of the Year award. In 2019, San Group’s president and CEO won the highly coveted Entrepreneur of the Year award in the Natural Resources and Energy category from Ernest and Young. We deal in all kinds of lumber dimensions for any wooden construction need like beams, sauna boards, plywood, siding, decking and fencing. With the same high wear resistance, strength and excellent appearance our composite lumber is significantly cheaper.

Name: Pulp n Paper Industry
Description: Pulp and paper industry

Name: KOHLSCHEIN GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
EXCELLENCE IN PAPERBOARD SINCE 1932

Name: PEFC Deutschland e.V.
Description:
PEFC ist die größte Institution zur Sicherstellung einer nachhaltigen Waldbewirtschaftung und damit eine Art weltweiter „Wald-TÜV". Durch ein transparentes und unabhängiges Zertifizierungssystem weisen wir nach, dass Holz und Holzprodukte mit dem PEFC-Siegel aus ökologisch, ökonomisch und sozial nachhaltiger Forstwirtschaft stammen. Die Abkürzung PEFC steht für die englische Bezeichnung „Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification Schemes", also ein „Programm für die Anerkennung von Forstzertifizierungssystemen".

Im Rahmen der Anerkennung nationaler Zertifizierungssysteme wurde PEFC Deutschland 1999 als eingetragener Verein gegründet. Wir entwickeln seitdem die Standards und Verfahren der Zertifizierung, stellen der Öffentlichkeit Informationen bereit und vergeben die Rechte am PEFC-Logo in Deutschland. Mit 7,6 Millionen Hektar zertifizierter Waldfläche, also rund zwei Drittel der deutschen Wälder, sind wir hierzulande die bedeutendste Institution zur Sicherstellung nachhaltiger Waldbewirtschaftung.

Waldzertifizierung nach den Standards von PEFC basiert auf strengen und transparenten Richtlinien für die nachhaltige Bewirtschaftung von Wäldern. Diese Bewirtschaftung wird durch kompetente und unabhängige Organisationen kontrolliert. Trägt ein Produkt aus Holz das PEFC-Siegel, können Groß- wie Privatverbraucher sicher sein, dass die gesamte Produktherstellung – vom Rohstoff bis zum gebrauchsfertigen Endprodukt – zertifiziert ist und durch unabhängige Gutachter kontrolliert wird. 

Nachhaltige Waldbewirtschaftung bedeutet unter anderem:

•	Es wird nicht mehr Holz geschlagen als nachwächst.
•	Wo einzelne Bäume gefällt wurden, wird wieder gezielt aufgeforstet.
•	Der Wald bleibt ein sicherer Lebensraum für Tiere und Pflanzen.
•	Die Artenvielfalt im Wald bleibt erhalten.
•	Der Wald behält seine Funktionen zum Schutz von Gewässern, Böden, 
        Luft und Klima.

Impressum und Datenschutz: www.pefc.de/datenschutz

In 2010, the regional operations came together to operate under one organization and the company was rebranded as Ariva. Today, Ariva remains proud of its past yet firmly focused on the future.

Ariva, division de Domtar Corporation (NYSE/TSX:UFS), est un fournisseur principal de solutions optimales répondant aux besoins des clients concernant le papier, d’emballage et les arts graphiques. Ariva est chef de file en solutions de papier et d’emballage durables détenant des certifications FSC, SFI et PEFC.
Elle puise ses origines parmi les entreprises des plus respectées, des plus prospères et des plus innovatrices dans l’histoire de la distribution du papier en Amérique du Nord: Buntin Reid The Paper House, JBR La Maison du Papier, et The Paper House. Peu à peu, ces entreprises régionales ont été acquises par Domtar et exploitées sous l’organisation-cadre Groupe de distribution Domtar. Description:
Cañapack comercializa y distribuye papel y cartón elaborados 100% de bagazo de caña de azúcar. 
Ofrecemos al mercado un producto único. Nuestro papel y cartón es 100% sostenible, reciclable, renovable en el corto plazo, biodegradable, compostable y libre de tala de árboles. 

Estamos presentes en el sector del packaging, comunicación gráfica, consumo y, disponemos de stock para poder proveer a los clientes en hasta 72 horas todo tipo de producto, desde 30gr hasta 350gr, como cartulina estucada, sin estucar, cartulina antigrasa, antihumedad, papel offset y papel MG.
Nuestro papel y cartón está presente en los envases de comida para llevar, fast-food, estuchería de farmacia, perfume y cosmética, bolsas, etiquetas, catálogos, libros, revistas y cuadernos. Además es apto para todo tipo de impresión: inkjet, láser y fotocopia para uso de hogar y oficina. 
También comercializamos Delipac, un producto elaborado de cartón y sin plásticos, apto para el contacto con alimentos que puede ir del congelador al microondas y al horno directamente. 

En Cañapack apostamos por la sostenibilidad y la revolución eco-friendly.

Name: AMORIM France
Description:
Créé en 1870, dirigée par la 4ème génération de la Famille Amorim, le Groupe AMORIM est le premier producteur mondial de liège, présent sur les cinq continents à travers un réseau d’une dizaine de filiales. AMORIM exporte de nombreux produits dans plus de 100 pays et dispose d'un réseau de 30 000 clients. 
En France, AMORIM est implanté depuis 1991 à Bordeaux (vins tranquilles), Reims (vins effervescents) et Cognac (spiritueux) avec trois sites Qualité et de finition. 
A travers son engagement pionnier dans le développement durable et les activités ayant un impact positif dans la lutte contre le réchauffement climatique, AMORIM fournit un ensemble de solutions, de matériaux et d'applications à certaines des activités les plus technologiques et les plus exigeantes, comme l’industrie aérospatiale, l’industrie automobile, les vins et spiritueux, les matériaux de construction, l’architecture, le sport, l'énergie, la fabrication de biens de consommation.
AMORIM investit chaque année plusieurs millions d'euros en R&D, réalise 94 % de ses ventes hors du Portugal et emploie plus de 20 000 personnes dans l’industrie du liège. 
Chef de file d'une industrie naturellement durable, AMORIM promeut, valorise et viabilise les forêts de chênes -liège, puits de carbone naturel et l’un des écosystèmes les plus importants au monde pour la préservation de la biodiversité. AMORIM et ses filiales sont engagés dans un programme de protection des forêts de chênes-liège qui occupent une superficie estimée à plus de 2,2 millions d'hectares dans le bassin Ouest de la Méditerranée, principalement au Portugal, en Espagne, en France et en Italie.

Name: Houtindegww.nl
Description:
Centrum Hout en haar projectpartners willen het natuurlijke, milieu- en mensvriendelijke materiaal hout onder de aandacht brengen. Met het actieplan Hout in de gww wil de houtsector bijdragen aan een duurzame economie en maatschappelijk ondernemen bevorderen. 

Zij wil dat bereiken door kennis over hout en houtproducten breed te delen binnen de grond-, weg- en waterbouw. Het actieplan richt zich met name op adviseurs en opdrachtgevers omdat zij mede vorm geven aan het inrichten en instand houden van de duurzame leefomgeving.  Hout en houtproducten hebben uitstekende technische eigenschappen en passen naadloos in een biobased en circulaire economie. Verder is de grondstof hout te eenvoudig te volgen tot aan de duurzaam beheerde bron en hebben houtproducten veelal een zeer lage milieubelasting.

Met het delen van kennis over hout en houtproducten wil de houtsector bijdragen aan het realiseren van een duurzame, biobased, circulaire en klimaatvriendelijke economie.

Name: Tribalveda
Description:
We are Tribalveda, India’s only online marketplace selling organic and natural products made from Jamun, also known as Java Plum or Indian Blackberry. 

Tribal communities of India are a storehouse of knowledge on traditional herbs and forest produce. And Ayurveda is our Vedic treatise on medicines and medicinal practices. Tribalveda combines the two, selling healthy Jamun products made by tribal communities in the forests of Udaipur -- the southernmost tip of Rajasthan.

What we do?

We work with forest produce collected by tribal women from forests, in turn providing them with dignified livelihood opportunities. We process the produce without using chemicals or preservatives in world-class facilities with the highest focus on hygiene. Our high-technology packaging ensures that our organic and all-natural products reach you in the healthiest way possible.

We are working with Jamun right now and will expand to other produce very soon. We chose Jamun to begin with because in Puranas, India is referred to as Jambudvīpa or the land of Jamun. The fruit finds a mention in the epic, Ramayana, as Lord Rama survived on this berry during his 14 years of exile in the forest. 

Our Products:

We currently offer 6 Jamun-based products. Jamun flakes (dried Jamun), Jamun strips, Jamun seed powder, Jamun caffeine-free tea, Jamun ark (concentrate) and Jamun vinegar. All our products are fresh from the forests and preservative free.

Health Benefits of Jamun:

Jamun is rich in antioxidants, proteins, vitamins, iron, magnesium, potassium and some phytochemicals. The diuretic effects of Jamun help in cleansing kidneys while the high fibre content helps in digestion and prevents nausea. This fruit is especially useful for diabetics as its high alkaloid content controls blood sugar levels. Jamun seed powder is very beneficial for diabetics.

Our Social Impact:

We work with women from tribal communities that live in the forests of Udaipur.

It is our mission to provide the next generation with the resources, skills and guidance needed to join the forest and wood products manufacturing workforce. Siempre nos ha caracterizado la creación de diseños exclusivos que despertarán todos tus sentidos. Los productos pueden ser realizados con Finish foil, CPL o vinilo y están diseñados para puertas, paneles, mobiliario,
molduras, perfiles... 
La aplicabilidad de nuestros productos es muy amplia, con un gran abanico de posibilidades, permitiendo recubrir lugares a los que todos no pueden llegar. Esto es debido a los 40 años de experiencia en el sector y a una mejora continua constante.

Name: Humboldt Sawmill Company, LLC
Description:
Humboldt Redwood Company, LLC (HRC) was formed in 2008. Ten years later, in 2018, Humboldt Sawmill Company, LLC (HSC) was formed. Name: Softex Hellas
Description:
Το ξεκίνημα της Softex, μας φέρνει πίσω στο 1936 όπου ιδρύθηκε από την οικογένεια Κεφάλα και στο 1937 που ξεκίνησε να λειτουργεί στο Βοτανικό. Η πορεία της από την αρχή ήταν ανοδική εκτινάσσοντας την παραγωγή χαρτιού από 1.250 τόνους το 1950 σε 59.000 τόνους το 1968. Μέχρι το 1974 το χαρτί Softex έμπαινε σε περισσότερα από τα μισά νοικοκυριά στην Ελλάδα. Το 1984 πέρασε στο Δημόσιο και το 1999 μεταβιβάστηκε στην ιταλική πολυεθνική Bolton Group και στη συνέχεια το brand Softex αγοράζεται από την χαρτοβιομηχανία Intertrade Hellas Α.Β.Ε.Ε, μία από τις μεγαλύτερες εταιρείες επεξεργασίας χάρτου στην Ελλάδα. Η Intertrade, διαθέτοντας εργοστάσια στις Αχαρνές και με την παρουσία της στην εγχώρια αγορά τα τελευταία 24 χρόνια, παράγει χαρτί υγείας, χαρτοπετσέτες, κουζινόχαρτο για οικιακή και επαγγελματική χρήση και χαρτομάντηλα εξάγοντας μέχρι σήμερα σε 23 χώρες και απασχολώντας περισσότερους από 120 εργαζομένους.

Η Intertrade Hellas, ιδρύοντας μια νέα εταιρεία με το όνομα Softex Μονοπρόσωπη Ι.Κ.Ε., ανέλαβε την ανάπτυξη του brand name της Softex δίνοντας πνοή στο ιστορικό brand και διεκδικώντας ξανά τον ηγετικό ρόλο που είχε το όνομα Softex στην ελληνική αγορά.

Name: Angel Estrada & Cía.
Description:

La empresa ha sido capaz de mantener intacta su firme vocación orientada hacia la calidad, el compromiso y la innovación permanente. Ángel Estrada es hoy sinónimo de vanguardia en materia de tecnología, procesos productivos y desarrollo de productos escolares y de oficina.

Con una planta integrada por más de 400 personas, Estrada considera a su gente como un recurso primordial para lograr la concreción de sus objetivos.

Ángel Estrada concentra sus actividades de logística para sus productos en Esteban Etcheverría donde entrega más de 20 mil toneladas anuales. El centro de distribución ocupa una superficie de 20 mil metros cuadrados, que permiten abastecer de manera ágil y eficiente los pedidos de sus clientes, tanto en el mercado interno como en el exterior.

En la provincia de La Rioja se encuentra la planta de producción, con una superficie total de aproximadamente 72 mil metros cuadrados. En ella se lleva a cabo la producción de más de 16 mil toneladas de conversión de materiales, lo que equivale a 70 millones de unidades destinadas tanto al consumo nacional como el internacional. La Planta cuenta con un sofisticado y avanzado plantel de máquinas automáticas, que le permite sumar mayor eficacia y rapidez en cada una de sus cadenas de producción.

Name: Legal Shred
Description:

Mobile shredding is a service where our truck comes to your location and can shred material.  We provide both regular mobile shredding and micro shredding.  

Offsite shredding is a service where our truck comes to your location but picks the material up and takes it away for shredding back at our plant.

Description:
Bamboo House India is a social enterprise building green livelihoods by transforming natural and discarded materials into sustainable products and income opportunities.

For 18 years, we have worked with communities that society often overlooks—marginalised women, prisoners, refugees, waste pickers, and low-income artisans—helping them rebuild identity, dignity, and economic independence through skill-based livelihoods.

Our work sits at the intersection of people, materials, and climate action.
From bamboo to textile waste, plastic waste, agri waste, industrial scrap, and natural fibres, we turn undervalued materials into functional products while creating stable income pathways for underserved communities.

We believe:
Waste is not a problem. Lack of livelihoods is.
When people gain skills, waste becomes opportunity—and opportunity becomes dignity.

What we do:
• Green & circular livelihood training
• Bamboo & natural material housing
• Upcycled textile and plastic furniture
• Sustainable product development
• Community entrepreneurship programs

Our mission is simple:
Design livelihoods, restore dignity, and build a circular economy that includes everyone—not just the privileged.

If you believe sustainability must be people-first, you’re in the right place.

Name: Emirates Pallet Factory LLC
Description: Emirates Pallet Factory LLC is a management consulting company based out of 4 Saih Shuaib Road NO, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

Name: ONDUNORTE
Description:
A nova ONDUNORTE é composta por duas plantas fabris estrategicamente localizadas em Igarassu/PE e Itaporanga d´Ajuda/SE, somando um total de 123.000 metros quadrados de área construída onde produzimos 6000 toneladas de papel/mês totalizando 72.000 toneladas/ano.

Contamos com a força de trabalho de aproximadamente 830 colaboradores diretos e indiretos que contribuem para manter o abastecimento do mercado varejista e atacadista do Norte/Nordeste. Nossas caixas para embalagem são feitas sob medida para a necessidade de cada um de nossos clientes, abastecendo indústrias dos mais diversos segmentos, visamos entregar caixas resistentes que facilitem e atendam adequadamente cada uma delas.

Aqui o cuidado vai de ponta a ponta, do momento em que iniciamos a produção até a chegada do produto nos lares de nossos consumidores. Somos uma empresa genuinamente nordestina, valorizamos nossa cultura e as nossas raízes de povo nordestino.

Temos uma robusta malha logística, que são responsáveis por atender nossos clientes de acordo com a necessidade de cada um, atendemos clientes de diversos tamanhos e setores com rapidez e eficiência visando sempre a excelência do abastecimento.
A solidez de nossas operações é um reflexo de nossa gestão pautada em planejamento, ação, controle e acompanhamento de rotinas e processos promovendo a certeza da entrega de produtos confiáveis e que geram credibilidade para o mercado.

A vida nos ensina que devemos ser generosos, atuamos com responsabilidade social e ambiental, preservando recursos e ajudando a sociedade através de parceiros que trabalham ativamente cuidando da educação e bem estar de uma nova geração visando um futuro melhor para todos estamos apenas começando mais um passo desta história, liderados por pessoas que respiram um propósito em tudo que fazem.

Tudo isto nos motiva a viver o presente, contribuindo para o cuidado com a saúde e higiene de milhares de pessoas e fazendo parte do dia a dia das famílias brasileiras.

ReWorks möchte zu einer besseren Umwelt beitragen. Deshalb setzen wir uns für eine nachhaltige Kreislaufwirtschaft ein. Was wir von der Natur nehmen, geben wir der Natur zurück. Und zwar so, dass sie keine langfristigen Schäden davonträgt.

Im Ökosystem von ReWorks treffen Nachhaltigkeit und Kreativität aufeinander. Wir setzen wiederverwertbare Ideen um! Vielleicht auch schon bald dein Projekt?

Description: Garnica is a leading global manufacturer of premium, sustainable plywood. Garnica is committed to empowering its North American customers in a transformative era where efficiency and exceptional service intersect to propel sustainable plywood solutions forward.

Name: Marwood Ltd
Description:
Marwood knows wood. And we know how to maximize the value of wood. Each of our products are designed to be leaders in their field. The best quality available at competitive prices.

Name: SOFPO Groupe ROSSMANN
Description:
SOFPO, filiale du Groupe ROSSMANN, est spécialisée dans la production d’emballages en carton ondulé à destination de l’agro-alimentaire, de la pharmaco-cosmétique et de l'industrie.

Le Groupe ROSSMANN réalise un chiffre d’affaires de 600 millions €. Il est présent en Europe et en Afrique avec 25 sites de production comptants 3000 salariés.

Name: Cepi
Description:
Cepi is a Brussels-based non-profit making organisation representing the European pulp and paper industry and championing this industry’s achievements and the benefits of its products. 
Through its 19 national associations Cepi gathers 495 companies operating more than 900 pulp and paper mills across Europe producing paper, cardboard, pulp and other bio-based products. Cepi represents 22% of world production, €82 billion of annual turnover to the European economy and directly employs more than 177,000 people.

Name: Uniboard
Description: Uniboard is a leading North American manufacturer of engineered wood products, with installed capacity of over 640 million square feet of raw particleboard, high-density and medium-density fiberboard, of which over 50% is converted into value-added melamine and HPL. Its products are sold to retailers, distributors and finished goods manufacturers, which cater to the kitchen cabinet industry, the furniture industry, the renovation and construction industries. Uniboard is the largest supplier of thermofused melamine panels in North America. More information at: www.uniboard.com Uniboard, est l’un des principaux producteurs de bois reconstitué en Amérique du Nord, avec une capacité de production de plus de 640 millions de pieds carrés de panneaux de particules bruts, de panneaux de fibres à densité moyenne et de panneaux de fibres à haute densité dont plus de 50 % sont convertis en mélamine en stratifié haute pression. Ses produits sont vendus à des grossistes, distributeurs et détaillants qui desservent principalement les industries de l’armoire de cuisine et du meuble, les secteurs de la construction et de la rénovation. Uniboard est le plus important fournisseur de panneaux de mélamine thermofusionnés en Amérique du Nord. Pour en savoir plus : www.uniboard.com

NUESTRO PAPEL ES CUIDAR BIEN DE TI.

Name: Garnica
Description:
We’ve been challenging the ordinary since 1941. Garnica’s passion stems from a strong industrial devotion to the environment; this vocation has made us what we are: global leaders of plywood from sustainable sources, known for both quality and constant innovation. 

Our goal: surprise our clients with an extraordinary product, always moving towards a more respectful and sustainable industry. 

For more than 80 years, we’ve been carefully and consciously working to:

 Encourage the use of plantation wood like poplar, a high-quality raw material of high ecological value to produce plywood.
 Create a more sustainable manufacturing process.
 Consistently innovate to meet the needs of our clients.
 Attract, take care of, and bet on our employees.
 Seek continuous excellence.

Name: Catalyst Paper
Description:
Owned and Operated by Paper Excellence

We manufacture diverse specialty printing papers, newsprint and pulp for retailers, publishers and commercial printers, have an annual production capacity of 1.3 million tonnes of paper and pulp.

We are: 
◦ The only western North American producer of coated mechanical paper and SC paper 
◦ Among the largest producers of directory paper in the world 

Our Sage line of specialty papers comes with verifiable assurances relating to fibre supply, carbon emissions and mill-level performance. We respond to both the Carbon Disclosure Project and the Forest Footprint Disclosure Project, and all of our mills are chain-of-custody certified to both the Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification (PEFC) and Forest Stewardship Council (FSC)  standards. 

Catalyst has been ranked by Corporate Knights magazine as one of the 50 Best Corporate Citizens in Canada for eleven consecutive years.

We are headquartered in Richmond, British Columbia (BC), Canada and have three mills located in western Canada and a distribution facility in Surrey, BC. We have a workforce of 1,600 employees across North America.

Name: Palm Group
Description:
Palm is one of the leading companies in the European paper industry. The Palm Group is divided into Papierfabrik Palm with its 5 paper mills for the manufacture of paper and Palm Packaging Group with 26 plants for the manufacture of corrugated board. The third pillar of our operations, which encompasses the purchasing of raw materials for all our papers and corrugated boards made from 100% recycled paper are joined under the umbrella of Palm Recycling consisting of two recycling companies.

In all these areas our company name stand for exceptional product quality, innovative development of our production and processes, close customer relationships and reliable customer care and service.

"'Growth under our own steam' has always been our motto. We are a traditional company and we have created a company spirit where innovation can thrive for the benefit of prosperity and success of our customers as well as for our company." - Dr. Wolfgang Palm

Name: Zeina Group
Description:
Egyptian Company for Paper & Hygienic Products (Zeina) was founded in 1988 by Engineer Abdul Karim Natout. Understanding customer demands and supplying premium & hygienic tissue products was a driving force behind its vision. Driven by the ambition to become a market leader, the founder invested in a state- of-the-art facility in 10th of Ramadan City. Zeina grew to become a 500 strong human resource base with a leading market position over a 10 year period.

 

The ability to manufacture world-class tissue products from 100% virgin pulp, a customer-driven strategy and a capable distribution arm, led “Zeina” to become a household brand name for tens of millions of customers in Egypt.   

 

Zeina focuses on fostering personal and professional growth of its employees, reflecting a sense of community that nurtures innovation to support its overall business objectives.  A second converting plant was developed which added capacity and new products to Zeina’s portfolio. Zeina’s growth has been driven by a set of values, which evolved as key pillars for Zeina Group:

 

Innovation       :  Committed to introducing new ideas to enhance customer lives

Accountability :  Transacting business in a responsible manner

Reliability        :  Offering products of consistent high and superior quality 

Authenticity     :  A heritage of integrity and loyalty

Name: MD Papéis
Description:
Somos uma empresa 100% brasileira que atua desde 1945 produzindo papéis essenciais para atender o mercado editorial e gráfico. Fazemos parte do Grupo Formitex, que atua nos principais segmentos da economia brasileira.

Utilizando matérias primas procedentes exclusivamente de áreas de reflorestamento, possuímos uma linha de produtos de alta qualidade, sempre comprometidos com a sustentabilidade ambiental e social. Nossos principais produtos são cartões para embalagens.

Em sintonia com as demandas do mercado brasileiro e internacional, investimos constantemente em novos negócios e em pessoas com o objetivo de aumentar a capacidade industrial e oferecer um excelente nível de serviço e atendimento comercial.

Hoje com uma unidade localizada em Limeira – SP, nos tornamos uma das principais empresas do setor no País e trabalhamos sempre com o objetivo de contribuir para o desenvolvimento humano, a responsabilidade social e o respeito ao meio ambiente.

Name: CMPC Sack Kraft
Description:
A CMPC é uma empresa global com mais de 100 anos de história.

Fabricamos soluções sustentáveis de embalagem para proteção e transporte de produtos, utilizando fibras virgens e recicladas.

Somos especialistas em embalagens à base de papel de fibra de pinus radiata. Com forte presença global, somos um dos líderes mundiais na fabricação de sacaria.

A qualidade é parte fundamental do nosso DNA. Trabalhamos com os mais altos padrões e metodologia TPM para entregar produtos de excelência.

Name: Viking Kağıt ve Selüloz A.Ş
Description:
1982 yılında Yaşar Topluluğu’ na katılmasının ardından hızla büyüyen Viking Kağıt, 1996' da girdiği temizlik kağıdı sektöründe bugün yıllık 45.800 ton üretim kapasitesine sahiptir. Sürdürülebilir kalite anlayışını ilke edinen Viking Kağıt, tuvalet kağıdı, havlu, peçete, kutu mendil ve ıslak havludan oluşan geniş ürün yelpazesiyle ev içi ve ev dışı tüketim pazarına ürünler sunmaktadır. Her iki kanalda tüketicilerin farklı istek ve ihtiyaçlarına uygun yenilikçi ürünler yaratan Viking Kağıt, Türkiye’de 20’den fazla bayi ve 200’den fazla direkt satış noktası ile ürün dağıtımını etkin şekilde gerçekleştirmektedir. 

Güçlü markaları ve 70’ i aşkın ürün portföyüyle farklı tüketici gruplarının beklentilerini karşılayan Viking Kağıt, temizlik kağıtları sektöründe yenilikçi kimliği ve çevre dostu uygulamaları ile öne çıkmaktadır. Şirket, sektör ve tüketici dinamiklerini yakından takip ederken, müşterilerinin ihtiyaç ve beklentileri doğrultusunda güçlü Ar-Ge yapısıyla pek çok yenilikçi ürün geliştirmektedir. İlk pamuk katkılı tuvalet kağıdı, ilk 3 katlı tuvalet kağıdı, ilk aloe vera katkılı tuvalet kağıdı, ilk seçimli yaprak havlu gibi yenilikçi ürünleri ile sektörüne kazandırmıştır. 

Üretimde kalite standartlarını sürekli yükselten Viking Kağıt, bu çalışmalarını uluslararası bağımsız kuruluşlar tarafından verilen belgeler ile tescillendirmektedir. Türkiye temizlik kağıtları sektöründe bir ilk olan geri dönüştürülmüş kağıt işleme tesisini (de-inking) 2000 yılında hizmete alan Viking Kağıt, “doğa dostu” temizlik kağıdı ürünleri ile yılda ortalama 310.000 ağacın kesilmesine engel oluyor.

Ayrıca 2015 yılından bu yana yıllık olarak kurumsal karbon ayak izi ve su ayak izi hesaplanmaktadır. Viking Kağıt, elde ettiği bu sonuçları raporlamayı ve karbon salınımı azaltan projeler geliştirmeyi sürdürmektedir.

Name: SupremeX Inc.
Description: SupremeX is the only national packaging and envelope manufacturer in Canada, with 9 facilities across 4 provinces as well as 5 facilities in the United States, employing approximately 900 people. SupremeX’s growing footprint allows it to efficiently manufacture and distribute paper and packaging solutions designed to the specifications of major national and multinational corporations, resellers, government entities, SMEs and solutions providers.

Name: Cia Canoinhas de Papel
Description:
No ramo de papéis descartáveis, desde 1983, a Cia Canoinhas de Papel conta hoje com mais de 700 colaboradores diretos em um único parque fabril localizado na cidade de Canoinhas/SC.

Sendo considerada uma das maiores empresas de Santa Catarina e atua nos segmentos de papel higiênico, papel toalha de cozinha, guardanapo e produtos institucionais.

Com marcas consolidadas no mercado, como a linha de Papel Higiênico Fofinho e Bambino e a linha de Papel toalha de cozinha e guardanapo Sorella, a Cia Canoinhas também produz as marcas de grandes redes supermercadistas, as chamadas “marcas próprias”.

A empresa tem representantes e clientes em todo o território nacional. O atendimento comercial é feito pelos escritórios de vendas que a empresa mantém em São Paulo – Capital e em Curitiba/PR.

A Cia Canoinhas é uma empresa voltada para uma Gestão Ambiental Responsável e Sustentável,  sempre investindo em novas tecnologias na área.

Os reconhecimentos deste esforço são uma Menção Honrosa em 1998 e os três Prêmios Fritz Müller recebidos em 2001, 2008 e 2015, concedidos pela FATMA – Fundação de Meio Ambiente de Santa Catarina.

MAIS DO QUE PRODUZIR PAPEL, NÓS FAZEMOS O NOSSO PAPEL!

Name: Progroup AG
Description:
Progroup AG - designed for innovation and speed 

To question the status quo, to develop completely new approaches and get trend-setting concepts ready for market launch: this is what Progroup AG stands for. The successful development of the company is based on technological leadership, network management and its supply chain strategy. With three paper mills, seven sheet feeder plants, several service provider subsidiaries and our core business - the production of corrugated base papers and corrugated sheet boards – we are among the top 5 industry leaders in Western and Central Europe.

Please visit us at www.progroup.ag.

Name: Lindenmeyr Munroe
Description:
Our extensive history begins in 1859 with the opening of Lindenmeyr Paper in Manhattan, New York. Throughout the years, we have focused on building a strong future for the print industry by pursuing strategic acquisitions and joining forces with renowned print advocacy organizations. Today, Lindenmeyr Munroe is the leading independent paper, packaging, wide format and facility solutions provider in the US, supporting businesses nationwide with a comprehensive selection of products and services. 

With financial stability, we are able to continuously invest in our people, local inventories with diversified products, and the latest technologies that provide innovative solutions. We are locally available in every facet, making us easily accessible and allowing us to maintain our commitment to provide exceptional service and selection to our customers.

Lindenmeyr Munroe has the experience, knowledge, infrastructure, and technology to be your reliable and trustworthy partner.

Lindenmeyr Munroe benefits from our corporate parent, Central National Gottesman Inc. (CNG), a global sales, marketing, and distribution organization that owns a range of businesses primarily in the forest products industry. Founded in 1886 and headquartered in Purchase, NY, CNG employs 4,300 people in 29 countries worldwide. CNG is privately held and builds on more than 137 years of family ownership, market knowledge, and adaptability to create value for clients around the world.

Name: Irving Woodlands
Description: Since 1882, Irving Woodlands has been investing in healthy, diverse and growing forests. We invest in our infrastructure, new and improved technology, scientific research, our employees and the communities where we live and operate.

Name: Grupo Zucamor
Description:
Historia
1951 – Se funda Zucamor S.A., produciendo fundas para botellas de sidra en una corrugadora simple faz.
1954 – Se adquiere el predio de la ciudad de Ranelagh.
1957 – Se instala la primera máquina de fabricación de papel.
1985 – Se inaugura la planta de corrugado y cajas de Zucamor Cuyo.
1999 – Se adquiere la planta de corrugado y cajas de Inland Argentina. Actual planta de Zucamor Quilmes.
Zucamor asociada con B.I.S.A. adquiere el 93% del paquete accionario de Papel Misionero S.A., único productor argentino de papel kraft.
2001 – Se adquiere el 100% de Puntapel, una de las principales fábricas de bolsas multipliegos del país.
2004 – El fondo DLJ Merchant Banking Partners adquiere el 51% del capital accionario de la empresa.
2006 – Se conforma el Grupo Zucamor. Se compra a B.I.S.A el porcentaje de Papel Misionero, quedándose el Grupo con el 93% del paquete accionario.

Name: CARPELO S/A
Description: A Carpelo, é uma empresa voltada a prestação de serviços na área florestal, tem como objetivo fornecer serviços de qualidade, respeitando as leis e normas pertinentes ao negócio com foco na satisfação do cliente, preservando o meio ambiente, a saúde e segurança dos seus colaboradores através da melhoria contínua de seus processos.

Name: Elite Professional Perú
Description:
RUC: 20266352337
RS: SOFTYS PERU S.A.C.

Elite Professional brinda soluciones integrales de higiene y limpieza en respuesta a las necesidades específicas de cada ámbito profesional como: hoteles, clínicas, entidades educativas, industrias, comercios y todo aquel espacio que requiera una solución higiénica.
Contamos con una amplia gama de productos de primera calidad, para mejorar la experiencia de los usuarios y sumar valor a sus ambientes: papeles higiénicos, servilletas, sabanillas, toallas de mano, jabones y dispensadores para dosificar su consumo y optimizar la relación costo-rendimiento.
Mediante una amplia red de distribuidores y de la mano de nuestra fuerza de venta especializada le brindamos asesoramiento para encontrar la solución higiénica que más se ajuste a cada ámbito de uso.
Además, nuestro servicio de atención técnica y post venta lo ayudará a construir un espacio confiable para la satisfacción de los usuarios más exigentes.

Name: Aglomerados Cotopaxi
Description:
Bienvenido a Aglomerados Cotopaxi S.A. Somos una industria líder forestal ecuatoriana fabricante de tableros aglomerado, MDF, madera sólida y molduras. Estamos comprometidos con el desarrollo sostenible desde 1978 y nuestra visión es continuar Sembrando Futuro. 

La sostenibilidad está en nuestro ADN, si quieres conocer como la desarrollamos día a día, te invitamos a ver el siguiente video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=17GmbMXNb58&t=3s

Name: MIDLAND
Description:
MIDLAND is one of the nation’s largest independent paper and packaging distributors.  We provide value added solutions for the efficient distribution of printing and publication paper, packaging supplies & equipment, and facility supplies.  Through experienced recommendations and our intimate knowledge of these industries, we will help you find the best solution for your needs at the most competitive pricing in this ever-changing marketplace.

We focus our attention on adding value by using our strong mill relationships and expertise in paper, packaging, printing, sustainability, and mailing to help you exceed your marketing and financial objectives.  We will provide you with regular updates on the direction of the market to effectively and economically help manage your programs. 

Our employees are an unparalleled, detail-oriented team of dedicated professionals bringing experience from all facets of the industry.  We pride ourselves on providing outstanding service, practical knowledge, technological innovation and continuous value-added services.  We proudly serve a broad spectrum of clients, from large Fortune 500 companies to smaller family-owned businesses.

MIDLAND is not simply a distribution company.   In 2019, we acquired CohereOne, a multichannel consulting and strategic services firm.  With their seasoned experts on our team, we offer strategic planning, branding, campaign execution, integrated print and digital direct mail solutions, and analytics to drive sales more effectively and efficiently.  CohereOne engages with brands by conducting a helpful assessment to learn about the health of their business and to discover opportunities for significant and measurable growth.  

In 2022, MIDLAND acquired J.Schmid, a prominent creative and branding agency, to add to the value-added "performance" services we offer our clients.

MIDLAND also moved into the custom converting space in 2023, with the acquisition of Connemara Converting, to offer additional value.

The company has manufacturing facilities in Europe, Asia and North America, with corporate headquarters in Charleston, South Carolina.

AstenJohnson emphasizes quality in its innovative products and builds long-term relationships with its customers, associates, suppliers and communities based on five values:

Description:
We believe in the future of print and its effective coexistence with digital media. Our high performing graphic papers and services add value to our customers' businesses, while actively fulfilling demanding environmental and social responsibility criteria.

Sustainability is the driving force behind our responsible sourcing and use of raw materials, our resource-efficient production and our caring for people and society. 

UPM Communication Papers is the world's leading producer of graphic papers, supplying a wide product range that includes magazine, newsprint and fine papers.

With headquarters in Germany, UPM Communication Papers employs approximately 6,500 people.

For over 100 years, Comact has been a leading OEM in high-caliber wood processing equipment, digital technologies, cutting solutions, project services, and aftermarket support. Whether for brownfield or greenfield projects, Comact’s expertise provides wood processing facilities with the confidence that their investments will yield superior performance, throughput, and ROI. Name: LUMIN
Description:
LUMIN is a global leader in socially responsible and environmentally sustainable wood products based in Uruguay.

Our business is inspired by the desire to guarantee a trustworthy supply of wood-products from responsible and sustainable sources delivered to our clients at national, regional, and global level.  Our business includes 120,000 hectares of timberland in north eastern and north central Uruguay, as well as a seedling nursery, a cogeneration facility, and a state-of-the-art plywood and veneer manufacturing facility.

Our timberlands constitute a mix of pine and eucalyptus trees, with a core focus on sustainability both in environmental management systems and in harvesting practices. Our operations produce high quality, long lasting, beautiful and sustainable wood products that are externally certified to international standards (including FSC).

Today, LUMIN has over 750 personnel across timberlands, manufacturing and commercial teams. LUMIN plywood panels are globally recognized as a leading brand and are structurally certified, solid, lightweight, resistant, and with a beautiful appearance suitable for many end-uses. LUMIN plywood has PS1 and CE2 + certification for use in construction in the United States and Europe respectively and is sold through a network of regional offices and reliable and trusted distributors.

Name: Twin Rivers Paper Company
Description:
Twin Rivers Paper Company, headquartered in Madawaska, Maine, is an integrated specialty paper manufacturer producing 400,000 tons of paper per year for the publishing, label, technical and packaging sectors. The company operates a pulp mill in New Brunswick and diverse paper assets in northern Maine and upstate New York that produce uncoated and coated specialty papers in a broad range of basis weights and finishes. Customized product development and dedicated technical services support are company hallmarks. 

With U.S. ownership by Atlas Holdings and Blue Wolf Capital, a sound financial structure and a strong balance sheet that fuels continuous investments in its assets, Twin Rivers Paper offers its customers the security of local product availability and the assurance of long-term viability.

Description: Forest Products Association of Canada (FPAC) provides a voice for Canada’s wood, pulp, paper, and wood-based bio-products producers nationally and internationally in government, trade, and environmental affairs. As an industry with annual revenues exceeding $75B, Canada’s forest products sector is one of the country’s largest employers operating in over 600 communities, providing 225,000 direct jobs, and over 600,000 indirect jobs across the country.

Name: Mohawk
Description:
Founded in 1931 in Upstate New York, Mohawk has produced some of North America's best-known fine papers for designers, brands, and printers for over 90 years. Mohawk makes paper that is as enduring and unique as it was well-crafted and beautiful. Mohawk has demonstrated a decades-long history of innovation and resilience in the fields of digital printing and sustainability. Mohawk operates with an eye towards the future while honoring our past, continuously pushing the boundaries of papermaking and upholding our mission to make paper more beautiful, effective, responsible, and memorable. 
Mohawk's parent company, Fedrigoni Group - one of the world's leading manufacturers of special paper for luxury packaging and other creative applications, self-adhesive materials, RFID and connection solutions – shares the same passion.  Discover more about Fedrigoni Group: https://fedrigoni.com
 
At its core, Mohawk is a company of makers. We make real things that make a real impact. We connect people and ideas. What we make helps creative print go from simply good to truly great.

Name: Pixelle Specialty Solutions
Description: Pixelle Specialty Solutions is proudly made in the U.S.A., with facilities in Pennsylvania and Ohio. Through innovation, quality, and expertise, Pixelle delivers a wide range of specialty papers for printing and packaging applications.

Name: Forest2Market, Inc.
Description: Forest2Market empowers participants in the forest, wood products, and bioenergy industries to make exponentially better-informed decisions through the strategic application of industry expertise and unique price databases. We offer timber, wood fiber, wood fuel, and lumber pricing, as well as benchmarks, forecasts, and resource availability and feasibility studies. For more information, visit www.forest2market.com.

Name: Embrart Embalagens Inteligentes | Papelão Ondulado
Description:
A Embrart é uma empresa brasileira especializada na produção de embalagens de papelão ondulado de alta qualidade e durabilidade.

Através de serviços abrangentes e projetos especiais, a Embrart oferece soluções exclusivas para os mais variados setores, garantindo proteção adequada de produtos com eficiência de manuseio e armazenamento.

As embalagens Embrart são produzidas em equipamentos de alta tecnologia de impressão revelando uma grande variedade de cores com definição perfeita para a personalização estratégica e completa.

É a primeira empresa do ramo de papelão ondulado do sul do país a obter a certificação de qualidade NBR ISO 9001.

Name: Olmuksan
Description:
A prominent part of the corrugated packaging industry since 1968, Olmuksan has been offering high quality products and services to customers all around Turkey. 
Olmuksan is part of Mondi Group as of June 1, 2021

Name: Grupo Jari
Description:
Uma das principais organizações brasileiras no setor de madeira, celulose, papel e embalagens, com atuação também no mercado de produtos florestais não madeireiros, o Grupo Orsa traz a sustentabilidade como eixo de sua estratégia de negócios. Com capital 100% nacional, tornou-se referência mundial em manejo sustentável de floresta tropical nativa por suas operações em 545 mil hectares na região Amazônica do Vale do Jari, localizado entre os estados do Pará e do Amapá.

As empresas do Grupo - Jari Celulose, Papel e Embalagens; Orsa Florestal; Ouro Verde Amazônia e Fundação Orsa - atuam de forma integrada, em linha com o conceito internacional dos 3Ps (people-pessoas, profit-lucro e planet-planeta), incorporando modelos de ação economicamente viáveis, socialmente justos e ambientalmente corretos.

Name: Irving Tissue
Description:
Irving Tissue is a leading manufacturer of household tissue products including bathroom and facial tissue, paper towels and napkins. We make some of North America’s top-selling tissue brands, including Royale and Majesta in Canada and Scotties facial tissue in the USA.  We are also a major supplier of private label brands for leading retailers across Canada and the United States. Irving Tissue has tissue making and converting facilities in Saint John and Dieppe, New Brunswick; Toronto, Ontario and Fort Edward, New York. The company was started in 1988 and employs over 1,000 people.

All Irving companies are backed by a commitment to the management of operations in an environmentally sustainable and socially responsible manner.

Name: American Wood Council
Description: The American Wood Council (AWC) is the voice of North American wood products manufacturing, an industry that provides over 450,000 men and women in the United States with family-wage jobs. AWC represents 86 percent of the structural wood products industry, and members make products that are essential to everyday life from a renewable resource that absorbs and sequesters carbon. Staff experts develop state-of-the-art engineering data, technology, and standards for wood products to assure their safe and efficient design, as well as provide information on wood design, green building, and environmental regulations. AWC also advocates for balanced government policies that affect wood products.

Name: Venkatalakshmi Paper & Boards Pvt. Limited(VLPB) - India
Description:
Venkatalakshmi Paper and Boards Pvt. Ltd. (VLPB) is a trusted name in the paper manufacturing industry, committed to sustainability and innovation. We specialize in the production of Newsprint, Writing and Printing Papers, MG Posters, and MG Kraft varieties, using 100% recycled paper as our raw material. With a focus on eco-friendly practices and quality-driven processes, VLPB delivers reliable paper solutions to meet the diverse needs of publishing, packaging, and commercial sectors. Our advanced manufacturing facilities and experienced team ensure consistent product excellence while promoting environmental responsibility. At VLPB, we believe in creating a greener tomorrow through responsible recycling and sustainable paper production.
