Name: James Cropper Paper & Packaging
Description: Since 1845, we have redefined the art of papermaking, pushing beyond the boundaries of conventional mills. At James Cropper, we embody a unique blend of technical intelligence and unwavering commitment to a better future.

Name: Setra Group
Description:
At Setra we want to do business where everyone prospers – not just ourselves but also our customers, society and nature. When a business profits everyone, we call that ‘Grönsamhet’ – a combination of the Swedish words for ‘green’ and ‘profit’. And we want to create Grönsamhet.

Setra is one of Sweden’s largest wood industry companies. At our plants, we transform forest raw material into climate-friendly, value-added products such as glulam, planed timber, wooden components and cross-laminated timber for the global housing and construction market.

All our timber comes from responsibly managed forests in some of the world’s best locations for conifers as a raw material. We also sell bioproducts such as bark, chips and sawdust to customers in the paper and pulp industry and for energy production.

We have approximately 800 employees and annual sales of around SEK 4 billion. Exports to Europe, North Africa, the Middle East and Asia account for about 65% of sales.

Name: Nissha Metallizing Solutions
Description:
Nissha Metallizing Solutions 

Nissha Metallizing Solutions is world leader in the production of coated metallized paper for flexible packaging and labels (wet glue labels, pressure sensitive labels, general labels and in-mold labels). Metallized paper is a sustainable alternative to foil or film. Metallized products are used in the production of functional, barrier, cosmetic, labelling and promotional packaging products for major brands. Nissha Metallizing Solutions serves the following industries: food, beverage, consumer packaging goods, entertainment and many others. It supplies its innovative products to customers worldwide from production sites in Belgium (Genk), Italy, (Casalgrasso), Brazil (Osasco), German (Berlin) and the United States (Franklin, MA). Thanks to a continuous investment in people, technology, quality and environmental protection, Nissha Metallizing Solutions consists of a group of over 700 highly committed and passionate people, guaranteeing a high level of specialist expertise.

Nissha Metallizing Solutions is a full subsidiary of Japanese multinational Nissha. Nissha is listed on the Tokyo stock exchange and is highly regarded for its technological leadership.

Name: Felix Schoeller
Description:
Felix Schoeller was founded in 1895 and is headquartered in Osnabruck, Germany, with operations on a global scale, manufacturing specialist  papers. With around 2.500 employees, over 535,000 tonnes of specialist papers were produced and sold in 2021. The renowned Osnabruck-based business recorded revenues of >1 billion euros in 2021. Felix Schoeller develops, manufactures and distributes specialist papers for photographic applications, digital printing systems, the packaging market, self-adhesive applications and for the furniture, wood, and carpet industries.

In addition to its headquarters location in Osnabruck, Felix Schoeller has manufacturing facilities at four other German locations in Weißenborn und Penig in Saxony, Titisee-Neustadt in Baden-Württemberg and Günzach in Bavaria. The Group has a total of 17 locations and is represented with these in 10 different countries. 

We understand the importance of preserving the life we all know and treasure the moments that make a difference in our lives. That’s why we follow our vision to make life better through paper.

PAPER MADE FOR LIFE

For more information visit our website felix-schoeller.com

Essencial para impulsionar os resultados e eternizar as parcerias.

Name: AV Terrace Bay
Description:
The Terrace Bay Mill became the third Canadian mill to join the Aditya Birla Group’s pulp and fibre business (Grasim Industries Ltd.) in July 2012. On October 10th 2012, the Terrace Bay Mill successfully restarted production as a NBSK mill.

The pulp industry has a long history in the town of Terrace Bay; the original pulp mill was built in 1947. After a period of instability, the Terrace Bay Mill became the third Canadian company to join the Aditya Birla Group’s pulp and fiber business (Grasim Industries Ltd.) in July 2012. On October 10th 2012, the Terrace Bay Mill successfully restarted production as a paper grade pulp mill.
In a constantly changing market, we are adapting for the future. We are setting goals, creating plans of action and analyzing results. We are moving forward on the strength of our successes and the hurdles overcome. We are developing the foundation for shared prosperity for what lies ahead.

With over seven decades of responsible business practices, our businesses have grown into global powerhouses in a wide range of sectors – metals, textiles, carbon black, telecom and cement.

Name: Europap Tezol Kağıt
Description:
Our Company, established in 2001 in Bayraklı area in İzmir, started its operations with a converting facility designed to produce its own brands as well as private label products. Our initial operations included production of end-user tissue products using third-party semi-finished paper called rolls or Jumbo rolls. 

Rapid development in both production and sales prompted our Company to invest in expansion. In 2004, an integrated mill covering production of both semi-finished goods and finished products  was founded in İzmir. This mill provided both semi-finished goods needed for converting and also helped expand product diversity, and enabled us to produce also for the Away-from-Home market. Excess semi-finished goods could be sold to other companies, particularly in foreign markets.

Our Company continued to growin the following years. After increasing the capacity of its İzmir mill to approximately 55,000 tons with a new investment in 2009, we extended the total capacity beyond 90,000 tons with the launch of a new paper mill in Mersin in 2016. With another new paper mill in this OIZ, our total capacity is expected to rise to 133,000 tons.

Being among the top 500 companies in Turkey and holding the regional export champion title in its sector, our organization has established some of its paper mills in İzmir and Mersin with deinking processes that are not common in the country. These environmentally friendly processes utilize recycled paper collected from the market to produce tissue, which is mostly exported to foreign markets.

Our Company pays utmost attention to sustainability and quality and holds quality certificates such as ISO 9001, ISO 27001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, FSC CoC, BSCI, TSE, and IFS HPC.  Ours is the first and only company in its sector that holds an IFS HPC certificate.

Our Company went public and 24% of our shares started to be traded on Istanbul Stock Exchange since September 15, 2021.

Name: Columbia Forest Products
Description:
Founded in 1957, Columbia Forest Products is North America's premier manufacturer of hardwood plywood and hardwood veneer products. Columbia's decorative interior veneers and panels are used in cabinetry, fine furniture, architectural millwork and commercial fixtures.

Employee-owned and headquartered in Greensboro, North Carolina, Columbia Forest Products operates plants throughout the United States and Canada, with an operational network that spans the globe.

Columbia's products are sold through a network of wholesale distributors, mass merchandisers and original equipment manufacturers from three distinct business units: plywood, veneer and imports.

At the end of 2006 Columbia has converted all of its standard hardwood plywood production to produce formaldehyde-free panels called PureBond.

Name: West Fraser Europe
Description:
West Fraser Europe is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of engineered wood-based panel products. Our products are used extensively in the construction, DIY and furniture industries. 

• We have been supplying products to Europe for over 40 years and have a strong customer base, built on our record for excellent service and delivery, consistent quality and competitive pricing

• In Europe we produce in excess of 1.2million cubic metres of wood panels with a turnover of circa £225m

Name: PT. Pabrik Kertas Indonesia (PAKERIN)
Description:
PT. Pabrik Kertas Indonesia (PT. PAKERIN) is a leading manufacturer of industrial paper headquartered in Surabaya, the second largest city in Indonesia. Since starting commercial production in 1980, the company has expanded its installed capacity and continually increased the range of products it manufactures. PAKERIN is now widely regarded as one of the leading manufacturers of industrial paper in Indonesia and is committed to increasing its market share through low cost, high efficiency and advanced manufacturing. The company has served both national and international market.  

PAKERIN has a vertically integrated operation with its own plants producing pulps, caustic soda, electricity and steam, and raw water, which are the main ingredients in the paper production process. The company manufactures industrial paper which is used to make boxes and a wide range of packaging material for industrial and consumer goods. Its main products are Kraft liner, corrugating medium, coated duplex board, chip board, and core board.

A major reason for PAKERIN's success is the integration of the core manufacturing process with supporting facilities that are essential for the efficient running of a pulp and paper complex.

PAKERIN has a strong commitment to conservation and preservation of the environment. Recycling is central to the Company's manufacturing process, with more than 80% of the Company's primary raw materials being waste products and renewable resources.

Name: UPM Specialty Papers
Description:
UPM Specialty Papers meets the world’s demand for renewable packaging materials with high-quality packaging and label papers. Our approximately 2,000 experts work with customers to develop solutions that meet their business objectives. UPM Specialty Papers' sales and supply chain and mills in Finland, Germany and China serve customers around the world.

Discover why our products are Special by Nature: upmspecialtypapers.com

Name: Lignadecor Melamine Paper
Description:
Lignadecor is a leading manufacturer of impregnated papers and finish foils for the furniture industry.
Operating from our modern production facility in Istanbul, we employ a team of approximately 100 people, serving both domestic and international markets.

Exports to more than 45 countries account for 60% of our total sales.
Our key markets include Europe, the Middle East, the USA, Canada, South America, Russia, North Africa, and the Balkan countries.

Our steady growth and success are driven by our core principles:

A strong commitment to customer satisfaction and consistent service quality

A dynamic and innovative approach supported by advanced production technology

We aim to be your trusted and preferred supplier for high-quality decorative surfacing materials.

Name: Seaman Paper
Description:
Seaman Paper Company is the leading supplier of lightweight decorative tissue papers for retail packaging, consumer products and industrial lightweight papers.

The company is a privately owned, vertically integrated paper manufacturer with investments in plants and facilities that provide manufacturing diversity and technical capabilities to support the company’s future growth on a domestic and global level. We have grown globally through continuous innovation of our product line with a strong focus on sustainable manufacturing.

Seaman Paper supplies its products to the following market segments around the world: Retail, Footwear, Apparel, Cosmetics, Consumer (Resale), Floral, Party, and Arts & Crafts.

Name: Merensky Timber
Description:
A forestry and sawmilling concern, Merensky Timber supplies Pine and Eucalyptus lumber to southern African and international markets. 
Merensky plantations comprise both Pine and Eucalyptus species, totalling ca 65 000 hectares across South Africa. Ours are the largest privately-owned plantations in South Africa being managed on a sawlog rotation. Adhering to and often exceeding local and international standards for environmentally-sustainable forestry management practices, the Merensky plantations continue to provide the highest-quality saw timber to both the local and international markets.
Merensky is also a pioneer of commercially-grown sawlog rotation Eucalyptus in South Africa, with plantations extending to more than 10 000 hectares. Many decades of continuous genetic improvements have resulted in superior Eucalyptus sawlog plantations.
All Merensky plantations carry the prestigious Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) accreditation, an international audit benchmark assuring consumers that Merensky lumber originates from forests managed in a sustainable and responsible manner, according to the environmental social and economic principles of the FSC.
Merensky lumber is available in bulk direct to merchants or from Distribution Centres in major centres across South Africa. Product applications for our lumber include construction, furniture and joinery, among many others.

Name: ACON TIMBER
Description:
Bienvenidos a ACON TIMBER, una empresa del Grupo HS Timber.
Somos una de las principales plantas procesadoras de madera del país, conformada por un equipo humano con amplia trayectoria en la industria forestal. Ubicada en Virasoro, provincia de Corrientes, nuestra planta modelo transforma materia prima noble como la madera, en productos sostenibles y de alta calidad para un mercado de alta exigencia. Nuestro innovador modelo productivo -único en el país- utiliza tecnologías avanzadas y procesos eficientes, que minimizan el impacto ambiental y promueven el desarrollo sostenible de las comunidades donde operamos. Perfección en Madera.

Welcome to ACON TIMBER, an HS Timber Group company. 
We are one of the most important wood processing companies in Argentina, founded by professional people with long-stablished heritage in the forest industry. Located in Virasoro, province of Corrientes, our state-of-the-art production plant produces high-quality wood products for customers all over the world. For an industrial company that works with a sustainable raw material such as wood, it involves ensuring optimum, waste-free utilisation, but also playing an active role to mitigate the impact on society and the environment. Perfection in Timber.

Name: Mili Professional
Description:
União com Propósito

A Mili Professional é o resultado da parceria estratégica entre
o Grupo KWM - Kapersul Waste Management e a MILI S/A, unindo
tradição industrial e inovação para atender com excelência o mercado
institucional de papéis tissue.

Atuando em todo o território nacional e expandindo sua presença
na América Latina, a Mili Professional se consolida como uma marca
de confiança, com um portfólio versátil, desenvolvido para atender
às necessidades específicas de cada segmento da saúde à hotelaria,
da educação à indústria.

Cultura Organizacional

Nossa cultura é feita de cuidado, compromisso e evolução.
Na Mili Professional, valorizamos as pessoas, incentivamos
a inovação e cultivamos um ambiente colaborativo, ético
e com foco em resultados. Trabalhamos todos os dias para fazer
a diferença na vida das pessoas, dentro e fora da empresa.

Mili Professional, um papel importante na sua vida.

Name: Coropex Packaging India Private Limited
Description:
One Step Solution from Design to Deliver. 

We are confident to deliver a versatile range of products and solutions and are specialists in:

Flexo Corrugated Cartons
Litho Corrugated Cartons
Specialised Printing, Coating & Branding Solutions
Integrated Solutions in Corrugated Packaging
Folding Cartons
POP/POS Displays
Paper Corrugated Pallets & Wooden Pallets
Reprographics & Design Innovation

Name: Sustana
Description:
From recovery to fiber to paper production, Sustana is dedicated to finding new ways of putting clean materials within more everyday products—sustainably, responsibly, and meaningfully.

De la récupération à la fabrication de fibre, puis à la transformation en papier, Sustana s’engage à intégrer les matières propres au cœur des produits de papier de votre quotidien, de façon plus durable, responsable et significative.

Name: Arctic Paper
Description:
Originating in northern Europe, we are a paper group with a dedicated passion for making superior graphic fine paper for demanding fine paper users. Being ideal for creative design, our paper qualities offer a wide range of applications, including book production, advertising, office materials and other qualitative printed matter. We want to combine delivery of our fine paper with know-ledge that inspires better business for our customers.


www.arcticpaper.com

Name: Emerald Ecovations
Description:
Did you know that 32 million trees are cut down every year forcoffee cups and over 31 million treesare cut down every year for toilet paper? Our everyday choices matter, which is why we create sustainable products for your everyday essentials - from coffee cups and toilet paper to to-go containers and paper towels. 

We're on a mission to end deforestation and plastic pollution by creating tree-free, plastic-free and toxin-free paper products for your workspace. Since 1997, we've created 300+ eco-friendly products for businesses of all sizes. 

At Emerald Ecovations, our sustainable products include Tree-Free paper goods, plastics made without petroleum, disposables that are USDA Biopreferred, specialized packaging options, and chemical-free cleaning products. We provide food service and janitorial items for office buildings, cafeterias, hospitals, airlines, restaurants, venues, universities, and more. 

As leaders in sustainability, we help leaders understand their ESG Scope 3 goals and meet their CSRs by providing a Environmental Impact Report to quantify trees saved, water saved, carbon emissions, and more. 

By working with American farmers and manufacturers to transform traditionally wasted materials into high-quality disposables, eliminate local air pollution, increase farmers’ revenue, and create American jobs. These products are created from rapidly renewable materials like miscanthus, bamboo, bagasse (a byproduct of sugarcane), and plant starch.

Name: NWH
Description:
No one knows hardwoods like NWH. We began in the Pacific Northwest with a single alder mill in 1967. Over the years, the company has steadily grown and expanded to become the largest manufacturer and global supplier of hardwood lumber, producing 14+ species of domestic hardwood. Today we also import and distribute a variety of exotic hardwood species, and source both appearance and structural plywood.

As a manufacturer and supplier of products made from natural resources, it is our responsibility to make sure those resources are protected and responsibly managed. Both your customers and our business demand nothing less. We do our part by actively pursuing the strictest sourcing and resource management practices. 

North American Hardwoods are among the most plentiful and well-managed natural resources in the world.  Hardwood forests naturally regenerate themselves and do not require planting. The preferred method of harvesting is single-tree selection. This provides a sustainable supply and ensures the overall health of the forest including water quality, wildlife habitat, and biodiversity. As a result, the volume of hardwoods has more than doubled since 1950.

Name: Eska
Description:
ESKA is a brand of premium solid board dedicated to highly aesthetic, high-performance and sustainable luxury packaging, book, stationary, puzzle and games solutions. 

Located in The Netherlands and with international subsidiaries, we are a trusted, renowned partner for many great brands in the world.  

We are convinced that packaging gives brands a texture identity. 

As architects of identity materials, we take a full spectrum view of the creation and development process. 

We are B-Corp certified and we approach innovators who dare to move things forward. We partner with brands, designers and converters to expand the boundaries of sustainability.

Name: Elite Professional Chile
Description:
Elite Professional brinda soluciones integrales de higiene y limpieza para todo tipo de negocio, empresa o industria; entregando alta calidad de productos, innovación y servicio para cada uno de nuestros clientes: desde hoteles y clínicas hasta entidades educativas, industrias, comercios y todo aquel espacio que requiera una solución higiénica completa.

Contamos con una amplia gama de productos de primera calidad y excelente performance para mejorar la experiencia de los usuarios y sumar valor a sus ambientes: papeles higiénicos, toallas de mano, servilletas, sabanillas, faciales, paños de limpieza, jabones, alcohol gel, desinfectantes y dispensadores para dosificar el consumo y optimizar la relación costo uso.

Contamos con un equipo comercial especializado y comprometido en encontrar la mejor solución para tu negocio junto a una amplia red de distribuidores que nos permite llegar con nuestros productos a todos los rincones del país y así abastecer a nuestros diversos clientes. Además, nuestro exclusivo servicio de atención técnica brinda apoyo profesional para la instalación y mantención constante de dispensadores, lo que ayudará a construir un espacio confiable para la satisfacción de los usuarios más exigentes.

Name: Shotton Mill Limited
Description:
Shotton Mill Limited is constructing one of the largest and most technologically advanced paper mills in Europe, at its site in Deeside, North Wales. 

When operational, we will have the capacity to manufacture 750,000 tonnes per year of containerboard and 67,000 tonnes per year of tissue paper, potentially increasing to 210,000 tonnes. 

The Shotton site is a model of sustainability, using 100% recycled materials in containerboard production and harvesting recycled waste wood and biomass to use in green energy. 

An essential part of the circular economy initiative at the site will be the installation of a hydrogen enabled CHP plant, generating low carbon energy to sustainably power the mills operation, together with biogass resulting from anaerobic digestion based effluent treatment.

Name: Tembec
Description:
RayonierAM International IN BRIEF
      
RayonierAM International is a manufacturer of forest products – lumber, pulp, paper and specialty cellulose – and a global leader in sustainable forest management practices. 

RayonierAM International is hiring: Visit jobs.global.rayonieram.com to see openings for professional, technical and manufacturing positions in all our businesses.


RayonierAM International EN BREF

RayonierAM International est une société de fabrication de produits forestiers – bois, pâtes, papier et cellulose de spécialités – et un leader mondial en gestion des ressources forestières durable.

Name: Corporación Chilena de la Madera CORMA
Description: La Corporación Chilena de la Madera es una asociación gremial que reúne a más de 150 pequeñas, medianas y grandes empresas del mundo de la madera.

Name: EMPACOR S.A.
Description: Somos una empresa con más de 40 años de trayectoria, dedicada a brindar soluciones de empaque fabricado a partir de fibra reciclada, siendo pioneros en la contribución de crear un mundo ambientalmente sostenible y equitativo. Nos basamos en la aplicación de la economía circular con apoyo de las asociaciones de recicladores.

Name: Nordic Paper
Description: Nordic Paper is a leading producer of Greaseproof Paper and Kraft Paper. The paper we produce is used all around the world in various segments and markets. Our five paper mills are located in Sweden, Norway and Canada.

Name: VPK Packaging France
Description:
VPK France est une entreprise du groupe VPK Packaging, groupe intégré européen qui produit du papier, des emballages en carton ondulé et compact.
Nous maîtrisons toute la chaîne de fabrication, ce qui nous permet d’être réactif, de tenir vos délais, tout en étant compétitif grâce à nos différentes solutions techniques.
Avec l’expertise de nos bureaux d’études, nous pouvons vous accompagner et concevoir toutes sortes de produits.
Pour plus d’informations consultez notre site : https://www.vpkgroup.com/fr-fr

Name: Hamburger Containerboard – Prinzhorn Group
Description:
Hamburger Containerboard, part of the Austrian Prinzhorn Holding, offers its partners throughout Europe a full programme of high-quality corrugated case material products. 

Hamburger Containerboard has its origin in 1853, when its founder Wilhelm Hamburger set up a rag paper production facility in Pitten.

The companies that belong to the group are now among the leading manufacturers of high-quality corrugated base paper in Europe.

They produce over three million tons of paper every year, which is made exclusively from waste paper.
At 10 locations in 5 countries, Hamburger Containerboard produces brown and white uncoated papers, white coated papers and plasterboard.

Name: Appvion
Description:
Appvion innovates sustainable specialty coating solutions that are a part of many tickets, tags, labels, and packages consumers touch daily. Our solutions leverage a unique blend of proprietary processes and technical know-how to provide crisp imaging, which ensures reliable barcode scannability and 
consistent image quality for pressure-sensitive and non-pressure-sensitive applications. Headquartered in Appleton, Wisconsin, we are the market leader in specialty and high-performance coatings for direct thermal paper and film applications in North America. Our 115-year-long history began as a leading producer of carbonless and microencapsulation advancements. Today, our focus is on harnessing the power of materials science and innovation to serve a wide range of markets such as retail, healthcare, transportation, entertainment, and food packaging. Appvion is a portfolio company of Wynnchurch Capital L.P.

Name: Novacki Papel e Embalagens S/A
Description: Empresa no ramo de papel e papelão ondulado, com unidades localizadas em Monte Mor - SP, Porto União - SC, União da Vitória - PR.

Name: Timber Products Co.
Description:
Timber Products Company manufactures a wide range of wood products with a focus on decorative wood panels featuring beautiful wood veneers and laminates.

From environmental stewardship to wood product solutions, Timber Products Company defines choice, quality and sustainability.

Name: KMK Paper - Kahramanmaraş Kağıt Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.
Description:
Kahramanmaraş Kağıt Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Şirketi, 1988 yılında Kahramanmaraş’ta kurulmuştur. Faaliyetine 1989 yılı sonunda 40.000 ton/yıl kapasiteli PM I kağıt makinesi ile oluklu mukavva kağıtları üreterek başlamıştır. Fabrika, 30.000 m²’si kapalı olmak üzere 200.000 m² alan üzerine kurulmuştur. 1997 yılında PM II kağıt makinesinin üretime katılmasıyla gri karton üretimine de başlandı. Aynı yıl içerisinde PM I kağıt makinesinin modernizasyon yatırımı ile hem kalite arttırılmış hem de toplam kapasite 150.000 ton/yıl’a çıkarılmıştır.
2010 senesinde alınan yeni bir yatırım kararı ile Türkiye’nin özel sektördeki ilk gazete kağıdı fabrikası inşaatına ve kuruluma başlandı. Bu fabrika Kütahya’da Organize Sanayi Bölgesinde 20.000 m²’si kapalı olmak üzere 160.000 m² alan içerisinde, 90.000 ton/yıl üretim kapasiteli PM III kağıt makinesi ile 2012 senesi son çeyreğinde üretime başladı.
Kurulduğu günden bugüne oluklu mukavva sektörüne yönelik Fluting ve Testliner üretimiyle tanınan Kahramanmaraş Kağıt 2002'den beri Ar-Ge çalışmaları ile temizlik kağıtları, tekstil, matbaa, mobilya sektörlerine de yönelik çeşitli karton ve kağıt ürünlerini de portföyüne eklemiş, 2012 senesinde ikinci kağıt fabrikası yatırımının tamamlanması ile birlikte basım-yayın sektörüne de hizmet etmeye başlamıştır. Üretim portföyünde olmayan diğer basım, yayın ve ambalaj sektörüne yönelik kağıt türlerini yurtdışından almış olduğu temsilcilikler vasıtası ile karşılamaktadır.
Kahramanmaraş Kağıt, küreselleşen dünyadaki yerini alabilmek için yola çıktığı Toplam Kalite Yönetimi ve Müşteri Memnuniyeti anlayışında önemli çalışmalar gerçekleştirmiştir. Bu çerçevede geçmişten günümüze her zaman müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarına kaliteli, hızlı ve güvenle cevap vermiş, bunu da 1998 senesinden bu yana ISO 9001(UKAS) Kalite Yönetim Sistemi belgesi sahibi olarak ispatlamıştır. Bu doğrultuda sürekli hedeflerini yükselten bir firma olmanın haklı gururunu taşımaktadır.

Name: CPP
Description:
En CPP desarrollamos y fabricamos papeles de alto
desempeño para la industria de envases y embalajes. Con
más de 35 años de experiencia en el sector papelero y un
servicio especializado, ofrecemos productos de alta calidad
y un suministro estable que acompaña el crecimiento de
nuestros clientes.

Name: Cartopel S.A.I.
Description: converting corrugated plant for corrugated boxboard integrated with paper mill.

Name: Hamelinbrands
Description:
Hamelin is a leading supplier to the office and school markets.
In our state-of-the-art production facilities, we manufacture a wide range of consumer goods: Notebooks, Notepads, Drawing Pads, Drawing Paper, Diaries, Binders, Files, Folders, Dividers, Pockets, Desk Lamps, Rulers...
Our global brands Oxford and Elba are among the strongest in our markets.
Since its start-up in 1864, the company is still family-owned and has its headquarters in Normandy (France).

Hamelin has built a strong corporate culture based on values shared among all its employees:
• Respect and recognition of the professionalism of the company's employees, customers and suppliers. 
• Autonomy and sense of responsibility enhancing greater involvement of the personnel. 
• Long-term vision regarding the company's interests. 
• Sense of economy and practicality. 
• Humbleness and discretion. 

KEY FIGURES and FACTS
• Sales: 400 million Euros 
• Manufacturing: 15 plants in 9 countries 
• Employees: 2 200 employees in 12 countries 
• Brands : OXFORD, ELBA, UNILUX
• Our markets : School, Office, Home

Name: EMIRSON
Description:
EMIRSON is an international company established in the 2010s with the aim of building a bridge between Turkey and candidates looking for contract manufacturers, especially for the paper-tissue-hygienic markets. Our headquarters is in Istanbul, Turkiye.
Tissue paper jumbo rolls and finished products such as toilet paper, paper towels, napkins and facial tissues are our main business. We produce HORECA type industrial tissue paper products in our production facility located in Kocaeli Gölcük; We offer greyboard, spunlace, airlaid, nonwoven to our portfolio and in addition we produce PL for baby diapers, sanitary pads and wet wipes.

Tissue paper export is one of the important business areas in which we operate. We offer 360-degree service by taking on the operational side of all your orders with our logistics team.

We sell and distribute different types of products domestically; It markets technical consumables such as pulp, OCC, cardboard, paper cup rolls and knives, industrial cutting tools, grinding equipment, rolls and embossing, felt wire, chemicals.

EMIRSON aims and works to become a solid and strong company that can keep up with the times and industry trends, focused on growth and increasing the profitability of its business partners.

Name: Tafisa Canada
Description:
Tafisa Canada jouit d’une solide réputation grâce à son expertise, à sa recherche constante de nouveaux designs avant-gardistes ainsi qu’à son usine Méganticoise, qui est la plus grosse en matière de développement durable de panneaux de particules en Amérique du Nord.

Une fois de plus, Tafisa innove en ajoutant une gamme de produits HPL nommée SURFORMA qui s’agence parfaitement à ses panneaux décoratifs des séries Sommet et Prélude afin d’offrir la meilleure offre de produits sur le marché.

Tafisa Canada, c’est inspirer l’excellence.
www.tafisa.ca

Tafisa Canada enjoys a solid reputation thanks to its expertise, its constant search for new trendsetting designs as well as its Méganticoise plant, which is the largest sustainable particleboard manufacturing plant in North America. .

Once again, Tafisa is innovating by adding a complete matching line of SURFORMA brand HPL to its Sommet and Prélude TFL Series in order to offer the best product range on the market.
 
Tafisa Canada is inspiring excellence.
www.tafisa.ca

Name: Hood Industries, Inc.
Description:
The Hood Way - People, Process, Performance

Our Vision: To provide rewarding employment opportunities by being a company that is safety-focused, customer centric, process driven, sustainable and growing. 

Hood Industries is a blend of wood manufacturing and distribution concerns that includes two plywood and three lumber manufacturing plants and 23 specialty wood product distribution operations, located in 18 states serving the northeast, southeast, midwest and southwest United States.

From our corporate headquarters to our facilities, we employee over 1,300 people in communities where our operations are located. 

Learn about our current career opportunities and how we are making a difference in our communities by visiting us at hoodindustries.com and following us on LinkedIn.

Name: OJI PAPÉIS ESPECIAIS Ltda.
Description:
Fundado em 1873 no Japão, o Grupo Oji Paper conta com aproximadamente 20 mil colaboradores e atua em 4 continentes com mais de 300 subsidiarias e unidades fabris, as quais produzem inúmeros tipos de papéis e produtos relacionados, como: papel de imprimir e escrever, papel para jornal, papéis para embalagem, celulose, papéis especiais, destacando-se como líder mundial no setor.

O Grupo Oji Paper tem como princípio o manejo florestal sustentável e a reciclagem dos papéis como formas de proteger e preservar a natureza.

O grupo japonês assumiu em setembro de 2011 o controle da fábrica de papéis especiais, iniciando suas operações no setor de papel no Brasil.

Contudo, a planta de Piracicaba iniciou suas operações em 1953, produzindo papel a partir da celulose de bagaço de cana-de-açúcar.
Em sua trajetória a fábrica de papéis  colecionou alguns destaques, onde conquistou a posição de líder nacional e latino-americana do setor de papéis especiais (térmicos e autocopiativos) e pioneira na fabricação de Couché on machine.

Name: AGT Ağaç Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.
Description:
Founded in 1984 with the dream that wood can be processed with technology and developed with industrial production, AGT (Wood Developing Technology) operates as one of the world's leading organizations in the furniture components and flooring industry today.  AGT, which produces materials for many different sectors with its MDF, Melamine Faced MDF, Panel, Profile and Flooring production in modern production facilities with a total area of 450 thousand square meters, is positioned as an innovative and design-oriented brand of its sector since it benefits from technology and innovation.

AGT, which is also accepted as the top segment and quality material manufacturer of the sectors such as furniture, decoration and construction it serves, adds value to our country's economy with its exports to more than 100 different countries on 5 continents. AGT, which is located in more than 1000 sales points in Turkey and abroad, carries out its activities with the mission of being a leading brand that ensures the happiness and loyalty of its stakeholders with its values, is sensitive to society and environment and grows by directing the sector. 
Adding color, elegance and sustainable vitality to the living space of millions of people who attach importance to quality and aesthetics, AGT has been a brand of furniture components industry that determines trends by closely following the developments in technology and design by being inspired by nature without compromising its ethical values and quality principles since its establishment.

Name: SONAE ARAUCO
Description:
Sonae Arauco is a wood-based alliance between two strong brands: Sonae Indústria and Arauco.

This partnership was born to create inspirational wood solutions for a better world and brighter future, and encompasses wood-based panelling, chemical and impregnated paper plants in Europe and South Africa.

With 23 industrial and commercial units, in 9 countries and 2 continents, and with 2600 employees, Sonae Arauco is one of the largest wood-based panel producers in the world. Our products can be found in 68 countries, taking our inspiration everywhere.

Sonae Arauco, taking wood further.

Name: Canfor
Description: Canfor is a world leading manufacturer of wood products like lumber for building houses and construction, pulp and paper, wood pellets and green energy. We have a history dating back to 1938 in Western Canada and have grown into a successful global company with people, customers, operations and sales offices around the world.

Name: PT. Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk.
Description: As a part of Sinarmas Group, Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Serang is one of the biggest paper packaging companies located in Serang, Banten Province, Indonesia. The 550 hectare facility is strategically located close to reliable distribution hub, the seaport. Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Serang was established in 1991, to provide solution for all paper and board packaging needs. We operate two groups of paper machines; four machine produce brown/industrial paperboard and the other two white grade machines carry out coated white paperboard. Our products are distributed all over the world, including to Asia, North and South America, Australia, Africa, and also Europe.

Name: Double A (1991) Public Company Limited
Description:
Double A is one of the most advanced fully integrated pulp and paper manufacturers in the world, internationally recognized as the leading premium quality copy paper provider in 130 countries.

Our vision is to support the work performance of Executives around the world, by delivering premium quality copy and office paper, as well as premium quality office stationery products. Created for sophistication and reliability, Double A products deliver excellent performance and enjoyment for its users.

All our paper products are made of sustainable fiber from Double A’s ‘Paper Trees’, which are grown along the rice paddy ridges of more than 1.5 million farmers across Thailand - a uniquely Asian solution to the sustainable sourcing of fiber.

Launched in 2000, Double A is headquartered in Thailand with offices in 15 countries and teams in over 50 countries, including Australia, Bangladesh, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Hong Kong, Malaysia, the Netherlands, Pakistan, Singapore, South Korea, Taiwan, the United Arab Emirates and Vietnam. Our #WorkHardPlaySmart culture places priority on job fulfilment, where having fun in our work is a key ingredient our innovative product and market strategies.

Join the Double A team today. Check out our open positions, or contact us for business collaborations.

Name: Modern Oluklu Mukavva Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.Ş.
Description: Operating under the roof of Eren Holding, Modern Ambalaj started production of corrugated fiberboard packaging at its facilities in Çorlu established in 1997. Opening new facilities in Manisa, Kayseri, Gebze, Eskişehir, İstanbul, Bursa and Sakarya the Company has expanded, currently reaching an annual production capacity of 1.000,000 tons of cardboard packaging in its 8 factories, with an indoor space of 308.000 m². This is the highest cardboard production volume in Turkey on company basis.

Name: Roseburg Forest Products
Description:
Grown to Build. Built to Grow

Oregon-based Roseburg Forest Products sustains and responsibly harvests hundreds of thousands of acres of our own timberland to reliably manufacture and provide the highest-quality lumber and specialty wood products to customers throughout North America.

With more than 3,000 team members, our privately held company operates an expanding footprint of state-of-the-art facilities to deliver more new products in more places that help our customers realize their dreams and grow. These products include engineered wood, exterior trim, softwood plywood, lumber, medium-density fiberboard, and more.

For decades, Roseburg has aligned our company interests and aspirations with those of our customers, from the nation’s largest building supply distributors and DIY retailers to builders and craftspeople. Enduring business relationships are built on handshake integrity and superior service, and we extend our responsibility as a vertically integrated provider through sustainable forest management practices in Oregon, Virginia and North Carolina.

Our people are the very best in our industry, putting safety first and delivering products that generate pride for the job and stand the test of time. They are closely connected to communities where Roseburg gives back through contributions and volunteerism, extending our decades-long commitment to making lives better from the ground up.

See how we are building and growing at www.roseburg.com

Name: Novopan
Description:
Creemos en el poder de la transformación sostenible,
que es el motor que nos inspira a crear un mañana lleno de posibilidades. 

En cada árbol que cultivamos vemos un legado de progreso gracias al uso de tendencias y tecnología de punta en nuestros procesos.

Trascendemos fronteras sembrando semillas de esperanza y oportunidad, somos cercanos y familiares. Generamos empleos, abrazando la inclusión y el respeto. Porque creemos que transformar es el camino hacia un futuro más sostenible.

Impulsamos la excelencia y la eficiencia a través de la transformación para resguardar nuestros bosques y sus comunidades, en cada aspecto de Novopan palpita una energía incesante que nos motiva a explorar horizontes desconocidos, abrazando la evolución y  materializando lo imposible.

Estamos certificados FSC
FSC C191114 Cadena de Custodia
FSC C196300 Manejo Forestal
www.fsc.org

Name: UPM Raflatac
Description: UPM Adhesive Materials (formerly UPM Raflatac) provides high-performance, innovative self-adhesive products, including label materials, graphics solutions, and specialty tapes, as well as reliable services close to customers. We are one of UPM’s fastest-growing global businesses employing around 3,200 professionals. In 2024, our sales reached nearly €1.6 billion ($1.7 billion).

Name: Revista O Papel
Description: A revista O Papel é uma publicação de tecnologia em celulose e papel e é hoje o principal veículo de comunicação do setor na América Latina. Nela você pode conferir artigos técnicos elaborados por especialistas das principais universidades e centros de pesquisa do mundo inteiro, além de notícias sobre o mercado nacional e internacional, lançamentos de produtos, dados estatísticos da indústria brasileira (produção e preços de celulose e papel).

Name: BTG Group
Description:
BTG is a multinational provider of highly specialized process solutions for the global pulp and paper industry. Every day our people help customers achieve sustainable gains in business performance through our application know-how and industry-leading technologies. This includes world-leading rods and beds for film-metering size presses; high-performance ceramic and cermet coating blades; high-performance tissue creping doctors and doctor holders, specialty doctor blades and pulp and paper process control sensors and laboratory instruments. All of these technologies are supported with expert services and application support. Several of our technologies are also widely applied in other industrial applications.

BTG globally assists pulp and paper makers in achieving sustainable gains in business performance. We accomplish this through our world-class professionals, market-leading technologies, industry expertise and a passion for results.

Since 1 December 2019, the BTG Group belongs to Voith (www.voith.com)

Legal Notice: BTG Eclépens S.A - Z.I. Village - 1312 Eclépens - Switzerland I Phone +41-21-8660066 I Fax +41-21-8660061 I CH-550.0.078.093-0 I President Sunny Cui I CFO Patrick Hitzler

Name: Lucart
Description: Lucart is a multinational group that promotes a sustainable way of making paper. This is achieved by adopting a systemic approach designed to optimise the use of raw materials and reduce waste by turning them into new resources. Lucart makes airlaid and MG paper tissue products (paper articles for everyday use, including toilet paper, kitchen paper, napkins, tablecloths, handkerchiefs, etc.). The production activities of the company founded by the Pasquini family in 1953 are organised across three Business Units (Business to Business, Away from Home and Consumer), engaged in the development and sale of products with brands, such as Tenderly, Tutto, Grazie Natural and Smile (Consumer market) and Lucart Professional, Fato, Tenderly Professional, and Velo (Away from Home market). The production capacity is over 396,000 tonnes/year of paper on 12 paper machines. The consolidated turnover is over EUR 550 million and 1,700 people are employed at 10 production plants (5 in Italy, 1 in France, 1 in Hungary, 2 in Spain and 1 in the UK) and a logistics hub. Lucart joined the United Nations Global Compact Network Italy in 2020 and has been awarded a “Platinum” sustainability rating by the independent certification company Ecovadis.

Name: Metsä Board
Description:
Metsä Board is a producer of lightweight and high-quality folding boxboards, food service boards and white kraftliners. The fresh wood fibres we use in our products are a renewable and recyclable resource, that can be traced back to Northern European forests. We aim to have completely fossil-free mills and raw materials by the end of 2030. We promote a culture of diversity, equality and inclusion.

Metsä Board is listed on the Nasdaq Helsinki. In 2024 our sales totalled EUR 1.9 billion, and we have around 2,300 employees. Metsä Board is part of Metsä Group, whose parent company Metsäliitto Cooperative is owned by over 90,000 Finnish forest owners.

Name: Södra
Description:
In Södra’s world everything starts with the forest. The forest provides our constant supply of raw materials and is the essential requirement for Södra’s many different operations. 

53,000 forest owners in southern Sweden are members of the economic association that is Södra. They own just over half of all privately owned forest in the area, as well as a group of companies that are successful in both Swedish and international markets. This gives them a market for their raw materials from the forest and at the same time provides the foundation for profitable forestry.

Södra is also a large employer. 3,100 people work for the Group, in areas that range from forestry management and environmental conservation to accounting, sales and product development. The Group’s three business areas produce sawn timber goods, paper pulp and biofuel. In recent years Södra has also become such a large producer of electricity that the Group now produces more electricity than it uses.

Name: Ankutsan A.Ş.
Description: Şirketimiz hedeflerine ulaşabilmek ve başarılı olabilmek için en kritik kaynağı insan olarak görmektedir. Bu nedenle genç ve gelecekte başarı potansiyeli yüksek yönetici adaylarını yetiştirerek insan kaynaklarını güçlü tutmayı hedeflemektedir.Yönetim ekiplerinin bu doğrultuda izleyecekleri temel politikalar, dürüstlük ve açıklık olup, devletin, müşterilerin ve diğer ticari kuruluşların uzun süreli güven ve memnuniyetini korumaya yönelik olmalıdır.ANKUTSAN A.Ş. nin ailesinden olmak, üstün kaliteli ürünleri, değerlerine uygun üreterek satan ve en iyi hizmet anlayışıyla faaliyet gösteren gururlu bir takımın parçası olmak demektir. Bu ailede daima karşılıklı güven, saygı, katılım ve işbirliği esastır. Bu ailede yenilikler teşvik edilir, değişim ve gelişmelere açık olunur. Bu ailenin her kademesinde görev alanlar oluklu mukavva endüstrisinin en başarılı bireyleri olarak kariyerlerine devam edeceklerdir.

Name: IGUAÇU Embalagens Industriais Ltda.
Description:
Atuante na industrialização e comercialização de papel e celulose. Com quatro unidades localizadas nos estados do Paraná e Santa Catarina, onde são produzidos celulose, pasta mecânica, Papelão Paraná, papéis e sacos multifoliados.

Somos responsáveis por todo o ciclo da produção da madeira, desde a floresta até a apresentação final. Por isso, industrializa e comercializa produtos de base florestal com garantia de qualidade e de serviços para clientes.
Possuímos mais de 26.000 hectares de reflorestamento com pinus e eucalipto. 

O processo segue uma rigorosa política ambiental de responsabilidade em relação aos recursos naturais, com a preservação das matas nativas, gestão de resíduos sólidos, tratamento de efluentes e plano de fomento florestal. Cada unidade fabril é especialista numa linha de produtos e conta com um corpo técnico focado na criação de novos produtos para atender as necessidades específicas de cada cliente.

Hoje, a Iguaçu é a principal fornecedora nacional de celulose fibra longa não branqueada, de papel base para carbono e um dos quatro maiores produtores brasileiros de sacos multifoliados, além de exportar para os cincos continentes. A empresa gera 1.100 empregos diretos e 3.000 indiretos, contribuindo efetivamente para o equilíbrio do meio ambiente nas suas áreas de atuação.

Name: BO PAPER
Description:
BO Paper is the market leader in the segments of newsprint, LWC and special papers made out of mechanical pulp in Latin America. Its history and experience in the paper production goes back to the year 1957, when the first newsprint-paper factory was established in Concepción/Chile. Today the group has three units (one in Chile and two in the South region of Brazil) and the company is the provider to newsprint publishers and printing factories, as well as to plants that use paper as raw material for other products. The company has an average production of 450 thousand tons/year.

Institutional video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zakPRCMcUps

Name: Arab Paper Manufacturing Co (WARAQ)
Description: Paper recycling industry

Name: MM Group
Description:
MM is a global leader in consumer packaging. The Group provides packaging solutions for cartonboard and folding cartons with an attractive offer in kraft papers, uncoated fine papers, leaflets and labels. MM promotes sustainable development through innovative, recyclable packaging and paper products. 

#LeadingInConsumerPackaging

Privacy Policy: www.mm.group/privacy
Imprint & Legal Notice: https://mm.group/imprint

Name: Interfor
Description:
Interfor is where excellence meets opportunity. We invest in your success by positioning you alongside the best people in top quartile mill facilities located in great communities across North America. In the past decade, we’ve infused close to $1 billion into modern facilities and systems that employ the latest technologies. Interfor is one of the largest, most diverse lumber companies in the world and we’re growing in exciting directions. Come be a part of our success.

----

Interfor, c'est la où l'excellence rencontre l'opportunité. Nous investissons dans votre réussite en vous plaçant aux côtés des meilleurs collaborateurs dans des scieries de premier ordre situées dans de grandes communautés à travers l'Amérique du Nord. Au cours de la dernière décennie, nous avons investi près d'un milliard de dollars dans des installations et des systèmes modernes qui utilisent les technologies les plus récentes. Interfor est l'une des entreprises de bois les plus importantes et les plus diversifiées au monde et nous nous développons dans des directions passionnantes. Venez participer à notre succès !

Name: Ibema Papelcartão
Description:
Gerar valor de maneira sustentável por meio da fabricação e distribuição de produtos que conquistem a preferência dos clientes, contribuindo com iniciativas que favoreçam toda a cadeia, com a dedicação e preocupação de garantir o melhor resultado para a empresa e seus clientes. Esta é a missão da Ibema, que permeia a sua atuação com base no conceito de foco do cliente.

Fundada em 1955, somos hoje,  um dos players mais competitivos da América Latina. Com uma capacidade de produção anual de 140 mil toneladas. Em nosso portfólio, estão os melhores produtos, reconhecidos pela qualidade e performance na indústria gráfica. 

Estamos presente em diversos segmentos do mercado nacional e internacional, contribuindo para a confecção de milhares de embalagens, livros, materiais promocionais e demais serviços realizados pela indústria gráfica. Nosso produtos são utilizados em setores variados, como: medicamentos/ farmacêuticos, alimentação, bebidas, cosméticos, calçados, vestuário, higiene pessoal e do lar, brinquedos, editorial e promocional. 

Graças ao trabalho árduo, a constante evolução em inovação, o seu senso de sustentabilidade e a experiência de mais de 60 anos na fabricação de papelcartão, nossos produtos estão presentes no cotidiano de milhares de pessoas no Brasil e no mundo.

Name: RDM Group
Description:
RDM Group is the European leading packaging board producer.

The Group is committed to the development of cartonboard solutions based on recycled fibers.

Our main business area are White-Lined Chipboard (WLC) and Solid Board.

For us, Sustainability is one of the core value on which our business model is built.

Name: Naini Papers
Description:
Naini Papers is a leading manufacturer of writing & printing paper, copier paper, industrial grade and specialty papers in India, with an annual capacity of 250,000 MT.

We operate three advanced production lines, including a newly commissioned state-of-the-art machine for coated and uncoated papers, designed for plastic-alternative flexible packaging solutions.

With a strong focus on automation, quality, and sustainable manufacturing, we are certified for FSC-FM, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001. Our effluent quality and discharge performance set a benchmark in the industry, reflecting our deep commitment to environmental responsibility.

We work with global partners like Valmet, Voith, Andritz, Siemens, ABB, and others to bring cutting-edge technology into our processes.

Through long-term CSR initiatives, we have adopted 50 government schools in Uttarakhand, supporting education and infrastructure development in local communities.

Our journey is powered by a passionate team committed to excellence and continuous improvement.

Name: Ittihad Paper Mill LLC
Description:
Ittihad Paper Mill (IPM) is the first printing and writing paper production facility in the GCC. IPM is focused on catering to the growing regional demand for paper products that is currently reliant on imports, while also serving the international markets. 

IPM is located on a 230,000 square meter plot in the Industrial City of Abu Dhabi (ICAD) and is the largest producer of printing & writing paper in the MENA region.

Equipped with high-tech machinery and production facilities, IPM strives to produce the highest quality of Uncoated wood free paper reels, folio size paper and cut-size. Products produced by the IPM are strictly in compliance with global environmental standards and sources pulp only from certified sustainable forests.

The project is a strategic industrial investment which is undoubtedly a landmark project in the region and a milestone in Abu Dhabi’s resolute economic vision.

Name: Renova
Description:
Renova is a European brand of high quality and innovative products. Available worldwide in more than 60 countries, it offers colorful designs and new functional solutions through stylish and environmentally happy  disposable paper products for the home and body. 

Renova main products are home tissues and sanitary products such as  toilet paper, handkerchiefs, napkins, kitchen rolls, feminine hygiene products and wet wipes. However, Renova also produces 100% recycled office paper and specialty papers.

What others say about us:

"Passionate, Innovative and Daring!"
Gaius Chow, Singapore

"In Australia we see Renova as a motivated dedicated team of sensitive people that are making a gigantic difference in the home decor world."
Pam Haughey, Australia

"Renova is: Resplendent, Exciting, Novel, Opulent, Vivacious, Awesome!"
Andrew Menzies, UK

"The colored Renova toilet paper is absolutely iconic and a great eye-catcher."
Dieter Marxer, Switzerland

Name: Khanna Paper Mills Ltd.
Description:
Khanna Paper, one of India’s largest producers of innovative and eco-responsible papers, combines a 39,000MT/month capacity with a 750MT/day advanced DIP facility, leveraging scale, efficiency and technology to deliver high-quality output to diverse markets.

Our plant in Amritsar, is spread across 100+ acres with an annual production capacity of half a million tons with four paper machines, deinking plants and inhouse captive powerplant of 37 MW.

Name: binderholz group
Description:
At binderholz, 100 % of the renewable raw material wood are utilised.

From the cultivation of seedlings and forest management to timber harvesting, processing in the sawmills, products for the do-it-yourself sector, customised packaging solutions, the manufacture of solid wood products, innovative mass timber solutions and affordable housing, the entire value chain is consistently implemented. Waste wood from production is processed into densified biofuels, green electricity, pressboard pallets and pressed pallet blocks.

In the timber industry, the name Binder is associated with a sense of tradition and integrity, combined with modern technology and innovation. From humble beginnings as a small sawmill more than 70 years ago, the family-run binderholz has grown into a fully integrated group of companies that utilises state-of-the-art technology and manufacturing methods.

Besides its original headquarters in Fügen, Austria, the binderholz Group operates 60 other sites. More than 6,300 employees in Europe and the US share a passion for wood.

Name: Middle East Paper Company (MEPCO)
Description:
Middle East Paper Company (MEPCO)  is considered one of the largest producers of Containerboard and paperboard in the Middle East, with a production capacity of half a million metric tons.
The company produces a diverse range of CONTAINERBOARD grades 
along with other grades of PAPERBOARD on three paper machines.

MEPCO's strategic location and proximity to Jeddah seaport provides the company with the ability to deliver its products to a wide array of markets within a very short lead-time. The company is present mainly in the Middle East, Africa, and Indian Subcontinent along with Europe and Americas.

General Enquires: Info@mepco.biz
Careers: cv@mepco.biz

Name: MM Board & Paper
Description:
MM Board & Paper is the leading cartonboard producer in Europe (excluding liquid board) with an attractive offer of kraft papers and uncoated fine papers.

With sales of approximately 2 million tons of cartonboard and paper from six board mills, plus the CTMP plant FollaCell, MM Board & Paper produces for a broad range of markets in the consumer goods industry and beyond.

Our goal is to grow faster than the market with efficient, sustainable and innovative board and paper solutions promoting circular economy and keeping impacts on natural ecosystems to a minimum.

#LeadingInConsumerPackaging

Privacy Policy: www.mm.group/privacy
Imprint & Legal Notice: https://mm.group/imprint

Name: Suzano International
Description:
We are the world’s largest producer of pulp, planting 1.2 million eucalyptus trees every day to produce responsibly grown raw materials that reach over two billion people in more than 100 countries globally.
 
Our pulp is used in products such as tissue and toilet paper, books, printing and writing paper, diapers and period products, packaging, textiles, and a range of innovative applications that replace products made from fossil fuels.
 
For over a century we have combined a deep sense of responsibility with groundbreaking innovation, so we can plant a better future for people and the planet. With a zero deforestation policy on the wood supply, we only harvest what we plant and sustainably manage around 26,000 square kilometers of land, of which 11,000 square kilometers are protected for permanent conservation.
 
We are listed on the B3 stock exchange in Brazil (SUZB3) and the NYSE (SUZ) in the United States.

Name: SWM International
Description:
We are the global leader for sustainable, safe and intelligent lightweight materials. We harness the properties of botanicals and natural fibres to solve the challenges of our partners and their industries. 

#SWM
#BOTANI
#THINPACT

Name: Dunapack Packaging - Prinzhorn Group
Description:
Dunapack Packaging stands for innovative and competitive corrugated packaging solutions. 

With more than 5.500 employees and a sales volume of around 3 billion m², the company is a market leader in Central and Eastern Europe. We serve our local and international customers with 24 plants in 11 countries.

Our target is to reinforce and expand our position through customer proximity, flexibility, and reliable first-class service. Employing the most modern technology helps us to produce tailor made packaging solutions with highest print quality.

Harmonious coexistence with the environment is one of the cornerstones of our company philosophy along with thinking long term and living responsibly. We are committed to continuously improving our company's environmental, social and cultural activities to achieve sustainable growth. Our aim in Dunapack Packaging is to be lean in all areas and we operate by reducing all kinds of waste while increasing the awareness level of all our employees.

Full recyclability and resource optimization represent primary factors when designing our products. All our products are 100% recyclable and our raw materials consist mainly of recycled paper.

Our long term growth strategy focuses on maximizing customer satisfaction through proud employees that strive for continuous improvement and the creation of value-added products.

We will continue to be a role model in ensuring that all our business activities  contribute to a better world, a greener environment and a sustainable future.

Please visit https://careers.prinzhorn-holding.com/ for available job opportunities.

Name: Arab Paper Manufacturing Co (WARAQ)
Description: Paper recycling industry

Name: EcoPlanet Bamboo
Description:
EcoPlanet Bamboo is driving the reforestation agenda with a global portfolio of bamboo projects. With bamboo farms currently located across Central America, Africa and Southeast Asia, and smallholder operations under development in East Africa, EcoPlanet Bamboo is leading the industrialization of bamboo as a tree free, deforestation free alternative fiber for timber manufacturing industries. 

The conversion of degraded land into certified bamboo plantations is coupled with innovative technology development to provide bamboo based solutions for products and markets that currently contribute to the deforestation of our world’s natural forests.

Bamboo can be grown on degraded land, providing positive restoration properties while at the same time reducing deforestation and degradation through the provision of a sustainable source of fiber. Bamboo’s fast growth rate and high productivity results in significant volumes of fiber produced per area and input. New technology enables bamboo’s use in the manufacturing of most products that currently rely on wood as their raw fiber including pulp &  paper, textiles, engineered timber and bioenergy. EcoPlanet's bamboo can provide a secure and sustainable raw resource for industries, companies and consumers.

Name: FLORA
Description:
A Flora é uma empresa genuinamente brasileira e única fábrica de HDF e MDF na Amazônia. Faz parte do Grupo Concrem, onde há mais de 40 anos vem inovando e se estabelecendo nos negócios.

Consciente por um mundo mais sustentável, a Flora investe em tecnologia de ponta com foco na redução do impacto ambiental e reconhecimento de talentos locais. Tudo para entregar um produto responsável e com excelência em qualidade.

Name: TWK Agri
Description: Agricultural company with Head-Office in Piet Retief, Mpumalanga, South Africa with interests in the Forestry, Agricultural Trade, Grain, Mechanisation, Financing, Insurance and Motors & Tyre industries operating mainly in the Mpumalanga and Kwazulu-Natal provinces.

Name: Clearwater Paper Corporation
Description:
Clearwater Paper (NYSE: CLW) is a premier independent supplier of paperboard packaging products to North American converters. Our team produces high-quality paperboard that provides sustainable packaging for consumer goods and food service applications. 

We are grounded in our core values of commitment, collaboration, communication, courage and character. We are driven by purpose to make important products people use every day.

Name: Century Pulp and Paper
Description: Century Pulp & Paper, a unit of the Aditya Birla Group, is one of the leading integrated Pulp and Paper companies in the country. Established in the year 1984 at Lalkua, a township near the foothills of Himalayas.

Name: PG Paper Company Ltd
Description: PG Paper Company Ltd is a global, award-winning company, creating markets and customising solutions to enable trade for paper and packaging products worldwide. With sustainability and community at its heart, PG Paper is one of Scotland’s largest trading companies, providing a holistic and integrated service through our dynamic expert teams.

Name: Paraibuna Embalagens
Description:
A Paraibuna Embalagens tem mais de 50 anos de tradição no mercado e está entre as dez maiores fabricantes de papelão ondulado do país, recicláveis e biodegradáveis.
Através da produção verticalizada, a empresa garante autossuficiência e qualidade no abastecimento da planta de papelão ondulado.
As duas unidades produtivas, localizadas estrategicamente no eixo Rio de Janeiro - São Paulo - Belo Horizonte, garantem uma logística apurada, flexibilidade e pontualidade  nas entregas.

Name: Crown Paper Mill
Description:
Established in 1996, Crown Paper Mills LLC (CPM) is a producer of Jumbo Tissue Paper rolls. The mill covers a total area of 55,000sqm, with an annual production capacity of 100,000 metric tones.

Headquartered, in the Industrial city of Abu Dhabi (ICAD), the mill’s “Prime Quality” Jumbo Rolls come in various grades such as Facial, Toilet, Kitchen Towel, Napkin, C-Fold and Carrier Tissue.

All high quality tissue grades are produced from the highest virgin pulp grade sourced from all over the world. Since its inception, the mill has built a reputation for producing world-class tissue paper from the highest-grade virgin pulp.

The mill also houses one of the most advanced de-inking plant that is engaged in converting waste paper into commercial/industrial high-quality tissue paper.

The mill's products are FSC (C106685) - Certified and are actively marketed in the UAE and its surrounding region. CPM products have made a significant mark not only in the local market but amongst international converters as well.

Name: Tolko Industries
Description:
With state-of-the-art operations across western Canada, Tolko is a leading manufacturer of a wide range of forest products for customers around the world.  For over 60 years, our family-owned company has been recognized by customers and business partners for being reliable, flexible, efficient and offering quality products. With the third generation of family leadership, we’re continuing that legacy today in our divisions throughout western Canada and joint ventures in the Southern United States.

At Tolko, our values, vision and mission aren’t just what we believe. They’re how we work, live and serve our customers every day. Fundamental to our success is a diverse and committed workforce that thrives on change, building relationships, and a drive toward excellence.

When you join Tolko, you’ll develop your skills and be encouraged to pursue diverse opportunities with a company that’s built on integrity, respect, and provides employees with the inclusive environment, support and opportunity to build great lives.

Name: PT Pabrik Kertas Tjiwi Kimia Tbk
Description:
PT Pabrik Kertas Tjiwi Kimia Tbk. (TKIM) manufacturing facilities are located in Sidoarjo, near Surabaya in East Java - Indonesia. The mill which started as a caustic soda plant, now boasts many state-of-the-art paper and stationery machines making it one of the world’s largest stationery manufacturers under one roof. Originally producing caustic soda since 1972, the Paper production mill commenced production in 1978 with an annual paper production capacity of 12,000 metric tons.

In 2006, the annual paper and board production capacity grew to over 1,200,000 metric tons along with an additional stationery converting capacity of approximately 320,000 metric tons per annum. The product range includes value-added products such as specialty paper, plain paper copier, uncoated woodfree, industrial brown paper, carbonless paper and huge range of school and office stationery. Exercise books, pads, spirals, hardback books, drawing books, envelopes, continuous forms, file folders and others make up the range of converted stationery products. Tjiwi Kimia is one of Asia Pulp and Paper (APP Group) paper mill in Indonesia that has been actively promoting the use of post-consumer waste paper. The recycled fiber is used in the manufacture of Tjiwi Kimia’s fine paper and stationery range of products. Tjiwi Kimia obtain various certifications that provide third party verification for its commitment in efficient and sustainable operations.

Name: Fernandez S/A - Indústria de Papel
Description:
Nós somos a Fernandez S/A, uma indústria de papel, chapas e caixas, situada na cidade de Amparo, no interior de São Paulo.

Na linha de produção, grande quantidade do papel fabricado se transforma em chapas e caixas de papelão ondulado. E os produtos ainda podem ser personalizados de acordo com a marca e as necessidades da sua empresa.

Desde a nossa fundação, em 1971, nos orgulhamos por fabricar todos os produtos somente com reciclagem! Se você recicla o seu lixo, provavelmente já nos ajudou a transformá-lo em matéria-prima novamente. Recicle, isso faz bem para todo mundo!

Fernandez Papel: aqui, seu papel é essencial!

Name: Burgo Group
Description:
Burgo Group is one of the leading producers of graphic and specialty papers, collaborating closely with all the most important European markets. 
Mission: to produce quality paper, in line with the market's evolving needs, at the service of all those who communicate on printed paper. Pursuing a balance between economic development and social and environmental responsibility.
The Group is configured as a 'system' developed around the world of paper: from the production, distribution, recycling of paper and the processing of forestry products, as well as factoring and energy. 
Burgo Group makes sustainable development a core part of the business which is present in all processes, from purchase and use of resources, to the return of waste water, as far as the optimisation and re-use of discarded material for energy generation. Furthermore, Burgo Group is committed to expanding the business through the entrance in the container board market.
Burgo Group has 11 paper mills in Italy and 1 integrated mill in Belgium and  16 production lines

Name: Fastmarkets Forest Products
Description:
Who we are
Fastmarkets is the most trusted cross-commodity price reporting agency (PRA) in the agriculture, forest products, metals and mining energy transition and carbon markets. Our price data, forecasts, and market analyses give our customers a strategic advantage in complex, volatile, often opaque markets. Our events provide immersive experiences to network, trade, and discuss the critical issues of the day.

What we do
The commodity markets we serve are the beating heart of today’s economy and critical to the transition to a low-carbon economy.  That reality guides our purpose:  to create transparent commodity markets to help our customers build a more sustainable world.  The creation of healthy commodity markets – markets that maintain supply-demand balances and create clear mechanisms for participants and investors – are essential to fuel today’s financial performance and make the key investments to build a more sustainable world.

Have questions? Allow us to help:
If you have a question about your existing service, please contact our customer success team: customersuccess@fastmarkets.com
 
If you’re considering purchasing one of our solutions, please contact our sales team:
sales@fastmarkets.com

Name: PROPAL S.A.
Description:
Somos una de las empresas que hace parte de la Organización Carvajal S.A., multinacional colombiana con presencia en más de 17 países del mundo, con más de 60 años de experiencia en la producción de papeles de la más alta calidad.

Contamos con un amplio portafolio de productos sostenibles para impresión, escritura, esmaltados, no esmaltados y especialidades, que permiten atender diversas necesidades del mercado, en los segmentos de distribuidores, convertidores e impresores, suministrando variedad de formatos, colores y gramajes, buscando siempre marcar la diferencia.

Name: Grupak
Description:
Grupak | Liderando la sustentabilidad en papel y empaques 100% reciclados desde 1957
En Grupak no solo fabricamos papel y empaques… creamos soluciones que inspiran confianza, impulsan la competitividad y cuidan el planeta. Somos una empresa 100% mexicana con más de 60 años de experiencia, respaldada por un liderazgo sólido y una visión clara: ser el Grupo líder en sustentabilidad a nivel nacional.
Desde nuestros inicios, hemos apostado por tecnología de vanguardia y talento humano de alto nivel, ofreciendo productos y servicios que superan las expectativas de nuestros clientes en las industrias de fibra, papel y cartón corrugado.

 Nuestra misión
Ser el Grupo líder en sustentabilidad dentro de nuestro sector, que proporcione soluciones vanguardistas de papel y empaque para nuestros clientes, teniendo como prioridad el desarrollo del talento humano, y el compromiso con los valores organizacionales.

Lo que hacemos mejor:
• Empaque Digital: Impresión en alta gráfica, diseños aleatorios, ediciones limitadas, códigos de realidad aumentada… sin mínimos y con tiempos de maquila reducidos. Innovación para que tu producto destaque.
• Empaque Convencional: Diseños únicos y estructuras personalizadas que protegen, transportan y promueven tu marca.
• Papel 100% Reciclado: Orgullosamente sustentable, reciclable y biodegradable, con proyectos que impactan positivamente en las comunidades.
• Grabados de Alta Precisión: Optimiza la calidad de tus diseños gráficos con tecnología de grabado avanzada.

 En Grupak, no solo producimos… transformamos.
Transformamos residuos en recursos, ideas en realidades y marcas en referentes. Nuestro compromiso con la sustentabilidad, la innovación y la excelencia nos ha convertido en aliados estratégicos de empresas líderes en diversos sectores.

Conectemos.
Si buscas empaques que cuenten la historia de tu marca y cuiden del planeta, en Grupak tenemos la solución.

Name: COCELPA - Cia de Celulose e Papel do Parana
Description:
A tradição no segmento de madeira e a qualidade dos seus produtos tornam a Cocelpa - Companhia de Celulose e Papel do Paraná uma das empresas mais bem posicionadas no setor de celulose, papel kraft e embalagem no mercado nacional.

Conseqüência das experiências e valores profissionais herdados dos seus fundadores, imigrantes italianos que rumaram ao Brasil em busca de uma nova vida, tornaram realidade o sonho de um negócio sólido e próspero.

Com suas plantas em Araucária e Curitiba (PR) tem a excelência no processo industrial com a constante preocupação com o meio-ambiente, o desenvolvimento sustentável e a sociedade. 

A Cocelpa utiliza somente madeiras de reflorestamento na manufatura de seus produtos, possui políticas ambientais que garantem o equilíbrio do ecossistema e mantém uma reserva de 27 mil hectares de Pinus Taeda e Eliotti. Intervenções que evidenciam o respeito à natureza, em harmonia com as comunidades, também fruto de ações sociais da empresa, motivadas pelo cuidado com o momento presente. 

São programas que prezam pela melhoria da qualidade de vida dos cidadãos, em diferentes campos, como educação, cultura e aprendizado profissional.

É assim que a Cocelpa conquistou uma posição de destaque no cenário mundial, com uma visão de vanguarda e conectada ao futuro, porém sem esquecer os valores do passado, os mesmos princípios que motivaram a sua fundação e expansão, numa história trilhada pela atual geração, que carrega consigo, até hoje, o legado da madeira.

Name: Adami SA
Description:
Constituída em 9 de junho de 1942, com a razão social Adami & Cia. Ltda. iniciou sua atuação no segmento madeireiro com uma estrutura modesta. Na época, efetuava o desdobramento e comercialização de madeiras brutas. Em 1956 aconteceu a mudança da razão social para Adami S/A – Madeiras.
Procurando acompanhar o crescente desenvolvimento do setor, a empresa mantinha como principais atividades, além do desdobramento da madeira bruta, também a fabricação e comercialização de caixas de madeira.Os constantes investimentos realizados em máquinas e equipamentos de alta tecnologia foram decisivos para iniciativa na verticalização dos setores de atuação, permitindo a ampliação da linha de produtos, fundamental para a conquista de novos clientes e novos mercados.A Adami S/A é uma empresa familiar, que se encontra sob a administração da terceira geração de diretores, atuando continuamente na busca pela mais alta posição de liderança de mercado.
Atualmente, está composta pelas Unidades de Negócio Florestal, Madeireira, Papel, Embalagem e Energia Elétrica. Os principais produtos desenvolvidos pela atividade industrial são madeira serrada e beneficiada, paletes, painéis, molduras, portas, kits de portas, modulados, papel para embalagens, chapas e caixas de papelão ondulado, energia elétrica e o plantio de florestas produtivas, desde a produção de mudas até a colheita. As Unidades de Negócio dispõem de processos produtivos automatizados que funcionam de forma integrada, realizando atividades exclusivamente em prol do fortalecimento do nome e das marcas Adami e Vert. 
A Adami S/A surgiu de um sonho do seu fundador, cresceu e se consolidou pela visão estratégica dos seus diretores, tornando-se valorizada pela eficiência operacional, foco nos resultados e transparência nos relacionamentos.

Name: VPK Group
Description:
VPK Group is a leading European packaging company dedicated to creating sustainable and innovative solutions. By maximizing the use of recycled fibres, we combine environmental responsibility with high-quality performance.

We design and produce tailor-made packaging in corrugated and solid board, as well as tubes, cores and edge protectors. Across all our markets, VPK stands for reliable quality and customer-focused service, enabling us to build strong partnerships and deliver real value.

Name: Sinarmas Forestry
Description: Sinar Mas Forestry manages companies that operate forest plantations in Sumatra   and Kalimantan. Sinar Mas Forestry is the exclusive supplier of raw material for pulp and paper mills Asia Pulp &  Paper.

Name: WEPA
Description:
WEPA - your expert for sustainable hygiene paper. 

OUR MISSION
