We always provide sustainable hygiene solutions to improve well-being everyday, everywhere.

OUR VISION
To be the most sustainable and agile first class partner for personal and professional hygiene solutions.

Name: Artivinco
Description:
A Artivinco é uma empresa 100% brasileira que produz: papel, chapas e embalagens de papelão ondulado. 

Para atuar num mercado altamente competitivo, a Artivinco investe constantemente na inovação dos produtos e na tecnologia dos processos, o que inclui reengenharia de materiais, sistemas de embalagem, canais de distribuição e prestação de serviços. 

Todo o papel utilizado na fabricação das embalagens é produzido pela própria Artivinco, empresa com processo verticalizado, que tem como principal diferencial a fabricação de papéis à base de fibras de cana-de-açúcar; é a única empresa brasileira a desenvolver essa tecnologia, permitindo homogeneidade na qualidade da matéria prima e suprindo, assim, as necessidades dos mercados onde atua. 

As constantes preocupações com o aprimoramento e a inovação, se refletem nos investimentos em tecnologia, respeitando o meio ambiente e o cliente, na busca do mais alto padrão de qualidade de seus produtos.

Name: Norske Skog
Description:
Norske Skog owns six profitable bio product mills, strategically located near attractive markets. The Norske Skog group has decided to enter the packaging market with 760,000 tons by conversion of newsprint machines at Bruck (Austria) anf Golbey (France). 

The group has a product portfolio consisting of biogas, bio energy, wood pellets, bio composites, bio chemicals, and nano cellulose. Norske Skog expects non-publication paper activities will represent about 50% of total revenues by 2030. Total paper production capacity is 1.9 million tons. Norske Skog is a leading producer of publication paper with strong market positions in Europe and Australasia.

Name: Bio Pappel SAB de CV
Description:
Since its foundation 25 years ago, we have set ourselves three major objectives, which are our company’s mission: to competitively produce paper and paper products, to constantly adhere to the international best business practices and to progressively grow our integral competitive edge to the benefit of our customers and shareholders.
 
Our vision of sustainability is supported and balanced on three pillars: competitiveness, environmental protection, and social responsibility, thus adding value to all that we do in a comprehensive way —through our constant investment on human and physical capital focused on an improved future for our people.
The paper industry is the largest consumer of wood and forests worldwide, since it uses them as raw material for paper production.
In Bio-PAPPEL we are very proud of our visionary and structured Sustainability plan to replace forest woods for urban woods (paper recycling) with investments of over 500 million US dollars in the past 10 years by not cutting down trees or using wood to manufacture paper.
This is the structural foundation of Bio-PAPPEL’s change of corporate identity.
We are the leading company in the production of 100% recycled, recyclable and biodegrabable paper. We are the largest paper recyclers in Mexico. We produce non-chlorine bleached paper, as well as one of the few Mexican companies which capture more CO2 than it the amount we emit.
Thus, in 2010, we recycled 1.5 million tons of paper, equivalent to saving 685 thousand trees or 12.5 times the trees in the Chapultepec Forest. By recycling, we have saved 10.5 million cubic meters of water and 4.3 million kw/h.

Name: Metsä Tissue
Description: With its high-quality tissue and greaseproof papers, Metsä Tissue makes life more comfortable for consumers, customers and end-users every day. Metsä Tissue is a leading tissue paper products supplier to households and professionals in Europe and the world’s leading supplier of greaseproof baking and cooking papers. Our main brands are Lambi, Serla, Mola, Tento, Katrin and SAGA. With production units in five countries, we employ a total of about 2,450 people. Our sales in 2024 were EUR 1.2 billion. Metsä Tissue is part of Metsä Group.

Name: Holmen Board and Paper
Description:
Much has changed since Holmen started out 400 years ago. What was once a manual craft is now all high-tech, but one thing remains constant: our passion for paper and paperboard.
 
As a part of the Holmen Group, our business is centered around the forestecocycleand the renewable products we can create from it. Across our four production facilities in Sweden and the UK (Iggesund, Hallstavik, Braviken and Workington) we use fresh fibers from sustainably managed forests to produce premium paperboard and innovative paper products suitable for various packaging solutions and graphical applications. Our conscious customers appreciate our products for their unique properties and low climate impact.

Name: American Forest & Paper Association
Description: The American Forest & Paper Association (AF&PA) serves to advance public policies that foster economic growth, job creation and global competitiveness for a vital sector that makes the essential paper and packaging products Americans use every day. The U.S. forest products industry employs more than 925,000 people, largely in rural America, and is among the top 10 manufacturing sector employers in 44 states. Our industry accounts for approximately 4.7% of the total U.S. manufacturing GDP, manufacturing more than $435 billion in products annually. AF&PA member companies are significant producers and users of renewable biomass energy and are committed to making sustainable products for a sustainable future through the industry’s decades-long initiative — Better Practices, Better Planet 2030.

Name: Kuantum Papers Ltd
Description:
Kuantum Papers is a leading fully integrated wood and agro-based paper manufacturer in India. Headquartered in Chandigarh with a manufacturing facility based at District Hoshiarpur, Punjab, Kuantum is a family of 1,500 employees and is committed to manufacturing high-quality creamwove, maplitho, copier, and specialty grades of paper. The company has frequently received recognition from its patrons for delivering the finest standards with a customer-centric approach. The customer base comprises HT media, Today Diaries, Global Diaries, SBM Industries, Evergreen Publications, Oxford University Press, MBD Books, Best Price, McGraw Hill, Lotus Global, Navneet Publications, Macmillan, Kokuyo, and Magic International to name a few. 

Kuantum is environmentally conscious and the commitment to sustainable social progress has long been enshrined in its way of working. The company believes in using its resources to innovate, enhance value in operations, pursue excellence and seek future sustainability keeping its environmental footprint in check while delivering an exceptional experience to customers, suppliers, employees, and society alike.  Kuantum’s social vision finds a voice in 4 primary areas – Environment, Empowerment, Education, and Health.

Name: Paper Technology International
Description:
Paper Technology International is a unique global information resource for the world pulp, paper, board, and tissue industry. PTI provides a traditional print and digital media news platform for leading personnel at every paper and board mill in The World. 

Our specialist circulation includes the CEOs, Commercial Directors, Mill Managers, Technical Directors, Heads of Production and Product Development Professionals engaged in the Pulp, Paper and Tissue Industry.

Name: SONAE INDÚSTRIA
Description:
Founded in 1959 as part of SONAE Group, Sonae Indústria quickly became one of the largest Portuguese manufacturers of wood-based panels. Located in the north of Portugal, the company has undergone an expansion process through a combination of organic growth and acquisitions, and has become one of the industry leaders with business units in Europe, North America and South Africa and a wide variety of products for the furniture, construction and decoration industries aiming to improve people’s lives.

In May 2016, Sonae Indústria completed a partnership with Arauco, a company with headquarters in Chile and one of the largest producers of forest resources. As a result of this strategic partnership, Sonae Indústria holds a shareholding of 50% in Sonae Arauco.

Additionally, Sonae Indústria retained the full ownership of the wood-based panels business in North America, operated by Tafisa Canada, of the Laminates & Components business and some real estate assets in Europe.

Name: UPM Pulp
Description:
UPM is a responsible pulp producer and one of the world’s leading pulp suppliers. We offer a comprehensive set of hardwood and softwood pulp grades for demanding tissue, specialty paper, board, printing and writing paper and other innovative end-uses to the global market.
 
Our reliability as a pulp supplier is based on our modern and efficient mills, dynamic sales force, local technical support and service, and long-term logistics partners.  
 
We operate five modern pulp mills, three in Finland and two in Uruguay as well as sustainable eucalyptus plantations in Uruguay. Our new Paso de los Toros pulp mill in Uruguay started operations in April 2023. With the new pulp mill, our annual production capacity has increased by over 50% from 3.7 to 5.8 million tonnes. 
 
Our modern pulp mills are also an invaluable source of wood-based, renewable energy as well as by-products and residues, which are used for innovative bio-products.

Name: Think Wood
Description:
Think Wood provides commercial, multifamily, and single-family home design and build resources to architects, developers, and contractors. Funded by the Softwood Lumber Board (SLB), Think Wood is reimagining the future of the built environment by educating AEC professionals on the benefits of wood, including aesthetics, sustainability, and speed of construction.

Explore the Think Wood website for case studies, design tools, CEUs, expert Q+As, and more.

Name: Piveteaubois
Description:
PIVETEAUBOIS est un industriel français, fabricant de solutions bois pour la construction, l'aménagement extérieur et le bois énergie depuis 1948.

Sa passion du bois, l'engagement pour le développement de la filière bois et ses multiples savoir-faire font de l'entreprise familiale, un acteur d'exception.

PIVETEAUBOIS met toute sa connaissance du bois et son savoir-faire technologique au service des professionnels. Plus de 70 années d'expérience lui ont permis de développer 5 technologies exclusives de fabrication et de valorisation : Durapin, Wex, Lamwood, Igni-B et Pellets. 

>> En immersion au cœur de la forêt et de nos sites de production, découvrez nos métiers, nos étapes de transformation du bois et notre passion pour ce matériau d'avenir : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3gBWD6zqonw

Name: Koehler Paper
Description:
The core area business of Koehler Paper, part of the Koehler Group, is the development and production of high-quality, specialty paper, including thermal paper, playing card board, drink coasters, fine paper, carbonless paper, recycled pa-per, decor paper, wood pulp board, sublimation paper, and innovative specialty paper for the packag-ing industry, too. In Germany, the Koehler Group, with its around 2,500 employees, has five production sites, as well as three more in the USA. The Group operates on an international level, with an export ratio of about 70% in 2024 and annual revenue of 1.1 billion euro.
As an energy-intensive enterprise, Koehler invests with its unit Koehler Renewable Energy in renewa-ble energy projects such as wind energy, hydroelectric power, photovoltaics, and biomass. The Koehler Group has committed itself to producing more energy from renewable sources than is needed for pa-per production by 2030.

• Impressum http://bit.ly/2ASuPBN •

Name: Verso Corporation
Description:
Billerud North America is a leading producer of graphic, specialty and packaging paper and market pulp, with a long-standing reputation for quality and reliability. Our graphic paper products are designed primarily for commercial printing, advertising and marketing applications, including direct mail, catalogs, corporate collateral, books and magazines. Our specialty paper products include release liner papers and label face stock for pressure sensitive, glue-applied and laminate applications. Billerud NA produces packaging paper used in higher-end packaging and printing applications such as greeting cards, book covers, folders, labels and point-of-purchase displays. Verso also makes market pulp used in printing, writing, specialty and packaging paper, facial and toilet tissue, and paper towels. For more information, visit us online at billerud.com.

To view our social media guidelines visit: https://www.versoco.com/socialmediaguidelines/.

Name: Grupo COBAP
Description:
A COBAP é uma empresa de Papel e Caixas de Papelão Ondulado. 
Criada para embalar suas vendas, a COBAP tem como foco a proteção do seu produto desde a produção até o seu consumidor final.

Name: Starwood Orman Ürünleri A.Ş.
Description:
Starwood, one of Yıldız Family companies engaged in forest products industry for 4 generations, is one of the biggest industrial companies in Turkey with its growing production capacity and new investments every year.

The company has the highest production volüme capacity in one roof in Turkey, produces 2.000 m³ MDF per day on 2 lines and 4,000 m³ chipboard 3 lines, which is especially specialized in the production of thin MDF from 1.5 mm to 8 mm. Starwood has a total production capacity of 700.000 m² in 350.000 m² closed area in İnegöl plant and has a production capacity of 50.000 sheets/day with 12 short cycle press lines ( dims 1830 mm and 2100 mm) ogether with Georgian plant.

With its 5 impregnation lines, While producing its own production needs and Starwood also supplies impregnated paper for customers on the domestic and export market. On the other hand Starwood produces his own glue for paper impregnation, particle board and MDF production. With a 450.000 m²/day capacity paint line, Starwood is able to paint the boards from 1,5 mm to 22 mm, with 30 different solid and print colours, In addition, all kinds of customer-specific paint can be painted. Also according to cusmer’s need Starwood is able to produce custom-made colours for his partners.


With its enviroment-friendly structure and fresh air quality, Starwood has respiratory systems for pressurized gases in all production lines and electrostatic filter / dust separators for chipboard plants. All E1 grade Starwood products, which do not contain carcinogenic substances, are certified with national and international quality standards.

Name: Holmen
Description:
Holmen’s operationsare powered by the forest. Thegrowingtrees, the waterrushingdown the mighty rivers and the windblowingthrough the treetops. This is the heart of Holmen, a business built around the forestecocycleand the renewable products we can create from it. Our business areas are Forest, Renewable Energy, Wood Products, Board and Paper. 

With a workforce of 3500 people, we create a sustainable future and value for shareholders, customers and society with courage, commitment and responsibility. We generate sales of just under SEK 23 billion and our shares are listed on Nasdaq Stockholm, Large Cap. 

Please visit holmen.com for more information.

Name: Forest
Description:
For more than 20 years on the market, Forest Paper is a paper converter. It offers high-quality Kraft Paper and Paperboard, in tailor-made formats according to the customers’ needs. Forest Paper delivers its products adopting a responsible process, which starts with the sustainable and certified source of its papers supplied by Klabin, a reference in quality and social-environmental commitment.

In more than two decades of existence, Forest Paper has built a history of respect guided by its ability to always innovate according to the market demands, standing out for offering the best to its customers and developing solutions that increasingly value this relationship.

It has an office in São Paulo and its headquarters is strategically located in Telêmaco Borba, in the state of Paraná, one of the key papermaking cities in Brazil, thus providing greater agility in the logistics of its products.

Products

At Forest Paper, the quality standard is above the market standards. This means superior raw material with certified origin. It is a guarantee of excellence and sustainability for your company.

Guarantee of Origin

Aware of its socio-environmental responsibility, Forest Paper only uses sustainable raw materials in its production process. Conducting its business knowing that its product must be a positive factor for society and for the preservation of the environment. And to also be a guarantee of solution and agility, Forest Paper constantly invests in the innovation and technology of its processes of customization of paper formats for packaging.

Name: Celupa Industrial Celulose E Papel Guaíba Ltda.
Description: Com sede em Guaíba/RS, a Celupa é uma empresa do Grupo Melitta e conta com um parque fabril moderno e capacitado para atender as demandas de fabricação de papéis especiais dos mercados nacionais e internacionais. Ao longo dos anos, a Celupa vem investindo em inovações tecnológicas, de processos e em programas internos de boas práticas de fabricação (BPF), se tornando especialista em papéis com alta exigência de higiene e segurança.

Name: Braswell Papel e Celulose Ltda
Description:
Fabricação e produção de produtos de pastas celulósicas. Bobina de papel higiênico, toalha e guardanapo para conversão em produto acabado. Comercialização  de produto acabado de marca própria e patentes. Papel Higiênico Folha Simples ; Papel Higiênico Folha Dupla; Papel Toalha, guardanapos e lenços.

A Sulleg é a principal marca da empresa Braswell na linha de consumo . Seus produtos são produzidos com materia-prima 100% celulose, o que reﬂete diretamente na qualidade do produto, obtendo características como maciez, resistência e conforto.

Name: Congolaise Industrielle des Bois
Description: Congolaise Industrielle des Bois has been operating out of the Republic of Congo for more than five decades. Our forest concessions cover around two million hectares spread over five concessions of Pokola, Loundoungou, Kabo, Pikounda and Mimbeli-Ibenga.

Name: Box Print
Description:
O primeiro contato do cliente com o seu produto é a embalagem. Nosso trabalho é fazer deste momento uma experiência inesquecível. A Box Print oferece o que nosso cliente mais precisa, inovação, agilidade e segurança. Sistema de informação online, permitindo acompanhamento 24h do seu pedido.

Atendimento qualificado através de Anjos da Guarda, profissionais preparados para zelar pelo cliente. Que tem como objetivo assegurar a confiabilidade da execução dos projetos.

Parque gráfico com 42 mil m² de área construída, permite agilidade de entrega e capacidade para altas demandas. Contamos ainda com um escritório Comercial em São Paulo, facilitando a comunicação com os demais estados do país.
Location: Campo Bom, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Ahlstrom-Munksjö
Description:
On October 3, 2022, Ahlstrom-Munksjö completed the ownership arrangement of its Decor business. This transaction was followed by a company name change to Ahlstrom. Decor business started operating as a stand-alone company under the name Munksjö. This LinkedIn page will no longer be active; please follow the new pages for updates and job opportunities.  

www.linkedin.com/company/ahlstrom 
www.ahlstrom.com

www.linkedin.com/company/munksjö
www.munksjo.com

Name: Celbi S.A
Description:
An ALTRI company since 2006, Celbi produces a high quality short fibre pulp from eucalyptus globulus.
The properties of the fibres of this species give Celbi’s pulp special characteristics that make it particularly suitable for very specific types of paper and cardboard.

The brand Celbi PP is recognised by the market for its top quality, particularly in what concerns low level of dirt, bleaching and consistency of its physical, chemical and paper properties and characteristics. When compared with other competing pulps produced from other species of eucalyptus, Celbi’s pulp stands out for its resistance, good opacity and high porosity. These characteristics make it just right for the production of fine printing papers, laminated decorative papers and paper or cardboard primed for high quality printing.
In 2014, Celbi produced almost 700,000 tonnes of pulp.

With 50 years of activity in Portugal, Celbi keeps loyal to its vision: to be the best European producer of short fibre pulp.

Name: Abu Dhabi National Paper Mill
Description:
Welcome to Abu Dhabi National Paper Mill
Set up in the year 2000, ADNPM is the largest and most advanced manufacturer of hygienic jumbo tissue rolls in the United Arab Emirates with an annual production capacity of more than 90,000 tons. Spread over 60,000 square meters, the plant houses 3 state-of-the-art Crescent Former Machines including the latest “Advantage New Textured Tissue (NTT)” machine that produce world-class tissue paper from the highest grade virgin pulp.
Our NTT Machine can produce all grades in both plain and textured mode with higher Bulk, Softness and Water Absorbency than conventional tissue.

Our facility also has the most sophisticated De-inking recycling plant in the region which produces tissue paper from recovered office wastepaper.

A member of ADNIP Group.
Location: Industrial City of Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi

Name: RCP Papéis
Description:
A RCP Papéis é uma fábrica de embalagens e chapas de papelão ondulado, e bobinas de papel com estrutura robusta e produção 100% nacional e sustentável. Com pilares sólidos, atuamos há mais de 40 anos no setor. 

Com localização privilegiada e uma equipe de mais de 300 profissionais treinados, a nossa missão é garantir que nossos clientes e parceiros obtenham as melhores embalagens de papelão do mercado.

 100% de Autonomia Produtiva
Fabricamos desde o papel reciclado a partir do reaproveitamento de aparas, até as embalagens finais para transportar seus produtos com segurança.

 + de 300 colaboradores
Acreditamos em pessoas, por isso, temos uma equipe multifuncional que atua desde o desenvolvimento até a entrega de cada pedido, com foco na qualidade.

 + de 90.000 m² de Parque Industrial
Nosso parque industrial conta com uma área ampla para garantir alta capacidade produtiva de grandes projetos em curto espaço de tempo e custo-benefício.

 Preservação do Meio Ambiente
Nosso processo produtivo segue protocolos de qualidade que visam a sustentabilidade e a preservação do meio ambiente e seus recursos naturais.

Name: Dispapeles
Description:
Desde nuestra fundación en 1970, hemos forjado nuestro liderazgo en la comercialización de productos de la industria papelera. En 53 años, nos hemos adaptado a la constante evolución de las empresas y del mercado, ampliando nuestro portafolio y ofreciendo soluciones más amplias y diversificadas que satisfacen las necesidades de nuestros clientes. 

En nuestro portafolio, encontrarás: 

1. Distribución de Papeles y Cartulinas: Como representantes de los fabricantes más destacados de papeles reconocidos a nivel mundial, ofrecemos una selección excepcional de materiales de alta calidad. 

2. Tecnología para la Industria Gráfica: Comercializamos una amplia gama de equipos, insumos, materias primas y consumibles de primera categoría para la industria gráfica. 

3. Consumo Institucional: Nuestra variada oferta incluye productos para limpieza y desinfección, envases y embalajes, artículos de protección personal y productos higiénicos, diseñados para satisfacer las necesidades de entornos institucionales. 

4. Servicios Digitales y Colaboración Electrónica: Implementamos soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas que automatizan y optimizan los procesos empresariales de nuestros clientes. 

5. Soluciones Logísticas de Abastecimiento (SLA): Nuestra división de SLA se encarga de la distribución eficiente de productos esenciales, garantizando el funcionamiento ininterrumpido de diversas empresas.

Name: Munksjö
Description: Munksjö is a leading international manufacturer of specialty papers, including a full range of decor papers and innovative abrasive backing solutions. Our decor papers upgrade the surfaces of wood-based panels, helping create colorful, durable furniture, flooring, and other interior and exterior materials. Our high-performance abrasive paper backings allow the industry to achieve state-of-the-art quality in surface finishing. With over 1,400 employees, we operate five production sites across Germany, Spain, France, and Brazil.

Name: ASD Laminat
Description: ASD Laminat combines over 70 years of experience, a team of 700+ professionals, and an 80,000 m² modern production facility to operate in 85 countries worldwide. Its advanced manufacturing infrastructure, including 8 impregnating lines, 7 High Pressure Laminate (HPL) lines, and 4 Continuous Pressure Laminate (C-HPL) lines, ensures an impressive annual production capacity of 40,000,000 m². ASD Laminat offers contemporary architectural solutions for a sustainable future with its wide collection of decors & patterns, products, and surfaces. As a pioneering company, ASD Laminat adds value and elegance to the furniture and building industry.

Name: Lecta
Description:
Lecta is one of the leading manufacturers and distributors in Europe of specialty paper for labels, flexible packaging and rigid packaging, including innovative, high value-added barrier papers, and a wide range of premium coated and uncoated woodfree papers for publishing and commercial printing. Our production capacity is 1.6 million tons. Lecta is active in the distribution business with its own merchants operating under the Torraspapel name in France, Spain and Portugal, and under the Polyedra name in Italy. 

Lecta is a multinational group with some 2,700 employees. Producing our extensive portfolio requires in-depth technical know-how and the mastery of diverse technologies and manufacturing processes. This affords us a unique position in the market as a premier multi-product supplier, with paper solutions for a wide range of applications, end uses and industries. As a committed company, Lecta continues to focus on developing innovative and recyclable products, helping to contribute to the circular economy and create a more sustainable world.

Name: ND Paper
Description:
We are a leading manufacturer of various types of high-quality and sustainable pulp, packaging and paper products.

Our mills in Rumford, Maine and Biron, Wisconsin are integrated paper and pulp facilities, our mill in Fairmont, West Virginia is one of only three in the world that produces air-dried, recycled pulp, and our fourth mill, in Old Town, Maine, produces unbleached softwood kraft and recycled pulp. 

Finally, the newest addition to our family, ND Packaging, offers high-quality, sustainable packaging products produced in our state-of-the-art corrugated box plant, in Sturtevant, Wisconsin.

We are proud of our dedicated employees who produce more than 1.2 million short tons of pulp, packaging and paper products annually and together, through innovation and determination, are building the foundations of our 100-year vision.

Name: KapStone Paper and Packaging Corporation
Description:
Real value doesn't come from a supplier. It comes from a partner.
We’re more than a supplier: we’re a partner that provides a competitive advantage, a partner that can deliver consistent quality and superior service, a partner that fuels innovation to foster real, sustainable growth.

We have a long history of entrepreneurship, leadership and innovation. That history includes game-changing developments in papermaking, packaging design and retail solutions, as well as strategically building and strengthening our company's capabilities over time. 

With operations around the world and expertise in every shopping category, we focus on working with brands to help them win across the board by providing an unbeatable portfolio of paper and packaging products. We’re building unbeatable packaging solutions together.

Name: Altri Group
Description:
A Altri é um grupo europeu líder na produção renovável de fibras celulósicas. Gere mais de 90 mil hectares de floresta totalmente certificada e transforma a madeira de eucalipto em fibras nas suas três unidades industriais, com uma capacidade anual superior a 1,1 milhões de toneladas.

Além da produção de fibras celulósicas utilizadas em diversos produtos de tissue, a Altri produz ainda fibras sustentáveis que são utilizadas no fabrico de centenas de produtos de uso diário desde o têxtil, aos ecrãs de smartphones e TV, ou ao revestimento de medicamentos ou de alimentos, entre muitas outras aplicações.

Presente desde a gestão florestal até à produção de fibras celulósicas, a Altri é uma companhia renovável que procura contribuir no seu dia a dia para um mundo sustentável a nível ambiental, social e económico.

Está comprometida com o cumprimento dos princípios fundamentais do Global Compact e dos Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável das Nações Unidas, os quais resultaram na definição do “Compromisso 2030”.

Name: Boise Paper
Description:
Over the past century, Boise Paper has become well known within the North American forest products industry. Today, Boise Paper is the white paper division of Packaging Corporation of America (PCA) – manufacturing high quality printing and converting papers at our mill in International Falls, Minnesota. With distribution centers strategically located throughout North America, Boise Paper operates with an emphasis on the highest level of customer service and operational excellence.

Boise Paper is committed to partnering with our customers to understand and execute on their needs. We deliver high-quality products and innovative solutions guaranteed to meet those needs. And we invest time and resources into ensuring the sustainability of our industry, our communities, and our world.

Name: Damapel
Description: A Damapel foi fundada pela família De Domenico e está no mercado brasileiro há mais de 60 anos, com foco na produção de papéis absorventes: higiênicos, lenços, papel toalha e guardanapos.

Name: Sofidel America Corp.
Description: Sofidel America Corp. is part of the Sofidel Group, one of the leading manufacturers of paper for hygienic and domestic use in the world. Established in 1966, the Group is active in 13 countries, 12 in Europe and the United States (8 States), with over 7,000 employees, net sales of 3,129 million Euros (2023) and a production capacity of over one million tonnes per year (1,440,000 in 2023). Sofidel's presence in the United States can be found through its brands Nicky and Papernet. Sofidel is committed to reaching Net-Zero carbon emissions by the end of 2050.

Name: PT Tanjungenim Lestari Pulp and Paper
Description:
The PT TanjungEnim Lestari Pulp and Paper (“TeL”) is one of the most exciting pulp mill companies in Asia. The company is subsidiary of Marubeni Corporation – Japan.

PT TeL  operations in Indonesia is managed by world-class standard, and has been ISO 14001, ISO 9001 and SMK3 for diligent adherence to both Environmental, Quality and Safety Management.

Name: Svenskt Trä
Description:
Här delar vi nyheter om varför trä är det bästa konstruktionsmaterialet ur hållbarhets-, konstruktions-, säkerhets- och estetisk synpunkt.

On this page we share news about why wood is the best construction material from a sustainable, construction, safety and aesthetic point of view.

Name: ICT Group - Industrie Cartarie Tronchetti
Description:
With Italian roots and an international spirit, the ICT Group was founded to produce top-of-the-line paper. It targets the consumer, large-scale retail and converting markets by offering top-quality tissue and personal care products. It is operates in the tissue market with toilet paper, kitchen towel rolls, napkins, handkerchiefs and tissue paper under the Foxy brand and under private labels.The Group’s tissue paper production capacity is 620,000 tonnes per year and its strong international outlook is demonstrated by the fact that it has offices and facilities throughout Europe. The Group consists of:
ICT S.p.A.: founded in 1978 in the province of Lucca, with the aim of producing paper from virgin pulp; over the years, it has started up new plants and facilities in Piano della Rocca, Decimo and Piano di Coreglia.
ICT Poland: founded in 2001, located in Kostrzyn, it is one of the most cutting-edge plants, as well as being one of Europe’s largest, with a fully automated warehouse.
ICT Ibérica: founded in 1999, in 2005 it started up greenfield plants in El Burgo de Ebro. In 2018, the facility was doubled in size and is now one of the most modern and efficient in Southern Europe.
ICT France: the new integrated greenfield plant in Pannes-Villemandeur, which was inaugurated in 2011, now offers optimally manufactured products of excellent quality. 
ICT Deutschland: a commercial company based in Düsseldorf, it works with large-scale retailers to meet requirements relating to the supply of private label products. 
Pozzani Disposables: it joined the Group in 1992, specialising in high-quality nappies and personal care products, and supplies large-scale retailers with private label products and with its own brands, Carezza and Naturell. 
Europaper: the paper mill in Fivizzano is the only company in the Group that produces not only pure cellulose reels but also reels with different percentages of recycled fibres, which are also intended for the Away From Home Professional mark

Name: Skogsindustrierna
Description: Vi är organisationen för företag som förädlar trä till fossilfria och förnybara material och produkter. I verksamheten ingår Svenskt Trä och sekretariatet för BioInnovation.

Favini is also a leading global producer of graphics specialties - natural fibers-based (cellulose, algae, fruits and nuts) - for the packaging of luxury and fashion industries.

It also operates in the converting products industry sector that includes activities related to the creation and production of stationery for school, leisure and office, for high-end market.

Alberta-Pacific Forest Industries Inc. (Al-Pac), is a leading manufacturer of quality kraft pulp, with an annual production of about 640,000 tonnes. Al-Pac continuously invests in new technology and science to remain among the most environmentally responsible and competitive forest companies in the world.

For information on the company, visit www.alpac.ca.

Name: Sidharth Papers Private Limited
Description:
Situated in the lap of nature, Kashipur (Uttarakhand), Sidharth Papers Limited saw the light of the day in the year 1986, Almost within a wink of an eye, the company rose to such a pedestal that today it stands as a paradigm of a perfect and contemplated success.

Today, we are proud possessors of two more units within the premises itself.. “Siddheshwari Paper Udyog Ltd.” Manufactures agro and waste Paper based Multi Layered semi Kraft Paper 22 to 28 BF; AND “Sidharth Papers Ltd.” (Board Division) manufactures FBB, SBS and premium quality duplex board.

This is not all ! We have two more paper units at Muzaffarnagar, Uttar Pradesh – Siddheshwari Industries Ltd. Which manufactures Waste Paper based absorbent paper and 16 BF Semi craft paper, and, ‘Shree Bhageshwari Papers Ltd.’ that manufacturers Agro based quality semi kraft paper 16 to 20 BF.

A constant search for the best creates the best. Something similar has happened to us too! Since inception, we have been continuously upgrading our machineries, technologies and the system as a whole so that we could provide the finest quality of the best paper to our esteemed clients through a strong marketing and distribution system in all the leading Indian states.

Our product itself speaks voluminously about itself. We understand the interest pulse of our customers well. And that is why; today our Kraft paper and Duplex Board are the prior choice of major leading industries in packaging segment.

Sidharth Paper Limited is always around you. Its in the small gifts you give, it’s in the big decisions you make, it’s always with you.

Eco friendly packaging solution                        
Packing your life with colorful pleasure – 

We support the style. We are Sidharth Papers.

Name: PRESTON BOARD & PACKAGING LTD
Description:
Preston Board & Packaging are one of Europe’s leading provider of sustainable laminated solid board, display board & premium packaging solutions covering wide arrays of applications. We manufacture approx 25,000 tonne of board per annum and some of the market sectors we cover include;

Luxury Packaging (rigid board)
Premium Packaging (cartonboard)
Display Board (sign & display)
Furniture Board
Food Board 
Industrial Packaging (edge/transit protection)
Paper & Boards 

In 2011 we obtained FSC chain of custody certification. In 2020 we became ISO 9001 & 14001 accredited and principle aim of the business is to supply sustainable, recyclable products. 

We operate 2 x 2 metter wide laminators has the ability to produce laminated board from 500um to 5000um.

Special makings indent from as little at 2 tonne. 

Wide range of stocked products from warehouse in England & Scotland allowing us to offer high level of service.

Addition conversion capabilities allow us to manufacture board up to 7000um

In addition to this we offer a wide array of conversion facilities including die-cutting, sheeting and guillotine services.  

For more information please contact us at sales@prestonboard.co.uk or visit our website www.prestonboard.co.uk

Name: Pack-e
Description:

Thanks to our 25 years of experience and more than 35 factories around the world we customize your packaging experience.

Name: Hartzell Hardwoods
Description: Hartzell Hardwoods has been an innovator and leader in the hardwood industry for over 145 years. Long recognized as a worldwide leader in Walnut and top quality thick Oak lumber, Hartzell Hardwood's philosophy continues to be characterized by innovation, quality, and integrity. Our company has long been active in the National Hardwood Lumber Association, the Hardwood Manufacturers Association, the Indiana Hardwood Lumber Association, the American Walnut Manufacturers Association, and the Ohio Forestry Association.

Name: Global Tissue Group, Inc.
Description:
Global Tissue Group’s Private Label programs give you the convenience of having a personal, on-demand paper facility. We put your labels on our products, and work flexibly with your needs to provide a broad spectrum of products that effectively compare with national brands. If what you need is advanced retail visualization, customized products, specific sizes, or the use of an in-house art department and creative team to improve your package design, Global Tissue can supply it – consider us your own private manufacturing plant! We’ll gladly build a special program for you. We successfully have for many major retailers, mass merchandisers and supermarkets 

The Global Tissue family stands behind the quality of each and every paper product we supply: standard, premium, or ultra-premium tiers; 1-, 2-, or 3-ply sheets. We offer a variety of choices, from our branded program, Aura , paper towels and napkins with T.A.D. (Through Air Dry) technology, soft Laurel  line, our eco-conscious Regal  line, or a custom program for your private label. With Global Tissue’s combination of designed embossing, earth-conscious production, use of soft fibers, and outstanding value, our superior goods are products trusted by families all over the world – including our own.

Name: Kosher Tissue
Description:
𝗞𝗼𝘀𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗧𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘀 𝗣𝘃𝘁 𝗟𝘁𝗱 is 18 years young company, where we specialize in manufacturing 𝗽𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗶𝘂𝗺-𝗾𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝘁𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘀 designed to meet the hygiene needs of modern businesses. Determined to play a dominant role in the market for paper tissue products, we are committed to delivering exceptional comfort, durability, and sustainability in every sheet. 

Our product range encased in our four brands : 𝗞𝗼𝘀𝗵𝗲𝗿, 𝗞𝗼𝘀𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗚𝗼𝗹𝗱𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗸, 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗹 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗞𝗼𝘀𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗕𝗮𝗺𝗯𝗼𝗼 is comprehensive and caters to both home and institutional segments - through an evolving network of dealers, distributors, retail partners and online sales channels. 

Our products are trusted by offices, IT professionals, and businesses across industries for their superior quality and reliability. We take pride in providing innovative tissue solutions that combine functionality with a touch of luxury.

Why Choose Kosher Tissue?

• 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗶𝘂𝗺 𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆: Soft, strong, and highly absorbent tissue papers.
• 𝗦𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗙𝗼𝗰𝘂𝘀: Eco-friendly materials and responsible production practices.
• 𝗧𝗮𝗶𝗹𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗱 𝗦𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: Designed to cater to the unique needs of offices, IT, and professional spaces.
• 𝗖𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗿-𝗖𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗰: Dedicated to exceeding expectations with every product and service.

Kosher Tissue is more than just a tissue brand — it’s a partner in promoting hygiene and comfort for businesses. Join us in making a softer, cleaner world, one tissue at a time.

𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝘂𝗽𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀, 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁 𝗶𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘀𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀.

Name: STIN BAMBOO PAPER
Description: STIN PAPER, short for CHANGSHA STIN BAMBOO PAPER CO., LTD, is a part of STIN GROUP, STIN PAPER focuses on the production and export of daily-use bamboo household paper, covering bamboo toilet tissue, facial tissue, pocket tissue, kitchen towel, kitchen rolls etc. We have our own brand of bamboo tissues but we are also acting as an exclusive export agent for some bamboo pulp, bamboo base paper, jumbo rolls, and bamboo paper-making machinery & equipment manufacturers here in China. Lots of the mid-size mills do not have direct export licenses in China at the moment. We are also offering OEM services for some paper importers and distributors worldwide. We have rich experience in sourcing suppliers (OEM factories), quality control, risk control, loading process supervision, shipping, logistics (package) and customs clearance etc in this field. Our partner factories are mainly from Sichuan, Henan, Shenyang, Shandong, Guangdong and Jiangsu etc, China. We are offfering a ONE-STOP solution service for your paper or paper-making business !  We focus on high quality bamboo paper series ! Save trees, protect our earth, do not forget to use high quality, healthy, eco and environment-friendly bamboo products !

Name: D & S Pallets Hauling
Description:
Pallets
Recycled Pallets

Remanufactured Pallets

Hauling

Name: Scholar Stationery Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 1958, Scholar is a family run business that has over 60 years of experience in the manufacturing of high quality stationery.
Scholar has always been at the heart of design and innovation and has successfully pioneered in India some of the most commonly used products today such as a spiral pad, a notepad & even a To Do pad.

At Scholar, we have consistently maintained our quality due to highly responsible manufacturing practices, the use of latest machines & by using the finest inputs sourced from India & across the globe.

Traditionally, our forte was educational notebooks for students. Over the years, we have added many items to our range. Currently, we manufacture more than 500 across 8 broad categories, namely:

JOURNALS - Premium Notebooks with a variety of covers, utilities and binding functions.
CREATIVE ARTIST PADS – Our specialised pads cater to an array of arts: sketch, watercolor, charcoal, acrylic, oil painting, guache,etc.
DATED DIARIES & PLANNERS –  New Year Diaries and Planners
NOTEBOOKS – College Notebooks, subject books and notepads 
OFFICE STATIONERY – Everyday office essentials such as notepads, registers, book keeping books, etc.
PERSONAL STATIONERY – Daily Essentials that make life easier: to-do pads, planners, memo pads, etc.
LIFESTYLE ACCESSORIES – Passport cover, luggage tags, utility book bands, etc.
CUSTOM EDITIONS - Customised paper products that flaunt your brand inform your customers about your offerings in many innovative ways.

OUR USPS
- Highest Quality Paper.
- Use of the best of the raw materials soured from across the globe.
- Stringent Quality Standards. We are also ISO 9001:2015 Certified.
- Quintessential craftsmanship.
- Unrivalled trendy designs.

INFRASTRUCTURE - We have a modern production facility in the heart of Mumbai City occupying close to 10,000 sq.ft. We also have an in-house design team that is always coming up with new innovations.

Name: Yildiz Entegre România
Description:
Având o profundă înțelegere și experiență în industria produselor forestiere, Yildiz Entegre este un exemplu dinamic de tărie și determinare antreprenorială a anatolienilor.

Yildiz Entegre este unul dintre cei mai mari producători din lume.  Compania a lansat primele produse forestiere în anul 2001. Astăzi își dezvoltă calitatea, marca și popularitatea exportând produsele din cele 7 fabrici în peste 40 de țări.

Yildiz Entegre produce MDF, MDF melaminat, PAL, PAL melaminat, profile de MDF, Parchet Laminat, uși din MDF, MDF vopsit, fronturi de MDF, fețe de uși, furnir și adezivi în fabrici cu o suprafață totală de 1.832.000 m2. 

Yildiz Entegre își asumă misiunea de a avea produse eco-friendly, obținând certificate europene în domeniu și demonstrând sensibilitate față de consumatorul final.

Yildiz în România 

Yildiz Entegre își lărgește orizonturile de producție și investește 150 de milioane de euro în România, devenind astfel unul dintre principalii investitori străini. Fabrica va angaja aproximativ 450 de persoane din comunitatea locală. Suprafața platformei este de 40 de hectare cu o hală de producție ce va măsura 78.800 mp. Fabrica Yildiz Entegre Romania este localizată în comuna Oarja, județul Argeș, la aproximativ 60 de km de capital țării, București.

În fabrica din comuna Oarja, Yildiz Entegre va produce profile MDF și HDF, MDF melaminat, PAL, PAL melaminat, parchet laminat, uși și plinte MDF. Tehnologia de ultimă generație folosită în procesul de producție va poziționa fabrica din România ca un etalon de calitate pentru toate produsele companiei. Investițiile majore în tehnologie au ca scop eficientizarea procesului de producție și respectarea celor mai înalte standarde de protecție a mediului.

Credem că Yildiz Entegre, așa cum a făcut-o în Turcia, va juca un rol important în economia României prin capacitatea de producție, export și forța de muncă locală.

Security paper contains various types of protection against counterfeiting used to protect documents. Currently, the company produces more than 1000 different types of security paper with different technical specifications according to customers’ requirements.
Among the main products there is paper for passports, ID cards and driving licenses, tax stamps, shares, travel tickets, postage stamps, checks, bills, vouchers, entrance tickets, a range of certificates and many others. The high and guaranteed level of production quality is appreciated not only in the Czech market, but also in the most developed markets of European Union countries, where the majority of production is exported. The export reaches 90% of the total production and the goods are exported to over 70 countries.
SPM has a unique know-how, state-of-the-art paper production technology, its own development and research centre, as well as production monitoring and security systems.

En la empresa se ha realizado una inversión para minimizar considerablemente el impacto de las emisiones de gases de efecto invernadero; sustituyendo la caldera de gas, por una caldera alimentada con biomasa: en concreto astilla forestal de proximidad. 

Hemos sido la primera empresa del sector en Cataluña en apostar por este cambio.

Kronoflooring is the worldwide leading producer of high-quality laminate floorings and panels.

Through our many years of experience, extensive technical know-how and high product-quality we deliver to 80 countries worldwide. Kronoflooring is proud to be an innovative company: Our technologies are constantly developed further.

A lot has happened since the first laminate flooring appeared on the market in Sweden at the end of the 1980s: Our modern products are available with a large number of decors and special coatings make laminates from Kronoflooring anti-static, sound-insulated and easy to clean.

We set no limits to the creativity of our designers and decor printers: Apart from the classical wood and stone decors, our floorings are also available in trendy retro colours and patterns. Designers, printers and impregnators work closely together in the early phase of product development – and Kronoflooring encourages them to constantly try out new ideas. So that we are among the trendsetters on the laminate flooring market and can repeatedly offer our customers not only top quality but also surprising new developments. With our in-house umbrella brand "Krono Original" and extensive service we will continue to be a reliable and competent partner for our customers in the future too.

Description:

Jingxing Holdings (M) Sdn Bhd will be investing approximately RM 2.3 billion for the project (approximately USD 300 million) with a land size of 80 acres, and the factory is located at Banting Industrial City, Kuala Langat, Selangor.

Jingxing Holdings (M) Sdn Bhd is the wholly owned subsidiary of Zhejiang Jingxing Paper Joint Stock Co., Ltd. which was founded in 1984 and was listed on the Stock Exchange of Shenzhen, China for the year 2006. Today, Zhejiang Jingxing Paper Joint Stock Co., Ltd. is one of the market leaders in the packaging board manufacturing industry in China.

The factory will be manufacturing and distributing a variegated range of quality paper products mainly pulpboard, Kraft-liner and corrugated medium. The project is planned for large scale production capacity of 1.4 million tons per year.

Inter-Papier has an excellent reputation and strong financial background. We are providing our customers and suppliers with added value in marketing, financing, logistics and risk handling and management.
Our people are highly motivated and experienced to help serving our partners needs. We are at your disposal at any time.

Name: MS Paper & Engineering Works
Description: We at MS Paper & Enginnering works are engrossed into manufacturing of various paper based, bio-degradable products.

Name: emtec Electronic GmbH
Description:
Emtec Electronic GmbH develops, produces and distributes worldwide testing and measuring devices for the detection of relevant processing properties of paper, board, nonwoven and textile materials. 
The portable measuring devices enable manufacturers and converters of paper, nonwoven and textile products, for example, to control and optimize the manufacturing and converting processes during ongoing production. From the wet end to the final product, the application of the devices enables an efficient process to achieve and ensure the best possible quality with the least possible effort. 
For 25 years, we have been relying on innovative, highly specialized measuring instruments combined with a high degree of service orientation. Since the company was founded, we have been intensively involved in scientific cooperation with institutes and companies, further developing instruments for our customers and offering a broad network in over 80 countries from our Leipzig location.

Name: Creapack
Description:
Creapack is a family-owned company with its own production facility based in West-Flanders since 1988.
We design and produce displays, POS and packaging material. 
As a well-established business, we have a tradition of customer-oriented, high-quality products.
You can count on us for a professional, engaged approach and for advice from a highly motivated team. 
From draft, design to the finished product, we guarantee you an outstanding and highly efficient service.

Name: Atta-Norm SA
Description: Fabrique de portes en bois sur mesure, spécialisée dans la fabrication de portes coupe-feu EI30, portes techniques, portes de sécurité RC3.

Name: Stora Enso De Hoop
Description: Stora Enso De Hoop is the paper mill in Eerbeek, founded in 1657. At Stora Enso De Hoop we make paper based on recycled fibers for the packaging industry, plasterboard and honeycomb industry. We are part of Stora Enso AB.

Name: Gurgaon Paper Mills India Ltd.
Description: Manufacturers of High BF Kraft Paper &Kraft Board with Capacity of 250 tons per day in Tauru, Haryana

Name: Fiberdom - A Materials Innovation Company
Description:
We are a Finnish materials innovation company transforming wood fibers into a high-performance, 100% plastic-free supermaterial. 

From food contact to durable packaging and beyond, our material helps replace plastics in demanding applications—without compromising performance or sustainability.

Our patented process, built on circular thinking, uses only four natural ingredients with no barriers, binders, or additives. The result? A durable, recyclable and home-compostable material that supports our targets to decrease the use of plastics. 

Compliant with the toughest regulations like the EU’s Single-Use Plastics Directive and Product and Packaging Waste Regulation, we aim to advance a zero-waste, circular economy.

Our first product, plastic-free disposable cutlery, is available in Finland—proof of what’s possible with our breakthrough material. And this is just the beginning.

We’re collaborating with manufacturers, retailers, and sustainability-driven partners to scale our innovation and create a future where high-performance and plastic-free truly coexist. 

Ready to join us? Let’s innovate together.

Name: Oriental Paper
Description:
In 2002, ORIENTAL COLLECTION (HK) LIMITED started its journey, catering to overseas customers. In 2005, ORIENTAL PAPER (HK) LIMITED was established, specializing in exporting various printing paper and packaging board. 



With a commitment to quality, service, passion, and sincerity, ORIENTAL PAPER has emerged as a trusted SUPPLY CHAIN and business partner for major paper mills, earning a stellar reputation globally.



Expanding its horizons, Hangzhou Oriental Trading Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008, engaging in the import and export of paper and a variety of printing industry machines. 



Proudly announcing the establishment of Oriental Paper General Trading LLC in January 2024, showcasing an ongoing dedication to excellence in the industry. 



#PaperIndustry #SupplyChain #BusinessExpansion #GlobalTrade

Name: Mediterranean Tissue Mill
Description:
Mediterranean Tissue Mill was established in 2007 as an Egyptian joint stock company, a leading manufacturer of tissue paper in the Arab world, and in 2009 we started our regular production for 100% Virgin Pulp tissue paper.

Mediterranean Tissue Mill is specialized in manufacturing Jumbo Rolls of Hygienic tissue paper made from 100 %virgin Pulp “Prime Quality” using the latest techniques and applying quality criteria in every stage of Production.

Name: Erwin
Description: hhh

Name: Onyx Specialty Papers, Inc.
Description: Onyx Specialty Papers manufactures a wide range of products utilized in the decorative laminate, automotive, medical and artist market segments.  We pride ourselves in being a strong business partner who consistently delivers superior performance.  Our heritage dates back over 200 years manufacturing paper in the Berkshires of Massachusetts.

Name: Enviroflute
Description:
Together, we can make positive change.

We create and deliver innovative sustainable packaging solutions using ethically sourced products that are 100% recyclable, biodegradable and fully customisable.

This makes it easy for our clients to reduce their environmental impact - Less plastic with no compromise on the 'unboxing experience.'

Name: Soffigen
Description:
La Soffigen produce e distribuisce dal 1981 articoli monouso in carta destinati alla fruizione domestica e industriale. 
L'elevata qualità e igienicità del nostro prodotto è frutto dell'esclusivo utilizzo di materie prime di purissima cellulosa lavorate con linee di produzione sempre più aggiornate e tecnologicamente sofisticate; il tutto garantito dalla certificazione SGS ISO 9001.
Il successo della nostra società nasce soprattutto da una profonda conoscenza del mercato, infatti l'attuale linea di prodotti è frutto di un continuo adeguamento alle sue evoluzioni.

Name: Heko Spanten Ede B.V.
Description: Heko Spanten Ede B.V. is a paper & forest products company based out of Rijksweg 39, EDE GLD, Netherlands.

Name: Brink Group of Companies
Description:
Operating since 1975, The Brink Group is the largest finger-joint lumber producer in North America. The company proudly employs over 400 individuals in Northern British Columbia.

The Group is comprised of  Brink Forest Products, Pleasant Valley Re-manufacturing, Vanderhoof Specialty Wood Products, Brink Properties (Land Development) and Boardwalk Properties (Real Estate Agency). 

For more information, visit www.brinkgroup.ca.

Name: Dynamic Fine Paper Mill Private Limited
Description: Dynamic Fine Paper Mills Pvt. Ltd. is a premier manufacturer of high-quality kraft paper in India, with an impressive annual production capacity of 40,000 MT. We specialize in producing kraft paper in the GSM range of 100 to 140, tailored to meet the diverse needs of our clients across multiple industries. At Dynamic, we’re driven by a commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, consistently delivering exceptional products and an unparalleled customer experience. Our dedication to sustainable practices and industry leadership has made us a trusted name in the kraft paper manufacturing sector.

Name: BIOFORESTAL PELLET
Description:
En una clara apuesta ambiental y energética, Nuevas Tecnologías y Bioenergía (NTB) se ponía en 2012 al frente de BIOMASA FORESTAL S.L., la planta de revalorización de residuos forestales para la fabricación de pellets de madera con sede en As Pontes, tras la adquisición del 80% del capital de la empresa, en una clara apuesta ambiental y energética.

Accuore Inversiones SL, Intacta Gestión Ambiental SL e Invespar Desarrollos SL – las dos últimas sociedad filial y patrimonial respectivamente del grupo empresarial gallego "Gestán"– realizaban así una meditada apuesta por el mundo de la bioenergía, en cuyo potencial confían plenamente, proyecto industrial con el que pretenden impulsar el sector de la biomasa y desarrollar de todo el potencial que ofrece el pellet a nivel industrial y de consumo particular.

Con una producción inicial de 55.000 toneladas, que se ve incrementada a lo largo del año hasta situarse en 75.000, la planta situada en la localidad coruñesa de As Pontes se destina a la producción de pellet doméstico que, vendido a granel, se dirige tanto al mercado nacional como al internacional. La exportación al extranjero es su principal objetivo, destinando más del 80% de la producción al mercado internacional. Sus principales clientes son Dinamarca, Alemania e Inglaterra, hasta donde se hace llegar el pellet por vía marítima, con barcos fletados para tal fin desde el puerto de Ferrol. El otro 20% del pellet producido tiene como destino el mercado nacional, al que llega a través de camiones cisterna. Tanto en un caso como en otro, son las grandes industrias, los complejos hospitalarios, los establecimientos hosteleros y los centros educativos los principales consumidores de biomasa.
Location: As Pontes de García Rodríguez. (A Coruña), A Coruña

Name: PERE VALLS, S.A.
Description:
PERE VALLS, SA, es una empresa familiar fundada en 1533, situada en Sant Pere de Riudebitlles, en la comarca del Alt Penedès; que se encuentra en su novena generación, y se dedica a la fabricación de papel reciclado. En su actividad principal realiza una función medioambiental importante transformando cada año 20.000 toneladas de papel viejo en papel nuevo.

La amplia gama de productos de papel fabricada en nuestras instalaciones tiene aplicaciones para uso alimentario, embalaje, para la fabricación de mandriles, etc. Disponemos de Certificación de Calidad ISO 9001 y Certificación de Gestión Ambiental ISO 14001, además de los Registros Sanitarios correspondientes de la instalación.

En la empresa se ha realizado una inversión para minimizar considerablemente el impacto de las emisiones de gases de efecto invernadero; sustituyendo la caldera de gas, por una caldera alimentada con biomasa: en concreto astilla forestal de proximidad. 

Hemos sido la primera empresa del sector en Cataluña en apostar por este cambio.

Name: Società Legnami Paganoni S.p.A.
Description:
Lᴀ Sᴏᴄɪᴇᴛᴀ̀ Lᴇɢɴᴀᴍɪ Pᴀɢᴀɴᴏɴɪ ɴᴀsᴄᴇ ɴᴇʟ 1989, ᴍᴀ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴀ sᴜ ᴜɴ’ᴇsᴘᴇʀɪᴇɴᴢᴀ sᴇᴄᴏʟᴀʀᴇ ɴᴇʟ sᴇᴛᴛᴏʀᴇ ᴅᴇʟ ʟᴇɢɴᴏ ᴅᴀ ᴘᴀʀᴛᴇ ᴅᴇʟʟᴀ ғᴀᴍɪɢʟɪᴀ ғᴏɴᴅᴀᴛʀɪᴄᴇ, ᴄʜᴇ ɢɪᴀ̀ ᴀɢʟɪ ɪɴɪᴢɪ ᴅᴇʟ ‘900 sɪ ᴏᴄᴄᴜᴘᴀᴠᴀ ᴅᴇʟ ᴛᴀɢʟɪᴏ ʙᴏsᴄʜɪ ɴᴇʟʟᴀ ᴢᴏɴᴀ ᴅɪ Bʀᴀɴᴢɪ (Bᴇʀɢᴀᴍᴏ).
 
Oggi, nel suo spazio di oltre 60.000 mq, Legnami Paganoni si occupa della vendita all’ingrosso e al dettaglio di legname italiano ed estero delle migliori essenze, con soluzioni per falegnami e per l'edilizia, senza trascurare i prodotti finiti destinati alla realizzazione di arredi e con consegne in tutta Italia.

Nel reparto segheria di Legnami Paganoni, il personale svolge la delicata operazione del taglio su misura di tronchi, pannelli e travi, che verranno poi trasportati nella zona destinata all’essiccazione per rimuovere l’umidità e rendere il legno più resistente. In reparto sarà preparato per l’applicazione di vernici e altri prodotti di finitura. La società dispone anche di un magazzino per lo stoccaggio, per garantire al cliente un’ampia varietà di prodotti in pronta consegna. 

A ʀɪᴠᴇɴᴅɪᴛᴏʀɪ ᴅɪ ᴍᴀᴛᴇʀɪᴀʟᴇ ᴇᴅɪʟɪ, ꜰᴀʟᴇɢɴᴀᴍɪ, ᴀʀᴄʜɪᴛᴇᴛᴛɪ ᴇ ᴘʀᴏɢᴇᴛᴛɪsᴛɪ Lᴇɢɴᴀᴍɪ Pᴀɢᴀɢᴏɴɪ ᴏꜰꜰʀᴇ ɪ sᴇɢᴜᴇɴᴛɪ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴏᴛᴛɪ:

  Pᴀɴɴᴇʟʟɪ
  Lᴀᴍᴇʟʟᴀʀᴇ ᴘᴇʀ sᴇʀʀᴀᴍᴇɴᴛɪ
  Tᴀᴠᴏʟᴀᴍᴇ
  Tᴇᴛᴛɪ
  Pᴀᴠɪᴍᴇɴᴛɪ
  Pᴏʀᴛᴇ
  Iᴍᴘʀᴇɢɴᴀᴛɪ

Scegliere Legnami Paganoni significa avere la certezza di ottenere essenze selezionate, per offrire solo prodotti di qualità assoluta ai propri clienti. Non c’è crescita senza rispetto per la sostenibilità: per questo Legnami Paganoni opera nel rispetto per l’ambiente, con certificazioni che ne attestano filosofia e mission: 𝐂𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐳𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐅𝐒𝐂 e 𝐂𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐨 𝐏𝐄𝐅𝐂, oltre al 𝐅𝐢𝐭𝐨𝐤, garantiscono il rispetto di rigorosi parametri di salvaguardia ambientale.

Name: Brasilpel
Description:
Somos movidos pela constante busca por qualidade e inovação. Diariamente, a Brasilpel está em busca de novas tecnologias para melhor atender seus clientes. Priorizando sempre o atendimento e relacionamento, desde 2001 a Brasilpel vem evoluindo seus produtos, suas tecnologias, e seus valores.

Mais do que números, o que nos define é o esforço permanente em encontrar soluções para nossos clientes. Inicialmente fornecendo papeis para o ramo calçadista, hoje contamos também com uma ampla linha de soluções corporativas para linha digital, sublimação, fitas, antimofo, e papeis para o ramo alimentício.

A nossa missão em satisfazer nossos clientes, hoje se estende por diversos segmentos que formam a identidade da Brasilpel.
Location: Novo Hamburgo, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Mikropak Packaging
Description:
Founded in 1994, Mikropak has been constantly growing since its establishment.

We managed to increase our production volume by two hundred percent over the time. We opted for a structure that is in line with our growth rate and took our team quality to a young, dynamic, and professional level.

Our responsible team of staff who prioritizes quality and deadlines helped us achieve a reliable working system that can manage the time and quality in the most effective way possible.

Sensitivity to the environment has always been one of our main priorities. We continue our efforts to protect the entire environment at Mikropak as well. To this end, we have been using our pollution-free treatment facility for many years - something that makes us very happy as we know that we do not damage the environment.

We think that it is very important to make investments and create employment opportunities for our citizens and our efforts to do good for our country will continue.

Name: Galaxy Brite
Description: A premium multi-purpose #paper brand that offers excellent brightness, opacity and #printing quality for customers! #UAE

Name: Caesar Pac Kuwait
Description:
Caesar Pack was established in 2001 in the Kuwait Free Trade Zone and has since been the premium provider of corrugated carton in Kuwaiti & the Middle East market. We specialize in producing corrugated boxes, both brown and white, 5 color printing, and die-cut boxes including micro-flutes, point of purchase and display cartons.

Our clients include a wide variety of industries and leading manufacturing companies, fast food chains, mineral water, confectionery items, fruits, vegetables, hardware items, lubricants, chemicals, poultry, etc. Related services include in-house structural and graphic concepts development, packaging design and an independent manufacturing facility, (we produce our own corrugated sheets and convert them to boxes).

Our product range is:

Corrugated Liner
Brown & white cartons
Die-cut boxes
Microflutes
Point-of-Purchase
Display Cartons

At Caesar Pac, we believe in our customers, our employees, and continuous improvement. Our dedication to the highest standards has made us the number one choice in the region for all corrugated boxing needs.

Name: ARTI GRAFICHE BM S.R.L.
Description:
An Italian company born in 1970 specialized in stationery products.
We define ourselves as paper lover and we would like to share with you products that brings us joy.

Name: Dunkley Lumber Ltd.
Description: An Efficient and Flexible Producer of High Quality Lumber. With a capacity of approximately 500 million board feet of lumber annually, Dunkley is one of the largest sawmills in North America. We process predominantly SPF (White Spruce, Lodgepole Pine, and Alpine Fir), however Douglas Fir is also a component of the log mix. A long-standing commitment to modernization and efficiency has allowed us to maintain a strong position in British Columbia’s forest industry.

Name: Pre Rolled Cones Factory - PT Kertas Energi Mulia
Description:
We manufacture pre-rolled cones and smoking accessories for the global market. Mostly supplying to Canada, USA, NL, GB, Mexico, South Africa, Israel, France and Germany.

With over 20 years working and manufacturing in different industries, we can proudly say we are a fast-growing company on the right track.

We offer every cone size on the market, crafted carefully with European inported adhesive, filter board and rolling papers. You can be sure we always hold stock of wood and hemp based rolling papers, both French and R4Y supply.  Other materials are available also on request.

Together with our team of designers and packing experts we will carefully develop your outstanding packaging or execute your own designs 

Contact us now and find out why we have a 99 % returning customer rate!

Name: Surpapelcorp S.A.
Description:
Paper manufacturing company involved in the production of recycled paper for the corrugating industry. The company was acquired by Barnett Corp. (USA) in December 2011, beginning a process of investment in production process. Since then, the company has continuously improved its production levels and the quality of those products. 

At the same time, the company acquired a water treatment plant, matching the highest standards in terms of environmental regulations.

Name: Canoe Forest Products Ltd.
Description:
Since 1965, the CANOE  brand has distinguished itself as a premium quality plywood panel that is well recognized and valued throughout the world.

The Canoe plywood facility is situated 5 kilometers east of the city of Salmon Arm, in the heart of some of BC’s highest quality timber and is supported by log harvesting and forestry operations within the Okanagan Timber Supply Area, surrounding Shuswap Lake.

Name: The Paper Tigers
Description:
Paper Tigers
Distributing pulp and paper products to the packaging industry for nearly 40 years
The Paper Tigers is a service oriented paper and secondary fiber brokerage company headquartered just north of Chicago, in Bannockburn, Illinois. We specialize in buying and selling various grades of paperboard in bale, roll and sheet form for re-pulping, converting, and printing domestically or internationally.
Although bleached board is our particular specialty, The Paper Tigers deals in just about any grade of paper, post-consumer or post-industrial, and we have the ability to add value to paper stock through our processing, warehousing and distribution operations located strategically throughout the United States

Name: MoRe Research Örnsköldsvik AB
Description:
MoRe Research Örnsköldsvik AB is a neutral and independent research and development company in the field of products and processes for e.g. the forest industry. Our company used to be a part of the MoDo group, which was founded more than one hundred years ago.

Our focus areas are All the way (Hela vägen), Analytical services, Biorefinery, Process Emergency and Education.

Name: Logs Direct Ltd
Description: Logs Direct are suppliers of eco-friendly carbon neutral fuels. Selling a range of locally produced wood fuels from sustainable sources including traditional firewood logs, kiln dried hardwood, seasoned logs, wood pellets and kindling both direct to the public and in bulk quantities to suppliers and fireplace shops and restaurants.

Name: Kanzaki Specialty Papers
Description:
Headquartered in Ware, Massachusetts, Kanzaki Specialty Papers is widely recognized as a leading manufacturer of direct thermal, inkjet coated papers and films. Customers in retail, financial, medical, industrial, and other markets depend on Kanzaki for the finest surface coated materials that best fit their needs. Kanzaki Specialty Papers is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Oji Imaging Media Co., Ltd. and sister company of Kanzan Spezialpapiere. 

Kanzaki is committed to manufacturing and distributing quality surface coated materials in an atmosphere driven by cost effective production and full utilization of its human resources. Kanzaki shares with all Americans important responsibilities concerning the environment and the protection of natural resources, including land, air and water.

Name: LSK Holding
Description:
Yurtdışı yatırımımız olan LSK Proton şirketimiz Türkiye'nin 4 bin km kuzeyinde bulunan Sibirya'da Dünya’nın en kaliteli sarıçam ormanlarının kiralanması ve hasat edilmesi ile başlayan ürünlerimizin serüveni son teknolojiye sahip ahşap fabrikalarımızda devam etmektedir. Günlük 40 konteyner(2.000 m3) üretim yapan fabrikalarımızda tüm ürünlerimiz ısıl işleme tabi tutularak nem oranı %10 oranında indirilmekte ve hepsi dış etkenlerden korunması adına vakumlu ambalajlar ile paketlenmektedir.
LSK Makro Ağaç San. Anonim Şirketimiz optik okuyucular yardımı ile sınıflarına ayrılan ürünlerimizi silinmiş, fırınlanmış ve pürüzsüz yüzeyleri ile son kullanıma hazır vaziyette Sibirya Fabrikamızdan Gebze limanına ulaştırarak birçok ülkeye ihraç etmektedir.
LSK Yapısal Ahşap Şirketimiz uzman mimarlarımızın desteğiyle online ve telefon ile gerçekleştirilebilen satışlarının yansıra; Gebze’de bulunan depomuzdan ve merkez ofisimizden yüz yüze satış hizmeti de vermektedir. Türkiye’nin her bir noktasına hızlı ve güvenli şekilde gerçekleştirilen sevkiyatlar ile siz değerli müşterilerimize ürünlerinizi ulaştırmaktayız. Ustabul uygulamamız ile ürünlerin satış sonrası sürecinde de destek vererek Türkiye genelinde 1000’in üzerinde ahşap ustasından size en yakın lokasyonda bulunan usta ile iletişime geçmenizi sağlamaktayız.

Name: Foopak
Description:
Foopak: Paperboard for Sustainable F&B Packaging

Foopak is the innovative paperboard brand from APP Group, one of the world’s largest pulp and paper manufacturers. We supply paperboard, not finished packaging. We provide eco-friendly, compostable, PEFC-certified, and food-safe paperboard—available in rolls and sheets—for converters creating sustainable packaging solutions.

Our flagship product, Foopak Bio Natura, is tested and certified to meet the highest standards of safety and performance. 

 If you're a converter, let’s collaborate to shape the future of sustainable packaging
 If you're a brand owner, we’ll connect you with our global network of trusted converters to bring your packaging vision to life.

Join us in redefining packaging with purpose!

Name: Pino de Galicia
Description:
Pino de Galicia es una iniciativa impulsada por el sector forestal gallego para garantizar el origen, trazabilidad y calidad de la madera de pino procedente de los montes gallegos.
#FundacionArume
//
Pino de Galicia é unha inicitaiva impulsada polo sector forestal galego para garantir a orixe, trazabilidade e calidade da madeira de piñeiro procedente dos montes galegos. polo sector forestal galego para garantir a orixe, trazabilidade e calidade da madeira de piñeiro procedente dos montes galegos.

Name: HQPlantations
Description:
With more than 300,000 hectares under management, we are one of the largest plantation forest growers in Australia and genuine stewards of the land and environment that we protect, maintain and enhance.

Managing productive, healthy, carbon sequestering plantation forests in a sustainable way for generations to come is at the heart of everything we do and recognised by our Responsible Wood and FSC certification to Australian and international standards.

Our continuous cycle of growth ensures our collective values are perpetually maintained while producing a constant supply of plantation timber for many important products used by everyday Australians, including important building materials for homes. 

We are deeply rooted in regional Queensland, mindful and respectful of our neighbours, supportive of our local communities and contributing to regionally significant economies enhanced by our local customers and contractor partners.

We acknowledge the Traditional Custodians and First Nations Peoples of the land on which we work, live and learn and seek opportunities to grow together. We pay our respects to their ancestors and Elders past, present and emerging and thank them for enriching us with their cultural practices, traditions, lore and connection to country.

We manage our forests with care for the future, minimising disruption and disturbance to land, water, wildlife and communities, and contributing to a better and more sustainable world for everyone.

For information about our business, please visit our website at www.hqplantations.com.au

Name: Vernaza Grafic
Description: Since 1950 in the Graphic Industry

Name: Hamelin Brands Limited
Description:
Hamelin Brands is the largest supplier of branded envelopes, notebooks, pads, diaries, personal stationery and paper-based education supplies in the UK.

As part of Hamelin, one of Europe's leading stationery manufacturers, Hamelin Brands is the home of the Oxford stationery brand along with other well-known brands such as Black n' Red, Elba, Oxford Office, Oxford Campus, Cambridge, Challenge and Basildon Bond.

We pride ourselves on offering stationery products with strong environmental credentials, whether recycled or using virgin fibres from sustainable sources.


We Value Our People……
At Hamelin we believe that people are our biggest asset and have spent the last few years developing an environment that demonstrates that belief. We are fully committed to the ongoing training & development of our employees and as a result have been accredited with “Investors in People” .

We have a set of values that we work towards to ensure that we stay focussed on the customer and the needs of the market whilst ensuring we all enjoy day to day work and feel valued by the business.

We are a small dedicated team at Hamelin and these values we believe make a difference to our success:

Team Players: We believe in one team, we support and trust our colleagues, we embrace challenge.

Ambitious: We seek to raise the game in all that we do, we don’t accept the status quo without challenge, we are not afraid to fail in pursuit of our goals, we’re energetic.

In the detail: We seek out root causes, we love data & analysis, we base decisions on fact when we can, we take time to pause & reflect.

Personally Committed: We engage actively in what we do and hold ourselves accountable, we listen & engage, we go the extra mile, we work hard & take time to thank our colleagues.

Leaders of Change: We embrace change when it comes, we drive it where it’s needed and we are flexible in our approach.

Name: Manubois (Groupe Lefebvre)
Description: Manubois est une entreprise du groupe Lefebvre spécialisée dans l'aboutage et le collage du bois de hêtre. Fort de 35 ans d'expérience sur le marché de la menuiserie, et après plusieurs années de R&D, Manubois propose désormais du lamellé collé de hêtre pour le secteur de la construction. Certifié GLD40h par le FCBA, labellisé PEFC et Bois de france, le BLC+  hêtre est aujourd'hui le bois d’ingénierie le plus résistant jamais produit en France.

Name: COPACEL
Description:
The French Union of Industries of Paper, Board and Cellulose (COPACEL) is a trade association representing the French companies producing pulp, paper and paperboard. COPACEL gathers 75 companies, employing approximately 14,000 people with a total turnover of nearly 6.5 billion euros.

COPACEL represents the French Paper Industry for all its aspects, and all grades produced (paper and cardboard packaging, graphic papers, sanitary papers, industrial and specialty papers, pulp), raw materials used (wood, recovered paper and cardboard), and the size of companies (SMEs and subsidiaries of large groups).

Name: Korab International
Description:
We are committed to delivering solutions, strategically tailored to our clients unique reality.

Korab International has been in the Pulp and Paper industry since 1912.
