Name: Whakatane Mill Limited
Description:
Whakatane Mill Limited (WML) are Australasia’s only manufacturer of coated paperboard grades for the packaging market. 

All of our paperboard is produced to the highest quality from virgin fibre for the greatest product safety and optimal performance.  

We are extremely proud of our past having been part of the Bay of Plenty community since 1939.

We directly employ in excess of 185 personnel - the vast majority of whom come from the local Whakatane area.  We started production in 1939 to turn the nearby Central North Island Pine forests into export paperboard for New Zealand’s growing economy.

Paperboard is an environmentally sustainable packaging format, with raw materials sourced responsibly from nearby renewable pine plantations or from a dedicated, qualified supplier base.  Every product that we make fits easily into already established circular recycling programs, ensuring that our impact on the environment and consumer waste to landfill is minimised.

Our ownership history has been diverse – from NZ Forest Products in the early days, to Carter Holt Harvey and Rank Group, SIG Combibloc and since June 2021 by the Smurfit Consortium.  Our current owners are committed to investing in WML to ensure that the business has a future for decades to come.

Today we produce in excess of150,000 tonnes of paperboard annually on a 24hr/day, 7 days a week basis, with an already invested expansion plan that will take the Mill volume to in excess of 200,000 tonnes by the end of 2023.

We are committed to being an employer of choice in the Bay of Plenty area and continuing to support the New Zealand timber industry and our many customers and suppliers all over the globe.

And we're delighted to help strengthen the families of our employees and contribute meaningfully to the communities in which we live.

Name: PALLISCO-CIFM
Description:
PALLISCO est une entreprise d’exploitation forestière basée au Cameroun depuis 1972 dans le village Eboumétoum par Messamena. En 1996, elle s’installe définitivement à Mindourou, arrondissement de Dja, département du Haut-Nyong, avec la création d´une unité de transformation : le Centre Industriel et Forestier de Mindourou (CIFM).

Nous disposons d’un massif forestier constitué de (07) sept UFAs, soit environ une superficie de 388 949 hectares de forêt. Nous sommes aussi des entreprises certifiées ; OLB (Origine et Légalité des Bois) depuis le 06 juillet 2005 et FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) depuis octobre 2008, en gestion forestière et chaîne de contrôle. Ce qui nous positionne incontestablement dans la sphère de la gestion durable et responsable, car nos activités respectent les normes d’Exploitation Forestière à Impact Réduit (EFIR).

Première société au Cameroun à créer une cellule d´aménagement interne, l’entreprise a réalisé les inventaires d´aménagement, les études socio-économiques et fauniques de ces concessions. Nous disposons également de 02 pépinières de jeunes pousses d´essences diverses, d'environ 35.000 plants.

A propos de PALLISCO-CIFM : 
-PALLISCO:  Exploitation Forestière - Transformation Bois - Exportation Produits Bois.
-CIFM : Scierie - Séchage – Raboterie
Localisation : 
Siège Social : Avenue des Cocotiers Bonanjo (Douala-CAMEROUN) 
Site forestier et industriel : Mindourou (localité située entre les villes d’Abong-Mbang et Lomié), arrondissement de Dja, département du Haut Nyong, Région de l’Est. 

Taille de l’entreprise 
-PALLISCO : plus de 320 employés 
-CIFM : plus de 170 employés.

PALLISCO-CIFM propose à ses clients une gamme de produits bois certifiés OLB et FSC :
Grumes (Okan, Tali, Dabéma, Wamba, Biilinga…).
Débités verts et secs, nous avons l’Ayous, l’Assamela, l’Acajou, le Bibolo. 
Rabotés comme les lambris, parquets, lambourdes.

Pour vos produits bois et notre avenir, nous gérons nos forêts de manière responsable.

Name: VALASAHA
Description:
VALASAHA is a global trading and solution providing company in forestry and wood sector with focus on sustainability and innovative approach. Our group has 6 sourcing-trading units and supplies a wide range of products including roundwood, sawn and structural timber, packaging timber, veneer and wood-based panels.

Our vision - Where wood becomes smart
We see wood as a material of the future. Renewable, recyclable, emission-reducing, and of a great value to the whole society. Our aim is to create a wood value chain where all our products and related solutions are SMART:

S = sustainable
Sustainability takes the first place in VALASAHA philosophy. Being a part of the FSC and PEFC chain of custody certifications, we are happy to participate in the system which takes proper care of the forests and secures the wellbeing of the whole habitat.

M = made-for-life
When thinking long-term, wood is the perfect material because it is made for life in its core. Understanding its value and with our experience and devotion, we are trying to find the right usage for each piece of wood in order to prolong its life cycle and make sure that none gets wasted.

A = all-round
We are focused on solutions and for our partners we are willing to go the extra mile. Being a part of a holding group allows us to achieve synergies and to offer complex, time- and cost saving solutions. From sustainable harvesting through optimized transport and professional fumigation and treatment, we can supply wood to serve its purpose as effectively as possible.

R = reliable
Given our heritage and professional history, we pride ourselves on having a culture based on respect and fair, lasting relationships. 

T = technologically advanced
Enhancing the traditional with innovation and progress. We combine our know-how and partner network with modern technology and tools that increase effectivity and contribute to a long-term growth.

Name: Lee & Man Paper Manufacturing Limited
Description:
理文造紙有限公司 ("理文造紙") 于1994年成立，發展至今，發展成為全球具領導地位的箱板原紙及紙漿生產商的跨國企業。集團於2003年9月26日在香港聯合交易所主機板上市（股份代號：02314）。集團主要生產不同級別及規格的包裝用牛皮箱板紙及瓦楞芯紙，以迎合不同工業的包裝所需。過去數年，我們一直致力於擴充規模及發展涵蓋制漿及廢紙回收的垂直業務模式，以確保原材料的穩定供應。 

集團目前在中國擁有5家造紙工廠, 3家生活用紙工廠和1家造漿廠，分佈在中國廣東省東莞市中堂鎮和洪梅鎮、江蘇省常熟市、重慶市永川區、江西省瑞昌市碼頭鎮等地，另外，集團在越南及馬來西亞等國家亦設有生產基地。集團不斷投放資源于設置先進機器及研發工作，力求生產最優質及價格相宜的產品。發展至今，我們已成為年產能逾738.5萬噸（其中：包裝紙產能約648萬噸，漿年產能約18萬噸，衛生紙年產能約72.5萬噸）的跨國企業。 

除了致力行之有效的業務外，理文造紙亦盡力履行社會責任，其中尤以保護環境方面為甚。因此，集團投放資源並實行合適的環保措施，備受社會認同。同時，集團的廠房屢獲品質及環保管理方面的國際認證。

Description:
Ox Industries is the largest independently owned, vertically integrated producer of paperboard, specialty paper, tube & core, and protective packaging products in the United States.

When we opened our doors in 1996, we worked to produce the most environmentally sustainable product possible, using recycled material purchased from nearby paper mills. We knew that if we wanted to impact the environment – while also maintaining the most efficient production lines and highest quality product – we needed to be in control of our paper source. In 2007, with that goal in mind, we purchased Halltown Paperboard Mill – founded in 1869 – and became a 100% vertically integrated producer of recycled paperboard.

The Ox team is rooted in the paper business and knowledgeable across multiple industries. We take the time to listen and gain an understanding of our customer's goals and challenges. We help clients navigate through manufacturing channels, creating efficiency and finding solutions for even the most demanding jobs. Ox has adopted the approach of educate, train and support to ensure the result is a product precisely fit for our client's application.

With over a million plantable products sold in 36+ countries and 18+ languages, we've catered to over 10,000+ customers and 300+ brands. Our handcrafted, eco-friendly packages journey from the heart of India to doorsteps worldwide, championing conscious consumerism and making a tangible environmental impact. 

We also offer print-on-demand & white labelling with seed paper and other tree-free, recycled & FSC-certified papers without limitations of MOQs. Other sustainable materials we are now making products with include agricultural waste, natural fabrics, cork, bamboo & reclaimed wood. 

Supported by IIM Bangalore NSRCEL - Goldman Sachs 10,000 Women Program and StartinUP 

Incubated in Startup Incubation and Innovation Centre - IIT Kanpur and REC Kannauj 

Please write to us at garima@plantables.store

Name: VPK Belgium
Description:
VPK Group is a leading European packaging group, developing and producing innovative, protective and logistical solutions and making maximum use of recycled fibres. As a service organisation VPK attaches great importance to our customers’ specific needs.

VPK Group offers its customers tailor-made solutions in corrugated board and solid board packaging, tubes/cores and edge protectors. In every one of these market segments VPK stands for dependable quality products at competitive prices. This allows us to continue to occupy a strong market position across the range.

Name: Globus - Performance Release Liners
Description:
Globus has steadily grown to become a Global Release Liner producer with its objective to serve the pressure-sensitive adhesives industry by delivering high quality liners that adhere to nothing but quality. Exporting to over 50 countries and serving several Fortune 500 customers, we have over 30 years of experience in the Silicone coating industry.
With three solvent-less Silicone coating lines, we are able to coat upto the width of 1750mm. Our slitting lines are able to deliver in any width from 12mm pancakes to 1750mm jumbo rolls upto 1000mm outer diameters. Globus is equipped to coat up-to 240 million square meters of paper and film per annum

Name: Sona Commercial LLC
Description:
Sona Commercial is not any ordinary entity engaged in the distribution of fine paper brands – it is the final destination for connoisseurs seeking a variety of solutions spread across the board from fine, specialty papers, boards and 100 percent recycled paper.

Sona is sought out by the discerning users not only because it has papers from the most revered names from among the manufacturers in the world, but also because such solutions are provided at the most reasonable price points and are always supported by a team of customer care professionals with a high level of knowledge about the industry and its products. The Sona name is after all, synonymous with integrity – a reputation that has been painstakingly earned over a period of 55 years and is vetted by thousands of satisfied customers around the world.

Name: REPUBLIC TECHNOLOGIES FRANCE
Description:
Le Groupe Republic Technologies International, leader mondial de l’industrie du papier à rouler et accessoires pour fumeurs, est un groupe Français créé en 1822 et implanté à Perpignan. Il emploie près de 400 collaborateurs en France et dispose de 4 filiales en Europe.

Le Groupe compte parmi ses marques phares OCB, JOB ou encore Zig-Zag, des marques leaders sur leurs marchés qui le placent comme n°1 mondial du papier à rouler et accessoires pour fumeurs. Ses produits sont distribués dans plus de 100 pays à travers le monde, grâce à un réseau de distribution parfaitement organisé.

Présent depuis 2015 dans l’industrie du e-liquide et des e-devices, le Groupe a également diversifié son activité au travers de la fabrication et commercialisation de produits de nettoyage optique, 100% fabriqués en France. Sur ce segment, le groupe occupe également une place de leader. 

Fort d’une histoire remontant au 19è siècle, le Groupe Republic Technologies International place les valeurs humaines au coeur de son activité : l’expertise des collaborateurs, leur savoir-faire et la reconnaissance que leur porte l’entreprise instaurent un climat de confiance propice à l’excellence et la pérennité de ses activités.

Name: Cartiera Giacosa Spa
Description: Founded in 1961 in Front Canavese, Cartiera Giacosa is a company with over 50 years of experience, specializied in the production of decorative paper and Kraft paper for plastic laminates, mainly used in the furniture industry.

Name: Acucote, part Fedrigoni Self-Adhesives
Description: Acucote, part of Fedrigoni Self Adhesives is committed to developing innovative, high value packaging solutions to support the growth and profitability initiatives of its customers.  Manufacturing pressure-sensitive products for single-press operations to large international corporations, Acucote provides stock inventory programs and custom capabilities that offer a diverse selection of adhesives, facestocks, and silicone release systems.  With 160 employees, a US-based sales force, and distribution centers in North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Ohio, Texas, and California, Acucote works with its customers to achieve solutions to the most difficult labeling challenges.  Innovation, customization, and customer-involved product development is our core business.

Name: Servall
Description: Over 50+ years, Servall has partnered the pulp and paper Industry worldwide, answering its need for high performance, futuristic machinery. Today, Servall has earned itself the unique position of the complete manufacturer. The quest for excellence in Quality, Design & Engineering, Manufacturing & Technology has spurred SERVALL’s electrifying growth over the years, enabling the company to carve itself a prominent place in the world map of pulp and paper manufacturers.

Name: SIVALBP
Description:
Entreprise industrielle française innovante et éco-responsable, SIVALBP fabrique des solutions performantes, esthétiques et durables pour habiller façades intérieures et extérieures.
Grâce à l’éco-conception de l’outil industriel, SIVALBP élabore des produits à l’impact environnemental positif, excluant tout procédé chimique, comme l’autoclave. 

L’entreprise SIVALBP s’engage dans une alternative éco-responsable en utilisant des essences naturellement durables, certifiées PEFC et FSC et en transformant thermiquement les bois grâce à ses propres équipements de thermostabilisation, de séchage et d’étuvage. 

Les produits de finition appliqués en usine sont respectueux de l’environnement, en phase aqueuse et sans solvants. 

Fabrication exclusivement française

Name: Forestal Antares
Description:
Empresa de Servicios Forestales fundada en el año 1991, con alto nivel de especialización y experiencia en los Procesos de Cosecha y Triturado de Bosques, con presencia desde la V hasta la X región del país.

Contamos con más de 25 años de experiencia prestando servicios de forma continua a empresas líderes del rubro a nivel nacional e internacional.

Nos destacamos por nuestra alta productividad, estándares de seguridad y la férrea orientación hacia las personas, siendo estos nuestros pilares y fuentes de ventajas competitivas.

Name: Klingele Brasil
Description:
Desde 1941, nossa fábrica de papel em Nova Campina, Brasil, produz produtos de papel de alta qualidade para diversas aplicações. Com uma equipe de 574 funcionários, oferecemos uma ampla variedade de papéis.
Nosso ponto forte é a combinação do processamento de fibra virgem e papel reciclado, o que nos permite desenvolver soluções flexíveis e personalizadas para nossos clientes.
Inovação e sustentabilidade são o nosso foco: com nossa própria usina hidrelétrica, estação de tratamento de águas residuais e usina de cogeração a biomassa, contribuímos ativamente para a redução da pegada ecológica e, ao mesmo tempo, garantimos o abastecimento local de energia.

Name: Sustainable Timber Tasmania
Description:
Sustainable Timber Tasmania is a Tasmanian Government Business Enterprise responsible under State legislation for:
- Sustainably managing approximately 800,000 hectares of public production forest (Permanent Timber Production Zone land)
- Undertaking forest operations for the production and sale of forest products from these forests (including making available at least 137,000 cubic metres of high quality eucalypt sawlogs and veneer logs per annum).

Sustainable Timber Tasmania purpose is to be a customer-focused and financially viable forest products and services provider, sustainably managing Permanent Timber Production Zone land for multiple-use as a community asset.

Sustainable Timber Tasmania aims to:
- Achieve and maintain financial sustainability
- Efficiently and effectively make available agreed wood volumes and other services
- Professionally manage public production forests to maintain wood resources and other environmental, cultural and economic values
- Achieve zero harm to our people and contractors. 

Our forest management is currently certified under the Australian Forestry Standard which is recognised, under the Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification, as being an independent assurance of legal and sustainable timber supply. We are also in the process of seeking certification for our operations under Forest Stewardship Council standards.

Name: VF Papeis S.A.
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada na produção de papéis especiais que fazem parte de diversos momentos da sua vida. Nossa fábrica está estrategicamente localizada em Mogi das Cruzes e conta com equipe, estrutura e tecnologia que garantem o melhor em papéis especiais.

https://www.instagram.com/verdefortepapeis

Name: IBC Paper Training
Description:
IBC is a worldwide company that provides training in the Pulp and Paper Sciences from basic to expertise level. 
Thanks to our wide portfolio of experts, we also offer optimization and trouble shooting. 

Training Types:

- Every Step in Papermaking (Pulp, Recycling and Deinking, Stock Preparation, Refining, Forming, Pressing, Drying, Coating and Sizing, Reeling and Winding)

Description:
A Universidade Setorial ABTCP é um canal de educação, conhecimento e experiências sobre o setor de celulose e papel. Aqui você encontra informações e se capacita sobre o processo produtivo de celulose e papel, gestão, liderança, segurança do trabalho, sustentabilidade entre outros assuntos. 

Para suporte, entre em contato com nossos canais de comunicação:

Name: Vista International Ltd
Description: Vista Group started its operations from Nigeria in early 1991. Today Vista International Ltd has grown to be one of the largest manufacturer & converters of Paper in the African Continent and has a state of the art manufacturing unit with top of the line German Technology. We Manufacture top quality Exercise books and Stationery products and is a recommended and dependable source for Paper, Printing Chemicals and Consumables. Vista International Ltd has  recently introduced  its Range of Agro Chemicals with a tie up with a leading Agro Chemical Manufacturer for technical Materials and Formulations.

Name: Lugomadera
Description: La Asociación Provincial de Empresarios de la Primera Transformación de la Madera de Lugo (Lugo Madera), es una entidad sin ánimo de lucro que nace con el objeto de representar a las empresas del sector de la primera transformación de la madera con actividad en la provincia de Lugo, así como prestar un servicio de coordinación, gestión, fomento y defensa de los intereses generales y comunes de carácter empresarial de las empresas que la forman.

Name: Greenliner
Description:
Greenliner is a next-generation containerboard producer, combining advanced technology with modern papermaking expertise to deliver high-performance grades for corrugators and packaging producers worldwide. 

The company manufactures a wide portfolio of recycled containerboard grades and is dedicated to innovation, sustainability, and supporting the competitiveness of the global corrugated packaging industry.

Name: Ellopel Papéis
Description:
Ellopel: Soluções completas em papéis e higiene, impulsionando seu negócio.
Desempenho imbatível, variedade incomparável e compromisso com a excelência.

Há 10 anos no mercado, a Ellopel se consolidou como líder em conversão de papéis descartáveis, oferecendo:

Ampla gama de produtos:
Papéis interfolha, bobina e rolão
Produtos de limpeza e higiene
Tecnologia de ponta:
Maquinários de última geração para corte e goframento
Qualidade impecável:
Rigoroso controle de qualidade em todos os processos

Amplo estoque para pronta entrega
Soluções logísticas personalizadas
Atendimento personalizado:
Equipe altamente qualificada e dedicada
Foco total na satisfação do cliente
Sustentabilidade ambiental:
Compromisso com a preservação do meio ambiente
Práticas sustentáveis em toda a cadeia produtiva
A Ellopel é mais do que um fornecedor, é uma parceira de sucesso.

Juntos, construiremos um futuro mais sustentável e próspero.

#Ellopel #PapeisDescartáveis #ProdutosDeLimpeza #Excelência #Compromisso #Sustentabilidade #Parceria

Name: Perlen Papier AG
Description:
Wir sind…
- ein Familienunternehmen mit Tradition und Innovation
- ein Unternehmen der CPH-Gruppe mit über 360 Beschäftigten
- Nr. 1 Herstellerin von qualitativ hochstehenden Magazin- und

Name: The Lumber Manufactory
Description: The Lumber Manufactory (TLM) is making America's forests more productive by connecting landowners with opportunities to sell their timbers. We are starting to build a nation-wide network to democratize wood processing. With a commitment to environmental stewardship and economic empowerment, TLM is set to become the premier platform for timber transactions and lumber production, driving growth and sustainability in the forestry sector.

Name: KALIDECK (PTY) LTD
Description:
Kalideck Southern Africa is the Leading Distributor of:
Paper for Print and Office, Digital Media & Display, Graphics, Packaging and Logistics Solutions

Name: Bingaman & Son Lumber Inc
Description: Bingaman & Son Lumber is proud to offer sustainably-harvested, premium hardwoods from Pennsylvania's beautiful, vast forestland. Browse our species, products, & services by visiting our website.

Name: Houthandel Houtex
Description:
Ons familiebedrijf kenmerkt zich door het aanhouden van grote houtvoorraden. Houtex is gespecialiseerd in het leveren van loof- en naaldhout. Ca. 75 houtsoorten zijn snel uit voorraad leverbaar!

Maatwerk | In de machinale kan het hout bewerkt worden. Zagen, schaven, korten, kepen, profileren, er is veel op maat mogelijk! Daarnaast kan het hout ook naar een gewenst vochtpercentage gedroogd worden in één van de droogkamers. 

De klantengroep is divers en bestaat uit o.a. de houthandel, timmer- en trappenfabrieken, restauratiebedrijven, meubelmakers en jachtbouw. 

Via eigen inkopers en agenten wordt het hout uit diverse continenten geïmporteerd. Als importeur is het besef groot dat duurzaam bosbeheer een voorwaarde is voor een gezonde toekomst. Daarom is er veel aandacht voor het leveren van gecertificeerd en duurzaam hout.

Houtex staat voor kwaliteit! En geeft graag, door jarenlange ervaring en vakkennis, deskundig houtadvies.

Name: FARGES
Description:
Né du rachat de l’ancienne scierie de Guy Farges, FARGES ambitionne, au travers d’investissements continus, d’être et de rester une entreprise innovante de par sa puissance industrielle et sa passion du bois.

En 10 ans, l’entreprise a considérablement évolué en multipliant par 6 ses volumes de production. Cette croissance remarquable ne pourrait être possible sans la détermination et le dynamisme de tous les collaborateurs qui réalisent chaque jour cette aventure humaine.
Notre rigueur, la qualité de nos produits, notre grande capacité de production et notre proximité vous garantissent des solutions bois performantes au quotidien.

2004 : Rachat de la Scierie FARGES de M. Guy FARGES (35 salariés / 25 000 m3 de sciage).
2016 : Farges SAS devient FARGESBOIS. 150 salariés, 145 000 m3 de sciage, 100 000 tonnes de Pellets.
2022 : FARGESBOIS devient FARGES  

Par éthique et par exigence qualitative, FARGES s’approvisionne en résineux au plus près de son site, dans les forêts du Grand Massif Central à 100 km en moyenne de l’entreprise. Sensible à la durabilité de la ressource, l’entreprise contribue à régénérer les forêts locales éco-certifiées PEFC et ainsi préserver la nature.

Le bois est une ressource trop précieuse pour être gaspillée. C’est pourquoi chez FARGES, nous transformons dans leur intégralité tous les arbres sélectionnés. En effet, la matière non destinée aux produits pour la construction est transformée en énergie verte ou intégrée dans la composition des granulés de bois.

Chez FARGES, prendre soin de la nature est essentiel :
– Nous préservons l’environnement en produisant notre propre énergie verte et bien plus encore grâce à notre centrale de Cogénération.
– Nous avons mis en place au sein de l’entreprise une démarche environnementale certifiée.
– Toujours plus prononcé, notre engagement sociétal se concrétise notamment à travers notre adhésion à la démarche BIOM.
– Chez FARGES nous mettons l’Homme au cœur de nos préoccupations.

Name: UPM Biocomposites
Description:
UPM Biocomposites – Excited about the limitless opportunities of bioeconomy

UPM ProFi – Great design for sustainable outdoor living.

Name: SILVERTON PULP AND PAPERS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: SILVERTON PULP AND PAPERS PRIVATE LIMITED is a paper & forest products company based out of 9 TH K MBHOPA ROAD, MUZAFFARNAGAR, Uttar Pradesh, India.  The group has a diversified business portfolio in manufacturing of high-grade Writing Printing Paper and Packaging Grades Paper

Name: Recycled CLT
Description:
Does your Eco have an Echo? Did you know that in the CLT construction element production process as much as 20% from the original CLT panel is wasted due to window and door openings? 
Recycled CLT promotes the idea to recycle these cut-offs into usable structural elements with long life cycle.

Name: Gulf Industrial Solutions شركة جولف الصناعية
Description:
We are one of the Regional emerging sales and marketing organizations, serving for complete industrial solutions. We provide Quality Product, Competitive Price & Impeccable Service for customer needs. Gulf Industrial Solutions offers the wide range of services, but major focusing on Regional Pulp & Paper, Corrugated Packaging Industry and Industrial Water Treatment.

Our strong Techno-Commercial expertise enables us to create unique possibilities for each stage of our customer’s business that common companies could not. In Short, We understand industry need and help our customers to improve their raw material, equipment and water efficiency.

Name: Umran Isay Sadiq Badr for Paper Products Factory
Description: A Saudi factory with Korean technology that produces the largest number of paper cups with the highest quality standards and most cost-effectively based on the automation system to secure the workflow automatically, accurate and sound and with the leat possible error under the supervision of international experts and specialists and with an innovative management that achieves value and trusts the excellence of your brand

Name: Timber Queensland
Description:
We are an outcome focused, non-profit industry association representing the interests of our members. Our unique and diverse membership base consists of timber businesses from plantation growers, harvesters, sawmillers and merchants through to timber users including manufacturers, architects and builders.

Timber Queensland, on behalf of our members, works to gain the support of politicians, government departments, employer and environmental groups to further develop forest products and the forest products industry. We are committed to creating greater public and political awareness of the forest and timber industries, and the valuable economic and environmental contribution they make to Queensland.

Name: BALCAS
Description:
Balcas is a leading timber products supplier, and has pioneered biomass renewable energy in the British Isles. The business has grown organically, and through acquisition and investment in the latest processing technologies.

Balcas’ timber products portfolio includes construction timber, fencing & landscaping products and pallet & packaging material.

Balcas has led the development of the market for wood pellet fuel in Ireland and Britain.

Balcas operates biomass Combined Heat and Power plants that produce renewable energy. Residual heat from electricity generation is used to dry locally sourced woodfibre that is then processed into high-energy fuel pellets - marketed under the company's brites brand, displacing 75 million litres of oil in homes, commercial premises and industry.

We invest in training, competitive salaries and good employee benefits. Balcas provides 320 direct jobs in our rural localities and the same again in supporting organisations. Balcas is one of the largest employers in Fermanagh. We have had three generations of local families grow with us; be part of the story. We are a big supporter of local education. We are unequivocal about safety; we want everyone to return home safely, every day, whether directly employed or working on contract.

Name: Colombates Bolsas de Papel
Description:
Creemos que las grandes metas se alcanzan haciendo las pequeñas cosas de manera excelente. ofrecemos el respaldo, la tecnología y la calidad de una empresa grande, sin perder de vista la cercanía y compromiso de una empresa local.

Colombates es una compañía colombiana con más de 80 años de trayectoria en la fabricación de bolsas industriales y comerciales de papel.  

Estamos en constante búsqueda de soluciones eficientes y sostenibles, para convertir bolsas y sacos convencionales, en herramientas estratégicas que le agreguen valor a su negocio, de la mano del compromiso social y del cuidado del medio ambiente, desde la semilla hasta la bolsa misma.

En colombates somos tus aliados por un futuro más sostenible!

Name: Fibois Centre-Val de Loire
Description:
FIBOIS Centre-Val de Loire a pour mission le développement durable de la filière forêt-bois, dans ses aspects économiques et environnementaux. Ses actions s'articulent autour des grands thèmes suivants :
 Développer le Bois Énergie : toute la filière est concernée, les propriétaires forestiers qui trouvent difficilement des débouchées à leurs bois d'éclaircie, les entreprises de transformation qui génèrent entre 30 et 50 % de produits connexes à chaque opération.
 Favoriser l'essor de la construction en bois : grand utilisateur de bois, ce secteur dynamise toute la filière lorsqu'il utilise des produits régionaux.
 Renforcer les compétences des hommes et des femmes de la filière, des sylviculteurs, des exploitants forestiers et du personnel de la transformation.
 Valoriser la ressource forestière régionale : la recherche de nouveaux procédés de valorisation comme le traitement thermique du bois (peuplier, pin et chêne) ou la lamellation du chêne pourront déboucher sur la création d'unités de production régionales.
 Améliorer la compétitivité de la filière en informatisant les ventes de bois, facilitant l'accès aux marchés export, par le soutien à la démarche PEFC, la mise à jour de l'annuaire régional, la promotion de la filière.
Location: ORLÉANS CEDEX 2, Centre Val De Loire

Name: Queenex Hygiene Paper Manufacturing LLC
Description:
Queenex Hygiene Paper Manufacturing LLC is a subsidiary of Queenex Paper Products based in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. On January 2012, QHPM run the State-of- the-art crescent-former tissue machine that produces the first-class tissue paper from the topmost grade virgin pulp.
The mill is located in the Industrial City of Abu Dhabi, a 30km drive away from the city and occupies a total land mass area of 66,000 m2.
QHPM is proud to have the state of art crescent former tissue machine with a speed of 2100 m/min with designed production capacity of 32000 MT/Annum. QHPM is also on the verge of initiating the second paper machine PM2 double-width capacity with a production of 65000 MT/Annum. The company also houses a de-inking plant amongst the most refined in the region, which converts waste paper into commercial tissue fiber of high quality standard. Our qualified technical and resource people are highly trained and well-equipped, which boasts of local and international trainings attributing to a cost efficient, self-reliant, safe environment and remarkable production surpassing global economic expectations.
In a recent development, QHPM garnered the distinction of achieving the Chain of Custody certification (COC) from FSC ( Forest Stewardship Council ) International, thereby acknowledged to be complying with international, global and even environmental standards complying with a standard quality of ISO 9001 to 14001 and OHSAS 18001 certification which makes QHPM, a highly competitive industrialized manufacturing company to reckon with.

Name: Valpasa Indústria De Papéis
Description:
A Valpasa é líder na produção de microondulados no Brasil, destacando-se pela sustentabilidade 
e a inovação em cada etapa dos processos. Com um time de colaboradores operando em três turnos, 
a produção é 100% reciclável para papel e chapa, com uso de fibra virgem no microondulado.

Certificada pela ISO 9001, ISO 14001 e FSC, a Valpasa é um exemplo de compromisso com a 
qualidade e a responsabilidade ambiental. Além disso, como um local certificado pelo selo GPTW, 
promove um ambiente de trabalho que valoriza o desenvolvimento e bem-estar de cada colaborador.

Há 26 anos, a Valpasa faz muito mais do que transformar matéria-prima em produtos de excelência. 
Ela transforma vidas, fortalecendo também a comunidade e o meio ambiente.

Name: eco:fibr
Description:
eco:fibr geht aktiv gegen die Wegwerfkultur vor, indem das Start-Up Zellstoff aus Ananaspflanzen für die faserverarbeitende Industrie produziert. Dabei nutzt das Team einen Reststoff aus dem Ananasanbau als Rohstoff für die Gewinnung von qualitativ hochwertigem Zellstoff.
eco:fibr möchte sichere und fair bezahlte Arbeitsplätze in Costa Rica unterstützen und zugleich die Ökologie und Ökonomie des Ananasanbaus sicherstellen. Bei der Entwicklung des Verfahrens zur Zellstoffproduktion aus Ananasblättern wird bewusst auf den Einsatz von umweltschädlichen Chemikalien verzichtet.
Der Zellstoff von eco:fibr kann als Alternative zu herkömmlichen Holzzellstoff eingesetzt und so als jedes erdenkliche Papier- und Kartonageprodukt verwendet werden.



Impressum: www.ecofibr.de/impressum

contact@ecofibr.de
www.ecofibr.de

Name: Gestion Rémabec Inc
Description:
LE GROUPE RÉMABEC EST PRÉSENTEMENT EN RECRUTEMENT : JOIGNEZ-VOUS À UNE ÉQUIPE DYNAMIQUE QUI A LE VENT DANS LES VOILES !

Le Groupe Rémabec est un pilier de l'industrie forestière québécoise située dans trois régions du Québec, soit la Côte-Nord, la Mauricie et le Saguenay-Lac-Saint-Jean. Ayant son siège social à La Tuque, cette entreprise se spécialise dans cinq créneaux d'excellence, tous intimement liés : administration, opérations forestières, transformation de la matière ligneuse, vente des produits du bois et production d’énergies vertes. Aujourd'hui, le Groupe Rémabec est fier d'être le plus grand entrepreneur forestier privé au Québec et l'un des plus importants scieurs de la province via sa division Arbec bois d’oeuvre, ce qui lui permet d'offrir un emploi direct et de qualité à près de 2000 personnes. Le Groupe Rémabec est composé de plus de 30 filiales et récolte plus de trois millions de mètres cubes de bois à chaque année. Au plan manufacturier, le Groupe Rémabec compte 14 usines opérants dans des domaines tels le sciage, le rabotage, l'aboutage, le tronçonnage, la mise en copeaux, la deuxième transformation du bois d'essences feuillues.

Groupe Rémabec is a pillar of the Quebec forestry industry, headquartered in La Tuque and specializing in four niches of excellence, all closely linked : administration, forestry operations, timber processing and the sale of wood products. Today, Groupe Rémabec is proud to be the largest private forest contractor in Quebec and one of the largest sawyers in the province through its Arbec division, which enables it to ensure high-quality direct employment of close to 2,000 employees. Groupe Rémabec is composed of more than 30 subsidiaries and harvests more than 3 million cubic meters of wood each year. In terms of manufacturing, Groupe Rémabec is present in three regions of Québec with its 14 factories, operating in fields such as sawing, planing, butting, bucking, chipping and second processing of hardwood lumber.

Name: Intertrade Hellas SA
Description:
INTERTRADE HELLAS SA was founded in 1992 and specializes in the production of high-quality paper products (such as Tissue paper, Kitchen roll, Paper napkins, Pocket tissues and Facial tissues)
The company strengthened its dynamic presence in the field of paper processing with the acquisition of the Softex brand, inaugurating a factory in Metamorfosi, with new mechanical equipment and highly trained staff. The company has also a product family under the brand name Servin for the Ho.Re.ca market and supplies the largest Retailers in Greece and abroad with private label products.
With a turnover of approximately 127 million in 2022 and productive investments  our products are literally found in every Greek home. In 2006 the company was certified with ISO 9001, further developing the quality of its products. The quality control laboratory, equipped with state-of-the-art certified machines, carries out daily inspections of the raw materials delivered to the company's warehouses, as well as the final products.
In 2018 the company obtains FSC certification and in 2022 the company certified according to the SA8000 standard recognizing the impact of its operation on society.
The company has 4 factories in with 17 production lines. The company’s Logistics Center operates at Oinofita Viotias. 
Exports are another important pillar of the company’s overall turnover of approximately 20% of annual sales. The company is currently exporting to 28 countries and our vision is to put Greece and Greek paper production back in the position it deserves in the European competitive environment. Finally, in 2018 the company acquires 148.000 m2 of land at Oinofita Viotias in order to create an integrated tissue production plant and converting by 2022. In 2022 Intertrade’s Paper Mill started producing paper and the total capacity exceeded  65.000 tons annually.

Name: METPACK
Description:
MetPack produces Sterile Food Packaging Board by using Extrusion Coating Machines & Technology since 2016. We would like to introduce ourselves as the leading Polymer ( PE, PP, PLA and PET) extrusion coated paper and board manufacturer in Turkey located in Istanbul at a 40.000 sqm facility with a production capacity over 66.000 mt per annum. We are part of the Aras Grup company, one of the leading pioneers in the printing, paper and packaging market in Turkey, established in 1974. 

We aim to continue investing in state-of-the-art production facilities and promoting our tradition of innovation and exceptional service worldwide, in order to provide the best quality products to our customers.  Our biggest strength is the ability to extrusion coat paper and board from 20 gsm up to 400 gsm. MetPack production and quality meets all international food packaging standards. (Food Security Certificates, Quality Assurance Certificates, BRCGS Packaging, ISO 22000, ISO 9001, FSC, PEFC, Compostable Certification for PLA)

MetPack motto's to provide tailor-made production with best quality and service to build long-lasting co-operation with our future partners all over the world.

Name: Group Lemahieu & Lempan
Description:
SHAPING THE FUTURE…

For almost 100 years, Lemahieu Group has been an established name in the import of timber and panels and has a huge comprehensive range of timber products in stock for fast delivery.

As an innovative player, we anticipate most changes in the market conditions. This allows us to offer a full package: drying, sawing, planing and sustainable and fire-retardant timber treatments. We are also the only importer to trade both timber and panels. Our aim is to be a loyal partner in the timber trade and specialised timber processing industry both in the domestic and international markets, so we always strive for consistent quality and excellent customer service.

Our mission is to ensure an excellent level of customer satisfaction and service by delivering quality timber and panels and by maintaining and developing strong relationships with our stakeholders. Our customers are leading timber product suppliers. We aim to create a workplace where people are respected and appreciated. We are committed to promoting the growth and development of our employees by creating an atmosphere of openness, teamwork, ingenuity and innovation, and to shape a productive future.

SUSTAINABILITY IS ALL ABOUT INVESTING IN THE FUTURE

In addition to our strong focus on quality and innovation, sustainability is also in our DNA. 

More than 75% of our products are sourced from sustainably managed forests and therefore meet the highest standards, with PEFC or FSC certificates to guarantee sustainably harvested raw materials. Out of respect for the environment, we believe in wood as a sustainable (building) material and we invest in the very latest, most environmentally friendly technologies to achieve this

Together with our sister company LDCwood, the first official ThermoWood manufacturer in Belgium, we are shaping the future and challenge ourselves to achieve our goals.

Name: Ramenzoni Indústria de Papel
Description: A Ramenzoni é a primeira recicladora de papel do Brasil. Desde 1951 produz papel 100% reciclado e certificado em uma fábrica em Cordeirópolis, no interior de São Paulo. Seus produtos têm inúmeras utilizações e estão presentes no cotidiano de milhões de brasileiros. É dela o papel das caixas de fósforos da Fiat Lux, dos fogos Caramuru, das embalagens  dos lanches do McDonald's e das pipocas do Cinemark.

Name: Guyenne Papier
Description:
With decades of experience, Guyenne produces stunning paper, film and textile products using a coating process. The company specialises in coatings for all kinds of flexible substrates. This process also makes it possible to give specific qualities to a substrate, particular printing qualities, technical and aesthetic properties. Guyenne targets a niche market with added-value products for graphic design industries, paper converting, textile and digital printing.

Our mediums are optimized for a variety of printing types: sublimation, inkjet dye and pigment, eco-mild-solvent, UV, latex, laser, offset and high speed or technical effects for fabrics such as fire-resistant, water-resistant, non-slip, antistatic... 

Made in France, to the most exacting standards of quality and environmental safety, our coated mediums are distributed throughout 5 continents, proof of our unique expertise acquired over centuries.

Our philosophy:  We coat for you.

Name: Fiskeby Board AB
Description: Fiskeby has been manufacturing paper and board since 1637. Now as then, we are driven by our ambition to offer the very highest quality in both products and customer contacts. Our product, Multiboard, are made of 100% recovered fibre, fully in line with modern requirements for a sustainable society.

Name: Liner Brasil
Description: Liner Brasil é uma indústria transformadora de papel líder na América Latina e com clientes ao redor do mundo. Nosso principal objetivo é garantir a satisfação de nossos clientes trazendo soluções inovadoras de forma rápida e sustentável. Somos uma empresa 100% nacional e focamos nosso trabalho em três pilares: rigoroso controle de qualidade descrito na NBR - ISO 9001:2015, linha de produção proprietária e desenvolvimento da nossa equipe.

Name: DREWSEN SPEZIALPAPIERE GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Innovation & Tradition – Made in Germany – Seit 1538.

DREWSEN SPEZIALPAPIERE ist ein Hersteller von ungestrichenen holzfreien Spezialpapieren. 
DREWSEN fertigt mit 422 Mitarbeitern 24/7 auf drei komplexen Papiermaschinen (Anschaffungskosten für die größte Maschine ca. 150 Millionen €) über 500 verschiedene, hoch spezialisierte Papiere, die auf die Kunden zugeschnitten sind und setzt sich mit hoher Gewissenhaftigkeit für die Interessen der Kunden ein, um das Papier in über 70 Länder der Welt zu vermarkten.
Das schafft DREWSEN nur mit einer sehr gut ausgebauten, gebildeten und hochmotivierten Mannschaft. Die Belegschaft kommt überwiegend aus der Region, arbeitet gern für das Familien-Unternehmen und schätzt das familiäre Betriebsklima.
Kurze Entscheidungswege und ein hohes Maß an Eigenverantwortung von jedem Mitarbeiter infolge der Lean-Management-Erfahrung führen dazu, dass es praktisch keine Fluktuation gibt. Die durchschnittliche Betriebszugehörigkeit beträgt 19 Jahre. Viele Mitarbeiter arbeiten über mehrere Generationen im Unternehmen. 

In vielen Marktsegmenten übernimmt DREWSEN eine führende Position. Unser Erfolg basiert auf Qualitätsprodukten, die speziell auf Kundenanforderungen zugeschnitten sind sowie auf einem individuellen und kompetenten Kundenservice.
Durch hohe Innovationskraft, eine eigene Entwicklungsabteilung und den Blick für die sich verändernden Ansprüche an heutige Papiere, verbessert DREWSEN das Produktsortiment kontinuierlich. Heute umfasst es die drei Produktgruppen:
- PROSECURA - Fälschungsschutz auf höchstem Niveau
- PROTECH - Technische Papiere zur industriellen Veredelung
- PROFINO - Papiere für ein breites Druck- und Verpackungsspektrum

Seit 2019 bietet die Gruppe SUSTAINABLE PAPER SOLUTIONS Lösungen zum Thema „Papier statt Plastik“ an.

Kontakt für Bewerbungen per E-Mail: matthias.recke@drewsen.com

Name: Seshasayee Paper & Boards Limited
Description:
Seshasayee Paper and Boards Limited (SPB), the flagship company belonging to ‘SPB-ESVIN GROUP’, owns and operates
An Integrated Pulp, Paper and Paper board Mill at Pallipalayam, Erode, District Namakkal, Tamilnadu, India
A Paper Mill at Tirunelveli District, Tamilnadu, India
SPB, incorporated in June 1960, was promoted in association with a foreign collaborator M/s Parsons and Whittemore, USA. After commencement of commercial production, having fulfilled their performance guarantee obligations, the foreign collaborators withdrew in 1969.
Main promoters of the Company as on date are a group of companies belonging to the SPB-ESVIN group headed by Sri N Gopalaratnam.

Name: FOLBB Group
Description: We are FOLBB, the leading manufacturer of virgin fiber cartonboard. A high-end packaging material unmatched in terms of quality and sustainability, manufactured with passion and technical craftmanship at our plants in Eerbeek (NL) and Baiersbronn (GER). Our customers use it to design and produce a wide variety of packaging, particularly for the food and pharmaceutical industries. We maintain personal, often long-term relationships with those customers. We share our knowledge based on years of experience and have the continuous drive to be an innovative leader. We like to make a difference for our customers; with speed, flexibility and attention to their specific needs. We always go that extra mile

Name: Rosboro
Description:
Rosboro is North America’s largest producer of glulam beams and manufactures a number of high quality lumber products including western species studs and dimension lumber. You will always be greeted by a live person when you call, and our professional service team will deliver on demand support from the initial inquiry all the way through delivery and job-site support. The people at Rosboro pride themselves on being easy to work with so you can focus on what’s important in your own business.
Founded more than 100 years ago, Rosboro is headquartered in Springfield, Oregon and has a fleet of highly-efficient mills and production lines to serve your product needs. 

Rosboro offers application-specific glulam and engineered wood product solutions including:
•	X-Beam, the industry's first full framing-width architectural appearance glulam, making it ideal for both exposed and concealed framing applications.  X-Beam is the most cost-effective engineered wood product on the market. 
•	BigBeam-DF, a high-strength 3,000fb, 2.1E Doug fir glulam that is the perfect solution for longer spans and heavy load conditions.
•	Rosboro’s heavy timber X-Rim, which is used as a fire stop in floor systems, around stair wells and elevator shafts and it is installed in walls perpendicular to the floor joist eliminating high cost standoff hangers. X-Rim is zero camber, so it installs flat in floor systems.
•	Custom Glulam: Through Western Structures, our recently acquired custom division, we manufacture Douglas Fir and Alaska Yellow Cedar glulams in non-standard sizes made-to-order.
•	Mass Timber: RLD (Rosboro Laminated Decking) is a cost-effective alternative compared to other mass timber floor and roof systems such as CLT (Cross Laminated Timber).

Rosboro engineered wood products are sold through a distribution network that provides next day delivery. Glulam is the most cost-effective engineered wood product on the market today making it the ideal choice for floor, roof and wall framing.

Name: Taurų Kedras
Description:
Company Tauru Kedras more than 15 years produce  kiln dried pallet and construction timber. Monthly we produce up to 10000m3.
Our main markets are: Asia- China, Malaysia, Thailand, Australia, Vietnam. Europe: Scandinavia, UK/Ireland, Netherlands, Germany,Italy, Poland and ech..

Name: KALIDECK (PTY) LTD
Description:
Kalideck Antalis Southern Africa is the Leading Distributor of:
Paper for Print and Office, Digital Media & Display, Graphics, Packaging and Logistics Solutions

Name: Somas Instrument AB
Description: Somas Instrument AB develops, produces and markets control- and on/off-valves made from high-grade, acid-proof stainless steel.  We export our products all over the world. Our main customers are to be found in the pulp and paper industry, but we now have a growing market in the chemical, power, biofuel, offshore and pharmaceutical sectors, as well as on product tanker.

Name: Madeiras Afonso
Description:
We are a Wood Commerce Company with 1/4 century working in the following segments:  Forest Exploitation, Impregnated Wood, Wood Chips, Biomass and more recently we entered in the world of  Alimentary Wooden Packaging with our brand Wood&Oven. 

To generate value through responsible Forest Management and Wood Processing, Providing Sustainable Solutions for Society.

Providing our consumer with Wood-Based, Natural and Renewable products, thus making our contribution to a Greener and more Sustainable Planet.

We aim to be a European benchmark in Wood Processing and Forestry sector, endeavouring to achieve 100% Sustainable Processes.

Commitment, Positivism, Resilience, Expertise, Partnership, Sustainability, Congruence, Dexterity and Solidarity are the values we regulate ourselves by.

Name: Muratlı Karton Kağıt San. ve Tic. AŞ
Description:
Muratlı Karton Kağıt San. ve Tic. AŞ

Tekirdağ ili Muratlı İlçesinde 1995 yılında temeli atılarak 1997 yılının sonunda faaliyete giren fabrikamızda, 225-400 gr/m2 arasında değişen gramajlarda kuşeli karton üretimi gerçekleştirilmektedir.Yüksek basılabilirlik özelliği isteyen her türlü ambalaj ve grafik baskı işlerinde kullanılmak üzere Alfaprint tescilli marka ile kuşe dubleks kartonlar , ilaç, kozmetik, yiyecek maddelerinin lüx ambalajlarında ve kartpostal baskılarında kullanılmak üzere Alfatriplex tescilli marka ile kuşe triplex kartonların üretimi yapılmaktadır.

Name: FINSA FRANCE SAS
Description:
FINSA FRANCE, délégation française du Groupe Finsa et implantée en France au cœur du Massif des Landes de Gascogne, produit et commercialise une large gamme de solutions bois pour tous projets d'habitat : panneaux à base de bois agglomérés et MDF (Medium Density Fiberboard) bruts ou revêtus de mélamine ou replaqués essences fines (placages de bois), panneaux sculptés, surfaces décoratives antibactériennes, moulures, modules de cuisine, composants pour meubles, sols stratifiés... 
Les solutions décoratives et techniques Finsa s'adressent aux secteurs du meuble, de l'architecture et l'aménagement d'intérieur et de la construction.

Name: Norske Skog Saugbrugs AS
Description:
Saugbrugs is one of the largest and most modern production plants of SC magazine paper in the world.  Building on 160 years’ experience with fibres and cellulose we are proud to bring forward new sustainable innovations in fibril and composite technology.

Our company was founded in 1859, and became a part of Norske Skog in 1989. 

https://www.norskeskog.com/Business-units/Europe/Norske-Skog-Saugbrugs

Follow us on:
https://www.facebook.com/saugbrugs/
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtGFf84RbZVzgcdLzgkZiyA

Name: Woamy
Description:
Woamy, an Aalto University spin-off, is bringing to the market a revolutionary circular biofoam for protective packaging to replace harmful plastic foams, a solution sought after by the biggest players in the foam market and brands ranging from big electronic companies to luxury brands. 

Inspired by nature and backed with a decade of scientific research, our Finland-based multidisciplinary and diverse team of scientists, engineers, designers and business minds founded Woamy in 2022. Since then we have already succesfully proven the technology's scalability, started pilot production, become the top 10 rising star in Finland and build an incredible customer base.

Do you have a product that needs circular packaging? 
Let’s connect and we can help to create environmentally friendly packaging for your product without compromising in quality and your brand identity. 

Do you want to invest in impact start ups? 
  Reach out to us and lets find out if you could be a good fit to support us to accelerate our growth on our journey to become the world
leaders on sustainable foams. 

Want to join us on our mission to replace plastic-foams and build a sustainable future together?  

Reach us at contact@woamy.com
Together we can make a difference. 

#sustainablefoam #biobased #biofoam #recyclable #biodegradable #nontoxic #plasticfreepackaging  #newmaterials #sustainablematerials #foamwood #sustainablepackaging #packagingfoam

Name: Papiers White Birch - S.E.C. Stadacona WB
Description:
Papiers White Birch est un producteur de papier journal de qualité élevée, de papier annuaire et de carton possédant trois usines situées au Canada. Ensemble, ces usines produisent plus de 1,3 million de tonnes de papier journal et annuaire contenant jusqu'à 50 % de pâte recyclée. 

Ayant son siège social situé à Greenwich au Connecticut, Papiers White Birch est une compagnie familiale qui produit et expédie du papier journal et du carton de haute qualité à ses clients situés en Amérique du Nord et partout à travers le monde.

Chez Papiers White Birch nous misons sur la performance de nos usines, la créativité et l'initiative de nos employés, pour livrer un produit de grande qualité tout en respectant les besoins spécifiques de nos clients.

Name: ISOLA S.P.A.
Description:
Founded in 1989, from the idea of Luigi Isola, today Isola Spa is the reference point for the Italian market of waste paper, plastic and chemical products for the paper industry.

Once Isola acquired the leadership in the Italian recovered paper sector, it extended its activities and know-how to plastic scraps, dyes, chemical products and mechanical spare parts for the paper industry, acquiring additional trading licenses.

Isola’s independence and financial soundness, built in over 20 years of activity, allowed the company to develop strong relations of trust with its clients and its success on the market.

With a turnover of over 50 million Euros, Isola Spa obtained “Rating 1” for its financial reliability by Cribis D & B, an important result that validates and certifies the company’s success.

In addition to its core activity, Isola SpA manages a sales agency through its Chinese subsidiary Isola Engineering, offering consulting and other services to companies wishing to find business opportunities in the Chinese market.

Name: Canusa Paper & Packaging
Description: Canusa Paper & Packaging is an independent international trader of containerboard and other papers for the packaging industry. For more than 40 years, Canusa has delivered producers and consumers of packaging papers with quality sustainable products, superior market knowledge, and service combined with creative and effective financing and supply chain solutions. With a supplier and customer network spanning more than 45 countries, Canusa offers direct access to the most important markets across the globe. In aggregate, Canusa and it’s affiliates comprise one of the United States largest exporters – most recently ranked the 9th largest shipper by number of containers -- per the U.S. Journal of Commerce.

Name: Igepa Polska
Description:
Igepa Polska is a company operating on the Polish market since 1995. It belongs to the leading national distributors of paper, graphic and packaging boards, other printing substrates, materials and devices for advertising and office papers. Igepa Polska is a part of the international Igepa group.
The Igepa group is one of the specialist leading wholesalers groups in Europe and serves more than 50,000 customers in industry, trade and commerce. The variety of goods includes products such as graphic paper and cardboard, packaging and media for advertising technology including technical equipment and services. At more than 75 locations in 25 countries and with around 3,500 employees, the Group including all strategic partners across Europe, generated a turnover of 1.8 billion euros in the year 2018.

Name: Interpine Innovation
Description:
Interpine Innovation is a forest consulting and data management company specialising in information technology and optimal decision making across the forest industry.    We have a committed management team of professional foresters and backed up by qualified technicians and data analysts that provide credible solutions for forestry-based companies.    By basing our core business in the central hub of New Zealand forestry since 1983, Interpine has been able to develop contemporary and applicable ideas, systems and services that have greatly benefited the local, national and international forest industries.

Interpine is a Microsoft Small Business Partner, esri Partner and Planet Partner

Name: Servigama
Description: Hemos reunido conocimientos y experiencias de todos los sectores en los que Servigama ha trabajado en los últimos 15 años ayudando a las empresas e industrias. Compartimos nuestro mejor asesoramiento, consejos e información sobre cómo puedes trabajar de manera más eficiente y resolver los desafíos con soluciones innovadores e inteligentes que ahorran tiempo y dinero. Esperamos que estos artículos sean de tu interés y te ofrezcan soluciones sostenibles que te ayuden a optimizar tu negocio, aumentar la higiene y el bienestar de tus empleados o clientes.

Name: Kilombero Valley Teak Company
Description:
KVTC was established in 1992 and is one of the most innovative forest management projects in Africa, bringing a wide range of social, economic and environmental benefits to a remote area of Tanzania.

At the heart of the project is the planting and sustainable harvesting of plantation teak and the protection and management of over 20,000ha of native forests and wetlands and a wide range of wildlife and flora within.

KVTC has established an integrated processing plant for the production of timber and value added product, bringing much needed long term employment and social development for the region.

With major shareholders including the Africa Sustainable Forestry Fund and Finnish Development funds, KVTC is dedicated to delivering high value Teak, sustainably and ethically sourced from the Heart of Africa.

Name: Power Cleaner
Description: High Pressure cleaning equipment for Fabrics, Wires, Felts and Belts for the Paper-, Tissue- and Board-industry

Name: Lesters Packaging
Description:
At Lesters, we’re the complete solutions partner. And we Deliver More, with our all-round service and product solutions. 
Working closely with our customers we’re able to help them take control of their business packaging by creating innovative, bespoke material-neutral solutions that maximise their company’s product throughout the whole of the supply chain. 
Our industry leading capabilities allow us to pack, store and transport their products in the most efficient and cost-effective way possible, whilst our data-driven approach means they’ll always be in command of their costs. 
We can even buy back their used boxes from them - reducing their environmental footprint and turning a cost into a revenue generator.

Name: ECC Timber Products
Description:
ECC is supplying quality construction, fencing & pallet timber products to the Irish and UK markets since 1992. Founded by PJ Fahy, the company has grown to become a major force in the Irish and UK timber industry with annual turnover increasing from €1million in 1992 to over €100million per annum today. The company has grown to become Coillte’s largest customer and Ireland’s largest exporter of sawn and planed timber products. Round log production now exceeds 500,000m3 annually.

Our team is a skilled and dynamic group who are customer focused and buy into the company ethos which encourages long term staff development, teamwork and loyalty. Employing over 150 full-time staff at our County Galway site, an additional 250 full-time staff are contracted externally in the areas of timber felling, extraction & haulage, our team has formed the backbone to the company’s success over the years.

At every stage of the operation our team is committed to quality management and continuous improvement through the use of ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System. All our processes are highly automated which allows us control, monitor and measure our product output and quality standards. 

Responsible procurement of raw material forms a core element of the company’s day to day management and policies. Fully accredited to the FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) and PEFC (Program for the Endorsement of Forest Certification), we actively promote sustainable forestry management with over 90% of raw material attaining FSC chain of custody.

Our commitment to the future is ongoing through our continuous approach to customer focused investment in cutting edge technology and equipment. ECC’s design and engineering team has sourced the latest technology from around the world making the process one of the most modern and efficient in Europe.
 
For more information, visit our website www.ecc.ie.

Name: PATA
Description:
The PATA group — a major regional player in the timber market with a sustainable and environment-friendly approach to forest management. PATA is the largest full-cycle forest management, timber production, logistics and trade company in the region. The group is also one of the largest private forest owners in Latvia.
Our mission is to create a forest industry ecosystem where all the stakeholders — from forest owners to end consumers —, by working together, not only may develop individually and create added value to all, but also lay the groundwork for sustainable development in the future.

Name: SRIPATHI PAPER AND BOARDS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Sripathi Paper & Boards Pvt. Ltd was started in the year 2002 producing Kraft paper with a 30 Tons Per Day capacity. Within a short span of time, the capacity at our Unit at Sivakasi, Tamilnadu was increased to 50 Tons Per Day in 2007. During the same year the company also ventured into production of Duplex Board with a 140 Tons Per Day Machines.

During 2010 the company installed a 6MW cogeneration power plant to prevent production delays and wastage resulting from the intermittent power supply from the state grid due to power shortage in Tamil Nadu. The company also forayed into writing and printing and having its Unit at Sathyamangalam, Erode District and has embarked on a programme to revitalize the operations of that Company, keeping in mind long term business prospect sand to be in all major segments of the paper industry.

The company has recently embarked on huge expansion cum modernization of both the Kraft and Duplex mills this year. After the expansion programme the capacity of Kraft paper division and Duplex will be 100 tons per day and 250 tons per day respectively.

Name: ENplus Head Office
Description: We are a world-leading, transparent and independent certification scheme for wood pellets. From production to delivery, we guarantee quality and combat fraud along the entire supply chain.

Name: Verde Forte Papeis S.A.
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada na produção de papéis especiais que fazem parte de diversos momentos da sua vida. Nossa fábrica está estrategicamente localizada em Mogi das Cruzes e conta com equipe, estrutura e tecnologia que garantem o melhor em papéis especiais.

https://www.instagram.com/verdefortepapeis

Name: Dawn Convertec Private Limited
Description:
We believe in providing ultimate customer satisfaction and preserving our relationships with esteemed customers.
  
With products ranging from Board to top-class printing paper (and almost everything in between), Dawn Group has all of your paper and board needs covered.
 
Equipped with high-tech machinery and production facilities, Dawn Group strives to produce the highest quality of Coated & Uncoated paper reels, folio size paper and cut-size. Products produced by the Dawn are strictly in compliance with global environmental standards and sources pulp only from certified sustainable forests.

We are leaders in the market and a symbol of finest quality providers across Pakistan.

Name: AM TRADING UK LIMITED
Description: Established in 2008, AM Trading has grown to be a trusted and respected international paper and board trading company by customers & suppliers alike. Specialising in the supply of stocklot, redundant, surplus & prime material in various qualities to export markets around the world, we can fulfil your requirement. Growing customer and supplier channels month on month, year on year, we welcome the opportunity to work with new customers and supplier alike.

Name: Materiaux Blanchet Inc.
Description:
Matériaux Blanchet Inc. is one of the largest independent private sawmill operators in Quebec, with an annual production capacity of over 300 million board feet of softwood lumber. The company operates two complexes integrating softwood sawing, drying and planing processes. One complex is located in Saint-Pamphile on the Quebec-Maine border, and the other is in Amos, in northwestern Quebec. The company mainly produces lumber for construction and industrial applications. Production also includes by-products such as chips, shavings, sawdust and bark, which are used by pulp and paper producers, board fabricators, energy companies, and pellet and bedding producers.

________

Name: Bulk Timber Sales
Description:
We Have over 30 Years Experience in the Timber Industry!  Bulk Timber Sales holds high quality as a priority in its manufacturing of all treated timber products.  Established in 1993, SABS mark holders since 1998, proudly BEE level 4.

Suppliers of CCA Treated Gum Poles, SA Pine Decking & Cladding, Lathes, Droppers, Fencing Slatts & Hardware! We also provide our clients with Design Assistance.

Name: OutNature
Description:
OutNature entwickelt und vertreibt innovative Faserprodukte auf Basis schnell nachwachsender Pflanzen wie Silphie, Stroh und Paludi-Biomasse. Wir verwandeln bisher ungenutzte pflanzliche Rest- und Rohstoffe in eine neue, wertvolle Faserquelle für die Papier- und Verpackungsindustrie.

Wir nutzen verborgene Kreisläufe der Natur, um Frischholz- und Recyclingfasern in Papier- und Verpackungsprodukten (z. B. Schalen, Faltschachteln, Displays) anteilig zu ersetzen. Als Teil der Schwarz Gruppe liefern wir in enger Zusammenarbeit mit Landwirtschaft, Industrie und Forschung eine ökonomisch sinnvolle und ressourcenschonende Alternative zu konventionellen Materialien.

Jede Faser von OutNature steht für Zukunftssicherheit und ökologische Verantwortung. Wir schließen Kreisläufe und kombinieren pflanzenbasierte Rohstoffe mit moderner Technologie, um hochwertige, leistungsfähige Verpackungslösungen zu schaffen. Wir sind die Antwort auf die Frage, wie es anders geht.

Name: Maelor Forest Nurseries
Description:
BSW Group
Member of Binderholz

The Company

Maelor Forest Nurseries Limited is located at Fields Farm, Bronington on the Welsh Borders. The nursery is independently owned and produces an extensive range of commercial forestry, Christmas tree and native broadleaf species, marketing approximately 12 million trees a year to customers throughout the UK and Europe. 

The Team

The Company has a strong management team and the support of an experienced workforce. Short lines of communication ensure prompt responses to customer requirements and the entire team is highly motivated towards giving every customer the level of satisfaction demanded. 

A policy of continuous staff training, both externally and on-site encourages staff at all levels to improve plant handling skills. Maelor personnel also liaise with universities, research establishments, laboratories and colleges to gain up to the minute technical support and training. As a major local employer the Company also recognises its responsibilities for the welfare of its staff.

Technical Research

Maelor Forest Nurseries Limited has good contacts with many research institutions and advisory bodies. Our technical work aims to improve growing conditions on the nursery to produce a better quality plant and to ensure that this quality is maintained all down the line from despatch to planting out and beyond. Research and technical work is carried out in the following areas - 

Vegetative propagation of Improved Sitka

Name: South African Forestry Contractors Association - SAFCA
Description:
Since its foundation in 1989, the South African Forestry Contractors Association (SAFCA) has stood as a pillar in advocating for forestry excellence, sustainability, and industry advancement. Our roots run deep, with a firm commitment to representing and empowering forestry contractors nationwide. SAFCA plays a vital role in fostering sustainable practices, ensuring stringent safety standards, and driving overall industry recognition.

Formed with 9 initial members in Kaapsehoop, Mpumalanga, SAFCA was envisioned as a platform for forestry contractors to come together, united by common concerns in legal, insurance, labor, and training and development aspects, while respecting healthy competition. Over the years, our range of services, from Legal Aid to Capacity Development and Training facilitation, have adapted to best serve our members. Retaining key services has been crucial as we continually support contractors in insurance, capacity development, forestry-technical advice, costing, and representation in various forums.

As the voice of forestry contractors, SAFCA collaborates with industry organizations like Forestry South Africa and the Forest Sector Charter Council (FSCC). Participation in discussions on human resources, B-BBEE compliance, and codes of practice highlights our dedication to ensuring a sustainable and inclusive industry. Our presence in addressing industry-wide matters underscores the commitment to nurturing a dynamic future for forestry contractors in South Africa.

The company has production plants in Europe and North America, with headquarters in Fiorano al Serio, Northern Italy.

Our Research & Development has always engineered innovative products, which have become important in the 𝐞𝐯𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐏𝐮𝐥𝐩 & 𝐏𝐚𝐩𝐞𝐫 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐲.

Some of the technologies widely used nowadays, like the first seamed press fabric (US Pat no.569040, 1956), the first microwave consistency meter (2005), or the first spiral link fabric in corrugator belts (2004), have been introduced to the market for the first time by our Company.

Our advanced Diagnostic Systems help daily hundreds of paper machines worldwide to 𝐬𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐠𝐲, 𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐞 𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 and boost process and 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐭𝐲.

Når du afleverer dine kasserede træmøbler og inventar på genbrugsstationen, er der stor sandsynlighed for, at de ender hos os. Vi renser affaldstræet for metaldele, genbruger træet i vores produktion og sender metallet til genanvendelse. Vi fremstiller og sælger spånplader og færdigbehandlede produkter til møbel- og køkkenindustrien samt byggeri i Danmark og Sverige. En voksende del af vores produktion går til eksport. 

En væsentlig del af vores råmateriale er genbrugstræ. Resten stammer fra biprodukter fra den danske træindustri og træ fra skovudtynding. Vores lim produceres på en dansk fabrik. 

Bæredygtighed gennemsyrer hele vores proces – fra råvareindkøb til produktion og levering af konkurrencedygtige spånpladeprodukter, produceret af mere end 90% genbrugstræ. Alle vores produkter kan leveres med Svanemærket.  

Grundlagt i 1950, er vores dygtige og engagerede medarbejdere vores vigtigste ressource. Vi er stolte af vores arbejdsplads, der afspejler samfundets mangfoldighed. Vores team består af administrative medarbejdere, ingeniører, økonomer, træindustriarbejdere, sælgere, smede og elektrikere. Vi tilbyder løbende lære- og elevpladser og investerer i fremtiden.

Bliv en del af vores bæredygtige rejse på Kronospan - Novopan Træindustri. 
#Kronospan #Novopan #Danskproduceret #Bygmedtræ #AffaldtilRessource #BæredygtigtByggeri

Name: Pepaa.co
Description:
Pepaa (formerly Plantcil) is a social enterprise enabling brands and zero waste lifestylers to transition to sustainable stationery and packaging. 

In late 2017, we started Plantcil as our reference to our first product - Plant in a pencil. We made plantable seed pencils made from 100% recycled paper and newspapers that will sprout after use. With incredible reception to our initiative, we started making other pencil variants, including newspaper pencils, rainbow pencils and even fruit pencils from recycled and handmade paper.

Once we gained traction with the plantable pencils, we realized that the complete stationery gamut across the world has huge potential for a dose of sustainability. Which is then that we started exploring how we could make pens out of recycled paper/cardboard - our first attempt at a zero-plastic pen resulted in 75% lesser plastic. We were one of the pioneers across the world to introduce seed pens that could be planted after use - brands absolutely loved to flaunt the new recycled cardboard pens and asked us if we could make other stationery items. And boy, did we rise to the challenge!

Over the course of the next few months, Plantcil went from just being a pencil company to becoming a full-stack sustainable stationery company, making products from recycled and handmade paper - all the way from notebooks, coasters, wine tags, roster sheets, event invites, table tents, bookmarks to even plantable seed packaging for the biggest of brands across the world! We even did a one-up on the plantable pens by going from 75% lesser plastic to India’s first automated 95% lesser plastic pen production (sans the refill, everything in the pen body is recycled paper)!

At Pepaa, we offer full-stack sustainability solutions for brands to manage their paper waste and get exotic upcycled stationery and packaging done. 

Pepaa is the brand name and registered trademark of Pepaa Products Private Limited.
