Name: Papelão União
Description:
Somos uma indústria de papel reciclado com mais de 35 anos de história, construída sobre três pilares que orientam todas as nossas decisões: qualidade industrial, responsabilidade ambiental e pessoas.

Produzimos papel a partir de matéria-prima 100% reciclada, com controle rigoroso de processo, tecnologia aplicada e conhecimento técnico acumulado ao longo de décadas de operação industrial.

Mais do que fabricar papel, entregamos constância, previsibilidade e confiança para quem depende do nosso produto para manter sua produção em movimento.

Nossa História:
A Papelão União nasceu do compromisso com a indústria e com o futuro.

Desde o início, nossa trajetória foi marcada pela busca por evolução técnica, eficiência produtiva e melhoria contínua.

Ao longo dos anos, investimos em estrutura, equipamentos, laboratório interno e pessoas, consolidando uma operação capaz de atender diferentes setores industriais com papéis de alto desempenho, adaptados às exigências reais de cada aplicação.

Crescemos mantendo a essência: fazer bem-feito, com responsabilidade e visão de longo prazo.

O Que Fazemos:
Produzimos dois tipos de papel:

- Papel Cartão: utilizado em aplicações que exigem estabilidade, controle dimensional e qualidade de acabamento.

- Papel Maculatura: voltado principalmente ao mercado tissue, com especificações técnicas consistentes e formatos adequados ao processo industrial.

Cada produto é desenvolvido para entrar no processo produtivo do cliente com segurança, mantendo padrão, regularidade e desempenho.

Nossa Visão Industrial:
Acreditamos que a sustentabilidade real nasce da eficiência do processo, do uso inteligente dos recursos e da responsabilidade com o que produzimos e entregamos.

Trabalhamos para fortalecer a indústria, apoiar cadeias produtivas e construir relações duradouras com nossos clientes, baseadas em transparência, compromisso e parceria técnica.

Papelão União
Tradição industrial, tecnologia aplicada e compromisso com o futuro

Name: Kastamonu Romania
Description:
Kastamonu, unul dintre cele mai mari doua grupuri ale Hayat Holding care operează la scară globală, a fost înființat în 1969 la Istanbul pentru fabricarea panourilor pe baza de lemn. Compania noastră, care are 100% capital domestic, a început producția în 1971 în prima unitate de producție - fabrica de PAL de la Kastamonu. În prezent, producem în 6 locații în țară: Kastamonu, Gebze, Balikesir, Samsun, Tarsus și Adana. Avem facilități de producție în 6 țări, inclusiv Turcia, România, Bulgaria, Bosnia și Herțegovina, Rusia și Italia. În SUA, avem un punct de lucru prin intermediul căruia gestionăm procesele de achiziție și logistică ale materiei prime lemnoase. Avem aproximativ 6.300 de angajați în unitățile și birourile noastre de producție interne și internaționale.
Fabricile noastre noastre au o capacitate totala de productie de 5,5 milioane m³ / an, incluzand producția de MDF de 2,4 milioane m³ / an, PAL - 3,1 milioane m3 / an, parchet laminat - 70 milioane m² / an. Aceste cifre ne fac al șaptelea cel mai mare producător din lume și al patrulea ca mărime din Europa. Pentru MDF, PAL, pardoseli laminate, și fețe de uși suntem cel de-al patrulea mare producător din regiune. În Turcia, avem o cotă de piață de aproximativ 30%.

Name: Cartão Sbravati Ltda.
Description:
By the end of 1957, from the work and vision of Mr. Aldo Sbravati, Indústria de Cartão Sbravati Ltda. was founded, located in the heart of the state of Santa Catarina at the city of Curitibanos, in Brazil.
 
Today, with a total area of 20.000 m², being 9.000 m² of gross floor area, the company employs 110 associates and has a capacity of  processing 1500 tons of paper per month.
 
In 2008, Cartão Sbravati began manufacturing spiral paper tubes. The initiative focuses on serving the market demands from tube, plastic films, textiles and other industries. By producing its own paper for the tubes, the quality standard of the final product is reassured.
 
The company has already over 50 years of tradition, supplying products for the market of paper barrels, tubes and angles, besides manufacturing its own tubes.
 
Cartão Sbravati has cutting edge equipment, qualified personnel and a tight quality control to produce its high quality paper and tubes.
Company
The company recycles over 15'000 tons of paper every year, using only recycled paper fibers.
 
To assure the origin of the timber used, the steam generation relies on wood chips produced from the company's own reforestation.
 
The process water stays in a closed-loop circuit, being recycled and reused. If the water is eventually returned to the river, it undergoes a water treatment system to remove any remaining paper fibers.

Name: Pehart
Description:
Pehart Grup este liderul producției de hârtie tip tissue (materie primă și produse finite) în România.

Compania are doua site-uri de producție, în Petrești, lângă Sebeș, județul Alba și la Dej, județul Cluj. Ambele puncte de producție sunt echipate cu tehnologii avansate pentru producția și transformarea hârtiei tissue.

Fabrica de hârtie din Petrești are o istorie de peste 180 de ani în producția și comercializarea hârtiei pe piața din România. 

În perioada 2007-2009 fabrica a fost complet renovată și modernizată pentru deschiderea unor noi linii de productie a hârtiei igienice și a prosoapelor de bucătarie pentru a îndeplini cele mai înalte standarde din Europa.

În perioada 2012-2014, a fost construită fabrica de la Dej, având utilaje de producție moderne pentru jumbo role (material brut pentru prelucrarea produselor din hârtie) și pentru producerea hârtiei igienice și a prosoapelor de hârtie. 

În 2016 au fost inaugurate la Dej două linii noi de producție a șervețelelor și batistelor de hârtie.

În 2017 – Abris Capital Partners finalizează preluarea companiei Pehart Tec Grup.

Name: Re-board Technology

Based in Sweden, we work with our global print partners and distributors to offer impactful design solutions for display advertising, point of sale marketing and for exhibitions and tradeshows. 

Our flagship product, Re-board, is a uniquely strong and versatile rigid paperboard. Its engineered fluted core allows Re-board to be cut and folded into any shape imaginable. When crafted into fantastical shapes, Re-board remains exceptionally strong, lightweight, and durable. Easy to transport, assemble and dissassemble, it is most versatile board on the market. Re-board contains no harmful components and utilizes water-based adhesives. This means that when your campaign has reached your perfect customer, the Re-board display can be recycled as paper.

Name: Two Sides UK
Description:
Two Sides is a global initiative with membership right across the graphic communications value chain; from forest to print and on to recovery and recycling. Two Sides promotes the responsible use of Print and Paper which, when sourced from certified or sustainably managed forests, is a uniquely powerful and natural communications medium.

Two Sides recognises that the industry has a responsibility to continually improve its environmental credentials and address customer concerns, which are often the result of misleading or inaccurate information.

The Two Sides initiative sets out the facts in a clear and straightforward manner; addressing some of the inaccuracies and issues that surround the industry. There is an appetite by those working within the Graphic Communications channel to understand all the environmental issues and thus make more informed decisions about the use of Print and Paper products.

Print and Paper has been the preferred communications medium for 2,000 years. In a multimedia world, it continues to be highly effective and, used responsibly, is inherently sustainable.

Two Sides seeks to ensure that, by fostering a better understanding of our industry’s environmental credentials, Print and Paper, through its myriad of uses from commercial applications to the basis of learning and creativity, remains an essential communication medium of choice.

Membership

Membership of Two Sides shows that your organisation regards environmental awareness as an essential part of the business strategy. Benefits of membership include access to materials and information, helping your business to communicate its sustainability to clients and staff, as well as participating in an initiative which sets out to dispel many of the myths that surround our industry.

Find out more www.twosides.info/join-us

Name: Mendocino Forest Products Company, LLC
Description:
Mendocino Forest Products (MFP) provides a unique mix of redwood, Douglas-fir, and pressure treated lumber and timbers for home improvement and outdoor living projects. Located in Northern California, environmental stewardship constitutes the cornerstone of MFP’s corporate culture.

Sister company, Mendocino Redwood, owns approximately 350 square miles (228,800 acres) of Forest Stewardship Council (FSC C019948) certified coastal redwood and Douglas-fir timberlands in Mendocino County, California. Logs from Mendocino Redwood timberland operations are manufactured into solid lumber products at Mendocino Forest Product’s sawmill in Ukiah, California.

Mendocino Forest Products maintains chain-of-custody certification for its sawmill and distribution operations through the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC C013133), an independent, non-governmental, not-for-profit organization. FSC promotes the exemplary management of the world’s forests.

Mendocino Forest Products manufactures and distributes the Mendocino Redwood brand of FSC certified redwood decking, fencing, landscaping and dimensional lumber, and timber products, as well as Douglas-fir dimensional lumber. Mendocino Redwood and Douglas-fir lumber and timbers are available exclusively at The Home Depot stores throughout California and several other states in the Western U.S. 

For project inspiration, maintenance tips, and where to buy, please visit our website: http://www.MFP.com/

Name: Kastamonu Italia
Description:
Kastamonu Entegre è una delle due società multinazionali facenti parte della Hayat Holding, fondata nel 1969 a İstanbul per operare nel settore dei pannelli derivati dal legno. 
La nostra Società, fondata con il 100% di capitale nazionale, ha costruito a Kastamonu (cittadina del nord-ovest della Turchia) il suo primo stabilimento di pannelli truciolari ed ha iniziato la produzione nel 1971. La Società attualmente produce in 6 differenti località della Turchia: Kastamonu, Gebze, Balikesir, Samsun, Tarsus ed Adana. Inclusa la Turchia, possediamo degli stabilimenti di produzione in 6 paesi: Romania, Bulgaria, Bosnia ed Erzegovina, Russia ed Italia. Negli Stati Uniti abbiamo una Società che si occupa del processo di approvvigionamento di trucioli di legno. 
I nostri stabilimenti di produzione ed i vari uffici locati sia in Turchia che all’estero, nel complesso, sommano intorno a 6.300 dipendenti.
La capacità produttiva annua dei nostri stabilimenti è di circa di 5.5 milioni di m³, così suddivisi:  2.4 milioni di m³ per MDF, 3.1 milioni di m³ per trucioli di legno, 70 milioni di m² per pavimentazione in laminato. I suddetti dati ci collocano al VII posto nel mondo ed al IV posto in Europa. In riferimento alla produzione di MDF, pannelli truciolari, parquet in laminato e pannelli per porte invece siamo tra i 4 più grandi produttori nel mondo. In Turchia abbiamo il 30% del mercato.

Name: G+D Louisenthal
Description:
Louisenthal is a leading manufacturer of banknote substrates, security papers and security features. Its products are used globally by more than 100 central banks and governments, including the ECB. Louisenthal also offers comprehensive security and services around plant engineering, from the planning stage to the commissioning of production plants. 

Louisenthal’s portfolio comprises banknote security and durability technologies which meet  the security and automation requirements of issuers, the commercial sector and the public. Substrate-embedded features such as watermarks,  threads and foil stripes showing optically variable and dynamic effects, recognisable both by the public and by central banks, are part of its portfolio. 

With Hybrid, LongLife and cotton the company also offers a variety of substrates for banknote and security papers. 

Louisenthal employs approximately 1100 staff at its production sites in Gmund at Lake Tegernsee (paper and foils) and in Königstein near Dresden (paper). It is a subsidiary of the German technology company Giesecke+Devrient Currency Technology GmbH.

Description:

Bu teknolojiyi ülkemize ilk getiren şirket olma gururunu taşıyan Çamsan Entegre Ağaç Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.’nin günümüzde kalite ve ürün yelpazesi açısından sektördeki liderliği devam etmektedir. Finansal büyüklük açısından Türkiye’nin ilk 300 şirketi arasında uzun yıllardır yer alan firmamız, iç piyasanın ve sektörün lideri olarak yurtdışı piyasalara da ihracat yapmaktadır. Ağırlıklı olarak İran, Suriye, Irak, K.K.T.C., Azerbaycan, Rusya Federasyonu, Yunanistan, Arnavutluk, Gürcistan, Türkmenistan, Kazakistan’a yönelik ihracat yapmakta olan firmamız her geçen gün ihracatını artırmaktadır.
Çesitli kalite ve ebatlarda çıplak MDF levhanın yanı sıra, Melamin Kaplı Levha ve Laminat Parke üretim üniteleriyle entegre bir tesis konumundadır.

60.000 m2’si kapalı 200.000 m2 alan üzerinde kurulu olan fabrikamızda;
MDF ÜRETİM TESİSİ
3 ADET LAMİNE (KAPLAMA) TESİSİ
3 ADET LAMİNAT PARKE TESİSİ
2 ADET EMPRENYE TESİSİ
KİMYA TESİSİ
bulunmaktadır.

Çamsan Entegre Ağaç Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş, 1999 yılı ISO 9001 sistemi kuruluş çalışmalarını aynı yılın Aralık ayında tamamlamış ve merkezi İngiltere’de bulunan Uluslararası bir belgelendirme kuruluşu SGS Yarsley Internatıomal Certification Services firması tarafından denetlenmiştir. Denetlemeler sonucu firmamız ISO 9001 – 2008 (Kalite Yönetim Sistemi), ISO 14001-2004 (Çevre Yönetim Sistemi) ve OHSAS 18001 – 2007 (İş Sağlığı ve Güvenliği Yönetim Sistemi) belgelerini almaya hak kazanmıştır.

We know wood, and we know it better than anyone else.

In addition, we offer laboratory services for the analysis of solid biomass fuels, wood preservatives, environmental analysis and physical properties of lumber. Name: Forisk Consulting
Description:
Founded in 2004, Forisk analyzes forest supplies, wood demand and timber pricing to develop forecasts and strategic guidance for clients.  Our approach emphasizes rigorous research, clear communication, localized analysis and direct forestry experience.

We conduct original, nationally cited research. Forisk publishes research in North America’s top forest industry journals.  Leading media outlets – including The Wall Street Journal, New York Times, and National Public Radio – cite our analysis and, in 2015, Forisk was named a “Bulldog 100 Fastest Growing Business” for the 4th time since 2010.

We understand forestry.  All of our researchers have forestry degrees and hands-on experience, including wood procurement, land management and forest operations.

We start with mills and local timber markets.  Capital allocation and investment decisions in the forest industry require localized analysis and forecasts.  Our entire research program builds on mill-by-mill, market-by-market analysis.

We “teach the teachers.” Forest industry professionals and investors attend our short courses to learn skills and gain insights.  Our workshops and conference presentations consistently score as “outstanding” and “best in show.”

Velvet Care is the team of more than 700 people who represent in everyday work the company values such as: consumer, development, team, entrepreneurship, balance, heritage. More than 70 percent of employees has been working here for more than 10-year.
The company aims at strengthening its leadership position in Poland, as well as being the key market player in the other Central European markets. In 2020 Velvet Care made its first acquisition – Czech company Moracell – the biggest producer of hygienic paper products in this country.
Velvet Care products are available in more that 30 countries in Central Europe, Scandinavia, Western Europe, Balkans, Russia and CIS. 
Velvet Care is the reliable partner in B2C and B2B sector -  for all customers who are interested in high quality branded products, as well as in private labels.

One of our intentions is to be close to our clients geographically to respond to their needs as quickly and efficiently as possible. Our entrepreneurial vision is globally positioned. Name: NPS Holdings LLC
Description: At NPS, we're passionate about our products and strive to be a company that encourages new ideas and progressive innovation. As a manufacturer with our own tissue mill, we efficiently create insulated and protective packaging from 100% recycled inputs, and help industries get the job done with our away-from-home towel and tissue selection and specialty contract converting operations.

Name: PT Lontar Papyrus Pulp & Paper Industry
Domsjö Fabriker AB
Description:
At Domsjö Fabriker we combine over 120 years of experience with a strong belief in the future. With our unique process, we transform the forest into green products that replace fossil alternatives – and every employee contributes to a more sustainable world. We are a biorefinery with the whole world as a market, with the heart in Örnsköldsvik, Höga Kusten. Here, all roles are behind the gates, short decision-making paths and a community that makes us call ourselves the Domsjö family. With us, you get to develop, take responsibility and help build a greener future – together.
We make renewable products from renewable raw material, using the whole tree, which gives us a strong sustainability profile and a positive impact on the final CO2 footprint.
Cellulose is our biggest business area, our main product and the basis of our production. It can be found in viscose clothing as well as medicine tablets. We also deal with the by-products of cellulose production, which are further processed into sustainable products such as lignin and bioethanol. Lignin can be used in a wide range of applications - from concrete to animal feed and bioethanol is also a by-product of pulp production and mostly sold as a fuel blend on the European market.
Together with our customers we want to make a difference. We are involved in creating a sustainable bioeconomy that utilizes forest as the unique resource that it is. We make more from the tree.

Domsjö Fabriker is part of the Aditya Birla Group.
Learn more about our parent company at www.adityabirla.com

Name: Spicers Australia
Description:
Spicers is a dynamic and solutions-focused company with a passion for supplying quality materials, equipment, and solutions to our customers in the commercial print, labelling, signage, visual display, and architectural industries.

A leader in our traditional market of commercial print paper products, we now hold significant positions in our growth markets: digital media, consumables, hardware and architecture.

With Australian operations in Melbourne, Sydney, Brisbane, Adelaide, Perth, Hobart, Canberra, Darwin and Townsville, each region we do business in has a personality of its own. This local knowledge means that we understand the issues and opportunities faced by our customers, and can partner with them to make the right choices for their business.

We aim to be the business partner of choice for our customer, by delivering on our promises, every day.

Name: SMSA
Description:
A Sebastião & Martins SA, fundada em 1980, é uma empresa com posição e imagem consolidada no mercado da indústria de cartão canelado e embalagens.

A sua estrutura tem vindo a ser ampliada de forma sustentada com a abordagem de novos mercados e a expansão para segmentos de actividades com exigências superiores.

Name: Papierfabrik Louisenthal GmbH
Description:
Louisenthal is a leading manufacturer of banknote substrates, security papers and security features. Its products are used globally by more than 100 central banks and governments, including the ECB. Louisenthal also offers comprehensive security and services around plant engineering, from the planning stage to the commissioning of production plants. 

Louisenthal’s portfolio comprises banknote security and durability technologies which meet  the security and automation requirements of issuers, the commercial sector and the public. Substrate-embedded features such as watermarks,  threads and foil stripes showing optically variable and dynamic effects, recognisable both by the public and by central banks, are part of its portfolio. 

With Hybrid, LongLife and cotton the company also offers a variety of substrates for banknote and security papers. 

Louisenthal employs approximately 1100 staff at its production sites in Gmund at Lake Tegernsee (paper and foils) and in Königstein near Dresden (paper). It is a subsidiary of the German technology company Giesecke+Devrient Currency Technology GmbH.

Name: Tamil Nadu Newsprint and Papers Limited
Description: Tamil Nadu Newsprint and Papers Limited (TNPL), an enterprise promoted by Government of Tamil Nadu, has precisely followed this adage. The Unit- I of TNPL at Kagithapuram, Karur district was commissioned in October 1985 with an installed capacity of 90,000 TPA of Newsprint/Fine Paper, in a single machine. Over a period of time, TNPL has added two more paper machines, besides upgrading the existing Paper machine. The increased production capacity of 400,000 TPA of writing and printing papers has made TNPL as one of the largest bagasse- a residue of sugar cane, as primary raw material based paper mill in the world. With an increased demand, the company has expanded the pulping capacity by way of installing new chemical hardwood line, upgrading the chemical bagasse pulp line and setting up a new deinked pulp line besides adopting ECF bleaching in all the chemical pulp lines. Simultaneously, the company has also increased the power plant capacity to meet the steam and energy requirement of the expanded mill. All the three modern high-speed paper machines are capable of producing varities of Writing and Printing papers and are equipped with state-of-the art automation to ensure consistent quality. The Company has earned a reputation as a pre-eminent player of manufacturing paper from bagasse having a world-wide creditability in the trade. Today, TNPL Unit-I is self sufficient in terms of power and pulp.

Name: Exacompta
Description:
Fondée en 1928, Exacompta fête bientôt ses 100 ans d'amour pour le papier et les produits d'organisation. 
Le siège social, toujours situé au coeur de Paris, abrite aussi la plus grande usine de la capitale, où sont encore fabriqués articles de papeterie, de classement et agendas.
Au-delà du « Made in Europe » et du « Made in France », Exacompta présente donc de larges gammes « Made in Paris » qui ont construit son histoire.
Depuis ces 30 dernières années, Exacompta s’est considérablement diversifié en investissement massivement dans la spécialisation et la performance de sites de production basés en Europe avec 10 sites en France et 4 en Europe.
Le maintien des productions et des emplois en Europe de l’Ouest constitue un engagement majeur pour Exacompta, et plus largement pour le groupe Exacompta-Clairefontaine.

NOTRE EXPERTISE
Exacompta se positionne comme le leader Européen en solutions d'organisation et de planification : Papeterie, fournitures de bureau, agendas, accessoires de rangement... L’offre sans cesse renouvelée et la capacité à s’adapter aux changements de consommation ont assis la notoriété de la marque et sa position chez les distributeurs.

NOTRE MISSION
Accompagner les consommateurs vers leur propre réussite professionnelle et personnelle.
Parce que, chez Exacompta, nous ne vendons pas que des classeurs, des agendas, ni même des boîtes de rangements, nous ne sommes pas des addicts du livre de comptes non plus.
Chez Exacompta notre métier est avant tout de concevoir depuis presque 100 ans des solutions adaptées aux besoins de chacun pour vous aider à avancer.
Notre métier est donc dès lors d’apporter l’organisation nécessaire (scolaires, ou pro) pour AVOIR LES IDÉES CLAIRES.

En somme, Exacompta accompagne l’utilisateur et lui permet d’ « avoir les idées claires pour voir plus loin ».

Name: Komatsu Forest North America
Description: Komatsu develops and supplies technologies, equipment and services for the construction, mining, forklift, industrial and forestry markets. For more than a century, the company has been creating value for its customers through manufacturing and technology innovation, partnering with others to empower a sustainable future where people, business and the planet thrive together. Front-line industries worldwide use Komatsu solutions to develop modern infrastructure, extract fundamental minerals, manage forests and create consumer products. The company's global service and distributor networks support customer operations to help enhance safety and promote productivity while working to optimize performance. Learn more at www.komatsu.com.

Name: Caima, S.A.
Description:
Considering the specifity of the process and the size of the industrial unit, Caima
searches for niche markets, focusing on the production of dissolving pulp for applications in textile and chemical industries.

Caima produces eucalyptus pulp through sulphite, bleached entirely without using chlorine or its derivatives (TCF-Totally Chlorine Free pulp).
These specific qualities confer special properties to the cellulose pulp and make it particularly suitable for viscose and other chemical applications.

Caima also produces lignosulphonates which are mainly used in the construction industry.

Name: Coldenhove
Description:
Coldenhove was founded in 1661 and has developed to become a global leader in high-value quality paper for specific high-end applications. In the last decades Coldenhove has specialized in the digital industrial printing (on textiles) market with the development of sublimation transfer paper (DTP).

It is our goal to make a difference through dynamic technological renewal. By continuously improving the products in our portfolio to meet the demands of an ever changing market. And by developing new and innovative products, thus driving changes in the market place and creating new opportunities for our partners and customers. We can achieve this goal only thanks to the commitment of the Coldenhove community - dedicated professionals who love what they do and want to be the best at it!

Description:

Beyond a blank sheet of paper, there are ideas waited to be discovered.
BMJ captures the unique point of view of how thinking outside the paper and beyond can produce satisfying products with high-quality paper. Our company truly benefits from those concepts as its journey begins with two things, a blank paper & a fresh idea. 

Let’s think outside the paper,

We’ll imagine and make it for you!  We are your world’s number one partner for speciality paper and packaging materials in the cigarette industry.

Name: Whakatane Mill Limited
Description:
WML Paperboard are Australasia’s only manufacturer of coated folding boxboard grades for the packaging market. 

All of our folding boxboard is produced to the highest quality from virgin fibre for the greatest product safety and optimal performance.  

We are extremely proud of our past having a steadfast presence since 1939.

We directly employ in excess of 185 personnel - the vast majority of whom come from the local area.  We started production in 1939 to turn the nearby Central North Island Pine forests into export paperboard for New Zealand’s growing economy.

Folding boxboard is an environmentally sustainable packaging format, with raw materials sourced responsibly from nearby renewable pine plantations or from a dedicated, qualified supplier base.  Every product that we make fits easily into already established circular recycling programs, ensuring that our impact on the environment and consumer waste to landfill is minimised.

Our ownership history has been diverse – from NZ Forest Products in the early days, to Carter Holt Harvey and Rank Group, SIG Combibloc and since June 2021 by the Smurfit Consortium.  Our current owners are committed to investing in WML to ensure that the business has a future for decades to come.

Today we produce in excess of 150,000 tonnes of folding boxboard annually on a 24hr/day, 7 days a week basis, with an already invested expansion plan that will take the Mill volume to in excess of 200,000 tonnes by the end of 2023.

We are committed to being an employer of choice in the Bay of Plenty area and continuing to support the New Zealand timber industry and our many customers and suppliers all over the globe.

And we're delighted to help strengthen the families of our employees and contribute meaningfully to the communities in which we live.

Name: Altri Florestal
Description: Altri Florestal, S.A.

Name: Tree Wood Products
Description:
TREE Wood Products provides integrated trade solutions for wood products in the domestic and international markets.

TREE Wood Products is highly specialized in wood products. The main products traded are roundwood (logs, poles, posts and landscape timbers), sawnwood (pallet components, S2S, S4S, APG boards, pickets, balauster and decking), wood panel (pine plywood, maritime plywood, PSF plywood, OES plywood, T1/11, beaded ceiling, blockboard and hardboard), and remanufactured wood product (blocks and blanks, moulding and frames, EGP, hardwood flooring and wooden doors).

TREE Wood Products operates in the entire forest industry production chain within high governance standards. TREE is not only focused on trading operations, but also provides logistic, financial, taxation and quality control solutions.

Through an experienced technical staff and a solid operational structure, we strive for excellence in what we do to better serve our clients.

Name: Barrette-Chapais
Description: Depuis 1975, Barrette-Chapais est une entreprise forestière fièrement québécoise et un chef de file dans l’utilisation de la fibre pour la production de bois de sciage au Québec. L’innovation, l’ingéniosité et le souci du détail sont au cœur de ses valeurs et elle est reconnue tant pour l’excellence de ses produits et son environnement de travail dynamique et stimulant que pour le développement d’équipements performants, à la fine pointe de la technologie.

Name: Miquel y Costas
Description:
Miquel y Costas is an industrial group dedicated to the manufacture of high-performance special papers and materials derived from cellulose of great complexity and added value. With nearly 300 years of history, it is an international benchmark, exporting more than 80% of its production to 130 countries worldwide. The Group, consisting of 900 employees and 14 companies, operates across three business lines: the tobacco industry, speciality papers and pulp for industrial uses, and papers for the graphic industry.

The purpose of Miquel y Costas is to apply the necessary knowledge to cellulose to offer society products that contribute to the sustainability of the planet and the protection of the environment. Quality, commitment to innovation, environmental responsibility, experience, and financial strength are the main hallmarks of the Group, which has been listed on Spain’s Continuous Market since 1996.

Miquel y Costas demonstrates its commitment to Corporate Social Responsibility through the Fundación Miquel y Costas & Miquel, whose mission is to improve the economic, educational, cultural, and social conditions of vulnerable groups while also promoting sustainability initiatives and actions against climate change.

Name: Ramires Reflorestamentos Ltda.
Description:
The Ramires Reforestation began operations in 1973 taking advantage of tax incentives at the time. His first project was forest in Botucatu-SP. From a modest enterprise, Ramires left for the new and great plans, settling in Mato Grosso do Sul and then in Maranhão and Minas Gerais.

The Ramires was a pioneer in adopting the Clean Development Mechanism in the early 90's. For 12 years charcoal exported to Europe. Today, after planting over 90 thousand hectares, is a national reference in the forestry sector.

Name: Heinzel Pöls
Description: Zellstoff Pöls AG, one of the biggest producers of elemental chlorine-free (ECF) bleached softwood sulphate pulp in Central and Eastern Europe, is based in Austria, or more precisely in the federal province of Styria. ORION pulp, the brand name under which Pöls pulp is sold, is mainly used to manufacture high-quality printing and writing paper, tissue paper as well as packaging and special paper. An integrated paper machine produces bleached kraft paper. This STARKRAFT paper is primarily applied in the production of packaging and special application.

Name: Unibol SAS
Description:
Nuestros productos se fabrican con 100% fibra natural de celulosa, proveniente de material reciclado preconsumo, postconsumo y remanufacturado, y están respaldados por procesos de producción de alta tecnología, control de calidad y mejora continua, garantizando su calidad y el mejor aprovechamiento de los recursos en cada uno de los procesos de producción. De esta manera contribuimos con la protección del medio ambiente.

Innovamos permanentemente en la investigación, desarrollo y mejoramiento de los procesos. Así mismo, trabajamos constantemente en la capacitación y desarrollo del talento humano que integra el equipo de Unibol S.A.S.

Fabrica papel a partir de fibras 100% recicladas lo cual contribuye en gran medida a la preservación de bosques dado que evita la tala de árboles y aumenta la vida útil de los rellenos sanitarios evitando que materiales recuperables como cartón y papel sean depositados allí de manera innecesaria.

La empresa cuenta con sistemas de recuperación y recirculación de agua, cogeneración del 100% de su energía requerida aprovechando de esta los gases calientes generados y así producir el 40% de su demanda de vapor para el secado del papel.

Para el tratamiento de sus aguas residuales Unibol cuenta con una planta tipo MBR (Membrana Bio Reactor) la cual garantiza superar ampliamente los límites permisibles exigidos por ley en las aguas vertidas.

Name: Cellupaper for Industry CPI
Description: Cellupaper is one of the largest paper mills in Egypt, with a daily production capacity of 250 tons and a paper machine width of 380 cm. We specialize in producing a full range of packaging papers for corrugated board, including kraft, testliner and fluting. Equipped with the most advanced quality control laboratory and testing equipment in Egypt, we ensure every product meets the highest international standards. By combining state-of-the-art technology with customer-focused service, we deliver reliable and sustainable paper solutions to clients across global markets.

Name: PaperlinX
Description:
PaperlinX is one of the world's leading merchants of paper, communication materials and diversified products and services. 

PaperlinX businesses around the world source, stock, market and distribute branded fine paper ranges, specialty paper, sign and display, industrial packaging and graphics materials. 

We link customers and suppliers through an international network of locally focused operating companies in Australia, Austria, Belgium, Canada, Czech Republic, Denmark, Germany, Hong Kong, Ireland, Malaysia, New Zealand, Poland, Singapore, Spain, The Netherlands, United Kingdom and Vietnam.  Our continuing business operates with approximately 4,620 employees and sales of 1.93 million tonnes of paper.
  
Each company within the PaperlinX Group operates as a separate business and therefore manages its own recruitment process. Find details of our different businesses or email the Company directly using the website (Contact Us section).

2024 yılında faaliyete aldığımız KM4 makinesi ile %100 geri dönüşümden Fluting, Testliner, İmitasyon Kraft üretimi yapılmaktadır.

This is packaging with meaning: gKRAFT is a high-quality packaging solution, introduced to accelerate the transition from plastic to natural, sustainable, recyclable, and biodegradable ﬁbres.

gKRAFT is a force accelerating the change, from fossil to forest.

Name: Tension Envelope & Print
Description: Tension is an established and reliable resource for custom printed mailing, promotional and shipping solutions. We produce billions of envelopes a year and take great pride in being a leading manufacturer of custom envelope solutions that people and businesses around the world send and receive. We are privately owned and operated and our products range from standard commercial styles to unique specialties including one-of-a-kind mailing and packaging products. Whether it’s direct mail, financial transaction envelopes or everyday communication products, we believe that how information is conveyed and presented through the mail is essential to the communication process.

Name: ECMA - European Carton Makers Association
Description: ECMA: The European Carton Makers Association ECMA is the international network of folding carton organisations; carton businesses, national carton associations and suppliers to the carton industry.

Name: Skogssällskapet
Description:
Skogssällskapet is a public service foundation whose main objectives are to ensure sustainable forest and land management. We manage and develop forest properties for private and public forest owners in Sweden, Finland and Latvia.

We help forest owners develop their forest properties, maximising their potential. The objective is to enrich the different values in the forest, and to use the forest sustainably, from an economic, ecological and social perspective. Skogssällskapet is an independent foundation, with no ownership ties to sawmills or other forest industries, so our management is based on the forest owner’s own objectives and goals.

Name: COMSUCRE S.A.
Description: COMSUCRE is a company based out of Ecuador.

Name: Sanitary Care Products Asia, Inc.
Description:
Proudly Pinoy
 
SCPA is a Christian family-run company that continues to serve the Philippine market with high quality products at competitive prices. A tissue converter with offices located nationwide. SCPA serves both the retail market and institutional markets. 

Your Hygiene Is Our Concern
 
We know that your family’s hygiene takes top priority in your household. This is why we don’t take it for granted. At SCPA, we are committed to upholding the value of hygiene in all our products. We take a stand in using 100% virgin pulp made tissue that is free from artificial whiteners and elemental chlorine ensuring the safety of every family member.

Innovative Solutions
 
We take pride in being the first in the Philippines to come up with innovative tissue solutions for our consumers. SCPA only acquires the latest technology to be utilized in product configuration from services to solutions. Stand out efforts have been made as well in understanding the market behavior in tissue usage thus fitting every detail in producing a hygienic paper line that is functional for everyone.

Name: Neodecortech S.p.A.
Description:
Neodecortech è un Gruppo di società attive nella filiera del mobile d'arredo. 

Con l'appassionato contributo del nostro team di ingegneri specialisti ed industrial designer, produciamo superfici decorative in carta, in pvc o in pet riciclato, per la nobilitazione del pannello d’arredo e dei pavimenti. 

Ogni risultato raggiunto è frutto di un progetto dedicato, realizzato sulle esigenze del singolo cliente. 

La nostra esperienza e la ricerca continua ci permettono oggi di offrire in tempi brevi prodotti innovativi ad alto valore aggiunto.
Commercializziamo prodotti con tre diversi brand:
CONFALONIERI – carte decorative stampate ed impregnate
TEXTE – laminati decorativi
PLANA – film plastici

Ogni nostra azione è mossa da un forte impegno per la salute del pianeta e il futuro del nostro ecosistema, in linea con gli obiettivi di crescita sostenibile che tutti noi perseguiamo.
Siamo orgogliosi di poter rappresentare questi valori 100% made in Italy e di poter soddisfare i nostri clienti nel mondo.
-
Neodecortech is a group of companies active in the furniture industry.

With the passionate contribution of our team of engineers and industrial designers, we produce decorative surfaces in paper, PVC or recycled PET, for the finishing of furniture panels and floors.

Every goal achieved is the result of a dedicated project, tailor-made to the needs of the individual customer.

Our experience and continuous research allow us to rapidly offer innovative products with high added value;
We market under three different brands:
CONFALONIERI - printed and impregnated decorative papers
TEXTE - decorative laminates
PLANA - plastic films

Every action we take is driven by a strong commitment to the health of our planet and the future of our ecosystem, in line with the sustainable development goals we all pursue.
We are proud to represent these 100% made in Italy values and to be able to satisfy our customers worldwide.

Name: Puunjalostusinsinöörit ry - Finnish Forest Products Engineers' Association
Description: Metsäteollisuuden ammattilaisten ja yritysten verkosto. Network for professionals and companies in the forest industry. #PIprof #puunjalostusinsinöörit

Name: Papelera Internacional (PAINSA)
Description: Comunidad OFICIAL del área de Recursos Humanos de PAINSA (Papelera Internacional S.A.) de Guatemala.

Name: Aadharshree Paper Mills Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Aadharshree Paper Mills Pvt. Ltd. (Located in Roorkee, India) is focused on creating papers that are best suited for your packaging needs. Our products are totally made from recycled fiber so we do our little bit in making our planet a cleaner place with less waste going to landfills.
With the best in segment infrastructure and state of the art paper machine and pulp mill, we push ourselves in improving our paper quality everyday and making our customers delighted. 

Our core focus is on making specialty grade papers, high quality MG Kraft Paper, MG Bleached Kraft Paper, MG Tissue and MG Poster Paper from 18 GSM to 90 GSM.

Name: BILT GRAPHIC PAPER PRODUCTS LIMITED
Description: BILT GRAPHIC PAPER PRODUCTS LIMITED is a paper & forest products company based out of Tower-C, Block-A First India Place, Gurgaon, Haryana, India.

Name: SICAL GROUPE ROSSMANN
Description:
Notre Groupe est le principal producteur indépendant d’emballages en carton ondulé en Europe et en Afrique avec une capacité de production de 500 000 tonnes. Pionnier en Europe, fort d’une expertise accrue des matériaux et d’une bonne compréhension des activités de nos clients, notre savoir faire est reconnu. 
A SICAL (62), nous produisons et transformons du papier ( papeterie), du carton ondulé (cartonnerie) et du polystyrène (département plastique). 
Au département "Carton",notre parc machines nous permet de proposer tous les formats d’emballages imprimés de la simple à la quadruple cannelure. 
En parallèle, nos cartonnages ( Ex: Nord Carton -62-) produisent des emballages à façon en complément de gamme des cartonneries ainsi que pour leur propre commercialité. 
Avec une capacité de production de 300 000 tonnes les papeteries du groupe alimentent toutes nos onduleuses.

La division Distripackaging, c’est une solution complète de :
- Caisses 
- Adhésifs 
- Feuillards, films, film à bulles 
- Cornières 
- Palettes 
- Boites postales 
- Etuis d'envoi 
Une équipe à votre écoute capable de répondre à vos besoins. Un distributeur à votre service. 

SICAL est également expert dans le moulage de pièces en matière expansée, transforme du polystyrène et du polypropylène. Fort de notre expérience, nous sommes un acteur incontournable de l’emballage alimentaire dans les secteurs de la marée, barquette viande et boite à glace. Notre expertise technique nous positionne dans des domaines aussi variés que le secteur pharmaceutique avec le respect de la chaîne du froid, la fabrication de pièces isolantes pour le bâtiment et la création de calages pour l’industrie. Notre parc de 30 presses assure une capacité de production annuelle de 1200 tonnes.

Name: ABENA-FRANTEX
Description:
Frantex est une société française spécialisée dans la fabrication d'alèses. Créée en 1975, elle devenue en 1992 une filiale du Groupe danois Abena, spécialisé dans la confection de produits d'incontinence. Aujourd'hui, Abena-Frantex est le leader français de la production d'alèses et compte plus de 80 salariés. Les employés sont répartis sur le siège situé à Nogent-sur-Oise (Oise, 60), sur les deux entrepôts situés à La Ciotat (Bouches du Rhône, 13) et Narbonne (Aude, 11) et  aussi partout en France grâce à son équipe de commerciaux et techniciens (Infirmiers diplômés d'état et aides soignants). 


Les Domaines d'Activités Stratégiques d'Abena-Frantex sont : 


- La fabrication d'alèses


- La gestion de la continence


- La distribution de produits à usage unique non stériles

Name: Abzac Group
Description:
Les équipes professionnelles d’Abzac accompagnent les clients industriels. Leur expérience et leur savoir-faire permettent le développement de solutions durables innovantes spécifiques et pérennes, adaptées aux exigences des utilisateurs de tubes carton, cornières carton et fûts fibre.

L’approche de développement durable du Groupe Abzac repose sur la proximité, l’écoute, l’innovation et la satisfaction de nos clients au travers de relations de confiance et de partenariat construites dans la durée.

L’innovation durable s’appuie sur la technique pour développer des produits en carton, plus légers tout en restant performants pour réduire l’impact environnemental.
Partenaire industriel, Abzac développe cette stratégie de proximité avec ses clients et des marchés grâce à son réseau d’usines de production de tubes carton, fûts kraft et cornières carton, en Europe et en Amérique du Nord pour une approche circulaire de l’économie.

Name: PaperlinX Europe
Description:
PaperlinX is the world's leading international fine paper merchant and distributor, and a unique Australian manufacturer of high performance communication paper and packaging paper.

We link our customers and suppliers through a global network focused on local market needs

Name: PlantPack by Lifepack
Description:
Lifepack is dedicated to the manufacture and commercialization of packaging made from agroindustrial waste and seeds, with a social and environmentally sustainable model. After use, our product biodegrades and becomes plants, absorbing carbon dioxide from the air and releasing oxygen into the atmosphere to give consumers an alternative to use an ecological product that helps conserve the environment. 

This is done through the use of agricultural waste such as the Pineapple Crown, corn husk, among others, which is our main input and local seeds for the product to become plants such as vegetables, fruits, flowers, etc.

Our products are plates, spoons, cup slives, boxes, packaging, etc.

In our social model we help single mothers, farmers in the region who supply us with agricultural waste and need an additional income to improve their quality of life and thus help their family.

Name: Radeče papir nova & Muflon
Description:
The tradition of producing quality paper in Radeče dates back to 1736. Ever since then, generations have faithfully followed the footsetsps of the paper-mill masters. The expertise based on tradition and the use of modern technology is reflected in the quality of all types of paper that we proudly produce at the mill. 

We are compliant with Environmental management system ISO 14001 and Quality management system 9001. Our FSC certified products ensure that product resources come from appropriately managed forests taking into account the environmental, social and economic aspects of sustainable forest management. 

Our daughter company Muflon proudly supports poople with disablaities by providing suitabale jobs to them.

Name: Pulpak
Description: Producción de piezas de Pulpa moldeada colaborando al cuidado de nuestro planeta mediante la difusión, venta y distribución de innovadores productos 100% biodegradables de excelente calidad y que satisfagan adecuadamente las necesidades de nuestros clientes, con un alto sentido de responsabilidad, adaptabilidad y calidad.

Name: Confédération Belge du Bois
Description:
La Confédération Belge du Bois regroupe, au niveau belge, les secteurs des travaux forestiers, de l’exploitation forestière, du sciage et du négoce de bois.

Elle est née en avril 2017 du regroupement de l’Union Nationale des Entreprises du Bois et de la Fédération Nationale des Scieries, deux organisations actives depuis plus de 60 ans.

La Confédération compte plus de 220 membres.

 Devenez membre de la Confédération Belge du Bois : https://www.confederationbois.be/fr/confederation-belge-du-bois/

 Abonnez-vous à notre magazine Bois Entreprise : https://www.confederationbois.be/fr/bois-entreprise/

Name: Slater Harrison
Description:
Slater Harrison & Co Ltd are manufacturers & converters of fully sustainable metallic paper & board. 

Founded in 1929, we have over 90 years experience within the Paper & Forest Industry. 

Today we're focusing on developing sustainable alternatives to plastic by providing paper coated products which are much more environmentally friendly.

We create exciting, innovative, bespoke solutions for customers as well as an extensive range of standard products.

Our most recent product is CenturaReflect...

CenturaReflect is a fully recyclable, high gloss, metal effect paperboard designed for luxury packaging and graphical applications where high performance and sustainability are paramount.

Available from stock in paper & board weights, it is ideal for luxury cartons & boxes, promotional advertising, covers, sleeves, stationery, greeting cards, and point of sale display.

Learn more by visiting our website.

Name: Bindals Papers Mills Limited
Description:
The Bindal Legacy: Building a Sustainable Tomorrow
At Bindals, our journey began with a steadfast commitment to
sustainability and innovation. Focused on the paper industry,
we have dedicated ourselves to creating eco-conscious
solutions that honor our planet. By integrating responsible
practices into every aspect of our operations, we strive to
redefine the balance between industry and nature.
While paper remains our core focus, our vision extends far
beyond. We aspire to expand into new frontiers, including
sugar and ethanol, where we can continue to leverage
sustainable practices and innovation to make a meaningful
impact. Each step we take is guided by the belief that
progress should never come at the cost of the environment.
As Bindals grows, we remain rooted in our values, determined
to create products and processes that contribute to a greener,more responsible future. Our story is one of ambition,
purpose, and unwavering dedication to a better tomorrow..

Name: Europapier Polska
Description:
Od lat wyznaczamy standardy na rynku dystrybucji papierów poligraficznych, biurowych, tektury, mediów do reklamy oraz papierów i środków do utrzymania higieny w firmach. Europapier Polska w Polsce od 1991 roku.

Wiodąca pozycja rynkowa w Polsce i CEE oraz obecność w strukturze branżowej potęgi holdingu Heinzel to gwarancja stabilności finansowej, niezawodności i atrakcyjnych warunków współpracy.

Naszym celem jest osiągnięcie pozycji preferowanego partnera Klientów odnoszących sukces i strategicznych dostawców na obsługiwanych rynkach. Strategia firmy oparta jest na pasji i zaangażowaniu pracowników do tworzenia dla nich indywidualnych rozwiązań i wartości dodanych. 

Firma inwestuje w długofalowy, rentowny rozwój organiczny jak i aktywnie poszukuje możliwości ekspansji dopasowanej do strategii i platformy logistycznej. 

Europapier podąża przy tym za najnowszymi trendami w nowoczesnej dystrybucji. Digitalizacja jest szansą na zwiększenie efektywności sprzedaży i rozwój jakości świadczonych usług.

Magazyn centralny o powierzchni 20 tys. m2 znajduje się w Błoniu k. Warszawy. Grupa doświadczonych przedstawicieli handlowych i dział obsługi zapewniają szybki kontakt z Klientem. 

Dzięki współpracy z wiodącymi producentami na całym świecie, Europapier Polska oferuje produkty wysokiej jakości, spełniające oczekiwania najbardziej wymagających odbiorców. W 2007 roku firma uzyskała certyfikat potwierdzający zgodność funkcjonowania organizacji z wymogami ISO 9001:2000, zaś w 2008 roku, jako jeden z pierwszych dystrybutorów w Polsce, otrzymała certyfikaty środowiskowe FSC i PEFC.

Name: DIVERUS
Description:
DIVERUS - your partner for wood since 2004. A leading company in Europe region involved in the round wood (logs) and sawn wood (lumber) (spruce, pine, birch) import-export industry.

We raise our business with energy, attentiveness, and caring in partnerships with our suppliers and buyers, resourcefully fulfilling clients’ needs, ensuring the quality of wood, applying smart logistic solutions, and therefore successfully operating in different countries of the world.

Our company values are responsibility, trust, cooperation, professionalism & self-improvement. We raise our business by being responsible for nature conservation, trusting our team members, cooperating with our suppliers, and investing in self-improvement to be professionals for our clients. 

With a worldwide network of supplying round and sawn timber, DIVERUS is focused on providing market-leading choice, quality, service, and value. Our main purchasing markets are Ukraine, Lithuania, Germany, the Czech Republic, Poland, Latvia, Estonia, and France. Our main sales markets: are China, South Korea, Vietnam, India, Pakistan, and West Europe countries. The headquarters are in Vilnius (Lithuania).

Name: M/s Star Paper Mills Limited
Description: Paper Manufacturing company (A Unit of Duncan Goenka Group)

Name: SADEK GROUP for Investment - مجموعة صادق للإستثمار
Description: Sadek group for investment is a commercial agency in the field of Book Printing / Offset Printing Finishing / Packaging Industry / Paper manufacturing / Paper recycling / Pulping / Corrugated Board Industry

Name: American Paper Converting
Description: American Paper, APC, is a manufacturer of towel and tissue products with state of the art facilities in Washington State and Virginia serving nationwide customers.  APC has been serving the commercial market and health care for over 20 years.  APC provides a complete line of sustainable quality towel, tissue and dispensers with innovative solutions at a competitive pricing.     APC brands,  EcoGreen , is green seal certified.  APC is women and minority owned.  Our products are made from virgin or Green Seal certified recycled paper.  APC growth is the result of its commitment to outstanding customer service by delivering the product on time, meeting quality expectations, providing innovative products at a competitive price.

Name: Al Watania Paper Products (WAPER)
Description:
Al Watania Paper Products (WAPER) was formed in 1981 with a paid capital of SR 15 Million and a production capacity of 15000 MT of cartons and 15000 bundles of egg trays .Since then, neither financial investment nor technical development hasn’t ceased and a capacity of 150,000 MT of cartons and 960,000 bundles of egg trays per annum is achieved. Since its inauguration WAPER has grown with each major challenge to meet the growing sophistication of the industrial development in Saudi Arabia. This is most evident in the latest and most modern technologies employed in WAPER. Moreover, WAPER built on a sound, solid foundation, remains firm in its resolve, to be constantly at the forefront of the industry, and the technical innovations therein. WAPER is hiring a high qualified and specialized employees to take the company well beyond the foreseeable future.    

 
 
WAPER is a strategic unit owned by Al-Watania for Industries. WAPER, as it stands now, is a premier factory specialized in producing corrugated carton products and egg trays in the GCC Region and Middle East.

WAPER incepted operations in 1401H, 1981through its Riyadh Carton Factory with production capacity of 15,000 MT of corrugated carton and 15,000 bundles of egg trays. The production capacity escalated rapidly until it hits now 150,000 MT of corrugated carton and 960,000 bundles of egg trays.

WAPER has two integral plants producing corrugated cartons in Riyadh and Jeddah plus the Egg Trays Plant in Riyadh.

Building on our continuing aspirations to produce high quality products in terms of strength and printing techniques, our production lines are continuously overseen by our quality assurance staff to ensure supplying products to our customers according to their required specifications, which enables WAPER to be one of the leading companies to be certified under ISO 9001:2000.

Name: NILE PAPER
Description: FLUTTING , TESTLINER, TOP KRAFT , WHITE TOP

Name: BOIS ET SCIAGE DE L'OGOOUE
Description:
Créée en 1998 la société Bois et Sciage de l'Ogooué , est une Entreprise d'Exploitation Forestière et de première transformation du bois.  Le bois transformé est essentiellement vendu à l'exportation . 
Avec près de 500 salariés de nationalités diverses, BSO est un acteur majeur dans le tissu économique et social du Gabon.

Name: Spinnaker
Description:
Founded in 1928, formerly Brown-Bridge Mills, Spinnaker Coating is a pressure sensitive material manufacturer providing personalized service to the label printing and converting industry.  

At Spinnaker Coating we are committed to being recognized as the outstanding service provider in the pressure sensitive industry.  To achieve that goal we strive to create a high level of confidence in the minds of our customers that we will meet or exceed their expectations every time.  

Slitting distribution centers include: California, Georgia, Illinois and New York

Name: PT. Aspex Kumbong (Korindo Group)
Description: KORINDO’s Paper Division which located in Cileungsi, Bogor. Core business of PT. Aspex Kumbong is paper industry, particularly newspaper paper industry. The company was founded in 1983 and headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

Name: JPJ-Wood Oy
Description:
JPJ-Wood was founded in 1994. At first a log sorting line and a dimension plant was built and logs were sawn by a rented saw on wheels. In 1997 a fixed sawline was completed and during the next 10 years annual sawn timber volume increased evenly to the level of 100 000 m3

During years 2006-2016 JPJ-Wood has done extensive investments and modernizations. Most important was all new sawline, capable to handle and saw efficiently logs from 12 cm thind end up to 40 cm. In 2016 annual capacity will grow to over 150 000 m3 of sawn timber in two working shifts.

Majority of our production is exported to the countries of Europe, North Africa, Middle East and Asia. High quality raw material is acquired within a 150 km radius of the sawmill and it is 100 % Finnish.

JPJ-Wood aims to be dynamic and reliable company in the traditional field of sawmilling. Our philosophy is to do our part in wood processing efficiently and tailored to the custumer’s needs. We pay special attention to exact use of valuable raw material and to wood harvesting and processing in the way of sustainable deveploment.

As a family company our ambition is that our working environmet is united, informal and goal-oriented. This makes our work quality good and creates good relationships with our customers and partners.

Name: SUPREME PAPER MILLS LTD.
Description:
Established in 1982 by the visionary Late Sri Nand Lal Todi, Supreme Paper Mills. Ltd. has evolved into a leading manufacturer of paper and paper products in India. We started from humble beginnings as a manufacturer of writing, printing, and board products but we grew quickly to cater to the diverse needs of our consumers in West Bengal and across the north eastern region of India. 
Under the astute leadership of Raj Kumar Todi we have embarked on a mission to revolutionize the paper industry. We pioneered the iconic Cheetah brand of dista khata noteboooks over forty years ago. Over the years we have diversified our product offerings to meet the dynamic demands of the market. Today, we proudly present a comprehensive range of notebooks under the brand names Maxmind, Royale, and Jet. These brands have swiftly become synonymous with excellence and reliability making us the preferred choice among students, professionals, and businesses alike.
In line with our commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction, we have recently ventured into the hygiene sector with our latest offering – Sofmax tissue products. As India's educational and hygiene sectors continue to witness rapid growth, we are poised to leverage our expertise and infrastructure to cater to emerging needs and opportunities.
As we journey forward, we invite you to partner with us in our pursuit of excellence. Whether you are a student seeking the perfect notebook, a business in need of reliable paper solutions, or an individual prioritizing hygiene and cleanliness, Supreme Paper Mills. Ltd. is here to serve you. Together, let us write a brighter future, one page at a time.

Name: Two Sides Italia
Description:
Two Sides è un’iniziativa della filiera della comunicazione su carta: dalle piantagioni di alberi alla produzione di cellulosa e carta, dagli inchiostri ai prodotti chimici, dai macchinari pre-stampa e stampa all’editoria fino agli operatori postali.
Tutti impegnati a promuovere scelte e comportamenti responsabili nella produzione della carta e nei processi di stampa.

Name: Gorman Bros. Lumber Ltd.
Description: Manufacturers of quality wood products since 1951. Family owned and operated, and located in the beautiful Okanagan Valley.  We pride ourselves on extracting the highest value from our raw products, and work closely with the communities to ensure the best use of their resources.

Name: AL ZEINA TISSUE MILL
Description:
Zeina Group was founded in Egypt in 1988 by Engineer Abd El Karim Natout. The Group's converting plant marked the launch of Zeina brand of tissue products which grew to become a household name for pocket, facial and other tissue products. The focus on quality rapidly earned the company the reputation of excellence and contributed to the current leading position in the Egyptian market.

The establishment of Al Zeina Tissue Mill in 2008 came as a key milestone to Zeina Group, with an annual production capacity of 32000 tons per annum. Driven by a vision of excellence, Zeina Group worked closely with Georgia Pacific, a global leading player in the tissue industry to design a state of the art plant, with a total area of 88500 m2 in the 10th of Ramadan City. Sophisticated technology and high-tech modules guarantee consistent quality products that have earned the trust and confidence of clients, not only in the Middle East region, but also in Europe and South America.
Al Zeina Tissue Mill production line features a 2.7 meter wide crescent former machine with cutting edge technology supplied by PMT of Italy. The process uses 100% virgin pulp with tissue output of various tissue grades ranging from 13.8 gsm to 40 gsm. This range provides the flexibility needed to cover the requirements of diverse products ranging from facial tissue to medical rolls. 
Al Zeina Tissue Mill employs 250 able employees who are dedicated to producing world class quality tissue products that meet the latest ISO standards.

Name: KPNB Komponenten+Partner NicoleBuschmeier
Description:
Matchmaking specialist suppliers and services for sustainable process improvement in the paper industry. Contact us for your challenges!
Our partners have the customer need as focus - this is the KPNB philosophy! We offer support and help to find YOUR solution. 
KPNB is your 1 contact to find your solutions for projects, optimisations and maintenance from pulper to finished paper and board converting.
-efficient systems and components for all areas in the paper mill
-high life-time of products - manufactured in Germany, Finnland and Czech Republic - using high quality materials
-unique measuring devices developed exclusively for the paper industry

Name: EDT-Enzymatic Deinking Technologies, LLC
Description:
EDT is a bio-industrial, value-added manufacturer of enzyme formulations employing biologically produced enzymes from renewable resources to solve traditional pulp & paper industry problems. 

EDT's customized enzyme-based treatments can improve upon or replace traditional chemistries and have superior performance and environmental benefits. Consulting and selling internationally to the world's leading pulp and paper manufacturers, our customized applications and consulting approach help the mills reduce total costs, improve pulp quality, streamline operations and enable environmental compliance.

Founded in 1994, EDT's mission is to be the worldwide leader in providing enzyme-based solutions to problems and opportunities of the pulp and paper industry.  We are committed to the concept that enzymes provide the best alternative for addressing issues in an industry based on natural materials.

Name: A&J Scott Ltd
Description:
A&J Scott Ltd is a leading independent UK home grown sawmill, providing a flexible, versatile service to customers nationwide.
We supply sawn softwood timber for a wide variety of uses, principally in the outdoor and garden products, fencing, landscaping, DIY and pallet and packaging sectors.
We are also one of the country's leading hardwood round timber merchants, providing hardwood logs of all species and qualities to customers of varying sizes.
Established in 1960 and still operating from the original site in Northumberland, the company now employs over 150 people. With family ownership and a strong team of long term employees, the company's vast knowledge of timber and enviable, experienced skill base provides top quality products supported by unrivaled standards of service.
Continuing investment in state of the art production facilities supports our ability to produce large volumes of consistently high quality products, serving an increasingly diverse customer base.

Name: EuropaFi
Description:
EuropaFi est la filiale papetière de la Banque de France qui a été créée le 27 octobre 2015. Cette unité industrielle est implantée sur le site de Vic-Le-Comte depuis 1923.

La filialisation de la Papeterie de la Banque de France a été décidée afin de permettre la création d’un pôle papetier au sein de l’Eurosystème et d’asseoir sa place de principal producteur de papier fiduciaire de la zone euro (environ 3500 tonnes de papier par an) et de devenir l’usine papetière la plus moderne d’Europe.

Name: Krafir
Description: Somos un Grupo Corporativo cuyo negocio principal es la fabricación y conversión de papel para empaque y embalaje, 100% reciclado y reciclable, con el fin de satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes en este ámbito; reinvirtiendo en la mejora continua de productos, procesos, servicio y en el desarrollo personal y profesional de nuestros colaboradores.

Name: Westas Group Oy
Description: Westas Group is a financially solvent, independent Finnish sawmill company known for its good reputation both locally and globally. We produce high-quality spruce and pine sawn timber for further processing to companies in over 30 countries. The foundation of our operations lies in an experienced and highly motivated staff and long-term customer relationships.

Name: INMASERGE
Description:
Somos una empresa peruana e innovadora dedicada a la comercialización de madera, asesoría en SSOMA y  Mejora de Procesos. 

Nuestra principal ventaja competitiva es trabajar con insumos de buena calidad; y nuestro mayor respaldo es la experiencia con la madera y asesorías, brindando la satisfacción a nuestros clientes. Le ofrecemos calidad en nuestros productos y servicios.


MISIÓN:

En INMASERGE S.A.C. ofrecemos productos madereros y asesorías de gestión empresarial para el sector Industrial, Construcción, Minería y Retails, respaldado por nuestro compromiso con la Calidad, Seguridad y Medio Ambiente.

VISIÓN:

En INMASERGE S.A.C buscamos ser la empresa líder en el Mercado Nacional, brindando excelencia en nuestros productos y servicios, con un personal comprometido y en constante crecimiento, impactando en el desarrollo sostenible.

Name: Richwood Industries, Inc.
Description: Richwood Industries, located in Grand Rapids, MI, has been a leader in the wood manufacturing industry since its founding in 1988. Name: GODAVARI PULP AND PAPER MILLS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
GODAVARI PULP AND PAPER MILLS PRIVATE LIMITED is a paper & forest products company based out of Gut No.405, Lakhamapur,, Nashik, Maharashtra, India.

Godavari Pulp and Paper Mills Pvt. Ltd was incorporated on the 8th of November 1994 as a Private Limited Company under the Companies Act 1956. 

The Company was set up as a Recycled Fibre Paper Mill for manufacturing Kraft Paper / Fluting Paper. Currently, it has a production capacity of 325 TPD, comprising of two machines with Deckel of 2.15m and 3.65m. GPM has been in the kraft paper industry for 25 years now.

GPM has been consistently delivering quality products by the process of up gradation and development, using new technology to maintain pace with changing requirements of the customers and to ensure that we give quality products at the most economical price.

We are deeply committed to the cause of preserving the environment as seen by our environmentally friendly practices leading to energy conservation and savings. Detailed energy audits are conducted from time to time including all thermal and electrical equipment and various energy-saving measures as proposed are implemented in a scheduled manner.

Implementation of some of such proposals has resulted in reduced power consumption which has added to the profitability and economic viability of the Company. The Company has also set up state of the art effluent treatment facilities leading to zero liquid discharge thereby recycling 100% of the effluent generated. We also have an Electrostatic Precipitator and do maintain an air exhaust SPM of under 50 PPM in the exhaust flue gas.

We reuse overground resources from the past, to recycle them into paper today so that we can save the future. Which further leads to a circular economy of resources.

Name: NexGen Tree Shelters
Description:
Tree shelters help establish and protect young trees, so they have a vital role in the global drive to create new forests and woodlands. However, currently, most tree shelters are made from plastic. At least 700 million plastic shelters have been used in the UK, with some reports saying it could be as many as 2 billion. 

NexGen Tree Shelters offers an environmentally friendly replacement for plastic shelters and nylon cable ties. We make our tree shelters, shrub shelters, spiral guards and vole guards from a mix of British wool, a biodegradable polyol made from ethically sourced cashew nutshell liquid and castor oil, and an innovative biodegradable custom polymer. Our metal ties are releasable, and we package everything using recyclable cardboard strapping and compostable bags.

NexGen shelters are:

✓     100% biodegradable
✓     pH neutral 
✓ 	ecotoxicity neutral
✓ 	proven to last five years 
✓ 	cost-effective as you don’t need to collect or recycle them

They create a nourishing micro-environment that protects your young trees and promotes healthy plants and strong growth. When the tree is established, the shelters break down into CO2, H2O and nitrogen and become food for micro-organisms.

Because of our innovative material technology, we believe, in partnership with our customers and suppliers, we can make a significant contribution to:

•	Mitigate climate change
•	Support the growing demand for timber
•	Support the urgent need to plant new forests
•	Reduce the environmental impact of plastic in our countryside
•	Support UK sheep farmers with a new and sustainable market

We’re also researching new uses for our material technology. If you think it can be applied in your industry, please get in touch. We’d be happy to talk to you. 

Website: http://www.nexgen-ts.com

Phone: 01252 755333

Name: ND PAPER (MALAYSIA) SDN BHD
Description:
NINE DRAGONS PAPER (HOLDINGS) LIMITED was founded in 1995 and listed in Hong Kong on March 3, 2006, and is the first and only paper group with an annual production capacity of more than 10 million tons at China.

    ND PAPER headquartered in Dongguan, Guangdong province, owns 8 production bases in China ( a total of 40 internationally advanced paper production lines, 5 specialty paper production lines and about 17,000 employees), and one production base in Vietnam, 4 pulp and paper mills in the United States (acquired in 2018).

    In 2019, ND PAPER acquired a pulp and paper mill in Bentong, Pahang, Malaysia, and invested about $ 1 billion in a papermaking base in Banting, Selangor, Malaysia. The base of Banting has a total land area of about 670 acres. We will build the world's advanced high-speed paper machines, supporting natural gas power plants, sewage treatment plants, office and dormitory living areas and other facilities on it. The completion of the project will provide more local employment opportunities and taxes revenue, and contribute its own strength to the development of Malaysia.

    So, would you like to join our family?

Name: Shanying International Holdings Co., LTD
Description:
Shanying International Holding Co., Ltd. is an international enterprise integrating recycled fiber, paper making, packaging, printing, environmental protection, trade, logistics, port and wharf. It was listed on Shanghai Stock Exchange in 2001 with stock code 600567, and headquartered in Shanghai.
By November 2018, Shanying International owes 9 papermaking companies at home and abroad (Anhui Ma'an Shan, Zhejiang Jiaxing, Hubei Jingzhou, Fujian Zhangzhou, Nordic Sweden / Norway, Kentucky, USA). It has 23 packaging ,printing, design, sales and production companies , 19 international trade enterprises, 5 land logistics, port and wharf enterprises, 2 investment and financing enterprises, and 2 environmental protection enterprises. Among them, 3 paper-making enterprises are high-technology enterprises, and 1 paper-making enterprise is a postdoctoral research workstation. In 2018, Shanying International ranked No. 416 in Fortune China's top 500 enterprises and Top 10 in China's light industry with the third largest output of wrapping paper in China.
Ecological Shanying, Centennial Foundation. Shanying International has always regarded green, low carbon, environmental protection and sustainable development as the life of enterprise development. Not at the cost of ecological destruction, industrial wrapping paper was produced from recycled fiber, 4.5 million tons of recycled fiber were recovered annually, and 200,000 hectares of forest resources were protected.
Adhering to the enterprise values of "integrity, care, passion and responsibility," Shanying International has taken the mission of "leading to create, share and win-win industrial civilization," and "becoming the most valuable and creative eco-enterprise in the world" as its vision. Committed to building a new pattern of industrial ecology.

Name: Kağıt Üreticileri
Description:
Kimsiniz diye soracak olursanız, biz "SirPrograming" takımıyız. Her ne kadar bilgisayar programcılığı ile uğraşsak da, kağıt sektörü içinden gelen takım arkadaşlarımızla Türkiye'deki kağıt sektörüne hizmet etmeyi planlamaktayız.
Türkiye'deki kağıtçılığın dünü ve bugünü bilgilerini derleyerek gelecek için yeni vizyonların oluşmasına yardımcı olmak istemekteyiz. Bu görüş doğrultusunda, sektör paydaşlarının bilgiye kolay erişimini amaçlayarak sitemizi 2021 yılı içinde yayına açıyoruz.
Türkiye Kağıt sektörü bazında her ne kadar  Türkiye'ye odaklanılsa da , Türkiye Kağıt Sektörünün Avrupa pazarı ve dünyadaki gelişmelerden etkilenmeleri kaçınılmazdır. Bu nedenle bilgilendirmeler bir bütünü tamamlamak amacıyla çeşitlendirilmesi düşünülmektedir.

If you ask who we are, we are the "SirPrograming" team. Although we deal with computer programming, we plan to serve the paper industry in Turkey with our teammates from the paper industry.
We want to help create new visions for the future by compiling past and present information about papermaking in Turkey. In line with this view, we are launching our website in 2021, aiming for easy access to information for industry stakeholders.
Although the Turkish Paper Industry focuses on Turkey, it is inevitable that the Turkish Paper Industry will be affected by the developments in the European market and the world. For this reason, it is planned to diversify the information in order to complete the whole.

Name: Fibre Circle
Description: Fibre Circle is a government-recognised producer responsibility organisation for the paper and paper packaging sector. It facilitates extended producer responsibility (EPR) programmes (as per Section 18 of the National Environmental Management Waste Act, Act No 59 of 2008) for paper manufacturers and importers as well as brand owners and retailers. PAMDEV, trading as Fibre Circle, has been established and mandated by most South African paper manufacturers and importers as the recognised PRO for the paper and paper packaging industry. It has public benefit status and is registered with the Department of Forestry, Fisheries and Environment (DFFE).

Name: OG Hemp
Description:
OG Hemp is India’s pioneering manufacturer of 100% hemp-based paper and packaging solutions—designed for eco-conscious brands, global white-label partners, and sustainable product companies.

 Our mission is to eliminate tree-based and plastic-based paper by offering chemical-free, compostable, and carbon-negative hemp alternatives. From packaging to stationery, we provide premium products that don’t just look good—they protect the planet.

 What We Offer:
- Hemp-based mono cartons, rigid boxes, and pouches (28g to 1kg)
- Handmade diaries, business cards, seed paper, and stationery
- Custom-branded and white-label options for global partners

 Trusted by conscious businesses in India, the UK, Europe, Australia, and the USA, OG Hemp products are:

- FSC-free, plastic-free, and compliant with compostable norms
- Made in India using indian-grown hemp and artisanal methods
- Designed for impact, with lower water usage and zero trees cut

 Whether you're a D2C brand, organic product manufacturer, wellness company, or premium gift supplier, we’re here to help you ditch plastic, ditch wood, and switch to plant-based alternatives.

 Explore collaborations, samples, and pricing at: dm@oghemp.in
 Learn more: www.oghemp.in

Name: APP Canada

Moreover, APP Canada have further illustrated the development of their company through the diversification of their product portfolio. Although the company is prominently recognized for their photocopy and printing paper products, APP have also come to be known for their packaging boards and speciality paper products. Name: CULAUD
