Nous travaillons toutes les essences de bois : feuillus, exotiques, résineux, mais aussi les panneaux de contreplaqués, de médium, d’osb ou de Kerto.
Notre équipement et notre équipe nous permettent de répondre à la plupart de vos besoins : rabotage, moulurage,  collage,  perçage, usinage sur commande numérique,rainures arrêtées, cintres, gougeage mais aussi assemblage par collage, tenons mortaises, tourillons, vissage…le chant des possibles est très large.

Nous vous proposons une prestation complète de la conception à la finition : vernissage, huilage, laquage, traitement autoclave…

Assisté par notre bureau d’études, nos technico commerciaux étudierons avec vous la meilleur solution pour réaliser votre projet : choix de l’essence , faisabilité technique, dessin, prototypage, délais, prix .

 Confiez nous vos projets de marches d’escaliers, main courantes, moulures, plans de travail, cintres mais aussi platelages, brises soleil ou bardages.... Nous sommes au service de votre imagination...

Name: PT WKS Asia Pulp & Paper Group
EGGER Polska
Description:
Firma EGGER powstała w 1961 roku i jest stale rozwijającym się przedsiębiorstwem rodzinnym, działającym na arenie międzynarodowej, które zatrudnia około 11000 osób. W 22 zakładach na całym świecie wytwarzamy szeroką gamę produktów drewnopochodnych (płyty wiórowe, płyty OSB, MDF, blaty kuchenne), panele podłogowe oraz tarcicę. 

W Biskupcu powstała fabryka Egger, najnowocześniejsza w całej grupie, wyposażona w innowacyjne maszyny i technologie. Produkowanych w niej jest ok. 650 tys. m3 płyt wiórowych. Obecnie zespół EGGER Biskupiec liczy 560 pracowników i stale się rozwija.

W roku budżetowym 2022/2023 obroty całej Grupy EGGER wyniosły 4 449,7 mln EUR . Posiadamy szeroką sieć dystrybucji w zakresie produktów drewnopochodnych. 

Produkty EGGER mają zastosowanie w wielu obszarach życia prywatnego i publicznego, w tym w kuchniach, łazienkach, sypialniach, biurach, hotelach i sklepach. 
Jesteśmy dostawcą pełnego asortymentu produktów dla przemysłu meblarskiego, aranżacji wnętrz, budownictwa konstrukcyjnego oraz sektora podłóg.
Oprócz naszych produktów budowlanych wykonanych z prawdziwego drewna, wszystkie nasze pokazane i wymienione dekory są reprodukcjami i oferują trwałe i wysokiej jakości, modne rozwiązania dla pomieszczeń prywatnych i przestrzeni komercyjnych. 
Stopka redakcyjna: https://to.egger.link/imprint
Deklaracja ochrony danych: https://to.egger.link/data-protection-declaration

Name: Kastamonu Bulgaria
Description:
Kastamonu Entegre е глобална компания, която поддържа своя непрекъснат цикъл на производство в дървообработващата индустрия повече от половин век. Тя притежава производствени мощности в 6 държави и инвестиции в Румъния, България, Босна и Херцеговина, Русия, Италия и Турция. В САЩ притежава дружество, което извършва доставки на дървесен чипс и логистични процеси. 
Kastamonu Entegre e четвъртата по големина компания в света, в сектора и е сред трите най-големи производители в Европа. Тя е един от четирите най-големи производители в света за всяка от основните си продуктови групи - МДФ, плочи от дървесни частици, ламиниран паркет и пана за врати. Компанията осигурява 7% от световното производство на ламинирани подови настилки. Kastamonu Entegre е лидер в индустрията с експорт към 100 държави, на 6 континента. Компанията е носител на приза „Най-голям турски инвеститор в Италия “, а също така е и най-големия производител и износител на МДФ в Русия.
С консолидиран оборот от 1,9 милиарда долара и своя потенциал, знания и опит в производството, компанията осигурява работа на повече от 7 500 служители в своите местни и международни производствени предприятия и офиси. Със своите производствени мощности и общ годишен производствен капацитет на дървесни плоскости от 6,5 млн. м³, компанията задоволява потребностите на мебелната и строителната промишленост, както и на интериорния дизайн със своите продукти - плочи от дървесни частици (ПДЧ), ламинирани плочи от дървесни частици (ЛПДЧ), МДФ, ламиниран МДФ, ламиниран паркет, работни плотове и пана за врати. Производственият обем на компанията осигурява обзавеждането на жилищните пространства на 4500 жилища всеки ден.

Stowarzyszenie Papierników Polskich jest organizacją o charakterze naukowo-technicznym i menedżerskim, skupiającą członków indywidualnych oraz podmioty gospodarcze, których działalność jest związana z papiernictwem i dziedzinami pokrewnymi.

Celem działalności Stowarzyszenia jest:
*integracja papierników, kultywowanie tradycji stowarzyszeniowych i dokumentowanie historii papiernictwa, a także kształtowanie wśród członków etyki zawodowej, koleżeńskiej solidarności i wzajemnej pamięci,
*reprezentowanie środowiska papierników wobec organów administracji publicznej i samorządu gospodarczego,
*prowadzenie działalności naukowo-technicznej, obejmującej podnoszenie kwalifikacji i popularyzację wiedzy w dziedzinie papiernictwa i w dziedzinach pokrewnych, a w szczególności: zbieranie, przetwarzanie i upowszechnianie informacji dotyczących ilości i jakości produkcji, nowych wyrobów, surowców i półproduktów, eksploatacji maszyn i urządzeń, kontroli i automatyzacji procesów produkcyjnych, energetyki, ochrony środowiska, bezpieczeństwa pracy oraz zagadnień ekonomiczno-organizacyjnych.

Horse or Large Animal Bedding: With national availability and a strict raw material selection, processing and bagging process, AWF can provide product solutions from shavings to pellets.
Wood Flour: AWF manufactures many different grades of wood flour for a wide array of applications.

For more than four decades, American Wood Fibers, Inc. has also been a trusted name in freight transportation. In 2006, we established AWF Express, LLC as a subsidiary dedicated to the trucking industry.

With a workforce of over 400 dedicated team members spread across our 11 locations throughout the United States, we recognize that our ongoing success hinges on the skill, ingenuity, and drive of each member of our team. Name: VPF GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
For more than 55 years VPF has been supporting and shaping the European market for self-adhesive materials and coatings as an idea generator, reliable partner and problem solver.
Expertise and a strong focus on customer and market needs are the foundations on which we develop innovative solutions. With our state-of-the-art production facilities, dedication and flexibility, we turn these solutions into quality products for paper and film applications of all kinds.
Our standard portfolio already offers a huge variety of options to cover all application areas (pharmaceuticals, medical, chemical and engineering industry, food and beverages, cosmetics, logistics, and much more).
And developing new, personalised and tailor-made self-adhesive solutions is part of our daily business. Innovative – flexible – versatile.

UNIQUE VPF MODULAR SYSTEM

The secret of VPF’s success is our consistent focus on non-standard self-adhesive materials, with adhesive-free zones, coloured adhesives and other custom specifications, with fast delivery and small minimum order quantities.
This is based on the unique VPF modular system comprising more than 200 film and paper labelstocks, over 25 specialty adhesives covering all modern self-adhesive technologies, and a large variety of siliconised paper and film liners with different release values.
In addition to this, VPF‘s long experience in the self-adhesive labels market makes us a reliable partner for contract coating and the development of special solutions to meet specific customer needs.

Name: American Eagle Paper Mills
Description:
Nestled in the rolling hills of Pennsylvania’s eastern Allegheny Mountains, American Eagle Paper Mills serves as the lifeblood of the town of Tyrone and its surrounding community. Built in the 1880’s, the mill operated contiguously, until 2001, when its former owner, MeadWestvaco, unexpectedly ceased operations at the facility. Jobs were lost. Families were devastated. The mill whistle fell silent.

In 2003, a group of local investors, past mill managers, and business leaders came together with a plan to revive the paper mill, under the name of American Eagle Paper Mills. With a vision of sustainability, the team set out to rebuild a paper mill that could sustain the families of Tyrone by producing papers sustainably with recycled fiber. Using integrated deinking technology, the mill would convert paper waste into premium uncoated printing and writing papers.

American Eagle Paper Mills produces 300 tons of recycled paper products daily. That is the equivalent of converting 15 truckloads of paper waste into premium printing, writing and specialty papers. The mill employs 250 people, up over 40% from the startup in 2003.

In 2016, the company further strengthened its commitment to sustainability with an $8 million investment replacing its 1957 coal fired boiler with a highly efficient natural gas boiler. The new energy source, combined with an upgraded power distribution system in the mill, dramatically reduced greenhouse gas emissions, lowered water intake by 82 %, and positioned AEPM for future sustainable growth into new paper markets.

As we look to the future, American Eagle Paper Mills will continue to bring recycled papers into new markets and to new customers. Stay tuned for updates as we continue to Soar to a New Dimension of Green.

Name: Forest Products Society
Description:
The Forest Products Society (FPS) is an international not-for-profit technical association founded in 1947. FPS is the only professional organization for individuals that provides an information network for all segments of the forest products industry. Membership is open to all interested individuals and organizations.

Society members represent a broad range of professional interests including private and public research and development, industrial management and production, marketing, education, government, engineering and consulting. The Society convenes technical conferences, produces several journals including the peer-reviewed Forest Products Journal and publishes books on topics of relevance to the forest products industry.

Our Mission is to connect research and science to industry - fostering innovation and the providing resources for current and future generations of forest product professionals.

It produces eucalyptus pulp, a hardwood pulp used by paper manufacturers (Tissue, PW, Decor and Imaging). Site: http://www.aracruz.com.br

Name: Sopasta Papel e Embalagem
Description:
Nós somos a Sopasta. Desde 1952, inovamos e fazemos história na fabricação de papel e na produção de embalagens de papel ondulado.

Somos uma empresa de capital 100% nacional, que, por meio da gestão e da relação que desenvolvemos com os nossos clientes, colaboradores, comunidade e meio ambiente, nos tornamos uma referência na produção de papel e embalagens.

Name: Mazurky - Além da Caixa
Description:
Na Mazurky, papelão ondulado e PP corrugado ganham forma, propósito e estratégia.

Desde 2004, somos referência nacional na fabricação de embalagens e soluções visuais, com foco em inovação, qualidade e sustentabilidade. Atuamos com tecnologia de ponta, transformando do kraft pesado ao reciclado, e também estruturas em PP corrugado, para atender com excelência diferentes setores do mercado.

Acreditamos que uma embalagem vai muito além da proteção: é comunicação, experiência e conexão com a marca. Por isso, investimos continuamente em processos eficientes, impressão digital de alta performance e uma estrutura robusta que garante agilidade, personalização e excelência em cada projeto.

O Grupo Mazurky também reúne empresas que ampliam nossa atuação: Eu Amo Papelão e Vai na Caixa, reforçando nossa presença no setor com criatividade, inteligência e versatilidade.

Com sede no ABC Paulista e atuação em todo o Brasil, seguimos firmes no propósito de ser uma empresa confiável, inovadora e sustentável — entregando mais do que embalagens: entregando soluções que impulsionam negócios.

Name: Slovak Hygienic Paper Group (SHP Group)
Description:
•We are the largest producer of tissue paper products in Central and Eastern Europe.
•SHP Group consists of 4 production mills and 3 business branches with headquarters in Bratislava
•We sell our products in 46 countries, focusing on the markets of Central & Eastern Europe, and DACH region.
•Four manufacturing plants of SHP Group produce 176 thousand tons per year.
•The paper production in our company has a long standing tradition since 1817.
•SHP Group has more than 1 300 employees.
•Our majority shareholder, Eco Investment, is one of the strongest financial groups.

Name: PT. Baratama Putra Perkasa
Description:
Kami merupakan Perusahaan Swasta Nasional yang bergerak dibidang Hutan Tanaman Industri (HTI)
dengan Comudity Acasia & Eucalyptus dengan Lokasi Kerja di Kalimantan Tengah

Name: Karton Ambalaj Sanayicileri Derneği
Description:
KASAD – Karton Ambalaj Sanayicileri Derneği 
1991 tarihinde kurulmuş olup,  halen Türkiye'nin en büyük 42 karton ambalaj üreticisi firmasından 61 asil üyesi ve onların en önemli tedarikçileri olan 30 fahri üyesini ile Türkiye karton ambalaj pazarının % 70 inden fazlasını temsil etmektedir.
Temel amaçları arasında; üyeleri arasında işbirliği ve dayanışmayı sağlamak; mesleki bilgiyi arttırmak, yönetimsel, teknolojik ve bilimsel konularda bilgi alışverişini sağlamak ve üyeleri arasında oluşan ve oluşabilecek mesleki sorunlarını çözümlemek ve ulusal ve uluslararası mevzuattaki değişimleri üyeleri ile paylaşmaktır. 
Üyelerine yönelik eğitimler, paneller, konferanslar biçimindeki mesleki bilgilendirme toplantıları düzenleyen KASAD yurt içi ve yurtdışındaki fuarlara toplu katılım ve ziyaretler de düzenlemektedir. 
Tanıtım toplantıları adını verdiğimiz ve yaz ayları dışında hemen hemen her ay, bir tedarikçimizin sponsorluğunda gerçekleştirdiğimiz toplantılarımızda, tüm üyelerimiz bir araya gelmektedirler. Bu toplantılarda hem tanıtımı yapan tedarikçimiz, firmasını, ürünlerini ve sektördeki güncel gelişmeleri üyelerimizle paylaşmakta, hem de bu toplantılar üyelerin kendi arasında mesleki sohbetler, tartışmalar yaptığı sosyal bir platform olmaktadır. 
Üyelerimiz çalışanları için her yıl karton ambalaj eğitimleri düzenlenmekte ve bu toplantılara da üyelerimiz yoğun ilgi göstermektedirler. 
ASDF Ambalaj Sanayicileri Dernekleri Federasyonunun kurucu üyeleri arasında yerini alan KASAD,  ECMA (European Carton Makers Association) Avrupa Karton Üreticileri Birliğine üyedir. Üyelerimiz ECMA tarafından düzenlenen “European Carton Excellence Award” karton ambalaj yarışmasına her yıl katılmakta ve ödüller almaktadır.
KASAD, Karton Ambalaj Sanayicileri Derneği; "www.kasad.org.tr" web sitesinde karton ambalaj sektörü ile ilgili güncel bilgileri paylaşmaktadır. Ayrıca derneğin sosyal faaliyetlerini paylaştığı “Karton Ambalaj Sanayicileri Derneği” Facebook sayfası bulunmaktadır.

Name: ORIGAMI CELLULO PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
At Origami India, we believe that everyday essentials should be nothing short of exceptional. For nearly three decades, we've been at the forefront of the Indian hygiene landscape, driven by a commitment to quality, convenience, and a better tomorrow. Our consistent dedication has proudly made us India's No. 1 Tissue brand for 10 consecutive years, a monumental achievement that reflects the trust millions of Indian households and businesses place in our superior paper hygiene and disposable solutions.

Founded in 1995, Origami has grown into a household name, synonymous with softness, strength, and reliability. Our extensive product range, including Paper Napkins, Toilet Tissue Rolls, Facial Tissues, Kitchen Towels, Wet Wipes, Paper Plates, Paper Cups, and many more, caters to every individual need.

As a fully integrated operation with state-of-the-art paper mills and converting plants, we're committed to sustainable practices, utilizing environmentally friendly processes and materials. We constantly innovate to bring you products that enhance daily life and contribute to a healthier planet.

Name: NORSKE SKOG GOLBEY
Description:
Norske Skog Golbey is the largest producer of newsprint in Western Europe. Despite the fact that 
the company is operating in a declining paper market, it is supported by a clear strategy, high-quality renewable products, an efficient production plant 
and a skilled workforce. By continuing our research into the bioeconomy and interacting with our stakeholders, we have created conditions that are favourable to the emergence of a true ecosystem 
based on governance by partnership, which helps create value in our local area.

Name: PaperWorks
Description:
PaperWorks is a leading, integrated North American full-service provider of recycled paperboard and specialized folding cartons for packaging applications. The company specializes in providing folding carton solutions for a wide variety of market sectors including food, beverage, personal care, pharmaceuticals, nutraceuticals and medical devices and is also known for its state-of-the art, extended color gamut printing capability, which creates shelf-differentiating graphics.

PaperWorks has invested in state-of-the-art technology over the past three years to upgrade its paperboard mills and folding carton converting plants and be at the forefront of innovation and market differentiation.

Name: Forestry Corporation of NSW
Description:
Forestry Corporation of NSW is the largest manager of commercial native and plantation forests in NSW. We manage these forests for renewable timber production,  environmental sustainability and  recreation and tourism and are proud to take stewardship of more than two million hectares of NSW State forests.

We are Australia's largest grower of plantation pine, producing enough timber to construct a quarter of the houses built in Australia each year, as well as native hardwood timber all certified to internationally recognised standards of sustainability. 

A State Owned Corporation with an independent Board of Directors, our sustainability framework sets out our principles for managing both the forests and our business.

Forestry Corporation and its predecessor Forests NSW have been managing State Forests for timber production, recreation and conservation for over 100 years. 

From foresters to forest modellers, firefighters to ecologists, logistics specialists to Aboriginal partnerships liaisons, Forestry Corporation offers a diverse array of career opportunities in an industry with a sustainable future.

Name: Inapa - Investimentos, Participações e Gestão SA
Description:
Founded in 1965, Inapa Group occupies a position of reference in the European paper distribution market and holds prominent positions in the distribution of packaging and visual communication, with annual sales of approximately 900 million euros. It is the only Portuguese multinational company listed in the paper distribution sector in Europe.

With a team of 1400 employees, Inapa Group operates in 10 countries - Germany, France, Spain, Portugal, Belgium, Luxembourg, Austria, the Netherlands, Turkey and Angola.

Fundado em 1965, o Grupo Inapa ocupa uma posição de referência no mercado Europeu de distribuição de papel e detém posições de relevo na distribuição de embalagem e comunicação visual, com vendas anuais de aproximadamente 900 milhões de euros. É a única empresa portuguesa do setor com presença multinacional e única cotada no setor da distribuição de papel na Europa.

Com uma equipa de 1400 colaboradores, o Grupo Inapa opera em 10 países - Alemanha, França, Espanha, Portugal, Bélgica, Luxemburgo, Áustria, Holanda, Turquia e Angola.

Name: Bras Onda
Description: A Bras-Onda visa atender a crescente demanda de embalagens em papelão ondulado nos mais diversos segmentos do mercado e regiões do Brasil. Oferece produtos e serviços com alta qualidade e que atendam as necessidades de seus clientes onde haja a necessidade de embalamento, seja para proteção, transporte, acondicionamento ou exposição de um produto. Com equipamentos de alta geração e profissionais qualificados, a Bras-Onda tem sempre uma solução em embalagens para você.

Name: Lutepel
Description: A Lutepel Indústria e Comercio de Papel Ltda foi constituída originalmente em 1958. Atualmente a Lutepel conta com uma moderna estrutura, investindo no crescimento e produzindo papéis com qualidade, respeitando o ser humano e o meio ambiente. Somos uma empresa sustentável. Nossos produtos passam por rigorosos testes e inspeções frequentemente. Nos orgulhamos em possuir diversas certificações, que comprovam nosso compromisso com o meio ambiente, e a qualidade do nosso produto final.

Name: Millar Western Forest Products Ltd.
Description:
A Resourceful Company  

Millar Western is an Alberta-based forest products company in business for more than a century. Headquartered in Edmonton and operating an advanced-tech BCTMP mill in Whitecourt, the company produces high-quality pulp for markets around the world. Work where you want to live, and build a rewarding career with a stable, family-oriented business founded on the values of safety, integrity, honesty, trust and respect. Check our website for more, and learn about the huge range of opportunities available in the forest industry through Work Wild http://workwild.ca/ and The Greenest Workforce http://thegreenestworkforce.ca/.

Name: Hoffmaster
Description: Hoffmaster is a premier provider of single-use tableware for the foodservice, consumer goods, and baking industries. From paper plates and napkins to paper straws and contract manufacturing, we continue to lead the industry after 125 years in the business. Our reputation for excellence is upheld by our exceptional products and dedicated team.

Name: Hyne Timber
Description: One of Australia's largest and most successful privately owned timber companies. Hyne is a leader in technology implementation, product development and quality control, with a world-class manufacturing capacity and environmental standards that underpin a commitment to sustainably grown timber production and supply in Australia.

Name: INTERHOLCO AG
Description:
Interholco (IHC) is one of the leading international suppliers of African logs and lumber. The company has over 60 years of experience in responsible wood procurement and production on the African continent.

With its own production facility (IFO) in the Republic of Congo, customers are served with high quality and FSC-certified African wood: logs, lumber, finger-joint products and more. Trading partners in several countries and locations assure flexible and fast service for our customers. 

Join our dynamic team!

We offer attractive positions in a unique environment, constantly looking for talent in the following areas: Forest Management and Harvesting; Sawmilling; Mechanic Maintenance and Electricity; Glue-Lam production; Logistics; Finance and Admin.

Follow us to learn more about Interholco (IHC), its products and expertise.

Name: T2EARTH LLC.
Description:
We are a breakthrough, innovation driven, sustainable superior performance forest products building materials company. We are problem solvers and challenge the status quo. In stealth mode from 2018 until 2022, we are now fully scaled and vertically integrated from forests to unmatched highest performing finished wood products. We are pioneers in the pursuit of sustainable wood preservation and our T2EARTH team is led by entrepreneurial and seasoned strategic, operations, R&D, disruptive marketing, venture capital and sprint growth company backgrounds professionals. We are supported by established and exceptional partnerships and relationships across the global forest products industry and the building design, development and construction community. T2EARTH's mission and vision is to change the paradigm of the wood industry. T2EARTH is building a bold team and agile business model committed to providing long-term environmental, social and economic benefits and to accelerating the Earth’s transition to a sustainable built environment. We have open opportunities across all engineering functions and business operations at T2EARTH, year-round, full-time and part-time and in our T2EARTH topnotch talent T2E Internship Program, onsite and remote. We are based in the New York Metropolitan area, the largest in the United States, and in Augusta, GA, home of the Masters, and in the heart of the Southern Softwood Timber Region, the largest in the USA. Join us to play a direct role in transforming the forest products and building industries and making humanity an enduring infrastructure and buildings species, with your optimism and ingenuity that enhance our growing team. 
Contact: careers@T2EARTH.com

Name: Claret
Description:
Claret is one of India’s leading manufacturers of premium hygiene and packaging solutions. As part of Paramount Universal Private Ltd., we are proud to offer a diverse portfolio including tissue papers, aluminium foils, food wrapping rolls, wet wipes, and more crafted to serve both households and commercial spaces with ease and efficiency.

At Claret, we are driven by a commitment to quality and sustainability, ensuring every product we deliver stands for comfort, care, and convenience.

Why Choose Claret:

•  Made with high-grade raw materials.
•  Eco-conscious production practices.
•  Trusted by households, hotels & healthcare industries.
•  Proudly made in India with international quality standards.
•  FDA Approved/FSC Certified/GMP Certified/Dermatologically Certified.

Name: Navigator Paper
Description: Navigator Paper is recognized internationally as the leading premium office paper brand. It offers a wide range of solutions for any printing application.

Name: Premier Paper Group Ltd
Description:
Local Stock - Local Service - Local People

From A4 paper that we use in our offices through to the packaging board that protects our food products; and countless other uses, paper is an integral part of our daily life.

In this digital age of virtual reality, paper remains a trusted medium for communicating information and stimulating creative ideas. The look, feel and even smell of paper help to reinforce the retention of key messages and is unmatched for communicating quality.

Premier offers a choice of over 5,500 paper products including; office paper, digital paper, recycled paper, self adhesive sheets and labels, packaging board, graphical paper and board, postal packaging and envelopes; all from sustainable sources.

Name: Papelera Nacional - Panasa
Description:
En PANASA, llevamos más de 55 años compartiendo calidad, compromiso y tradición en el Perú. Desde nuestra fundación el 23 de mayo de 1969, hemos sido pioneros en la industria papelera, con una misión clara: mejorar la vida de las personas a través de productos que impactan en la educación, la salud y la higiene de millones de familias. 

Nuestro portafolio, que incluye cuadernos, papelería y papel tissue, es fabricado con altos estándares en nuestras plantas de Lima y Paramonga. Esto nos permite ofrecer soluciones sostenibles y de calidad que acompañan a nuestros clientes en su día a día. Trabajamos como un solo equipo para brindar productos de calidad y que están presentes en cada momento importante de la vida cotidiana de nuestros cliente.

Conéctate con nosotros para conocer cómo continuamos innovando y liderando, impulsados por nuestra pasión por ser parte del crecimiento del Perú.

Name: Millcraft
Description:
Millcraft is a wholesale distributor of paper, luxury/brand packaging, envelopes, shipping materials including boxes and mailers, banners, sign material, and other substrates in which you would market your company’s brand. We are a fourth generation, privately held family company, founded in 1920.  We proudly represent hundreds of manufacturers, and have specialists in nearly every aspect of the supply chain. These specialists ensure that you are sourcing the right materials, that they fit with your applications, that they help convey your brand in the right way, and that they effectively and efficiently meet your procurement goals. When you have questions, we have answers…Just ask.

The Millcraft service platform has 17 sales and retail distribution locations in 14 cities: Akron; Ann Arbor, Buffalo; Cincinnati; Cleveland; Columbus; Dayton; Detroit, Fort Wayne; Greenwich;  Indianapolis; Louisville; Southfield and Sterling Heights.

Long committed to a guiding principle of product sustainability, Millcraft paper and product lines are environmentally certified by the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC)  and the Sustainable Forestry Initiative (SFI).

Name: Grigeo Group
Description:
Grigeo Group is the only paper and wood industry company group in Lithuania and one of the largest in the Baltic countries. For the present moment the Group comprises the following companies: Grigeo Tissue, Grigeo Hygiene, Grigeo Paper Packaging, Grigeo Klaipėda, Grigeo Packaging, Grigeo Baltwood, Grigeo Recycling,  Mena Pak and Niedomickie Zakłady Papiernicze sp. z o.o.

In our processes, we cover an almost complete cycle of manufacturing wood and paper components - from wood to the product made from it, and, more precisely, from wood to man, producing higher value-added wood and paper products in the production process. 

All of these products are produced in a resource-efficient way: by self-supplying biofuels, saving electricity, purchasing and recycling waste paper, replanting forests, and investing in water treatment plants.

When creating and manufacturing, we always think about you - our customers, employees, partners, colleagues - what is important to you and how we can contribute to the well-being of you and the environment around you.

Name: Grupo Gomà-Camps
Description: We are Gomà-Camps, a business group dedicated to the manufacturing, transformation and sale of tissue paper and other related solutions. For more than 260 years, we have been committed to the quality and diversity of our products, standing to constant innovation, respect for the environment, service to our customers and the development of our staff.

Name: VIDA Gruppen
Description:
Vida AB är en global leverantör av förädlade produkter från hållbar svensk skog. Koncernen har ca 1 500 anställda på 23 produktionsanläggningar. Produktionen är i huvudsak inriktad på konstruktionsvirke för en rad olika marknader. 80% av produktionen exporteras till fem kontinenter. Verksamheten omfattar även hustillverkning, emballagetillverkning, pellets- och strötillverkning samt biobränslehandel.

Industrierna är strategiskt belägna nära skogsägarna i Småland, Skåne och Västra Götaland. Vida köper huvuddelen av råvaran från privata skogsägare via det egna inköpsbolaget, Vida Skog. Totalt anskaffas ca 5,9 miljoner m3fub årligen.

LinkedIn
Vi har vår LinkedIn-sida för att ge intressenter en närmare kontakt med vår verksamhet.

Tänk på att kommentarer som strider mot lag, innehåller kränkande personuppgifter eller på annat sätt är olämpliga raderas. Vi ställer krav på en godtagbar etisk nivå på postade inlägg. Granskningen sker regelbundet. Vi förbehåller oss rätten att radera kommentarer som misstänks utgöra s.k. SPAM-meddelanden. Du är personligen ansvarig för dina kommentarer. Tonen i kommentarer ska vara trevlig och respektfull.

Kommentarer får inte innehålla:
• Obehörig publicering av upphovsrättsskyddat material.
• Länkning till sidor som innehåller olagligt material.
• Uppmaningar till brott eller annat som bryter mot svensk lag. 
• Hets mot folkgrupp, sexistiska yttranden eller andra trakasserier. 
• Olaga våldsskildring eller pornografi. 
• Hot, skvaller eller lögner. 
• Förtal, personangrepp eller ärekränkande inlägg.
• Svordomar eller obscena ord. 
• Kommersiella budskap.

När du skriver en kommentar garanterar du att innehållet är ditt och får publiceras. Kommentarer kan komma att delas av andra och publiceras. Du kan anmäla olämpligt material genom att kontakta oss per telefon eller e-post. Ev. personuppgifter som lämnas i samband med en kommentar behandlas i syfte att administrera kommentatorsfunktionen och sparas inte längre än vad ändamålet kräver.

Name: Northwood
Description:
We have a group of associated companies that provide the manufacturing, supply and transportation of away-from-home professional paper hygiene products, wiping products and dispensers.

The privately family owned Northwood Group began its journey in 1976 when Paul Fecher established Northwood Paper Sales. During this time the focus was to target the supply of parent reels for the Tissue Sector, over the next 30 years the Fecher family grew the business to become the UK’s largest independent Paper Agent and Supplier of various paper grades to the UK paper converters. 

In 2009 the opportunity to acquire Kruger Tissue’s UK operations arose which included a recycled Tissue mill and an AFH converting plant, over the course of the following years, more pieces of the Northwood manufacturing jigsaw came together. Waste reclamation specialist Ashley Recycling was acquired in 2011 guaranteeing a supply of high quality recycled waste paper for the mill facility. In 2012 the mill and converting plant of Peter Grant Papers was also acquired by the group and a new logistics company formed as the final part of a fully integrated supply chain solution for the away-from-home paper sector. 

The offering from Northwood was further complemented with the JV acquisition of the former Georgia Pacific Paper Mill in Bridgend where consumer Tissue products are manufactured in a fully integrated Tissue Mill and converting plant. in 2015 Disposables UK was also acquired and in 2016 the acquisition of both Freedom Paper Products and Midland Paper Products took place. This now meant that Northwood Hygiene Products had an exciting array of brands to offer the away from home market.

Northwood Recycling, at Disley and Lancaster with recycled waste paper, supply reliable materials to allow the manufacturing of paper reels for conversion. The mother reels are then transported to two Northwood Hygiene converting facilities by Northwood Logistics’ fleet of articulated vehicles. The paper is then converted before being distributed across the country. The complete Northwood supply chain ensures that customers receive quality, responsibly sourced products, delivered both efficiently and reliably.


Our Mission - ‘To be the preferred supply chain partner for key organisations involved in the disposable paper & tissue industries’

Name: GS Paperboard & Packaging Sdn Bhd
Description:
The Oji Holdings Corporation began as Japan's first industrial scale paper manufacturer in 1873. Today, with 29 pulp and paper mills and 57 converting plants in Japan, Oji Group is not only a leading company in Japan, it is also one of the largest pulp and paper companies in the world. Oji Group is expanding in Southeast Asia with its presence in Vietnam, Laos, Thailand and Malaysia. In Malaysia, Oji Group operates 8 carton box plants and 3 paper mills.

GS Paperboard & Packaging Sdn Bhd (a member of Oji Group) is the major player in the domestic containerboard segment and the largest integrated paper and packaging manufacturer in Malaysia founded in 1992. Our Paper Mill and Packaging Plants have gained tremendous successes. Today, we are the market leader in terms of customer base, scale and technology of the production facilities.

Name: Paper Province
Description: Paper Province is a leading bioeconomy cluster in Sweden

Name: Remasa Reflorestadora
Description: Remasa, located in the south-central region of Paraná and north of Santa Catarina, produces high quality forests to serve the forestry industry both in Brazil and around the world. Remasa is currently among the five largest independent suppliers in the Brazilian pine log market, with a production capacity of over 600 thousand tons / year.

Name: PT. Sun Paper Source
Description:
PT. Sun Paper Source is a leading tissue paper producer in Indonesia which is located in Sukoanyar, East Java. It operates to target over 150.000 tonnes per year of tissue paper from various mills, including PT. Sopanusa Tissue & Packaging Saranasukses which is located just 8km away. Its expertise and experience since 1995 have made the group one of the second largest tissue paper producers in Indonesia and South East Asia. 

The Voith Germany has succeeded in the strengthening of PT. Sun Paper Source’s position with 1,600/min, 2860mm complete brand new high-performance tissue machine. It is specialized in producing various tissue paper grades from 11.5 gsm to 36 gsm, including machine-glazed paper 14-30 gsm and carrier tissue 14-18 gsm. Another by Valmet modified Beloit machine with deinking equipments to add high quality recycle grade tissue papers production. 

CONVERTED / FINISHED TISSUE PRODUCTS
Over the years, we have provided house brands to leading retailers, food chains, distributors and build our brand name locally. We have learned that customer needs differ considerably. An economic, safe, soft yet strong and absorbent tissue paper products are tailored to your individual specifications.

Name: Cerland Group
Description:
Fondé en 1999 par Vianney Descheemaeker, le groupe Cerland regroupe les marques françaises Cerland et Soulet, reconnues pour l'aménagement extérieur et le jeu de plein air. 

Notre mission est de simplifier la vie au jardin en alliant fonctionnalité, design et durabilité, avec plus de 20 ans d'expertise.

Cerland propose des solutions personnalisées pour tous types d'espaces extérieurs, avec des produits durables, respectueux de l'environnement, imaginés en France et conçus en Europe. 
Maîtrisant tout le processus de fabrication, Cerland valorise un savoir-faire expert du bois et des matériaux durables.

Nos produits, présents en France et à l'étranger, sont disponibles dans les enseignes de bricolage et de jardinerie, couvrant divers univers de l'aménagement extérieur.

Founded in 1999 by Vianney Descheemaeker, the Cerland Group brings together the French brands Cerland and Soulet, known for outdoor landscaping and outdoor play equipment. Our mission is to simplify life in the garden by combining functionality, design, and durability, with over 20 years of expertise.

Cerland offers customized solutions for all types of outdoor spaces, with durable, environmentally friendly products, designed in France and manufactured in Europe. By mastering the entire manufacturing process, Cerland highlights expert craftsmanship in wood and sustainable materials.

Our products, available in France and abroad, can be found in DIY and gardening stores, covering various areas of outdoor landscaping.

Name: PT PP London Sumatra Indonesia Tbk.
Description: Established since 1906 with the initiatives of the London-based Harrisons & Crossfield Plc, as a general trading and plantation management services firm. The London-Sumatra plantations, which later came to be known as “Lonsum”, evolved over time to become one of the world’s renowned plantation companies, with almost 100,000 hectares of planted oil palm, rubber, tea and cocoa plantations spread across Indonesia’s four largest islands.

Name: FSC France
Description: Le Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) est une organisation internationale à but non lucratif née en 1993 à Toronto, qui s’engage pour l’exploitation responsable des forêts. Le FSC est indépendant et ne pour-suit en aucun cas des intérêts financiers. Sa mission fondatrice est d’apporter un schéma de certification véritablement indépendant et crédible garantissant que les forêts sont gérées d’une façon écologique-ment viable afin de répondre aux besoins sociaux, économiques, écologiques des générations actuelles et futures. Le FSC réunit à la fois des organismes ayant des intérêts économiques dans le secteur fores-tier, des organismes ayant une approche purement environnementale, et d’autres développant une ap-proche sociale. Le FSC a pu ainsi élaborer de façon concrète des principes et critères de gestion fores-tière basés sur des normes sociales, économiques et environnementales, qui sont opérationnels et efficaces.

Name: PT. SBA Wood Industries
Description: PT. SBA Wood Industries adalah perusahaan multi nasional yang bergerak di bidang kehutanan khususnya Hutan Tanaman Industri (HTI). Adapun areal kerja PT. SBA Wood Industries terletak di Kabupaten OKI Provinsi Sumatera Selatan.

Name: Verso Paper Corp.
Description:
Billerud North America is a leading producer of graphic, specialty and packaging paper and market pulp, with a long-standing reputation for quality and reliability. Our graphic paper products are designed primarily for commercial printing, advertising and marketing applications, including direct mail, catalogs, corporate collateral, books and magazines. Our specialty paper products include release liner papers and label face stock for pressure sensitive, glue-applied and laminate applications. Billerud NA produces packaging paper used in higher-end packaging and printing applications such as greeting cards, book covers, folders, labels and point-of-purchase displays. Verso also makes market pulp used in printing, writing, specialty and packaging paper, facial and toilet tissue, and paper towels. For more information, visit us online at billerud.com.

To view our social media guidelines visit: https://www.versoco.com/socialmediaguidelines/.

Verso offers a wide array of products which allows us to creatively address any challenge you are facing in your business and help you remain competitive. From finding the right product to the performance of our products, doing business should be simple.

At Verso Paper Corp. our focus is simple:  The paper you need.  The service you deserve.  The sustainability you require.

Name: ROXCEL Trading
Description:
Unlocking forward! ROXCEL opens possibilities. Opens doors. Lives for moving towards the future.

Through a deep understanding of the pulp, paper, and board industries, ROXCEL delivers unbeatable service to partners across the entire business cycle. 

As a recognized, respectable name across the globe, ROXCEL has built a reputation on trust, expertise, and transparency. The great individuals who work with and represent us are testimony to all that we stand for. As a result of the hard work, creative solutions, and varied skills of our employees we’ve been able to grow our business into a global leader in trading and provide solutions for our partners in the printing, packaging and related industries.

Name: Latvijas valsts meži
Description:
AS “Latvijas valsts meži” (LVM) dibināta 1999. gada oktobrī saskaņā ar Latvijas Republikas Ministru kabineta rīkojumu. LVM pamatdarbība ir mežsaimniecība, kas ir uzņēmuma galvenais ieņēmumu avots.

Līdztekus mežsaimniecībai LVM sniedz medību un rekreācijas pakalpojumus, ražo selekcionētas sēklas un stādus, piedāvā produktu un pakalpojumu kopu “LVM GEO”, kā arī zemes dzīļu resursus: smilti, granti, kūdru.

LVM pārvalda un apsaimnieko 1,62 miljonus hektāru Latvijas Republikas zemes, kā arī īsteno valsts intereses meža apsaimniekošanā, nodrošinot meža vērtību saglabāšanu, palielināšanu un gūstot maksimāli iespējamos ienākumus īpašniekam – valstij. LVM ir Eiropas valsts mežu apsaimniekotāju asociācijas (EUSTAFOR) dibinātājs un aktīvs tās biedrs.

LVM pārzinis veic Jūsu personas datu apstrādi saskaņā ar Privātuma politiku: https://www.lvm.lv/privatuma-politika.

Name: ESSEL SELÜLOZ & KÂĞIT SAN. TİC. A.Ş.
Description:
Essel Cellulose and Paper Industry was founded in 2005 in Zonguldak Çaycuma over a land of 67.000 square meters with machines that are erected by Italian Celli Company to produce TISSUE PAPER ROLLS made of 100% cellulose.

Essel Cellulose and Paper Industry is producing Tissue Paper Rolls (Jumbo Rolls) for Tissue Paper Converters with about 600 different types of product such as toilet paper, napkin, dispenser napkin, paper towel, dispenser towel and Z napkin in various basis weights working full capacity, Production capacity; 70 tons per day, 26.000 tons per year, to produce world-class products for our customers.

Essel Cellulose and Paper Industry has its main principles of meeting the demands of its customer with competitive prices and highest quality production and sevices just in time, we produce highest quality products with 100% cellulose, the most qualified cellulose in the world.



Essel Cellulose and Paper Industry places the customer at the center of the organisation and its processess. We pride ourselves on high quality, sustainability, and collaborating with customers to produce speciality products that help them reach their business goals.

In 2015 we opened our second plant in Osmaniye over a land of 25.000 square meters with machines erected by Italian Recard Company, Production capacity; 130 tons per day, 50.000 tons per year.

WE ARE IN TODAY AND TOMORROW AS WELL to satisfy you not only by our quality and price but our customer perception as well.

Name: Versowood Oy
Description:
Versowood Group on Suomen suurin yksityinen puunjalostuskonserni, kansainvälinen toimija ja innovatiivinen alan uranuurtaja. Hankimme vuosittain noin 4 miljoonaa kuutiota kotimaista raaka-ainetta, josta valmistamme noin 1,5 miljoonaa m3 kuusi-ja mäntysahatavaraa.
 Sahatavaratuotannon ja erilaisten sahatavara jatkojalosteiden lisäksi valmistamme muun muassa liimapuuta, erilaisia puupakkauksia, puhelin- ja sähköpylväitä, puusiltoja sekä puupellettejä ja muita energiajakeita.
Versowood Group is Finland's largest privately owned wood processing group, an international organization and an innovative pioneer in the industry. Every year we procure approximately 4 million cubic meters of Finnish spruce and pine which we process into approximately 1,5 million cubic meters of sawn timber.

Name: Green Resources AS
Description: Green Resources is a sustainable, FSC-certified integrated forestry company established in 1995. As Africa’s largest forestry company, it controls and manages 86,000 ha of total area, comprising 38,700 ha of plantation forestry and three processing facilities across Uganda, Tanzania and Mozambique. It is also one of the first companies globally to receive carbon revenue from its plantation forests. Green Resources believes forestation is one of the most efficient ways of improving social and economic conditions for people in rural areas and aims to be the preferred partner for local communities in these areas as well as the favoured African employer within its industry.

Name: Mpact Paper
Description: The paper division manufactures recycled-based packaging and industrial paper grades such as containerboard and cartonboard. Mpact has distribution rights to sell Mondi ProVantage Baywhite (a premium quality white top kraftliner) and Mondi ProVantage BayKraft (a premium quality kraftliner) in sub-Saharan Africa.

Name: PT Surya Hutani Jaya
Description:
Menjadi Perusahaan Kehutanan terdepan di tingkat internasional melalui pengelolaan hutan tanaman yang menjamin
kelestarian fungsi produksi, ekologi dan sosial guna mewujudkan pembangunan hutan tanaman yang berkelanjutan

Name: La Reforma S.A.- Papeles Absorbentes
Description: Fabricamos y comercializamos papel higiénico, servilletas, papel toalla, toallas Z, entre otros, tanto en la línea de consumo como institucional. Nos enorgullece ser expertos en papel, cuidar y proteger a la familia, estando presentes en sus vidas todos los días.

Name: Groupe THEBAULT
Description: Fabricant français de contreplaqués à base de Pin Maritime, Peuplier et Okoumé. Le Groupe THEBAULT comprend 4 sites de production de contreplaqués en France, à Magné (79), Sauzé-Vaussais (79), Solférino (40), Marigny le Châtel (10) et un au Gabon, ainsi qu'un tout nouveau site de LVL en Auvergne.

Name: COPAPA - Cia Paduana de Papéis
Description: Fabricante de Papéis para Fins Sanitários: Papel Higiênico, Guardanapo e Papel Toalha
Location: Santo Antônio de Pádua, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Canson
Description:
The year was 1557, when the famous Montgolfier family established the Canson Paper mills. After centuries, Canson continues to carry on a spirit of invention and excellence like no other paper company, by combining the oldest manufacturing process with the most innovative technologies.  Since its origins, Canson has been a big supporter of the Arts.
Canson constantly strives to make “creating adventure” possible for everyone.  For example, did you know that Canson was the inventor of the first Hot Air Balloon, which launched in 1782 and was made with Canson paper!
As a worldwide leader in the fine art market, Canson supports artists, designers, architects, illustrators and students by producing a large assortment of superior quality papers.
Today Canson is producing art paper for: drawing, tracing, pastel, watercolour, oil, acrylic, printmaking, and even digital printing.
Canson joined the F.I.L.A. Group in 2016.

Name: SETA Embalagens
Description:
Desde 1991 a SETA Embalagens atua de forma inspiradora, transformando papelão em solução.

Trabalhamos com caixas de papelão ondulado e folhas de papel, possuímos um setor projetos próprio que colabora no desenvolvimento da embalagem ou arte ideal para o seu produto!

Produzimos embalagens, entregamos confiança!
Location: São Bento do Sul, Santa Catarina

Name: Elite Professional Brasil
Description:
A marca Elite Professional faz parte da companhia CMPC, um grupo com mais de 100 anos de história, presente em 8 países e líder em soluções sustentáveis para higiene e cuidados pessoais. 

Elite Professional é referência em soluções higiênicas para o mercado B2B, oferecendo qualidade, inovação e eficiência para empresas em toda a América Latina. Líder em papéis tissue no continente, nossa marca se dedica a fornecer produtos de alto desempenho para hotéis, hospitais, clínicas, instituições de ensino, indústrias, escritórios, restaurantes e diversos outros segmentos.

NOSSO PAPEL É CUIDAR BEM DE VOCÊ.

Nosso compromisso vai além dos produtos: contamos com uma equipe especializada e uma ampla rede de franquias, garantindo suporte consultivo e soluções sob medida para cada cliente. Cuidamos do seu negócio para que você possa focar no que realmente importa.

Nós cuidamos, pode confiar!

Name: WT Distribuidora
Description:
WT Distribuição e Serviços, uma empresa que nasceu do empreendedorismo do casal de empresários Werneck Lima de Carvalho e Tatiana Souza de Carvalho, que juntos tem construído uma história de sucesso.

Toda história de sucesso tem sua marca. A história da WT é marcada pelo empreendedorismo na identificação de novos nichos de mercado, pela conquista de espaço, quebra de paradigmas e pautada pela sua reputação de integridade e respeito aos clientes e colaboradores.

Desde que a WT iniciou suas atividades em 1990, tem buscado trabalhar de forma correta utilizando-se de ferramentas adequadas, aliadas a uma equipe de profissionais comprometidos, passando a oferecer aos clientes serviços diferenciados pela sua qualidade.

A WT reflete experiência, credibilidade e profissionalismo do seu corpo funcional e parcerias de sucesso com clientes que atuam em diversos segmentos de mercado.

Sua estrutura organizacional foi montada sobre uma visão global do negócio e desenhada para que a WT possa competir de forma eficaz no ambiente desafiador e dinâmico do seu mercado de atuação.

Em 26 de outubro de 2007, fundou sua nova sede com o objetivo de manter o seu padrão de excelência em qualidade e acompanhar o crescimento do mercado, investiu forte na criação de uma estrutura física altamente especializada, elaborada nos mínimos detalhes para que seu corpo funcional realize suas atividades de forma preste e eficaz, gerando um melhor apoio logístico.

Em 2010, recebeu o certificado de Qualidade NBR ISO 9001:2008. Permanecendo em constante contato com seu público alvo, a WT mantém-se em sintonia com as necessidades de seus clientes e dessa forma continua surpreendendo com apresentação de soluções inovadoras.

Nossa Missão
"Identificar oportunidades de melhoria e prover soluções inovadoras que gerem satisfação aos clientes, colaboradores e parceiros."

Name: Obeikan Paper Industries
Description:
Paper is a mirror that reflects our thoughts to be later translated into fruitful achievements. Obeikan Paper Industries became a reality with the construction of a 156 thousand square meter factory with a production capacity of almost 180 thousand tons yearly and is now one of the pioneering companies in the field of duplex board manufacturing. In light of the constantly increasing demand for our high quality products, the factory’s production capacity is due to be increased to 250 thousand tons per year by 2013.

Obeikan Paper Industries is proud of employing high quality experienced technicians and engineers trained in production continuity who ensure quality standards and are fulfilled according to local and international market requirements.

Name: Al Karam Paper Mills Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Pakistan's best environment friendly Paper Mill established in  2006. Al Karam manufactures International Quality Paper Products, which ensures sustainability and reliability. Consumers and customers are the core of our product design and business strategy. We inspire customer's every day with our product quality, services and viability. Our ambition is to facilitate the Corporate sector, Distributions, Wholesale and Tender Business across Pakistan.

Name: GENTAS GRUP
Description:
Gentaş Şirketler Grubu

1972 yılında Bolu ilinin Mengen ilçesinde kurulan, Genel Müdürlüğü Ankara’da, Bolu ve Mengen’de iki ayrı lokasyonda üretim fabrikaları bulunan GENTAŞ, 1991 yılından bu yana Borsa İstanbul’da işlem gören çok ortaklı halka açık bir anonim şirket statüsündedir. GENTAŞ, ana ortaklığının yanı sıra yurtiçinde bağlı ortaklığı GENMAR, iştiraki GENTAŞ KİMYA ve yurtdışında bağlı ortaklığı GENTAŞ ITALY ile birlikte kurumsal bir şirketler topluluğudur.

GENTAŞ Laminat üretimini CPL ve HPL laminat olmak üzere; 55.000 m2’lik kapalı alanda gerçekleştirmektedir. Bugün yıllık 15 milyon m2 CPL (continue pressure laminate), 11 milyon m2 HPL (high pressure laminate) dekoratif laminat, 2 milyon 750 bin m2 compact panel kapasitesi ile uluslararası arenanın sayılı üreticileri arasında yer almaktadır.

Uluslararası kalite standartları dahilinde müşteri taleplerini karşılayan Gentaş için kalite her zaman ilk sıradadır ve üretilen tüm ürünler EN 438 normlarına uygundur. İlave olarak yanmaya dayanım, kimyasallara dayanım, UV dayanım sertifikaları ile antibakteriyel ve antistatik ürün kalite belge ve raporlarına da sahiptir.

Gentaş, yıllar boyunca edinmiş olduğu uluslararası bilgi ve deneyimini, yaşam konsepti trendlerine uygun olarak geliştirdiği 400’den fazla dekor ve 50’ye yakın yüzey seçeneği ile birleştirmiştir.

Gentaş , stratejik politikasının bir parçası olarak teknolojiye, kaliteye, insana ve çevreye sürekli olarak yatırım yapmaktadır. Ar-Ge çalışmalarının neticesinde gerçekleştirilen yenilikler, üretim kapasitesi ve kalitesi ile önde gelen bir HPL ve CPL üreticisi olup, güçlü markası, profesyonel dağıtım ve satış ağı, deneyimli ekipleri ile 6 kıta ve 67 ülkede tercih edilme başarısını göstermiştir

GENTAŞ Bünyesinde Yer Alan Şirketler;

Gentaş Dekoratif Yüzeyler San. ve Tic. A.Ş.
Genmar Yapı Ürünleri Dağıtım Pazarlama San. ve Tic. A.Ş.
Gentaş Kimya Sanayi Pazarlama A.Ş.
Gentaş İtalya

Name: Monadnock Paper Mills
Description: Founded in 1819 and based in Bennington, NH, Monadnock Paper Mills, Inc., works with the world's leading brands to craft and customize environmentally responsible performance papers for commercial printing, packaging and technical applications. Monadnock is committed to environmental stewardship and maintains that fiber-based alternatives to plastic can be cost-efficient, environmentally sensitive, and beautiful.

Name: The Connected Inc
Description:
The Connected Inc is a leading global trading company, comprised of a team of experienced packaging professionals with extensive hands-on experience managing high-end production plants and advanced JIT supply chain modules. Our foundation is built on systematic planning, hard work, research, and financial strength, which we leverage to successfully execute strategies and provide end-to-end solutions to our customers. With a strong network of paper mills, suppliers, and buyers worldwide, we are proud to be recognized as a team of experts with over 30 years of technical experience in production, planning, and packaging. Our combination of experience and passion is how we make trading smarter, acting as an indentor, merchant exporter, and importer.

We supply a comprehensive range of paper and board products to the printing and packaging industries around the world, meeting the specific needs of our customers with high-quality solutions.

Name: CARTORAMA C.A.
Description: EMPRESA INDUSTRIAL DEDICADA A LA ELABORACION DE PAPEL Y CARTON CORRUGADO.

Name: Rex Lumber
Description:
Rex Lumber has been producing high quality lumber products for almost 100 years.  We are family owned and operated, with the fourth generation of the McRae family firmly in place.  

Our employees are the key to our success, both past and future, consider joining our team if you are motivated, dedicated and driven to succeed.

Currently we manufacture Southern Yellow Pine (SYP) dimension lumber.  We service all sectors in the SYP Industry including treaters, truss manufacturers, exporters, remanufacturers and more.  If you are looking for high quality SYP dimension lumber please contact our sales team at 850-263-1861.

Name: Gmund Paper
Description: Since 1829, Gmund Paper is known for paper culture and the ecological production of unique communication media made from natural paper. The pulp of all Gmund papers is FSC certified. Customised solutions for sustainable brand presentations are created at the development and production site in Gmund am Tegernsee. Around 75 % of the paper is exported. Gmund Paper is family-owned and is now managed by Florian Kohler in the fourth generation.

Name: Fibre Excellence
Description:
Fibre Excellence is a leader in the French forest products industry, with pulp production, biomass energy production, and timber harvesting operations. Headquartered in Labège, France, our goods reach customers in France, Europe, and beyond. 
Our core values of accountability, trust, pragmatism and innovation drive everything we do. We are deeply committed to championing the sustainability of our sector, and our products are entirely derived from locally harvested and PEFC certified wood. 
Fibre Excellence employs more than 600 people, therefore supporting local communities throughout the country with an economic impact of nearly €650 million each year. Our mills in the Bouche du Rhones and Haute-Garonne regions are located at the heart of the French paper industry, and it is this rich history and the strong expertise of our people that makes us the leader in our sector in France.

Name: Losán
Description:
Losán es una multinacional fabricante de productos derivados de la madera:  chapas, tableros de melamina, rechapado, aglomerado, madera aserrada... Controlamos todo el proceso productivo manteniendo la cadena de custodia según la certificación FSC.

Losán is a multinational corporation that manufactures wood products: veneers, melamine boards, veneer boards, chipboard, sawn timber... We completely control the production process and we are FSC certified.

Name: Vel-Vin Packaging & Paper Products
Description:
Velvin Group has established itself as one of the pre-eminent manufacturer in the Corrugation industry and Paper Bags in India and across the globe. 

Incorporated in the year 1987 and headquartered in Mumbai, Velvin Group continues to grow under the dynamic leadership of its Founder and Managing Director – Mr. Vincent Mathias, a first generation entrepreneur.

With an idea of building world class infrastructure at its core, Velvin Group today operates 5 manufacturing units in Maharashtra and Goa. To bifurcate, 3 manufacturing plants for Corrugated Boxes and 2 manufacturing units for Paper Bags. To support last mile just-in-time operations, Velvin group runs its own fleet of container-body vehicles and also operates warehouses in Goa, Bhiwandi, Pune and Chennai.

With an annual capacity of 50000 Metric Tonnes per annum we are one of the largest set ups of Corrugation in India. And with a capacity of 1 Billion Bags per annum, we are the largest shopping bag manufacturing facility in India.  

With team of professionals trained over the years, Velvin Group positions itself as a partner delivering solutions to meet customer requirements, well surpassing the traditional practice of manufacturing products.

Name: Kelly Spicers
Description:
Kelly Spicers is one of the industry’s leading paper, packaging, wide format and facilities solutions distributors, serving the print, graphics, packaging and facilities solutions communities across the Western U.S. With 4 divisions, 8 regional locations, and more than 28 stores, Kelly Spicers delivers the products our customers need, when they need them, including same-day and next-day service in most areas. 

Kelly Spicers is an independent, privately held company with a rich company history with long-standing relationships with our customers, suppliers and the communities in which we operate. Our mill partners represent every product category, including fine and specialty paper, packaging, facilities solutions, digital and wide format products. 

As a member of Central National Gottesman Inc., we are strongly committed to the future of print, and partner with industry organizations, initiatives, programs and campaigns that support that mission.

Name: PAPRESA
Description: PAPRESA S.L. is a paper & forest products company based out of AVENIDA DE NAVARRA ,6. ERRENTERIA Spain.

Name: Ball & Doggett
Description:
Australia's leading distributor of digital materials, press consumables and printing equipment. The place where all great communication starts.

Thanks for joining our LinkedIn family! You can also find us on Facebook, Instagram, YouTube and Pinterest (search for @ballanddoggett) or visit our website www.ballanddoggett.com.au.

Name: StukaZ
Description: StukaZ provides designing and creating websites for individuals, businesses, or organizations. This service includes everything from planning the layout and coding the site using programming languages such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to implementing functionalities and ensuring the site is user-friendly and responsive across different devices. A well-developed website serves as an essential tool for online presence, marketing, and communication.

Name: Nothing
Description:
Nothing exists to reimagine single-use products with intelligence, efficiency, and a sense of humor. We're not here to guilt people into being eco-friendly. We're here to make it easy to choose better - for your coffee, your customers, and the planet.

Plastic has overstayed its welcome. And the so-called alternatives? Most of them don't hold up. Literally. That's why we build products that do their job brilliantly, then disappear on their own. Strong when you need them, gone when you don't. Fully compostable, plastic-free, and proudly over-engineered to break down. 

We care about the full life of a product. Where it comes from, what it's made of, how it performs, and where it ends up. Our promise: every product we make will disappear without a trace in 180 days or less. 

No asterisks. 

No industrial composters required. 

No greenwashed BS. 

At Nothing, we're creating a better experience for everyone involved - the customer sipping, the barista serving, and the planet we all share. And while we're proud to be behind the scenes, we're even prouder to be forgotten. 

Because Nothing is better than something.

Name: LEIPA Group
Description:
A passionate partner. Since 1847.

LEIPA GROUP is an independent family business with over 170 years of passion for environmentally friendly processes and technologies.

LEIPA Group takes the needs of its customers seriously and serves them with a combination of state-of-the-art products, relevant technological innovations and consulting that sets benchmarks in sales, service and reliability.

With our passion for environmentally friendly processes and technologies in the paper and packaging sector, we have continuously developed and are now a European group of companies. We inspire customers worldwide with our products. All production processes are environmentally friendly. 

This is how we think not only today, but also about tomorrow.

Join us! We are hiring! Visit www.leipa.team for all career opportunities.

Name: Andhra Paper
Description: Andhra Paper is a premier paper manufacturing company in India, committed to delivering high-quality paper products through sustainable and innovative practices. we specialize in a wide range of writing and printing papers, including Uncoated Free Sheet, Poster Papers, and Cut Size paper grades from 30 GSM to 230 GSM. Explore how we blend tradition with technology to foster growth and sustainability in the paper industry at http://www.andhrapaper.com

Name: heinzelsales
Description:
heinzelsales is Heinzel Group’s global sales network and one of the largest Pulp, Paper and Board trading houses and sales organizations in the world, represented in 28 countries via own offices and partnerships. The international sales network offers customers an excellent global service and, at the same time long-term supplier contacts. 
 
Heinzel Sales also partners with pulp and paper producers all around the world to distribute their products to more than 100 markets, selling around 2,4 million metric tons annually. Third-party suppliers and Heinzel Group’s own mills rely on heinzelsales’ comprehensive market knowledge. Pulp and paper customers worldwide count on heinzelsales’ sourcing skills and creative supply-chain Solutions.

Name: Cascades PRO
Description:
Cascades PRO is a Cascades Inc. paper tissue and hygiene brand distributed throughout North America. 

True to our name, we’re pros in our field: professional, proactive and committed to protecting our world. And we’re pros at creating safe and feel-good public spaces with proven hygiene solutions.

-----

Cascades PRO est une marque de papier tissu et de produits d'hygiène de Cascades Inc. distribuée à travers l'Amérique du Nord.

Fidèles à notre nom, nous sommes des pros dans notre domaine : professionnels, proactifs et protecteurs de notre planète. Et nous sommes des pros de la création d’espaces publics sécuritaires et agréables, grâce à des solutions d’hygiène qui ont fait leurs preuves.

Name: PT Wirakarya Sakti (Asia Pulp and Paper Group)

Name: Fisher International, Inc.
Description:
Fisher International is a business intelligence consulting firm that supports the global pulp and paper industry’s strategic and operational practices with a unique combination of rich marketplace data, powerful analytics and expert consulting. Our products and services are used by the industry’s producers, suppliers, investors and end-users around the world every day.

For over 30 years, Fisher International has invested in a game-changing advantage — superior business intelligence resources that put the power of data-driven decision making in your hands. We build databases and analytical tools that exceed important thresholds of quality and functionality so they can answer questions no other tool can. In addition, we have assembled an expert team of paper industry professionals who understand how data-driven thinking can deliver insight and create value for our clients.

Today, organizations using our business intelligence resources and our data-driven approach make more effective decisions more often, faster, and more reliably.

Name: Paper Matters
Description:
We aim to engage with you by presenting facts and dispelling common myths about paper. Our goal is to showcase how India's paper industry contributes positively to nature, emphasizing that paper production is a sustainable and renewable process that gives back more than it takes. We are committed to celebrating paper for its socio-economic, innovative, and sustainability benefits.

To all paper enthusiasts, join us in celebrating its goodness and discovering the true purpose & positive impact of paper on our lives and the environment. In other words, Paper Matters. An initiative by the Indian Paper Manufacturers Association (IPMA).

Name: Ruchira Papers
Description:
Ruchira Papers Limited | Agro-Based Paper Manufacturers | Tree-Free Paper | 

We take great pride in creating a quality range of tree-free papers for writing, high volume print, and packaging.

Name: Sociedad de Productores Forestales
Description:
La SPF representa a los diferentes actores que integran la cadena productiva del sector. Sus integrantes son:
- productores rurales independientes que diversifican sus rubros agropecuarios tradicionales.
- empresas exclusivamente forestales de origen nacional y extranjero.
- empresas que administran fondos de inversión y de pensión (nacionales y extranjeros) que han invertido en plantaciones forestales.
- viveristas
- técnicos
- empresas de servicios (preparación del sitio, plantación, control de plagas y malezas, podas, raleos, prevención y combate de incendios, cosecha, etc)
- industrias forestales.

Name: M.A.SILVA
Description:
M.A.SILVA is a leading cork producer on a global scale, innovative on processes and products, working close to the end user. 
M.A.SILVA supplies the global wine markets with a range of products, from Natural corks, to VIVA sparkling wine corks, Silktop 1+1 corks, Evacorks, Neo micro agglo corks and aglomerated corks.
M.A.SILVA has affiliated companies in Brazil, Italy, China, France, Spain and USA, to better respond to customer service and post sales needs.
Onebyone, Sara Advanced and Neotech are M.A.SILVA's latest achievements in technological features.

Name: Pan Pac Forest Products Ltd
Description:
For over 50 years, Pan Pac Forest Products has been growing, processing and delivering quality radiata products to international markets. O Centro PINUS existe, porque acreditamos numa floresta melhor, em que o pinheiro-bravo tem um papel único. 

A associação tem por objeto promover a sustentabilidade do pinheiro-bravo na floresta portuguesa, contribuindo para o fornecimento de matéria-prima adequada às necessidades das indústrias da Fileira.

A atuação do Centro PINUS passa por:

– Promover iniciativas nomeadamente de carácter científico, técnico e formativo bem como ações de comunicação, divulgação e disseminação;

– Cooperar com entidades públicas ou privadas em temas de interesse comum;

- Garantir a representação e defesa dos seus objetivos junto dos organismos e centros de decisão nacionais e internacionais, dos demais grupos de interesses e da opinião pública, contribuindo para a perceção generalizada da importância social, económica e ambiental da Fileira do Pinho.

Centro PINUS is a non-profit private association gathering the main stakeholders from the Portuguese pine-based sector, including representatives of forest landowners, contractors, the national agronomy research agency (INIAV), the national forest services (ICNF), Higher Education entities and the main industrial players.

Name: Cartiera San Martino
Description:
La Cartiera San Martino S.p.A. è stata fondata dalla famiglia Cerrone intorno al 1890 lungo la riva del fiume Fibreno in località San Martino, Broccostella, nel cuore della Valle del Liri.
L’azienda opera nel settore cartario per la produzione di cartoni accoppiati di diversi spessori sia grigi che colorati, di cartoncino di varie grammature, utilizzando come materia prima carta da macero e da recupero.
Il complesso industriale è costituito da più corpi di fabbrica al cui interno sono allocate due macchine continue, una macchina accoppiatrice, magazzini di stoccaggio, materie prime e prodotti finiti, palazzina uffici, piazzali per carico e scarico merci, parcheggi e zona verde.
Oltre ai fabbricati e relative infrastrutture, il complesso industriale comprende attrezzature ed impianti necessari al corretto funzionamento dei vari servizi.
Attualmente nell’azienda sono occupate 54 persone fra dirigenti, impiegati, tecnici e operai.
Il costante monitoraggio dei processi produttivi e l’efficienza degli impianti di depurazione, garantiscono di ottimizzare la qualità del prodotto, la massima sicurezza durante le varie fasi di lavorazione ed il minimo impatto ambientale.
A tal proposito nel 1999 l’azienda ha certificato la propria organizzazione secondo lo schema delle norme UNI EN ISO 9001, successivamente ha aderito agli schemi di certificazione per la catena di custodia Forest Stewardship Concil (FSC-CoC) e Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification schemes (PEFC-CoC).
Il mercato di riferimento in cui l’azienda opera è nazionale e internazionale, annoverando tra i propri clienti scatolifici, legatorie, cartotecniche e grossisti.

Name: FSC Deutschland
Description:
FSC ist die verlässlichste Organisation für die Absicherung wichtiger Umwelt- und Sozialstandards im Wald. Mit weltweit gültigen Standards, der beispiellosen Einbindung aller relevanten Interessengruppen und der Unterstützung durch namhafte Unternehmen sowie anerkannte unabhängige Umwelt- und Sozialorganisationen, gilt FSC als die glaubwürdigste Lösung für nachhaltige Waldwirtschaft. Die Zertifikatsvergabe erfolgt nach einer erfolgreichen Prüfung durch unabhängige Dritte, die min. jährlich wiederholt wird. Weltweit sind über 220 Millionen Hektar Wald FSC-zertifiziert. Über 62.000 Unternehmen verfügen weltweit über eine FSC-Zertifizierung für den Handel und die Verarbeitung zertifizierter Materialien.

In Deutschland sind rund 1,44 Million Hektar Wald FSC zertifiziert und rund 3.750 Unternehmen verfügen über eine Zertifizierung ihrer Produktkette nach den FSC Standards. In deutschen Wäldern steht der FSC u.a. für eine Waldwirtschaft, die den Wald nicht übernutzt, die biologische Vielfalt fördert und die gegenüber interessierten Bürgern*innen sowie Organisationen transparent handelt. Kahlschläge bei der regulären Holzernte sind untersagt und Pestizide dürfen nur eingesetzt werden, wenn dies gesetzlich gefordert wird. FSC setzt sich für die Mehrung natürlicher Mischwälder, die Schonung des Waldbodens, für den Schutz seltener Arten und Ökosysteme ein. Damit sind FSC-zertifizierte Wälder stabiler in einem sich wandelnden Klima und können als Ökosystem mehr CO² langfristig binden. Für die Menschen im Wald sichert FSC faire Entlohnung und mehr Bürgerbeteiligung im Wald. 

In Deutschland ist FSC als gemeinnütziger Verein tätig und engagiert sich gemeinsam mit seinen Mitgliedern für eine sozial und ökologisch verantwortungsvolle Forstwirtschaft die ökonomisch tragfähig ist.

Kayabaşı Şenol Ambalaj bu pazarda siz değerli iş ortaklarına sunduğu ürün ve çözümlerle destek olarak ambalaj zincirinde öne çıkan firmalar arasına girmiştir. 6000 m2 açık ve 4500 m2 kapalı alan üzerinde faaliyet gösteren firmamız 2005 senesinden bu yana köklü değişiklikler yaparak makina parkını yenilemeye devam ederek sizlere hızlı ve kazançlı çözümler sunmaya çalışmaktadır.
2013 senesinde üretimini 2 kat arttırarak daha çok hizmet vermeye başlamıştır. Yönetim kadrosunun ve ekibinin profosyenel yaklaşımı ile siparişleriniz hata oranı en düşük seviyede üretilmektedir.
Üretimimiz palaka şeklinde oluklu mukavva dışında ürünlerinizin son halini alacağı Sıvama, Kesim, Yapıştırma gibi işçilik hizmetleri de sunmaktadır. Tasarım halinde gelen siparişleriniz müşterilerinize ulaştırılmak üzere hazır halde teslim edilir.

PFI moved to Trondheim in 1997/98, and established a close cooperation with the Department of Chemical Engineering at the Norwegian University of Science and Technology. In 2004 PFI changed name to the Paper and Fibre Research Institute and became a subsidiary of Innventia in Stockholm, Sweden.

Name: OUATECO
Description:
Installée dans le sud-ouest de la France, notre entreprise Ouateco est une PMI familiale éco-responsable spécialisée dans l'isolation de vos maisons avec des matériaux biosourcés. Notre usine, installée dans les Landes, est un bâtiment industriel positif insufflée avec notre ouate de cellulose. En 2018, nous avons investi 2,5 millions d’euros de machines d’effilochage  innovantes afin de recycler les textiles usagés invendus d’Emmaus Lescar et de la Région Nouvelle Aquitaine en isolant biosourcé très performant au niveau thermique, écologique et le proposer au marché au prix de la laine de verre. Nos matériaux sont certifiés et garanties 50 ans de durée de vie.

Nous fabriquons entre autres de la ouate de cellulose à partir de papiers recyclés et de la fibre isolante créée à partir de déchets textiles. Notre mission est de proposer des produits performants, écologiques, économiques, le tout dans une démarche de bon sens. 

Nous proposons une nouvelle vision engagée et vertueuse de la production d’éco-matériaux pour le bâtiment afin d’aider notre société à évoluer vers des pratiques respectueuses de l’être humain et de notre environnement. Nous nous inscrivons dans une démarche d'économie circulaire en travaillant avec des acteurs locaux pour l'approvisionnement de nos matières (tels Emmaus Pau, les collectivités régionales, aéroport de Biarritz...).

Name: Wespine Industries
Description:
Quality Products. Reliable Supply.

Wespine Industries is jointly owned by Wesfarmers Limited and Fletcher Building Limited. We are a softwood sawmiller, specialising in the production of Pinus radiata, a premium quality plantation timber. Our product range includes dressed, stress graded and preservative treated timber suitable for construction, renovations, landscaping, pallets and packaging, and furniture manufacturing.

The Wespine sawmill has operated since 1985. In 1991/92, we signed an agreement with the Government of Western Australia to purchase sawlogs produced by state owned and private pine plantations, over a forty year period. Under the agreement, we committed to construct and operate a sawmill that would make full use of the economies of scale provided by the deal, producing timber for sale throughout Australia and the countries of the Pacific Rim. Our sawmill’s capacity is approximately 200,000 m3 output per year.

Whether you're a DIY builder or a major wholesaler, Wespine will be happy to answer any questions you might have about our products. To buy our products, we have a range of distributors available.

Name: TABSAL SCL

History
Although Tabsal is only 20 years old, the company was built from a success story that began in 1952. In this year Carpintería Saldise was born, who would become the founder of an important manufacturing company of interior doors called Industrias Carsal, a pioneer in Spain, manufacturing hidden edge doors in the ’60s, molded doors in the ’80s, lacquered doors in the 90’s and finally technical doors, both fire resistant and acoustic in the early years of this century. Tabsal was born in 1999, launched as a new initiative from Carsal, tasked with the technological challenge of replacing quality solid wood with a product composed of wood that solves the great and historical problems of its use, stability.
As a result of an internal R+D+I process developed in Carsal, the LIGNUMSTRAND product was finally born, and with it Tabsal.
Currently, the third generation of this family is in charge of the company
