Name: Laboratório de Celulose e Papel - LCP/UFV
Description:
O Laboratório de Celulose e Papel (LCP) é parte do Departamento de Engenharia Florestal da Universidade Federal de Viçosa (UFV). Inaugurado em 2 de dezembro de 1970, o LCP tem se dedicado ao ensino, à pesquisa e à assessoria técnica na área de celulose e papel. Em 1998, o LCP foi reconhecido pelo Ministério da Ciência e Tecnologia como Núcleo de Excelência, recebendo recursos do Programa de Apoio a Núcleos de Excelência – PRONEX.
Seus profissionais, por meio de atuação direta ou em colaboração com outras entidades locais, estaduais e nacionais, atuam não somente no ensino em nível de graduação, pós-graduação (especialização lato-sensu, mestrado e doutorado) e cursos de curta duração, mas também em pesquisas, no assessoramento técnico-científico e na prestação de serviços para empresas nacionais e internacionais na área de celulose e papel.

Operamos en los principales mercados internacionales con una red comercial propia garantizando una rápida respuesta en la relación con nuestros clientes.

Brandia fabrica papel kraft blanco/colores MG (machine-glazed) satinado a una cara con la posibilidad de producir un amplio rango de gramajes y con diferentes acabados para su procesado, impresión o transformación industrial.
Nuestro papel destaca por su alta calidad al utilizar únicamente materia prima 100 % fibra virgen en su producción.

Dadas sus características mecánicas y la optimización de cualquier proceso de impresión sobre la cara satinada, nuestro producto es idóneo para la fabricación de múltiples tipos de bolsas y embalajes.

Además de la búsqueda constante de mejora de la calidad de nuestros productos y servicios, en Brandia mantenemos el compromiso firme de fomentar un entorno de trabajo seguro para el personal y garantizar la protección del medioambiente.

Description:
Deevyashakti Paper, the flagship company of Deevyashakti Group, is a leading manufacturer of sustainably recycled paper products headquartered in Hyderabad, India. 

Our mission is to create high-quality packaging paper in an environmentally-responsible manner while generating remarkable shareholder returns. 

Deevyashakti Paper pioneered, and still is one of the few Indian companies, to operate a 4+1 multiwire technology, a fully computerized automatic DCS and QCS system, and offer a prompt after-sales service program. We hope to continue our rapid growth through constant technological advancements to serve our clients better in 60+ countries.

If you have the necessary experience, are motivated to innovate and wish to join a community of hardworking professionals, then please send your resume to careers@deevyashakti.com.

For more information, please visit www.deevyashakti.com.

Name: Cartiera Fornaci Srl
Description: Cartiera Fornaci was born in Fagnano Olona in the province of Varese in 1960, has for 50 years committed itself to creating a quality product that meets the needs of customers. In a very competitive context, serve the vanguard by deploying efficient machining techniques that allow the optimum use of the continuous machine. With this goal we have never stopped investing in improvement solutions for our product and working methods. In the day-to-day running of ecologically critical operations, respect for the environment is our priority. Our wastewater treatment and recirculation plants, waste storage and disposal processes guarantee the least social and environmental impact on the surrounding area. Strong in family tradition and experience, today we interpret the business to the company by answering the question promptly with Italian imprint.

Name: Sarl Starouate
Description:
Fondée en 2000, StarOuate a placé la satisfaction client au cœur de sa philosophie d'entreprise. Au fil des années, nous avons développé une expertise reconnue dans la transformation du papier qui nous a permis de nous établir comme un acteur de référence dans le secteur de l'hygiène personnelle à l'échelle nationale.

Dès nos premiers pas, notre entreprise a connu une croissance soutenue, portée par une vision claire et des valeurs fortes. Aujourd'hui, notre catalogue compte plus de 70 articles de qualité supérieure, répartis à travers 2 marques distinctives qui opèrent dans 2 secteurs d'activité stratégiques King Top et Fiesta.

La relation avec nos consommateurs étant primordiale, nous avons fait de la logistique et de la distribution un axe prioritaire de notre développement. Cette stratégie s'est concrétisée en 2019 par la création d'une filiale dédiée à la distribution, une initiative qui répond aux attentes grandissantes de notre clientèle tout en renforçant notre engagement de proximité.

Notre réseau logistique s'étend sur 11 plateformes de distribution stratégiquement implantées à travers le pays :
- Région Est : Annaba, Constantine, Batna, Sétif.
- Région Centre : El Djelfa, Alger, Bejaia 
- Région Ouest : Chlef , Tiaret, Oran, Sidi Bel Abbès

Cette infrastructure nous permet de desservir efficacement plus de 15 000 points de vente sur l'ensemble du territoire, grâce à l'expertise de nos 200 collaborateurs dédiés à la distribution.
Comme l'exprime notre Responsable de la distribution : « La fonction principale de notre entité logistique consiste à assurer la livraison optimale de notre portefeuille produits sur l'intégralité du territoire national, favorisant ainsi une proximité stratégique avec nos consommateurs finaux et renforçant notre capacité de réponse aux besoins du marché.

Name: Schut Papier
Description:
Schut Papier is a prominent and versatile manufacturer of high-quality, non-coated paper varieties. Our strength lies in the production of tailor-made products in accordance with the specific wishes of our clients. Schut can manufacture your own paper variety from as little as 2 tons. 
Our specialties include artists' paper, graphic paper, colored paper and technical paper. We also specialise in applying surface textures and watermarks. The use of various ingredients and tailor-made preparations enables us to anticipate the market's range of wishes quickly and flexibly.

The history of Schut Papier dates back to 1618. Since 1998, we have been an independently operating part of the strong French group Exacompta Clairefontaine S.A. Thanks to our continued focus on new areas of application, we have grown to become a powerful organisation with customers around the world.

Name: Lesbats Une forêt de Solutions
Description:
LESBATS est une entreprise familiale fondée en 1895 par Augustin LESBATS, arrière-grand-père de Paul LESBATS, l’actuel dirigeant.

A l’origine, LESBATS est une scierie mobile de pin maritime et depuis l’entreprise a intégré de nombreux autres savoir-faire : sciage canter, séchage, rabotage, traitement.

Aujourd’hui, LESBATS est un véritable industriel du bois et une équipe de 125 personnes est à votre
service.
Le négoce est depuis longtemps le client privilégié de LESBATS qui lui propose les solutions en pin maritime pour tous ses besoins, par l’intermédiaire d’un interlocuteur à son écoute et d’outils de communication de qualité.

LESBATS s’appuie sur un outil de production très performant et mène une veille technologique permanente pour accroître ses capacités de production. Le contrôle permanent de la qualité permet à LESBATS de garantir la fiabilité de ses produits et d’obtenir la satisfaction de ses clients.

Doté d’une logistique efficace et implanté en plein massif forestier, LESBATS optimise l’utilisation de la matière bois de la forêt au client, en minimisant son impact sur l’environnement.

Réactivité, qualité de service, dynamisme, jeunesse, autant d’atouts pour faire de LESBATS votre partenaire d’avenir.

Nouveauté 2017 : LESBATS se lance dans l’aboutage et le collage de composants pour la structure et pour l’habillage des façades ou des murs intérieurs.
C’est la naissance du PIN XXL !

Name: CARTEPSA
Description:
CARTEPSA es el principal proveedor del mercado local gracias a sus productos de alta calidad. 

Los productos CARTEPSA han alcanzado sus características estables combinando la tecnología más moderna con décadas de experiencia en la industria. Por lo que el resultado son las excelentes prestaciones que distinguen a los productos CARTEPSA.

En cooperación con nuestro departamento de Calidad y Servicio al Cliente, la red de ventas de CARTEPSA está comprometida a ofrecer un producto técnicamente superior y rentable para cada cliente. Los clientes de CARTEPSA pueden confiar en nuestra avanzada tecnología para la elaboración de tubos y envases y paletas de cartón para todos los usos finales. Nuestras operaciones a medida y entregas en plazo respaldadas por nuestra innovadora labor de I+D y nuestro extenso servicio al cliente hacen de CARTEPSA un socio con valor agregado.

•	Las operaciones de CARTEPSA se han basado sistemáticamente en un perfeccionamiento constante.
•	La tecnología especializada, el saber hacer aplicado, la investigación y la innovación continuas son factores clave para lograr los servicios y productos que necesitan nuestros clientes.
•	La marca CARTEPSA significa un incalculable valor añadido para el cliente.

Name: Bellotti Spa
Description: Bellotti has been operating on the market for almost 100 years as a manufacturer of plywood, lightweight composite panels and special integrated systems for the Nautical, Railway, Transport and Industry sectors. Its Research & Development department, extensive know-how and sustainable approach are the pillars of Bellotti. The Company stands out in the national and international market for the quality of its consultancy service, its wide range and the added value for the Clients. Bellotti has always been synonymous with the Evolution of wood thanks to its innovative mindset combined with its deep knowledge of wood types, their characteristics and behavior in different application fields. The result is a large offer of individual technological elements and complex multifunctional systems with acoustic and thermal performance, mechanical properties as well as light weight and vibration damping. The certification ISO 9001:2015 achieved by Bellotti is a confirmation of its approach to pursue the highest quality standards. With Headquarters in province of Como ( in northern Italy), the Company works with a total area of 120,000 m2 and a work force of more than 100 employees, boasting a turnover of more than 23 million Euros in 2021.

Name: Unipel Industria e Comercio
Description:
A Unipel está localizada na cidade de Bom Jesus dos Perdões, no interior do estado de São Paulo. De antemão, apresentamos uma história de comprometimento e solidez desde 1971.
A Unipel é hoje sinônimo de crescimento sustentável, confiabilidade e competitividade. Temos orgulho de ser uma empresa com 50 anos de reconhecimento no mercado de papelão e embalagens. Além disso, somos uma das empresas que mais cresceram nos últimos 20 anos neste segmento, em todo território nacional. 
E o mais importante, esse crescimento não para! Seguimos com energia para superar a cada ano as expectativas de nossos clientes.

Nossa história é escrita por pessoas comprometidas e responsáveis, que compartilham da visão de crescer e fazer melhor. São essas pessoas que fazem da Unipel uma empresa forte e singular. É esse ambiente dinâmico que fazemos questão de preservar, para sermos realmente um agente de geração de oportunidades. Se você é um dos nossos, envie seu currículo e faça parte!

Para manter esse prestígio, a Unipel investe em tecnologia nos processos produtivos e em seus maquinários. Implementamos automações e sistemas de supervisão para gerenciamento de nossas máquinas, além de equipamentos que atendam as normas vigentes e procedimentos internos de qualidade.
Sem dúvida, nossa equipe de qualidade, produção e engenharia trabalha em conjunto, a fim de implementar soluções de 5S, plano de manutenção preventiva/preditiva e procedimentos de qualidade. Afinal, garantimos a confiabilidade durante todo processo de fabricação.
São todos esses ativos e principalmente nossa base de pessoas que trabalham com muita dedicação e amor ao que fazem, que conseguimos firmar nossa história. Vamos, juntos, conquistar muito mais.

MISSÃO
Geração de valor para clientes, funcionários, sociedade e proprietários.

VISÃO
Ser, no menor prazo possível, uma das 10 melhores papeleiras e fabricantes de embalagens do Brasil.

VALORES
Honrar aos nossos compromissos com transparência, respeito,
Location: Bom Jesus dos Perdões, São Paulo

Name: Highland Solutions LLC
Description: Since Highland’s inception, we have taken a best-in-class approach to everything we do. From the team we formed to those proven, exceptional companies with which we have aligned our services, Highland has positioned itself to become an immediate high-level provider of sustainable wood pellets to Europe. We are a diverse group of professionals who share a commitment to excellence and success. Name: ISMA 2000 S.L
Description:
We are a company with over 40 years old and locatted in Mallorca,

Our Commitment to the Environment led us to start our business focused to the recycled.

At  Mallorca our activity is the Recovery and Classification of Paper and Paperboard and Sanitary Waste collection.
In addition to the unit of Mallorca, 60kms from Barcelona, we have the Paper Mill, where we manufacture on a Crescent Former with 2750mm of useful width, coils of Tissue Paper 100% recycled
Hygienic, or Wet Strength , with grammages ranging from 17grs / m² up to 45grs. / m² in White  and Color.

To 10kms from the Paper Mill is the Converting where we manipulate and transform paper reels into finished products of tissue, napkins, paper towels, toilet rolls. . .

All our products have the Ecolabel distinction, are 100% recycled and Family Wet Strength, are suitable for contact with food.

Name: Koninklijke VVNH
Description: De Koninklijke Vereniging van Nederlandse Houtondernemingen (VVNH) is de overkoepelende organisatie van zo'n 300 groothandelsbedrijven in hout en plaatmateriaal. Het overgrote deel van de circa 7.000 werknemers in deze branche is werkzaam bij de VVNH-lidbedrijven. De VVNH representeert de houthandelsbranche en is aanspreekpunt voor de overheid, binnenlandse en buitenlandse koepelorganisaties en maatschappelijke organisaties. Doel van de VVNH is belangenbehartiging voor de leden en het delen van kennis en informatie op economisch, sociaal, juridisch, technisch en milieugebied. Tot slot is de promotie van hout en de vele toepassingen ervan een belangrijk speerpunt.

Name: Salkım Forest Products
Description:
As one of the leader companies in the production and marketing of solid wood, Salkım Forest
Products owns various production facilities equipped with advanced technology both in the
country and abroad. Salkım has been rendering service by its sales points located in Romania,
Morocco and Uzbekistan in addition to its stores extended nationwide. Our Demirköy (Central)
factory is established over a total area of 125.000 m2 , including a covered area of 30.000 m2,
and has beech (fagus sylvatica) and oak (Quercus Patrea, Robur) timber production capacity
amounting to 150.000 m3 per year.
We have 2.000 m3 hardwood timber kiln drying capacity and 4.000 m3 beech timber steaming
capacities per month. Our annual oak and beech edge glued solidwood panel production
capacity is 13.500 m3. Our İstanbul factory is located over a covered area of 10.000 m2. where
6.000 m3 of pine and spruce edge glued solidwood panel production is available. Besides, serial
production of furniture is maintained from solidwood and chip board panels.
Focusing on customer satisfaction and raw material quality, advanced technological investments,
rapid and effective distribution of our products play important role for the development of our
company. Edge Glued Solidwood panel, of which the area of use is getting wider each passing
day, which is produced through very sensitive processes, hereby consists the main production
group of our company. Besides the production of solidwood panel, we also produce t&g flooring,
deckings, paneling, timber and wooden railway sleepers.
Salkım Forest Products, with its modern plants, technological equipment, expert production and
marketing staff, offers professional solutions for all of your necessities regarding the solid wood.

Name: Nortømmer AS
Description:
Omsetning
Nortømmer har hatt en jevn og god vekst siden etableringen. I løpet av omlag 20 år har tømmeromsetningen i NORSKOG/NORTØMMER økt fra ca 300.000 kubikkmeter i året opp til forventede 1,7 millioner kubikkmeter i 2017.

En slik markedsutvikling er et godt og tydelig bevis på at skogeierne verdsetter vår kvalitet, gode priser og service. Denne rekordveksten ville ikke vært mulig uten at vi over tid har hatt markedets beste priser. Kundenes tale er klar og kundene har alltid rett.

Lokalisering
NORTØMMER har sitt hovedkontor i Elverum, samt distriktskontorer i forskjellige geografier.

Fleksibilitet
Fordi vi opererer i hele Norge, har vi god oversikt over hvilke muligheter som finnes til enhver tid. For NORTØMMER er det viktig å finne de virkeskjøperne som betaler best for nettopp den skog som du som skogeier skal avvirke. Vi er fleksible mhp å flytte volumer, flytte driftsapparat og finne løsninger som passer leverandøren. Vi kan også inngå rotkontrakter.

Enkel administrasjon
Vi oppfordrer skogeier til å delta aktivt av planlegging og drift på egen eiendom. Der det er ønskelig kan vi ta planlegging og organisering av tømmerdrift.

Tjenester og kunnskap
I likhet med andre tømmerkjøpere, tilbyr vi nettbaserte løsninger til skogeier, der skogeier kan følge med på egne innmeldinger, innmålt tømmer, oppgjørsfakturaer osv.

Ved behov for faglig veiledning (planlegging, utmarksutnyttelse, skatt/økonomi, ungskogpleie m.m) har vi mulighet til å trekke inn NORSKOGs konsulentavdeling, Norges beste fagmiljø innen operativt skogbruk, skatt og skogøkonomi.

Actualmente, sus productos están presentes en más de 60 países de todo el mundo.

Name: SPCI Svenska Pappers- och Cellulosaingenjörsföreningen
Description:
Välkommen till SPCI - Svenska Pappers- och Cellulosaingeniörsföreningen. SPCI är en förening för personer med anknytning till skogsindustrin och som har ett intresse för teknik och nätverkande. SPCI verkar för att sprida information och kunskap inom ämnesområdet samt att skapa forum för erfarenhetsutbyte och kontakter mellan medlemmar. Föreningen bildades 1908 och har idag ca 2500 medlemmar.

SPCI äger Svensk Papperstidning, den ledande branschtidningen för nordisk massa- och pappersindustri sedan 1898.  Tack vare Svensk Papperstidning har verksamma i branschen, i drygt ett sekel, kunnat hålla sig uppdaterade om vad som händer inom massa- och pappersindustrin. Välkommen att kontakta oss på SPCI med synpunkter och idéer till artiklar!

Name: Klingele Embalajes Canarias, S.A.

Name: StickyPOS Asia Pacific
Description:
StickyPOS is a patented, linerless direct thermal label manufactured in the USA and distributed exclusively by CP Label Solutions in Asia Pacific.

Designed for the QSR industry, StickyPOS improves accuracy and speed of service during the order fulfilment process. The StickyPOS labels can be stuck to various surfaces during the preparation and fulfilment process which eliminates the need kitchen display screens, staples, sticky tape or writing on cups and packages.  

StickyPOS is the only self-cleaning label solution ensuring maximum printer uptime and eliminating residue build up in printers. In addition, StickyPOS, unlike traditional labels, produce zero waste and does not contain BPA, a chemical commonly used in thermal papers.   

The implementation of StickyPOS in all QSR, both large and small, in in Australia and overseas has resulted in a 50+% reduction in order fulfilment errors.

For more information on StickyPOS or to place an order call Michael Sfetkidis +61 425 764 999 and michael@cplabelsolutions.com.

Name: MONDIALCARTA - S.P.A.
Description:
Fondata nel 1974 e parte del Gruppo Puccetti, Mondialcarta S.p.A. è un punto di riferimento internazionale nella produzione di carta riciclata. 
Con sede a Diecimo, nel cuore della provincia di Lucca, l'azienda trasforma carta da macero in nuovi prodotti di alta qualità, contribuendo attivamente all'economia circolare.

I nostri prodotti:

Carta per copertina e carta per onda; entrambe realizzate al 100% con fibre riciclate, certificate FSC e provenienti da un sistema di approvvigionamento tracciato e controllato.
L'intero processo produttivo è studiato per essere sostenibile e monitorato in ogni fase della lavorazione, assicurando elevati standard qualitativi e ambientali: dalla selezione del macero, alla produzione della bobina finita.

L'attenzione all’ambiente non è solo un valore dichiarato, ma certificato.
Mondialcarta possiede certificazioni ambientali (EMAS e FSC) che attestano l'adozione di pratiche per la riduzione dell’impatto ambientale e l’impegno concreto verso un futuro più sostenibile.

Nel 2018, inoltre, Mondialcarta ha investito in un nuovo impianto di cogenerazione innovativo, in sostituzione del precedente risalente agli anni ’90.
Questo intervento ha ridotto significativamente l’impatto ambientale dell’azienda, riducendo estremamente il calore disperso nell'ambiente e le emissioni in atmosfera, dando modo alla cartiera di autoalimentarsi al 100% e di cedere la restante energia alla Rete Elettrica Nazionale.

Perchè sceglierci:

Da oltre 50 anni, uniamo tradizione e innovazione per offrire soluzioni cartarie affidabili e sostenibili.
La tracciabilità del macero, l’efficienza energetica e la nostra dedizione al cliente ci rendono un partner ideale per chi cerca qualità, responsabilità e visione a lungo termine.


 Località Renaccio, Diecimo (LU) – Italia
 mondialcarta.com
 info@mondialcarta.com

Name: Cartotecnica Rossi S.r.l.
Description:
Cartiera Rossi was founded in 1878 by Mr. Francesco Rossi.
From the beginning, Cartiera Rossi developed the research and production of all kinds of paper.

In 2005, Cartotecnica Rossi was born and absorbed the Crepe and Tissue Papers production.

The aim of Cartotecnica Rossi is to follow the historical experience and to pursue the tradition maintaining the know-how, the brand, the human and professional patrimony, the quality, the seriousness and the reliability.

The characteristics of our papers are suitable for many uses thanks to the extensibility, the strength and the shining colours: animation, packaging, confectionery, flower arrangements, decorations and window dressing.

Thanks to the continuous research and development of this simple material, our company, a worldwide leader, offer a large and complete range of natural metallised and water-resistant Crepe and Tissue papers.

All of our papers are ideal to express the fantasy and the happiness of your creations.

Name: Lake Utopia Paper
Description:
Lake Utopia Paper produces high quality corrugating medium for the North American and global markets, used in the production of packaging material for many of the world's favorite brands. Lake Utopia Paper’s corrugating medium is a key component of box packaging for a wide range of industries including food & beverage, consumer goods, industrial, agriculture and electronics.

Our mill in Utopia, New Brunswick has supplied customers in Canada, the U.S. and Latin America for over fifty years. Trust Lake Utopia Paper to produce the high quality corrugating medium you need, when you need it, so you can produce the high quality packaging your customers demand.

As part of the J.D. Irving, Limited Pulp and Paper Division, Lake Utopia’s commitment to sustainability is key to creating long-term value for our customers, enabling us to meet your evolving needs and expectations. Integrated rail, truck and ocean service ensures cost-effective and flexible delivery and warehouse managed inventory supports just-in-time shipments.

Lake Utopia’s highly responsive sales team provides exceptional customer service to our customers and our mill team is dedicated to excellence. Lake Utopia is a proud member of the J.D. Irving, Limited Group of companies, a family-owned corporation for more than 140 years, committed to uncompromising quality and customer service, as well as the sustainability of our land, water and air.

For 35 years Rainbow has been a leader in the manufacturer of hardwood plywood and veneer, and an innovator of dyed and reconstituted architectural veneers. Our manufacturing capabilities include cut to size, 4’ and 5’ widths with lengths to 14’. Thicknesses include paper and phenolic backed to 2”. We laminate to a variety of platforms including Particle, Fiberboard and Veneer core. Rainbow is second to none and specializes in cross grain and our custom sander allows us to sand with the grain.

Our commitment to the environment has influenced us to pursue FSC Certification, partnerships with various memberships, yet we were a leader in the use of alternative resins. We welcome your inquiries and look forward to forging new partnerships for now and the future.

Name: John Roberts Paper & Packaging
Description:
The original John Roberts founded the business in 1880 when he converted an old cotton mill into a paper making facility. Paper making activities were enhanced by paper conversion in 1939 and subsequently by corrugating in 1965. In 2002 the paper conversion and corrugating facilities were consolidated onto the current extended site when our purpose built paper conversion factory was added. Over the years the business has continued to invest in enhancements to its facilities and machinery to provide the breadth of products and the cost effective, flexible service which our customers value.
We are a key employer within the local community and the business continues to benefit from the depth of experience our people bring to it. This loyalty provides a high level of continuity and knowledge which characterises our values and approach to our customers.
We remain to this day a private, independent business which offers a unique combination of both corrugated and converted paper products in the UK. We believe that, together with our flexible and friendly approach to doing business, this represents a value offer for all our customers.
With todays emphasis on moving away from Plastic based packaging, we sit in a unique position in the UK market by offering a wide product range of 100% recycled, and recyclable, materials. We manufacture many products to replace oil based, non-renewable or recyclable, items with papers, such as Embossed Rolls, that are suitable for product cushioning without “costing the earth”
We have recently added Block Bottom bags to our product portfolio with the acquisition of two bag machines and we are the only UK manufacturer of the unique “Rose Shaped” Block Bottom bag.

Name: Kavyatri Paper & Board Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
At Kavyatri Paper & Board Pvt. Ltd., we specialize in delivering high-quality papers and boards that cater to both retail and bulk requirements. With over 30 years of expertise, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the Indian paper and board industry.

We are proud to be authorised distributors for Mehali Paper Mills Pvt. Ltd. and ITC PSPD (Paperboards and Specialty Papers Division), strengthening our ability to provide top-grade products trusted across industries. Our wide range includes office documentation products, business stationery, packaging boards, specialty & graphic boards and eco-friendly paper solutions that serve diverse business needs as well as personal usage.

At Kavyatri, we focus on delivering more than just products - We deliver value. Our timely service, innovative solutions and dedication to quality have helped us foster long-term relationships across industries. With a strong understanding of wholesale and B2B sales, we ensure competitive pricing, flexible order handling and complete client satisfaction.

Sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. Through eco-conscious products like EcoGreen, EcoGreen+ and EcoWhite, we actively promote “Thinking Green” while practicing responsible environmental, health and safety measures to reduce our ecological footprint.

Our motto is simple yet powerful: leadership in quality, inspired thinking and continuous innovation.

Name: Hemptology
Description:
At Hemptology, it’s not only about business and profits.  It’s about deep love and commitment to preserve our environment for the next generation.  The word ‘Hemptology’ suggests the sustainable alternatives offered by the Himalayan hemp that are truly eco-friendly in every sense.  Established in 2020, we only offer 100% natural and organic hemp products that are truly distinctive in appearance and quality.  

Hemptology is not merely an online hemp platform, it reflects our deep desire to protect the natural environment by promoting sustainable and pure products. 

Hemptology provides high-quality, sustainable hemp products responsibly sourced from Himalayan region of India to the UK retail and wholesale market. 

The Himalayan region is known for its purity, unique charm and mysticism. Hemptology aims to deliver the true fragrance and charm of Himalaya to your doorstep. 

We aim to make this world a better place through use of sustainable hemp products.  We believe that a business should not be just about capital and profits; it must have social objective. All of our products are obtained from sustainable, ecological and socially responsible sources primarily in the Himalayan Region of India.

Name: HUMAN RESOURCES MANAGEMENT @ Centruy Paper & Board Mills
Description:
We are a Public Limited Company listed on both the Karachi Stock Exchange (KSE) and Lahore Stock Exchange (LSE), proudly recognized as the largest integrated Pulp, Paper & Paperboard Mill in the country — complete with a state-of-the-art Corrugated Box Plant.

 Our Journey
Established in 1984, we began with an initial production capacity of 30,000 tons per annum (80 tons/day). Through dedication and innovation, we’ve grown exponentially over the years:

 Paper & Packaging Board Capacity: 250,000 tons/year

 Box Section Production: 325,000 boxes/day

 Our Commitment to Quality, Safety & Sustainability
We are proudly certified with:

ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management)

ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental Management)

ISO 45001:2018 (Occupational Health & Safety)

FSC CoC 40004:V3.0 (Responsible Forestry)

Our integrated approach ensures end-to-end quality, sustainable practices, and continuous improvement — serving diverse industries with world-class paper and packaging solutions.

 Follow us to stay updated on our latest innovations, career opportunities, and sustainability initiatives.

#PaperIndustry #PackagingSolutions #Sustainability #MadeInPakistan #ManufacturingExcellence #CorrugatedPackaging #FSC #ISO #IndustryLeaders

Name: LES MENUISERIES ARIEGEOISES
Description:
Depuis 1975, Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises fabriquent des cercueils en alliant tradition et savoir-faire français. 

Soucieuses de répondre aux besoins et budget du plus grande nombre de familles, cette entreprise a créé une offre étendue de gammes : du cercueil en pin brut au coffre américain en acajou vernis, du cercueil blanc d’un célèbre chanteur français au cercueil bleu d’un propriétaire de cabaret… ce sont plus de soixante modèles proposés aux familles.

En complément, Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises proposent également une offre de capitons et accessoires funéraires aux pompes funèbres indépendantes.

Plus qu’un fabricant, Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises accompagnent et conseillent en proposant :
- des gammes avec effet, adaptées au marché de chacun de ses clients, 
- la mise en place et la gestion de dépôts ventes de cercueils & accessoires 
- des outils d’aide à la vente pour faciliter la démarche de vente des conseillers funéraires et conforter les familles dans leur choix avec Exponeo, le show-room dynamique en 3D.

Avec plus de 130 collaborateurs, Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises produisent chaque année 75 000 cercueils sur ses lignes de production à Saint-Paul de Jarrat. 

Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises sont membres du label Les Artisans du Funéraire qui regroupe 4 sociétés familiales dont l’engagement est la qualité et le souci du travail bien fait.

Name: Roda Packaging
Description:
Roda Packaging, the biggest paper straw manufacturer in CEE, offers environmentally friendly, food safe, premium quality paper straws 100% made in Europe.
Roda Packaging is a member of  the Roda Group, investment company from Belgrade founded in 2012.
Our products are premium quality, produced exclusively from material certified for direct food contact and they provide a sustainable, alternative solution to plastic straw use.
In house technology, our own R & D and using only certified food safe European materials make us one of the leaders in the European market in this area.

Our mission is to provide a sustainable alternative solution to plastic straws.
We aim to produce paper straws for an affordable price so that our customers can easily transit away from plastic with a minimum extra cost.
Our vision is to educate clients and consumers about the benefits of using paper straws.

Name: Hemp Technology Ltd/ Now GB Animal bedding ltd
Description:
Global Pioneering Leader in the processing and conversion of crop straws into ecologically friendly engineering solutions.

From wood-chip replacement and animal bedding to civil engineering thermal and humidity balanced solutions (to name a few applications among many) our Hemp, Oil Seed Rape and Linseed (Flax) based products, used across the group are leading the way in the race to find 'green' solutions as alternatives to those less friendly materials we have come to take for granted.

Instead of farmers ploughing the left over straw back into the fields, or burning it, Hemp tech bedding take this waste product and separate the fibres from the core in our state of the art facility to produce an impressive range of materials, we are pushing the limits of the modern world to deliver innovation via nature.

Following an extensive history spanning three decades, Hemp tech bedding Ltd is now based in Didcot, Oxfordshire, 

For any company taking the sustainability of the planet as seriously as they take the generation of profitable innovative solutions, Hemp tech bedding Ltd is your first point of contact.

We supply companies that are providers of Mortars and Hemcrete building solutions used by M&S, St.Pancras and the British Museum among others.

Ofrecemos productos de papel, empaque y embalaje; enfocados en la transformación de varios tipos de papel principalmente: Kraft, Semi Kraft, lustre, opalina, bond, américa, corrugado ó cajas de cartón, tubos, cuñetes y esquineros para usos específicos de protección de materiales y productos para distintas industrias; así como para el cerrado y sellado de cajas (cintas adhesivas) y para el resguardo de documentos (folders), entre otros.

Name: Distripack
Description:
Somos Distripack, una empresa enfocada en satisfacer las necesidades de pequeños, medianos y grandes consumidores de empaques y planchas de cartón corrugado. 
Contamos con mas de 15 años de experiencia en el mundo del cartón con un gran equipo técnico altamente capacitado para la fabricación y distribución de nuestros productos.

Desde el inicio de nuestras operaciones nos convertimos en socios estratégicos de los clientes  que hasta el día de hoy nos vienen acompañando gracias al compromiso de calidad y servicio que venimos brindado en todos los sectores como Industriales, Farmacéuticos, Alimentaria, Minería, Agro-industrial local como Exportación etc.

Name: Terranova Papers, S.A.
Description:
Terranova Papers, S.A. is a company located in Barcelona, Spain that belongs to Miquel y Costas SA, now one of the leading manufacturer of specialty papers around the world.

Terranova Papers, S.A. was created in 2011 by initiative of MB Papeles Especiales, S.A. in order to exploit company synergies and to serve two diverse but highly demanding and growing industries such as:

–       Food and beverage market

–       Automotive market

Terranova Papers, S.A. has the most modern inclined-wire machine technology to ensure cost efficiency, reduction of environmental impact and continuous innovation in products and processes. This unique Technical Factory benefits from the Group experienced Technical Division, International sales network and most excellent R+D Department and Quality Management.

Name: The Beck Group
Description:
The Beck Group is a leading provider of forest products consulting services — in both North America and around the world — dedicated to helping businesses succeed in this new global economy. Our staff provides clients with the information and innovative solutions their companies require to meet the challenges of today's highly competitive environment.

Our experience in the areas of project planning, feasibility studies, mill modernizations, competitive assessments, operational due diligence, fiber supply, and timber procurement planning has earned our company an international reputation.

Our goal is to improve the performance of forest products companies through providing practical and cost effective consulting solutions.

Name: El-Obour for Paper Production
Description: El-Obour for Paper Production is an Egyptian-based paperboard company specialising in the manufacturing of Fluting and Testliner since 1996, with papermaking expertise spanning more than 5 decades.

Name: CERACARTA SPA
Description:
Ceracarta fu costituita agli inizi degli anni ‘60 dal Sig. Marino Bandini, attuale Presidente, con lo scopo di realizzare la produzione e la vendita di carte speciali e diagrammate utilizzabili negli apparecchi di registrazione dati in molteplici settori (sanità, trasporti, centri di ricerca), nonché biglietti per parcheggi e per trasporti.
Da allora la società si è sviluppata continuamente fino a diventare leader nazionale, nonché una delle più grandi aziende europee nel proprio settore con un fatturato di circa 28 milioni di Euro, di cui il 50% in export.
Attualmente essa svolge la sua attività in Forlì, in uno stabilimento di circa 3200 mq. insistente su un’area di circa 9000 mq. e conta un personale di 50 persone.
La proprietà dell’Azienda è interamente detenuta dalla famiglia Bandini di Forlì.

Nel corso dello stesso decennio la Società ha incrementato il personale, passando da 35 a 50 persone e ha costantemente rinnovato il proprio parco produttivo con investimenti medi di circa 400.000 Euro/anno.
In continuità con tale andamento è stata recentemente acquistata una nuova rotativa a 8 colori che permetterà di ampliare ulteriormente la gamma di prodotti e affacciarsi su nuovi mercati.
Nel 2013 la crescita è avvenuta anche per linee esterne grazie all’acquisizione della società Pirrone S.r.l di Milano che, essendo ben radicata nel mercato dei prodotti speciali (quali ticket per trasporti e parcheggi, biglietti per scommesse e lotterie), ha permesso alla società Ceracarta di ampliare la propria copertura sul mercato.
Ceracarta è amministrata da un Consiglio di Amministrazione composto da 4 membri, presidente della stessa è il fondatore,
il Sig. Marino Bandini, e amministratore delegato il dott. Alessandro Bandini.

Name: Central Advance
Description:
Há 37 anos atuamos com excelência no mercado de distribuição de papéis, atendendo gráficas, editoras, copiadoras e conviterias em todo Brasil.

Nosso diferencial está na combinação de qualidade, agilidade e respeito. Contamos com sede própria, filial em Campinas e uma estrutura preparada para oferecer uma ampla variedade de produtos, com entregas rápidas, sem burocracia e sempre a preços justos.

Mais do que fornecedores, somos parceiros estratégicos de nossos clientes e fornecedores, construindo relações sólidas baseadas em ética, confiança e comprometimento.

Com uma equipe especializada e dedicada, a Advance segue firme em seu propósito: disponibilizar os melhores recursos para impulsionar o crescimento e o sucesso do mercado gráfico brasileiro.

Realize sua cotação conosco e tenha acesso a condições personalizadas no mercado.

Name: Cajas e Impresiones Cometa S.A. de C.V.
Description:
Cajas e Impresiones Cometa es una empresa dedicada a la fabricación de envases plegadizos y micro corrugado de cartón; expandiéndonos en fabricación de envases de plásticos de polietileno de alta densidad. 

Desde el año de 1993, ofrecemos nuestros servicios en la ciudad de León, Guanajuato, comenzando con la fabricación de envase micro corrugado enfocados 100% a la industria del calzado, abarcamos diversos sectores industriales, orientando nuestros servicios a la atención de las necesidades de la industria automotriz, alimenticia, ferretera, farmacéutica, electrodomésticos, entre otras. 

Actualmente contamos con equipos 100% automatizados y con innovación en nuestros procesos, con acabados en barniz uv a registro, barniz UV en plasta, en terminados brillantes y mate; laminados metalizados, relieve, hot stamping y gofrado. 

La calidad de nuestros procesos está avalada por la certificación ISO 9001:2015 certificación lograda desde el año 2010, hemos apostado firmemente por la formación continua de nuestros colaboradores y por la implementación de herramientas de calidad que nos ayuden a ofrecerle un servicio eficiente y confiable

Name: Jaap de Vries Produkties
Description:
Jaap de Vries Produkties since 1997 the absolute specialist in the field of sustainable wood, with which we create different applications. Use designation poles, signs, fences, bridges and information boards. We always start from the highest possible quality and based on that institution to build out a broad customer base. We work for municipalities, institutions, companies and individuals. We supply outdoor furniture of different kinds of wood. It is the high quality of the material, which together with the durability ensures that you can expect nothing less than the best.

We work exclusively with sustainable wood, based on the cradle-to-cradle principle. We believe that we are as sustainable as possible should deal with materials like wood and it also is important to look carefully at the origin of this. We are working on different applications and can be extremely flexible service, but always on the basis of our love for the materials.
Read more about us in the company or the latest news. See also our references and of course the interesting links. We give you this way like a complete picture of Jaap de Vries Produkties, the specialist in the field of applications with sustainable timber.

Name: FULGHUM FIBRES
Description:
Fulghum Fibres, processes approximately 15 million tonnes of wood and bark annually into wood chips and residual fuels at its 32 wood chipping mills, 26 of which are located in the U.S. and 6 of which are located in South America.

Fulghum Fibres commands an estimated 70% of the U.S. contract chipping business and approximately 6% of total U.S. chipping market.

Name: JC Paper
Description: Wholesale distributor of Printing Papers, Janitorial Supplies, Food Service Disposables, and Packaging Supplies. Next day delivery throughout most Northern California cities and the greater Reno Nevada market. Stocking over 8000 items in 205,000 square foot Fremont California warehouse.

Name: The Freeman Corporation
Description:
Our company manufactures sliced and rotary hardwood veneer. We were founded in 1914 by George E. Tomlinson, the great-grand father of our current owners. Until Mr. Tomlinson’s death in 1953, the company (called The George E. Tomlinson Co. at the time) manufactured hardwood lumber, tobacco hogsheads and Tomlinson Takedown banquet tables. Following Mr. Tomlinson’s death in 1953 his grandson, Gene Freeman, took over the business and expanded the company by adding the export of walnut veneer logs and then building his own hardwood sliced veneer production facility in 1967. In 1982 Mr. Freeman’s two sons, Reid and George Freeman, joined the business. In 1990 a rotary veneer operation was added. Throughout the past 25 years, the company has constantly reinvested back into its operations and has now expanded to encompass a 44 acres site with over 6 acres under roof.

Our products are sold throughout the United States and to customers in over 20 other countries. Typical customers are manufacturers of office furniture, doors, 4x8 panel producers, kitchen cabinet and residential furniture manufacturers, as well as sales to custom millwork businesses. In addition, our rotary veneer products can be found in engineered flooring for most of the major manufacturers.

Name: Paper & Board International Corporation
Description:
Paper & Board International Corporation (PBIC) was established in 2003. The company specializes in the supply of the following paper and board products: uncoated wood free, coated paper and board, photocopy paper, folding box board, coated duplex board, one side and two side P.E boards, tissue paper, sandwich paper, bleached and unbleached kraft paper, kraft liner, test liner, fluting, white top test liner, newsprint, and LWC.

Our products are supplied from mills in Europe, Indian Sub Continent and the Far East and our customer base spans across the Middle East, Africa, and Indian Sub Continent. 

To place an order or for any other information, please contact - bunnymehra@hotmail.com

Name: Saarthak Vanijya
Description:
SAARTHAK VANIJYA means Meaningful Commerce.

The Khemka Group / Saarthak Vanijya is a traditional paper trading company based at Varanasi. Over the past six decades, the company has become a well-known name in paper marketing & trading across India. 

We pride in having long-standing relationships with our clients and industry leaders such as Century Pulp & Paper, Orient Paper, JK Paper, Trident Group, and many others.

Our offices in state capitals and key commercial hubs, serve the geographic regions of Uttar Pradesh, Chhattisgarh, Jharkhand, Bihar, West Bengal, New Delhi, and Gujarat.

Khemka Group is committed to making all future investments in support of the concept of ‘Circular Economy’ as part of the GreenPack Mission 2030.

GreenPack was incubated by The Khemka Group in 2018 to serve the HoReCa industry, by offering eco-friendly custom-made food packaging products.
Within a year of commencement of operations, we grew to become one of India's top raw material suppliers for the Paper Cup Industry.

We have come a long way from just providing raw material to the HoReCa Industry to manufacturing our own Paper Cups.

Moving forward, we intend to invest heavily in reorienting our business activities and align them with the vision of Sustainable Development Goals. Our aim is to make our business operations and our product line CARBON NEUTRAL over the next five years.

Name: Eminent Paper Industries LLP
Description:
Eminent Paper Industries LLP is a kraft paper manufacturing plant based in Kosamba, Surat, Gujarat. With a daily production capacity of 250 tons (6,500 MT/month), we specialize in producing high-grade, 100% recycled kraft paper for packaging applications across diverse verticals such as FMCG, automobiles, healthcare & pharmaceuticals, chemicals, textiles, food industry, e-commerce, heavy industrial packaging, and retail—serving both domestic and export markets.

We have steadily built a strong presence in the corrugation industry, trusted by 750+ clients across 27+ cities and 5+ states. Our 95% on-time delivery rate reflects our commitment to reliability and supply chain efficiency.

We operate with a zero-compromise quality policy, backed by an ISO-certified management system. Every roll undergoes rigorous testing for GSM, burst factor, moisture control, and surface smoothness. To ensure complete customer satisfaction, samples are approved before bulk dispatch, and deliveries are managed with full CRM team coordination and strong logistics support—guaranteeing defect-free, on-time supply.

At Eminent Paper, we are krafting a sustainable legacy, combining advanced technology with eco-friendly manufacturing to deliver durable, high-performance kraft paper that enhances both product protection and brand value.

Name: Sona Commercial LLC
Description:
SONA Commercial LLC deals in fine / specialty paper, 100% recycled paper and paper boards. We have exclusive collaboration with world’s leading paper mills and having sole right of marketing and trading of some of the premium brands in fine paper & recycled papers

In the few months since its existence, SONA Commercial LLC has made a name in the market because of its premium quality products and competitive pricing.

The company is young and exuberant and always strives to achieve customer satisfaction by offering the best quality products. The company though young, is guided by the best management team and a group of highly experienced consultants with years of experience behind them.

Name: Poppies Europe Ltd
Description:
Poppies Europe Ltd are a UK based independent napkin manufacturer. We offer the full disposable tissue range which includes napkins in 1ply, 2ply 3ply & Airlaid offered in a wide range of colours. We have the ability to offer bespoke printed napkins and are market leaders in this field with our own in house flexographic print team. 

An established and accredited member of the CHSA soft tissue standard scheme we also manufacture hygiene tissue including centrefeed, toilet tissue & hand towels.

Name: Europly Woodproducts
Description:
Sinds 2001 is Europly Woodproducts uw gedroogd eiken leverancier. Wij importeren nat Europees eiken en drogen dit vervolgens zelf op professionele wijze. Hiervoor schakelen wij ons zusterbedrijf Drooghout Gendringen in. Samen vormen wij de Gendringen Hout Groep.

Gedroogd Eiken leveren wij in verschillende kwaliteiten. Tevens hanteren wij naast QF-normeringen ook kwaliteiten als mix- en meubelkwaliteit. Zo heeft u een ruime keuze in kwaliteiten voor zowel ons conventioneel gedroogd europees eiken als voor ons eigen merk TeeWood. (Dit eiken is gestoomdroogd waardoor het een warme, donkere verkleuring krijgt, tot in de kern van het hout).

De meubel- & interieurbouw vraagt om verschillende afmetingen eikenhout. Om die reden houden wij alle gangbare breedtes op voorraad. Standaard diktematen zoals 27- 40- & 50mm maar ook dikkere varianten zoals bijvoorbeeld 80mm zijn uit voorraad leverbaar. Mocht het voor u niet mogelijk zijn een volledige bundel te kopen dan denken wij ook  met u mee. Alle kopmaten zijn leverbaar in diverse lengtematen en worden keurig verpakt per bundel, klaar voor transport!

Van een deel van onze voorraad ruw eiken maken wij hier in Gendringen onze meubelpanelen. Massief verlijmde panelen produceren en leveren wij in verschillende specificatie.

Omdat wij tevens beschikken over een goed uitgerust machinepark kunnen wij de meest uiteenlopende houtbewerkingen voor u uitvoeren, desgewenst ook in loonwerk, indien u uw eigen hout aanlevert. Hierbij kunt u denken aan hout laten schaven, hout laten korten maar ook hout schuin korten en neigen kunnen wij voor u uitvoeren.

Name: Advanced Speciality Materials LLP
Description:
ASM, is a company from India which happens to be one of the best suppliers in the Synthetic Non Tearable Paper Space. With over 300 different range of Synthetic Papers varying from 12 micron to 1200 micron ASM has the widest range in the Synthetic Paper Industry. From Matte to Gloss, Textured to Mettalic, Direct Thermal to Thermal Ribbon Transfer, Roll to Sheets, Colored to Speciality, Security to Customised we have it all. But the reason to do business with us is none of the above -the biggest reason is our ability to develop customised solutions everytime, which happens only after understanding our customers true requirement and suggesting the product which would fit them absolutely right.   

We take great pride in our knowledge in this segment and we work to share this knowledge with the industry which made us one of the 1st Synthetic Paper Brands Globally to write a blog every week educating the  industry on new applications, the wide usage and varied possibilities with Synthetic Papers, read the below blog to know more about us
http://www.syntheticpaperindia.com/blog/
 
We started with providing Synthetic Papers in the Printing Industry but in the journey we matured to find amazing opportunities to work  into the Footwear Industry, Filtration industry, Engineering Industry, Healthcare and many more.

While we work to develop new applications for the existing products, we relentlessly work on developing new products which are new to the market, which has led us to develop some very special relations with our customers.

We agree we are a young company today, but our dreams are to be the Largest Supplier of Synthetic Papers Globally and we look forward to work with every possible individual from every possible market globally to help us reach this dream.

Name: PAPTAC
Description:
PAPTAC is a Canadian-based non-profit organization, dedicated to improving the technical and professional capabilities of its members worldwide, and to the advancement of the pulp, paper and forest products industry.

Name: Cosmo Specialty Fibers, Inc.
Description: Cosmo Specialty Fibers, Inc. (CSF) is a privately-held company producing dissolving pulp at the former Weyerhaeuser Specialty Cellulose Mill in Cosmopolis, Washington. With the goal to build on the Weyerhaeuser legacy of producing a high-quality dissolving wood pulp, CSF resumed market-grade pulp production on May 1, 2011 and is completing acetate qualification.  Since opening, CSF has reduced operating costs over 40% and executed a global sales strategy to ensure financial sustainability. Our priorities include exceptional production reliability and quality, implementation of world-class safety standards, best-in-class environmental impact status and a commitment to the values of the surrounding communities.

Name: Unique Wood S.A.
Description: Realizamos la gestión integral – administrativa, técnica, ambiental y social – de proyectos de reforestación de acuerdo a los estándares internacionales del FSC.

Name: CAMBIUM TECH
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la gestión forestal sostenible con un alto componente en I+D+I y con dos objetivos fundamentales: la obtención de productos de la mayor calidad a través de la integración directa entre el monte y la valorización industrial de sus productos, y la conservación y mejora del entorno natural y social en los cuales actuamos.

En Cambium Tech trabajamos con dos productos fundamentales:

- Plantas Aromáticas y Medicinales (PAM): principalmente  trabajamos con jara (cistus ladanifer) de los montes gestionados directamente por nosotros y procesada el mismo día que es extraída para conservar todas sus propiedades. A estos efectos se procesa sin ser triturada por medio de arrastre de vapor, obteniendo como principales productos, hidrolato, aceite esencial y ládano. Estos productos tienen un alto valor añadido por su composición en sectores como la cosmética, perfumería, alimentación o el sector médico y biotecnológico.
Así mismo, Cambium Tech tiene una línea de productos para el sector retail basada en los hidrolatos y aceites esenciales (jara, acícula del pinus pinaster, etc.) que se comercializa bajo la marca CAMBIUM ESSENTIALS.
Adicionalmente, nuestras instalaciones están preparadas para trabajar con cualquier otra PAM (romero, lavanda, hierbabuena, eneldo), pudiendo dar servicio a terceros que quieran trabajar con sus hidrolatos o aceites esenciales.

- Resina: obtenida del pino rodeno (pinus pinaster), en Cambium Tech somos pioneros en la utilización a nivel industrial de nuevos sistemas de extracción de la resina, que son más seguros para los trabajadores, más benignos para el pino y el entorno, y a través de los cuales se obtiene un producto de mayor calidad y limpieza.

La gestión forestal se realiza en bosques con certificado FSC para la sostenibilidad y trazabilidad del producto, así como el impacto verificado en la Conservación de la Biodiversidad.

Name: Xiamen C&D Paper & Pulp
Description: Xiamen C&D Paper &Pulp Co., Ltd. founded in 1992, and have become the largest marketer and supply chain solution provider of Paper and Pulp industry in China in last 19 years.  It's a sole subsidiary of Xiamen C&D Inc., a listed company in Shanghai Stock (stock code: 600153)  an Top 100 Enterprises in China of Standard & Poor's List with revenue above 10 billions USD..

Name: Forestadora Tapebicua S.A.
Description: Tapebicua Group is an industrial forestry firm that combines responsible forestry with the manufacture and distribution of premium products. The company develops forestry activities in the province of Corrientes and owns two sawmills and a processing plant.

Name: Tonelli S.p.A.
Description:
L’azienda Tonelli S.p.A. nasce nella Repubblica di San Marino, su iniziativa del suo fondatore Italo Tonelli che all’inizio degli Anni Cinquanta trasforma l’attività di falegnameria in magazzino per la vendita legname.

Negli anni Sessanta l’ingresso dei figli in azienda porta ad un ulteriore sviluppo dell’attività con il brevetto nido d’ape Aston, un particolare prodotto in cartone che viene utilizzato nella costruzione delle porte e più in generale nel settore dell’arredamento, nelle costruzioni in legno e costruzioni antisismiche.

Negli Anni Settanta e Ottanta con nuovi investimenti in macchinari per la lavorazione e la nobilitazione dei pannelli,  l’attività commerciale si trasforma in una vera e propria realtà industriale che cresce e si sviluppa nel corso degli anni fornendo prodotti sia all’artigiano che all’industria dei mobili e delle porte.

Successivamente l’attività si espande con l’apertura di due nuovi stabilimenti in Italia e in Francia per la produzione di un nuovo prodotto, totalmente ecologico, realizzato con un anima di nido d’ape ricoperto con fogli di carta:  il pannello Ecopan, che grazie alle sue caratteristiche di leggerezza e resistenza viene impiegato nel settore dell’imballaggio. Oggi Ecopan trova anche altre applicazioni, dall’edilizia ai componenti d’arredo e oggetti di design.

Name: Melvis Papéis
Description:
Somos uma empresa de conversão de papéis localizada em Cambará do Sul, na Serra Gaúcha, com destaque na produção de papel toalha e papel higiênico.

Name: Jordan Paper And Cardboard Factories Company.PLC
Description: Jordan Paper & Cardboard Factories Company.PLC was founded 40 years ago and since then has shown dramatic growth with sophisticated manufacturing facilities, and with our extensive knowledge of the industry you can have confidence in us providing you with a quality product, on time and at a competitive price. JPCF has two plants: Paper plant and Corrugated boxes plant with a wide range of products that include paper, cardboard rolls, single face, sheets and packages of corrugated board manufactured for storing and transporting goods.

Name: Fabrika hartije Beograd
Description:
Fabrika hartije Beograd d.o.o. osnovana je 1921. godine i ima najdužu tradiciju proizvodnje ambalažnih papira u Srbiji.

Name: ETIMO Biomateriales
Description:
Somos Etimo, un laboratorio de biomateriales que trabaja a partir de residuos de la industria gastronómica. Somos un equipo transdisciplinario en el cruce entre el diseño y la ciencia, con base en el Centro Metropolitano de Diseño, en la Ciudad de Buenos Aires.

Desde el 2019 nos encontramos desarrollando biomateriales a partir de residuos orgánicos. Investigamos, diseñamos, damos charlas y educamos sobre la nueva cultura material que se está gestando y de la cual somos parte. Transformamos residuos orgánicos en materiales resistentes, reutilizables y biodegradables que reducen la extracción y uso de recursos vírgenes. 

En 2023 lanzamos nuestro primer producto, una taza de café reutilizable y compostable hecha a base del residuo del café, la borra.
Hoy nuestra Taza Borra se encuentra en más de 15 cafeterías de Buenos Aires insertándose en la industria de manera circular y expandiéndose de a poco en toda la Argentina.

¿Nuestro propósito? reducir los residuos del territorio local, empezando por las cocinas y ayudar a mejorar la gestión de residuos, revalorizando los recursos orgánicos.

Somos parte de la revolución biomaterial. 
¿Nos acompañas?

Name: Engineered Wood Products Association of Australasia
Description:
The Engineered Wood Products Association of Australasia Ltd (EWPAA) is an industry-driven organisation, voluntarily funded by plywood, LVL, particleboard and MDF manufacturers in Australia, New Zealand, Fiji and Papua New Guinea. The EWPAA is also supported by affiliate members in Australia and New Zealand who are suppliers of goods and services to the industry.

The EWPAA has developed and maintains a high level of respect across the broad range of our contacts and clients both domestically and internationally as an industry-wide organisation with an emphasis on industry self-help. The range of products manufactured and merchandised by Association members include interior and exterior plywood products, structural plywoods used for formwork, residential and commercial flooring, wind and earthquake bracing, and feature cladding; and Laminated Veneer Lumber and I-beam products used in both commercial and residential structures.

The market development program coordinated by the EWPAA on behalf of its members, comprises quality control, product certification, chain of custody certification, education and training, standards and codes development, technical promotion, research and development; and market maintenance.

Name: Mark Lyndon (UK) Ltd.
Description:
We are a UK company with excellent access to the export market in china for Recovered Paper. 
Our supplies in the main are delivered to the recycling facilities in China are operated by the Lee and Man paper group. Mark Lyndon is an exclusive supply agent to this group of paper producers. Lee and Man is the second largest corrugated cardboard recycler in China and operates some of the largest and most technological and environmentally advanced cardboard recycling machines in the world.
The Lee and Man group recycle over 5 million tonnes per annum of old corrugated boxes and up to one and a half million tonnes of this recycling is provided by Mark Lyndon here in the UK. At over 5 million tonnes of recycling capacity, the Lee and Man group is over twice as large as the largest UK recycler.
Supplying one of the global leaders in the recycled corrugated box market requires a global supply chain with local knowledge. Mark Lyndon Paper Enterprises UK  Ltd also known as Lee and Man paper group ensures the Chinese based giant receives a continual supply of this valuable raw material.
We currently export up to 7,000 40 ft containers each month, so to ensure a complete hassle free service to our suppliers we have in place a comprehensive and dedicated in house shipping team to ensure all aspects of export shipping is managed to the satisfaction of our supplier’s requirements.
Our UK Recovered paper division is based at the heart of the UK in Nottingham, allowing us to easy access to all UK Locations and provide the high standards required to ensure our suppliers are able to recycle with the minimum of fuss and conform to UK, European and Chinese environmental standards.
Being the UK’s largest exporter of scrap cardboard means we have access to close to 1 million PRN’s per year, if you have any requirement for paper PRN.’s we should be in your contact list.

Name: Vistaraku
Description:
Vistaraku is the manifestation of our love for nature and humanity.
At Vistaraku, we create sustainable alternatives to to plastic and promote a sustainable lifestyle while empowering rural women. 

Our product: Biodegradable leaf plates and bowls made from leaves of Palash  tree (scientific name: Butea monosperma). These leaves are known for their  anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, anti-diabetic, diuretic, analgesic, anti-tumour and astringent properties, which makes these plates not only a sustainable option but also a super healthy one!

Our leaf plates and bowls are made by the women of Siddipet in the village of Thimmareddypalli which lies in the outskirts of Hyderabad, India. The process involves collecting leaves, stitching them and heat pressing them along with food grade cardboard to provide stiffness and strength.

Name: Hahnemühle FineArt France
Description:
Peu d’entreprises dans le monde peuvent être fières d’avoir une histoire aussi ancienne que celle d’Hahnemühle. La fabrique de papier Hahnemühle, fondée en 1584 à Solling dans le sud de la Basse-Saxe, s’est résolument développée dans le droit fil de ses pères fondateurs et est devenue une manufacture proche de ses clients et innovante.

Évidemment, les produits et les méthodes de fabrication ont quelque peu changé depuis 1584. Il s’agissait au début de papiers à écrire faits main ; plus tard se sont ajoutés des papiers beaux-arts et plus récemment toute une gamme de papiers FineArt pour l’impression digitale jet d’encre, inventés par Hahnemühle. De plus, les papiers Hahnemühle sont utilisés depuis des décennies dans les produits industriels et les processus de fabrication ainsi que dans les laboratoires de recherche. Mais certaines choses sont restées identiques : par exemple, notre haut niveau d’exigence en termes de qualité qui garantit à nos clients les papiers les plus purs pour l’art ou les applications techniques.

Name: Stora Enso Warsaw
Description:
Łączy nas klimat, łączą nas wartości. Łączy nas chęć do bycia częścią czegoś ważnego i pracowania w miejscu, które aktywnie działa na rzecz zrównoważonego rozwoju. 

Stora Enso jest wiodącym dostawcą produktów odnawialnych w zakresie opakowań, biomateriałów, konstrukcji drewnianych i papieru, a także jednym z największych prywatnych właścicieli lasów na świecie. Wierzymy, że wszystko, co dziś jest wytwarzane z materiałów kopalnych, jutro może być wytwarzane z drzew. Zrównoważony rozwój i odpowiedzialne praktyki biznesowe są głęboko zakorzenione w naszej strategii.

Nasze niskoemisyjne produkty na bazie włókien są odnawialne i nadają się do recyklingu. Oferują rozwiązania w zakresie zmian klimatycznych i promują pozytywny wpływ na środowisko, umożliwiając naszym klientom stanie się bardziej przyjaznymi dla środowiska. 

Warszawski oddział Stora Enso odpowiada za kompleksową obsługę klientów z segmentu Packaging Materials. 

What unites us is the climate, shared values, the desire to be part of something important and to work in a place that is actively working towards sustainability.

ENG below
Stora Enso is a leading supplier of renewable products in packaging, biomaterials, engineered wood and paper. We're also one of the largest private forest owners in the world. We believe that everything that is today's fossil material can be tomorrow's tree material. Sustainability and responsible business practices are deeply rooted in our strategy.

Our low-carbon fiber-based products are renewable and recyclable. They enable our customers to become greener by providing solutions to climate change and promoting a positive environmental impact.

The Warsaw division of Stora Enso is responsible for providing comprehensive services to customers from the Packaging Materials segment.

Name: Fibraresist Cellulose Eco Friendly

Description:
The BC Forest Safety Council(BCFSC) is the Health and Safety Association for BC's forestry industry. We have been serving industry since 2004 with a vision to see every forestry worker goes home safe - every day.

BCFSC is dedicated to helping reduce the potential for forestry worker injuries and fatalities in BC. We work alongside industry experts and advisory committees to help keep workers safe and help companies build a strong safety culture. 

BCFSC develops and provides resources, information, education and training for forest harvesting, sawmills and wood pellet manufacturing throughout BC. 

Our goal is to ensure safety remains a top priority in all forestry work places by offering:
•	SAFE Companies Certification
•	Faller Certification
•	In-field safety advice
•	Safety training courses
•	Auditing & consultation services 
•	Resources & safety planning tools

For more information, visit our website.

Name: Papyrus Australia Ltd
Description:
Papyrus has a patented conversion technology which converts banana trunk waste into fibre based products and will license this to appropriate partners around the globe.

Papyrus Australia’s mission is to displace plastic and forest-sourced products. We do this through the development and implementation of technology that creates reusable products from agriwaste. 

Seeking a sustainable, eco-friendly response to growing environmental uncertainty, we have developed a world-first technology which takes waste banana trunk and converts it into alternatives to fibrous bioplastics. 

To directly address the negative impacts of deforestation and plastic in our waterways and environment, our long-term vision is to license our technology to suitable entities that will establish banana veneer and banana fibre production factories in locations where bananas are grown. 

Our world-first technology promotes a circular economy, whereby it creates a valuable product from waste materials that would otherwise negatively contribute to climate change and our deteriorating environment. 

The patented, zero-waste process means developing and distributing sustainable alternatives to forest-sourced fibre and fibrous bioplastics is more than just a goal or a vision – it’s our reason for being, and a core part of our operation internationally.

Atrelado ao grande desenvolvimento do setor já há décadas e com excelentes perspectivas para o futuro, a JRM Florestal entrou no mercado de serviços de prestação de serviços de Mão de obra e Máquinas florestais da fase de implantação até a manutenção das florestas de eucalipto e  nativas, com atuação inovadora no setor agrícola, (canavieiro e cafeeiro),  ciente de que o desenvolvimento tecnológico, sustentável e renovável são praticas indispensáveis para conservação do meio ambiente e do progresso da humanidade. 

A experiência do Fundador e a formação da  sua equipe que somam anos de experiência no setor florestal, atuando como executores e gestores de serviços nos estados de São Paulo, Minas Gerais e Mato Grosso do Sul.

Name: Coldwater, part of Valmet from 1 March 2022
Description:
Coldwater is a global supplier of mechanical consumables and services for paper machines.

Coldwater is the largest supplier of suction roll seals and accessories in the world providing Coldflex and GTEC flexible rubber graphites from four owned facilities and several stocking distributors to paper mills in more than 70 countries.  We also provide air loading tubes, springs, and holders for the complete sealing assembly.  Suction roll energy audits are offered that make recommendations to significantly reduce the drive load through a custom seal fitting process.  24 hour emergency service. 

Coldwater is also one of largest suppliers of UHMW and ceramic drainage elements, plus the patented Acu-Formation products including adjustable angle, height, and pulse blades in ceramic (aluminum oxide or silicon carbide) or UHMW.  With 11 meter CNC routers in Atlanta, Georgia USA and Kil, Sweden, Coldwater offers four grades of UHMW from virgin to near ceramic quality.    Large inventories of raw materials and t-bars are on hand to provide quick deliveries.

Coldwater manufactures the Fab-Curl edge control system to eliminate stock leaks on the table and manage waves.  The system can improve basis weight, moisture and TSO angle profiles and is easily removed for wire changes and adjustments.

Coldwater Doctor Blades are made in the US and Sweden, and supported by our field Technical Services team, who can also provide headbox inspections and services.

Our machine clothing cleaning products include the ezEco Smart Cleaner for wires and felts, and the PCA passivation system for felts and dryer can surfaces.

Name: International Council of Forest & Paper Associations (ICFPA)
Description:

ICFPA members represent over 90 percent of global paper production and more than half of global wood production.

Name: NEPA Limited
Description:
26 January 1947
Nepa Ltd was incorporated as a private enterprise on 26th January 1947 by M/S Nair Press Syndicate Limited under the name of “THE NATIONAL NEWSPRINT AND PAPER MILLS LIMITED" for production of Newsprint and was the sole Newsprint-manufacturing unit in India up to 1981.

October 1949
The management of the Company was taken over in October 1949 by the then State Government of Central Province and Berar (at present Madhya Pradesh).1956
Commercial production started on Paper machine No. 1 of “Pussy and Jones” of USA with installed capacity of 30,000 TPA and the mill dedicated to the Nation by Late Pt. Jawaharlal Nehru the first Prime Minister of India on 26.04.1956.

19581962
Certificate of Honour presented by the Hon’ble President of India for achieving installed capacity and for satisfactory performance.1969
Paper machine No. 2 (Capacity 37,500 TPA) “Wartsila” of Finland commissioned on 27.03.1969, increasing the installed capacity to 67,500 TPA.1978
Chandni Thermal Power Station, Nepanagar purchased from MPEB at cost of 1.50 Cr.

1989
1. Company‘s name changed to “NEPA LIMITED” from 21.02.1989.
2. New power House boiler (75TPH) and 12.27 MW TG commissioned in March, 1989.
3. Paper Machine No. 1 renovated by Beloit UK and re-commissioned in November, 1989 increasing its capacity to 50,500 TPA.
4. Overall mill capacity of both the Paper Machine increased to 88,000 TPA.
Government of Indiatook over controlling interest.TPA.

1991
Achieved all time record of Newsprint production of 75,512 MT and registered highest profit of Rs. 14.32 Cr. During 1991-92.

1992
Started manufacturing 49 GSM Newsprint from April, 1992.

1995
Pink Newsprint introduced in the market.

1996
The Mill had completely stopped in August 1996 due disconnection of HT Grid supply by MP State Electricity Board.

MARCH-1997
The production was restarted in March 1997 in an innovative way using eco-friendly technology (Recovered Paper as 100% raw material) and with captive power generation.

Description:

Uzņēmums ievēro labas korporatīvās pārvaldības principus. “Rīgas meži” ieguvuši starptautiskus sertifikātus, kas apliecina videi draudzīgu, ekonomiski pamatotu, sociāli atbildīgu un ilgtspējīgu meža apsaimniekošanu.

2021. gadā “Rīgas mežiem” Uzņēmumu reģistrā ir reģistrēts nacionālajai drošībai nozīmīgas komercsabiedrības statuss. Tāpat 2021. gadā uzņēmums pievienojās biedrības “Sabiedrība par atklātību – Delna” un “CSR Latvia” iniciatīvai “Nulles tolerance pret korupciju”.

2023. gadā “Rīgas meži” otro reizi uzņēmuma vēsturē piedalījās Ilgtspējas indeksā – ierindojās Zelta kategorijā, kā arī saņēma balvu “Ilgtspējas čempions” par straujāko izaugsmi Ilgtspējas indeksā.

Lai veicinātu klimatneitralitāti un aizsargātu dabu, 2023. gadā izveidots nodibinājums “Rīgas mežu fonds”. Šajā pašā gadā uzņēmums pievienojās iniciatīvai “Misija Nulle”, kā mērķis ir rūpēties par “Rīgas mežu” darbiniekiem, viņu veselību un drošību, kā arī parakstīja Latvijas Dažādības hartu.

Name: Korda Kağıt Pazarlama ve Ticaret A.Ş.
Description:
Korda is one of the largest paper merchant/distributors in Turkey with more than 35,000 tons/year sales, over 2,000 SKU paper and board product range and over 2,500 customers mainly in printing, packaging, publishing as well as media sectors.

Established in 1997, Korda is owned by Inapa Group.

We supply all kinds of paper and board without any quantity limit to the small and medium sized companies located in Turkey which are not able to import and don’t want to afford the high inventory costs and financing.  From time to time, Korda also compensates the lack of supply in larger sized firms. 
Our main products are wood free offset, woodfree coated, boards (including dublex and FBB), newsprint paper, photocopy and office paper products, autocopy paper and some special papers such as self-adhesive.

Korda’s distribution network consists of delivery vans, small and large warehouses throughout Turkey, well educated sales team and a sheeting facility.

Description:

Koncernen omsätter ca 2,5 miljarder kronor, har ca 1.900 anställda i 15 länder. Sverige, Norge, Danmark, Finland, Estland, Lettland, Frankrike, Storbritannien, Holland, Belgien, Tyskland, Polen, Luxemburg, Spanien och Ryssland..

Resmacon es una empresa distribuidora de papel fundada en 1992. Contamos con depósito y logística propia, realizando entregas en todo el país. Somos el principal distribuidor de resmas de Ledesma en Argentina y ofrecemos una amplia gama de productos de higiene, embalaje y limpieza. Además, fabricamos bolsas americanas con y sin impresión.

Comercializamos cartulina encapada, papel ilustración, papel kraft, cartón, papel sulfito, papel seda, papel obra y más. También ofrecemos servicios de corte de bobina a plano y rebobinado, transformando bobinas grandes en bobinas pequeñas.

Name: Kieppi Sawmill Oy
Description:
Kieppi Sawmill in Mäntyharju stands amid some of the most beautiful lake scenery in Finland, with easy access to vast forest resources. Kieppi Sawmill has long traditions, as on the same site has been a sawmill since 1920–1930’s. Nowadays it is known as Kieppi Sawmill Oy. Kieppi is a promise of quality which our new logo, the crown of pine, represents. 

The annual capacity is about 70 000 m3 Redwood. Over 80 % of the production goes to the exports for joinery, indoor wood products and outdoor construction purposes. The biggest market areas are in Europe, North Africa, Middle East and Far East.

Name: Industria Del Papel Sido

The company uses 100% recycled materials for the manufacturing of kraft, napkin, and toilet tissue solutions for the beautiful island of Hispaniola, covering both Dominican Republic and Haiti.

Name: Haeberlein GmbH
Description:
The company Häberlein GmbH is one of the biggest sawmills of hardwood in South Germany, based in Hardthausen-Gochsen Germany.

We are located in one of the best forest areas of Germany for hardwood, which allows us to offer you logs and lumber of high quality.

We have a big range of different kinds of hardwood air dried and kiln dried:
Red Oak, White Oak, Beech nature and steamed, Ash, Sycamore, Cherry, Hornbeam, Alder, Walnut, Plane, Birch Poplar.

We export logs and lumber to the Asien and European market.

Name: Vida Wood Australia

Vida Wood Australia is a leading provider of high-quality timber products and innovative solutions for the Australian construction and design industries. With a focus on sustainability and customer satisfaction, we offer a wide range of premium timber materials sourced from certified, responsibly managed forests.

At Vida Wood Australia, we take pride in our commitment to delivering exceptional products and services that meet the highest standards. We collaborate closely with our customers providing tailored solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

Our team is driven by a passion for excellence, innovation, and a shared vision to shape the future of Australian design with the beauty and versatility of timber. Whether you're looking for environmentally friendly building materials or expert advice on timber products, Vida Wood Australia is your trusted partner for all your timber needs. Join us in building a sustainable, beautiful future, one timber product at a time.

ST Paper, LLC
