Name: Oasis Fabrix
Description:
We develop more efficient forming fabrics, press felts, dryer fabrics and filter belts to help customers achieve superior quality.

Paper Machine Clothing: Forming, Drying and Pressing

We have been supplying the pulp and paper industry with whole range of paper machine clothing (PMC) products including forming fabrics, press felts, dryer fabrics and spiral dryer fabrics for the manufacture of all paper and board grades. These paper machine fabrics and felts are produced with highly advanced equipment: looms with width of 12.5 meters, automated seaming machines, heat setting machines and edge treatment machines.

Filter Fabrics and Cloth for Dewatering, Drying, Pressing and Screening

Oasis Fabrix specializes in the design and engineering of filter fabrics for sludge dewatering, pulp and paper making, refining, vacuum filtration. Our fabric belts are widely used in belt press filters, horizontal vacuum belt filters, paper machines, plate and frame press filters, disc filters, drum filters, and continuous press filters.

Super Paper Industries LLC is a leading tissue converting company in the UAE, dedicated to delivering high-quality hygiene solutions to households, businesses, and institutions. Our extensive product range includes facial tissues, maxi rolls, auto-cut rolls, interfold tissues, toilet rolls, and T-Tork rolls, all crafted with the highest standards of hygiene and quality. Our Vision
To enhance everyday hygiene experiences by providing premium-quality tissue products that go beyond the ordinary.

Our Mission
- To manufacture and deliver hygienic, eco-friendly, and high-performance tissue products that cater to both individual and commercial needs.
- To maintain the highest quality standards through rigorous testing and continuous innovation.
- To remain a trusted choice for millions of households, restaurants, hotels, and businesses across the UAE.
- To contribute to a greener future by adopting sustainable production processes and environmentally responsible practices.

At Super Paper Industries LLC, we are more than just a manufacturer—we are a brand that people trust for their hygiene needs. We take pride in our role in promoting cleanliness, comfort, and sustainability in everyday life.

Name: Monway Woodfuel
Description:
We are a UK homegrown sawmill, servicing and supplying timber, bespoke pallets, and a selection of wood fuel products to customers across a variety of industry sectors.  Our timber is cut from sawlogs that are sourced from FSC approved suppliers ensuring sustainability.

We hold certification with the TIMCON administered United Kingdom Wood Packaging Material Marking Programme (UKWPMMP) enabling us to manufacture and supply heat treated timber and pallets in accordance with ISPM15 regulations.  We conduct the full process of heat treating using our onsite certified kiln with the finished product marked accordingly.

As an approved producer-trader on the Biomass Suppliers List (BSL), we can supply a small selection of wood fuel products that meet the eligibility requirements for domestic and non-domestic customers who are on the Government’s Renewable Heat Incentive (RHI) scheme.  Our A1, P31S, M30 virgin wood chip is certified by Woodsure and we also produce firewood and kindling that holds the necessary Ready to Burn certification.

Name: Houtexclusief
Description:
Houtexclusief heeft een breed assortiment in houtsoorten op voorraad, beschikbaar in diverse afmetingen. In ons assortiment hebben wij o.a. boomstambladen, schaaldelen, houten planken en werkbladen. Ruw of reeds geschaafd! 

Wat maakt hout bijzonder? Elk deel is uniek! Het heeft zijn eigen uitstraling, eigenschappen en toepassingsgebied. Bovendien is het een natuurproduct, en daarmee 100% circulair! Hout kan eeuwen doorstaan en al die tijd blijft het CO2, wat de boom opneemt als hij groeit, opgeslagen. Dit maakt hout speciaal. Waarbij natuurlijk duurzaam bosbeheer van groot belang is voor de toekomst.

Wij richten ons op het in huis halen van ‘specials.’ Dit kan dus hout zijn met een bijzondere afmeting of denk aan een partij hout welke gerecycled is. Of bijvoorbeeld hout afkomstig van een boom welke een soort stress ervaren heeft (door insectenplagen of schimmels) wat tot een prachtige decoratieve tekening leidt. Allemaal hout met een eigen verhaal, eigen uitstraling en warmte.  Op onze webpagina’s proberen wij u een impressie te geven van ons uitgebreide assortiment. Echter is niet alles in beeld te vangen en nodigen wij u graag uit voor een bezoek aan Houtexclusief, om onze ‘houten wereld’ met u te delen!

Houtexclusief is, sinds maart 2020, een nieuw en enthousiast onderdeel van Houthandel Houtex en is gericht op de professionele markt.

La dynamique de croissance est donc bien installée, et le Groupe a d’ores et déjà doublé son CA au cours des 3 dernières années. Le Groupe est ainsi devenu un des deux plus important producteur français indépendant de ouate de cellulose. 

Le Groupe a profondément modifié son fonctionnement pour tenir compte des enjeux RSE, grâce en particulier à sa papeterie, en restructurant tant ses logiques de transport que de gestion des déchets.

Description:

Spécialistes de la transformation du carton simple, double ou triple cannelure depuis 30 ans, CPL Emballages (Cartonnerie des Pays de Loire) et OP Emballages (Ondul’Pack) mettent leur savoir-faire au service de tous les secteurs ayant une activité de production et de logistique.

Membres du Groupe ALTAGO, nos deux entreprises présentent chacune leurs spécificités tout en travaillant conjointement :

> CPL Emballages : Présente sur trois sites en Sarthe (2 à Moncé-en-Belin, près du Mans et 1 à la Flèche), CPL Emballages conçoit et réalise en petites, moyennes et grandes séries tous types d’emballages en carton ondulé de grandes dimensions ainsi que des emballages spécifiques et techniques (kits, wraps…).

> OP Emballages : Établie à Château-Thébaud, près de Nantes en Loire-Atlantique, OP Emballages est spécialisée dans la conception et la réalisation en petites et moyennes séries de caisses carton de plus petites dimensions en simple, double et triple cannelure. 

Quel que soit votre besoin en matière d’emballage carton, CPL OP Emballages s’appuie sur son expérience, ses deux bureaux d'études et son sens du service pour comprendre et intégrer vos problématiques de logistique.

Notre objectif : vous fournir, dans les délais convenus, une solution d’emballage toujours bien pensée, bien conçue, bien fabriquée.

Name: LA COURONNE
Description:
LA COURONNE est le leader de la fabrication et la fourniture de solutions de courrier et d'emballage durables en France. Spécialisés dans les enveloppes, pochettes, pochettes à soufflets, boxes, sachets, nous vous proposons : 

- L'offre éco-responsable la plus vaste du marché pour vos envois (NF Environnement, PEFC, Carbone Neutre..).
- Un choix de plus de 400 références disponibles sur stock sous 48h
- Des produits de protection et d’emballage de vos expéditions sous la marque e.pack
- La personnalisation de tous nos produits, de 1 à 4 couleurs
- Notre expertise de la mise sous pli automatique

NOTRE VISION : L'INNOVATION DURABLE, HIER, AUJOURD'HUI, DEMAIN
Forte de son savoir-faire et de sa tradition papetière, LA COURONNE n’a de cesse de se réinventer. Nos innovations, notamment en matière de protection et d’emballage, visent à redéfinir les standards de l'industrie pour un avenir plus durable.

Notre dernière innovation?  Les bulles d’air 100% papier, zéro plastique, une alternative écologique au papier-bulle plastique. Reconnues pour leur résistance et leur solidité, elles protègent vos envois - y compris les plus fragiles -, dans des sachets, pochettes et boxes de différentes tailles, ultra-résistantes aux chocs. Ces-derniers s’adaptent au format du colis et soulagent votre chaîne logistique d’expédition par la rapidité d’insertion des produits. Unique en Europe et fabriqué dans nos ateliers en France !

NOS VALEURS
Dans la lignée de son rôle pionnier dans l’adoption des normes environnementales et de la réduction de l'empreinte carbone, LA COURONNE s'investit dans des projets de protection et de restauration de la biodiversité dans différentes zones du monde. 

NOS CLIENTS
Nous comptons plus de 6500 clients fidèles à nos côtés (Raja, Bureau Vallée, SFR, Yves Rocher …). Nos solutions éco-responsables Made in France optimisent votre chaîne logistique tout en réduisant son impact environnemental. 

Alors n’hésitez plus, rejoignez-les, rejoignez-nous !

Name: White Mountain Paper Company
Description: White Mountain Paper Company was formed in 2021 on the site of one of the country's oldest paper mills. We produce high quality tissue and towel for the retail market using renewable energy and sustainable pulp.

Name: Cotek Papers Limited
Description:
Cotek is a leading European manufacturer of specialist release paper and film, concentrating principally on two side and differential silicone coatings produced on the latest generation of solvent free coating machinery.

We specialise in accurate and stable silicone release coatings on all types of paper, PET, HDPE, metallised PET, blown coloured PP, MOPP and BOPP film.

A high proportion of our customers are involved in manufacturing double sided adhesive tapes, hot melt adhesive packaging, butyl mastic sealant and pre-preg composite fibre.  We supply many other industries such as medical, graphic art, automotive, personal hygiene and bag closures.

Finished product can be jumbo reels up to 1600mm wide with 100% solids solvent free thermal cure or aqueous thermal cure, and 1300mm wide for inerted UV cure.  Pre-slit coils can be offered as narrow as 14mm on film and 10mm on paper.  Sheets or cut shapes according to specific needs are also catered for.

Cotek has the ability to back print or print under the silicone in one colour to specific customer requirements.

Name: Scheufelen
Description:
Papierfabrik Scheufelen specialises in developing high-quality coated premium papers and boards that are now exported to more than 40 countries. Each year 330-strong workforce at the Scheufelen site in the German town Lenningen, achieves a capacity of 140,000 metric tons of high-quality coated, wood-free premium paper and premium boards from FSC/PEFC-certified pulp. 

The paper brands phoenixmotion, heaven 42 and bvs/bro are available in various grammages and finishes. Typical applications for these papers include high-end annual reports, image brochures, advertising brochures, high-quality books, art prints and calendars. A wide range of grammages from 160 to 700 gsm make the high bright SBS board phoenolux ideal both for graphic applications and for packaging in highly discerning segments such as cosmetics, beauty, pharmaceuticals, food and beverages. phoenolux can be used for folding cartons and displays of all kinds.

Both quality and environmental protection are key to Scheufelen’s paper production operations – the tradition-steeped company is the only paper manufacturer in Germany with its production site based in a biosphere reserve.

Product Brands
The Scheufelen Portfolio is extensive and varied. Make your selection – and as all individual Scheufelen brands stand for outstanding print quality, excellent reproduction and high performance, your decision is always right. 

- phoenolux – Scheufelen premium coated board 
- phoenixmotion – Scheufelen finest coated paper 
- heaven 42 – Absolutely white coated paper with a uniquely soft surface 
- bvs – Scheufelen’s standard coated paper 
- bro – coated paper designed specifically for web offset 

>>>  NEW  <<<

- graspapier  -  printing paper with up to 50% grass fiber in the composition
- greenliner  -  grass paper for fluting and liner layers of corrugated board
- phoenogras  -  laminated board produced from phoenolux and greenliner for  eco-friendly packaging solutions

Imprint: http://bit.ly/2eUBgaR

Name: JassBoard
Description:
Jesteśmy młoda i dynamiczna firmą, której działalność opiera się na produkcji oraz dystrybucji tektury litej i falistej. Jesteśmy zespołem zorientowanym na wysoką jakość obsługi oraz oferującym produkty w unikatowym systemie dostaw. To co nas wyróżnia to nowoczesna technologia, innowacyjność i ciągły rozwój. Dzięki temu chcemy być najlepsi!

Produkty oferujemy naszym klientom w unikatowym systemie dostaw: 
* 72 godzinny termin dostaw, który umożliwia naszym klientom skrócenie terminu realizacji swoich zamówień oraz poprawia elastyczność i sprawność drukarni,
* realizacja zleceń w formacie minimalnym, zgodnym z zamówieniem klienta, co pozwala obniżyć ilość odpadu technologicznego i bezpośrednio wpływa na obniżenie kosztów produkcji oraz poprawę rentowności,
* arkuszowa realizacja zamówień pozwalająca klientom na zamówienie ilości surowca pod konkretne zlecenie produkcyjne oraz redukcję stanów magazynowych.

Zaawansowany technologicznie park maszyn oraz 10 000 ton surowca w rolach, w magazynie, pozwala nam realizować zamówienia liderów z branży poligraficznej.
Jakość produktów, unikatowy serwis oraz bezpieczeństwo współpracy  to podstawy naszej oferty. Nasi partnerzy to największe koncerny papiernicze z całego świata. Doświadczenie zdobywane przez lata, własne laboratorium, oraz długofalowa współpraca z dostawcami sprawia, że nasze produkty cechuje najwyższa jakość.

Naszą przewagę tworzy zgrany zespołu specjalistów i pasjonatów w swoich dziedzinach, którzy wspólnie pracują i dzielą się swoimi zainteresowaniami. Praca w Convert to duża samodzielność i realny wpływ na projekty w dynamicznym środowisku biznesowym. Energia w działaniu, kreatywność i ciągły rozwój oraz wspólna integracja i celebracja składa się na sukcesy naszych pracowników.
Zadowolony, zgrany i skuteczny zespół to nasze marzenie, którym kierujemy się w codziennych  działaniach.

Description:
Bir aile şirketi olarak kurulan Koçal Kağıt Sanayi, 1995 yılında endüstriyel kağıt sektöründe üretim yapmaya başlamıştır. Geçen süre zarfında, kurumsallaşmaya ve markalaşmaya verdiği önem ile gelişen Koçal Kağıt, Ev dışı tüketim sektörünün önde gelen lider üreticileri arasına girmeyi başarmıştır. Merkezi İstanbul Küçükçekmece’de olan ve Ankara’da dağıtım deposu ile faaliyet gösteren Koçal Kağıt Sanayi, 2012 yılı sonunda Sakarya 2. Organize Sanayi Bölgesinde yaptığı üretim tesisi yatırımı ile büyümesini ve gelişmesini sağlamış, deneyimli personeliyle, zamanında ve kaliteden ödün vermeden modern tesislerinde temiz ve güvenilir ortamda Endüstriyel Kağıt üretim yapmaktadır.Aylık üretim kapasitesi 1500 tona kadar ulaşan Koçal Kağıt Sanayi, Sosi ,Vilo ,Brava ve Tami markaları ile temizlik kağıtları sektöründe güçlü bir yer edinmeyi başarmıştır. Ev dışı kullanım (Endüstriyel Kağıt) alanında Sosi ve Vilo markaları ile fark yaratan Koçal Kağıt Brava ve Tami markaları ile de farklı seçenekler sunmaktadır.

Geniş ürün yelpazesi sayesinde Koçal Kağıt Temizlik Kağıtları sektoründe müşterilerinin tüm taleplerini en iyi şekilde karşılamaktadır. Koçal Kağıt günümüzde Irak, Filistin, Avusturya, Almanya, Panama, Maldivler ve Gürcistan başta olmak üzere 73'ten fazla ülkeye düzenli olarak ihracat yapmaktadır.

Name: Aylesford Newsprint Limited
Description:
Aylesford Newsprint Limited manufactures on average 400,000 tonnes each year of quality 100% recycled newsprint branded Renaissance. The Aylesford portfolio incudes Renaissance Standard and Smooth

Aylesford Newsprint is situated in Kent in the south-east of the UK with excellent links to the UK motorway network and is also ideally situated for the Channel Rail Link and Channel ports giving an ideal gateway to Europe.   We supply all the national and regional newspaper publishers in the UK and Western Europe and have exported to other international press rooms, which includes USA and the Far East.

As from 2nd October 2012 Aylesford Newsprint is owned by The Martland Holdings, LLC an investment holding company.

Name: Rotolificio Pugliese
Description:
Affidabilità, Materia Prima di Alta Qualità ed Ecosostenibile Innovazione, Tecnologia, Servizio.

Rotolificio Pugliese, da oltre 25 anni, è il partner perfetto per tutte le esigenze di etichettatura, e realizzazione di rotoli per l’emissione del documento commerciale , in grado di soddisfare pienamente la peculiare necessità tanto di GDO che del Retail. 

L’attento orientamento al mercato e il continuo investimento tecnologico, unito ad una struttura commerciale e distributiva efficiente, fanno del Rotolificio Pugliese una tra le maggiori aziende produttrici del settore.

L’esperienza, l’eccellenza qualitativa, un’ampia capacità produttiva, i continui investimenti in formazione e tecnologie all'avanguardia, tempestività nelle consegne e competitività nell’offerta, sono diventati gli elementi identificativi per la nostra clientela più esigente. 

Vantiamo oltre 10 linee per la produzione di etichette, sia a rotoli che in foglio con capacità di stampa fino ad 8 colori e 7 linee per la produzione di rotoli in carta termica e cellulosa. La presenza di macchine da stampa fuori linea, sia flexo che offset ci permette di realizzare qualunque esigenza di stampa a colori, rendendoci così un punto di riferimento per la realizzazione di rotoli ed etichette in A4 anche per prodotti a marchio.

Attraverso il nostro studio grafico offriamo una vasta gamma di opzioni per la personalizzazione del rotolo cassa, rispondendo a una forte esigenza di mercato: in questo modo, lo scontrino diventa un vero e proprio mezzo di comunicazione e valorizzazione del proprio brand.

Completano la gamma, rotoli per prezzatrici e cartellini segnaprezzi oltre a prodotti distribuiti come verifica banconote, contamonete e contabanconote,sistemi per eliminacode e stampanti termiche.

Scopri di più sul nostro sito: http://www.rotolificiopugliese.it/

Name: CIBBIOS
Description:
Un mur préfabriqué en béton de chanvre & ossature bois.
Le Mur CIBBIOS préfabriqué se compose d’une ossature en bois porteuse et d’un remplissage en Béton de chanvre d’une épaisseur de 16 cm à 50 cm, selon la demande.

L’ossature est conçue sur mesure en conformité au DTU 31.2 et aux règles Eurocode 5 de résistance mécanique. Le Béton de chanvre respecte les Règles professionnelles éditées par l’association « Construire en Chanvre ».

Le procédé de production en atelier garantit un séchage préalable parfait quelle que soit la saison, de sorte que la livraison des murs sur chantier permet un assemblage immédiat des ossatures selon la technicité classique et la réalisation rapide des enduits de finition assurant la pérennité du bâtiment, son esthétique et son étanchéité à l’air.

L’état hors d’eau / hors d’air peut être obtenu en quelques jours, ce qui autorise le démarrage rapide des travaux de second-oeuvre.

Name: Industrie Forestiere Du Congo S.A.R.L.
Description: La société IFCO, Industrie Forestière du Congo, siège social à Kinkole en République Démocratique du Congo. IFCO est l'une des plus grandes sociétés d'exploitation forestière en Afrique, nos chantiers sont implantés au cœur des forêts du Congo RDC et ce pour vous offrir les meilleures essences d'Afrique préparées par nos experts de compétences internationales. Les concessions forestières de IFCO sont les premières à être aménagées durablemet au Congo. Les experts sur terrain et la technologie de pointe employé par IFCO expliquent bien le succès à l'international. IFCO opte pour une stratégie de développement continue afin de pouvoir offrir de la qualité à prix compétitifs. La société IFCO coopèrent avec des partenaires de renommée internationale. Ayant en possessions les documents de légalité EUTR selon les normes Européennes du commerce légal de bois, IFCO exporte vers la majorité des pays Européens du bois débité des essences les plus demandées par les professionnels d'ameublement et du métier en général vue la variété des gammes offertes d'une part et des domaines d'exploitations des essences offertes d'une autre part. Les essences du bois Africain que la société IFCO  offre et dispose dans ses parcs que ce soit en grumes (gros diamètre, qualité BB+) ou en débités FAS (AD et KD) sont les suivantes : - PADOUK; SAPELI; SIPO; WENGUE; BOSSE Clair; IROKO; KHAYA; BILINGUA; TIAMA; TOLA ; TALI; MUKULUNGO; AFRORMOSIA: - BUBINGA; ETIMOE; IATANDZA, OKAN Congo (EVEUSS), Les quantités en stocks chez IFCO en débités KD et AD sont classées et codées selon les essences et les mesures standards. Ce qui a permis à IFCO de répondre aux besoins de sa clientèle aux plus brefs délais possibles. Nos experts sont aussi à votre disposition pour vous préparer les commandes selon vos exigences

Name: Danco Converting
Description:
Relationships
Build A Good Distributor Base And Take Care Of Them

How we have grown over the years is not due to getting our distributors interested in us, but through being genuinely interested in them. Their success is our success. Their wins are our wins.

“To be interesting, be interested.” – Dale Carnegie

With understanding our distributor’s needs, we are then able to provide a better experience for them. That is why Danco’s number one priority is to first get to know the distributor, then go the extra mile for them; from sales to the production line and all the way to the end user of our products.

Flexibility
It feels great being the hero

We know the paper business – we’ve faced almost every obstacle our distributors have. When business is running smoothly or when emergency rush orders are needed, no matter the chaos, Danco’s fundamental principles is to be a manufacturer our distributors can rely on. This is a big reason why our capabilities grow every year – so we can handle the fast-changing nature of the paper business.

Innovation
Definitely NOT Your Average Paper Converter

It took a long time for Danco to become the company it is today, from selling newsprint out of a garage to now offering thousands of paper products from our 120,000 sq. ft. warehouse to distributors nationwide; but, no matter how BIG we get, we will keep our principles at the heart of our organization.

Keeping up with the demand for paper is not the only reason we’ve invested in dozens of converting machinery over the years; we are also product developers. The vast ranges of capabilities our equipment offers allow us to bring profitable paper products to the marketplace through our distributors. Check out our New Product Development page on our website to learn more.

https://dancopaper.com/capabilities/new-product-development/

Name: Mill Sales Direct
Description:
Mill Sales Direct Ltd started life by providing businesses with the opportunity of buying quality disposable paper products, direct from the paper mill. In addition to those 3 powerhouses of the disposable paper world, we also work closely with the UK's convertors, which enables us to provide one of the best range of tissue products in the UK.

Name: South Coast Paper
Description:
South Coast Paper produces copy/printing papers, folio, digital size papers, and other custom papers in standard and specialized packaging configurations.  As a converter, we source paper directly from paper mills and ship finished products to contract stationers and various distribution partners.  Our trucking docks, rail access, and nearby shipping ports make our facility readily accessible for distributing products to any location, anywhere in the world.  

Not only do we convert paper, but we also distribute private label, nationally branded, and specialty paper products to a diversified customer base both domestically and internationally.  Global brands and contract stationers count on South Coast Paper to help market their brands by providing sales expertise and product knowledge to end users.  We offer a value-added approach when working with corporate entities and contract stationers by playing an integral role in the supply chain with our diversity and sustainability efforts.  

South Coast Paper is a certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE).

Name: Bong Danmark A/S
Description:

Gennem mere end 100 år har Bong Danmark A/S produceret konvolutter af høj standard, og vi fører ekspertisen videre i de individuelt tilpassede emballageløsninger til eksempelvis webshops, udstillere og detailhandlere. Her på siden vil vi vise inspiration og forslag om eksempelvis boblekuverter, vandtætte produkter, carrier bags eller prøveposer med særligt udviklede grafiske udtryk, farver, logo og overfladebehandling. Med vores nyeste produktionskapacitet kan vi trykke helt ned til ét eksemplar af en ønsket emballage. 

Bong Danmarks produktion af kvalitetskonvolutter er stadig en stærk del af vores forretning, og vi tilbyder fortsat rådgivning og service om engrosløsninger inden for kontor og handel. 

Bong Danmark A/S specialises in custom made packaging for among others retailers, webshops and exhibitors in Denmark. Adding value to the company’s brands and products, customized packaging is increasingly demanded end developed. Bong Danmark A/S provide products such as printed carrier bags, padded envelopes, waterproof material and sample bags with logo, colours and graphic design.  

High quality envelopes have been Bong Danmark’s brand for more than a century. We continuously offer service and support on envelope solutions for wholesale customers.

Name: Wieland & Sons Lumber Co.
Description:
Family owned and operated since 1948

Harlyn Wieland was the original founder of Wieland & Sons Lumber Company in 1948, when today's corporation began as one man and his small portable sawmill. Several years later, three of his sons undertook Harlyn's past responsibilities and formed a partnership, which resulted in the incorporation of Wieland & Sons Lumber Co. in 1982. This family-run business is still currently owned and operated by the three brothers (Ted, Dean, and Jeff Wieland) with sites in Iowa and Wisconsin.

Wieland & Sons Lumber Co. now does business in all of the continental United States and several foreign countries. The company plays a major role in the community by providing employment to over 100 full- and part-time employees, who are all dedicated to servicing Wieland's customers with only the highest quality lumber products. 

Manufacturing a total of 18 million board feet of lumber per year, with locations in Winthrop and Muscoda, WI, Wieland & Sons is a wholesale distribution yard, manufacturing plant, and sawmill. The company's products are offered both internationally as well as domestically, and the list includes hardwood logs and lumber, rips, cut-to-length, flooring, ties and log siding. Specialized products are also available in width-pulled lumber, color-sorted lumber, and custom-sawn green lumber. Wieland & Sons also offers lumber pulled to customer's specifications and a custom sales shop for small dimensional orders. Wieland & Son's Lumber Co. is a member of the National Hardwood Lumber Association, Forest Stewardship Council and the Indiana Hardwood Lumbermen's Association.

Company Mission Statement:
To pro-actively serve and satisfy our customers by improving the cost effectiveness and quality of our products and services by building a team of people who will develop and maintain a quality and service oriented attitude that lead the industry and create a sustainable competitive advantage for Wieland & Sons Lumber Co.

Description: SRI SIDDHI VINAYAK PAPER MILLS PRIVATE LIMITED is a paper & forest products company based out of AMMILAL DHANOTIWALA ROAD NAYA BAZAR, SILIGURI, West Bengal, India.

Name: Peak Renewables Kootenays
Description:
It is the vision of Peak Renewables Kootenays to work collaboratively with First Nations communities, Customers and the Communities in which we operate, combining innovation with our core values of Healthy and Safety, Integrity, Respect, Open communication, Entrepreneurship and Pride of Ownership.
Our business model is based on knowledge of and deep commitment to sustainable forest practices.  We plant, nurture and harvest trees, and produce quality products for a variety of markets.

Companies in the Peak Kootenays family include Peak Woodlands, Peak Industries Ltd., Galloway Sawmill, Peak Properties Ltd, Galloway Woodlands and Chasse Holdings Ltd.

Name: China Paper Corporation
Description: China Paper Corporation is a paper & forest products company based out of Beijing, Beijing, China.

Name: Firn Overseas Packaging
Description: Firn Overseas Packaging Limited is one of the world's leading international suppliers of paper packaging materials and related products.

Name: Rössler Papier GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Wir von Rössler sind Papierliebhaber durch und durch. Was wir an Papier lieben? Die Vielfältigkeit, die Natürlichkeit, die vielen verschiedenen Strukturen und Haptiken und die noch größeren Möglichkeiten, Papier zu veredeln und anzuwenden. Produkte zu schaffen, die emotionale Momente besonders persönlich und stilvoll gestalten, das ist unser Anspruch.

Name: VISION PAPER AND BOARD LIMITED
Description:
We supply a distinct range of papers and boards that have been carefully selected to meet customer requirements, serving the needs of commercial printers and end users throughout the UK with highly effective products for all their printing needs from in house copying to mass production full colour digital and litho publications.

With knowledge and friendly staff at the end of the phone and sales representatives throughout the UK, we offer both a personal and professional service to our growing number of highly valued customers.

Being part of the Middleton Group, an independent family owned group of businesses, we have 55 years of experience within the paper industry. Vision Paper and Board is part of the paper division with sales exceeding 75,000 tonnes of paper and board.

For all enquiries please contact our sales team by e-mail: sales@visionpaper.co.uk

Name: eintec
Description: Started in 2006, eintec deals with pulp and paper machinery from Europe. Located in Coimbatore and Delhi, we deal with markets all over India, Sri Lanka, Nepal, Bangladesh and the GCC region.

Name: Bertolin Imballaggi
Description:
Founded in 1948 for the  production of wooden boxes, became a corrugated packaging company in the '80s.
Due to the know how an the location, the company is market leader in HQ packaging for wines and foods.

Name: Jagwati Industries India Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Jagwati Industries India Pvt. Ltd. is a leader in sustainable packaging solutions, specializing in premium-quality paper bags for various industries. As one of India's foremost manufacturers, we offer eco-friendly alternatives that help businesses reduce their environmental impact while enhancing their brand image.

Certified Excellence: We are proud to be certified with SEDEX and FSC, affirming our commitment to ethical business practices and responsible sourcing of materials.

Strategic Location: Based in Noida, one of the best industrial hubs in India, we benefit from rapid access to raw materials and expert support. This proximity ensures that we receive raw materials on time, and if any expert advice or adjustments are needed, our suppliers can send their specialists to our premises the same day. This allows us to guarantee quality and maintain a smooth, timely production process.

Technology Integration for Quality: We have integrated technology to maintain meticulous records of quality checks at every point of the production process. This ensures that each product we deliver meets the standards.

Our Mission: To support global sustainability by providing high-quality, recyclable, and biodegradable packaging that reduces plastic waste.

What We Offer:

Custom paper bags for various industries.

Eco-friendly, FSC-certified materials

Cutting-edge designs and printing options

Comprehensive quality control and assurance through technology


Let’s collaborate to grow your business while making a positive environmental impact.

Name: Catenva
Description:
CATENVA, S.L. es una empresa fabricante de tableros contrachapados de chopo y pino, con una producción de 60.000 m3 anuales destinados a los mercados agrícola e industrial.

Dentro del sector agrícola se utiliza para la fabricación de envases de madera para frutas, verduras, quesos, pescados etc. y en el sector industrial muebles, cajoneras, palas, rechapados, embalajes, etc.

Nuestros productos están elaborados con resinas que cumplen con la norma E1 (Formaldehyde inferior a 0,1 ppm.). También fabricamos tableros hidrófugos con resina de melamina que cumplen la norma EN 314 - clase2.

Las dimensiones de nuestros tableros contrachapados más usuales pueden variar desde 800x800 mm. hasta 1.200x1.200 mm. Los espesores desde 3 hasta 35 mm.
Ofrecemos la posibilidad del corte a medida.

Desde hace varios años somos muy conscientes de los problemas que ocasionan para el medio ambiente, el mal uso de los recursos forestales, la tala incontrolada de los bosques tropicales y en una palabra la deforestación de nuestro planeta. Por eso en CATENVA la protección del medio ambiente en su proceso productivo constituye un compromiso prioritario.

La materia prima que utilizamos es madera renovable, de ciclo corto de crecimiento, que antes hemos plantado y cultivado. Por eso estamos ante un producto 100% natural y no contaminamos en nuestro proceso productivo.

Name: Southworth Company
Description:
Based in Turners Falls and Agawam, MA, 

Southworth Company's Paperlogic Division is a US-based producer of customized solutions to meet your most demanding specialty technical paper needs.

For over 175 years, our industrial designers, chemists, manufacturing specialists and product experts have applied their expertise and ingenuity to produce superior, high quality paper products for a varied array of customers and end-use applications. Paperlogic continues to set industry standards for innovation, reliability and service as we meet the evolving needs of our customers.

Today we are as nimble as ever, and designed to meet our customers’ needs in a quickly changing and demanding world.

- See more at: http://www.paperlogic.com

In 2012 The Madison Park Group was acquired by Southworth Company, united by a common business culture, Southworth and The Madison Park Group look forward to continuing to work with their partners and retailers to bring new and innovative products to the social expressions marketplace. Collectively, The Madison Park Group and its partner companies sell a wide range of stationery, gift, and accessories products to over 6,000 retailers across the country. 

- See more at:  http://madisonparkgroup.com

Name: Charu Overseas
Description:
CharuPapers, Established in 2002, is one of the premiere custom printing house for highly diversified invitations.

We are one of the major manufacturer of distinctive, personalized cards for almost every occasion, be it Wedding, Bar/Bat Mitzvah, Holidays, Baby announcement, Bridal shower, Graduation or Anniversary etc.

We have specialized teams for designing, printing, assembling, packaging and quality check, ensuring our dealers to get the best products. A wide variety of personalized invitations made as a result of quality craftsmenship. The innovative designs produced by CharuPapers are included in our elegant albums. Round the clock customer support is an added advantage to work with us. 

As a result of our superior designing concepts, experiments with different type of papers, and zeal to present the best invites, our invites have won the prestigious LOUIE Award in 2009 and 2010 given by International Greeting Card Association.

We are ISO 9001:2008 Certified, a testimony for the quality standards. Have a rich experience of cataloguing our products in various shows, participating specially in National Stationery Show (NSS), since 2007.

Name: BOIS COLLE D'AUVERGNE - B.C.A.
Description:
Acteur industriel de la filière bois française, nous sommes spécialisés dans la fabrication de contrecollé, de lamellé collé et de bois massif abouté.
Dans le but de valoriser le bois Français et dans un soucis d'exploiter les ressources locales, nous sélectionnons le meilleur des bois du massif central: douglas et épicéa.

Name: CCR Paper
Description: CCR is a family business and a long standing manufacturer and supplier of all point of sale products including till receipt rolls, ticket rolls, credit card rolls, ATM rolls, car park rolls, kitchen printer rolls.  we specialise in bespoke printed rolls. We also supply back of house kitchen products including kitchen printer ink ribbons, food rotation labels, allergen labels, waiter pads, order pads.  In addition we produce bespoke food wrap, greaseproof paper, greaseproof bags and branded stickers. We have over 30 years of experience in the hospitality, leisure and retail sector and many of our customers are household names.

Name: R-Flex Bobinas e Etiquetas
Description:
Na Rflex Bobinas Térmicas e Etiquetas, estamos na vanguarda da indústria de fabricação de papéis térmicos, oferecendo soluções de qualidade excepcional para uma variedade de aplicações. Com décadas de experiência e um compromisso inabalável com a excelência, somos reconhecidos como líderes no fornecimento de bobinas térmicas e etiquetas de alto desempenho.

Além de nossa dedicação à qualidade e inovação, nos orgulhamos de nossos esforços para promover práticas sustentáveis. Estamos comprometidos em reduzir nosso impacto ambiental e adotamos medidas responsáveis em todas as etapas de nossa produção.

Name: Bolmet Kağıt Kimya
Description:
1995 Yılında faaliyete başlayan Bolmet Kağıt, Türkiye ve global pazarlardaki müşterilerine maksimum kalite ve verim sağlamayı amaçlamıştır. Bu amaca ulaşmak için tedarik zincirini dünya çapında kurumsal kağıt fabrikaları ile güçlü temeller üzerine inşaa etmiştir.
 
Merkezi İstanbul, Tuzla'da  bulunan Bolmet Kağıt, 2500 m2 deposu,kullanmakta olduğu antrepoları
ile müşterilerine hizmet vermektedir. Depolarında bulunan konverting makine hatları ile
müşterilerinin isteklerine göre özel kesim ve sarım yapmaktadır.
 
Ürün portföyümüz gıda kağıtları, kraft grubu, tekstil transfer kağıtları, peçete ve temizlik grubu kağıtları, endüstriyel kağıt ürünleri ve genel ambalaj kağıtları olmak üzere çeşitli uygulamalarda kullanılabilir, çevre dostu ve dünya standartlarına uygun kalitededir.

Bolmet Kağıt grubu olarak;  müşterilerimize en uygun fiyatlara en iyi kaliteyi sunmak, tecrübeli ve dinamik kadromuzla her zaman müşterilerimiz için ulaşılabilir olmak için çalışıyoruz. Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına uygun uzun vadeli çözümler sunmanın yanı sıra  satışını yaptığımız bütün ürünlerde kalite ve kullanım garantisi sağlamayı hedefliyoruz .Güçlü global tedarik zincirimiz ile sizlerin yerel çözüm ortağı olmak için çaba gösteriyoruz.

Name: Matheel Al Nujoom Group of Industries
Description: Matheel Al Nujoom Group Of industries is dedicated and Innovative Company that has Highly Qualified professionals in Manufacturing High end paper Cups Eco friendly and Customizable The company was founded in Kingdome of Saudi Arabia in 1998

Name: Townsend Lumber Inc.
Description: For over 50 years Townsend Lumber Inc. has produced high quality kiln dried lumber. Townsend Lumber is dedicated to procuring logs from woodlots that have been responsibly harvested.

Name: Florida Pulp and Paper Association
Description: The Florida Pulp and Paper Association, also known as FPPAEA, is the state trade association for Florida’s Forest Products Industry, consisting of pulp and paper manufacturing, converting and packaging, and wood products manufacturers, and private forest landowners. Florida’s Forest Products Industry is ranked in the top 5 manufacturing sector employers for both number of jobs and employee compensation. The industry is also Florida’s leading manufacturer in sustainability and providing green jobs. The industry employs over 30,000 Floridians in high-paying jobs, leads the way on recycling and renewable energy generation, and sustainably manages Florida’s forests.

Name: Carta Misr
Description: CartaMisr is a company of Saudi Holding for paper industries, Saudi Paper has more than a decade of experience in the paper industry, and occupies an important position in this market in Egypt, thanks to the dedicated work team’s efforts and dedication to providing exceptional value. We seek to achieve our goal of becoming among the leaders in the world of integrated paper products in the Middle East and Africa region. In all its products, Saudi Paper is keen to maintain sustainable practices, ensure unparalleled quality, and promote community growth.

Name: PLYTERRA GROUP
Description: Plyterra Group is one of the most reliable birch plywood manufacturers. We focus on modern market trends and support innovative ideas. Openness to innovation, creativity and wish for changing to the better help us to meet even the most specific requirements of our customers. Thanks to the high quality of our products, we have gained trust of our customers from 56 countries.

Name: 玖龙纸业
Description: 玖龙纸业成立于1995年，总部位于广东东莞，2006年在香港上市，是世界知名的废纸环保造纸集团，中国造纸龙头企业，主要生产包装纸、文化纸和特种纸。集团在东莞、太仓、重庆、天津、泉州、沈阳、河北、乐山及海外越南建立造纸、热电和环保综合治理于一体的基地。2018年收购美国四家浆纸一体化工厂，2019年收购马来西亚文冬一家浆纸厂，且即将在雪兰莪州建设大型新项目，2020年，玖龙接连在湖北荆州投资135亿、以及广西北海投资302亿建设大型林浆纸一体化及智能化包装全产业链项目，进一步巩固龙头企业地位。玖龙也在积极拓展下游包装业务，实现造纸全产业链发展，目前已在东莞、太仓、天津、成都、重庆成立了六个智能化包装公司。玖龙纸业造纸年产能已突破1800万吨，年总产值600多亿元，持续蝉联中国造纸行业榜首，2020年名列中国民营企业500强第111位。

Name: SCATOLIFICIO ISA S.R.L.
Description: PRODUZIONE SCATOLE DI CARTONE, DAL 1/03/2000

Name: Bergvik Skog AB
Description:
Bergvik Skog is one of the largest private landowners in Europe. In Sweden, we own 2.3 million hectares of land, mainly in central Sweden. In Latvia, we are the largest private forest owner with 0.1 million hectares of forest. The annual harvest volume is about 6 million m³sub. To ensure regrowth of forest after harvesting, Bergvik Skog owns three nurseries in the Counties of Värmland, Gästrikland and Dalarna. In total, the nurseries produce more than 55 million seedlings per year.

Bergvik Skog supports the transition to increased share of renewable energy by developing wind farms and leasing out land for wind mills. Today there are 107wind mills on the company's land in Sweden. Bergvik Skog leases out land and water for hunting and fishing and provides land for quarry operations. Our real estate department manages more than 8 000 contractual leases.

The company has about 100 employees, half of which are currently employed in the nurseries, 23 in the Latvian subsidaries, and the remaining 30 employees work at the head office in Falun.

Name: Symposium der Papieringenieure
Description: Größtes deutschsprachiges Symposium für die Papier- und Zellstoffindustrie

Name: Scierie Filaire
Description: La SAS Filaire est spécialisée dans la transformation des conifères : pin sylvestre, douglas, épicéa, sapin et mélèze. Créée en 1935 et située en Haute Loire, au cœur du massif central, à Sembadel-Gare dans le parc naturel régional du Livradois, l’entreprise s’est développée dans des secteurs aussi divers que la construction (charpente, poutres, chevrons, parquets, lambris, bois d’extérieur, bois de menuiserie, bois collé), l'emballage et le bois à palettes.

Name: Alpine MDF Industries Pty Ltd
Description: Alpine MDF Industries Pty Ltd is a manufacturer and supplier of the highest quality Pine MDF. The plant is located in the North East of Victoria in Wangaratta.

Name: Forest Operation De Clercq-Bourdeaud'hui
Description:
DCBB is a 3rd generation forest operation company. The family business has accumulated more than 50 years of experience and know-how. Throughout the years, the company has specialised in forest harvesting and in trading logs. Companies, both locally and abroad, can rely on us for the purchase of logs of various types of wood, mainly poplar, beech, oak and ash.

The company’s long-standing experience guarantees its reliable knowledge and craftsmanship when it comes to forest operation. DCBB supervises all activities to ensure that the trees are cut in line with the working method that it has developed over the years. All works are performed by its own staff and with its own equipment. This guarantees the quality of the work and ensures that DCBB assumes final responsibility.

DCBB is a major player in export countries with high demand for softwood and hardwood such as Egypt, China, India and Vietnam.  The logs are professionally shipped to the country of destination. Depending on the country of destination, the logs are shipped in bulk or in containers. 

DCBB carefully selects, measures and marks all the trees. It guarantees top quality towards the clients. The company has a large stock of logs, which means that it can honour the agreed delivery deadlines. Both Belgian as international customers greatly appreciate the service; and have come to rely on DCBB.

Name: IBERCUTTING SL
Description:
IBERCUTTING was created in 2000 to meet the needs of tissue paper handling companies in the Iberian Peninsula.

Ibercutting's main activity is the commercialization of spare parts for all the machinery involved in the sector. We provide a fast and efficient response, thanks to our extensive stock of 100% compatible spare parts for the main brands in the sector: Perini, Casmatic/KPL, Omet, PCMC, TMC, etc.

The quality of our products, together with the recognized good work of our company and our eagerness to improve, has quickly led us to expand our offer, offering the tissue converting sector a 360º service, providing comprehensive solutions to our customers and exporting our products to the 5 continents.

Companies such as Essity, Kimberly-Clark, Metsa, ICT, Sofidel, Goma Camps, Wepa or Renova, trust in the good service and quality of our products.

We can offer you from the transfer of lines or their modernization to the creation of a completely new line, purchase and sale of new and second hand machinery, assistance and advice, and everything that is necessary for the development of your company. Our goal is to be able to offer solutions to your needs.

Our expert sales team is at your disposal to assist you in any production problem you may have, and thanks to our large stock, we achieve short delivery times.

Name: Republic Paperboard Company, LLC
Description: Republic Paperboard Company is a wholly owned subsidiary of Eagle Materials. Main product is gypsum liner paper for construction and consumer container board and consumer shopping bags.

Name: James Latham Ireland
Description: James Latham Dublin and James Latham Ireland in Belfast, work together to supply modified timbers, softwoods, hardwoods, shingles and decking, alongside a huge selection of decorative surfaces and panel products throughout the Republic and Northern Ireland.    Our bulk timber service, LDT Ireland based in Naul, supplies large scale end users.  James Latham is a well-established 266 year old business with 12 depots throughout the UK and Ireland.

Name: Ro.ial. S.r.l.
Description:
Since over 25 years Ro.ial. is a point of reference for the production of nonwoven and airlaid professional disposable items for the hotel industry and catering, for the beauty/wellness sector and the healthcare field, through the offer of Made in Italy high quality products, with particular attention to environmental sustainability.

Ro.ial. is always careful to the satisfaction of its customers, thanks to the direct management of all its processes, from the creative development of the products, constantly updated following new market trends with technologically advanced systems.

Ro.ial. today offers 4 lines of disposable products, enriched with new, current and innovative contents.

- HO.RE.CA,
- Wellness, Hairdressers
- Healthcare
- Professional cleaning

All products express the greatest efficiency and functionality of the disposable items, in order to satisfy the final users needs for hygiene, safety and practicality.

Name: Reserva Papéis
Description: Com mais de 10 anos no mercado Potiguar, a Reserva Papéis surgiu com o objetivo de oferecer uma linha diversificada de papéis, sendo a melhor solução para empresas e consumidores finais.
Location: São Gonçalo do Amarante, Rio Grande do Norte

Name: Equatoria Teak Company
Description:
Equatoria Teak Company (ETC) and Central Equatoria Teak Company (CETC) together make up South Sudan’s leading sustainable forestry company, and Africa’s second largest teak grower. The group is based in Nzara, Western Equatoria State, with a second location in Lainya County, Central Equatoria State. The company has concession rights over more than 3,500ha of mature teak plantations and an additional 73,000ha of forestry concession, which is not planted.

ETC has built a new sawmill in Nzara and is harvesting, milling and exporting teak products to international markets; the company has a nursery and silviculture programme that it is looking to strengthen. The majority shareholder in ETC is Maris Capital (www.mariscapital.com)which has extensive experience in managing businesses in Sub-Saharan Africa.

Name: PPC Limited
Description:
PPC is a family run business, established in 1986, Based in Blackburn, Lancashire. We are manufacturers of a range of wholesale soft toilet paper products from household to hygiene. We are not one of the largest toilet paper manufacturers but from the very outset we have concentrated on providing a superior quality product.

At PPC, we manufacture a range of wholesale products including, industrial, household and coloured toilet paper, all of these are available in bulk. We are manufacturers of several types of wholesale toilet paper which includes a fragranced range, various plys and we also have a selection of coloured toilet paper.

Our business has continued to grow, 2 years ago we moved to our present site with 50,000 square feet, this new facility affords us more than adequate storage space, which has enhanced our service and enables us to keep more toilet paper for our customers.

Name: Swash Papertech Pvt. Ltd.
Description: SWASH PAPERTECH PVT.LTD. is a fast growing dynamic organization specialized in design, manufacture & supply of complete range of Transaction supplies, Office Stationery, Point Of Sale Supplies, Packing products, Food Packing , Labels, Tags.

Name: American Forest Resource Council
Description: AFRC is a regional trade association whose purpose is to advocate for sustained yield timber harvests on public timberlands throughout the West to enhance forest health and resistance to fire, insects, and disease. We do this by promoting active management to attain productive public forests, protect adjoining private forests, and assure community stability. We work to improve federal and state laws, regulations, policies and decisions regarding access to and management of public forest lands and protection of all forest lands.

Name: Le Tout Papier
Description:
We are offering office paper A4, A3 and other formats in different grammages.
Reams of 500 sheets.
We offer quality paper both from paper pulp and recycled paper.
We cover both the local market in Morocco and export

Name: LES MENUISERIES ARIEGEOISES
Description:
Depuis 1975, Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises fabriquent des cercueils en alliant tradition et savoir-faire français. 

Soucieuses de répondre aux besoins et budget du plus grande nombre de familles, cette entreprise a créé une offre étendue de gammes : du cercueil en pin brut au coffre américain en acajou vernis, du cercueil blanc d’un célèbre chanteur français au cercueil bleu d’un propriétaire de cabaret… ce sont plus de soixante modèles proposés aux familles.

En complément, Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises proposent également une offre de capitons et accessoires funéraires aux pompes funèbres indépendantes.

Plus qu’un fabricant, Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises accompagnent et conseillent en proposant :
- des gammes avec effet, adaptées au marché de chacun de ses clients, 
- la mise en place et la gestion de dépôts ventes de cercueils & accessoires 
- des outils d’aide à la vente pour faciliter la démarche de vente des conseillers funéraires et conforter les familles dans leur choix avec Exponeo, le show-room dynamique en 3D.

Avec plus de 130 collaborateurs, Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises produisent chaque année 75 000 cercueils sur ses lignes de production à Saint-Paul de Jarrat. 

Les Menuiseries Ariégeoises sont membres du label Les Artisans du Funéraire qui regroupe 4 sociétés familiales dont l’engagement est la qualité et le souci du travail bien fait.

Name: Virginia Forestry Association
Description:
Founded in 1943, the Virginia Forestry Association (VFA) is a non-profit, privately supported organization with the purpose of encouraging wise use of forest resources in the Commonwealth for present and future generations.

VFA membership consists of forest landowners, foresters, forest product businesses, loggers, forestry consultants, and a variety of individuals and groups who are concerned about the future well-being of Virginia's forest resources.

Our organization is dedicated to sustaining, developing, protecting, and promoting the forests and related resources of Virginia. VFA seeks to maintain a political and economic climate favorable for forest ownership and forest industry in the state and to enhance the public's perception of forestry through effective outreach and communications.

Name: Cartaseta AG
Description: Mit über 65 Jahren Erfahrung und hochmoderner Technologie sind wir Spezialisten im Bereich Fast Moving Consumer Goods und bieten dem Schweizer Detailhandel erstklassige Produkte im Bereich Personal Care und Household.

Description: Iberpapel es un grupo papelero referente en el mercado de papel de impresión y escritura en España, con presencia internacional en Europa, Sudamérica y el norte de África.

Description: Fiberteknologerna organizes and assists in the organisation of various annual events with the purpose of giving students at the Royal Institute of Technology (KTH) a chance to interact with company representatives from the pulp- and paper industry and become aware of the opportunities within this field.

Description: From the beginning owned and run by three enthusiasts who decided to take an opportunity to create #1 converter on Polish market. Together with our great team, we can offer: paper and cardboard converting,  wholesale, sheeting service and... another service in our portfoilo coming soon... Stay tuned!

Name: Enkey Enterprise
Description: We are a leading paper distributors, dealing in of the best paper companies around the world.

Name: WmD Druckfabrik Berlin GmbH
Description:
Die WmD Druckfabrik Berlin GmbH ist ein junges, sehr schnell wachsendes Unternehmen im industriellen Onlinedruck mit derzeit 130 Mitarbeitern. Auf hochmodernen Druckmaschinen entstehen in Zusammenarbeit mit unserer Weiterverarbeitung Folder, Flyer und Broschüren. Mit der Briefumschlagfertigung vom Blatt wurde ein weiterer Zweig aufgebaut. Wir legen Wert auf kurze Rüstzeiten, hohe Produktivität, erstklassige Qualität und Termintreue. Um dies zu erreichen, setzen wir auf motivierte und qualifizierte Mitarbeiter und einen durchdachten, effektiven, gut organisierten und stabilen Produktionsablauf.

Täglich werden mindestens 24 Tonnen Papier für unsere Produktion angeliefert und über eine Million Produkte für etwa 400 Kunden verlassen unser Unternehmen. Damit sind wir der drittgrößte Papierabnehmer im Raum Berlin.

Wir möchten uns zu einem innovativen und stabilen Unternehmen mit zufriedenen Mitarbeitern und treuen Kunden entwickeln, mit dem Ziel, einer der führenden Onlinedruck-Produzenten des Landes zu sein.

Um dies zu erreichen, sind wir ständig auf der Suche nach motivierten Mitarbeitern und Mitarbeiterinnen, welche uns durch ihre Qualifikationen als Industriebuchbinder/in (m/w/d) und Drucker/in (m/w/d) tatkräftig unterstützen können.

Name: Green Field Paper
Description: Green Field Paper Company is no longer in operations. We have become Fiore Paper

Name: Celtex S.A.

Para nosotros, la Innovación es un trabajo de equipos, por eso, participamos en distintos proyectos con empresas e instituciones líderes en Chile para entregar productos innovadores y de una alta calidad.

Name: Neu Kaliss Spezialpapier GmbH
Description: Manufacturer of wetlaid nonwovens on wire inclined machines in two factories. Products for decorative and technical industries.

Name: Papelera Guipuzcoana De Zicunaga S.A.U.
Description: Papelera Guipuzcoana de Zicuñaga es el origen del Grupo Iberpapel, uno de los principales actores del mercado de papel de impresión y escritura en España. Fundada en 1935, desde sus inicios en Hernani (Guipúzcoa) se ha dedicado a la fabricación de pasta de celulosa y papel, desarrollando una actividad industrial comprometida con la calidad, el servicio y el respeto al medio ambiente.

Name: LARIS GLOBAL THAILAND
Description: Laris Global (Thailand) Company Limited is a privately held company specializing in the processing of toilet paper (Tissue)Paeso brand company, Nice, Jolly 100% pure paper products do not cause irritation. Circulatory and ventilation systems. The company has built a new plant to expand its production capacity in Amata Nakorn Industrial Estate, Chonburi, with the need to recruit more staff to be part of the team.

Name: Ecoline Belgium
Description: Ecoline is a producer of non-woven wipes for all general industrial cleaning purposes, supplying those products to a network of industrial wholesalers Europe wide. For local market there is also a full range of cleaning and hygienic paper converted on in-house converting lines. Brand name is WipeAway.

Name: Bomo-Cypap Pulp and Paper Ltd.
Description:
At Bomo Cypap, our service means as much to us as the quality of the products we supply. We are proud of how we deal with our orders – executing every step including order handling, forwarding and supply inspection with precision and competence.

Our access to large quantities of paper and board allows us to handle all requirements in the fields of office paper, printing and writing paper, publishing , packaging and specialty paper. Working from our new corporate headquarters, we have created a winning culture which allows us to supply the very best products with the highest level of service.

Name: Romanian Paper Distribution
Description:
Brand 100% românesc!
Înființată în 1998, cu capital 100% românesc, Romanian Paper Distribution este una dintre cele mai importante companii în domeniul distribuției de materiale pentru industria tipografică. RPD oferă clienților săi cea mai diversificată gamă de hârtii și cartoane tipografice, office, pentru printul digital, specialități, soluții complete dedicate domeniului CAD/GIS, adezivi, benzi adezive și materiale de ambalat etc.

Parteneri de renume internațional!
Istoria și identitatea companiei, politica susținută de investiții constante, colaborarea cu furnizori de renume internațional, eficacitatea rețelei de distribuție, calitatea produselor din portofoliu, dar și nivelul serviciilor oferite clienților confirmă anual rolul important pe care Romanian Paper Distribution îl are în industria furnizorilor de hârtie din România.

Încă de la înființare, Romanian Paper Distribution a colaborat numai cu parteneri de renume de mondial, precum Fedrigoni Group, Burgo Group, Lecta Group, The Navigator Company, Mondi Group etc.

Peste 3000 de produse premium!
Portofoliul de peste 3000 de produse include elemente de interes atât pentru tipografii, cât și pentru experții în comunicare vizuală, agenții de publicitate și designerii. Specialiștii care apreciază produsele cu renume, de calitate superioară, vor regăsi în portofoliul RPD o varietate largă de suprafețe, gramaje, o explozie de culori și texturi, un mostrar inovativ, toate integrate într-o nouă identitate vizuală.

Acoperire națională!
Cu sediul central în București și șase filiale teritoriale în Brașov, Cluj, Iași, Timișoara, Brăila și Constanța, amprenta națională a companiei permite consultanța rapidă a clienților, prin intermediul punctelor cheie ale rețelei de distribuție. Fiecare filială dispune de un depozit spațios și o echipă pregatită să găsească soluții specifice, ideale pentru afacerea dumneavoastră! Spațiile de depozitare sunt climatizate, materialele fiind păstrate în condiții optime.

Name: Warmeston
Description:
Warmeston is a privately held wood pellet manufacturer in Estonia – the land of forest. 

We produce pellets by converting both forest and wood industry residues into energy efficient biofuel. The use of pellets displaces fossil fuels with renewable energy sources and helps combating climate change.

In 2016, when biomass sustainability had not yet caught everyone´s attention to the extent it has now, Warmeston was among the first 10 companies worldwide and the first in Estonia to become SBP (Sustainable Biomass Program) certified.

We work every day to create the best future for next generations. 

Details and experience combined with innovative technology and effectiveness make us your long-term partner.

Name: MOBIS ALGERIE
Description:
Nous mettons notre savoir-faire au service de nos clients afin de leur offrir des meubles inspirés par un style de vie moderne leur apportant ainsi le confort, le design à moindre coût avec un souci constant de qualité.

Toute l’équipe de MOBIS ne lésinera sur aucun effort pour créer des meubles qui mèneront les personnes et les organisations vers un quotidien harmonisé tout en contribuant à la valorisation du produit national Algérien
NOUS AVONS POUR AMBITION DE DEVENIR LA MARQUE REFERENCE DANS LA PRODUCTION DE MOBILIER ALGERIEN ET AVONS POUR OBJECTIF DE FABRIQUER DES MEUBLES QUI HARMONISENT LE QUOTIDIEN DES INDIVIDUS.

 

Notre objectif est de devenir le leader Algérien de la fabrication de meubles offrant des produits innovants et de qualité supérieure.

Cette déclaration traduit notre volonté et notre vision de l’avenir avec le souci de fournir les meilleurs produits au meilleur rapport qualité-prix de la conception jusqu’à la livraison.
NOS MEUBLES PARTICIPENT AU BIEN ETRE ET A L’HARMONISATION DE LA VIE DE NOS CLIENTS ET DES ORGANISATIONS.

 

Notre mission est de créer de la valeur pour nos clients en concevant et en produisant des meubles de qualité supérieure.

Grace à nos produits, nos clients connaîtront un quotidien plus pratique, ergonomique, chaleureux et convivial.
DES VALEURS INDUSTRIELLES FORTES

C’est de l’ambition d’un groupe solidement implanté et de son désir d’avancer vers un avenir durable que Mobis est née. Nous sommes capables de prendre des risques et avons l’envie de relever des challenges en ayant l’intime conviction que nos hauts standards d’exigences nous mèneront vers le meilleur.

Nos valeurs sont le ciment de notre culture d’entreprise. Tous nos collaborateurs ont la volonté de:

Participer au développement économique de notre pays
Avancer avec intégrité et force
Construire des relations durables et pérennes
Simplifier les difficultés du quotidien
Offrir un design épuré et harmonieux
Proposer à nos clients des solutions personnalisées

Name: MO PAC Lumber Company
Description: MO PAC Lumber (Missouri-Pacific Lumber Company) is a hardwood sawmill that specializes in NHLA Grade Certified steamed, kiln dried, furniture grade American black walnut lumber.  Decades of experience in both domestic and export shipping.

Name: Dongwha Finland Oy
Description:
Dongwha Finland Oy is a privately owned, producer of Imprex -products. Factory is located in Kotka, southern coast of Finland where we have approx. 60 employees. 

We are part of global company Dongwha Industries http://www.dongwha.com/en     

Imprex Surface Films are used for overlaying wood-based panels like plywood. They are self-bonding prepregs in which saturating base kraft paper is impregnated with phenol formaldehyde resin. Imprex Core Stock is a resin-treated core paper for high-pressure laminates.

Name: Golden Gate Paper Company Inc.
Description:
Headquartered in Calexico, California. We are a proud subsidiary of Papel San Francisco, Mexico’s second-largest player in the tissue industry, with 45 years of experience.
Our journey started with a commitment to quality and innovation, leading us to become a trusted name in the paper products industry.

Name: Pack N Pap
Description: PACK N PAP, division papier, kraft et carton de la société INTERFER. Avec plus de 35 ans d’expérience dans ce domaine, notre équipe est à votre disposition pour répondre à tous vos besoins dans le domaine de l'impression et du packaging.

Name: ALSAFLOORING - Parqueterie Berrichonne
Description:
Créée en 1947, la Parqueterie Berrichonne a su traverser les époques et se remettre en question pour pérenniser son activité et sa place de spécialiste sur le marché du parquet en bois naturel.
Rebaptisée France Parquet Production Innovation (FPPI) depuis la reprise par deux actionnaires salariés Dominique Bouillet (Président) et Philippe Merigot (Directeur général) en Novembre 2013, la société a fait ke choix de moderniser son outil de production pour plus de performance & d'innovation.

Aujourd'hui, FPPI se veut à la croisée d'une solide expérience, d'une maîtrise de la matière noble qu'est le bois et d'une volonté affichée de faire naître des nouvelles tendances.

Avec près de 65 ans d'existence, l'histoire continue de s'écrire à travers des femmes & des hommes passionnés, des professionnels, nourris de traditions et animés par la passion du bois dont le savoir-faire se transmet de génération en génération.
Au fil du temps, le mariage de plusieurs générations et de regards venants de plusieurs horizons, permettent de proposer une évolution perpétuelle et un partage des expériences.

Environ cinquante salariés dans des secteurs aussi divers que la production, la méthode, la comptabilité, la logistique, l'administratif, le commerce ou le marketing, permettent à cette société "régénérée" sous l'enseigne FPPI (France Parquet Production Innovation) d'avoir un horizon en commun qui s'inscrit dans la fabrication de produits beaux et précieux.

Name: Fraserwood Industries Ltd
Description:
FraserWood is a full-service supplier of heavy timber and specialty glulam products.  As the leader in Radio Frequency (RF) drying of timbers, FraserWood is able to provide timbers that remain straight, square, and stable for years to come.  From its facility in McMinnville, Oregon, FraserWood stocks an inventory of #1&Btr, FOHC, FOW, Douglas Fir Timbers in sizes up to 10x16 and lengths up to 24ft.  FraserWood fulfills all custom orders of Select Structural and any items that aren’t stocked in inventory from its facility in Squamish, BC.

FraserWood’s EdgeMatched and GrainMatched glulams provide solutions for projects with demanding requirements in strength, size, and appearance.  Our press allows us to provide these glulams as straight beams or as custom curves.

With two Hundegger CNC machines, FraserWood has the capacity and know-how to provide precision joinery on projects large or small.  Our team of CAD specialists and project leaders will work with you to ensure all of your design elements are achieved.

Whether you’re in need of stable, RF dried timbers, or the clean look of EdgeMatched or GrainMatched glulams, FraserWood has the products and experience to help make your project a success.

Name: Parqueterie de France
Description:
Fabricant de parquets massifs et contrecollés.
Une société du groupe DESCHAUMES, créateur de Naofloor, le premier parquet massif à bilan carbone neutre, démontable, réemployable et réutilisable à la pose ultra facile et rapide.

Name: Aserraderos Temuco S.A.
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la producción de madera seca, cepillada y verde de Pino Oregón.

Mi labor es planificar producción y ejecutar programa, efectuar el requerimiento materia prima, organización de solicitud de clientes, gestionar mantención industrial.

Name: Contract Converting LLC
Description:
Contract Converting is a family-owned industry leader specializing in high-quality slitting and rewinding services. As a trusted supplier of non-pressure-sensitive roll stock, we serve the tag, label, and flexible packaging industries with precision and efficiency.

With a strong commitment to service, speed, and accuracy, we help businesses eliminate production bottlenecks, reduce lead times, and streamline inventory management. Our slit-to-order product solutions ensure flexibility and reliability, allowing our customers to meet their unique production needs with confidence.

Our operations are divided into two key divisions:
Custom Slitting Division – We provide contract slitting, rewinding, labeling, and packaging services for companies without in-house slitting capabilities or those needing additional capacity. To support seamless supply chains, we also offer warehousing and inventory management solutions.

Roll Express Division – We maintain a vast inventory of products, including non-pressure-sensitive label stock, film, foil structures, synthetic papers, PET, HDPE, coated and uncoated papers, and flexible packaging material. Our products are custom slit-to-order to fit your application.

We proudly serve a diverse range of sectors, including food and beverage, personal care, pharmaceuticals, retail, agriculture, and commercial. Our reputation for quality, reliability, and responsive service has made us a trusted partner.

If your business needs expert slitting services or specialty materials on demand, Contract Converting is ready to deliver.

Name: Industrade Pulp and Paper Inc.
Description:
We are Canadian company specialized in the sale and distributing of paper,  paperboard and tissue, as well as related products to printers and converters in the Caribbean Island, Central and South America.

Industrade is a one stop solution that acts as a purchasing and financing arm for its customers. Our no overhead structure gives our customers access to very competitive prices and an experienced and professional team. We team up with the mills, warehouses and freight forwarders to offer a variety of products at great prices and with fast and hassle free destination delivery wherever the customer is located.

We distribute from reliable and recognized suppliers in North America, Europe and Asia. Whether you are looking for tissue, paper board or packaging, Industrade is in a position to offer to our customers a broad range of products at competitive prices with the same efficiency and speed as local producers.

Name: Nippon Paper Papylia
Description:
Go beyond paper.

Founded in 1918, a leading specialty paper manufacturer in Japan. 
A division of Nippon Paper Group's specialty paper and functional sheet business.

Nippon Paper Papylia supplies the most optimal paper and nonwoven sheet that our customers need, masterly combining not only wood fibers but also plant fibers and synthetic fibers, of which we guarantee the traceability.

Nippon Paper Papylia's product ranges are very wide, from the base material for tapes to tea bags, coffee filters, food and drug packaging material, industrial specialty paper, water-soluble paper that instantly dissolves in water, greaseproof paper which does not contain fluorine compounds, biodegradable agricultural mulching sheet and more. We support our customers' safe, secure, and sustainable corporate activities.

Name: PT. Margono Dian Graha
Description:
Providing more than 100 embossing design patterns and over 50 color combinations to choose from, Margono Paper has housed the largest collections of colored paper in the world. 

We specialize in offering OEM flexibility to match your custom orders with competitive pricing and premium quality. We take orders as low as 1 ton per color and gsm for minimum order quantities, in all kinds of sizes: reels, big sheets, cut sizes - matching your special requirements.

As a responsible manufacturer, we adhere to the highest industry standard. Our certifications include FSC, EN 71-3, SMETA/SEDEX Four Pillars, ISO 9001, and SVLK. These certificates demonstrate our commitment to the highest standards in sustainability, safety, and ethical business practices.

Name: Techpap
Description:
Techpap is the high-tech company funded by the C.T.P.(*) to market the instruments and equipment developed to improve paper production, quality, development and research. Acknowledging the fast paced and ever changing nature of today’s Pulp & Paper world, Techpap remains on the cutting edge of technological evolution to ensure the Pulp & Paper Industry has access to the most advanced information and equipment possible.

(*) Centre Technique du Papier de Grenoble, FRANCE

Name: Piantami - La carta che rinasce
Description:
Produciamo la Carta Piantabile. Tutti i prodotti che ne nascono come scatole , flayer , biglietti da visita  alla fine del loro uso invece di essere buttati, possono essere piantati e aiutare il pianeta a respirare grazie alle piante che ne nascono. 

La nostra carta piantabile è ottenuta grazie ad una tecnologia in grado di innestare semi vivi all’interno della carta riciclata. Perciò ogni oggetto di carta realizzato con la nostra carta piantabile, invece di finire in discarica, può rinascere come pianta.
Dopo aver svolto il suo ruolo nell’accompagnare la vendita del tuo prodotto, può essere piantato e donare nuova vita sotto forma di una splendida pianta rigogliosa.

Scegliere la nostra carta piantabile significa scegliere la materia perfetta con cui costruire il futuro.

Piantami è la soluzione per chi non vuole rinunciare alla sensazione della carta sotto le dita ma contemporaneamente ha a cuore le sorti del Pianeta.

Utilizzala per il packaging dei tuoi prodotti, per i cartellini dei tuoi vestiti o per i prodotti di carta del tuo albergo come portakey o biglietto Welcome. Plasmala per dare forma ai tuoi sogni green.

La natura te ne sarà grata.

Name: ForestryTrader
Description:
ForestryTrader.com is your go-to source for buying and selling new and used forestry equipment and attachments. You’ll find a wide range of equipment available on ForestryTrader.com, including feller bunchers, processors/harvesters, delimbers, skidders, yarders, mulchers, grinders, log loaders, logging trucks and trailers, sawmills, and more, from Bandit, Barko, Cat, Deere, Link-Belt, Morbark, Peterson Pacific, Ponsse, Rayco, Tigercat, Timbco, Vermeer, and many other manufacturers.

ForestryTrader.com offers quick and easy access to thousands of for-sale listings, including specs and photo galleries. The website makes it simple for buyers to find the forestry equipment they need, whether browsing by category or manufacturer or searching for a specific piece of equipment. For sellers, ForestryTrader.com provides an intuitive platform for listing forestry equipment for sale, including detailed descriptions and photos.

ForestryTrader.com is a service of Sandhills Global, headquartered in Lincoln, Nebraska, USA. Sandhills launched its first publication, Machinery Trader, in 1978 to serve buyers and sellers in the construction industry. That publication and the MachineryTrader.com website are still going strong, offering weekly print editions and reaching customers worldwide. ForestryTrader.com grew from the success of MachineryTrader.com, and today offers equipment previously available through both MachineryTrader.com and Sandhills’ website for trucks and trailers, TruckPaper.com.

Name: TRIPLAY ALAMEDA SA DE CV
Description: Triplay Alameda, S.A. de C.V. es una empresa 100 % mexicana, fundada en 1988, dedicada principalmente a la compra – venta de tableros forestales, nacionales e importados y considerada una de las distribuidoras de triplay más grande de México.

Name: Geosylva S.A., Rio Tumbes S.A., Clontech Uruguay S.A.
Description: Grupo empresarial que inició sus actividades a comienzos del año 2000. Desde entonces y hasta la actualidad se encuentra trabajando activamente dentro del sector forestal desempeñándose principalmente en las áreas de consultoría, comercialización y servicios forestales.

Name: Grupo Incofral
Description: Somos uma indústria especializada em produtos higiênicos descartáveis. Pertencemos a um grupo com mais de 25 anos de experiência nesse mercado, que investe constantemente em qualidade e tecnologia para atender cada vez mais às necessidades de nossos clientes.

Name: Ferpaper
Description:
Somos representantes de fabricantes internacionais e promovemos a ligação entre o nossos agenciados e o mercado, sempre  com o objetivo de apresentar os melhores produtos com o melhor serviço aos nossos clientes.

Apostamos na modernização do setor da distribuição do papel com recurso a novas tecnologias sempre com um serviço de excelência.

Valorizamos a relação com os nossos clientes, identificando os objetivos e oferendo um conjunto de soluções para cada projeto. Uma equipa coesa e organizada representam o ADN da empresa.

Name: Menuiserie - Ébénisterie Rossi
Description:
L’ébénisterie Rossi, installée à Monaco depuis 1936, assure la fabrication et la pose de tous vos travaux de marqueterie et menuiserie. Nous réalisons tous vos projets de parquets, menuiseries de bois, cloisons à structure bois et meubles de cuisines.

Nous vous proposons également de réaliser vos projets extérieurs, vérandas, grilles, volets et stores. Laissez-vous séduire par le travail d’artisans passionnés. Nous saurons choisir les meilleures essences de bois pour coller au plus près de vos envies. Avec un savoir-faire unique et le geste précis, nous réaliserons pour vous des pièces uniques, intemporelles et élégantes.

Name: HANEX Wood Products
Description:
HANEX was founded in 1987 in Germany and has been functioning in Istanbul as HANEX LTD. STI since 1994. HANEX gives the representation service to mainly Wood industry with Turkey production plants, steel belts and plates, decorative printed and unicolor papers and Chemical and Food industries with the steel belt representation.

HANEX is a representation company of many companies located mainly in Germany, Austria, France and Italy in Turkey.

Description: Angelo Reflorestamento is a paper & forest products company based out of R Edmundo Prestes Nogueira, 60, Itapetininga, São Paulo, Brazil.
