Fabricamos cajas de cartón corrugado y comercializamos productos para embalaje.
Mantenga tranquilidad absoluta en el empaque de sus productos.
Sus clientes estarán satisfechos al recibir seguridad.

Name: Dolpap
Description:
Dolpap is a Polish manufacturer of high-quality release liners, water-activated tapes and gummed papers with over 26 years of experience. 
We specialize in coating and converting paper and film materials, offering customized solutions to meet individual customer needs. 
Operating within an integrated quality and safety management system ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018, we ensure not only the excellent quality of our products but also the complete safety of our employees. 
We are prepared to meet even the most demanding industry challenges, providing comprehensive sevices and innovative solutions.

Name: Mivelaz Bois SA
Description: Entreprise familiale de 3ème génération active dans l'industrie du bois depuis 1945, nous sommes spécialisé dans la fabrication de lames et lambris pour l'intérieur et la façade, la fabrication de panneaux massifs collés et de traitements de surface en tous genre. L'environnement fait également partie de nos préoccupations, c'est pourquoi nous revalorisons tous nos sous-produits en pellets de bois et produisons chaque année plus de 1GwH d'énergie solaire pour alimenter notre production.

Name: Consorcio Maderero S.A.
Description: Consorcio Maderero S.A., is a paper & forest products company based out of Avenida Las Condes #11380, OF62, Vitacura, Santiago de Chile.

Name: Jazz Forest Products
Description:
Jazz Forest Products is a leading primary manufacturer, specialty value-added producer and global exporter of forestry products in Western Canada, we supply Western Red Cedar & Douglas Fir in various dimensions and grades. Jazz produces high quality wood products ranging from mouldings, specialty paneling, bevel and engineered products, as well has structural and appearance timbers. 

Jazz Forest Products is proud to be a member of the Mirax Group, leveraging collective expertise and resources to further enhance our offerings and expand our reach.

Name: Ar-Tu Kimya San. ve Tic. A.S.
Description:
The main activity of AR-TU Kimya (the "Company") is the production of tanning materials based on natural tanning. Valonia extract, "valex" which is a natural tanning is solely founded in Turkey. The plant is designed for specialised production of highest quality stated in valonia extract with a capacity of 8,000 tons per year. 80% of the total production is exported to over 14 countries including Spain, Italy, France, China, Argentina and Brazil.

Besides producing valex and pine bark extracts as tannin extracts, AR-TU is the supplier of other natural tannin from wild forests including gallnut and sumach leaf powder

Name: UNICO PAPER GROUP
Description:
UNICO is a global provider of premium cover materials and customized packaging solutions for luxury brands, printers, and design agencies.
We combine mill-level production capability with end-to-end supply-chain management, delivering better quality, faster lead times, and stronger cost performance.

Our materials include colored & textured cover paper, black card, PU & specialty surfaces, velvet-touch and sustainable fiber materials.
UNICO offers engineering customization—GSM tuning, coating adjustments, color development, embossing calibration, and functional upgrades such as anti-scuff or anti-curl treatment.

With a strict multi-step QC system and on-site inspection support, we ensure batch stability and export-grade reliability.
Through long-term mill partnerships, we help clients achieve competitive pricing, optimized production slots, small-MOQ flexibility, and smooth global documentation (FSC/GRS/EUDR/MSDS/TDS).

Our mission is simple:
Deliver premium materials with precision, transparency, and trust.

UNICO — Beyond Materials, We Deliver Confidence.

Name: Asia Forestry Management Ltd.
Description:
Asia Forestry Management Co Ltd (AFM) as a Company was established in 2006 with the purpose of implementing environmentally sound forestry development projects sustaining & strengthening the ecological balance within its operational areas, The Company specialises in the management of Aquilaria plantations and the production of Oud oil.

The company works hand in hand with the local community, improving the local economy through its sustainable projects. As a leading Oud Oil producer in Thailand, we are capable of providing the consistent high grade Oud oil from our cultivated plantations. Our Oil is considered as the finest due to our production base in Trat province, Thailand, situated just less than 50 kilometers from the Thailand - Cambodia border. AFM products are certified by the CITES for worldwide export.

Our strength lies in the fact that we control the complete value chain with a seed to oil strategy. We grow and manage our own agricultural Aquilaria trees after which our own Distillery extracts the Oil. Asia Forestry Distillery uses local expertise, knowledge & manpower & due to these method’s we are able to provide a consistently high standard and grade of Agar Oil in larger volumes and with the security that our trees are located at managed plantations to ensure consistent feedstock to supply our factory.

Name: Nature Line Cutlery
Description:
Years ago we already knew that single use items are not the future solution. 

Nature Line Cutlery Oy is a privately owned Finnish company, founded in January 2020 through a business acquisition. The idea of reusable cutlery made from renewable materials was born many years earlier.

During our development work, we partnered with forest industry giants UPM and Stora Enso to create a responsible solution that serves customers and consumers around the world to decrease disposable consumption.

Our products are manufactured in Outokumpu, North Karelia, Eastern Finland. We continually improve our products to meet a growing global demand of ecological cutlery. Our product line is available in our Nature Line brand or in custom packaging for private label brands. Today, our products can be found in more than 20 countries globally, and we continuously develop our offering to meet growing demand of ecological products with a highest food safety and quality.

We are a flexible and efficient partner, whose cornerstones are speed of operation, quality of service and high-quality safe products. We also continue developing constantly new solutions and products to fulfil customer demands.

Our ambition is to be leading supplier and brand of the sustainable cutlery, creating innovative designs and ecological solutions in kitchen utensils.

Our mission is simple: better future. Our goal: leading the way towards replacing all single-use and fossil-based cutlery and kitchen item with reusable ecological products.

Name: El-Salam Paper Mill
Description:
Established in 1978, El-Salam Paper Mill has solidified its position as a pioneer in the paper industry, combining decades of expertise with an unwavering commitment to quality and innovation. Serving a broad spectrum of markets across the globe, we specialize in delivering tailored solutions to meet the demands of diverse industries such as packaging, printing, and industrial applications. 

Commitment to Excellence

At El-Salam Paper Mill, we pride ourselves on blending modern technology with environmentally sustainable practices, ensuring that our solutions not only meet but exceed industry standards. Our dedication to excellence is evident in our meticulous attention to detail, quality assurance, and collaborative approach.

Global Vision

With a significant network of partners and distributors, El-Salam Paper Mill continues to expand its reach, fostering long-term relationships built on trust, reliability, and mutual growth.
 
Join us as we redefine excellence in Cardboard manufacturing.

Visit our website or contact our team for more information.

Name: Evergreen Fibres
Description:
Evergreen Fibres is an industry-leading third-party organization focused on providing unrivaled service and superior value to our suppliers and customers in the domestic and international paper markets. We achieve this success by offering sustainable, eco-friendly packaging solutions using a highly experienced team of professionals that are trained to offer the absolute best containerboard and packaging solutions to the marketplace. 

Evergreen Fibres’ serves as a bridge between manufacturers and customers by utilizing our combined 185 years of experience in multi-faceted paper-based packaging. 

Evergreen Fibres also offers a “closed-loop” recycling service to our customers. We honestly believe in reducing the world’s dependence on packaging that is non-recyclable resulting in earth-friendly product solutions for today and for future generations to come!

Name: LES ATELIERS AUBERT-LABANSAT
Description:
Les Ateliers Aubert-Labansat sont situés en Normandie, à Coutances, dans la Manche. Nous intervenons sur les monuments les plus emblématiques de notre patrimoine dans le grand quart Nord-Ouest de la France.

Selon les demandes et les besoins, nous restaurons,  reproduisons à l’identique, ou créons de nouveaux ouvrages en respectant l’esthétique de l’ancien. Nous réalisons également des décors en treillage ainsi que tous travaux spéciaux dans le domaine du bois.

Dotés d’un bureau d’études interne conséquent, nous disposons de toutes les compétences  et matériels dont vous avez besoin pour étudier et concevoir vos projets tout en alliant les techniques traditionnelles et innovantes.

Name: Southern Regional Extension Forestry
Description:
In 1979, the thirteen Southern 1862 Land-Grant institutions and the USDA Forest Service signed a cooperative agreement creating the Southern Regional Extension Forester position to serve as a liason role between the USDA Forest Service and the thirteen Extension Forest Resources units in the South. The position has evolved into a regional programming, representation, promotion,and communication role within the forestry and natural resource communities regionally and nationally.

The goal of the Southern Regional Extension Forestry Office is to identify, prescribe, and implement a mix of education and technical services that increase the efficiency of forestry programs in the southern United States.

Name: Indústria Gráfica Veiga Soares
Description:
A Veiga Soares é uma indústria dedicada à produção de embalagens de papel cartão personalizadas que se destaca não apenas pela qualidade de seus produtos, mas também por seu compromisso inabalável com a sustentabilidade ambiental.

Nosso foco primordial é fornecer embalagens adaptadas às necessidades específicas de cada cliente, garantindo a máxima eficiência e praticidade em seus processos. Utilizamos matéria-prima proveniente de empresas comprometidas com o meio ambiente, assegurando a qualidade e a sustentabilidade de nossos produtos desde o início do processo.

Na Veiga Soares, estamos empenhados em reduzir ao máximo os impactos ambientais de nossa produção. Reciclamos integralmente todos os materiais excedentes de nossas operações, adotamos sistemas de captação de água da chuva para uso em nosso processo produtivo e fazemos uso de energia solar por meio de painéis instalados em nossa empresa.

Com uma grande capacidade produtiva, oferecemos uma ampla gama de produtos, que incluem embalagens de papel cartão para empresas de diversos seguimentos, comunicação visual, materiais para hospitais e clinicas.

Nosso diferencial reside em nosso parque gráfico localizado em um único local, o que nos permite criar projetos exclusivos e oferecer acompanhamento personalizado, do início ao fim. Além disso, nosso compromisso com a excelência no atendimento ao cliente e a utilização de papel certificado para alimentos refletem nosso cuidado em oferecer segurança e qualidade em cada trabalho que produzimos.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Independent Lumber Manufacturers' Association
Description:
ILMA Member mills have great stories to tell: decades of continuous operation; more jobs per cubic meter; local employment and purchasing; and creation of high-value products from BC’s public forest resource.

We’ve dramatically grown our primary membership along with our Associate Members in a wide-range of core supporting industries.

There is an ongoing challenge in the industry regarding a consistent supply of fibre to the various producers in all parts of the industry. The ILMA-proposed solution to this challenge can be summed-up in one sentence: “Get the right log to the right mill.”

Over the past few years, the ILMA has been working with government to inform policies that support ‘the right log to the right mill’. We’ve been working with local government to gain support and working with staff in both the technical and political roles of the Ministry of Forests, Lands, Natural Resource Operations and
Rural Development.

Name: Planchers Wickham - Wickham Flooring
Description:
Une entreprise qui se positionne comme chef de file depuis plus de 30 ans.
Située à Wickham, en banlieue de Drummondville, l’entreprise Les Planchers de bois franc Wickham a vu le jour en 1989. Résultat de nombreuses années d’efforts et d’acharnement, l’entreprise occupe maintenant une place importante dans le marché et la qualité de ses produits est reconnue mondialement.
 
De la lamelle de bois non finie aux planchers de bois franc vernis
Depuis ses débuts modestes, avec une production concentrée uniquement sur les planchers en lamelles de bois franc non finis, cette entreprise florissante n’a cessé de perfectionner ses installations afin d’augmenter sa productivité et la qualité de ses produits. Chaque année, la compagnie réinvestit une part importante de ses profits dans ses aménagements. En 1996, une innovation dans le procédé de fabrication a entraîné un changement dans le positionnement stratégique de l’entreprise. Il s’agit de l’élaboration d’une chaîne de production automatisée pour le vernissage des planchers de bois franc.
 
Des nouveaux propriétaires et des installations à la fine pointe
En 2009, Jean-Pierre Nittolo et Lise Nittolo deviennent les nouveaux propriétaires majoritaires des Planchers de bois franc Wickham. Fort d’une longue et riche expérience au sein de l’entreprise, les nouveaux propriétaires ont entrepris de lui insuffler un nouveau dynamisme en procédant à des changements majeurs. L’entreprise possède maintenant une scierie, des séchoirs, une usine de transformation et une ligne de finition.
 
Une présence significative sur le marché mondial
Bien positionnée sur les marchés internationaux, l’entreprise exporte plus de 78 % de sa production, particulièrement en Europe (Irlande et Angleterre), aux États-Unis et en Asie (Japon). L'autre partie est destinée au marché local et à plusieurs distributeurs, soit en Ontario et dans les Maritimes.

Name: Allweather Wood, LLC
Description:
Allweather Wood began operating in 1985 with our first preservative treated lumber facility in Washougal, Washington. In 1991, the company constructed a second facility in White City, Oregon. With subsequent acquisitions, we added preservative treated lumber manufacturing and distribution facilities in Coos Bay, Oregon, and Loveland, Colorado as well as distribution locations in Ferndale, Washington, and Fontana and Woodland, California. Each of our locations manufactures and stocks preservative treated lumber and plywood products to best support the market needs in the geographic areas we serve. Allweather Wood now ranks as the largest waterborne preservative treated lumber manufacturer in the Western U.S.

Over the years, we have expanded our product lines at each location. Today, our inventory features products for building decks, fences, and landscaping projects. In addition, we offer products for industrial and agricultural applications including docks, bridges, pole barns, sill plate, framing, and much more. And, we continue to grow our product offerings in response to the ever-changing needs of our customers. 

Each of our locations stocks specific wood species that best support the market needs in those geographic areas. Some of these wood species include Douglas-fir, Hem fir, Southern Yellow Pine, Lodgepole Pine, and Ponderosa Pine.

In addition, Allweather Wood is honored to have obtained Forest Stewardship Council (FSC C013133) chain-of-custody certification for our manufacturing facilities in Loveland, Colorado, Washougal, Washington, and White City and Coos Bay, Oregon. We also maintain chain-of-custody certification for our distribution facilities in Fontana and Woodland, California. We take our policies of environmental stewardship very seriously. We consider FSC certification to be a badge of honor, as well as an affirmation of our forward-thinking, environmentally sustainable practices.

Learn more at https://www.AllweatherWood.com/

Nuestro catálogo abarca desde soluciones estándar hasta diseños personalizados y complejos, adaptándonos a las necesidades de sectores como el alimentario, farmacéutico, tecnológico y más. En Converpack, entendemos la importancia de la cadena de suministro y nos esforzamos por ser un socio estratégico que contribuye al éxito y crecimiento de su negocio.

Descubra cómo Converpack puede elevar sus estándares de embalaje y contribuir a la excelencia operativa de su empresa. Visite www.converpack.com.ar para conocer más sobre nuestras soluciones innovadoras y sostenibles.

Name: Aurora (Stationery & Filing)
Description:
Aurora History
... a "paper-story" ...
in the heart of Europe ...
... a future oriented company
customer service is our first priority ... 

1935
In the centre of Turnhout (province of Antwerp - Belgium) we started our paper converting activities.
At first the exercise books were machine ruled but finished by hand.
Yearly paper consumption was: 500 tons. 

1960
The company moved to the industrial estate of Beerse some 10 km away from Turnhout and very near to the E34-motorway.
The area of the first new building was then about: 5,000 m² 

2005
The company continues to grow and the buildings now have an area of 35,000 m².
Every year Aurora converts 14,000 tons of paper.
Nearly all our products are now made on fully automatic machines.
Aurora offers a very extensive range of stationery and has grown to become the most important manufacturer in the Benelux-region.
In addition we have been able to build an extensive worldwide export trade. 

2007
New warehouse for raw materials was completed bringing the total covered space for production, stock and logistics to over 430,000 sq.ft. 

2008
The commercial and logistic activities of all group members are integrated. Aurora now has one Distribution Centre for all deliveries. 

2010
All Cadara’s activities are taken over by its affiliated company Aurora Productions NV.
1935 - 2010 75th anniversary Aurora.

Description:
Duni Poppies is a leading UK-based manufacturer with decades of expertise in sustainably-sourced disposable table solutions. We take pride in producing the majority of our range right here in Britain, supporting local industry and ensuring the highest standards of quality and reliability.

Our product portfolio is one of the most comprehensive in the market, featuring napkins in 1-ply, 2-ply, 3-ply, and premium airlaid, available in an extensive palette of colours to complement any setting. But our expertise doesn’t stop at tableware. We also manufacture a full range of hygiene tissue products, including centrefeed rolls, toilet tissue, and hand towels, all crafted to meet rigorous performance standards. As an accredited member of the CHSA Soft Tissue Standard Scheme and proudly part of the Made in Britain initiative, Duni Poppies stands for consistency, trust, and UK manufacturing excellence.

With a reputation built on innovation and local production, we continue to lead the way in providing solutions that combine functionality, style, and responsibility. Name: RUK Group
Description:
RUKGROUP.COM is made up from Recycling UK Ltd, Oswestry Waste Paper, Shredding UK Ltd, and Materials Recycling and Consultancy Ltd. We also have partnership with Paper Works India and The New Saints Football Club, as can be seen on our website www.rukgroup.com 

Recycling UK Limited was formed in June 1998 to buy and sell waste paper within the UK and mainland Europe. Since then the company has seen substantial and continuous growth with average monthly traded tonnages of over 25,000 tonnes, and expansion into other world markets. We have a joint venture with Paperworks India. The head office is in Mumbai with sales to mills in all parts of the Indian subcontinent.

From Oswestry Waste Paper we service the Midlands, Shropshire, Staffordshire, North Wales and the North West of England to provide safe, convenient and independent waste collection and disposal of paper, card boards and plastics. Our experienced team and fleet of vehicles collect weekly, fortnightly or monthly based upon your contractual needs. Bespoke collections are also available.

Oswestry Waste Paper also provide delivery and collection of skips, balers and compactors to meet all of your businesses recycling requirements with a current weekly tonnage in excess of 800 tons per week.

Shredding UK, is an integral part of the RUK Group of companies, specialising in secure document destruction across a broad spectrum of market sectors throughout the UK. Our business model is focused on allowing businesses to comply with the latest industry legislation and and that confidential information is guaranteed to be kept secure at all times at all parts of the data destruction process.

We offer On-Site and One-Off Collection services that are tailored to suit your bespoke business requirements, keeping your company’s confidential information secure and, most importantly, giving you complete peace of mind that your secure data is in safe hands.

Name: Ebata Produtos Florestais Ltda
Description:

Nossa planta industrial de 32.000m2 está localizada no distrito industrial de Icoaraci, na cidade de Belém, estaod do Pará, contendo máquinas importadas e nacionais  para o precosamento de madeira de mais de 20 espécies diferente. 
Em 2009, construímos nossa usina de energia elétrica através da queima de nossos resíduos, gerando energia limpa para toda nossa indústria, caminhando para o tratamento de todo o resíduo que geramos.

Em 2010, a Ebata assinou um contrato de 40 anos com o Serviço Florestal Brasileiro para poder realizar a extração de  madeira e outros produtos florestais da UMF II da Floresta Nacional de Saracá-Taquera, contendo 29.769,82 ha. Esta extração, é executada através do nosso Plano de Manejo Florestal, onde extraímos as toras com reduzido impacto na floresta, tomando diversos cuidados em nossa operações.

Na Marombas Energia geramos energia limpa a partir de fontes renováveis, com usinas hidroelétricas projetadas com o mínimo o impacto ambiental.

We’ve since become one of the largest copy paper distributors in the nation and have been recognized for multiple years by Inc. 5000 as one of the fastest growing companies in the country. A few of our key values: Not me, WE. Be relentless. Detail makes the difference. We stand by our word. Learn. Adapt. Grow.

Name: Northland Forest Products, Inc
Description:
Northland Forest Products is a hardwood lumber processor and distributor, producing our own exclusive brand of hardwood lumber for markets in the United States and 26 countries around the world. Founded in 1970, and with a history dating back to the late 19th century, Northland Forest Products continues today as a family-run business committed to excellence, innovation and responsible forest stewardship.

We take great pride in knowing that our customers depend on us not only for reliable supply and professional service, but for the unsurpassed quality of our kiln-dried Northern and Appalachian hardwoods. Our customers expect the best, and with exacting quality and grading standards and over a century of experience, that's what we deliver.

Northland Forest Products is also proud to have one been one of the earliest companies in North America to embrace forest certification. Since 1996, we have been chain-of-custody certified to Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) standards. Our certificate number is NC-COC-000022 and FSC license code is FSC C017079.  There are only a handful of companies still in the business that have been selling FSC-certified wood longer than we have. FSC is the leader in third party responsible forestry certification, and we remain committed to doing everything we can to source and market FSC-certified lumber.

Name: ElasXeranSector
Description:
#ElasXeranSector es un programa impulsado por la Agencia Gallega de la Industria Forestal [Xunta de Galicia] con el objetivo de visibilizar el papel de la mujer en la industria forestal-madera.

Uno de los mayores desafíos a los que se enfrenta el sector es darse a conocer. No hablamos de publicidad sino de abrirse a la sociedad y mostrar tanto el quehacer diario como la aportación del sector a la economía, a la neutralidad climática o al bienestar de las personas. Este ejercicio será esencial tanto para mejorar la valoración (propia y ajena) del personal de la cadena de valor, como para atraer a nuevas personas que se incorporen nos distintos puestos de trabajo.

Y, si hablamos de ocupación laboral, el objetivo es atrajer TALENTO. Talento con mayúsculas puesto que debemos atraer a los mejores curriculums, con diverso bagaje formativo y laboral.

Por ello, la primera actividad del programa, en febrero de 2019, fue un reportaje fotográfico protagonizado por profesionales del sector. La recopilación pone de manifiesto la presencia femenina en prácticamente todos los puestos del sector. Estos ejemplos se seleccionaron como reconocimiento a su buen hacer, pero también en la búsqueda de papeles en los que las nuevas generaciones se puedan ver reflejadas y por tanto atraídas por la industria forestal-madera. 

Como cualquier otra actividad, #ElasXeranSector se vio ralentizada por la pandemia pero desde febrero de 2021 las reuniones son trimestrales. Estos encuentros no tienen un enfoque feminista ni sindicalista. Son foros de debate sobre las temáticas de actualidad y sobre los ámbitos estratégicos que posibilitarán el avance del sector. Sí se abordan con una perspectiva de género y se incide en la visibilización del papel de la mujer. 

Ante el enfoque participativo de esta iniciativa, se incrementa progresivamente el número de hombres que se adhieren al programa. Profesionales comprometidos y referentes, que por lo tanto serán clave en el impulso de la igualdad real.

Tree Alliance, a strategic program run by Private Forest Tasmania which aims to raise awareness of farm forestry and the benefits of trees on farms, and to encourage and facilitate farmers to plant commercially viable trees in the agricultural landscape. 

Our beliefs:
1. Increase farm productivity
2. Improve water efficiency and water quality
3. Improve the carbon balance
4. Protect the land for the future

Farmers who plant trees are growing the future.

If you have any questions regarding Tree Alliance or Private Forests Tasmania reach out at admin@pft.tas.gov.au or phone 1300 661 009 to speak to one of our staff.

Name: PABEX | Die Papierbörse | The Paper Exchange
Description:
PABEX stands for "Paper And Board Exchange" and is a business-to-business (B2B) marketplace for the printing and paper/cartonboard industry. Printers, manufacturers, wholesale and retail can easily liquidate excess stock of paper, cartonboard and cardboard or buy at reduced price via our trading platform.
 

Innovative solutions for the paper and packaging industry

PABEX was founded in 2016 by Daniel Jelić, who has been active in the paper and packaging industry for more than 15 years. Looking for an innovative solution to a known problem in his industry he was asking himself: How can fixed capital in the form of stored, no longer needed paper and paperboard be liquidated? What to do with residual stock that is not suitable for recycling? How can stocks be reduced, quick, easy and at a better yield than through the recycling process? 
 
A B2B marketplace was Jelić's answer to these questions. Companies in the paper and cartonboard industry can simply and quickly sell surplus stock at PABEX. Our platform also offers numerous advantages to buyers: they can purchase already discontinued varieties or avoid lengthy delivery times owed to bottlenecks at the manufacturers;  achieve favourable purchase prices despite small unit numbers, thus increasing the profitability of their own orders.
 

Ecological trading instead of recycling

Environmental protection, sustainability and efficient use of resources are very important to the paper and packaging industry. PABEX is a sensible way for printers, manufacturers, wholesale and retail to avoid the premature production of waste paper. Instead of storing yellowing surplus stock that will inevitably end up as waste paper, companies can simply resell through PABEX.

Name: FRUTIPACK
Description:
Depuis plus de 35 ans, FRUTIPACK conçoit et transforme des emballages en carton ondulé.

Implanté à Rivesaltes dans les Pyrénées Orientales, FRUTIPACK est une entreprise familiale, portée par Gilles Planes et son équipe. Intégrée depuis 2001 au groupe français ROSSMANN, pionnier de l’emballage en carton ondulé en France, la société profite de l’expérience du groupe qui fêtera ses 100 ans en 2022.

FRUTIPACK connait un développement continu depuis sa création. Une croissance nourrie par l’état d’esprit de son dirigeant, sa détermination constante à évoluer, à proposer de nouveaux produits et à élargir de façon ciblée le parc machine FRUTIPACK.

Aujourd’hui, près de 500 clients nous font confiance de Toulouse à Marseille, dans des secteurs aussi variés que l’industrie, la santé, l’agriculture, la viticulture, l’agroalimentaire, sur des produits classiques ou spécifiques, mais toujours sur-mesure, et reconnus pour leur qualité.

" Pour chacun de vos produits, il existe un emballage FRUTIPACK. S'il n'existe pas encore, nous le créons. "

Name: Huot Parquets
Description:
Le parquet dans les veines

L’histoire des parquets Huot, c’est une histoire familiale, l’histoire de six générations d’entrepreneurs passionnés, au service d’un parquet « made in France » qui a su traverser les époques et les modes, au son d’un seul et unique leitmotiv : qualité, authenticité, innovation et proximité.

Authentiquement moderne, voici comment on pourrait décrire les parquets Huot. Depuis toujours, Huot a à cœur de magnifier le bois pour proposer des parquets adaptés aux utilisations de son époque. Historiquement ancrés dans le paysage champenois, tous les parquets de la maison sont fabriqués sur le site de Saint-Julien-les-Villas, dans l’Aube.

L’innovation a toujours été au cœur de l’esprit Huot. Innovation dans le matériel de production, innovation dans le type de bois proposé, dans les systèmes de pose, dans les finitions, dans les solutions d’entretien… Huot a notamment été le premier à proposer un parquet massif adapté aux lieux à fort passage (musées notamment). Autre exemple, autre style : la maison a travaillé un produit spécial pour la rénovation, le 10 mm massif. Un parquet économique, qui utilise moins de bois pour couvrir la même surface. Toujours sensible aux évolutions du métier et à l’écoute des besoins du marché, Huot a su mettre à profit son expérience du parquet massif sur des parquets contrecollés, plus adaptés à certaines situations (chauffage au sol notamment). 

Pour assurer un approvisionnement en bois de haute qualité, la marque sélectionne des fournisseurs partageant les mêmes valeurs que les siennes et avec lesquels elle entretient des relations pérennes. En interne, le savoir-faire Huot est transmis aux équipes via une formation pointue aux techniques de fabrication du parquet.

Véritable moteur dans le monde du parquet, la maison Huot s’est toujours fortement impliquée pour faire évoluer la profession au sens large. En presque 180 ans, elle est devenue l’un des fleurons de la fabrication de parquet en France.

Name: LABEL GLOBAL SERVICE
Description:
Da più di vent'anni la "Label Global Service" opera nel settore del packaging e nello specifico fornisce etichette adesive in bobina.
La nostra collaborazione con importanti studi grafici nazionali, i rapporti con le migliori Cartiere fornitrici dei supporti e la scelta delle migliori tecnologie di stampa fanno sì che la nostra clientela può essere servita con innovazione costante e con finiture di qualità e di particolare effetto come le nostre lamine a rilievo “Colata Oro-Colata Rame-Colata Argento", spessore “Braille”, Glitter, rilievo Debossing ed Embossing. Le nostre etichette vengono realizzate con tutte le tecniche di stampa: dalla Offset alla SERIGRAFIA PIANA ed è con quest'ultima che otteniamo prodotti di grande effetto ed impatto visivo. Le nostre stampe se sostenute dal grafismo vengono realizzate anche con stampe miste per dare i migliori risultati. Inoltre abbiamo la stampa Lito-digitale per servire anche piccoli quantitativi e gestiamo le urgenze dei nostri clienti in quattro-cinque giorni. Guardando il nostro catalogo si può comprendere la nostra filosofia che da sempre è dedita al profondo rispetto per i nostri clienti e la qualità dei prodotti serviti.
Questi i punti di forza della nostra Azienda, che ci hanno consentito di essere, in questi anni, un punto di riferimento nel nostro mercato. In questi ultimi dieci anni abbiamo servito, volutamente, una clientela molto esigente, evadendo commesse per la stampa di etichette spesso "impegnative", nei settori dove la qualità dello stampato è “segno distintivo” al pari del marchio.

Name: UNIKIA CONCEPTS
Description:
At Unikia Concepts, we transform agricultural and industrial waste into high-performance alternatives to traditional paper, wood, and leather—designed for forward-thinking brands that care about sustainability and innovation.

Our mission is to reduce dependence on virgin resources by creating materials that are not only environmentally responsible but also creatively reimagined for mass-use products. We challenge conventional thinking to design materials that are scalable, practical, and beautiful—proving that sustainability doesn't have to come at the cost of functionality or appeal.

 Tree-Free Paper
Made from tea leaves, coffee husk, denim scraps, lemongrass, and more.
Used for notebooks, journals, paper bags, gift boxes, wrapping sheets, and packaging—completely wood-pulp free.

 BioHusk Timber
A durable, wood-like material made from 96% agricultural waste (rice husk and wheat straw).
Perfect for trophies, bar sets, tech stands, keychains, packaging components, and home/office décor.

 FloraHide
A plant-based leather alternative that is 80%+ natural and free from PU or PVC.
Used in wallets, portfolios, luggage tags, notebook sleeves, and corporate gift sets.

We are FSC, Sedex, GRS, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 certified—ensuring ethical, social, and environmental compliance throughout.

Name: CCH - The Cellulose and Paper Manufactory
Pacific Lumber Inspection Bureau
Description:
Founded in 1903, Pacific Lumber Inspection Bureau (PLIB) is a non-profit, accredited lumber and wood products inspection and certification agency. PLIB provides lumber-grading and grade-stamping services to the lumber industry along with a wide range of other inspection and certification services for related wood-products manufacturers including Heat Treatment, Wood Packaging, CE Marking, WUI, Glulam, Cross-Laminated Timber, and Wood Trusses.

In January 2019, PLIB merged operations with the West Coast Lumber Inspection Bureau (WCLIB) and with it, the American Institute of Timber Construction (AITC), retaining both the WCLIB and AITC trademarks. With the merger, PLIB added Glulam and Cross-Laminated Timber quality-control certification to its list of signature services and expanded coverage into the southern United States and Europe.

Headquartered in Federal Way, Washington, with offices in Canada and Europe, PLIB operates throughout much of North America as well as the wood producing regions of Europe. Call us at 253.835.3344 (U.S.) or 604.732.1782 (Canada) or contact us via email to learn more about what PLIB can do for you.

Name: S.R. INTERNATIONAL PAPER MILLS PRIVATE LIMITED
Mamelok
Description:
Mamelok is a historic papercraft brand that originated in Breslau, now known as Wroclaw, in Poland, and was launched in the first half of the 19th century. One of the first commercial colour printing companies, Mamelok developed as a publisher by selling religious pictures (also known as oleographs) and embossed scrap reliefs. The company came to London in 1940 and moved to Bury St Edmunds in 1968 before buying a German company called Heilbronn und Pinner (known as H&P Decorations).

Now based just outside Cambridge, we continue to sell our unique die-cut and embossed paper products to customers all over the world.

Name: Mettler Couvert AG
Description:
Mettler Couvert - Ecken & Kanten des Couvert nach Ihrem Geschmack
Willkommen in der Welt unserer Couverts der Extraklasse! Wir von Mettler Couvert stehen für beste Qualität, Swissness und legen grossen Wert auf eine nachhaltige Produktion. Wir freuen uns, Sie in die vielfältige und spannende Welt der Briefumschläge entführen zu dürfen.

Welche Formate bieten wir an? Welche Eigenschaften haben die Materialien? Welche Couverts passen zu Ihrem Inhalt oder umgekehrt? Diese Fragen möchten wir Ihnen gerne beantworten. Deshalb hier ein allgemeiner Überblick über das Angebot von Mettler Couvert:

Unsere verfügbaren Couvert-Formate:
C6, B6, C5/6, C5, B5, C4, B4 und 155 x 155, 165 x 165, 175 x 175, 220 x 220, 190 x 120
Unsere Verschlussarten:
gummiert, Haftklebe, ungummiert, mit und ohne Seitenfalten
Unsere Fensterpositionen:
links, rechts, ohne, Sonderfenster, lasertauglich, Werbefenster
Unsere Papiersorten:
ultraweiss, recycling, recycling natura, recycling weiss, naturweiss crème, munken polar, munken lynx, transparent, farbig

Wir sind ein eingeschworenes Team bei Mettler Couvert, denn Couverts sind unsere Leidenschaft. Wir produzieren kleine und grosse Mengen und verstehen es, auf Kundenbedürfnisse individuell einzugehen. Durch hervorragende Qualität und exzellentem Preis-Leistung-Verhältnis heben wir uns von anderen Anbietern ab und sind stolz, die besten Couverts der Schweiz anzubieten. Unsere Bestellgrössen variieren je nach Bedarf. Wir haben es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, unsere Couverts stetig weiterzuentwickeln, um innovativ und kundenorientiert zu bleiben.

Name: Synerge Paper Industries LLP
Description:
Synerge Paper Industries LLP a dedicated to transforming apparel manufacturing with innovative paper solutions. We produce cutting-room paper rolls that help apparel factories reduce fabric waste, improve cutting accuracy, and optimize production efficiency, making everyday operations smoother, faster, and more cost-effective.

Serving garment manufacturers and apparel exporters across India, Synerge has become a trusted partner in the textile industry, supplying products designed to meet the specific needs of modern cutting rooms. Our paper rolls are reliable, durable, and designed to support high-volume production, ensuring consistent results every time.

At Synerge, we combine industry expertise, advanced manufacturing processes, and sustainable practices to deliver solutions that not only save fabric and reduce operational costs but also support factories in achieving leaner, smarter, and more sustainable production.

We are constantly exploring new ideas, technologies, and process improvements to bring innovation to every roll we produce. By partnering with Synerge, garment manufacturers gain more than just paper rolls — they gain a dedicated partner committed to their efficiency, productivity, and success.

Visit www.synergeindustries.com to learn more about our products and services.

Name: FIBandCO
Description:
Established in Martinique, FIBandCO gives a second life to banana plant trunks. Using an innovative technology and an eco-responsible process, they produce a 100% natural veneer: Green Blade.

The idea behind the Green Blade launch was to valorize an unexploited, rapidly renewable resource and to propose veneer solutions that do not contribute to deforestation, all of this without compromising aesthetic.

Today, FIBandCO's products are acclaimed by architects, designers, furniture manufacturers, cabinet makers, and all those looking for a new architectural material that knows no compromise: Green Green Blade is aesthetic, unique and sustainable.

FIBandCO is commited to sustainable development:
Their transformation process of the fibre banana plant trunks does not require the use of any chemical components and FIBandCO produces the energy it consumes thanks to solar panels.
Their factory located in the heart of the banana plantations, makes it possible to optimise their logistics and to limit their carbon footprint.
Established in Martinique, an island which is an integral part of France, the company respects working conditions that meet European standards.

FIBandCO offers a unique eco-responsible, 100% natural product.

www.FIBandCO.com

Name: OVOL Malaysia Sdn Bhd
Description:
Our extensive history begins in 1959 with the opening of Spicers Paper (Malaysia) Sdn Bhd. Throughout the years, we have focused on building a strong future for the print industry by pursuing strategic acquisitions and joining forces with renowned print advocacy organizations. Today, OVOL Malaysia is the leading independent paper, packaging, and wide format solutions provider in Malaysia, supporting businesses nationwide with a comprehensive selection of products and services. 

With financial stability, we are able to continuously invest in our people, local inventories with diversified products, and the latest technologies that provide innovative solutions. We are locally available in every facet, making us easily accessible and allowing us to maintain our commitment to provide exceptional service and selection to our customers.

OVOL Malaysia has the experience, knowledge, infrastructure, and technology to be your reliable and trustworthy partner.

OVOL Malaysia is a subsidiary under our corporate parent, Japan Pulp & Paper Co., Ltd (JPP). Founded in 1845 and headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, JPP is a global sales, marketing and distribution leader in the pulp, paper and forest products industry, with revenue exceeding $6 billion.

Name: Coopercaixa - Cooperativa Paulistana
Description:
A Coopercaixa produz artefatos, caixas e chapas de papelão ondulado com a mais alta tecnologia e qualidade assegurada. A fábrica proporciona ao produtor de embalagens a melhor qualidade em serviços e o mais variado suporte técnico e logístico, buscando a excelência no atendimento ao mercado consumidor de papelão ondulado.

Opera tendo como parâmetros o modelo japonês de industrialização e o modelo das "sheet feeders" americanas, fábricas de chapas de papelão ondulado especializadas em servir a indústria de papelão sem concorrer com seus clientes.

Possui uma capacidade de produção que pode atingir até sete mil toneladas/mês e mantém de forma continuada investimentos em novas máquinas, equipamentos e pessoas. Esses investimentos superam os R$ 15 milhões. 

A partir destes dois exemplos, a Coopercaixa desenvolveu seu próprio modelo de industrialização. A fábrica é uma plataforma de produção para empresas que terceirizam seus serviços. Resultado: produtividade gerando maiores ganhos econômicos e bons resultados para todos.

Name: JagoTech Paper GmbH
Description:
JagoTech Paper and its innovators have researched paper for decades. As a manufacturer of calender rolls, press pads, heat and noise-resistant paper, we combine the know-how from machine technology and paper production. 
This holistic perspective encouraged the idea of introducing a fundamental change of direction in the paper industry. Get to know us, our competent team, and our innovative and high-quality products.

Name: Soylu Orman Ürünleri A.Ş.
Description:
Soylu Orman Ürünleri, inşaat sektöründe 40 yılı aşkın deneyimi ile MDF, Sunta, Kapı, Laminat, Lamine, ve Masif Parke ithalatı, ihracatı ve ülke çapında dağıtımının yanı sıra, toplu konut projeleri, perakende, ve özel tasarım iç mimari uygulamaları ile ahşap zemin döşemeleri çözümleri sunan, sektörün önde gelen dağıtım ve uygulama firmalarındandır.

AGT, Çamsan, Kastamonu Entegre, ve Yıldız Entegre firmalarının MDF, Sunta, Laminat Parke ve Kapı ürünlerinin yanı sıra, Şerifoğlu ve Dendro ile ithalatını yaptığı egzotik, özel tasarım ürün gruplarıyla Avrupa ve dünyanın önde gelen markalarını ülke çapında 100’ün üzerinde bayisi ve binlerce ustadan oluşan satış ağı ile Türkiye'nin yanı sıra 30'u aşkın ülkede ihracat pazarına sunmaktadır.

Name: SARL EAPI ALGERIE
Description:
*Transformation du papier.
*Production des cahiers scolaires, papier ramettes,
registres, agendas, petits carnets, pochettes,
doubles feuilles, feuilles mobiles, pochettes dessin,
et autres articles scolaires.
*Impression offset.
*Collage, pliage et reliure industrielle
*Emballage.

Name: Tellabs Chemicals Pvt. Ltd
Description:
TELLABS Specialty Chemicals is in the business of Intelligent Chemicals.

We have Technology from USA, France, Netherlands, & Spain.

All our manufacturing is ISO 9001, with an All India Sales & Service Infrastructure.

Our specialty includes Problem Solving: we succeed where others fail, & Real Return on Investment: we make profit for our customers or do not do business.

We keep ahead by Continuous Learning in the latest Technologies & Management Effectiveness Tools.

Name: Downie Timber & Selkirk Cedar
Description: At Downie Timber and Selkirk Cedar, we produce a wide variety of finished cedar products. Western Red Cedar, is without question, natures most beautiful wood. In addition to offering a deeply textured grain and incredibly warm colour, cedar is both durable and dimensionally stable. As well, Western Red Cedars natural oils resist insects and decay.

Name: OJI INTERPACK INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: OJI INTERPACK INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED is good solutions provider for heavy duty packaging.

Name: Keystone Wood Products Association
Description: We strive to strengthen and expand the base of lumber and wood products manufacturers in the Central Pennsylvania region.

Name: Kenniscentrum Papier en Karton (KCPK)
Description:
Kenniscentrum Papier en Karton (KCPK) is een initiatief van de Vereniging van Nederlandse Papierfabrieken (VNP) en heeft als missie de kennisinfrastructuur in de Nederlandse papier- en kartonindustrie te versterken door generatie, ontsluiting en verspreiding van kennis.

Het Kenniscentrum Papier en Karton (KCPK) heeft als strategie om zoveel mogelijk gebruik te maken van bestaande infrastructuur en netwerken om deze optimaal te verbinden met andere industrieën. De integratie van fundamenteel onderzoek, technologie- en productontwikkeling, procesintegratie en -optimalisatie worden hierbij toegepast. Implementatie gebeurt op vier niveaus; directie, productie, technologen en industriële R&D.

Onze missie is innoveren vóór en in samenwerking mét de Nederlandse papier- en kartonindustrie, met als lange termijn doel bij te dragen aan de continuïteit van de Nederlandse papier- en kartonindustrie via kennis en innovatie en inspelend op veranderende randvoorwaarden zoals beleid, wet- en regelgeving en infrastructuur.

Er zijn slechts 3 programma's, ieder met een heldere focus en groot industrieel belang, gericht op de twee grootste productiekostenposten en de toegevoegde waarde van de producten: Vezelgrondstoffen, Productie&Energie, en Eindproducten. 

Daarnaast heeft dochteronderneming Bumaga BV de rol om de vertaalslag naar marktontwikkeling en implementatie te kijken.

Name: Golden Forest
Description:
A Golden Forest é uma empresa de Gestão e Consultoria Florestal, fundado por Rafael Alexandre Malinovski – Engenheiro Florestal, Mestre e Doutor pela UFPR, que vem atuando há mais de 20 anos nas áreas de produção de florestas, biomassa e abastecimento de madeira, através de gestão de empresas, consultoria, treinamentos, feiras e eventos técnicos para o setor florestal.

Estamos no mercado para fornecer os serviços de Gestão e Consultoria Florestal de forma simples, justa e clara com excelência e autoridade de assunto.

PRINCIPAIS SERVIÇOS

- Geração de ativos florestais: prospecção, implantação e manutenção de florestas
- Gestão de operações florestais
- Comercialização de produtos florestais
- Consultoria em operações, administração e geração de valor para ativos florestais e stakeholders

OS PRINCÍPIOS QUE SUSTENTAM A NOSSA GERAÇÃO DE VALOR ESTÃO ALICERÇADOS EM TRÊS PILARES:
 
HONRA
Priorizamos o respeito e a transparência com todos os Stakeholders e profissionais que trabalhamos. Reconhecemos a importância daqueles que nos auxiliaram a construir cada degrau que nos trouxe até aqui.
 
INTEGRIDADE
Agir com compliance, seguindo as melhores práticas de gestão. Nas tomadas de decisões precisamos ter coerência de, realmente, agirmos de forma íntegra.
 
LIBERDADE
Realizarmos negócios adaptáveis e flexíveis que acompanham tendências e valor para todas as partes envolvidas. Condição primordial que permite transformar nossas visões em realidade.

Name: CBI Madeiras Ltda
Description:
A CBI Madeiras há muitos anos vem investindo em reflorestamento, produção, tratamento e comercialização de madeira de eucalipto para as mais diversas finalidades. Em suas fazendas, nas melhores regiões de reflorestamento do País, todos os processos foram verticalizados, do plantio aos tratos culturais, do corte e descasque à secagem, do processo industrial ao transporte até seus clientes. Para isso utiliza máquinas, equipamentos e frota própria, podendo desta forma garantir segurança, qualidade e pontualidade em todas as etapas.

A CBI Madeiras é a única empresa de tratamento de madeira no Brasil que possui o selo de qualidade "Qualitrat Pleno", programa de auto-regulamentação da ABPM (Associação Brasileira de Preservadores de Madeira), que garante qualidade e legalidade ao consumidor da madeira tratada.

Missão
Produzir e comercializar madeira de eucalipto reflorestada, tratada e de qualidade, por um preço justo, substituindo a madeira nativa, com soluções que atendam as exigências dos clientes.

Visão de Futuro
Consolidar a posição de empresa confiável, inovadora e de referência no mercado, alicerçada pela sustentabilidade econômica, social e ambiental.

Name: SAS PALETTES ARTOIS SERVICES
Description:
En quelques mots, Palettes Artois Services, PME familiale de 40 collaborateurs, est spécialisée dans le recyclage de palettes bois.
Nous sommes situés dans la région, plus exactement sur Divion depuis plus de 20 ans.

Name: Demirel Oluklu Mukavva ve Ofset Ambalaj San. Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
Demirel Oluklu Mukavva ve Ofset Ambalaj A.Ş. 2006 yılından beri İstanbul Avrupa bölgesinde oluklu mukavva sektöründe faaliyet göstermektedir.

İstanbul Başakşehir'de 17.000m²  arazi üzerine kurulu olan iki ayrı üretim tesisimiz toplam 10.000m² kapalı alana sahiptir. Mevcut makina parkurumuz ile her türlü koli, kutu ve oluklu mukavva ambalaj ihtiyacınızı karşılayabilecek durumda olan tesisimizde yılda 30.000 ton oluklu mukavva ambalaj üretilmektedir.

Müşteri memnuniyetini ilke edinen firmamız, müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarını zamanın, doğru ve en ekonomik şekilde karşılamak için tüm kaynaklarını verimli bir şekilde kullanarak en düşük maliyetlere, en kaliteli hizmeti müşterilerine sunmaktadır.

Name: Euro Trading Company
Description:
Euro Trading Company is a leading timber merchant and agency based in Riga, Latvia. We supply timber products to our international customers from sawmills in Baltic region and Western Russia.

Our specialty is pallet and packaging timber, construction, fencing  and furniture grade timber .  

Over the years we have built reliable working relationships with hundreds of sawmills in our region. Our extensive supplier network guarantees stable and timely deliveries, which is a crucial precondition for our service standard to deliver on our promises.

We employ staff of 30 people and each year we ship over 160,000 cbm of  timber products  through our terminal in Port of Riga.  Our main markets are UK, Ireland, Belenux, MENA, GCC countries,  Pakistan, India, Thailand, Vietnam, South Korea, China.

Name: Cartograf GS srl
Description:
Cartograf GS is a papermaking company that deals with the design and production of cardboard articles.
The production is mainly concentrated on the implementation of secondary packaging for the pharmaceutical industries, perfumery and cosmetics.
Produces boxes, counter displays, interiors in microwave, cardstock, and generic blanks.
The production uses two printing machines off-set, one for the hot printing, two die-cutters and four fold-paste.
Cartograf GS is able to provide surface treatments such as UV painting in line, hot printing, laminating, cutout, coupling, serigraphy, relief, Braille, paint gloss, opaque and soft-touch.
The Design Department is able to realize moke-ups and small productions via a specific software for the packaging and a cutting plotter.
The preprint office processes the graphic files using the latest generation of iMac and the most updated software for graphics and process control.
All Work Centers are equipped with a PC on board the machines for the complete control of production and the constant exchange of data with the software of management of orders.

Name: TURCONI SPA
Description:
Da sempre siamo partner di fiducia della GDO e pionieri dell’imballaggio ecologico e innovativo. La nostra lunga tradizione imprenditoriale, incentrata su qualità e affidabilità, ci ha permesso di evolverci e rispondere costantemente alle esigenze di un mercato in continua trasformazione. 

Offriamo soluzioni per ogni settore: pescheria, panetteria, macelleria, salumeria, gastronomia, pasticceria e ortofrutta. 
Lavoriamo con un ciclo di Produzione Automatico. Grazie a tecnologie all’avanguardia, realizziamo i nostri prodotti rispettando i più alti standard di qualità. La nostra attenzione è rivolta non solo alla sostenibilità, ma anche all’efficienza, poiché crediamo che la qualità sia strettamente legata a processi produttivi efficienti e responsabili.

In Turconi Spa, la sostenibilità non è solo un obiettivo, ma una parte integrante della nostra missione. Da oltre 70 anni, ci dedichiamo alla produzione di sacchetti e fogli in carta di alta qualità, progettati per ridurre l’impatto ambientale e promuovere pratiche eco-friendly.
Crediamo fermamente che ogni azienda abbia la responsabilità di contribuire a un futuro più sostenibile. Per questo, utilizziamo materie prime provenienti da foreste gestite in modo responsabile e adottiamo processi produttivi che minimizzano gli sprechi e il consumo energetico.

Il nostro impegno per la sostenibilità si riflette non solo nei nostri prodotti, ma anche nelle relazioni con i nostri partner e clienti. Insieme, possiamo fare la differenza e promuovere un’economia circolare, contribuendo alla salvaguardia del nostro pianeta per le generazioni future.
Turconi S.p.A. è dotata di un impianto fotovoltaico di 1 Mwh, in grado di soddisfare gran parte del fabbisogno energetico e ridurre le emissioni nell’ambiente. Crediamo in un futuro sempre più sostenibile, dove l’uomo possa utilizzare con intelligenza tecniche per migliorare la qualità della propria vita.

Name: Republic Technologies Iberia
Description: The RTIB factory manufactures filter-tips in reseable bags and tubes as well as other specialty items, including rolls and cardboard tips. The GROUP's growth in the filter market led to a move to larger premises in 2021, housing the headquarters to ensure the continuous growth that the company has been experiencing since 2011

Name: Disha Industries Private Limited
Description: Disha Industries is engaged in the manufacturing of Multi Layer, High RCT Kraft Paper and Paper Board, having 1,26,000 Metric Tons annual capacity, used in packaging boxes, cartons, paper bags, etc, catering Specialty Paper Markets in India and other countries.  Our Paper is manufactured from recycled paper and is a fantastic packaging choice for environmentally conscious companies looking to reduce plastic waste and carbon footprint.

Name: C PAPER- FÁBRICA DE PAPÉIS DESCARTÁVEIS
Description: A C Paper é uma fábrica de papel toalha interfolha criada em Julho de 2019 por dois sócios curiosos e empolgados por empreendedorismo e pelo ramo de higiene. Situada em Contagem, a C Paper tem como objetivo entregar afeto e qualidade aos seus clientes, conquistando o mercado de saúde e limpeza através de melhorias contínuas de seus produtos, inovação, aumento de portfólio e excelência.

Name: DINO&FILS S.A
Description:
With more than 20 years of experience, DINO & FILS S.A is today one of the Cameroonian leaders in forestry and wood processing.


Thanks to its many assets accumulated over the years, it now has vast UFA (Forest Management Units), very large capacity industrial dryers and a large land transport fleet, which allow it to make available Cameroonian and foreign companies and individuals, wooden construction materials and high quality carpentry products from a variety of species exploited responsibly. For twenty years, it has also been passionately committed to satisfying its customers through a young, dynamic and qualified team with proven expertise in the woodworking trades.


Speaking of its clientele, it mainly consists of construction and public works companies, companies processing and distributing woodwork materials, international organizations, public administrations and individuals and companies in all. kind.
Its activities consist of logging, sawing of wood, export sales, industrial drying of wood and industrial carpentry.


Finally, our ranges of products and services are divided into:
- first processing products: Logs, Plots and square-edged
- secondary processing products: industrial drying of wood, paneling, parquet Deckings, sauna slats
- Fourth processing products: wooden construction works (doors, windows, kitchens, etc.), interior furniture (bed, storage cupboard, bookcases, chairs, etc.), office furniture (office table, conference tables, armchairs etc).

Name: Koch Pulp and Paper
Description:
Koch Pulp & Paper Trading (KPPT) specializes in price risk management in the forest products market by allowing companies to remove uncertainty, stabilize cash flow, lock in profitable margins and grow their business. 

With years of cumulative trading experience helping customers across the lumber industry manage price exposure, KPPT has developed a global portfolio, market presence and reputation as a proven leader. And we can customize products based on item needs, volumes and timeframes.

Name: International Forest Products. LLC
Description:
International Forest Products manufactures and sells quality CCA-treated wood products and offers exceptional service that our customers can always rely upon.  We pride ourselves on consistently delivering pressure-treated wood products that have been produced the way that they should be, without cutting any corners.

Over the last 50 years this facility has pressure-treated a wide array of wood products using only the highest quality wood preservatives, and has become a major supplier of specialty, industrial, commercial, agricultural and marine treated wood products.  Experience alone, however, is not always enough to assure you of good service.  So, we listen to our customers, and supply them in a timely fashion with the quality products that they demand.

Our facility is located on the south side of Houston, Texas, with excellent access to the Texas Gulf Coast and convenient to transportation resources that enable us to provide prompt shipments throughout the State and beyond.

We contribute to the community and to the forest products industry in general.  We value the work ethic and character of the employees that make up the International Forest Products family and who make a very important contribution to our continuing success as a Company.

Name: Akdeniz Orman Istanbul
Description: Our company was established as a timber sales shop in Kasimpasa in the early 1900's. In 1986, we established our new facilities on a closed area of 4500 square meters in Istanbul Pendik and started to produce timber. Our tropical wood imports are mainly from Central African Republic, Cameroon, Congo-Brazzaville and Gabon. We are able to supply both finished and semi-finished products for boat building, furniture and flooring sectors. We have always done the R&D works with the best quality raw material and the best product motto. In 2008, we have established one of the biggest sawmill in Turkey equipped with high-tech machines including log bandsaws, large kilning and grinders in Orhanli / Tuzla. Also started wooden park bench and similar stuff production in second Orhanli / Tuzla facility in 2020.

Name: Paramount Planet Product
Description:
At P3RD.Earth, we are on a mission to eliminate plastic waste by engineering cellulose-based innovations that redefine the way we manufacture and use everyday consumer goods. We are a leading sustainable materials and manufacturing company, specializing in breakthrough molding technology to create Ocean Compostable and Fish-Friendly (OCFF) materials that seamlessly replace single-use plastics.

Plastic pollution represents one of the greatest environmental challenges of our time. Millions of tons of plastic waste end up in our oceans, harming marine ecosystems and contaminating our food chain. Recognizing the urgency of this crisis, we focus on redesigning the top 10 most commonly found plastic pollutants, as identified in the Ocean Conservancy Beach Cleanup Report. These items account for a significant portion of global plastic waste.

Our biodegradable and ocean-safe solutions offer a scalable, sustainable alternative to traditional plastics without compromising functionality, durability, or consumer convenience. Through relentless research, development, and innovation, we are pushing the boundaries of molding technology to create compostable materials that break down naturally, leaving no harmful residues behind.

Why P3RD.Earth?

 Innovative Materials – We develop high-performance cellulose-based alternatives that match or exceed plastic in strength and versatility.
 Sustainability at Scale – Our solutions are designed for mass adoption, ensuring businesses and consumers can transition seamlessly to eco-friendly options.
 Ocean-Safe & Fish-Friendly – Our products decompose naturally in marine environments, safeguarding aquatic life.
 Mission-Driven – We are committed to tackling plastic pollution at its source, replacing the world’s most problematic plastics with sustainable innovations.

Name: Prime Converting Corporation
Description: Prime Converting Corporation is the largest paper converter and supplier on the West Coast.  Located in Rancho Cucamonga, California servicing the packaging, commercial print and industrial markets.

Name: Versowood Oy
Description: Versowood Group, which has grown over the years to its now substantial size, boasts long traditions in wood processing which are still bearing considerable fruit today. Alongside its traditional sawn timber production, the Group has developed a continuously growing collection of competitive special products which do not neglect the unique and special character of wood as a traditional material.

Name: Elopak b.v.
Description:
At the centre of Elopak's well established range of packaging solutions is the Pure-Pak carton, the world's first paperboard carton. 

Based in Norway, and wholly owned by the Ferd Group (one of Norway's largest privately owned industrial groups) Elopak is continually modifying its packaging expertise to match changing world demands for packaged food. Elopak's business is to break new ground at every level of packaging; processing standards, food science, logistics analysis, packaging concepts, all alongside a total systems approach which uniquely characterizes Elopak's contribution to the world of packaging

Name: Anhui Shanying Paper Industry Co., Ltd.
Description: Anhui Shanying Paper Industry is a paper & forest products company based out of Ma'Anshan, Anhui, China.

Name: CANADELL
Description: Merranderie CANADELL spécialisée dans le sourcing et la transformation de grumes de chêne pour l'industrie Viti-vinicole

Name: RomPaper - member of Vrancart Group
Description:
Welcome to RomPaper, your trusted source for premium hygiene paper products in Romania.

Established in 2002, RomPaper has consistently held a top position among the country's leading manufacturers of hygiene paper products. As part of the Vrancart Group since 2016, we have further solidified our position in the market, becoming one of Romania's largest producers of folded products.

At RomPaper, we take pride in our 100% Romanian-made products, catering to a diverse range of sectors including household, industrial, beauty, and HoReCa. Our portfolio boasts renowned brands such as Mototol and Papely and a comprehensive private label offering for retail partners.

From table napkins to professional rolls, our products are crafted with precision at our state-of-the-art facilities in Brașov and Adjud, ensuring the highest standards of hygiene, performance, and safety.

As a member of the Vrancart Group, listed on the Bucharest Stock Exchange, sustainability is at the core of our operations. We are committed to reducing our environmental impact by utilizing recycled materials and implementing modern, eco-friendly production processes.

Join us in our mission to provide exceptional hygiene solutions while safeguarding the environment. Connect with RomPaper today to explore our comprehensive range of products and services.

Name: Organic Waste Management
Description:
With over 35 years of experience in the recycling and waste industry, Organic Waste Management can handle any type of waste you can throw at us. Our goal is to find the best alternative usage for your waste. Technology has improved to the point that we can effectively re-use as much as 90% of what is thrown into landfills today. We work with all aspects of waste materials that are generated and rely on our amazing partnerships with the most up to date processing equipment available to re-utilize these waste streams. We also offer specialized pick up services for unique situations.

We strive to accomplish your goals in how you want your recyclable materials to be handled. We make taking responsibility easy.

Name: Systembox Srl
Description:
Systembox è un fustellificio sito in Colceresa, località Molvena in provincia di Vicenza, attivo dal 1978, dedito alla creazione di fustelle per packaging e relativi supporti atti a velocizzare e qualificare maggiormente il risultato finale. Punti fondamentali sono la metodica realizzativa, precisa e impostata, che coniuga sapiente maestria artigianale, uso di apparecchiature evolute e l’esperienza, forte di 40 anni di attività.

Tra i settori di applicazione figurano: progettazione e studio del packaging, prototipazione e campionature, fustelle, estrattori, taglio gomma e riserva vernice, contro matrici e piastre fresate, rilievi e cliches stampa a caldo, braille, accubraille, rilievi, separatori di pose.

--
Systembox is a die-making company based in Colceresa, in the Molvena area of the Vicenza province.
Founded in 1978, it specializes in the production of dies for packaging and related tools designed to speed up and enhance the quality of the final result. Its core strengths lie in a precise, structured production method that combines skilled craftsmanship, advanced machinery, and over 40 years of experience.

Areas of expertise include: Packaging design and development, Prototyping and samples, Cutting dies, Ejectors, Rubber cutting and coating masks, Counterplates and milled plates, Embossing and hot stamping clichés, Braille, Accubraille, embossing, Layout separators.

Name: LECAS (page fermée)
Description: European leader in Diaries and Calendars production. Specific collections dedicated to Back to School and End of Year diaries, licensed diaries with L'etudiant, Lou, WWF. Main brands : OXFORD, Lecas Lecas is also a player for Commodities and Corporate activities.

Name: Fenner Paper
Description: It's in our fibre to help you be creative through our curation of sustainable, premium and bespoke paper collections. We have been delivering paper excellence since 1985.

Name: Suntex International
Description:
Suntex International is a producer and supplier of specialty chemistries for the textile and paper industries. Our focus is to provide problem solving solutions to our customers with value added technology, and to assist in the increase of productivity and return on their investment.

We are proud to supply our products to some of the most renowned manufacturers around the world. Suntex’s presence consists of six offices spanning from the United States, South America, and Europe.

Name: SARL TECABOIS
Description: SARL TECABOIS is a paper & forest products company based out of LIEU DIT LES CHATAIGNERAIES LANDEMONT, OREE D ANJOU, France.

Name: Due Emme Pack
Description:
Due Emme Pack nasce nel 1990 grazie all’iniziativa imprenditoriale di Massimiliano Marchesini posizionandosi immediatamente tra le eccellenze del settore cartario fornendo supporto alle cartiere per le operazioni di taglio dalla bobina a foglio e di impacco di ogni tipologia, formato e grammatura di carta.

Oggi Due Emme Pack, con la sua sede a S.Giovanni in Persiceto, un team di 16 dipendenti e un’ampia rete commerciale sul territorio nazionale,  si pone come un partner strategico per i suoi clienti: dinamica, efficiente nelle fasi del processo produttivo, tempestiva nell’evasione degli ordini, sempre attenta al garantire un risparmio sulla carta acquistata grazie all’ottimizzazione del formato e alla massima attenzione al contenimento degli sprechi.

Fra i principali servizi offerti troviamo il taglio dalla bobina al foglio per ogni tipo di carta (patinata, naturale, da edizioni, ecologica e riciclata), formato e grammatura. 
Non solo, valore aggiunto ai servizi di Due Emme Pack sono la tempestività nell’evasione degli ordini per piccole e medie quantità con consegne entro le 48/72 ore e la garanzia di un evidente risparmio economico rispetto ad altri operatori del settore;  grazie all’ottimizzazione del formato e alla massima attenzione al contenimento degli sprechi. 
Inoltre, Il suo team di esperti e con pluriennale esperienza, supporta e consiglia i clienti nella scelta della carta più adatta al loro tipo di lavorazione.

Due Emme Pack si distingue anche per l’imprescindibile e necessaria attenzione all’eco sostenibilità e al rispetto di rigorosi standard ottenuti con l’impiego di materie prime controllate e non provenienti da aree in cui sono stati violati i diritti civili.

Name: Mustang Innovation, INC
Description:
For the last 20 years, Mustang Innovation has been delivering sustainable, comprehensive cost reduction programs to companies across the US, Canada, and Mexico. We bring a fresh approach to the world of manufacturing. We understand the basic cost drivers in our areas of expertise and apply unique should-cost modeling programs to drive cost out of your business. We understand the art of the deal and the fundamentals of profit. We know how the markets work and utilize that knowledge for the benefit of our clients.
Our goal is simple, to extract maximum value for our clients and to keep them on the cutting edge of technology in our fields of expertise. We are not generalists.  We are focused and have the history and background to back it up. 

We focus on new technologies; in the last twenty-four months, we have been deeply involved in the Bio-Assimilation of polyolefins. A film that turns to dirt after a defined period of time. The epitome of sustainability in the poly world. 

Come along for the ride.

Name: Brasilpel Indústria de Papéis
Description:
A Brasilpel está estruturada com equipamentos próprios para industrialização de seus produtos, e capacidade de estoque para atender prontamente demandas de nossos clientes

Temos como propósito entregar verdadeiras soluções ao mercado, e por isso, contamos com uma estrutura de suporte ao desenvolvimento de nossos produtos e controle de qualidade com parceiros nacionais e internacionais

Somos movidos pela constante busca por qualidade e inovação e desde 2001 a Brasilpel vem aumentando sua linha de produtos, que hoje conta com fitas, filmes, papéis, etiqueta antimofo e suprimentos de embalagem

Name: VIRAX BORGHI ITALIA S.R.L.
Description:
Since 1906 Virax Borghi Italia is present in the paper sector. 
It is a group of 4 companies with offices in Italy, Germany and Romania. 
It has been operating for years in the supply of papers and accessories for the cutting room. 
From the experience in the paper industry it has been operating also in the digital printing sector for which it provides different types of transfer, protection and sublimation papers.
The Virax group is also a producer of polyethylene and bioplastic films and packaging.

Name: Welde - The Wood Company
Description:
Welde is diversified into two business areas - in production and trade
On the one hand, plywood and hardboard are produced and sold worldwide.
On the other hand, Welde operates wholesale companies offering a wide range of wood-based materials in Bulgaria, Romania and the Czech Republic.
In addition, large quantities of sawn timber are traded in Central Europe via Vienna.

Welde was founded in 1989 by Ewald Welde in Vienna initially as a timber trading company and very early on the company started producing plywood and hardboard. Since then, the production and trading activities have been steadily expanded. Today, the production and trading areas form a perfect symbiosis for the successful achievement of its corporate goals.

Name: ETORKI Industria de la madera
Description:
Somos un aserradero comprometido con la gestión forestal sostenible que desde 1984 somos referentes en la producción de madera de Pino Radiata. Nos dedicamos principalmente al aserrado de madera de pino, y su transformación. 

Contamos con una explotación forestal propia, asegurando el suministro de madera a nuestro aserradero y minimizando los efectos de la estacionalidad. Nuestra actividad abarca desde la compra del vuelo hasta el transporte a destino.

Disponemos de un almacén distribuidor en Villalobar de la Rioja con una capacidad de secado de 50.000M³ anuales.

Etorki cuenta con un gran equipo humano de profesionales, avalados por una gran experiencia y preparación técnica en el desarrollo de la actividad del aprovechamiento forestal, orientada al suministro de madera para nuestra actividad industrial de aserrado y transformación de la madera.

Nuestra actividad se extiende fundamentalmente por todo el País Vasco, Navarra, norte de Castilla y León, La Rioja y Cantabria.

/ / / / / / / / / / / / / / / / / / / / /

We are a sawmill committed to sustainable forest management that we have been dealing with in the production of wood in radiata pine since 1984. We are mainly dedicated to sawing pine wood, and its transformation.

We have a self managed forest ensuring the supply of wood to our sawmill and minimizing the effects of seasonality.

We have a distribution warehouse in Villalobar de la Rioja with a drying capacity of 50.000M³ per year.

Etorki has a large team of professionals who are backed up by their great experience and technical knowledge about forest harvesting aimed at supplying timber for our industrial lumber sawing and processing activities.

We mainly do business throughout the Basque Country, Navarre, northern Castile and Leon, La Rioja and Cantabria.

Name: FIBEX
Description:
FIBEX est totalement dédiée à la finition et à la protection du bois, que ce soit par l'application industrielle ou par la fourniture de produits.

FIBEX a été créée en 2005 par Hervé VAN OOST pour faire face à l'utilisation croissante du bois dans la construction et pour répondre à une demande de plus en plus forte pour protéger et mettre en valeur ce matériau.

Fibex est aujourd'hui un des plus gros applicateurs indépendants de peinture en France.

Pour répondre à tous vos besoins et projets avec la rigueur d'un industriel et la souplesse d'une PME, Fibex met à votre disposition:

        - plus de 13 années d'expertise

        - un réseau d'industriels, de laboratoires et de grandes écoles

        - 1800 m² d'atelier et 1200 m² de stockage

        - 3 lignes d'application industrielle, automatisées avec empileur automatique

        - un tunnel d'aspersion pour le traitement préventif

        - une cabine de peinture de 8m de longueur

        - un laboratoire de mise à la teinte et de contretypage

        - un stock important de produits

        - et quelques pinceaux...

Que vous soyez artisan, industriel, négociant, scieur, raboteur, agenceur, architecte ou bureau d'étude, Fibex c'est pour vous l'assurance d'un partenaire qui répond avec précision à vos demandes.

FIBEX, c'est aussi la fourniture de tous les produits de finition et de protection pour le bois, en intérieur comme en extérieur. Traitement M1 pour la résistance du bois
