Name: McAirlaid's Vliesstoffe GmbH
Description:
Founded in 1997, McAirlaid’s is a global producer and distributor of the world’s first nonwoven airlaid, SuperCore, which is produced without any glue, binders, recycled materials or latex. 

The company’s absorbent airlaid is used in a variety of food packaging, retail, medical, personal hygiene, and filtration applications.

Our ability to customize solutions based on customer need has allowed us to develop a reputation of innovation in the airlaid market. With corporate offices in Germany incl. manufacturing facilities also in the USA and sales offices world-wide, McAirlaid’s has developed an extensive network to support all your absorption needs.

For more information about McAirlaid's, visit us at www.mcairlaids.com.

Name: Beasley Group
Description:
The Beasley Group is a third-generation family business headquartered in Hazlehurst, Georgia.  Since 1968, we’ve become a hardwood forest products industry leader.  Core businesses include timberlands, procurement, logging, logistics, and mills with customers in the North America, Europe, and Asia.  

Vertically-integrated synergies have fueled our growth to become the largest hardwood sawmill in the United States and North America’s foremost producer of crane mats and timbers for the energy transmission, utility, and construction industries. In addition to mats, we offer crossties, grade lumber, industrial lumber, pallet lumber, renewable energy, and finished goods, such as flooring products.

Understanding customer-driven demand, the Beasley Group has developed multiple nationwide and international sales channels.  Quality service, reliability, and attention to detail are our secret to building customer loyalty and satisfaction.  We distribute Red Oak, White Oak, Ash, Poplar, Hickory, Tupelo, Cypress, Soft Maple, and Pine.  Extensive market knowledge and product design experience enable us to offer both standardized and customized lumber, timbers, and wood flooring.

We have a recognized track record of business expansion through organic growth and strategic investments in related or sector-adjacent forest products industry leaders, known for their product quality and customer relationships.  The Beasley Group invests in our people and our communities to build long-term sustainable businesses.

Name: MIDWEST SPECIALTY PRODUCTS, LLC - Winneconne, WI
Description:
Office Phone: 920-582-0342

Office Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00am-4:30pm (central time)

Nature’s Linen is Midwest Specialty Products brand of food service, continuous roll towel, and industrial products.  Nature’s Linen is the disposable alternative to cloth napkins, wipers, and towels. 

Increased absorption and versatility of Nature’s Linen food service products cuts laundering, replacement, and storage costs of linen while maintaining the same upscale elegance. 

Nature’s Linen continuous roll towels (CRT) are the alternative to traditional cloth roll towel and standard paper towel hand drying. 

Nature’s Linen Industrial Wipers are the perfect choice for all of your industrial wiper needs. Our Industrial Wipers come in flat pack, pop-up, and roll format with your choice of materials. 

And our disposable bath towels are perfect for use in the remedial abatement environment since they allow containment of asbestos clean-up or chemical spills to remain within the work zone – no laundering involved. Disposable bath towels are also used as an alternative drying material at YMCA’s, spas, public pools and truck stops eliminating high volumes of laundry and replacement costs.

Name: Jupiter Group
Description:
Jupiter Trading has built a strong supplier and customer base around the world over the past four decades and are the largest supplier of paper and paperboard products to the Sri Lankan printing, publishing, converting and packaging industries.

We expanded our reach in the paper industry in 1995 by opening an office in Chennai, India. DuroCell International and Jupiter Agencies (India) supply paper, paperboard and recycled fibre across India and to parts of Bangladesh.
In 2003, we moved into our own office building in the plush surroundings of Lake Drive, a feat that was beyond imagination in 1975 and a testament to the growth of our business under the strong and visionary leadership of Dudley Thambinayagam.

The Jupiter group then diversified business by entering into the local and export polythene industry. Jupiter Packaging manufactures a range of quality printed and plain H.D.P.E, P.P and L.D.P.E Poly bags and films for the local and export packaging industries.

Further expansion saw us simultaneously enter the thriving pharmaceutical & coir industries, as well as obtaining the reputed Waterman Pen franchise for Sri Lanka. Jupiter Pharma is the sole representative to BioPharma, Bangladesh and is an ever-growing presence in the industry.

But as always paper is the heart and soul of our business and in 2011 we opened a subsidiary in the United States of America, a stepping stone in achieving our vision of being a truly global force in the industry, as well as expanding locally by entering the fine paper sector, in Sri Lanka, through an exclusive partnership agreement with Gruppo Cordenons, Italy.

Name: MK Ecopack
Description:
At MK Ecopack, we strive to innovate and provide solutions that contribute to a better tomorrow. Witnessing unprecedented growth in the sustainable packaging segment, encouraged by the clientele and reduced use of single-use plastic has motivated us to venture into the manufacturing of paper mailer bags, shopping bags, and honeycomb wrap paper. All our products are made of FSC-certified paper which are reusable and biodegradable.

Backed by the technical capabilities of 40 years of printing and packaging in paper products, our aim is to make packaging seamless and clean. Focusing on enhancing the shelf-esteem of every product with innovative packaging solutions.

Description:
Pearl Group established in 1992 and possess a special position in the packaging Industry in the sense that it provides the largest variety and combination of products to its customers under one roof. Based in the hub of textile industry, Pearl Packages Industries provide premium packaging solutions for exceptional value to individuals and businesses. Our clientele include all the major textile industries of Faisalabad. Our major company’s products include packaging solutions for  Nike, JC Penny, Tesco UK, H&M, Target and many more.

In 2008 Pearl group decided to establish one more big packaging industry in one of the largest business hub of Pakistan with the name of “Pearl Packaging Company”, with in few years of its establishment, the company has become one of the prominent supplier of major brands in the market such as, Younus Brothers, Hilal, Rajby, LU and many big names to remember.

We have different certification like HACPP, ISO 9001:2015, FSC and many others.

Name: MB Papeles Especiales, S.A.
Description:
MB Papers is a company that specializes in the manufacturing of special papers. Mainly filter paper. Due to its great versatility. In the last few years it has developed new qualities and specialities.

With the special characteristics of its final products, MB boasts two independent departments which nonetheless work closely together the Quality Control Department that guarantees the highest Quality of its products and the Research and Development Department that deals in the field of research. As well as having the unconditional support of the Production Department in order to daily improve its products and at the same time create new ones. In this way and thanks to the work and collaboration of the variours departments, new research projects constantly arise which are carried out to always offer the best possible service its final customers.

Forming part of Miquel y Costas & Miquel Group, with 300 years of experience in papermaking, we have the following keys:

– Vertical integration, from the pulp production process until the commercialization of the final product.
– Asset flexibility provides the capacity to adapt production to market demand.
– Important R&D activity of the Group together with its quality policy allows being a worldwide reference in the sector.
– Our permanent commitment to continuous improvement of processes allows us to have a high degree of efficiency in our operations.
– Compromised with environmental.

Name: OVAL International
Description:
Based in North America, we have over 85 years experience in the design, manufacture and support of market pulp packaging equipment. OVAL International provides Technical Services, Packaging Equipment and Supplies to secure market pulp with steel wire and/or re-pulpable paper strap.  These products and services when combined offer our customers a complete packaging system.

Our worldwide customer base operates on a 24/7 schedule and our “around the clock” service demonstrates our commitment to customer support, regardless of time and distance. Our customers benefit not only from our products and services, but from our extensive experience in the global marketplace.  OVAL International’s “Ovalmatic Quality Wire”, strapping supplies, OEM replacement parts, and superior field service group insures the reliability of our customer’s pulp bale packaging equipment.

Our goal is to assist our customers by optimizing their market pulp packaging quality and productivity. We meet our customer’s packaging equipment needs by offering a variety of machine design and system integration services supported by our engineering team.  We can customize equipment to ensure you receive the most reliable, efficient and cost effective machinery specifically designed to meet your mill’s needs.

Our engineering team is focused on continuous improvement through our research and development programs.  In doing so we offer our customers enhanced machine performance, efficiency, and higher production.

Name: SOBOPLAC
Description:
SOBOPLAC, une entreprise française située à Bordeaux depuis 1975.

Le bois est l’ADN de cette société familiale depuis plus de 40 ans. Sa force : être en permanence à l’écoute de son marché et de ses clients pour leur offrir le meilleur de la matière bois. SOBOPLAC offre une gamme complète de parquets, terrasses et plans de travail tant en chêne qu’en bois exotiques apportant leur touche sensuelle et chaleureuse inégalable.

Entreprise responsable par nature elle s’évertue à choisir des filières contrôlées et raisonnées afin de préserver les ressources naturelles. C’est pour cela que la société est certifiée FSC et PEFC depuis 2000 et est donatrice à l’ONG Tropical FOREST Trust. Par ailleurs, elle a développé des gammes de produits fabriqués à partir de bois de plantation.

Passion, rigueur et savoir-faire sont les valeurs fondatrices de la société qui chaque jour tâche d’apporter à vos intérieurs le meilleur de cette matière noble qu’est le bois.

Devenez vous aussi Expert du Parquet Bois en nous suivant sur :
→ facebook.com/soboplac/
→ twitter.com/soboplac
→ instagram.com/soboplac/

Name: Western Pneumatics LLC

Western provides wood handling solutions for the wood products industry primarily in North America and overseas.  Engineering, fabrication and installation groups allow our customers to look to WP for a turn-key relationship.  Currently WP has offices in Eugene, Oregon and Ruston, Louisiana with 280,000 SF of total manufacturing space.

Nuestro eslogan es "Evolucionando el ser en el hacer".

El aporte que queremos dar, es ofrecer productos verdes, realizados en alguna fase o totalmente por procesos productivos sustentables. Alentamos el consumo eficiente. Pensamos que "Menos es Mas", cuidamos los recursos, cuidamos el medioambiente. Entendemos que estamos en un proceso de cambio y que paso a paso, es el camino correcto. Queremos ser puente de cambio. 

Nos dedicamos a la gráfica, el papel, y la publicidad. 
Bajo el mismo sentido, nucleamos productores, armamos equipos y logramos que suceda.
Felices de formar parte, con libertad, entusiasmo y compromiso, innovamos, aprendemos, crecemos, nos equivocamos para aprender y seguimos avanzando. Emprendedores, así nos llamamos.

Name: Forestal Millalemu
Description:
Forestal Millalemu y Cía. Ltda. Es una empresa de Servicios Forestales especializada en la cosecha con Torres y Skidder de madereo.

Sus operaciones son realizadas con especial preocupación, incorporando nuevas tecnologías que permitan el logro de un servicio de excelencia orientado en la Seguridad y Salud Ocupacional de sus trabajadores, el cuidado del Medio Ambiente, la Calidad de sus servicios y el bienestar de los colaboradores.

Name: Productos Texcel S.A
Description:
Productos Texcel S.A fabrica y comercializa productos que aplican a la higiene institucional y personal en las más diversas ramas de actividad.

Nuestras manufacturas se orientan al aporte de soluciones especificas en el mantenimiento de equipos, de procesos industriales o sanidad bajo las condiciones  que determinan el ejercicio de las buenas practicas de higiene  (certificación HACCP). 

Extendemos nuestra presencia a rubros como la metalmecánica, laboratorios de especialidades farmacológicas, alimenticias y espacios de actividad pública o privada que posean áreas de sanitarios, comedores, consultorios o guarderías infantiles en  establecimientos industriales, de servicios  ó recreación.

El modelo de negocios se apoya en la relación B2B que iniciamos con el asesoramiento técnico y de post venta, a fin de brindarle al cliente la mejor elección para satisfacción de sus usuarios.

Name: Europaper
Description:
Known throughout Europe for the quality and service
Manufacturer of reels, the paper mill in Fivizzano, Massa, specialises in producing paper for industrial use (Away From Home and Professional)

Part of the ICT Group, Europaper is located in Italy, in Fivizzano, in the Massa province. The paper mill specialises in the production of tissue paper reels for converting, for the toilet paper, kitchen towels and napkins market, with a special focus on the needs of the Away from Home/Professional sector (folded, industrial big rolls, medical sheets, etc.).
Europaper is the only group company that, in addition to pure pulp reels, also produces reels with varying percentages of recycled fibres, building on its long-standing experience in this sector.
Over the years, the paper mill has earned the trust of converting companies thanks to its great flexibility, reliability and timeliness.
Known throughout Europe for the quality of its product and its service, Europaper regularly exports a substantial part of its capacity.
Europaper is certified ISO 18001, and can also supply Ecolabel certified products.

Name: Divya Publications
Description: Finished paper traders and wastepaper dealers.

Name: RBI Converting
Description:
A RBI Converting, fundada em março de 1999, atua na prestação de serviços especiais de conversão de papel, realizando o acabamento de produtos em folhas, bobinas ou formulário contínuo.
Instalada em 8.500m², estrategicamente localizada na Rodovia Dom Pedro na cidade de Atibaia, a RBI oferece aos seus clientes a opção de armazenagem em um dos pontos geográficos mais importantes para o escoamento de mercadorias no estado de São Paulo.
Nossas máquinas trabalham de forma constante para atender a demanda dos mais variados clientes de maneira efetiva, em conjunto com uma equipe engajada e bem-preparada para desenvolver as melhores soluções à fabricantes e distribuidoras do segmento de papéis especiais.
Temos em nossa carteira de clientes grandes nomes da indústria brasileira, além de multinacionais como a OJI Papéis Especiais e Ranpak.
Trabalhando sempre com foco na solução de custos fabris, desenvolvemos novos processos e possibilidades em termos de aproveitamento de matéria-prima, equalizando os custos de desenvolvimento e produção de novos itens, permitindo assim a promoção de produtos bastante diversificados por parte dos nossos clientes.

Name: Bloomus International Corp.
Description:
Bloomus International Corp. is a leading export company specialized in the global supply and distribution of saw logs, veneer logs, and lumber. We offer a wide selection of superior quality products from North America at competitive rates. 
Our reliable and timely professionalism has serviced the unique requirements of our client base overseas, including industrial and commercial applications. We excel at forging strong relationships with every customer through seamless communication and honest work ethic. We exceed expectations by leveraging efficient logistics systems and innovative processes to enhance your purchasing experience.

Name: Scandinavian Group of Companies
Description: Established in 1997, our mission is to be the region's largest privately owned logistics and supply chain distributions for paper related products. Currently we hold 35,000 MT inventory (both grades i.e. white and brown) and also provide customized solutions to our clients.

Name: DVARMEDIS
Description:
UAB Dvarmedis is a wood processing company based in Alytus district with almost twenty years of experience. The company was established in 2003 and it has been growing and expanding its services every year. It started with the production of pallet blanks however today the activities include cutting, drying and planing wood. The company mainly focuses on production of pallet elements, pallets, decorative and construction wood products. The major part of the production is exported to Asia, Europe and North America.
Our company’s three core values are: partnerships based on trust, loyalty to our employees and uncompromising quality of our products. Motivating, achieving quality standards, searching for new opportunities – those are our daily goals. Our intention is to maintain strong relationships and trust with our suppliers and clients on a long-term basis; to meet the requirements of small and large volume buyers in a quality and timely manner; to find solutions for processing the most complicated orders.

Name: NPA Nordiskt Papper AB
Description:
TALE OF 100 YEARS – TOLD IN 2 MINUTES 
The Lidbeck family has been a part of the paper industry since the 1920s - A little over a century is quite a lot of time to master the paper inside out. 
NPA Nordiskt Papper, one of the key paper-converting companies in Scandinavia, was established in 1971. Over the time, the business grew to include also NPA Plast, NPA Spaces and NPA Filters. It sprung from Sweden and Scandinavia across Europe, UK and parts of North America, Asia, and Australia. 

WHAT DO WE DO?
We convert, stock, and distribute a wide range of paper products. We don’t simply resell. We produce arts and crafts paper, various kinds of paper bags and paper straws. With our own cellulose laboratory, we get to experiment, innovate and never ever compromise on the quality of paper. 
We’re proud to be green, and being BRC & FSC approved confirms our dedication to making the business environmentally friendly, sociably responsible and economically viable.
In a world going digital, we are here for all those who have passion for tangible creativity, and an urge to make the world, or their business greener.

Name: ERNEST PACKAGING
Description: Ernest is the go-to packaging company for innovative custom design and solutions—from commercial packaging to healthcare. Check out how Ernest can help!

We are Naseer Paper & Board Mills, a leading manufacturer of Kraft and Liner board paper. Our purpose is to have a strong commitment towards safe production, premium quality and customer satisfaction through continuous improvement and team work.

Our Values:

2. Acting with Determination, Passion and Energy
Our core competency is strong work ethic and commitment to the success of Naseer Paper & Board Mill. Paper making is our wheelhouse thus we act decisively to achieve the best outcomes for our customers and for our Mill.

3. Embrace challenges
We are committed to embrace change and continuous improvement while encouraging innovation, creativity and initiative.

4. Excelling our People
We believe in teamwork. We Respect our employees and encourage them to achieve their true potential.

We are keen towards the safety of ourselves, our employees, our customers and the communities in which we operate.

Our Products :

Name: Wood Beca

Since 1984, Wood Beca has provided technological innovation, insight and successful outcomes for clients in the Forest Industries, Oil & Gas and Biofuels & Biochemicals markets.

The company's range of resources and skills delivers all engineering services from planning and studies, through design to construction and commissioning. Whatever the project scale, Wood Beca is able to offer a comprehensive and professional service. 

With offices in Australia and New Zealand, Wood Beca is able to assist with optimising project outcomes. With a wealth of experience, knowledge and services to draw upon, Wood Beca endeavours to deliver on budget, on time and to a world-class standard of quality. In addition, Wood Beca has access to the world-wide resources of its parent companies, Beca and Wood (formerly AMEC Foster Wheeler). 

Wood Beca has earned a reputation for excellence through an intimate knowledge of the industries served and an atmosphere of teamwork, open communication and personal commitment to clients.

Name: Arctic Paper Munkedals AB
Description:
Arctic Paper Munkedals är en av Europas ledande tillverkare av obestruket designpapper,  och ett av världens mest miljövänliga pappersbruk. Bruket ligger i Munkedal, cirka 10 mil norr om Göteborg. Platsen, bruket och vårt varumärke fick sitt namn från munkarna från klostret i Bokenäs som för 800 år sedan fiskade lax i Örekilsälven. Munkedal är idag en av de största leverantörerna av högkvalitativa, miljövänliga designpapper och bokpapper baserade på förnybara källor. Mer information finns på www.arcticpaper.com

Arctic Paper S.A. är en av de ledande tillverkarna av högkvalitativt grafiskt finpapper i Europa. Bolaget producerar bestruket och obestruket träfritt papper för kvalitetsmedvetna kunder som tryckerier, bokförlag, tidningsutgivare, reklambyråer, pappersdistributörer och förpackningsföretag. Produktportföljen inkluderar välkända varumärken som Amber, Arctic, G-Print och Munken. I bolaget finns tre pappersbruk, Arctic Paper Munkedals, Sverige, Arctic Paper Grycksbo, Sverige och Arctic Paper Kostrzyn, Polen.

Name: Taeda S.A.
Description:
Somos una empresa Foresto-Industrial ubicada en la ciudad de Montecarlo, provincia de Misiones, Argentina, región conocida como una de las más atractivas del mundo para plantaciones forestales sustentables por su crecimiento anual.
La empresa surge como un emprendimiento familiar hace más de 80 años, de manos del abuelo, inmigrante alemán, quien nos transmitió el amor y pasión por los árboles y la madera.

Name: Scierie Descourvières
Description:
C’est en 1925 que la scierie Familiale Descourvieres est créé dans le Haut Doubs entre Pontarlier et Besançon (25). Depuis, les générations se succèdent avec confiance et font évoluer leurs savoirs faire dans le sciage et le traitement de résineux pour la construction bois et l’emballage en sections brutes ou transformées, standards ou à vos mesures
Depuis 2020, nous allons plus loin dans la transformation du bois grâce au développement d’une activité de raboterie parqueterie nous permettant de fabriquer notre propre gamme d’aménagement intérieur ( Parquets, lambris,…) et extérieur (terrasses, bardages, barrières,…). Mais aussi une activité de négociant bois et dérivés permettant de compléter notre offre.
Notre organisation à taille humaine nous permet d’étudier directement tous les projets des particuliers ou professionnels.
Fort de notre expérience et notre taille nous assurons des produits de qualité, grâce à nos sapins et épicéas sélectionnés par nos soins dans les forêts locales gérées durablement. 
Cette exigence de qualité, reconnue par le label Bois de France et la marque JuraSupérieur, nous la garantissons pour l’ensemble de nos produits.

Name: ATAUDES MONROY
Description:
Somos fabricantes de ataúdes ecológicos, artesanales y personalizados que honran la despedida de quienes más amamos. Apostamos por la sostenibilidad, el diseño emocional y la artesanía local como alternativa consciente frente a productos industrializados y masivos. 
Con más de 50 años en el sector funerario  nuestra producción 100% española  cuenta con la  tecnología  más avanzada que garantiza la  excelencia de nuestros productos. Contamos con certificados de calidad: AENOR ISO 9001 y cumplimiento de la norma AENOR 190001 para ataúdes genéricos y ecológicos, lo cual refuerza la trazabilidad, la mejora continua y la confianza que acompaña a cada pieza.
Nuestro servicio  junto con la alta excelencia en nuestros productos nos sitúan como un referente en el sector. Seguimos mejorando cada día.

Name: Adesprint Rótulos e Etiquetas Adesivas
Description:
A Adesprint atua no ramo gráfico desde 1998, foi criada para atender o mercado de formulários continuos e etiquetas personalizadas dentro dessa filosofia em 2008, acompanhando as mudanças mercadológicas realizamos investimentos para atender o mercado de rótulos adesivos.

Somos referêrencia de qualidade, trabalhamos dentro dos mais altos padrões, contamos com um departamento especializado de revisão e testes com objetivo de proporcionar os melhores produtos. 

Nosso diferencial em favor do cliente é a ampla assessoria desde a amostra para homologação, impressão, acabamento, embalagem e logística. Proporcionando agilidade na entrega dos pedidos formulados.
Oferecemos ainda total apoio ao cliente, transformando relações comerciais em verdadeiras parcerias.

Name: Paper-world.com by Birkner
Description:
Seit 1903 erfasst Birkner - International PaperWorld alles Wissenswerte über die gesamte internationale Papierbranche, von den Herstellern und Verarbeitern von Zellstoff, Papier und Pappe über die Zulieferindustrie bis zum Handel, den Verbänden, Institutionen und den Fachmedien. Dieser umfangreiche und jährlich aktualisierte Datenbestand wird weltweit von Fach- und Führungskräften der Papierbranche und der Zulieferindustrie genutzt. Die breite Akzeptanz, der hohe Nutzungsgrad und die Reichweite machen International PaperWorld zum bewährten Langzeit-Werbeträger.

Nachdem die Jubiläumsausgabe des Birkner 2005 mit dem EADP Award for Quality and Excellence in Directory Publishing als Europas bestes business-to-business Printverzeichnis ausgezeichnet wurde, stehen dem Leser der neuen Ausgabe Birkner - International PaperWorld über 27.000 Firmenprofile zur Verfügung. Wie gewohnt finden Sie hier aktuelle Informationen aus der internationalen Papierindustrie.

2009 erhält die Internetanwendung www.paper-world.com den VerzeichnismedienPreis in Gold. Das Portal ist für die einzigartige Zusammenführung von strukturierten Firmenprofilen und aktuellen Branchen- und Firmennews mit der höchsten Auszeichnung in der Kategorie Elektronische Medien vom VDAV Verband Deutscher Auskunfts- und Verzeichnismedien geehrt worden.

Die aktualisierten mehrsprachigen Firmenprofile bieten Informationen über Management, Maschinen, Produkte, Markennamen, aktuelle Umsätze und Jahreskapazitäten sowie die E-Mail und Internetadressen der Unternehmen.

Diese komfortablen Suchfunktionen der elektronischen Datenbanken mit den Exportmöglichkeiten für Serienbriefe, den Links zu den Homepages der Unternehmen und den Landkarten der Firmenstandorte machen den Birkner zu einer einzigartigen multimedialen Informationsplattform der Papierindustrie.

Sind Sie interessiert? Wir informieren Sie gern unter: +49 (40) 800 80 1777.
Impressum https://www.paper-world.com/impressum

We strongly believe in our business philosophies of Honesty, Integrity, and Quality, and as such we see both our customers and suppliers as Partners to which we are obligated to provide world-class service to meet and beat their expectations.

Name: LA CARTA È - DE LUCA FUORNI SRL
Description:
DE LUCA FUORNI SRL, con sede a Salerno, è un’azienda leader su scala nazionale nella produzione di carta uso alimentare e non. La storia dell’azienda è radicata nella tradizione da più di 100 anni con una ricerca continua e costante delle soluzioni che rispondano alle esigenze del cliente. L’attività si svolge in uno stabilimento su una superficie di 20.000 m² con impianti di ultima generazione e coinvolge una forza lavoro di 70 unità. La scelta della qualità delle materie prime e l’ottimizzazione dei processi sono i nostri punti di forza. La nostra mission ha come scelte di fondo il rispetto dell’Ambiente e la coesione del team, entrambi elemento fondamentale per lo sviluppo industriale.

I NOSTRI PRODOTTI

- CARTA: la nostra gamma di carte include opzioni per ogni esigenza, dalla carta da stampa a quella alimentare, a quella per usi speciali.

- SACCHETTI IN CARTA: i nostri sacchetti sono resistenti, eleganti e completamente personalizzabili.

- SHOPPERS: i nostri shoppers sono la soluzione ideale per chi cerca un’alternativa ecologica e resistente ai sacchetti di plastica.

- TOVAGLIATI: offriamo una vasta selezione di tovagliati in carta, ideali per ristoranti, eventi e uso domestico.

Name: Ipcart
Description:
IPCART srl si distingue come un'entità aziendale affermata, esperta nella creazione e nella personalizzazione di una varietà di articoli monouso per il settore della ristorazione. La nostra gamma include eleganti tovaglioli e tovaglie di carta, bicchieri sia in plastica che di carta, incarti raffinati per pasticcerie, sacchetti funzionali e stilosamente progettati, oltre a soluzioni per portatovaglioli e portabustine da zucchero, e porta posate. Tutti i nostri prodotti sono disponibili in molteplici formati e sono minuziosamente personalizzati per riflettere il carattere unico di ogni cliente.

La dedizione che IPCART mette in ogni creazione è palpabile: ogni giorno, la qualità e l'impegno si traducono in servizi affidabili per bar, ristoranti, caffetterie, sale per eventi, centri balneari, e le flotte delle compagnie di navigazione aerea e marittima, garantendo soluzioni che si adattano perfettamente alle esigenze di ogni ambiente.
Il nostro Team di Designer è il cuore pulsante della nostra innovazione, avvalendosi di una vasta esperienza e di tecnologie all'avanguardia per incontrare e superare le aspettative dei clienti. Con la loro abilità, non si limitano a rispondere alle richieste, ma trasformano ogni progetto in qualcosa di straordinario, elevando e valorizzando il logo e l'identità di marca di ciascuna azienda con grafiche curate e distintive.

Name: Tamoio Boas Impressões
Description:
Empresa brasileira do segmento de papelaria, a Tamoio Boas Impressões, nasceu com o objetivo de ser referência em qualidade e pontualidade.
Investindo freqüentemente em tecnologia e na capacitação de seus profissionais, a Tamoio tem como missão tornar a vida mais fácil através de produtos de qualidade sem medir esforços para entregar o melhor , causando assim uma boa impressão naqueles que fazem dos impressos gráficos que produzimos seu instrumento de trabalho ou educação.
Qualidade, atendimento, dinamismo e comprometimento são características da Tamoio, que busca evoluir continuamente, mantendo-se atualizada às demandas do mercado valorizando ao máximo os compromissos com os clientes.
Além de oferecer os já tradicionais formulários e os conhecidos impressos, temos também nossa ampla linha executiva, escolar e os mais inovadores materiais disponíveis, com design moderno, seguindo as tendências das mídias e das redes sociais.
Trabalhamos focados em melhoria contínua sendo nosso corpo fabril o mais bem equipado do Vale do Paraíba. Com autonomia industrial, produzimos integralmente mais de 600 itens do segmento de papelaria, desde a criação, desenvolvimento e o acabamento. Tudo isso aliados à experiência, tradição, alta qualidade, rapidez e preços competitivos, assim somos reconhecidos em todo o território nacional.

Missão
“Tornar a vida mais fácil com produtos de qualidade, oferecendo experiência de entrega rápida para servir nossos clientes. Não medir esforços para entregar o melhor e causar sempre Boas Impressões. ”

Visão
“Ampliar a presença no mercado nacional e se tornar uma empresa global.”

Description:
Parag Copigraph Pvt. Ltd. (PCPL) is among India's leading manufacturers in coated paper segment, offering Carbonless Paper, Thermal Paper and Self Contained Paper. The company is based in Pithampur (MP), India.

Through consistent investments in the area of technological improvement, human resource development and customer relationships, Parag Copigraph endeavors to be among the top ranking companies by offering complete customer satisfaction.

The essence of the product development activities at Parag Copigraph is to meet the unique and diverse needs of consumers by creating customized products and establishing quality benchmarks. Dedicated efforts of Team PCPL has made Parag Copigraph India's first paper coated manufacturer to get ISO-9001:2000 certification (from SGS-U.K).

Name: Northwood Dicepa
Description:
Dicepa es un grupo papelero referente en la producción de celulosas recicladas y pasta virgen, con dos fábricas: en Enate (Huesca) y Barcelona (Capellades); Y dos plantas de manipulado, en Barcelona (Capellades) y en Madrid (Alcalá de Henares).

Nuestros objetivos son generar productos de alta calidad y alto valor añadido para nuestros clientes, ofreciendo un servicio especializado, cercano y personalizado en función de las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Dicepa inició su andadura en 1985 centrando su actividad en la fabricación de papeles crepados en húmedo  cien por cien reciclados para uso higiénico, sanitario y de mesa.

Dicepa se ha caracterizado a lo largo de su historia por su gran capacidad de innovación y de generar desarrollos ad hoc para la industria.

En la actualidad es capaz de fabricar papeles con blancuras desde 45 hasta 85, con volumen desde 70 micras hasta 300 micras, hidrófilos, hidrófugos, en colores y aptos para el contacto con alimentos.

En el año 2014 la empresa expande su actividad a la fabricación de papel tisú a partir de pasta virgen. En la actualidad produce todas las calidades de este papel: Resistentes a la Humedad –secamanos, cocina y servilletas- e Higiénicos.

En 2018 Dicepa comienza en Enate la fabricación de su gama de Papel Kraft 100% reciclado destinado a la fabricación de para bolsas. Esto ha sido gracias a la investigación de nuevos materiales, mejoras de equipos, formación específica del equipo responsable de máquina y modificaciones en el proceso de fabricación. De esta manera Dicepa responde a las inquietudes de sus clientes y a la demanda del mercado al mismo tiempo, formando así una garantía de futuro en el desarrollo del grupo.

Name: Joe Piper Inc.

Joe Piper Inc. - Industry Leader in Job Lot Paperboard

Joe Piper’s approach to job lot board is markedly different from anyone else in the industry. Our commitment to quality runs deep throughout the entire organization, from a dedicated quality control department to a checklist for each outbound truck. Please browse through our site to see “the Joe Piper Difference”. Not all job lot distributors are the same!

Name: Firestorm Wildland Fire Suppression, Inc.
Description:
Firestorm is a forestry and emergency services corporation made up of fire and land management professionals. Founded by James Wills in 1995, Firestorm began with a memorandum of understanding for a single organized fire crew on the Lassen National Forest located in Northern California. Firestorm was the first private organization to hold a fire crew contract with the United States Forest Service and National Park Service in California.

In order to provide quality services to the federal agencies, we were in constant search for more work to keep our fire crews working, physically fit and well trained. This search for forestry work began our Forestry Services Division. Our hand crews and engines were performing thousands of acres of prescribed burning and forestry health projects each season, while waiting for the call to assist in the suppression of wildland fires. We then diversified our Forestry Operations with the utilization of heavy equipment, mulchers and chippers, to perform thinning and fire hazard reduction projects.

Today, Firestorm’s Emergency Services division now provides multiple fire crews, wildland engines and overhead personnel throughout the United States for fire and all risk incidents. Each year we provide hundreds of thousands of personnel hours towards the support of emergency situations. 

We are now providing Fire Safety Consulting for both large and small landowners to mitigate the threat of wildfires in the wildland urban interface.

Name: Kardem Ambalaj
Description:
2005 yılında kurulan Kardem Ambalaj, oluklu mukavva ambalaj sektöründe uzman kadrosu ve modern üretim tesisleriyle faaliyet göstermektedir. Sektördeki yenilikleri ve teknolojik gelişmeleri yakından takip ederek, her zaman yenilikçi, kaliteli ve müşteri odaklı çözümler sunmayı hedeflemektedir.

Oluklu mukavva üretiminde edindiğimiz uzmanlık sayesinde dayanıklılık, hassasiyet ve sürdürülebilirlik odaklı çözümler geliştiriyoruz. Farklı boyut ve özelliklerde özelleştirilmiş ambalaj çözümleri sunarak gıda, tekstil, e-ticaret, otomotiv, beyaz eşya ve daha birçok sektördeki iş ortaklarımızın ihtiyaçlarını karşılıyoruz.

Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana yüksek kalite standartları, zamanında teslimat ve rekabetçi fiyat ilkelerimizden ödün vermeden çalışıyoruz.

Sürdürülebilirlik vizyonumuz doğrultusunda, doğal kaynakları korumak, atıkları azaltmak ve çevresel etkiyi en aza indirmek için üretim süreçlerimizi sürekli iyileştiriyoruz. Geri dönüştürülebilir malzemeler kullanarak hem müşterilerimize hem de gezegenimize değer katmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Kardem Ambalaj ile geleceğe yönelik daha yeşil, yenilikçi ve güvenilir ambalaj çözümleri için birlikte adım atalım.

info@kardemambalaj.com

Name: Camara Forestal de Bolivia
Description:
Visión
Entidad líder del sector forestal boliviano, referente de excelencia en servicios y promotora del desarrollo integral y sostenible.

Misión
Representar a sus asociados, en los ámbitos social, ambiental, económico y político; promoviendo el desarrollo sostenible del sector forestal, en un marco de legalidad y libre empresa.

Objetivos
Mejorar la seguridad jurídica y las condiciones para el desarrollo a gran escala del Sector Forestal, a partir de una mayor participación e influencia social, ambiental, política y económica.  
Fortalecer la imagen del Sector Forestal, promoviendo sus virtudes en manejo sostenible, agregación de valor e impacto social. 
Mejorar la sostenibilidad económica de la CFB, bajo una perspectiva de consolidación de servicios y captación de un mayor número y diversidad de asociados. 
Fortalecer el relacionamiento con los diferentes actores forestales y todas las organizaciones que promueven la actividad dentro del marco de legalidad y el desarrollo sostenible.

Name: Elif Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Şirketi
Description:
Elif Ambalaj 1977 yılında İstanbul 'da kurulmuştur.
2002 yılına kadar Elif Ambalaj ticari faaliyetlerine şahıs şirketi olarak devam etmiş olup, firmanın büyüme ve kurumsallaşma hedefleri doğrultusunda ticari ünvani Elif Ambalaj San.ve Tic.Ltd.Şti. olarak değişmiştir. 

2003 yılında firma yatırımlarını hızlandırarak, bugün hala faaliyetlerini sürdürdüğü Başakşehir / İkitelli O.S.B 'deki  21.000 m2 kapalı alana sahip yeni tesislerinde üretim yapmaya başlamıştır.

2009 yılında sürdürülebilir büyüme için ISO 9001:2000 (TUV CERT) Kalite Yönetim Sistemi sertifikası almaya hak kazanarak kurumsal yapısını tescil ettirdi.

2010 yılında ISO 22000:2005 (TUV CERT) Kalite Yönetim Sistemi sertifikası almaya hak kazanarak, gıda ürünleri imalatı yapan müşterilerine hijyenik koşullarda, gıda güvenliğine uygun üretim yaptığını tescil ettirmiştir.

2014 yılında firma üretim prosesini, son teknoloji oluklu mukavva ve flekso baskı makina hatları ile yenileyerek, Avrupa standartlarında uluslararası FEFCO ‘nun belirlediği üretim kalite standartlarına uygun olarak üretimini gerçekleştirmektedir. Bu teknolojik alt yapı ve yüksek kapasite sayesinde Elif Ambalaj Dünya'nın en önemli ambalaj üretim tesislerinden biri oldu. Yıllık üretim kapasitesini 72.000 Ton Kağıt/Yıl'a çıkardı.
Bu sayede sektörünün lider kuruluşları arasındaki yerini almıştır.

2015 yılında firma ofset koli-kutu yatırımlarına ağırlık vererek özel kalıp kesim , laminasyon-sıvama, yapıştırma,dikiş, dilimleme, ondule ve ofset baskı teknolojisine sahip yeni makina yatırımları ile müşterilerine sunduğu ürün yelpazesini genişletmiştir.

2016 yılında Elif Ambalaj, Ofset ambalaj lüks karton kutu üzerine yaptığı yatırımlar ile ofset sektörünün öncü kuruluşları arasındaki yerini almıştır. Günümüzde Elif Ambalaj başlıca üretim çeşitleri arasında kağıt ambalaj, safia, ondüle, Flekso baskılı karton kutu, ofset baskılı karton kutu ve Flekso Baskılı Karton Koli yer almaktadır.

Name: SIRPUR PAPER MILLS LTD.
Description:
Sirpur Paper Mills Limited (SPM) is an integrated pulp and paper mill situated at Kagaznagar in Komaram Bheem district, Telangana.[1][2] JK Paper Ltd acquired Sirpur Paper Mills in August 2018.

Sirpur Paper Mills Ltd was established in the erstwhile Hyderabad State in 1938 by the Nizam of Hyderabad Mir Osman Ali Khan, with actual production beginning in 1942. This makes it one of the oldest paper mills in the country. In the 1950s, the Birla family group of industries took over the mill, and it was later transferred to the Poddars.[3] It was owned by R. K. Poddar at the time of its closure.

Name: The Bamboo Co by Infinity Traders Pvt Ltd
Description:
Why Bamboo Tissue?
Bamboo is a rapidly renewable resource that offers numerous environmental and practical benefits over traditional tree-based tissues: 

 Eco-Friendly – Bamboo grows up to 30 times faster than trees, reducing deforestation and preserving natural habitats. 
 Biodegradable & Compostable – Unlike synthetic alternatives, bamboo tissues break down naturally, minimizing landfill waste. 
 Sustainable Production – Bamboo requires no pesticides and very little water, making it a low-impact crop. 
 Hypoallergenic & Soft – Naturally antibacterial and gentle on skin, perfect for sensitive users. 
 Carbon Negative – Bamboo absorbs more CO2 than trees, helping combat climate change. 

Our Vision: A Greener Sri Lanka
Every small step toward sustainability makes a difference. By switching to bamboo tissue products, we can collectively: 
 Reduce deforestation caused by traditional paper production. 
 Lower carbon footprints with a renewable, fast-growing material. 
 Educate communities on sustainable living for a healthier planet. 

Join us in making Sri Lanka a leader in eco-conscious choices. Together, we can protect **Mother Earth**—one bamboo roll at a time. 

#Sustainability #BambooProducts #EcoFriendlyLiving #GreenSriLanka #InfinityTraders

Name: Jutos
Description:
Vi vill utveckla verksamheten på den plats där det gjorts i generationer, och dela den den kunskap och råvara som växer här med hela världen. Vi vill producera Sveriges bästa trävaror och stärka bygden.

Name: Residues2Revenues NZ
Description:
We have the potential to transform the forestry sector into a provider of biofuels, bioenergy and a range of renewable bioproducts. Residues2Revenues NZ will help you understand the real value of energy tied up in wood residues and the opportunities in supplying the market.

There is growing demand for alternatives to fossil fuels. Pressure is being bought to bear by the NZ Government. It’s aiming for low emissions transport. All Government owned facility heating will be from low emissions energy by 2035, with fossil fuels replaced by electricity and solid biofuels. Heat and energy users throughout New Zealand are following the Government’s lead and transitioning from fossil fuels. 

Major investment is required in creating a New Zealand biofuels industry. Te Uru Rākau, as part of the Forestry and Wood Processing Industry Transformation Plan, is developing business cases for companies to invest in biofuels and the solid fuels sector in New Zealand. This will include a focus on wood-based products that will provide a large source of residues. 

However, is the forestry sector in a position to supply?

The potential right now is immense - and it’s growing as the wood harvest increases. Biofuel is a new product line for the forestry sector. So, how can the forestry and wood processing sector best capitalise on this opportunity?

Name: DE LUCA INDUSTRIA GRAFICA E CARTARIA S.P.A.
Description: Una storia centenaria iniziata con Andrea De Luca, nel 1924, capostipite di quella che oggi è diventata un'azienda di riferimento per il settore alimentare, imballaggio flessibile, carta politenata e carte speciali per le industrie. Con abnegazione e dedizione al lavoro, condivisi in un percorso di crescita professionale e personale, Andrea De Luca seguito dai figli ha trasformato nel tempo l’attività da tipografia a impresa globale. Oggi questi valori sono portati avanti da Andrea De Luca, figlio di Giuseppe nipote del fondatore Andrea a cui è stata intitolata la strada dov’è attualmente ubicato lo stabilimento, in Salerno. L’eccellente reputazione che l’azienda è riuscita a costruire e consolidare nel corso degli anni, non soltanto sul territorio nazionale ma anche verso i mercati internazionali, è frutto di una costante coerenza tra valori aziendali e modalità imprenditoriali di operare.

AK Roll Service Oy: Comprehensive Solutions for the Paper, Board, and Pulp Industries

AK Roll Service Oy, based in Tampere, Finland, is a distinguished provider of roll service solutions dedicated to supporting the paper, board, and pulp industries. With a strong commitment to quality and innovation, we specialize in a range of essential services, including roll maintenance, coating, and manufacturing. Our Services
Roll Maintenance and Repair:
We offer comprehensive mechanical maintenance and repair services, designed to extend the life of your equipment and minimize downtime. Our expert team handles everything from minor adjustments to complex repairs, ensuring each component functions at optimal levels.

Coating Solutions:
Our coatings are tailored to meet the specific needs of industrial applications. We provide high-quality rubber, polyurethane, and thermally sprayed coatings, each formulated to protect and enhance the performance of roll surfaces. These coatings offer durability, resistance to wear, and the ability to withstand extreme conditions, helping to maximize equipment efficiency.

Custom Roll Manufacturing:
In addition to maintenance and coatings, AK Roll Service Oy manufactures custom rolls built to precise specifications. Our team collaborates closely with clients to understand their unique requirements, ensuring that each roll we produce fits seamlessly into their existing operations.

Why Choose AK Roll Service Oy?
Expertise and Experience: With years of industry experience, our team combines in-depth technical knowledge with hands-on expertise, ensuring high standards in every project.
Quality Assurance: We prioritize quality in everything we do, from the materials we select to the processes we follow. This commitment to excellence ensures that our clients receive reliable and lasting solutions..

Name: DAINA
Description:
C’era una volta, dunque, nell’ultimo dei mitici anni ‘60 – quelli del boom economico – un uomo di nome Giacomo Della Maestra, imprenditore nel campo della ristorazione, che decide di avviare una piccola attività parallela. Fin da questo momento il il futuro comincia a fare la sua comparsa: a supportare il padre, sotto la sua egida, è infatti il giovane figlio, Giovanni. Nasce Daina, che, negli anni ‘70 – anni di libertà, trasgressione, lotte politiche, ma anche di grande creatività in tutti i campi – è un piccolo laboratorio manifatturiero per la produzione di carta igienica. Si tratta di un settore completamente nuovo nell’ambito produttivo territoriale, ma in pieno sviluppo, tanto che di lì a breve la piccola impresa si trasferisce in una nuova sede al fine di far fronte alle sensibili esigenze logistiche.

Il decennio successivo – quello delle spalline e dei capelli cotonati – vede daina affermarsi come una piccola industria ben inserita nel contesto nazionale. La nuova sede, dove ancora oggi è sito un centro produttivo, permette all’azienda di incrementare gli spazi di stoccaggio e di ampliare il numero di macchinari, che richiedono un continuo aggiornamento tecnologico: Daina si specializza definitivamente nella produzione di carta igienica e prodotti in rotoli per comunità e industrie.
Negli anni ‘90 – quel decennio schiacciato tra la fine degli anni leggeri e spensierati appena terminati e la voglia, quasi frenetica, di scoprire il fantomatico 2000, protagonista di fantasie e fantascienza – la nuova Daina, guidata ormai a tutti gli effetti da Giovanni Della Maestra, compie numerosi passi, sia espandendo la propria gamma di prodotti, sia investendo in ricerca, sviluppo e personale qualificato. A partire dal 1995 gli uffici amministrativi e commerciali si trasferiscono nella nuova sede logistica.

In 1918, we  opened as a single ply veneer mill. Logs were purchased from local farmers and converted to fine veneer on a rotary lathe. One of our first customers was Radio Corp of America/Victor Talking Machines.  

Today, Darlington Veneer Co., is one of the oldest and most successful manufacturers of quality hardwood plywood products in the nation, and a longstanding leader in environmental safety and conservation. Lifetimes of dedication have gone into the creation of our outstanding hardwood plywood.

We manufacture quality paper and board by recycling of waste paper as the feedstock for domestic consumption. Although paper is traditionally identified with reading and writing, communication has now been replaced by packaging as the single largest category of paper use at 41% of all paper used. 
We feel very Proud to say that we are using 100% Recycled fiber in our unit to manufacture our products, Thus serving our society in different ways:
1.	Disposing of waste materials in an economical, scientific way.
2.	Preserving the environment primarily through preserving its natural resources and the biodiversity of trees through reducing dependence on imported pulp, which depends for its production on cutting down forest trees.
3.	Raising environmental awareness and healthy practices of the public.
 
Recycling each ton of paper saves 17 Trees, 7000 Gallons of Water, 2.5 Barrels of Oil, 4100 kWh of Electricity, 4 Cubic Meters of Landfill.

Name: Ignisterra
Description:
IGNISTERRA es una empresa que produce y comercializa madera aserrada seca y productos elaborados en maderas finas, especialmente de Lenga (Nothofagus pumilio), madera noble nativa chilena que crece exclusivamente en el extremo sur de Sudamérica.

Esta madera de excelente calidad transformada en productos de uso cotidiano eleva la calidad de vida de quienes la utilizan debido a su inigualable calidez y belleza, y hacen sentir la naturaleza.
La empresa tiene aserraderos mecanizados y operaciones de secado de la madera en Tierra del Fuego, y una moderna planta de manufactura en Villa Alemana.

IGNISTERRA en sus instalaciones industriales ha implementado tecnologías de última generación, que unidas a su personal altamente calificado le permiten fabricar y ofrecer productos de altísimo nivel de calidad.

La madera de IGNISTERRA es extraída de sus bosques propios en Tierra del Fuego, a través de un manejo forestal responsable, autorizado y fiscalizado por  CONAF y con certificación Forest Stewardship Council TM.

IGNISTERRA realiza un manejo forestal  extrayendo un porcentaje de los árboles adultos permitiendo que los árboles que vienen creciendo reciban luz solar y así el ciclo del bosque nunca se pierda.  

Además, IGNISTERRA busca aprovechar de forma eficiente todas las partes del árbol, es por ello que su madera se corta en anchos variables y ha incluido y fomentado la aceptación de naturalidades tales como nudos y diferencias de colores.

Name: Groupe DE TREVILLERS
Description:
Créé en 1956, le groupe DE TREVILLERS a commencé son histoire avec la transformation de panneaux bois brut, mélaminé et stratifié. Au fil des ans, l'entreprise est devenue experte sur cette activité de sous-traitance, allant de la découpe à l’usinage et au placage de chants.

En 1978, le groupe DE TREVILLERS intègre une activité de fabrication de tubes et bobines carton, droits et spiralés. Ce nouveau savoir faire lui permet de renforcer son positionnement sur le secteur de l'emballage industriel mais aussi de développer une nouvelle activité: les solutions de conditionnement en fûts sertis. 

La politique d'innovation fondée sur l'écoute et l'anticipation des besoins clients est devenue un principe fondamental, moteur de développement du groupe DE TREVILLERS. L’emploi de matériaux respectueux de l’environnement, la recherche de la performance, le développement de nouvelles fonctionnalités, sont quelques-uns des facteurs de succès de la politique d'innovation de l’entreprise depuis près de 70 ans. 

Ces valeurs ont conduit au développement du Green Fiber Drum, un fût kraft nouvelle génération, bi matière, qui permet que carton et plastique soient aisément dissociables, facilitant ainsi le tri sélectif et le recyclage.
Retrouvez plus d'information sur notre page dédiée: www.le-fut.com

Depuis 2006, le Groupe DE TREVILLERS a à nouveau élargi son champs d'action en intégrant la société FILIAC, spécialiste des clôtures et accessoires.  
www.filiac.fr

En 2021, le groupe créé la société DISTRIFEN, spécialisée dans les menuiseries extérieures. 
www.direct-fenetres.fr

Enfin, en 2024, le Groupe DE TREVILLERS intègre LR Industrie Panneaux, spécialisée dans la transformation de panneaux.
www.lrindustrie-panneaux.fr

Au travers de ces 5 entités, De Trévillers Transformation, De Trévillers Cartonnages, Filiac, Distrifen et LR Industrie Panneaux, le groupe met le service client, l'innovation et le respect de l'environnement au centre de ses préoccupations.

In addition, we have a significant presence in healthcare producing tissue sizes specific to needs of the healthcare industry.

As a small business, we take pride in the technology we’ve invested in to continuously produce quality products.

Our primary business focus is contract converting for the away-from-home market and other paper companies private label products. Because we specialize in facial tissue we don’t compete with our converting customers in any of their core categories, like bath tissue. Name: Filofax UK
Description:
For more information, please contact Julie Starr //// 

Our mission in Filofax is to offer quality stationery and lifestyle accessories, with the ideal balance of beauty and brains.

We believe 'you do you' better than anyone else, which is why we ensure all of our designs are intrinsically flexible and highly versatile.

Open one of our products and you enter a space within your control, ready to evolve into your own unique creation.

The popularity of Filofax over the past decade has naturally led many people to believe it is a relatively new concept. Yet its origins go back as far as the First World War.

In 1921, a London based company was formed to market personal organisation systems in the UK by mail order. In 1930 they registered the trademark "Filofax", the name having derived from the description "file of facts".

The business continued to grow and by 1987 had a retail network of 1250 outlets in the UK alone. Prestigious stores around the world stocked Filofax; Harrods and Harvey Nichols in London, Neiman Marcus and Bloomingdales in the US, Bon Genie in Switzerland, Galleries Lafayette in Paris and Seibu in Japan amongst others.

The Filofax personal organiser had developed from a simple loose-leaf diary and notebook into an indispensable organiser and lifestyle accessory.  Since then, the additions of colourful, refillable notebooks, four ring Clipbooks, writing instruments and elegant lifestyle accessories have helped us become the brand we are today.

With more than two decades of engineering and manufacturing leadership experience, I understand the culture, skills and mindset it takes to succeed in these environments.

For employers: we source skilled engineers, operations leaders, technical specialists and executives through a range of models—Contingency, Retained Search, RPO and Contract‑to‑Hire.

Our process is thorough yet efficient: discovery, targeted sourcing, careful screening and a smooth onboarding, all backed by a placement guarantee. By leveraging a deep network and technology‑driven sourcing, we reduce turnover and help build high‑performing teams.

For candidates: we open doors to opportunities you won’t find on job boards. We offer confidential searches, résumé and interview support, and guide you through every step until you land the right role.

windermererecruit.com

Name: Forestal Guarani S.A.
Description:
Somos una empresa Argentina con 40 años de trayectoria en el mercado nacional y 25 años en el internacional, ubicada en Ituzaingó (Corrientes) y Posadas (Misiones), que apuesta a la sustentabilidad de los recursos naturales generando valor agregado a la madera.

Como empresa buscamos dar a conocer a través de nuestros productos los beneficios tanto de sustentabilidad ambiental como de confort, calidad y agilidad que da la construcción con madera transformando así no solo la vida de nuestros clientes si no también la gran casa de todos que es el planeta tierra.

Juntos logramos la producción de más de 20 tipos de viviendas familiares, sociales y turísticas aptas para ser transportadas y montadas con diferentes tipos de terminaciones y demandas. Como también la venta de nuestra diversa línea de productos manufacturados en más de 30 países en los distintos continentes, Asia, Europa, Centro America, EE.UU. y el Mercosur. Pero nuestra visión apunta al crecimiento, a la expansión de nuestros productos, y a la posibilidad de brindar a nuestro gran equipo un desarrollo económico y personal constante.

Forestal Guaraní fue constituida por su fundador y actual presidente Pedro Lopez Vinader para desarrollarse como una empresa de servicios forestales. A través de los años fue apostando por la industrialización generando valor agregado y hace más de 20 años a la fabricación de viviendas con madera con las cuales se cumplieron los sueños de más de 2.500 familias.

Además del compromiso con el medio ambiente Forestal Guaraní tiene un gran lazo con la comunidad. Apoyándonos en nuestra capacidad de fabricación y experiencia, logramos asistir en la región y a varios países de Latinoamérica una solución ágil a distintas emergencia tanto climáticas como habitacionales, produciendo acción social instantánea.

Name: Finnpulp Oy
Description:
Finnpulp's objective is to build the world's most modern and efficient softwood pulp mill to Finland. The company's objective is to ensure the utilization of Finnish wood and the possibilities offered by the latest technological advances in the processing industry for the growing tissue and packaging board markets. 

The new Finnpulp mill will be the most efficient and ecologically sound pulp mill in the industry. The environmental permit was granted in March 2017 and the terms of the permit maybe the tightest ever been set to production plants. In addition to pulp production, the modern technology will enable versatile bioproduction. Thus, the mill is going to be a significant producer of biochemicals and bioelectricity. The company's production will equal 5 per cent of the world's softwood pulp market in 2022.

Name: Green Triangle Forest Industries Hub
Description:
The Green Triangle is unique in that it contains the breadth of the entire value chain – from seedling cultivation right through to final fibre processing. There is also depth to its value chain – from world leading, international corporations through to start-ups and micro businesses – all are looking for innovative solutions.

In early 2018, nine companies operating in the Green Triangle recognised that a unified approach to growing the regional forestry and wood fibre industry was required to strengthen it for future generations.

It was a unique collaboration representing a cross section of the industry – large and small companies, growers and processors, softwood and hardwood, Victoria and South Australia. Together, these entities represent about 90% of forest industries in the Green Triangle.

Later in 2018, the Federal Government announced its intention to fund defined regional forest industry hubs and launch the “Growing a better Australia” initiative – a billion trees for jobs and growth.” This initiative is aimed at facilitating and stimulating growth in the sector in order to meet growing demand for wood fibre and combat climate change.

The network was successful in its application for funding and the GTFIH was created in April 2019.

Name: Kurikka Timber Oy
Description:
Kurikka Timber is Europe's leading manufacturer of joinery components. Our products range includes finger-jointed, solid-wood and gluelam components, always made to order. Our customers consist of companies working in the carpentery and joinery industries across Europe and 90 % of our production is exported.

We are known first and foremost for our flexibility, customer-orientation and quality. We want to offer among the top names in their respective lines of business. The degree of quality is quaranteed by our own testing and product development laboratory. Our products have Danish Window Certification (DVC) and SP Trätek certification.

Our sole raw material is high-quality Finnish pine, the properties of which are ideal for the manufacturing of joinery products. We are biggest industrial user of sawn pine timber.

Eco-friendliness is also important to us and our operations are FSC- and PEFC-certified. The carbon dioxide emissions generated in the manufacturing of wood products are relatively low.

Name: CFP
Description:
La CFP, Compagnie Française du Panneau, est située à Corbenay, en Haute-Saône, au cœur de la deuxième forêt française. Entreprise fondée en 1969 par Parisot pour répondre à ses besoins en approvisionnement de panneaux, la CFP s'est spécialisée dans la fabrication et le revêtement de panneaux de particules. Son savoir-faire complet lui permet de proposer une gamme de produits bruts, surfacés finish foil et mélamine en lien avec les tendances du marché.

La CFP est présente aujourd’hui sur tous les circuits de distribution :
_ Le négoce : référencée chez tous les acteurs du secteur avec une offre panneaux bruts, panneaux surfacés mélamine et dalles labellisées par le centre de certification FCBA.
_ Les grandes surfaces de bricolage (GSB) : présente chez les plus grandes enseignes du secteur avec notamment une gamme de tablettes blanches et décors.
_ L’industrie : partenaire avec les industriels du meuble (fabricants de meubles, cuisinistes, agenceurs, fabricants de canapés, de portes de placards).

La CFP utilise les techniques les plus modernes pour la production de panneaux de particules bruts et revêtus. L’approvisionnement en bois provient essentiellement de forêts régionales éco certifiées PEFC (Pan European Forest Council). La CFP exporte 35% de sa production. Elle représente 10% de la production française de panneaux de particules. C’est aujourd’hui le seul fabricant à proposer des panneaux surfacés finish foil en largeur 2070 mm découpables selon la demande.

Retrouvez l'ensemble de nos produits sur notre site internet : http://www.cfp.fr/

Name: GA Paper International
Description: G.A. Paper International is a privately-owned trading company specializing in pulp, paper, and board sales and distribution. With decades of experience, they have established a solid position as a reliable partner for producers and converters. Their services include sales and marketing, trade finance, logistics, and risk management. G.A. Paper focuses on developing markets in South America, Africa, Middle East, and the Indian Subcontinent, offering localized expertise to broaden business dealings. Name: Adercarta
Description:
Da 35 anni siamo i pionieri nel settore del packaging per alimenti freschi da banco.
A renderci un punto di riferimento nel settore dell'imballaggio non sono però i 4 milioni di sacchetti che produciamo ogni giorno, ma sono l'impegno, la passione e l'attenzione che dedichiamo quotidianamente ad ogni nostro cliente.
Forniamo ai nostri clienti carte e sacchetti alimentari studiati per rispondere alle necessità specifiche di ciascun comparto: dal pane alla frutta, dai salumi ai formaggi, dal pesce alla carne, allo street food come pizze e focacce.
Investiamo ogni giorno nella ricerca per offrire prodotti e grafiche nuovi, in grado di assicurare la massima sicurezza alimentare, un’immagine coerente e forte ad ogni azienda, la migliore shelf-life per i prodotti, un’ottima riciclabilità e un facile confezionamento.
Crediamo che la tutela dell’ambiente debba essere una delle chiavi del nostro operato. Per questo utilizziamo solo carta proveniente da foreste certificate e siamo da sempre impegnati nello sviluppo di prodotti riciclabili o compostabili.

Name: PalettenWerk Kozik
Description: PalettenWerk istnieje od 1990 roku i obecnie jest jednym z największych producentów i eksporterów palet drewnianych w Polsce. Prawie 30 lat działalności pozwoliło firmie zyskać bogate doświadczenie w produkcji i dostawach palet dla niemal wszystkich branż i gałęzi przemysłu. Palety PalettenWerk stosowane są przez kilkaset firm z branży spożywczej, budowlanej, chemicznej, farmaceutycznej, browarniczej, metalowej oraz w innych gałęziach przemysłu. Każdego miesiąca zakłady firmy opuszcza 900 TIRów dostarczających palety do Klientów w kraju i za granicą. In 2011, Doğuş took another key step in growth with the move to its own built-to-need premises; which has been designed to have enhanced quality and environmental standards.

As the market leader in our region, our promise is to continuously match and further exceed our customers’ quality requirements.

Name: Murnane Paper Company
Description:
Being Obsessed Isn’t Bad…..

Here at Murnane Paper Company, we’re obsessed with getting you the best possible paper you need at the best possible price. Sure there are bigger paper companies out there you could do business with, but you won’t find anyone better and more focused on your bottom line and what you need to get the job done. Why else should you buy paper from us?

Are You A Printer? Printing Companies Are Our Specialty.

Our paper experts work with printers every day. We are laser focused on helping you source the best paper for the job while at the same time saving you money and even making you money. In fact, we’re the only paper company in the country that has “you sell more/we sell more” service philosophy.
Time is Money.
You need your paper now. Our paper delivery teams are fanatical about getting your paper from our door to your door as fast as possible. Same day if needed.

Simple and Straightforward.

We don’t nickel and dime you with hidden charges. That’s for the other paper companies to play around with. No fuel surcharges. No small order fees. Not even a same day delivery charge. We’re looking to develop a long term relationship with our customers, not a get rich quick scheme.

Service Made Best By Design.

Business is all about relationships and the service you deliver. We’ve learned that over our 100 year history. You won’t find any better customer experience in the industry. Helping you is our number one trait and the major reason we’ve survived all these years. For us, the best service starts with knowing your name. Simple yet uncommon in the paper business.

Our fine paper is priced right and delivered fast. We carry... 
High Quality Sheet Fed Grades
All Cut Sizes, Colors, Coated & Uncoated Papers
Gloss and Silk, Opaque, Coated Covers and Texts, C2s & C1s Board, Digital Grades, Business Imaging Products, Recycled Paper, Envelopes & Boards.

Name: Kefeli Packaging
Description:
Founded in 2000 under the leadership of Kazım KEFELİ, Kefeli Ambalaj initially started its operations in the İlkadım Industrial Site. The company strengthened its corporate identity in 2006, adopting the name Kefeli Oluklu Mukavva Ambalaj Sanayi Ticaret Limited Şirketi (Kefeli Corrugated Cardboard Packaging Industry Trade Limited Company).

By 2009, the firm significantly expanded its operational scope and objectives by relocating to the Samsun Organized Industrial Zone. A rapid acceleration into a leading position within the sector and the region followed in 2011 with the integration of printing machinery and in-house corrugated cardboard sheet manufacturing.

In 2018, Kefeli Ambalaj began operating in its new, technologically advanced factory, which was built to comply with modern production standards and equipped with state-of-the-art technology. This investment elevated the company to one of Turkey's most prominent packaging manufacturers. The firm subsequently maximized its production capabilities by adding a new-generation corrugated cardboard sheet production line, multi-color printing systems, and digital printing machinery to its equipment fleet.

Through strategic investment initiatives launched in 2022, the company successfully differentiated itself from competitors in terms of quality, service, and sustainable production. Notably, it integrated an Egg Carton (Viyol) production line into its manufacturing park. By utilizing its own internal resources for raw material, Kefeli Ambalaj achieved the distinction of becoming an "In-house Zero-Waste Factory" in Turkey.

Kefeli Ambalaj is committed to enhancing its brand value and delivering results-oriented solutions through its philosophy of Total Quality Management and Customer Focus, prioritizing continuous improvement systems.

If you are looking for the highest quality, innovative, and environmentally conscious packaging solutions for your business, you can contact Kefeli Ambalaj.

Name: Central Pulp & Paper Research Institute, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Government of India
Description:
Central Pulp & Paper Research Institute, a National level Institute was established in 1980 as an autonomous body under the administrative control of the Department of Industrial Policy & Promotion, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Govt. of India to promote R&D in the field of pulp & paper. The origin of CPPRI dates back to the year 1975 when the UNDP-GOI Project became operational. After the conclusion of the UNDP Project, the facilities thus created were utilized to fulfill the long-felt need for R&D needs of the Indian Pulp and Paper Industry. Thus after the approval of the Cabinet, Central Pulp & Paper Research Institute (CPPRI) came into existence in November 1980. Existing R&D facilities were continuously upgraded with the aid of Plan Funds received from the Government of India.

All affairs of CPPRI are managed by 18 membered Council of Association, comprising of representatives from Paper Industry, Department of Industrial Policy & Promotion  (DIPP), and Department. of Science & Technology (DST), Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR), Indian Council of Forestry Research & Education (ICFRE) and IIT Roorkee. The Secretary (DIPP), Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Govt. of India is the President of the Council of Association. The Council of Association performs various functions such as deciding the budget, approval of annual plan, purchase, and disposal of equipment, etc.

Planning & monitoring of research activities are looked after by the Research Advisory Committee (RAC). The committee is represented by Senior Executives from the Pulp & Paper Industry, Associations, Research Organizations, and the Ministry of Commerce and Industry.

Name: CANAPA PAPER TECHNOLOGIES
Description:
Canapa Paper Technologies is a next-generation materials company specializing in high-performance, sustainable paper technologies designed to replace single-use plastics and improve efficiency across multiple industrial printing and packaging applications. With a strong foundation in material science, coating chemistry, and industrial paper engineering, Canapa develops fully recyclable, plastic-free solutions that meet the highest performance standards of modern production.

Canapa is also a well-established manufacturer of high-quality sublimation transfer papers, supplying reliable, color-accurate, and high-speed compatible solutions for digital textile printing worldwide. 

At the core of Canapa’s innovation portfolio stands DTPaper, a revolutionary paper-based alternative to PET films used in textile transfer printing. By eliminating plastic from the printing process, DTPaper enables a fully circular workflow while maintaining industrial efficiency, print quality, and scalability. This breakthrough positions Canapa at the forefront of sustainable transformation in digital textile printing.

Beyond printing, Canapa also delivers advanced barrier paper technologies for food packaging, offering PFAS-free, biodegradable, and recyclable solutions for water, oil, and oxygen resistance. These materials help global brands comply with environmental regulations while significantly reducing plastic waste and carbon emissions.

Driven by a vision of circular economy and responsible manufacturing, Canapa integrates innovation, sustainability, and commercial scalability into every solution it develops. Through active collaborations with international partners across Europe, the UK, and North America, Canapa continues to shape the future of advanced paper materials—where performance, circularity, and environmental responsibility coexist at industrial scale.

Name: Bedmax Ltd
Description:
Bedmax bedding products are purpose made to provide an ideal bedding for horses and ponies.

Established in 2000, we are today producing nearly three million bags of high quality shavings a year for sale through a UK-wide network of wholesalers and retailers, and for export to growing markets in Europe, Hong Kong and the Middle East.

In 2008 we were delighted to be granted a Royal Warrant by appointment to Her Majesty The Queen as a manufacturer of horse bedding, and very proud when this Royal Warrant was renewed in 2012.

In 2010 we introduced a smaller, lighter shavings option called Littlemax, and at the same time began to produce and market Hotmax - fuel logs made from the dust and particles we extract in the production of Bedmax and Littlemax.

Bedmax has become a market-leading brand - the first choice of bedding for many leading equine veterinary practices and equine hospitals, racing trainers, racecourses and major international equestrian events. In market surveys carried out late in 2011 by the UK's leading equestrian magazine, Horse & Hound, and the British Equestrian Trade Association, Bedmax also emerged as the most popular brand of purpose-made bedding amongst the many thousands of people in the UK who keep, ride and compete their horses simply for the love of it.

The company has significant potential for further growth in the UK and a secure foundation to take advantage of the opportunity to expand in international markets.

TFPA represents all elements of the value chain from the sustainable harvesting of plantations and multiple use natural forest resource including forest establishment and management, harvesting and haulage, processing of timber resources and manufacture of pulp, paper and bio-products.

TFPA is a policy development, lobbying and advocacy organisation for our members interests.  We collaborate strongly with other industry bodies to ensure the best outcomes for the industry generally and our members more specifically.  

Our charter provides autonomy to manage State issues and we cooperate with AFPA on any issue that transcends state borders and has National implications.

TFPA have established a sub-committee structure to ensure the range of issues affecting the industry in Tasmania are actively managed and that the workload is shared across the membership.

Description:
SOBRE A FOREST2MARKET DO BRASIL
A Forest2Market do Brasil tem alavancado a experiência de seus cloaboradores, especialistas brasileiros reconhecidos na cadeia de suprimento florestal, e tem adaptado o processo de benchmark de sua empresa matriz – a Forest2Market – para a indústria brasileira de produtos florestais.

Forest2Market do Brasil Modelo de Negócios
Nossa visão: A única forma de alcançar a verdadeira compreensão do mercado é por meio da coleta de dados reais de transações.

Um Modelo de Negócios Exponencialmente Melhor: Dados reais fundamentam todos os nossos produtos e serviços.

Porque os dados de transação são tão importantes? É foi comprovado que mecanismos de preço baseados em pesquisas não são confiáveis, eles injetam volatilidade artificial nos mercados e enfraquecem a confiança dos tomadores de decisão. Quando um relatório é baseado em informações de transação verdadeiras (contratos de vendas de madeira, notas fiscais, etc.), sua utilidade se torna maior: ele reflete o verdadeiro preço de mercado, reduz a volatilidade com o passar do tempo e eleva a confiança com a qual os tomadores de decisão podem desempenhar suas funções.
