Star Paper Mills Limited established in 1938, is an integrated Pulp and Paper Mill. Starting with 6000 MT/annum, it has come a long way and produced of 72000 MT in 2008-09. It produces a wide range of Industrial, Packaging and Cultural Papers catering to almost all segments of the Consumers. Star has a distribution network throughout the Country. The company is a part of Duncan Goenka Group.
The Mill located at Saharanpur, U.P., has 4 Paper Machines producing a wide Range of Products catering to different segments and meeting varied requirements of the customers.
Star Paper is an ISO 9001:2000 & ISO 14001:2004 Company.
Company has In-House R&D Unit recognised by Ministry of Science & Technology - Govt. of India.
Star has won several awards in the fields of Energy conservation, Safety and Environment Management.

Name: Jolly Paper Special
Description:
Fondata nel 1983, Jolly Paper S.p.A. è una società leader nella distribuzione di carta da stampa e materiali speciali. Situata a Rubano (PD) in un'area strategica di 10.000 mq, siamo rinomati per la nostra dedizione alla qualità e alla soddisfazione del cliente. Con le nostre avanzate macchine da taglio, offriamo un'ampia gamma di formati standard e personalizzati, garantendo soluzioni su misura per ogni esigenza.

Dal 2006, abbiamo ampliato le nostre capacità includendo il taglio di bobine in formati speciali, mantenendo un vasto magazzino e un'organizzazione logistica efficiente che assicura consegne rapide e puntuali. Il nostro stock è sempre fornito di milioni di fogli, pronti per la spedizione, senza mai compromettere gli standard quantitativi.

L'ultima innovazione del nostro assortimento è JOLLY BLACK 100, un cartoncino nero riciclato al 100% post-consumer e certificato Blue Angel. Ideale per chi cerca qualità superiore e sostenibilità, JOLLY BLACK 100 è disponibile in formati speciali e in piccole quantità, perfetto per progetti esclusivi e di lusso.

Mission: Fornire soluzioni di alta qualità nel settore della carta, con un forte impegno verso la sostenibilità ambientale e la soddisfazione del cliente.

Name: Plastic+Paper
Description: Plastic+Paper, home of the "MEGA" sheeters, supplies many different types of substrates for printing, packaging, signage and display manufacturing.  Conveniently located at 510 Applewood Cres., #1, Concord, Ontario, Canada, we serve customers throughout North America.

Name: White River Forest Products LP
Description:
White River Forest Products (WRFPL) is a private corporation that owns and operates a sawmill and Sustainable Forest License (SFL) located in Northwestern Ontario located at White River, Ontario.

WRFPL was conceived and founded by the Township of White River and the Pic Mobert First Nation who purchased the sawmill assets from Domtar.

WRFPL is a community based company that is owned by private investors, Pic Mobert First Nations and the White River Economic Development Corporation. 

WRFPL has commenced a multi-million dollar re-investment program and has restarted operations on October, 1, 2013. Direct employment at the mill for production, management and administration is approximately 140 positions.

WRFPL is working proactively to maximize hiring from the local communities and is also committed to supporting the Pic Mobert First Nation to establish a harvesting contract operation that will employ Pic Mobert band members and seed new enterprises based in the First Nation. Other harvest contractors will also supply wood to the company. A crew contracted through the Pic Mobert First Nation’s development corporation, White Lake Resources Corp., is on site providing support and employing people from White River and the Pic Mobert First Nation.

The White River sawmill complex is centrally located within the White River SFL area and is known for its ability to produce high quality lumber products from wood sourced from forests in the local and surrounding region. WRFPL’s objective is to produce approximately 150 million board feet of FSC certified Random Length, stud and value added products. 

For further information, please contact us at:
Melissa.jones@wrfp.ca

Name: Dev Priya Industries Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Welcome to the legacy of Dev Priya Group, a venerable name in the paper recycling industry with a rich history spanning more than 30 years. With six paper machines and two cutting-edge plastic recycling units, we manufacture a diverse range of packaging papers, including fluting, test liner, Recycled KLB, Duplex board, absorbent kraft & recycled plastic products.

Innovation Junction: Krafting premium recycled paper with over 3 decades of expertise. Where Technology meets Tradition  #SustainableKrafting

Dev Priya Industries Pvt. Ltd., a proud member of the Dev Priya Group, stands at the forefront of innovation and sustainability in paper and plastic recycling. As a family-run business, we prioritize values of integrity, dedication, and community stewardship. With an installed capacity of 200,000 tons of finished Kraft paper per year, we are committed to excellence in production while upholding our values and contributing positively to society and the environment.

The synergy among the three generations steering Dev Priya is both enormous and incomparable. Join us in celebrating a legacy built on dedication, innovation, and a profound commitment to sustainability. At Dev Priya, we don’t just recycle paper; we shape a sustainable future.

Name: Les Cartons Northrich inc.
Description: As the Canadian leader, we're dedicated to excellence, sustainability, and innovation. Our extensive product range, from edge protectors to sheets and tubes & cores, is designed for robust reliability.

Name: RVB
Description:
RVB est spécialisée dans la finition, le traitement et la protection de tous supports bois.
RVB a été fondée en 2013 par Murielle et Christian RIVIÈRE, puis reprise en 2021 par Fabien LOUART. Pour répondre à la demande croissante du bois dans les différents projets d’agencement de construction et d’ameublement, la société RVB s’est équipé ces dernières années de matériels industriels capables de lui apporter une capacité de production à la hauteur de la demande de ses clients.
Fort de son équipe de 6 vernisseurs et vernisseuses et de ses 1000 m² d’atelier, RVB saura répondre à vos besoins en vernis, teinte, laque, lasure, traitement, vernis intumescent, mais aussi de protection intérieure / extérieure de tous vos projets bois.  Que vous soyez menuisier, agenceur, ébéniste, artisan, négociant, architecte ou industriel, nous serons ravis de vous apporter notre savoir-faire artisanal et notre expertise.

Name: Namabar Mehr
Description:
Several years ago, we made the strategic decision to unite, leveraging our youthful workforce and technical expertise, with the aim of making significant strides in the thermal roll production sector. Our journey commenced in 1984 with the establishment of a city workshop dedicated to producing a variety of fax rolls. Through unwavering dedication and the incorporation of state-of-the-art global technologies, we have steadily advanced day by day.

Presently, Namabar Mehr company occupies a space surpassing 7,000 square meters and is supported by a team of over 150 committed and skilled personnel. It has evolved into the nation’s foremost thermal paper production unit, boasting an annual production capacity that exceeds 100,000,000 POS rolls and over 20,000,000 journal and customer receipt rolls.

Name: RMK

Forest administration and forest management are RMK’s largest areas of activity. RMK protects and guards state forests, plants and maintains new forests, organises forestry work and sells forest and timber.

RMK also has the duty to facilitate various recreational uses of forests. RMK establishes hiking trails, marks scenic recreational areas, and prepares camping sites and campfire places. RMK also builds forest huts for hikers and offers accommodation in holiday homes.

Name: Isoletri - Industria de Materiais Isolantes
Description:
Empresa fundada em 2004, a ISOLETRI converte materiais isolantes a base de celulose para isolação de transformadores, reatores e equipamentos elétricos para baixa, média e alta tensão.
          Contamos com uma fábrica de IKC, onde convertemos matéria prima como Fenolite, Madeira Densificada, Presspahn, entre outros materiais isolantes, em Kits para bobinas de Alta e Baixa tensão e Parte ativa. Nosso portfólio inclui Cilindros, varetas, calços axiais, calços radiais, enchimentos e anéis isolados, anéis com calço, mesas, anéis de prensagem, gotas, tira em T.
          Nossa filial é dedicada a produção de peças Moldadas a partir de chapa úmida de fabricação própria. Nosso portfólio contempla proteções de canto, capas, anéis, snouts e moldados especiais. Nosso processo de fabricação engloba moldados manuais, prensados e repuxados.
          Prontos para aproveitar todas as vantagens que a ISOLETRI oferece? Estamos prontos para ajudar, basta entrar em contato com vendas@isoletri.com ou ligue (11) 4961-6100.

Name: Kopparfors Skogar AB
Description:
Kopparfors Skogar är en av Sveriges större privata markägare. Vi producerar skogsråvara och upplåter mark och vatten till jakt och fiske. Kopparfors Skogar stöttar omställningen till ökad andel förnybar energi genom produktion av biobränsle från skog och utveckling av vindkraft.

Kopparfors Skogar AB bildades 2018 i samband med omstruktureringen av Bergvik Skog AB och  är ett helägt dotterbolag till FAM AB.

I Mellansverige äger Kopparfors Skogar drygt 283 000 hektar, varav knappt 230 000 hektar är produktiv skogsmark. Den årliga avverkningsvolymen ligger på ungefär 700 000 m³fub.

Kopparfors Skogar stöttar omställningen till ökad andel förnybar energi genom att bidra aktivt i utvecklingen av nya vindkraftsparker och arrendera ut mark för vindkraftverk. Idag finns 145 verk på bolagets mark.

Kopparfors Skogar arrenderar även ut mark och vatten för bland annat jakt och fiske. Bolaget hanterar ungefär 2 400 avtalade nyttjanderätter på markinnehavet.

Koncernen har totalt 23 anställda, varav drygt hälften är stationerade på huvudkontoret i Falun och resterade på något av våra tre lokalkontor i anslutning till markinnehavet.

Name: Softex Paper
Description: For over thirty-five years, Softex Paper has provided quality hygienic paper products to residential, commercial and institutional customers in the US and the Caribbean.  Headquartered in Willemstad, Curaçao, we also have plants in Aruba, Puerto Rico, Florida and South Carolina.  While our brands include Beginnings paper towel and bathroom tissue, NOKY bathroom tissue, Swave luncheon napkins, and EverDry paper towels, we specialize in the production and distribution of private label paper products.

Name: APPTA
Description:
A professional non-profit making organisation with the objective of knowledge sharing, networking and sustainability. 
APPTA network comprises of more than 600 alumni from Pulp and Paper Technology Course (BASc), Karnatak University, Dandeli, India. The course has been operational since 1978 and the alumni are working in responsible positions across global paper and allied industries. 
APPTA's vision is to create a greener planet by judicious use of bio degradable, highly sustainable paper and board. 
APPTA will focus on further strengthening this global network of alumni for mutual benefits of all involved and overall industry sustainability. Examples include periodic Webinars, professional groups for knowledge sharing and troubleshooting, sharing industry trends, industry job openings, financial assistance for deserving students, mentoring the new generation, etc.

Name: Green Rock Middle East & Asia Pacific
Description:
At Green Rock Group, we specialize in sustainable packaging solutions. Our mission is to reshape the disposable packaging landscape with certified plastic-free paper cups, lids, and straws that are safe, functional, and aligned with global sustainability goals.

Serving B2B and B2C clients across the Middle East and Asia Pacific, we partner with:

- Cafés, Restaurants, and Fast Food Chains

- Hotels, Resorts, and Hospitality Groups

- Supermarkets and Eco-Retailers

- Event Planners and Catering Services

- Distributors of eco-conscious packaging

Our solutions are designed to meet the increasing demand for food-safe, PFAS-free, and regulation-compliant alternatives to traditional plastic-lined packaging. Whether it's a single wall or double wall cup, lid or straw, our packaging is built with the environment in mind with fully compostable, recyclable, and engineered for a circular economy.

At Green Rock, we don’t just manufacture cups, we lead a movement toward a cleaner, plastic-free future.

Sustainability. Safety. Innovation.
Let’s create an impact together.

Name: Sterling Distribution
Description:
Sterling Distribution is an independently-owned wholesale distributor of fine printing papers, office products, packaging supplies, industrial supplies and janitorial products. Produzimos papeis especiais reciclados sob demanda para as mais diversas finalidades que atende um amplo e crescente mercado. Nosso produto atende os seguimentos gráficos, caderneiros, alimentício, automotivo como os exemplos abaixo:

Agenda

Linha automotiva
Está nas suas mãos, na sua casa, em seu escritório, no seu trabalho… Faz parte do seu dia a dia!

Em 1965, o destino levou Fritz Faller até a cidade de Rio do Campo, onde ele conheceu uma fábrica de pasta em ruínas. Fritz gostava de trabalhar com máquinas, mas, como não tinha nenhum conhecimento sobre pasta, acabou não se interessando muito pela fábrica. Apesar disso, ele sabia da necessidade e importância da pasta mecânica, ou papel, no mercado, algo que seu falecido pai já falava havia vinte anos.

Fritz voltou a analisar a fábrica em detalhes, e observou uma bela fonte hidráulica, convertida por uma turbina, ou, rebolo desfibrador. Ele disse: “A parte mais importante está aqui”.

Foi então que resolveu conversar com seus irmãos e sócios, Willy e Reinwald Falle. Os dois concordaram com a ideia de assumir a instalação, desde que Fritz fosse morar em Rio do Campo e cuidasse da fábrica.

Assim, em 1 de novembro de 1965, a INDUSTRIAL E AGRÍCOLA RIO VERDE se formava.

Name: Shreyans Group: Shreyans Industries Limited
Description: An agro based writing & printing manufacturing company situated in Punjab. The company has two units, namely Shreyans Papers and Rishab Papers at Ahmedgarh and Ropar respectively.

Name: Banks Hardwoods, Inc.
Description:
From our modest beginnings in 1985 as a direct wholesaler, we’ve grown to become a valued supplier to some of the most discerning buyers in the hardwood lumber industry today. From our state-of-the-art concentration yards located in the heart of the Great Lakes producing region, we offer the most consistent, color-sensitive Northern hardwoods available on the market. Everything we sell is graded carefully after hit-or-miss surfacing for color and yield. While the NHLA rules remain the foundation for our grading process, we've developed almost as many custom grades as we have customers. Whether it’s a special grade mix or a critical color sort, we’re willing to custom-tailor grading programs to accurately meet your needs. 

Headquartered in White Pigeon, Michigan with an additional facility in Menomonie, Wisconsin, Banks Hardwoods is strategically located for quick and economical transportation on both a regional and national level. We serve a wide range of customers from coast-to-coast and internationally.

As extensive as our capabilities are, we know there’s more to our business than wood, equipment and facilities—it’s our people and their dedication. “Quality Everything” is our company motto and the name of our TQM program at Banks. We pride ourselves on our commitment to high quality and friendly, professional customer service.

Name: Seneca
Description:
Seneca started as a small sawmill operation founded by Aaron Jones in 1953 in Eugene.  Today, daughters Becky, Kathy and Jody continue the legacy of leadership and innovation in the wood products industry, overseeing a family of companies consisting of: 

Timberlands – we have about 167,000 acres that we manage sustainably.  We have 92% more timber on that land than we had 25 years ago. In 2019 we planted our 40 millionth tree.  If those seedlings were laid end-to-end, they would cross America 5 ½ times.

Sawmills – some of the most innovative in the country. 

Biomass plant – we take the scraps from our milling process, as well as some of the slash that would otherwise have been left on a landing after a harvest, and we use it to fuel our biomass plant that creates enough green sustainable energy to power 13,000 homes.  It is the cleanest running biomass plant in America.  The byproduct from the biomass plant is ash, and since all of the fuel going into the plant is organic, the ash is certified organic, and we market it to farmers here in the Willamette Valley to get tilled back into the soil annually in August and September.  

Sustainability is a core value of our multi-generational family business and it is woven throughout all of the Seneca companies.  We plan for generations.  Generations of trees and generations of family. 

We employ about 475 people.  We consider them all part of our Seneca Family.

Name: CLUSTER DEL PAPEL DE EUSKADI
Description:
Somos una asociación sin ánimo de lucro fundada en 1998, integrada por las principales organizaciones de la cadena de valor del papel y cartón de Euskadi.
Abarcamos desde el área forestal hasta la manipulación y transformación del papel y cartón pasando por ingenierías, fabricantes de equipos auxiliares, bienes de equipo, consumibles, …
Nuestra Misión es contribuir a la competitividad y transformación del sector papelero vasco, así como a la mejora de su imagen a través de la cooperación, el trabajo en red y el aprovechamiento de sinergias.
Queremos ser reconocidos como una organización de referencia, tanto del País Vasco como fuera de él, para el impulso de la transformación del sector papelero vasco, así como para su sostenibilidad medioambiental y para la mejora de su imagen como sector innovador, generador de riqueza y ejemplo de bioeconomía circular.
Los valores de las empresas asociadas son 1. su disposición y capacidad de trabajar en equipo para lograr un bien común, 2. su dinamismo y predisposición a emprender acciones de mejora, 3. su orientación al logro, 4. su orientación al aprendizaje, 5 y su resistencia activa ante las dificultades.

Name: Carbon Balanced Paper
Description:
Carbon Balanced Paper is a simple way for organisations to reduce the carbon impacts of their printed communications, reducing their carbon footprint and impacts on climate change.

Organisations can then use the highly recognisable World Land Trust logo on their print, to communicate your support and Corporate Responsibility. The total amount of CO2 Balanced and land area preserved is quantified in a unique certificate, which an organisation can use in its environmental reporting and marketing.

Name: TreeZero Paper LLC.
Description:
TreeZero is making a positive impact on the environment now and for future generations by offering tree free alternate fiber-based paper. TreeZero is the only 100% tree free, carbon neutral multipurpose paper made entirely from recycled sugarcane. 

No wood or wood-based fibers are used in our products.  Made entirely from recycled sugarcane waste, an RRF (Rapidly Renewal Fiber). TreeZero Paper qualifies for LEEDS and Star's credits and is carbon neutral.

Name: Elite Professional México
Description: Elite Professional es parte de CMPC, grupo chileno pionero en la fabricación de celulosa y papel. CMPC es una de las empresas líderes de Latinoamérica en la producción y comercialización de productos forestales, celulosa, papeles, productos tissue y productos de papel. Sus productos se comercializan en 55 países a más de 20 mil clientes.

Name: Chaleur Forest Products - A subsidiary of Interfor
Description:
Chaleur Forest Products is the result of the consolidation of two established forest products companies.

Chaleur Sawmills was the result of a dream and the work of four local entrepreneurs, who along with a group of dedicated employees, built the company from its inception.

The construction of the Belledune sawmill started in September 1994 and the operations were inaugurated in February 1995. At that time, the sawmill consisted of one line, which was primarily manual.  The Bathurst sawmill was first opened in the mid 1970s.

Today we have  completely automated lines, producing over 300 million board feet per year.

The logs used as raw material come from both private wood lots and crown land. We maximize the return on professionally harvested the following  spruce, fir and jack pine. The logs arrive by truck, mostly from New Brunswick, but also from outside of New Brunswick.

Our lumber is marketed throughout North America, with the majority destined for the US Eastern Seaboard, by rail, and distributed by truck to the New England States and Canada.

Chaleur Forest Products  employs over 400 people across our sites.

Name: EmbaPack Indústria Gráfica de Embalagens
Description:
A EmbaPack trabalha baseada em parcerias. Construir um sólido relacionamento entre clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores faz parte da nossa estratégia.

Produzir qualidade com preços competitivos e agilidade, só na EmbaPack.

Name: Retek A.Ş.
Description:
Ülkemizin kağıt karton sektöründe faaliyet gösteren en büyük özel kuruluşlarından olan Retek AŞ , 1989 yılında yönetim kurulu başkanımız Polat Güven tarafından Nazillide kurulmuştur. Selüloz, RTC üretimiyle sektöre adım atan Retek AŞ. tamamen doğaya dost, Çevre Bakanlığından onaylı ve sürekli iletişim halinde olan örnek bir kuruluştur. %100 atık kağıt kullanan firma gri karton ve mukavva üretmekte ve bu şekilde ekonomiye büyük bir katkı sağlamaktadır .

2002 yılında gri karton üretimine başlayan Retek sektördeki çoğu firmadan daha önce bu sektöre adım atmıştır. Son teknoloji makineler kullanarak üretimini gerçekleştiren firmamız; yenilikçi ve yeniliklere açık, inovasyon sürekliliği olan bir firmadır. Yapılan kalite ve kapasite revizyonları neticesinde müşteri memnuniyetine önem vermektedir. Gri karton üretimindeki başarısını mukavva sektöründe de göstermeyi amaçlayan firmamız 2016 yılında Retek Mukavva Fabrikasını kurmuştur. Kağıt sektöründe dünyanın en gelişmiş teknolojisine sahip firmalarından biridir. Gelişmiş üretim teknolojisi ve otomasyon sistemiyle yılda 40.000.000 kg gri karton ve 20.000.000 kg mukavva üretme kapasitesine sahiptir .

Name: Celucat / Maittra Envelopes
Description:
CELUCAT / MAITTRA Envelopes, presente no mercado há mais de 40 anos, é sinônimo de envelopes de qualidade.

Maior unidade fabril de envelopes da América Latina destinada a produção de envelopes personalizados, de auto-atendimento e padronizados, tendo sua sede em Americana, SP.

Quem somos:

Fundada em 01 de Julho de 1993 a empresa Maittra Industria e Comércio de Artefatos de Papel S/A, inicialmente era denominada Mercurs Industria e Comércio de Papel Ltda.

A Maittra cresceu gradativamente acompanhando o desenvolvimento do mercado, até que em 14 de Outubro de 2004 foi constituída a empresa Hallamo Artefactos de Papel Ltda com o objetivo de adquirir a Unidade de Fabricação de Envelopes da empresa Klabin S/A, então sediada em Lages / SC.

Com a aquisição dos equipamentos juntamente com a marca Celucat, criou-se o Grupo Econômico CELUCAT, formado pelas empresas Maittra e Hallamo, constituindo assim a maior unidade fabril de envelopes da América Latina destinada a produção de envelopes personalizados, de auto-atendimento e padronizados, tendo sua sede em Americana, SP.

A partir deste evento, a marca CELUCAT, presente no mercado há mais de 40 anos, se consolidou como sinônimo de envelopes de qualidade.

Qualidade, pontualidade e o respeito pelo cliente: nosso orgulho, nossa filosofia.

O crescimento da nossa estrutura e equipe corresponde ao crescimento da nossa produção: somos capazes de produzir mais de 180 milhões de envelopes por mês, consolidando a posição de líder no mercado da América Latina no segmento de envelopes personalizados. 

Faça como as melhores empresas já fazem: deixe a Celucat cuidar dos seus envelopes.

Name: Kretz Lumber Co., Inc.
Description:
We exist so everyone has a high quality, American hardwood lumber supplier at their fingertips. Our dedication to delivering the best premium, and most sustainably managed wood products in the world, drives everything we do. We rigorously inspect and analyze every piece of lumber we sell to ensure it meets our expectations and exceeds yours. All wood consumers benefit from our high-quality lumber.

Kretz Lumber Co., Inc. has called northern Wisconsin home for the past 90 years. We live, work, and play in some of the most pristine hardwood forests the Midwest offers. Our process starts in the forest where our foresters wisely choose what trees need to be harvested. Those logs are moved to our sawmill to get processed into lumber. That lumber is dried in one of our 16 dry kilns and then surfaced, ripped, and/or sanded to order.

We focus on American Hardwoods. We do this to ensure the product you receive originates from a sustainable resource. To us, a sustainable resource is one that bonds better water quality, cleaner air, high-quality wildlife habitat, and better living conditions for human life. As far as our level of expertise, this can only be done by concentrating on American Hardwoods.

From our humble logging roots of yesterday to our national shipping distribution network today, Kretz Lumber is firmly committed to providing woodworkers access to superior lumber and fast, helpful, service. We look forward to serving you now and for years to come.

Name: Two Sides Nordics
Description: We are an initiative by companies from the graphic communications supply chain including forestry, pulp, paper, inks and chemicals, pre-press, press, finishing, publishing, printing, envelopes and postal operators. Our common goal is to promote the sustainability of the graphic communications supply chain and dispel common environmental misconceptions by providing users with verifiable information on why print and paper is an attractive, practical and sustainable communications medium.

Name: ABZ der Österreichischen Papierindustrie
Description:
Das Ausbildungszentrum in Steyrermühl ist eine Privatschule der  Österreichischen Papierindustrie, deren Träger der Schulverein der Austropapier ist. 
Für die Ausbildung zum Werkmeister/Industriemeister der Papiertechnik besitzt die Schule als „berufsbildende mittlere Schule“ das Öffentlichkeitsrecht.

Professionelles Lehren und Lernen

Entscheidende Faktoren für die erfolgreiche Ausbildungskonzepte im ABZ Steyrermühl sind einerseits das mit der Industrie abgestimmte, bedarfsgerechte Angebot, andererseits  der unabdingbare Wissenstransfer, der durch die Industrie in das Ausbildungszentrum und retour in die Betriebe stattfindet.

ABZ-interne Lehrkräfte mit Industrieerfahrung und Gastlektoren und -vortragende aus der internationalen Industrie gewährleisten topaktuellen und praxisorientierten Unterricht auf dem aktuellen Stand der Technik, vermittelt mit modernsten Methoden und Werkzeugen in Form von „Blended Learning“.

Name: SciTech-Service Oy Ltd.
Description:
SciTech-Service is a boutique development consultancy in lignocellulosic biomass utilization. We have performed independent R&D services directly to industrial customers for 40 years.

SciTech provides raw material fractionation and separation testing as well as testing of pulp for regenerated cellulose (rayon) manufacturing. We can produce fully bleached pulp or finished viscose samples to the customer. Our lab can perform alternative production processes (kraft and organosolv pulping, hydrolysis and lignin separation) and we have experience from wood and non-wood. We have a track record of developing new technology such as SuperBatch and FreeFiber pulping processes.

We operate globally. We are flexible and deliver results promptly and reliably.

Name: PAPECO
Description:
Membre de la Convention des Entreprises pour le Climat (CEC)

PAPECO, est une PME familiale dont 100% du capital est détenu par les salariés .  Le premier site de production papetière datant de 1925. 
Papeco fabrique et transforme du papier d'essuyage de ouate de cellulose à partir du recyclage de papiers de bureau récupérés uniquement dans la région ouest de la France afin de réduire les transports et les émissions de CO².  

Le recyclage se fait sans désencrage se qui permet de limiter l’utilisation de produits chimiques.  

Papeco est une entreprise citoyenne et responsable avec plus de 75% de ses achats globaux effectués auprès de PME françaises. Seuls 3% des achats sont effectués hors Europe. 98% de la valeur finale des produits est française. 

Très engagé dans la réduction de son empreinte environnementale avec le but d’être autonome en énergie et neutre en émission CO² sous 10 ans.

L' objectif est de minimiser  à chaque étape du processus de production son impact environnemental .
Prendre toujours la solution la plus responsable pour l’environnement et la société ( sens large) 


L’entreprise  certifiée ISO 14001 et ISO 50001, possède la plus large gamme écolabel  et origine France garantie de France.

PAPECO est à ce jour l’unique et dernier papetier à capitaux 100% français dans l'essuyage à base de ouate de cellulose recyclée

Name: Kagitkarton.com - Use it and be one step ahead.
Description:
Welcome to Turkey’s first and only platform where current paper and cartonboard needs instantly reach hundreds of suppliers and where willing suppliers share their stock lists.
Kagitkarton.com was created because of the market need observed as a result of many years of sector experience. The aim here is to bring together the suppliers who cannot deliver the stock list to every buyer, and the buyers who want to obtain the paper or cartonboard suitable for their needs as soon as possible. The inquiries which the system receives, automatically sent to the suppliers by mails and private messages after our eliminations. The suppliers will just need to contact us to learn the name of the buyer if their stock is available and to manage the sales process independently from us. The entire process proceeds within the scope of the companies confidentiality policy until the moment of sale and finalize in max. 1 day.
Also please notice the new pages for 2nd hand machines and CV sharings.
Discover the sectoral CV's. 
Meet the paper & cardboard and second-hand machinery sellers & buyers.

Name: Thompson Appalachian Hardwoods
Description:
Manufacturing the highest-quality Appalachian hardwood products, creating superior value, and providing consistency in products and service
for our customers since 1993.

Name: Scanpole
Description:
Scanpole is one of the leading pole producers in Europe. The brand combines the strengths of two forerunner companies: Burt Boulton & Haywood Ltd – the longest established timber preservation company in the world and Iivari Mononen Oy – a Finnish family business globally known for high quality poles from Scandinavian pine forests.

Scanpole products are sold worldwide, with the main export areas being the Middle East, Northern Africa, and Western Europe. Production plants are situated in Finland, UK and Norway. In addition, Scanpole has a sales company in Sweden.

Scanpole is a part of the Iivari Mononen Group. The other members of the family company are PrimaTimber Oy (impregnated sawn and planed timber products) and Exsane Oy (service operations).

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Scanpole kuuluu Euroopan johtavien pylväsyhtiöiden joukkoon. Pitkät perinteet omaavan pylvästuotannon tuotevalikoimaan kuuluvat sähkö-, tele- ja valaisinpylväät sekä ratapölkyt. Markkina-alueena on koko maailma, tärkeimpinä vientialueina Lähi-Itä, Pohjois-Afrikka ja Länsi-Eurooppa.

Scanpolen tuotantolaitokset sijaitsevat Suomessa Höljäkässä, jossa toiminnasta vastaa Scanpole Oy sekä Norjassa Ilsengissä, jossa toiminnasta vastaa ScanPole As. Iso-Britannian pylväsmarkkinoilla asiakkaita palvelee myyntiyhtiö ScanPole Ltd, Ruotsissa myynnistä vastaa ScanPole Ab.

Scanpole on osa perheomisteista Iivari Mononen -konsernia. Konserniin kuuluvat myös maatalous- ja piharakentamiseen soveltuvia kestopuutuotteita valmistava PrimaTimber Oy sekä sähkönjakelu-, tele- ja valaistusverkkoihin liittyviä palveluja Suomessa tarjoava Exsane Oy.

Name: KM PAPER
Description: Km papers limited is a young company registered in 2015 with corporate office based in rudrapur.  km paper currently  has the annual installed capacity of 55000 Mt & upgrades for increasing the capacity & improving the quality are in process.

Name: Papelera Alfa
Description:
Papelera Alfa es una de las mayores comercializadoras de papel en el Perú. Desde su fundación en el año 2000, la empresa se ha dedicado a la importación y comercialización de diferentes papeles orientados a la industria gráfica, ofreciendo un servicio de calidad dirigido a su creciente cartera de clientes. La Empresa cuenta con un equipo de profesionales jóvenes y con experiencia, cuya prioridad es prestar un servicio de calidad y eficiente que cumpla con las exigentes necesidades de sus clientes.

En el año 2012 la empresa se fusiona con el grupo de empresas Dimar, ampliando su oferta de productos, operaciones y servicios.
En el año 2018, Papelera Alfa se traslada a unas modernas instalaciones emplazadas en una superficie de 4.300 m2, incluyendo almacenes y oficinas. Esta infraestructura apoya la comercialización de más de 13 mil toneladas anuales a una cartera de 400 clientes activos. Ubicados en el distrito de Lima, Papelera Alfa tiene cobertura en todo el país y capacidad para hacer despachos a lo largo y ancho de todo el Perú.
Papelera Alfa es parte de las empresas Dimar, cuya sede principal está en Santiago de Chile. Desde Perú, Dimar espera proyectarse hacia otros países en Sudamérica y la región del Pacífico.

Name: Simpson Lumber Company
Description: Simpson Lumber Company

Name: Agaprint
Ecopulpack S.A.S.
Description:
Ecopulpack es una compañía 100% colombiana que lleva más de 19 años en el mercado desarrollando productos de alta calidad en pulpa de papel, tales como bandejas para huevos, portavasos y soluciones de embalaje biodegradables, siendo líder en el diseño, producción y comercialización de empaques de fibra moldeada, e incursionando ahora en nuevos mercados con una nueva línea de producción en papel kraft. Es así como cumple con una misión clara basada en nuevas tecnologías y en procesos altamente eficientes que generen valor para sus clientes.

En sus líneas de producción, Ecopulpack recircula el agua del proceso, generando así un impacto positivo que engancha a esta compañía a la gestión del ciclo de vida, pensando siempre en las generaciones actuales y las futuras.

Ecopulpack cuenta con un recurso humano calificado y con experiencia en sus diferentes áreas de Producción, Administración e Innovación e Investigación.

Name: CelluXtreme
Description: CelluXtreme has a unique technology for spinning strong continuous fibres from 100% cellulose. The fibres can be used as a single component or combined with a polymer matrix to form a composite. The CelluXtreme fibre represents a unique and new material concept that is bio-based/renewable and can be produced in a water-based process using green chemistry principles.

Name: McFarlen Engineering Ltd.
Description: McFarlen Engineering Ltd. supplies equipment, spare parts and filter media to service pulp and paper, mining, steel, coal, municipal water and waste, chemical, and food processing industries throughout North America. With over thirty years of experience and state-of-the-art technology, the company specializes in gravity and pressure filtration type Recausticizing Systems. McFarlen Engineering Ltd. provides engineering studies, process analysis, seminars, trouble-shooting, equipment inspection, maintenance supervision, mechanical checkout, and start up assistance. McFarlen Engineering’s services include redesign and modification of existing equipment for adaptation to special process conditions and extended service life.

Description:

Fundada en la ciudad de Cali en el año 1946 por el Sr. Gordon Ashe. Con una larga trayectoria en la comercialización y conversión de papeles y cartones.

Contamos con agencia en Cali, Bogotá, Medellín, Bucaramanga y  Punto de venta en Pereira. Realizamos envíos a diferentes ciudades del país.

Name: Neimax
Description:
Bavimo se proizvodnjom valovitog kartona i kartonske ambalaze od valovitog kartona. Mjesečno utovaramo 150 slepera kartona i kutija, te izvozimo 40% proizvodnje u ex-Yu zemlje. 
U mogucnosti smo proizvesti kartonske kutije s stampom u tri boje i svih modela po FEFCO katalogu.

Name: Horizon Paper Co., Inc.
Description:
Horizon Paper was founded in 1978. From the start, we dedicated ourselves to the principle of representing both the paper mills and customers in a fair and equitable manner. Our primary goal has been to deliver value and savings by sourcing or developing the highest quality products that meet our clients’ needs.

Our sales personnel are professionals in their field having backgrounds in paper manufacturing, printing or both. As such, we are able to offer many value-added services at no additional cost including: inventory management; consumption analysis and reporting, print contract analysis; expert knowledge of paper price trends; proactive price strategy and more. Our model continually evolves to meet our customer’s needs.

Horizon personnel bring experience, integrity, and vision. Many of our clients have been with us since our inception. Our reputation is our most important asset.

.

Name: Valadié Emballages et PLV
Description:
Valadié Emballages et PLV, forte de son expérience dans la transformation du carton ondulé depuis plus de 90 ans, évolue autour de deux principaux secteurs : le packaging et la PLV grâce à un parc machine complet orienté petites et moyennes séries. 
 Acteur reconnu sur le Grand Ouest grâce à une force commerciale terrain et le développement de solutions adaptées aux besoins et aux attentes de ses clients. Valadié s’appuie sur différents moyens d’impressions tels que la flexographie, la sérigraphie et dernièrement, l’impression numérique.
Cette dernière technologie permet à Valadié Emballages et PLV de renforcer sa réactivité et accroître son savoir-faire dans l’impression haute définition et la personnalisation.

Name: Artoz Papier AG
Description: Seit 1979 widmet sich das Schweizer Unternehmen Artoz, Villmergen(AG), mit Leidenschaft ihrem Papier-/ Kreativ-Bastelsortiment und entwickelt innovative Geschenkideen . Das Sortiment erlaubt es sowohl im privaten als auch im geschäftlichen Gebrauch, sich persönlich, individuell sowie emotional auszudrücken.

Name: Bro-Tex, Inc.
Description:
Women Owned company in St. Paul which manufactures and distributes wiping and absorbing products: non-woven wipers, paper towels, cloth rags, specialty wipers, and sorbent products.

We offer over 25 different types of paper / non-woven wipers which are converted into Stack Pack flat sheets, Quarter fold, Dispense Pro pop-up boxes and Center Flo roll packaging options.  We also offer over 30 types of new and reclaimed cloth wipers and towels.

In addition to the nonwoven wipers we convert, we also offer a wide selection of specialty wipes including Micro Fiber towels, Hermitex, Orange Peels Hand and Tool wet wipes, and Fresh Start wet wipes (disinfecting, cleansing, and sanitizing options). 

We offer contract converting and custom packaging as part of our private label program.

Name: Intelligent Company
Description: Intelligent company based on its board background (three generations experience in wood industries as well as Thermally modified wood Manufacturer pioneers), was established in Finland and is active in wood industry such as cutting & planing processes, thermo treated & impregnating and painting as well as exporting to different countries.

Name: Tela GmbH
Description:
Wir sind Tela, ein Unternehmen in Familienhand. Seit über 50 Jahren produzieren wir hochwertige Hygienepapiere, die dank hochmoderner Technologie und stetiger Innovation immer den sich ändernden Bedürfnissen der Menschen und Märkte angepasst werden. Mit unserer eigenen Abwasserreinigungs- und Altpapieraufbereitungsanlage waren wir seit den Anfängen eine Pionierin der Nachhaltigkeit und legen auch heute noch größten Wert auf Ökologie und Umweltbewusstsein.

Über 200 hoch motivierte, fachkundige Mitarbeitende stellen im bernischen Niederbipp, unter anderem mit der Schweizer Traditionsmarke Tela, die Versorgung unserer regionalen und internationalen Kunden sicher. Als familiengeführtes Unternehmen ergänzt Tela seit 2021 als Partnerin einen seit gut 40 Jahren bestehenden Verbund von Hygienepapierfabriken in der Schweiz, Deutschland und Polen.

Erstklassige Hygienepapiere, Swiss Made.

Name: Global BP Solutions LLC
Description:
ART is the holding company of a manufacturing group of businesses in Zimbabwe with distribution operations in Malawi, Zambia, Zimbabwe and South Africa.  ART was incorporated as Beachmont Trading Limited in the British Virgin Islands in 1997 and changed its name to ART in 2001 by way of a special resolution of shareholders.  On 30 September 2001, ART acquired TZI’s interests in its wholly owned subsidiaries Art Investments (Mauritius) Limited and Chloride Central Africa.

Art Corporation was incorporated in 1912 and is one of the largest industrial companies in Zimbabwe involved in paper manufacturing, paper converting and distribution, pen manufacturing and lead-acid battery manufacturing and distribution, employing over 1,800 people.  Distribution businesses are operated in Malawi, Zambia, Zimbabwe and South Africa.

A substantial amount of ART’s products are distributed to Zambia, Malawi and South Africa through its regional businesses of Regional Stationery and Battery Express.  The Group has established trade links with Mozambique, Namibia and Botswana, and is making in-roads in Angola, the Democratic Republic of Congo and Kenya.

VISION

To be a blue chip conglomerate commanding regional presence and market leadership.

Name: Rotolificio Bergamasco
Description: Da oltre 40 anni, trasformiamo carta in rotoli destinati a molteplici utilizzi per soddisfare ogni esigenza tecnologica e di personalizzazione.

Description:

Nossa equipe de funcionários é constantemente treinada, podendo assim operar todos os processos de forma positiva, segura e otimizada, garantindo alta produção e eficiência dos processos.

Name: POLCOAT
Description:
POLCOAT is a team of industry experts with decades of experience in coating, laminating, and converting technologies. 
We specialize in the production of release liners and self-adhesive materials including:

- Linerless 
- Silicone-coated papers and films
- Self-adhesive materials: INKJET, TYRE, KRAFT and more

Our solutions are optimized for various printing and converting processes and are used in demanding sectors such as logistics, automotive, food, and personal care. 

With advanced coating lines, precision slitting, and in-house laboratory testing (FINAT standards), we ensure consistent quality, custom performance parameters, and technical support at every stage.

Name: Moba Eurotubi
Description:
From more than 50 years, Moba Eurotubi is one of the leading company in the manufacturing of spiral and convolute paper tubes and cores, for converting and
packaging applications.
The tubes are manufactured by using regenerated - recovered coreboard in gray and kraft grades. In one year, the company uses around 62,000 tons of paper. The product range is mainly divided into standard reinforced and high-strength tubes (spiral / convolute tubes, rectangular / square section tubes, edge protectors, cardboard pallets) and special tubes (coreboard tubes with special covering papers, high thickness tubes, tubes with double-side adhesive, tubes with longitudinal cutting, etc.).
Moba Eurotubi is capable to supply all the industrial sectors which use paper tubes and cores for packaging and winding. Especially sectors like: PLASTIC FILMS, PAPER MILLS, TEXTILE / NON WOVEN, TAPES/ ADHESIVE LABELS, METALS, PACKAGING / PROTECTIVE and many other SPECIALTIES.

Name: Protisa Europa
Description:
Protisa es una Compañía de producción de papel doméstico, industrial y sanitario a partir de papel cien por cien reciclado mediante la recogida de papel desechable y de la manipulación de celulosa. Su papel, fabricado en distintos formatos, está destinado al ámbito doméstico y al sector Horeca o industrial.

Compromiso medioambiental: Comprometida con la sostenibilidad del planeta y la defensa del Medioambiente, PROTISA tiene entre sus principales líneas de actuación, la toma de conciencia por parte de la población para incrementar el consumo de papel reciclado.

Ecología de vida: Su visión empresarial favorece la economía circular y proporciona beneficios económicos, sociales y medioambientales, mejorando la calidad de vida de las personas, del planeta y la competitividad de la economía en conjunto.
Location: Sta. Cruz de Tenerife, Islas Canarias, España

Name: Hamelers Palletten
Description: Welkom bij Hamelers Palletten, gevestigd op Slakweidestraat 33 A in Maasmechelen, België. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in de aankoop, verkoop en reparatie van een breed scala aan palletten. Met een toegewijd team streven we ernaar om hoogwaardige palletten te leveren die voldoen aan de behoeften van onze klanten. Of het nu gaat om standaardmaten of maatwerkoplossingen, wij bieden betrouwbare producten en service. Neem vandaag nog contact met ons op voor al uw palletbehoeften."

Name: ITALIGNUM S.R.L.
Description:
Italignum is a wholesale and retail trade company present in the wood and furniture sector since 1949. We sell countertops and semifinished products that come from both national and international import. Plywood, multilayer wood, raw and melamine chipboards, medium density fibreboards, real wood veneered panels, materials for window frames and shutters, glum wood for building construction, flooring, and laminated plastics are among the variety of products we handle.
L'azienda è presente nel settore del legno-arredo dal 1949. Commercializza pannelli e semilavorati nazionali e di importazione diretta da tutto il mondo. Alcuni degli articoli trattati: compensati, multistrati, truciolari grezzi e melaminici, media densità, placcati vero legno, materiali per serramenti, lamellare da costruzione, pavimenti, laminati plastici.

Name: LA BOLSA DE PAPEL - Plataforma de fabricantes de bolsas de papel y de papel para bolsas
Description: Somos una plataforma integrada por fabricantes de bolsas de papel, fabricantes de papel para bolsas, fabricantes de asas de papel para bolsas, fabricantes de tintas y fabricantes de maquinaria de bolsas de papel promover el uso responsable de las bolsas de papel, difundir sus beneficios medioambientales y promocionar su consumo. Los principios de la plataforma labolsadepapel.com son la libre competencia, la veracidad de sus informaciones, la autenticidad de sus actuaciones y el respeto a otros materiales.

Name: Vida Wood UK
Description:
Vida Wood sells and delivers sawn wood products that are processed at the Group’s twelve sawmills in Borgstena, Hjältevad, Hestra, Hästveda, Alvesta, Vislanda, Urshult, Nössemark, Tranemo, Vimmerby, Orrefors and Mörlunda. Seventy-five percent of the production is exported to five continents. All Vida products are manufactured from renewable raw materials – the Swedish forest. The majority of raw materials are purchased from private forest landowners via our purchasing company, Vida Skog.

All of Vida’s sawmills are focused on structural timber. A high degree of value-added processing takes place at all sawmills including planing, precision cutting, stress grading, finger-joining and chemical impregnating. Sideboards are predominantly made into tongued and grooved timber and batten for the European and Swedish markets. The product range from CLS, TR26 (stress-graded roof truss timber) to other types of beams. Vida’s wood products are sold worldwide

Name: GENERAL WOOD GROUP
Description:
Founded in 2012 – UAB General Wood Group gained years of experience.
Company specializes on production and trading of pallet, construction and fully planed wood products.
We are proud to have highly experienced team and ready to offer a wide selection of sawn wooden products.
Partnership is the essence of strong and long partnership in wood business.

Name: Parqueterie de Bourgogne
Description:
Fabricant français de parquets massifs et contrecollés depuis plus de 80 ans, la Parqueterie de Bourgogne, est implantée dans l’Yonne, en Bourgogne, au cœur de la Forêt d’Othe, à proximité de Paris.
Grâce à une sélection rigoureuse des bois issus de forêts gérées durablement (PEFC), et à des contrôles constants du processus de fabrication, la Parqueterie de Bourgogne vous garantit un parquet de qualité, fabriqué en France.

La Parqueterie de Bourgogne, expédie sa production partout en France, mais aussi en Europe (Suisse, Belgique) ainsi qu’aux Etat-Unis, en Australie, en Asie.

Parquets massifs, parquets contrecollés, parquets à clouer ou à coller, parquets grandes largeurs, parquets "Prestige", panneaux à motifs, accessoires, …

Une finition personnalisée contribue au charme de nos parquets haut de gamme : poncée, brossée, brossée fort, vieillie, bois scié et aussi huilée, vernie, teintée, cérusée, ou Vieux de Bourgogne...

Notre atelier de recherche crée constamment de nouvelles finitions pour suivre au plus près les tendances de la décoration et répondre à toutes vos envies.

Venez découvrir notre show-room ouvert aux professionnels et aux particuliers.
Notre équipe commerciale vous réserve un accueil chaleureux et personnalisé du lundi au vendredi de 9h00 à 17h00.

Name: Águas Negras S.A. Indústria de Papel
Description: In September 2015, Aguas Negras Indústria de Papel celebrated seven and a half decades of history. Created in Santa Catarina in 1940 under the name Indústria Salto Grande to manufacture wood pulp and supply electricity to the community of Salto Grande, today known as the municipality of Ituporanga. Today The Company operates with 100% recycled raw material purchased in São Paulo, Paraná, Santa Catarina and Rio Grande do Sul and sells its final products throughout Brazil and also exports to Mercosur.

Name: SF Resources Group
Description:
PT. Seng Fong Moulding Perkasa is the manufacturing arm of Seng Fong Resources Group located in Jombang, Indonesia. It is known today as one of the largest manufacturers of solid and hardwood flooring in the country. The factory covers 10.5 hectares and employs over 1,500 workers. This innovative facility is responsible for the manufacturing of the main line of Solid and Hardwood flooring, decking and housing component products. The facility incorporates office, log yards, and the area units of sawmill, kiln drying and conditioning, moulding, lamination, coating, frame saw and warehouse.

It offers a varied palette of tropical hardwoods to spoil customers for choice: core species Teak, Merbau, Sonokeling, as well as Albizia, Linggua, Mahoni, Rengas, Simpur and Torem. The main products are moulding and housing component such as, Flooring, Fingerjoint, Fingerjoint Laminate, Buttjoint Laminate, Parquet & Lamparquet, Decking, and Skirting. Today, we stuff an average of 120 to 150 containers a month.

The objective is to deliver only the best standard of process and quality :
• Assurance to bring legal and best quality raw materials
• Impeccable manufacturing process for efficiency in time and cost
• Best offering of finishing
• Constant focus on innovation with new technology and upgrades
• Strong governance towards safety and environment
• Provide customer service that exceeds customer expectations

Name: Flying Paper Industries Ltd.
Description:
Flying paper industries Ltd was formed in 1983 as a flagship company of Flying Group of Industries. The company has manifested itself as quality producer of paper. We have strategic business relationships with leading Paper industries. Flying Paper Industries Ltd. has integrated pulp & paper mills based on local wheat straw.
Flying Paper Industries is managed by a team of professionals which comprises process & paper Technologists, Engineers, Chartered Accountants, Cost & Management accountants, MBA’s, and Administration & Human Resource specialists. More than 20 Engineers of different technologies are currently working at Mills with well-trained supervisors and operators. Total strength of Flying Paper Industries Ltd is more than 700 employees.

Name: BOIS DEROULES DE CHAMPAGNE
Description: BOIS DEROULES DE CHAMPAGNE est une entreprise de déroulage de grumes de Peuplier pour la fabrication de panneaux de contreplaqués. La société Bois Déroulés de Champagne est issue du partenariat industriel de deux groupes spécialisés dans la fabrication de contreplaqués Peuplier, le Groupe THEBAULT et l'entreprise DROUIN.

Name: Ilim Timber Germany
Description: Ilim Timber, ein internationales Unternehmen mit Sitz in der Schweiz, ist einer der führenden Produzenten von hochwertigem Nadelschnittholz. Weltweit hat das Unternehmen vier Standorte, darunter zwei Standorte in Deutschland (Ilim Timber Germany), der Ilim Nordic Timber GmbH & Co. KG in Wismar und der Ilim Timber Bavaria GmbH in Landsberg am Lech, mit insgesamt mehr als 900 Mitarbeitern. Ilim Timber Germany produziert hochwertige Holzbauprodukte durch die Verarbeitung von Nadelholz (Kiefer und Fichte) aus nachhaltiger Waldbewirtschaftung, vorrangig für den regionalen (KVH, Leimbinder, Brettsperrholz, Dachlatten, Dielen) als auch für den weltweiten Markt. Damit können an den beiden Ilim Timber Standorten in Wismar und Landsberg am Lech jährlich über 2.300.000 Tonnen CO2 nachhaltig gespeichert werden. Mit dieser nachhaltigen Holzverwendung leistet Ilim Timber Germany zusammen mit seinen Partnern, den Waldbesitzern und seinen Kunden einen bedeutenden Beitrag zum Klimaschutz aus einem nachwachsenden Rohstoff.

Name: Wellons Canada CORP
Description:
WELLONS CANADA

Concept to Completion

Wellons Canada, located in Surrey, British Columbia, specializes in the design, manufacture and turn-key installation of biomass and gas fired thermal energy systems, lumber drying kilns and heat recovery systems. Wellons has the unique in-house ability to offer its clients a total project solution from concept to completion.

Biomass Energy for Industry

If your goal is to produce green energy from biomass fuel, then your source is Wellons Canada. Wellons’ biomass fired equipment is used in district energy applications, wood product facilities, biomass fired electrical generation facilities and combined heat and power (CHP) plants, and greenhouse operations. Wellons’ stable of combustion technologies can burn a combination of wet or dry fuel and the heat generated can be delivered directly to users, or converted to thermal oil, steam or hot water systems.

Gas Fired Energy

Wellons Canada has designed and supplied gas fired heater projects for over twenty years, ranging in size from 5MM Btu/hr to 70MM Btu/hr output. Wellons heaters can be horizontal or vertical configurations, and are a double helical coil, triple gas pass design.
For both oil and gas, and wood sector applications, Wellons heaters are typically skid mounted transportable units with integral control cab or building. Wellons’ scope can also include the primary loop thermal fluid circulation system including pumps, dump tank expansion tank and piping.

Leading Canada in Lumber Drying Kilns

Wellons Canada is the leading supplier of lumber drying technology in Canada. Wellons’ ruggedly designed kilns are recognized as both the high quality and most productive available in the market. Designed with and for our customers, Wellons’ WINKILN and TCS control technology has advanced to the forefront of drying control using real time moisture content measurement above and below fiber saturation as the defining control variable.

Name: Certification BTMC
Description:
Créée le 10 mars 2017 suite aux États généraux de la forêt sur le Massif central, BTMC regroupe des acteurs de la forêt et du bois construction dont l’objectif est de créer une véritable dynamique autour de la valorisation locale du bois en assurant sa traçabilité.
Notre démarche est de promouvoir et développer l’utilisation du bois local dans la construction et ceci à travers un outil : la certification « Bois des territoires du Massif central ». Celle-ci  garantit une véritable traçabilité et qualité 100% locale des bois issus de forêts durablement gérées. Elle renforce également les relations de proximité entre les maîtres d’ouvrage (collectivités, bailleurs sociaux, aménageurs, etc). et les entreprises du bois (négociants, scieurs, charpentiers, menuisiers).
L'objectif est de :
• valoriser l'importante ressource forestière du Massif central pour apporter une solution plus juste et durable que le bois d'importation.
• contribuer à répondre concrètement à la transition écologique avec l’utilisation du bois dans les projets en favorisant les circuits de proximité pour accroître les retombées économiques sur le territoire.
• donner plus de visibilité aux entreprises du bois du Massif central en renforçant leurs liens, favoriser leur montée en compétence collective afin de leur ouvrir de nouveaux marchés.
• augmenter le nombre, la qualité et la visibilité des projets en bois local sur le territoire.

Name: Winstone Pulp International Limited (WPI)
Description:
WPI is a New Zealand based subsidiary of Ernslaw One Ltd.  

WPI's wood processing operations are fully integrated with the Ernslaw One forestry division which, as the fourth largest foresty owner in New Zealand, manages Radiata pine and Douglas fir - Oregon forests in various locations throughout New Zealand. 

The WPI wood processing operations produce a range of timber and pulp products derived from renewable plantations of Radiata pine for both New Zealand and international markets. 

The WPI site operations include a pulpmill located in Karioi, Ohakune and WPI Timber sawmill located at Tangiwai in the Central North Island

The three mountains symbolise our physical environment and the integrated growth of the three key business areas: forestry, timber and pulp.

Name: Tasmanian Forests and Forest Products Network (TFFPN)
Description:
The TFFPN provides an inclusive, open and transparent platform on industry matters for all those people who either work within or who support a productive, sustainable and profitable forest industry in Tasmania.

The purpose of the TFFPN is to represent the shared views, aspirations and expectations of all those people who have a stake in the future of a sustainable Tasmanian forests, fine timber and wood fibre industry.

TFFPN's work includes:
- Being a communication hub – provide information and a united voice on issues, successes, policy, innovations, common areas of concern to its members , the general community, other industry organisations within the industry and other industries and to stakeholders 
- Provide informed policy advice to government and the industry
- Provide a focal point for Government to communicate high level issues of common concern across the Network
- Foster Research and Development in the industry
- Promote skills development and career paths across the industry
- Provide a linkage point across the industry to coordinate policy, government responses and other matters of common interest 
- Community engagement and education, providing information about the issues in the industry and build support for  those who work in it
- Promote the Brand 
- Build partnerships and align interests 

Membership is open to anyone who has a genuine interest in the continued future development of a sustainable and profitable forest and forest products industry.

Name: Sustainable Fiber Technologies
Description:
In 2015, an innovative concept to create paper from leftover wheat, an idea that gained its roots when Founder and CEO, Mark Lewis, was completing his undergraduate degree years before, came to commercial fruition with the establishment of Sustainable Fiber Technologies (SFT).

Lewis has spent his entire career in the industry, and created SFT to further develop the technology he began working on while in college. Since it’s start, SFT has refined and expanded the capabilities of its technology to pulp non-wood fibers, ranging in its use of agricultural residue in such things as wheat straw, sugar cane, eucalyptus, and more.

The company aids in the implementation of their Phoenix Process for pulping, as well as engineering and training help in the operation of such facilities. The Phoenix Process has been used in packaging, molded products, tissue and towel, printing and writing paper. Expansion of such technology is always on the horizon with the capable and energetic team of engineers employed by SFT.

SFT provides an easy to use, pre-engineered system that makes profitable facilities with short development and engineering phases. SFT will be your partner through the implementation and operation of non-wood pulping facilities. 

The compostable, all-natural, gluten-free pulp and paper products that SFT is able to produce are sustainable in their purpose as well as the process. For more information about the origins of SFT, or the details of the technology, visit www.sustainablefibertechnologies.com today.

Name: Tyoga Container Company
Description:
Since 1970 we’ve been providing our customers a competitive advantage in their respective markets is a primary goal here at Tyoga Container.  We strive to develop strong, long lasting, business to business partnerships that yield real benefits to our customers.  This is achieved through an integrated approach to manufacturing, inventory management and supply chain initiatives aimed at improving your packaging performance, reducing your packaging cost and tightening your supply chain.
 We are a company that will not stand still; we have been and will continue to evolve as a competitive manufacturing entity.  The only constant in our strategy is that we will continue to change. Our strategy is to strive for excellence in a number of key areas.  

Quality System: In December 2009 we passed our ISO 9001:2008 audit with no non-compliances.  The implementation of our quality system has been an excellent initiative for Tyoga Container.  We’re currently in the process of obtaining our certification for ISO 14001:2004.

Manufacturing Systems: Over the past 4 years we have invested in new machinery that increases our capabilities, quality, and throughput.  Additionally, we have moved most machines in the plant to incorporate excellent material flow.  These two major initiatives have virtually doubled our plant capacity and at the same time reduce lead-times, reduced waste, reduced direct labor, and increased quality.

Business & Information Systems:  Tyoga Container uses an integrated software system specifically designed for corrugated converters.  It allows us to create specifications, estimate, process factory orders, inventory management, shipping / receiving, and all accounting functions.

Name: FOR/Maine
Description:
Forest Opportunity Roadmap / MAINE
Strong forests. Strong economy. Strong communities.

Forest Opportunity Roadmap / Maine (FOR/Maine) is a unique cross-sector collaboration between industry, communities, government, education, and non-profits, which have come together to realize the next generation of Maine’s great forest economy. The coalition was created with support from the U.S. Economic Development Agency and U.S. Dept. of Agriculture.

FOR/Maine is convening scores of industry, community, research, investment and government stakeholders to conduct coordinated research, formulate strategy, and harness extensive global expertise as part of a long-term, U.S. Economic Development Administration-backed effort to strengthen Maine’s $8.5-billion, 33,000-job forest economy and position the state as a leader in emerging global forest product markets. Among the reports FOR/Maine will release by year’s end are:

- A global market analysis aimed at identifying current and emerging global demand for forest products, and the markets where Maine is likely to be most competitive. This will also enable FOR Maine to identify the necessary policy and industry changes to keep Maine forest products competitive.
- A wood supply analysisaimed at determining Maine’s current and potential wood supply and how it can meet global demands.
- A Forest Economy Strategic Plan that will identify the global forest products markets Maine can best compete in and the actions necessary to create a more diverse forest economy and increase our economic output.

FOR/Maine is also working closely with leadership in forest communities, including the six towns in Maine that have had mills close in recent years. The coalition is actively involved in efforts to diversify economic opportunities for these communities, supporting efforts to redevelop mill sites, provide more resources for brownfield cleanup and improve broadband access in rural areas.

Name: The South India Paper Mills Ltd
Description:
The paper plant is located 150 km from Bangalore near Nanjangud in Karnataka state. The current capacity is about 200 MT/day.
The manufacturing process is based on the recycling of scrap paper both imported and domestic. Some purchased pulp is also used. Paper is manufactured on three paper machines of capacity 45TPD (1.83m wide), 50 TPD (2.55m wide) and 115 TPD (2.88m wide). The plant is fully supported by a 7.5 MW biomass based Cogeneration Power Plant. About 1.5 to 2.0 MW of excess electricity is exported to the state grid.

The plant is well connected to the major industrial areas in the southern peninsula by NH 212 (to be 4 laned shortly) and the Bangalore- Mysore 4 lane State Highway.
     

SIPM began work on setting up its PPD division during 2007-2008 with the objective of introducing world-class products to brand owners who use paper based packaging material. Name: Tuytel Grondstoffen
Description:
De specialist voor A- & B-hout, chips, shreds, compost en andere grondstoffen. U kunt bij ons terecht voor de verkoop en inname van hout.

Inkoop en Verkoop van hout
Van A-hout tot rijbaanschors en grond: Tuytel Grondstoffen levert een breed scala aan biomassa en hout. Wij zijn een vertrouwd adres voor verschillende bedrijven actief in de groenvoorziening, cultuurtechniek, grond-, weg- en waterbouw en de opwekking van energie. 

Wij leveren verschillende soorten grondstoffen en beschikken over onze eigen transportmogelijkheden. Ook nemen we hout en andere materialen in. Neem gerust contact met ons op voor de mogelijkheden qua inname en levering. 

Transport
Tuytel beschikt over transportmogelijkheden voor het leveren van hout en andere materialen. Zo kunnen wij het materiaal voor je vervoeren in met onze walking floor trailers. Het voordeel van deze trailers is dat deze eenvoudig geladen kunnen worden via de bovenkant. Het lossen gaat ook heel gemakkelijk, doordat ze trailer het materiaal voor je naar buiten schuift. 

Ook is het mogelijk het materiaal in Oud-Alblas op te halen.

Rijbaanschors
Projecten vinden regelmatig plaats op moeilijk bereikbare locaties. Voor dit soort projecten leggen wij regelmatig tijdelijke toegangswegen aan. Dit doen wij met behulp van biomassa, oftewel, rijbaanschors. Ons geshredderde hout is ideaal om te gebruiken voor tijdelijke rijbanen op veenachtige of natte ondergronden.

Since its inception in Challans (Vendée region), close to the main timber terminal ports of La Rochelle and Nantes, the operations of Scierie de Challans have continued to adapt to the demands of its clients. Originally active in sawing operations and trading, Scierie de Challans has gradually integrated drying, steaming, stocking, lumber, production boards, and more recently a jointing and gluing line. 
 
These numerous investments have allowed Scierie de Challans to offer its customers products from the first and second transformation, like the multiply which benefits from CTB-LCA certifications.
 
Maintaining the satisfaction and trust of our customers is our primary goal, whether it is about traceability and origin of timber, product quality, storage conditions, client specific demands or responsiveness in delivery, for which we operate our own fleet of trucks.

Our passion for wood starts with the respect of our most important supplier: the forest. We know that only sustainably managed forests can produce the optimum quality of wood that we are seeking. This translates into a strict selection policy of suppliers.

Name: INPAR Autoadhesivos SRL

Our mission is to strive, day by day, to become the most important company producing self-adhesive labels in the country, based on excellence in our quality of service and our products, by focusing on total customer satisfaction.

We have a large industrial facility, which is characterized by a highly trained staff and the appropriate technology to achieve product excellence.

We want, thanks to the quality of our work, to be recognized nationally as a benchmark in the production of rolls of self-adhesive labels to continue growing and positioning ourselves internationally.

Name: MAR-MAR d.o.o.
Description:
MAR-MAR d.o.o. is a family owned company founded in 1991. As our line of work uses paper derived from wood pulp as our chief raw material, we liken our beginnings to those of a sapling – easily swayed by every breeze. But with time our quality-based business growth philosophy has proven successful, and the sapling grew strong, taking firmer root and branching out. This has led to the recognition we now enjoy as a producer of attractive and sought after notebooks and much, much more.

Our product range includes paper school and office products (with all binding types including hardcover, softcover and spiral), planners, notes (with rounded corners and elastics) and adding rolls. Also, our product line Memo'ar, a brand of specially designed planners with elastic over hardcover is created to always be on hand when you need to record a personal moment or a new business idea.

The latest addition to our product line is environmentally friendly, biodegradable paper packaging and bags. This trend is an answer to a growing demand for high-quality paper packaging and environmental awareness as a replacement for plastic products.

Our acquisition in 2008 of Lipa Mill, a related company with a hundred-year tradition, opened a new chapter in our operations. The brand's recognition, accepted products and an open market saw our growth accelerate and made us an even more dynamic company, earning 60% of our revenue through exports to the demanding Italian, German, Austrian and neighbouring markets.

We know that success in the modern world cannot be measured only in tonnes and percentages – it must also incorporate a responsible relationship with the environment. This, we feel, is particularly true of us as we liken ourselves to a healthy, growing tree – and that is why our priority is to constantly introduce new, cutting edge ecologically-friendly technical solutions. MAR-MAR now uses the best technology the world has to offer; our operations are clean and nature friendly.

Name: TRAMA Silvicultura Especializada
Description:
Teléfono: +52 (341) 107 6225
https://goo.gl/maps/b4jFxvGeGs92

En TRAMA somos especialistas en proveer productos forestales de calidad de manera sustentable

Ofrecemos diversos productos forestales y opciones rentables y ecológicas para el abasto de energías verdes. Somos una empresa mexicana y creemos en la cultura de la protección ambiental a través del manejo sostenible del recurso maderable. 

Nuestros productos:
-Madera aserrada de pino: Producimos tablas en medidas comerciales de 8 a 24 ft en presentación de tabla de 1 pulgada y tablón de 1 ¼ pulgadas, 1 ½ pulgadas, 2 pulgadas y 2 ½ pulgadas.
-Madera seca al aire o estufada: podemos entregar la madera aserrada sin humedad a través del proceso de estufado o secado al aire. Útil para la fabricación de muebles o usos múltiples. 
-Viguería: producimos vigas para techos en forma estructural o aparente de acuerdo a cálculo arquitectónico. 
-Corteza de pino: Es utilizada para hacer composta y es un fertilizante natural.
-Aserrín: Pequeñas partículas de madera aprovechadas para la fabricación de teja y adobe. También, sirve para camas de pollo. 
-Astillo de pino sin corteza: Es madera triturada que sirve como materia prima para plantas procesadoras de papel o de cartón. 
-Astilla de pino con corteza: Es madera triturada con corteza que sirve para procesos de cocimiento en calderas. Es también llamada biomasa y es considerada una energía ecológica.    

¿Qué hace a nuestros productos diferentes?
-Calidad del aserrío: Para que la tabla sea uniforme en su medida y esté bien clasificada
-Buen afilado: Para que la sierra brinde una textura suave a la madera
-Tecnología: Empleamos maquinaría innovadora en nuestro aserradero para mantener los estándares de calidad
-Sustentabilidad: Nuestros productos proceden de bosques autorizados 


Para todos nuestros procesos integramos el factor medio ambiental, económico y humano en el aprovechamiento forestal porque lo visualizamos como una oportunidad de conservar nuestros bosques.

Name: CONVERTED PAPER PRODUCTS JHB (PTY) LTD
Description:
Converted Paper Products (CPP) was established in 2001 and is a private owned company which supplies an extensive range of local and imported products that provides the Litho and Digital printing & stationery industry with all their paper and packaging requirements.

CPP’s offices are based in Johannesburg of which we are fully equipped with an excellent internal and external sales team. Our company has warehousing facilities in both Johannesburg and Durban. In Johannesburg we have our own fleet of delivery vehicles of which prides itself on excellent service and ‘quick’ deliveries.

CPP has committed itself to strengthening its relationships with both Local and International suppliers and the company has an Environmentally-Responsible-Approach by only partnering up with mills that are environmentally accredited and certified.

Some key aspects as to what SETS US APART from our Competitors:

	CPP has its own Converting Plant which converts reels into sheets. This allows our clients the opportunity to order specific sizes that will best suit their requirements for paper and packaging materials going for print.
	CPP has a hands-on-approach when it comes to our service. Our flexible fleet of delivery vehicles caters for both small and large deliveries and we are well known in our industry for our ‘speedy’ turnaround times.
	The Paper/Board industry is a very competitive market which is why it is vital that we continue to supply our clients with Quality products at Competitive pricing.

CPP is a PROUDLY SOUHT AFRICAN owned Paper Merchant that has committed itself to remaining a Valuable and Reliable supplier of Paper and Board for the Printing & Packaging industry.

Name: J.W. Cappelen GmbH
Description:
The Cappelen Group is a family-owned enterprise that was founded in 1973 by Jan Wessel and Marion Cappelen who believed in the future market potential of the Central and Eastern European countries. Despite the radical political changes in Europe in 1989, with courage, determination and creativity the first sales office was established in Bulgaria in 1991. Since those days the Cappelen Group has successfully established itself to numerous countries in Europe and Asia. Today Cappelen Group operates with four divisions: Paper, Wood, Logistics and ID-security.

Cappelen Paper acts as a reliable partner for both, high-quality paper and board suppliers and printing houses, publishers, board converters and national security printers. Marketing, sales and product positioning of paper, board and paper specialities are the core activities of our group. Our local sales offices with experienced and motivated sales teams employ their excellent market and product know-how to satisfy the needs of every individual client.

Cappelen Wood combines the know-how of our locally established Romanian sawmill with the experience of an international company operating world-wide for many years. We provide customized lumber products to support the value chain of our partners. 

Cappelen Logistics provides a wide range of services including rail transport, intermodal and road transport, warehousing and just in time distribution. As a competent provider of value-added services in the field of warehousing and delivery, we offer the complete range of logistics services with individual supply chain solutions and cost-efficient outsourcing.

Cappelen ID-security has specialised uniquely in the field of security paper and documents, gathering valuable experience over the years, during which it has been working on the Bulgarian ID-Project. Cappelen Group is a highly appreciated partner and the official representative of world-wide leading manufacturers of security materials and technologies.

Name: F.I.T. Manejo Florestal do Brasil Ltda.
Description:
F.I.T. Manejo Florestal do Brasil Ltda. is part of the business group F.I.T. Timber Growth Fund Ltd., an Investment Fund open to qualified investors. The main scope of the Fund is to invest in sustainable projects, natural forests and plantations, as well as further processing and sale of products and byproducts.

The afforestation project began in 1999 due to the promising results of an experimental planting of 1,000 seedlings of Acacia mangium in Boa Vista-RR, Brasil. The Acacia plantations, which now cover an area of approximately 30,000 ha, were deployed in order to meet the demand of raw material for sawn products industry, energy, etc.  It should be noted that the areas acquired for afforestation were historically used as grazing land and existing native forest areas have been fully preserved.

Currently the company has approximately 165 employees whose activities cover four key areas of management: Administrative Management, Social Management, Forest Management and Environmental Management.   F.I.T.  Manejo Florestal do Brasil Ltda.’s objective is to produce timber of high quality and value.  To this end, it has successfully applied for FSC  certification,  demonstrating compliance with the principles and criteria of the Forest Stewardship Council and the sustainability of its forest management practices.
