Name: Rose Tissues
Description:
Established in 1984, Rose Tissues is a family-run UK paper converter and manufacturer of quality toilet tissue and kitchen towel, based in the North West of England.

At our purpose built, well-maintained 35,000 sq ft facility, we convert 450 tonnes of paper per month into disposable household products for the consumer and ‘away-from-home’ markets across Europe. This includes both our own brand products and bespoke private label products, which enable customers to sell our toilet tissue and kitchen towel as their own. 

We know it’s a bit sad, but we’re really passionate about paper conversion and we really enjoy what we do – and this rubs off on our customers. Our team of just under 50 staff, from full time engineers and health & safety managers, to machine operators and warehouse assistants, are always looking out for what others in the industry are doing and how we can do it better.

Because we’ve been in the business of making toilet tissue and kitchen towel for so long, we know what works/sells and what doesn’t when it comes to product, packaging, pack format and branding. For example, the price marked packs we produce result in a 12% increase in sales.

We are on first name terms with our customers who are spread across Europe and include buyers from retail multiples, wholesalers, cash and carry outlets, janitorial supplies companies, facilities management companies and hotel/pub/leisure chains, and offer them a responsive, reliable delivery service to ensure they get what they need, when they need it. 

We are working towards gaining the ‘FSC Chain of Custody’ accreditation so that we can label our FSC products to enable consumers to identify products that support responsible forest management. We are also looking into carbon offsetting schemes to help to minimise our impact on the environment.

Description:
Dal 1896, la Cartiera Francescantonio Cerrone S.p.A. è un punto fermo nel panorama cartario italiano ed europeo. La nostra storia, intrecciata con quella del territorio, è un patrimonio di esperienza e passione che tramandiamo di generazione in generazione. La struttura aziendale occupa 100000 mq di cui 30000 coperti, il nostro processo produttivo ha origine da una materia prima 100% riciclabile e termina con la realizzazione di prodotti finiti e/o parzialmente finiti. L’economia circolare e la diversificazione del business fanno della Cartiera Cerrone una delle più importanti industrie nel settore del packaging, offrendo una vasta gamma di articoli ad uso specifico e generico.
Famiglia: crediamo nella forza del team work e nella collaborazione tra colleghi. Il nostro ambiente è un luogo dove le idee vengono valorizzate, dove si lavora in armonia e si cresce insieme.
Innovazione e tradizione, il nostro binomio vincente: mantenendo salde le nostre radici e il nostro know how, guardiamo al futuro con entusiasmo. Investiamo costantemente in R&S per offrire soluzioni innovative e sostenibili, coniugando la tradizione artigianale con le più moderne tecnologie alla ricerca di un sistema sempre più automatizzato ed efficiente.
Percorsi di carriera su misura: offriamo ai nostri collaboratori opportunità di crescita professionale concrete e personalizzate. Valorizziamo le competenze individuali promuovendo lo sviluppo di nuove skills attraverso un sistema meritocratico basato su risultati individuali e collettivi, delineando percorsi di carriera ben definiti, per aiutare ciascun individuo a raggiungere il suo pieno potenziale.

Name: Evowood
Description:
BEFORE EVOWOOD, THERE WAS MASONITE

Established in 1942, Masonite South Africa became a trusted manufacturer of the original hardboard product known as Masonite - a name that became synonymous with premium quality in the DIY, construction, carpentry and packaging industries. The company boasts a legacy of manufacturing excellence, and holds an esteemed position as a global producer of high quality engineered wood products.  In 2016 Masonite South Africa was purchased by Millco, a consortium of two South African investment companies: Jacobs Capital and Black Bird Capital. As a result, Masonite South Africa is now a 100% locally owned company, and backed by investors with international experience and local knowledge. 

EVOWOOD: MASONITE REBORN

Trading as Evowood, the business will build on the foundation established by Masonite South Africa with a re-energised and reinvigorated spirit. Evowood - evolutionary wood - will strive to continue our legacy of quality, service and extensive manufacturing experience, while strategically planning, designing and implementing new innovations to deliver superior products that meet the ever-growing needs of the engineered wood market.

PERFECTLY POSITIONED FOR SUCCESS 

Located closely to Durban and Richards Bay, and situated on a main transport route to Gauteng (SA’s largest market), Evowood operates from a mill based in Estcourt, KwaZulu-Natal and is ideally positioned to service the primary South African Market, SADEC and international markets. The mill houses a wood yard, chipping operation, refining department, four hardboard production presses, a coating plant, a softboard (insulation) line and an extensive secondary fabricating facility. Under new ownership, extensive investment will enable Evowood to maintain and improve on its high standards.  Evowood is committed to being ‘engineered better’ and continuing to deliver the same quality that customers have come to trust, however under a brand-new name.

Description:
WHAT WE DO

Name: UTKAL Ecopack
Description:
"Sustainable development is development that meets the needs of the present, without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs." The concept of sustainable development can be interpreted in many different ways, but at its core is an approach to development that looks to balance different, and often competing, needs against an awareness of the environmental, social and economic limitations we face as a society. 

Ecopack is an agro based sustainable innovative package of paper water bottle which will be made from rice straw. This new technology has the potential to revolutionize the way we think about single-use plastics and their impact on the environment. Through research we will explore the benefits of using paper water bottles, how they are made from rice straw, and the positive impact they can have on our planet. The mission of this agro based model is to clean the planet by making the environment plastic free.

The objective of Ecopack is to provide environmental, social and economic benefits while protecting public health and environment over their whole life cycle, from the extraction of raw materials until the final disposal.

Name: Nicoletti spa
Description:
Da più di 50 anni la nostra azienda è sinonimo di qualità nel settore della trasformazione della carta. Nasce negli anni ‘60 come sacchettificio e si sviluppa poi come cartotecnica, mantenendo una crescita costante e sostenibile. Per rimanere sempre al passo con i tempi investiamo per sostituire linee obsolete e introdurre linee nuove, rinnovando la gamma e proponendo al mercato prodotti innovativi. 

Ci impegniamo nella ricerca per garantire la massima sicurezza agli alimenti e il maggior tasso di riciclabilità a tutti i nostri prodotti, inoltre puntiamo a un consumo di energia sempre più sostenibile grazie al nostro impianto fotovoltaico e utilizziamo carta proveniente esclusivamente da foreste certificate. 

Ci rivolgiamo non solo a distributori su tutto il territorio nazionale e internazionale, ma siamo anche partner della grande distribuzione grazie a un’alta capacità produttiva. Qualsiasi sia il settore dei nostri clienti, la nostra missione è quella di rispondere alle loro necessità garantendo prodotti di qualità.

Name: Grupo Papelera FK
Description:
Desde 1989, Papelera FK ha sido testigo e impulsor de la evolución de la industria papelera en Colombia. A lo largo de más de tres décadas, hemos consolidado nuestra posición en el mercado, adaptándonos a las cambiantes necesidades de nuestros clientes y a las tendencias globales.

Nuestros inicios se remontan a un pequeño emprendimiento con una visión clara: ofrecer productos de calidad y un servicio excepcional. Con el paso de los años, hemos logrado expandir nuestra oferta, estableciendo alianzas estratégicas con proveedores líderes a nivel mundial. Gracias a esto, podemos ofrecer a nuestros clientes una amplia gama de productos, desde papeles convencionales hasta soluciones innovadoras y sostenibles.

La innovación ha sido un pilar fundamental en nuestro crecimiento. Hemos invertido constantemente en tecnología y maquinaria de última generación para optimizar nuestros procesos y garantizar la calidad de nuestros productos. Además, hemos sido un actor clave en la introducción de productos ecológicos e innovadores en el mercado colombiano, demostrando nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad y el cuidado del medio ambiente.

Nuestra capacidad para adaptarnos a las nuevas tendencias del mercado nos ha permitido mantenernos a la vanguardia. Hemos evolucionado junto con nuestros clientes, ofreciendo soluciones personalizadas que se ajustan a sus necesidades específicas. Desde pequeñas empresas hasta grandes corporaciones, confiamos en nosotros para satisfacer sus demandas de manera eficiente y confiable

Name: Papstar Ibérica

Name: GINA do Brasil
Description:
1945		
Como Tudo Começou
A empresa A Rela S/A foi fundada em 1945, no município de Itatiba, estado de São Paulo, sob denominação inicial de GIACOMO RELA & IRMÃOS. As atividades produtivas consistiam na prestação de serviços de manutenção e reparos de máquinas.

1947		
Ano de Fundação
Em 1947, com o crescimento dos negócios, foi constituída uma nova empresa, a A. RELA & CIA LTDA localizada também no município de Itatiba.

A nova empresa manteve a atividade de prestação de serviços de manutenção e reparos, passando, posteriormente, a produzir máquinas para moinhos e fecularias, palitos de fósforos e equipamentos têxteis.

1965		
A RELA S/A IND E COM
Em 1965, com a transformação da empresa em sociedade anônima de capital fechado, sob a denominação A RELA S/A IND E COM. a linha de produtos foi diversificada, abrangendo palitos para dente e artefatos de madeira em geral, ou seja, prendedores de roupa, abaixadores de língua para uso medico, garfinhos para bolos, espetinhos para churrasco e palitos para pirulitos.

Todos esses produtos foram designados pela marca GINA, marca essa introduzida em homenagem a Mãe dos fundadores, Sra. Rosa Del Nero Rela, que era conhecida pelo apelido de "Dona GINA".

2019		
Gina Hoje
A Empresa hoje é considerada líder de mercado no segmento de palitos para dentes com produção diária de 40.000.000 de palitos, representando 70% do consumo nacional que hoje significa 60.000.000 de palitos/dia.

Há sete anos lançamos no mercado o palito para dentes embrulhados um a um, em caixa de 2000 palitos cada, usados hoje em restaurantes, hotéis, etc.

Chegamos a exportar 15% de nossa produção diária na época que o cambio permitia, ou seja, antes do plano Real, Atualmente só atendemos o mercado nacional.

A matéria prima usada na fabricação dos produtos é madeira de Pinus oriundas de reflorestamento e todos os resíduos provenientes do processo produtivo são utilizados na queima em caldeiras de vapor, gerando energia para a indústria ou vendido a empresas

Name: China National Household Paper Industry Association/中国造纸协会生活用纸专业委员会
Description:
China National Household Paper Industry Association (CNHPIA) under China Paper Association is a nationwide organization in China. The site of the association is in Beijing. It was established on Jun 8, 1993. It is a nationwide organization. Its members are from different departments, different regions, and different ownerships, all the members are voluntary to join in the association. The aim of the association is to promote the technique improvement and economic development of household paper industry, to quicken the technical steps of modernization of the industry. Members include manufacturers of tissue paper and disposable hygiene products, suppliers of related equipments and raw materials, etc.    
    中国造纸协会生活用纸专业委员会（以下简称专委会）是在中国造纸协会领导下的全国性专业组织。英文名称 China National  Household Paper Industry Association（CNHPIA）。会址设在北京，挂靠单位为中国制浆造纸研究院有限公司。
    专委会于1993年6月8日正式成立。会员包括生活用纸、卫生用品生产企业，相关设备和原辅材料供应企业等，目前有国内会员单位约 861个，海外会员单位 42 个。通过其成员的积极工作，已在该领域做出了显著成绩。
    专委员会是跨部门、跨地区和不分所有制形式的全国性组织，是由生活用纸有关企业自愿组成的社会团体。其宗旨是促进生活用纸行业的技术进步和经济发展，加快现代化步伐。

Name: CIMAJ
Description:
Implantée dans la région toulousaine, CIMAJ est l’une des entreprises pionnières de l’économie verte en France dont l’aventure a débutée en 1987 par la naissance de la société ADOM spécialisée dans la promotion du papier recyclé.

Depuis CIMAJ développe 5 activités complémentaires :

CIMAJ Poêles et chaudières Bois – Toulouse Solaire – Bricafeu bois densifié – ADOM Papier recyclé - ATI Artisan Toulousain de l'Isolation

Spécialiste de l’énergie du bois et du soleil,
Nous fabriquons dans notre usine de Toulouse les briquettes de bois densifié Bricafeu que nous distribuons en vente directe sur tout le département de la haute Garonne ( 31 ) ou via un réseau de distributeur dans le reste de la France.

Nous installons des équipements de chauffage au bois ( poêles à bois ou à granulés, chaudières à bois ou à granulés ) ainsi que des équipements d’énergie solaire thermique ou photovoltaïque.
Nous assurons également l'amélioration thermique des logements résidentiels par la mise en oeuvre d'isolants intérieurs (Combles, murs ...) ou extérieurs (Façades, toitures ...)

CIMAJ assure l’amélioration du confort des logements (chauffage, production d’eau chaude, autoproduction d’électricité …) tout en réduisant de manière significative les risques environnementaux et la pénurie de ressources .

Entreprise citoyenne et engagée, nous privilégions depuis toujours l’équité sociale, les circuits courts, les technologies Françaises … à la rentabilité immédiate.

Name: Yıldız Sunta MDF A.Ş.
Description:
Şirketimiz 1976 yılında Gaziantep'te Anonim Şirket olarak kurulmuştur. Ünvanında değişik tarihlerde yapılan tadilatlarla bugünkü halini almıştır. Şirketimiz Orman Ürünleri sektöründe faaliyet göstermektedir ve sektörde % 20 'lİk bir paya sahiptir. Kısa bir süre zarfında İSO istatistiklerine göre 2000 yılından itibaren her yıl Türkiye çapında ilk 500 büyük firma arasına girmiştir.

      Bu süreci takiben 2002 yılının ikinci yarısında ana üretimin bir sonraki aşaması olan katma değerli mamullerin üretimi için gerekli yatırımlara başlanmıştır. Bu yatırımların sonucunda, tek yetkili lisans anlaşması ile Laminat Parke üretimine başlanmıştır. Laminat Parke üretimine paralel olarak, tüm üretimleri için tutkal ve emprenye ünitelerini de eş zamanlı olarak devreye almıştır.

Name: The Stone Paper Company Ltd

Rockstock has superior printing values and is available in most sizes and weights of traditional, wood fibre papers in reels and sheets. It's also:

    * Strong and tear resistant - perfect for books, carry bags and uses where strength is an advantage.
    * Won't crack or white line on folds - suitable for maps and brochures.
    * Waterproof - great for maps, outdoor displays, golf score cards, envelopes, pads etc.
    * Durable under low temperatures - excellent for freezer food packaging.
    * Moth and insect proof.
    * Food grade - for food storage and packaging.
    * Greaseproof
    * Recyclable
    * Compost-able (under suitable conditions)
    * Photo-degradable
   www.stonepaper.co.nz

Name: Boisaco
Description:
Boisaco Inc. est l'un des plus grand producteur indépendant de bois d'oeuvre de qualité supérieure du Québec.
Avec la participation de tous ses travailleurs et de ses partenaires, Boisaco Inc. s'engage à produire dans le respect des normes environnementales, à fournir à la satisfaction de ses clients canadiens, américains et mondiaux des produits de bois d'oeuvre, ses dérivés et des services connexes, de qualité certifiée, à prix compétitifs, tout en étant le moteur socio-économique de la région.
 

Vision


Boisaco Inc. est reconnue comme une entreprise modèle de performance et de dynamisme.

 

Valeurs
 

- Le souci de la qualité
Bien faire du premier coup à tous coups et à meilleur coût. Chaque travailleur est conscient qu'il est en même temps client et fournisseur dans la chaîne de transformation et qu'il est responsable de satisfaire son ou ses clients.

 

- Le sens des responsabilités
Chaque employé est conscient qu'il a des comptes à rendre sur les résultats de son travail. Il est fier de son travail et se sent entièrement responsable envers l'entreprise de son rendement.
 

- Le travail d'équipe
La compagnie fournit à chaque employé la possibilité de s'impliquer dans des groupes de résolution de problèmes, d'émettre librement ses idées et de participer à l'amélioration de son unité de travail.
 

- L'équité
Chaque employé est conscient de travailler dans un milieu ou la justice prédomine dans l'appréciation de ce qui est dû à chacun. La confiance et le respect caractérisent les relations humaines.
 

- L'excellence
Chaque employé a en tête la perfection dans chacune de ses actions. La compagnie a à coeur d'améliorer continuellement ses méthodes de travail et ses résultats.

Description:
Menuiserie Flacher, Menuiserie engagée.
Si nous jouissons aujourd’hui d’une réelle renommée en tant que fabricants de menuiserie bois complexe, intérieure et extérieure, c’est parce que nous avons investi dans ce que notre métier a de plus précieux : le sérieux technique et éthique. Réalisation de fenêtres, aménagements intérieurs, chaque projet est unique, chaque réalisation Flacher est spécifique. Maintenir cette excellence demande un engagement fort. 
Menuisier engagé dans la qualité tout d’abord. Celle de ses produits, ses services, sa technicité. Depuis 1955, un savoir-faire, une réactivité, et une adaptabilité à tous les défis architecturaux, qui ne se démentent pas, pour un résultat sur-mesure et sans rature.
Menuisier engagé pour l’humain, aussi. Une proximité avec ses clients et une qualité dans la relation à l’autre devenues les racines de notre entreprise. Pour que notre excellence dans la menuiserie bois professionnelle serve de socle à une innovation digitale qui vous donnera la main pour changer les choses, avec nous. Pour que notre atelier devienne le vôtre, en confiance et en transparence.
Menuisier engagé pour demain, enfin. Car si le bois est un matériau d’avenir, notre façon de le travailler, le performer… et même l’aimer… a un impact environnemental fort. Des actes sont nécessaires. Les nôtres sont déjà clairs : plus d’emballages, un réseau local, une chaufferie aux copeaux…

Name: KJS Forest Products
Description:
KJS Forest Products is a leading manufacturer of high-quality wood products, proudly rooted in the heart of Guin, Alabama. Specializing in southern yellow pine, we produce precision-crafted fence posts, utility poles, and marine pilings for agricultural, utility, and industrial applications across the United States.

Founded in 2022, KJS Forest Products is built on a foundation of integrity, sustainability, and craftsmanship. Our vertically integrated operations — from land and timber management to in-house harvesting and processing — ensure top-tier quality, traceability, and efficiency at every stage of production.

With a 200 acre facility and a team of experienced professionals, we combine modern technology with time-tested forestry practices. At KJS, we’re not just in the wood business — we’re in the business of building long-term partnerships, supporting local communities, and delivering products that stand the test of time.

Whether you’re fencing acres of land, supporting infrastructure, or protecting coastal foundations, trust KJS Forest Products to deliver with strength and precision — from the forest to your project.

Name: Nanliu Enterprise
Description:
Nanliu Enterprise is manufacturer of nonwoven rollstock and products for hygiene, medical and cosmetics. Making sustainable and innovative products for the future now is driving the company. It strives to have a socially positive impact on the environment in which it operates.
The end products made of Nanliu’s nonwovens can be found in people’s daily life worldwide. In 2020 Nanliu had net sales of 348 million USD. Approximately 1000 professionals are employed at its production plants in Taiwan, China and India. Nanliu is a publicly traded company listed on the Taipei stock exchange.
Nanliu is one of Asia’s largest nonwoven producers with a worldwide leading position in spunlace products. It operates the world’s largest spunlace lines in both China and Taiwan and has extensive air-through bonded capacity in all of its plants. Via its extensive converting operations and biotech workshops in all of its plants, it has secured a leading position in areas like wet wipes and cosmetic face masks.
Immediately after the outbreak of Covid-19, it took up its responsibilities by investing big in production of melt-blown capacity and the construction of some 100 mask production lines (FFP2, surgical masks levels I, II, IIR).
Key in present development work is the transition towards more sustainable products which fit in a circular economy. In 2020 Nanliu started up the production of 100 % pure organic cotton spunlace. It is also moving its spunlace production towards the use of sustainable fibers like Viscose FSC and Lyocell. All natural products which will find their way in sanitary napkins, tampons, baby diapers, cosmetic pads and many other products in daily life.

Firmamız, sektördeki talep ve beklentileri yoğun tecrübe ve konuya uzman bakışıyla objektif biçimde değerlendirmekte; genç, kaliteli hizmet, dinamik, yenilikçi, gelişmeci bir yaklaşımla müşteri memnuniyeti sağlayarak sadık müşteriler oluşturmaya çalışmaktadır.

“Kalitede Süreklilik”, “Uygun Fiyat”, “Karşılıklı Güven” ve “Dürüstlük” vizyonumuzu oluşturan temel ilke ve vazgeçemeyeceğimiz değerlerimizdir.

Firmamız, bu ilke ve değerlere bağlı kalarak; tanıtım ve teklif aşamalarından başlayıp, ürün veya hizmetin faturalandırılmasına kadar geçen süreç içerisinde, tüm hizmet ve faaliyetlerini hatasız ve bir defada doğru olarak yaparak bir kâğıt firmasında marka olmak için çalışmaktadır. Name: Stoelman Papierrecycling
Description:
Stoelman Papierrecycling is a leading, global company boasting 100 years of experience in the waste paper and cardboard sector . Over the years, we have expanded our network and we have established many consolidated business relationships with other companies worldwide.

The origins of our company
The history of Stoelman Papierrecycling dates back to 1914. In that year Mr. W. J Stoelman started a small waste paper trading company having mainly local printing businesses as suppliers and clients. In the years to follow the company grew from a local collector of waste paper to a company of an International standard, active worldwide. Apart from being specialized in the trading of various grades of waste paper, our company also focusses in the trading of cellulose/pulp and second choice new paper and cardboard. We are proud to say that Stoelman Papierrecycling is renown for its important position in the National and International paper and cardboard industry. Since the beginning of the 21st century, our company has traded over 100.000 tons of waste paper on a yearly basis.
Our clientele includes the paper and cardboard industry, printing industry and many other companies active in the recycling industry. Thanks to our know-how, built up over the years, and with our renown expertise in the field of paper, we have become one of the most leading companies in our sector.

Partners and Business Connections
What we are also proud of is our extensive business network. Thanks to our dedication, commitment and flexibility, over the years, we have built up many consolidated business relationships with waste paper traders and recycling companies; some of these relationships date back to more than 50 years. With the right contacts in the paper and cardboard industry, we can offer our customers an even better and more personalized service.

Acreditados con las certificaciones ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Ecolabel y FSC, revisamos y mejoramos periódicamente nuestros protocolos y procesos industriales para adaptarlos a una gestión productiva limpia, respetuosa con el medio ambiente y socialmente responsable.

•	Consumer (hipermercados, supermercados y discounts, entre otros)
•	Away from home (colectividades, servicios, hostelería, …)
•	Business to Business (venta de bobinas en España, Francia, Portugal, UK, USA, Norte de Africa, ...)
Además, comercializamos productos con marca del distribuidor y disponemos de marcas propias como GARBI, SIL y MILMO.
Contamos con una capacidad productiva de 90.000 toneladas/año y 245 empleados en nuestros 3 centros de actividad:
•	KARTOGROUP en Burriana (Castellón): fábrica con 3 máquinas de papel y una fábrica de transformación con 7 líneas de manipulado.
•	COMINTER TISÚ en Hernani (Gipuzkoa) fábrica con una máquina de papel
•	COMINTER PAPER (Barcelona), donde se encuentran nuestros Servicios Centrales.
En Cominter tenemos un gran compromiso en Responsabilidad Social Corporativa: nuestro objetivo prioritario es satisfacer las expectativas de nuestros empleados, de nuestros clientes, de la sociedad, los proveedores y accionistas para lo que desarrollamos diferentes políticas sociales y medioambientales basadas en nuestros principios éticos y de respeto a la comunidad.

History of company
1930 June	Buei Isokawa creates Isobun shoten Co. Ltd as paper manufacture 
(hadn made paper manufacture)
1943 August	The company is renamed Isokawa Paper Co. Ltd.
1952 March	First Yankee Paper Machine (W1160mm) begins operation.
1960 March	Second Yankee Paper Machine (W1200mm) begins operation.
1960 March	The Blackless (Machine made Japanese Shoji paper) is begins.
1973 July	Third Yankee Paper Machine (W1200mm) begins operation.
1982 April	Second Yankee Machine is replaced to new second machine(W1900mm).
1984 June	First Yankee machine (W760mm) removed.
1989 January	Developed the heat-resistant masking tape (260 degree C).
1992 November	Flip Co. Ltd begins operation.
1993 December	JIS (Japanese Industrial Standards) authorized our factory. 
1994 September	Zenkoku Shouji-gami Kougyoukai authorized our products.
1997 May	The thickness and moisture mater installed on Second Machine
1998 December	The recycling milk carton paper is given a patent (2864208)
2000 July	Isokawa Paper Co. Ltd merges with Flip Co. Ltd. 
2002 July	Surface defect inspection machine installed on Second Machine.
2004 March	The heat-resistant masking tape is given a patent (3649288).

Name: We are Bookbinders | Buchbinderei Begemann
Description:
Wir haben einen der seltensten und ältesten Berufe. Wir arbeiten an Produkten, die informieren und inspirieren. Dafür vertrauen uns Menschen all ihre Seiten an.
Wir sind Buchbinder. 
Seit 1993 fertigen wir in einer ehemaligen Maschinenfabrik in Hamburg Bücher, Broschuren, Mappen und Unikate für Privatpersonen und Unternehmen, erhalten historische und zeitgenössische, bibliophile Schätze und erschaffen analoge Kommunikationslösungen für Marken und Ideen.
Im Gegensatz zur industriellen Herstellungsweise folgen wir den Prinzipien der handwerklichen Buchbinderei. Ein Prozess, bei dem aus einem gedruckten Erzeugnis in bis zu 15 manuellen Einzelschritten, unter Verwendung verschiedenster Werkstoffe, ein Objekt mit vielen optischen wie haptischen Details entsteht.
Eine Arbeit, die Präzision, Versiertheit und Erfahrung sowie Verständnis für Inhalte, Materialien und Design erfordert. Dabei verbinden wir die traditionelle Methodik unseres Handwerks mit einem zeitgemäßen Approach. Als Team, das die Möglichkeiten der Buchbinderei als Kunst mit vielen Seiten versteht.

Your innovative paper partner, Papico, is a family-owned and run private company founded in 1977 | We provide a sustainable marketplace to find innovative solutions for successful growth. 

One of the leading paper agents in the UK, we are involved in both traditional and developing markets, importing paper and board from around the world for sale in the UK and Ireland | Our sales activities are in many high quality and speciality sectors including paper for wet glue labels, recycled and packaging papers.

The environment is important to us all and the paper industry has worked hard to ensure its products are produced within very strict guidelines | Papico only works with paper mills who respect this.

Our traditional markets include papers for wet glue labels and flexible packaging, general sheet and web offset printing, direct mail, high speed envelope papers and technical applications e.g. papers for siliconising and PE-Coated Papers and Boards.

The developing markets have seen a growth in demand for various types of digital and recycled papers and we have expanded our knowledge and expertise to include these | The growth in demand for environmentally packaging materials has been very welcome as this is an area in which we have experience, expertise and a strong portfolio of high quality products.

Our paper mills, customers and employees are all equally important to us and this combination makes us a very strong company and guarantees our continued success.

Al jarenlang bedienen wij een brede sector van het bedrijfsleven, waarbij het accent ligt op de grafische branche, de marketing- en de communicatiewereld. Door speciale wensen altijd op een perfectionistische manier in te vullen, hebben wij als betrouwbare partner in deze markt een uitstekende positie opgebouwd.

Dankzij de enorme expertise en een geavanceerd machinepark heeft Keiren Speciaal Enveloppen de vervaardiging van enveloppen tot een ware kunst verheven. Name: Helios S.A.
Description:
La historia de Helios se remonta a 1947 cuando empezó la fabricación en Chile de papel ferroprusiato y luego papel heliográfico. Fuimos los pioneros y durante 50 años fuimos líderes en el mercado de la reproducción técnica y de ingeniería.
 
Por allá por los años noventa, una nueva línea de actividades concentró nuestra preocupación y se comenzó con la fabricación de bolsitas de papel. Nuestro desafío fue elevar los estándares del mercado nacional y ofrecer soluciones novedosas y servicio de excelencia a nuestros clientes. Introdujimos nuevos productos y hoy somos los primeros en la atención a supermercados y grandes panaderías, a la par que hemos ampliado nuestra oferta hacia la industria de la comida rápida.
 
Con la revolución tecnológica que representó la aparición de los plotters de ingeniería y a continuación el desarrollo de la gráfica digital, nuestras actividades en el área de la reproducción de documentos e imágenes han evolucionado a la par de las exigencias de los mercados y nos encontramos participando activamente en la distribución y venta de suministros y soluciones para la gráfica digital y la señalética. 
 
En 2011 se inauguró el nuevo edificio corporativo en Parque Industrial Los Libertadores, que reúne producción y administración, dando inicio a una nueva etapa en la historia de la empresa.

Name: Adak Technologies
Description: Adak Technologies is a cutting-edge company specializing in the development of water-resistant ceramic fiber paper for high-temperature insulation. Leveraging advanced technologies and sustainable materials, Adak's innovative solutions address the challenges of moisture absorption, toxicity, and corrosion in traditional ceramic fibers. By replacing alumina-silicate fibers with non-toxic magnesium oxide (MgO) fibers, Adak manufactures products that excel in thermal insulation, corrosion resistance, and safety, making them ideal for industries ranging from petrochemicals and construction to clothing. Committed to sustainability and global expansion, Adak Technologies is headquartered in Toronto, Canada, and driven by a diverse team of experts dedicated to creating safe, efficient, and high-performance insulation materials.

Name: Skjern Paper A/S
Description:
Velkommen til Skjern Paper, og velkommen til Danmarks eneste papirfabrik. Vi er stolte over at have udviklet papirfabrikken til en moderne, bæredygtig og velfungerende virksomhed, der hele tiden tilpasser sig de skiftende markedsvilkår.

Skjern Paper så dagens lys i 1965, hvor en kreds af driftige erhvervsfolk ønskede øget vækst og fremdrift i lokalområdet. Placeringen i Skjern, med let adgang til brugsvand fra Skjern Å, affødte tanken om at købe en papirmaskine i udlandet. Takket være lokale midler og egnsudviklingsstøtte blev en papirmaskine købt og bragt til Skjern på over hundrede jernbanevogne.

Initiativtagernes koncept var at producere papir udelukkende på baggrund af gamle aviser. Det lykkedes at få en produktion i gang i 1967. Grundtanken lever i bedste velgående den dag i dag, hvor Skjern Paper fremstiller bæredygtige kvalitetsprodukter af 100% genbrugspapir. På denne vis har Skjern Paper været forud for sin tid.

Skjern Paper har igennem årene haft skiftende ejere og siden 2005 har Skjern Paper været ejet af Buur Invest A/S og enkelte ledende medarbejdere, der er involveret i den daglige drift og lokalområdet. I dag er Skjern Paper en velkonsolideret virksomhed med fokus på fremstilling af kvalitetsprodukter til den europæiske emballage- og papirindustri. Der bliver løbende investeret betydelige midler i en endnu grønnere og mere bæredygtig teknologi.

Name: TEKSAN KAĞIT VE AMBALAJ SANAYİ TİCARET ANONİM ŞİRKETİ
Description:
TR
Teksan Kağıt ve Ambalaj Sanayi Ticaret A.Ş. 2010 yılında tekstil sektöründe bobin imalatına başlamıştır. Zaman içerisinde sektör partnerlerinden gelen talepler üzerine doğa dostu kraft çanta imalatına yönelmiş ve bu konuda detaylı bir Ar-Ge çalışması başlatmıştır.

Gerekli araştırma ve altyapı çalışmalarını tamamlandıktan sonra 2021 yılında 10.000 m2 kapalı alanda kraft kağıt ambalaj üretimine başlamıştır. Sektör ihtiyaçları ve çevreyi koruma dinamikleri üzerine kurduğu bu altyapı ile kraft kağıt, ambalaj ve plastik paketleme malzemesi olan PP/PET çember üretimini bünyesine katmıştır. Sektördeki açığı kapatmak ve hem Türkiye hem de yurtdışı pazarında hizmet vermek amacıyla son teknoloji güncel makinelerle seri üretim sistemini kurmuştur.

Üstlendiği misyon; doğa ve insana saygı, çevreye duyarlılık, yasallık, kalite ve güvenilirlik ilkeleri ile maksimum müşteri memnuniyeti sağlamak ve gelecek nesillere daha iyi bir yaşam için çalışmaktır.


EN
Teksan Paper and Packaging Industry Trade Inc. In 2010, it started to manufacture bobbins in the textile sector. Over time, upon requests from industry partners, it turned to the production of eco-friendly kraft bags and started a detailed R&D study on this subject.

After completing the necessary research and infrastructure works, it started to produce kraft paper packaging in a closed area of 10.000 m2 in 2021. With this infrastructure built on the needs of the sector and environmental protection dynamics, it has incorporated the production of kraft paper, packaging and also PP/PET strapping, which is plastic packaging material. In order to close the gap in the sector and to serve both in Turkey and abroad, it has established a mass production system with state-of-the-art machinery.

The mission undertaken is; To provide maximum customer satisfaction and to work for a better life for future generations with the principles of respect for nature and people, environmental awareness, legality, quality and reliability.

With the idea of circular economy, which aims to redefine growth, focusing on positive society-wide benefits. Name: Koppers Wood Products Pty Ltd
Description:
Koppers Wood Products Pty Ltd (Koppers) supplies preservative treated timber utility poles, piles, and timber products servicing customers throughout Australia, New Zealand, the Pacific islands and the Philippines.  Koppers supply chain operations are supported by long term timber supply agreements with our major resource supply partners whilst demonstrating a strong commitment to sustainable forest management.

Koppers treatment plant facilities are well positioned to provide the Australian electricity distribution and building construction industries with security of supply from extensive procurement operations spanning forest reserves on the east coast from the NSW south coast region through to Rockhampton, Queensland.   Koppers operations in Tasmania include hardwood utility poles and piles, fencing and landscape pine log products. In Western Australia Koppers produces treated pine utility poles for the West Australian market, and custom timber treatment services for sawn timber producers servicing the treated timber and house framing markets.  
Koppers treatment plant facilities are all ISO9001 and RC14001 certified and have Chain of Custody Management Systems which comply with AS4707.
Koppers’ commitment to the future supply of timber poles to the electricity supply industry and piles to the building construction industry is demonstrated through ongoing capital investment in our timber treatment plants aimed at achieving industry leading productivity and quality as well as ensuring regulatory environmental and safety compliance.  Koppers investment in research and development projects and willingness to participate in industry trials and product testing further demonstrates Koppers commitment to the sustainable supply of timber poles and piles to our customers.  
Sourced responsibly from sustainable and renewable resources Koppers timber poles, piles, fencing and landscape products are treated with in-built durability to last.  The preferred choice is natural.

Name: Cannabistat
Description:
#CANNABISTAT- Don't Just smoke it up but write it up.....

WHY HEMP ?
Produced throughout the history of agriculture and having a present global market of more than 25,000 products. Hemp is a little to no THC containing a strain of Cannabis Sativa.
In most cultures, it was considered important for making paper, clothes, rope & oils. A relatively low maintenance crop, that is slowly proving itself as an alternative to the current practices of industrial raw materials.
With climate change being more evident than ever, current methods of producing paper are just an add-on, leading towards accelerated deforestation.
Research suggests that paper produced from hemp is the alternate path for a more environment-friendly approach towards paper production.

Our mission is to create a healthy environment ecosystem from the production and distribution of the Hemp paper stationery.

100% HEMP - 100% SUSTAINBABLE

Hemp is going places and so are we?

Cannabistat aims to take a lead in creating a positive impact on climate change by creating awareness about hemp paper stationery and its benefits through an array of lifestyle changing handmade hemp paper and stationery.

We strongly believe in the Indian Craftsmanship. This inspires us to work towards 'handmade' rather than 'machine-made', so as to aid in generating local level employment.

# CREATING A GLOBAL HEMP REVOLUTION

PRODUCT INFORMATION:-
Classic style... Exclusive Cannabistat Hemp fine paper has a naturally elegant appearance. Truly distinctive with an organic look and rich texture

Variety... The spectrum of products utilizing Cannabistat exclusive papers includes journals, sketch & drawing books, art packs, stationery, notes cards, envelopes, and do-it-yourself business cards

Attributes... Acid-Free, Chlorine Free, Archival Quality

Environmentally conscious... 100% Hemp, 100% Sustainable

Performance... Excels for use with watercolors as well as pastels and all drawing mediums including fountain & gel pens

Name: Papersmith & Son
Description:
Papermith & Son is a speciality paper merchant offering the commercial print industry the widest range of paper substrates available. Papersmith was founded in 1994 by Jo Haden-Smith, who handed over the reigns to his son Rob in 2004. 

Since its inception, Papersmith has continued to grow its range of products exponentially. Cyclus from Dalum (now owned by Arjo Wiggins), is considered to be the most environmentally friendly paper in the world scoring an incredible 92 points on the WWF Paper Scorecard. Papersmith also represents both of the leading speciality mills in Italy, Fedrigoni and Gruppo Cordenons, with trend-setting products like Wild, Plike, Savile Row, Stardream, Natural Evolution and most of our CSI grades coming from them.

Papersmith & Son offers the design industry far more than just a nice range of papers and a sampling service. When Rob travels overseas he visits leading merchants to find out what gives them a competitive differential. These concepts and new ranges are evaluated for suitability in the South African market and either introduced or discarded. The two most important characteristics among the winners in Europe boiled down to two things: stock availability and designer-related services. Every designer has experienced the situation of a client accepting a job on a specific paper and by the time it goes to print there is no stock in the country. Papersmith & Son can, at their discretion, and do airfreight the stock within a ten day lead-time. We also run an exceptional reserve system as a service to our customers, allowing them to reserve stock for a specific job.

In March of 2004, Papersmith & Son decided to extend their services by launching the PaperCafe, in Melrose Estate. It allows graphic designers, the printing industry as well as corporate customers and members of the public to see the transformation of the paper in the sample library, get a feel for Papersmith & Son’s range, and enjoy a delicious cappuccino while at it.

 Fonctionner avec les ressources locales pour réduire l’empreinte carbone
Nous travaillons principalement avec du Douglas (60 à 70% de la production), un bois local issu de nos massifs et récolté à moins de 50 km de nos ateliers.

 Certification BTMC 
Les bois que nous utilisons disposent de la certification “Bois des territoires du Massif central” et sont issus de forêts gérées de façon durable.

 Un matériel de production adapté
Notre circuit de production est optimisé en fonction des chantiers et des spécificités présentées par les bois locaux.

 Une synergie de territoire 
Notre scierie et notre capacité de production nous permettent de proposer aux charpentiers locaux une ressource de qualité, et de limiter ainsi l’importation.

Nos produits :
 Bois de charpente
 Charpente standard
 Bois d’emballage
 Fournisseur de bois pour les lamellistes, afin qu’il soit transformé en poutres lamellé-collé (en cours)


En 2021, Xavier Forge et Thomas Chabry, les gérants de LignaTech (entreprise de construction en ossature bois, attenante à la scierie), s'associent à Mathieu Chabry et rachètent la scierie familiale où Xavier a vu travailler son père et ses oncles.
Leur ambition ? 
> Gérer la ressource de A à Z (provenance, approvisionnement, adaptation aux spécificités)
> Augmenter le volume de production de la scierie 
> Faire évoluer les produits proposés pour valoriser au maximum les ressources locales (gros et petits bois)

Name: Logging-on
Description:
Logging-on is an independent and unbiased distributer of global forestry logging information. Logging-on is not affiliated to any supplier of equipment. It has the aim of getting new and relevant information to the user as quickly as possible. 

Logging information is often fragmented, in different formats and time consuming to source and then filter out useful information. Logging-on aims to short-cut this and places the useful information at the fingertips of the user. The user can then choose to investigate the information in even more detail if required. 

Interested loggers, foresters, contractors, researchers, suppliers and consultants subscribe to the logging-on newsletter at www.loggingon.net. They will receive an email with new, relevant and interesting logging information. the email will contain a summary of the articles. If any articles interest the reader, the can follow a link and read more.

The editors and contributors of Logging-on are well experienced in logging operations across the globe. They also have experience in training, research and conference organising, with a strong leaning towards practical “on the ground” requirements of the various levels of forest engineering management. Logging-on encourages any interested people to submit articles, information, events or job postings.

Name: Pappman AB
Description:
Pappman AB - Sustainable paper converter since 1988.

Pappman AB has been a prominent player in the paper industry and has dedicated itself to creating sustainable products through paper converting. Our journey began with a strong commitment to the environment and a goal to reduce waste from paper mills.

We understood early on that in a world where resources are limited, it is necessary to find creative solutions to handle paper that does not meet the margin of error of the paper mills. Instead of letting this material go to waste, we are committed to transforming it into high-quality products that serve a variety of purposes.

Our work begins with receiving degraded paper from the paper mills. It may be paper that for some reason does not meet the strict quality requirements. Instead of considering this as waste, we see it as a valuable resource. Through our expertise in paper converter, we transform this material into various products that meet high standards for quality and durability. A large product that we produce is the floor protection cardboard, but also packaging and other protective cardboard leave our production.

But our commitment to the environment does not stop there. We realize that there will always be material that we cannot use in our own production. Instead of ignoring this excess material, we make sure it is put to use by reselling it to other paper converters who can turn it into useful products. In this way, we reduce the wastage and waste of resources in the world.

Our commitment to the environment permeates everything we do. We continuously invest in developing and implementing more environmentally friendly production methods and work actively to reduce our own climate impact. By prioritizing sustainability, we strive to be a role model and show that it is possible to run a successful business while taking responsibility for the environment.

Name: HTRC Industrial Solutions Inc.
Description:
HTRC Industrial Solutions Inc. was founded in 1984 in Sherbrooke, Quebec.

The company made its mark in the pulp and paper industry with the JumboMaster, a computerized system designed to help its customers cut dry-end costs and run a more efficient paper machine. And it works. Mills that installed the JumboMaster have improved paper machine efficiency by an average of 1.2 percent. 

The JumboMaster’s success is based on a unique closed loop process that has been patented in countries around the world. HTRC currently has more than 50 systems installed in paper mills owned by AbitibiBowater, Catalyst, Irving, Domtar, Kruger, White Birch Paper, Suzano, Graphic Packaging, Twin Rivers Paper and Tembec.

In 2008, the company launched the JumboMaster Optimization Service. The focus here is to reduce tear-offs, maximize winder productivity and maintain the best possible performance.

A empresa possui laboratório próprio, onde são realizadas pesquisas e análises, que abrangem desde a escolha da matéria prima até a entrega do produto final.

Mais de 90% das empresas apresentam dificuldade em encontrar mão de obra especializada; por isso, ao longo dos anos, a MMI também se dedicou a oferecer treinamentos para que seus clientes e parceiros possam aumentar a produtividade, a eficiência e diminuir os desperdícios.

Name: Tesla Amazing
Description:
Tesla Amazing produces Magnetic Notes, Pads, Boards, and Sheets. Its mission is to give the world a new generation of paper that is truly worthy of the 21st century. 

Tesla Amazing debuted Magnetic on Kickstarter in March 2015, raising $240,000 from 6,000 backers. It currently has more than 50 distributors in 28 countries. It is headquartered in Estonia.

Magnetic is a modern twist on sticky notes, whiteboards, and other stationery that makes paper as sleek as it should be in the 21st century. And here’s a secret – Magnetic isn’t actually paper. It’s based on a patented technology called statically charged polypropylene film, which provides double-sided, full-coverage stick to almost any smooth, dry surface. Just write, peel off, cling, then slide Magnetic around without even removing it from the wall!

CLINGS TO ANY SMOOTH SURFACE 

Magnetic gives you the freedom to stick and slide your ideas anywhere: wood, plastic, glass, paper, metal, bricks, cork board, leather, and even some fabrics. 

STATICALLY CHARGED AND GLUE-FREE 

Magnetic is a modern twist on sticky notes that is super-charged with static instead of glue. Based on our unique patented technology, Magnetic provides double-sided, full-coverage, LONG-LASTING stick to almost any smooth, dry surface. 

DRY ERASABLE

The back side is like a dry erasable whiteboard that you can use time and again. 

UNLEASH YOUR CREATIVITY 

Magnetic is an amazing tool for brainstorming, planning, agile development, drawing, and leaving notes. 

BEAUTIFUL HANDWRITING

Magnetic's sleek surface is satiny to the touch and compatible with almost any writing tool. You will be pleasantly surprised to see that your handwriting is more beautiful than ever.  

SAVES YOU MONEY

You won’t have to go out and buy thousands of sticky notes to replenish your stash. Both sides of Magnetic are statically charged, so you can use either side. 

ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY 

Magnetic is 100% recyclable.

Name: Tahoe Forest Products LLC
Description:
Promoting Forest Health
Partnering with public and private landowners and the forestry community in the Sierra Nevada to restore burned areas and prevent future fires.

Tahoe Forest Products (TFP) is a new Tahoe-based company dedicated to the responsible commercial milling of logs sourced within our region. TFP’s operation will support forest health as part of critical fire fuels reduction efforts on public and private land, and also in the salvage, clean-up and restoration of local areas impacted by devastating wildfires by offering a convenient location to deliver salvaged timber. Working in partnership with the Washoe Development Corporation, an affiliate of the Washoe Tribe of Nevada & California, our facility will be the first significant sawmill in the Sierra Nevada in several decades, providing employment opportunities for dozens of local citizens and tribal members. We are excited to breathe new life into a long-dormant, locally sourced wood supply chain and invest in American manufacturing.
Tahoe Forest Products was formed for the purpose of constructing a commercial sawmill in the Tahoe region that would provide a nearby destination for the responsible processing of harvested and salvaged local timber. We are funded, managed and governed by longtime Tahoe-area residents and investors. The sawmill has the support of key members of our environmental community, including: Tahoe Douglas Fire Protection District, Tahoe Fund, Parasol Tahoe Community Foundation, & The US Forest Service Department of Agriculture.

Name: Pedrosa & Irmãos, Lda
Description:
A PEDROSA & IRMÃOS, LDA., foi constituída em 28-04-1976, mas não foi esta a data de início de atividade dos seus sócios fundadores. Estes iniciaram a sua atividade, na extração de resinas e já na década de 60, os irmãos Pedrosa, forneciam as madeiras necessárias à construção das estruturas que serviram de apoio à construção da ponte Salazar, mais tarde denominada ponte 25 de Abril.
O posicionamento no mercado da PEDROSA & IRMÃOS, LDA., vai desde a exploração florestal até à fileira da madeira de Pinho e de produtos acabados. Este posicionamento permite a valorização da matéria prima na sua melhor aplicação.
A participação da PEDROSA & IRMÃOS, LDA no mercado dos produtos em madeira foi confirmada com a obtenção do certificado de Marcação CE em 2014, assumindo-se assim como a primeira empresa a obter essa certificação em Portugal, de acordo com a Norma Europeia EN14229:2010 – Postes de madeira para linhas aéreas. O processo de preservação de madeiras, está aprovado pelo prestigiado Instituto Françês FCBA, com o número de registo: 0185. A empresa obteve e mantém a certificação da unidade de manejo florestal pelo FSC e da cadeia de custódia pelo FSC. O Sistema de Gestão da PEDROSA & IRMÃOS, LDA é auditado e cumpre a Norma EN ISO 9001:2015, desde 2019. As madeiras serradas para estruturas são colocadas no mercado com certificação Marcação CE, segundo a Norma EN14081-1:2005+A1:2011 desde 2020, dando cumprimento au REGULAMENTO (UE) N. o 305/2011.
São inúmeras as valências da PEDROSA & IRMÃOS, LDA e acreditamos, ser imenso o seu potencial, por ser uma organização que acumula a valorosa experiência dos seus sócios fundadores e o espírito inovador das novas chefias.

Name: ZXBLADE
Description:
Precision Blades. Engineered for Papermaking Excellence.

At ZXBlade, we are more than a manufacturer; we are a dedicated partner to the global pulp and paper industry. We specialize in the design, engineering, and production of high-performance creping blades and coating blades that are critical to tissue, paperboard, and specialty paper production.

Our mission is to empower paper mills with cutting-edge blade solutions that enhance product quality, maximize operational efficiency, and reduce total production costs. We achieve this through relentless innovation in material science—utilizing advanced tungsten carbide, ceramic alloys, and nano-coatings—and precision engineering that meets the exacting demands of modern, high-speed paper machines.

From our state-of-the-art facility in China, we serve a growing international clientele across Asia, the Middle East, and beyond. Our recent successes, including long-life performance records on 11-meter coaters in China and cost-saving implementations for mills in Indonesia and Argentina, demonstrate our commitment to delivering tangible, measurable value.

Why Partner with ZXBlade?

Proven Performance: Our blades deliver extended lifespan, superior surface finish, and unmatched stability.

Technical Expertise: We offer tailored solutions, from T-Series blades for ultra-soft tissue to TG-Series for high-bulk applications.

Global Support: Supported by a dedicated team that ensures seamless integration and ongoing support.

We invite paper producers, machine builders, and industry partners to connect with us. Let's discuss how ZXBlade can help you sharpen your competitive edge.

 Ma'anshan, Anhui, China
 www.zxblade.com

Name: F3 - Films for Future
Description: In Films for Future (F3) research project, VTT Technical Research Centre of Finland and LUT University are developing new environmentally friendly packaging solutions with 34 industrial partners. The main objective of the project is to develop cellulose-based alternatives to replace the plastic films currently used in packages. The new film material will also meet the demands of the EU’s Packaging and Packaging Waste Directive, which deals with the shift to a circular economy and improving the quality of the environment. The program is funded by the European Regional Development Fund (ERDF).

Name: HIDIRLAR Forest Products & Impregnation Industry & Trade
Description:
Founded in 1956 in İnebolu, the company initially started its operations with log cutting and timber manufacturing. Over time, in response to growing demand, it expanded its capacity and began selling its products not only within the country but also in international markets. During the 1970s, the company exported to countries like Libya, Egypt, and Iran, entering the global market. In 1979, the company began its institutionalization process. It doubled its capacity and opened its first factory retail store in 1985. In 1987, it started directly reaching consumers by offering its products in a 1500m² enclosed space in Istanbul Aksaray.

In 1997, the company opened its second branch in the ikitelli timber merchants' site. From this year onwards, it integrated a 1600 m² custom-cutting wood sizing production line and impregnation facilities. Starting from 2000, within a 3000m² enclosed area, the company adopted the principle of providing customers with the highest quality forest products, as well as services such as treatment, sizing, roof insulation, thermal insulation, painting, and varnish varieties, all at the most competitive prices, at the ikitelli timber merchants' site.

Prioritizing human health, the company treats its products with Tenelit-E, a new generation of impregnation that complies with European and global standards. This treatment makes the products resistant to vacuum, pressurized fungus, insect attacks, and thermal threats. It preserves their color, is odorless, environmentally sensitive, and durable, all while being wood-friendly. Consequently, the company eliminates maintenance concerns and provides high-performance impregnated wood that is both fire and earthquake resistant. Moreover, the company satisfies all market-specific orders by also importing concrete plywood from the Far East.

Name: Starch Performance Services
Description:
Starch Performance Services offers expert starch application and support services to starch manufacturers, paper mills, and users of industrial starch products and processes for paper manufacturing, coating, binding, and converting.


Starch support services include:

Starch preparation and cooker audits.
  Starch paste quality, storage, transfer, and addition-point evaluation.

-Paper machine wet end chemistry (cationic demand, zeta potential, drainage, retention, and strength) evaluations.
-Size press starch evaluation and recommendations.
-Coating starch recommendations and formulation assistance.

Problem solving – Machine efficiency, runnability, breaks, or paper quality issues sometimes require short-term, focused attention.

Trial and maintenance services – During times of peak demand starch companies and paper mills can be stretched to cover all of their technical support needs, or require additional periodic trial and technical service support.

Grade development help – Product recommendations, lab work, and trial support are often needed but exceed the available resources to achieve the desired quality or runnability objectives.

Wet end analysis – Web breaks, ash retention, machine speed, deposits and sheet strength are issues that often require specialized wet end chemistry analysis and measurement to achieve a successful resolution.

All of these services are available on an as-needed contract basis to fill temporary needs.

Thanks to our investments on paper in rolls market, we have the opportunity to create a sustainable paper cycle between our suppliers and customers, as these last ones, most of the time, give us back their waste.

Name: OBBOIS
Description:
[ A PROPOS DE NOUS ]

OBBOIS propose des services spécialisés dans la gestion responsable des forêts, la certification et l’évaluation de performances. OBBOIS est également impliqué dans la mise en œuvre des accords de partenariat volontaires (APV FLEGT) à travers différents projets d’amélioration de la gouvernance forestière et de contrôle de la légalité des entreprises, en lien avec la certification forestière. 

OBBOIS est aussi un organisme de formation reconnu (par l’administration française) et propose des formations ciblées sur la gestion et l’exploitation durable des forêts, la certification, ainsi que sur la transformation, le commerce et la traçabilité du bois.
 
Basés à Aix-en-Provence, en France, nous réalisons des missions d’assistance technique dans la plupart des pays forestiers et industriels, auprès du secteur privé et des institutions.

OBBOIS propose des experts dont les qualifications contribuent à la crédibilité des solutions que nous développons et à la performance des appuis que nous réalisons.

 [ NOS SERVICES ] 

• Gestion durable des forêts : 
Accompagnement dans les processus d’aménagement durable et de certification, tant dans la gestion des projets que dans leur mise en œuvre.

• Normes et certifications FSC & PEFC : OBBOIS a une large expérience de la préparation et de la réalisation des audits de gestion forestières et de chaîne de contrôle. 

• RBUE et diligence raisonnée : Nous avons développé un système de diligence raisonnée répondant aux obligations du RBUE. 

• Gouvernance forestière et études de filières : OBBOIS réalise des études stratégiques d'appui aux politiques forestières et des études de filières, de territoires et de marchés. 

• Formations : nous proposons des formations ciblées sur la gestion et l'exploitation durable des forêts, ainsi que sur la transformation, le commerce et la traçabilité du bois.

Name: FEDERATION OF PAPER TRADERS’ ASSOCIATIONS OF INDIA
Description:
In 1953, the Govt. of India banned the sale and movement of all Newsprint paper in stock with the traders. A meeting was held in Delhi to jointly decide the mode of operation for which a lead came from Mumbai at a time when the local association of Paper Traders existed only at Mumbai, Calcutta, Madras. At the meeting held in Delhi late Shri R.K. Gandhi, late Shri Shantilal Kadakia, Shri MR Batliboi from Mumbai, late Shri Sunderlal Dutt, Shri C.S.Chakrovorty from Madras, and Shri J.N.Singh from Delhi helped in the matter. As the trader’s viewpoint was very strong and argument convincing, they were soon crowned with success resulting in revoking of order.

Besides this, there was one more development at the Delhi meeting. Late Shri Lal Bahadur Shastri in the course of discussion with paper traders, advised Shri Chimanlal P. Shah to organize a Federation of all Paper Traders’ Associations in the country. The Paper Traders’ Association, Mumbai decided to take the lead to convene the First Conference of the Federation of Paper Traders’ Associations of India, which was held on 16th Feb. 1959. Thus the History of FPTA began much before its inauguration in 1959.

Wertschätzung und menschlicher Zusammenhalt sind ein wichtiges Fundament unserer Zukunft. Wir sehen uns als Arbeitgeber für rund 170 Personen unserer Region und den Familien, die hier leben, verpflichtet. Auch im Umgang mit Lieferanten und Geschäftspartnern stehen Vertrauen und Zuverlässigkeit an erster Stelle. Name: Partícula Verde
Description:
A Partícula Verde é uma empresa comprometida com a inovação sustentável e a preservação do meio ambiente, operamos sob o lema "Resíduo Hoje, Fibra Amanhã: A sustentabilidade da nossa fibra reciclada.", a Partícula Verde é pioneira na reciclagem de papel suporte de etiquetas autocolantes, conhecido como liner, através de um processo único e inovador.

O nosso foco principal é o papel suporte de etiquetas/liner, um desafio ambiental que olhamos com uma abordagem eco-friendly. Acreditamos que a sustentabilidade não é apenas uma opção, mas uma responsabilidade, e é isso que nos impulsiona todos os dias.

Inovação Sustentável:
No coração da nossa operação está o processo inovador de reciclagem, onde utilizamos uma química biodegradável, 100% eco-friendly, num circuito fechado de águas, reduzindo a criação de efluentes para 0%. Este é um marco significativo em nossa jornada, pois não apenas transformamos resíduos em fibra nobre, mas também o fazemos de maneira ambientalmente responsável. 

A Jornada do Liner:
Na nossa unidade fabril (Fábrica de Papel de Torres Novas), recebemos papel suporte de etiquetas autocolantes, o liner, proveniente dos parceiros (Operadores de Gestão de Resíduos e empresas diretas) que, em vez de seguir para os aterros, é tratado com uma nova finalidade. 
Através de um processo de desintegração e conversão, transformamos esse resíduo em fibras nobres de alta qualidade. Essas fibras são, então, direcionadas para diversas indústrias papeleiras, contribuindo para a produção de termo moldados, papel tissue, papel para escrita e outros produtos similares.

Compromisso com o Futuro:
Na Partícula Verde, não apenas reciclamos papel; moldamos o futuro. Estamos comprometidos não apenas com a eficiência da reciclagem, mas também com a educação ambiental. Trabalhamos em parceria com empresas e operadores para criar uma consciência coletiva sobre a importância da gestão sustentável de resíduos criando uma alternativa ambientalmente mais correta.

Description:
Moorim, a company that creates value
Moorim has led the paper history of Korea for over half a century since its incorporation in 1956.

After succeeding in mass production of wood-free paper in 1959, we began the era of ‘Made in Korea’ high quality printing paper. This led to every milestone in the history of paper in Korea: the first manufacture of pulp in 1974, the first manufacture of premium double-coated glossy paper in 1999, and the first and only integrated pulp-paper mill in 2011.

Beyond the concept of simply making the paper, We will present countless uses of 'paper' with a sense of duty in creating new values.

가치를 만드는 기업, 무림
무림은 1956년 설립 이래 반세기 넘게 한국의 종이역사를 선도해온 기업입니다.

지난 1959년 국내 최초로 백상지 대량 생산에 성공하며 대한민국 고급 인쇄용지 시대를 개막한 이후부터 1974년 국내 최초로 펄프 생산, 1999년 국내 최초로 프리미엄 더블코팅 아트지 생산, 2011년 국내 최초이자 일한 펄프-제지 일관화공장 준공까지 매순간 대한민국 제지산업에 큰 획을 그어왔습니다.

단순히 종이를 만든다는 생각보다, 보다 이로운 인류의 생활에 이바지하며 새로운 가치를 만들어간다는 사명감을 담아 ‘펄프’와 ‘종이’를 통한 무한가능성을 제시하겠습니다.

Name: The Moseley Rubber Company
Description:
The Moseley Rubber Company was founded by David Moseley and Sons in 1833 and has been synonymous with the global rubber industry ever since. Today, The Moseley Rubber Company is a wholly owned subsidiary of H&M Roller Technologies − the largest rubber roll covering manufacturer in Africa − part of a multi-million dollar group of Hi-Tech rubber companies each of which is a specialist in its own field of Polymer Technology.

The Moseley Rubber Company lives by the philosophy of continuous improvement.  Not only in our offering of products and services, but also our social and environmental responsibilities.  We believe in establishing and maintaining relationships with our customers and relevant stakeholders to achieve this aim.

As part of an international group of rubber companies, Moseley not only has the technical back up, but also high tech equipment to achieve the best result that current polymer technology can offer.

Our modern, purpose built manufacturing unit is based in Pietermaritzburg, South Africa, complete with a rubber mixing facility and fully equipped laboratory for quality control, material testing and product development.

The Moseley Rubber Company has significant capacity with two of the largest extruder builders that are available in the rubber industry, multiple blanket building stations , and various mandrels to produce 5', 6' and 8' diameter blankets up to 9.6m long. This will not only reduce the lead times for blankets, but also provide the additional capacity to produce more blankets when necessary.

With an international reputation built on quality. The Moseley Rubber Company supplies Rubber Blankets across the globe.

Name: Cem Machine, Inc
Description:
CEM is a U.S. manufacturer and supplier of stationary heavy duty/high production Disc-type log chippers, wood microchip chippers, chipper parts, engineered upgrades and technical services for CEM’s products.  With equipment operating on 6 continents, CEM’s patented technologies provide owner/operators of chip mills, pulp mills and pellet/biofuels plants around the world with exclusive advantages in areas of woodyard and chip mill safety, reliability, production capability and both conventional woodchip and microchip quality.

Because so many wood chipping lines struggle to meet their required chip production and/or chip quality levels because of limitations at their chipper, CEM’s high production heavy duty wood chippers are preferred over all others. 

Gains are often possible by simply replacing an existing production-limiting disc chipper with a CEM chipper with more knives. CEM’s Heavy Duty chippers vary in size from 96” (2.4 M) to 140” (3.5 M) diameter discs and are typically provided with 12 to 20 knives.

The extremely high value of stand-alone upgrades of existing facilities is that they often require little infrastructure modification except for replacement of the chipper in order to realize substantial performance improvements of the entire chipping system.

Name: Dimas & Silva Cork Group
Description:
Founded in 1987, by a family with an industrial cork background, the company Dimas & Silva Lda emerged from the entrepreneurial spirit of the founding partners Dimas Manuel Alves and António Júlio Silva. 
We manufacture the following products:
-Granulates result from the grinding of cork and cork waste. They are classified by granulometry and density. Their application is very diverse, the main one being technical cork stoppers. Insulation, footwear, civil construction, decorative pieces and gardening are also prominent applications.
-Natural cork blocks are the result of a careful selection of the raw material. The cork strips are overlapped widthways or lengthways in order to obtain distinctive compositions and patterns. The blocks and reels maintain the original cork texture and pattern and can be made with different calibres and dimensions in wide band or thin band. The main applications are cork flooring, cork fabric, components for shoes and other decorative products (architecture and design).
-Broken is a product that results from the first grinding of cork. This product is mainly intended for civil construction and gardening applications.
-The flexibility of the process allows us to offer various types of products and services tailored to the client. Virgin cork tubes and planks, cork boards for construction, bowls, cork lids and pieces for terrariums are examples of products we can supply. If you have an idea or project in cork, contact us for development and technical support.

Name: Byness Srl
Description:
La società Byness S.r.l. è presente sul mercato del tissue da oltre 60 anni, un periodo che ha visto molteplici cambiamenti e progressi, sia nella lavorazione della materia prima che nella trasformazione del prodotto finito.

Nel corso degli anni, la nostra linea produttiva ha raggiunto livelli altissimi di flessibilità, permettendoci di realizzare carta igienica bianca e colorata (a 2, 3 e 4 veli), nei formati da 1R a 60R, utilizzando tutte le qualità di carta: dalla pura ovatta alla semi-ovatta B, oltre alla produzione di asciugatutto.

Nel 2010 abbiamo ottenuto il marchio europeo Ecolabel su parte della nostra linea in carta riciclata. Nel 2015 abbiamo conseguito la certificazione ISO 9001:2008 per la qualità, seguita nel 2016 dalla certificazione ambientale ISO 14001:2004, successivamente aggiornata alla nuova norma nel 2018.

Negli ultimi anni abbiamo rinnovato completamente il nostro impianto produttivo, dotandolo dei macchinari più avanzati e all’avanguardia disponibili sul mercato globale.

Con questo ulteriore upgrade completiamo il percorso iniziato con il nostro precedente investimento di quattro anni fa, unendo un’estrema qualità nella goffratura alla massima efficienza del nostro nuovo impianto di packaging di fine linea.

Questo assetto ci consente di offrire prodotti di qualità superiore a prezzi estremamente competitivi.

Fin dalla sua costituzione, Byness S.r.l. ha avuto – e continua ad avere – il privilegio di collaborare con i principali gruppi del settore a livello europeo e mondiale. Esperienze come queste hanno contribuito e contribuiscono al continuo affinamento dei nostri standard produttivi.

I nostri clienti si trovano in diverse aree del mondo: attualmente esportiamo verso numerosi paesi in Europa, Africa e America Latina, oltre che verso l’isola di Réunion, la Guyana e Porto Rico.

Name: Reforestadora Latinoamericana SA
Description:
REFOLASA was created in September of 2002 in order to establish fast growing forest plantations for the production of sawn wood with native species of the Peruvian Amazon. It is an operator of reforestation for private investors in central Amazonia (departments of Pasco and Huánuco). With more than 12 years of experience in reforestation with native species, REFOLASA is among the oldest reforestation companies in Peru. 

The administrative headquarters are in Lima and Oxapampa. The services offered by REFOLASA include the purchase of the deforested areas, the sowing and the maintenance of the forest plantations up to the state of maturity that allows cutting the wood. It is worth mentioning that REFOLASA is exclusively working on titled areas with agricultural classification, that is to say areas that have been established for agricultural and cattle use by the Peruvian State. REFOLASA manage about 14,000 hectares of lands for its investors, which approximately 3000 of which have installed and growing plantations, all certified by the standard Peru Carbon Fund (www.perucarbonfund.com). 

Deforestation in the Peruvian Amazon averages an annual 110,000 hectares. Loss of forest is heavily linked to agricultural activities and the conversion of forest to pasture or farmland. In our working area, the deforestation has socio-economic drivers related to a lack of formal job opportunities.

To overcome these challenges and address the drivers of deforestation in a holistic way, REFOLASA aims to establish a permanent forest production cycle through this reforestation activity, creating jobs as well as a significant sequestration of carbon dioxide in the land-use sector while creating co-benefits for biodiversity and ecosystem services. 

REFOLASA is currentl looking for news partners and investors in order to keep developing reforestation in the Amazon forests.

Name: Resonityy Global Limited
Description:
Welcome to Resonityy Global Limited [RGL], your trusted partner in the global trade of waste paper products. At RGL, we understand the crucial role recycling plays in creating a more sustainable future. Our mission is to bridge the gap between waste producers in developed countries and the growing demand for recycled materials in India. By facilitating the export of various grades of waste paper, including OCC (Old Corrugated Containers), Mix Fibers, and White grades, we contribute to the circular economy and help reduce the environmental impact of paper production.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to quality and reliability. We work closely with reputable suppliers and maintain strict quality control measures throughout our supply chain. Our team of experts ensures that the waste paper products we export meet the highest industry standards, providing our clients in India with materials that are not only environmentally friendly but also meet their specific requirements.

As a forward-thinking company, we prioritize innovation and continuously explore new avenues to improve our processes and expand our product offerings. Our goal is to be at the forefront of the waste paper export industry, providing sustainable solutions that benefit both our clients and the environment.

At RGL, we value transparency, integrity, and long-term partnerships. We strive to build lasting relationships with our clients, suppliers, and stakeholders, fostering a collaborative environment where everyone involved can contribute to a greener, more sustainable planet.

Join us in our mission to make a positive impact on the environment while contributing to the global movement towards a circular economy.

Name: Letts of London
Description:
For more information, please contact Julie Starr //// 

In 1812, John Letts changed the way we record personal history forever by combining a journal with a calendar to engineer, invent and publish a unique accessory: the world's first known commercial diary. An innovation in the way it was future focused and not designed simply to record past events, the product was a response to the growing trade in the City of London at the time. It proved to be a success and by the early 1820's a range of diaries offering different sizes and formats were published. 

Further growth happened with the development of the pocket diary, as the product became a style accessory, rather than just a desk bound object. In the twentieth century, the specialist diary was also created, designed to cater for specific interests with unique editorials to match.

Through dedication and commitment, we have proudly maintained a manufacturing plant in Great Britain for the entirety of our Heritage. With both aesthetics and functionality in mind, each product is handmade from high quality materials with exceptional attention to detail. 

The secret to our longevity is quality and innovation. Time honoured techniques are still used to produce all our diaries, as well as an unrivaled level of craftsmanship. Traditional book-binding methods passed down through generations are still being used today, as they ensure the best quality results. On average, it takes 27 pairs of hands to create each diary. 

For more than 200 years, global generations of people, including royalty and key historical figures, have used a Letts product to plan and journal their lives. This has offered unique perspectives and first person accounts of key cultural moments, which otherwise, may have been lost.

Name: SURPRISE SOMEONE
Description:
Story of 1 paper bag to 1 lac Paper bags 
———————————————————

This is an interesting story of #WomenOwned Business.Pinky Maheshwari and her mom Sharda Daga started this in Sept 2015. Pinky is an MBA and has worked with Worlds Largest advertising agency -Ogivly & Mather, Mumbai for 8 years and 2 years with Vodafone. She quit her high paid job and chose to bring smiles on the hidden talented artisans of india. 

So what do this Mother Daughter duo does ?
——————————
They make recycled handmade paper. So what’s novel about it? Well, many reasons why their paper is unique. First, they don’t cut trees to make paper; they make it from cotton rags/waste cotton and paper waste. Secondly, they mix seeds in the paper so that there is life even after it loses its strength. No wonder their tagline, ``Why throw when we can grow” echoes in all their products.

Pinky says, ``Paper-making process uses energy, water and chemicals and produces waste. However, handmade paper made from recycled materials consumes at least 50 per cent less energy and up to 75 per cent less water than virgin fibre. It also produces up to 90 per cent less wastewater and reduces air pollution by 70 per cent.”
