Name: OPS Forestry
Description:
Australian forests managed responsibly, are a valuable renewable resource. 

OPS Forestry works with Landowners throughout Australia contributing to the sustainable management of their forests. From this comes a commercial product, mill logs, peeler logs, chip logs and bioenergy. 

This product generates income for the landowner and provides beautiful, unique raw material for manufactures of timber products throughout the world.

OPS work closely with professional harvesting and packing contractors, and shipping lines, to deliver a sustainable, secure, ongoing supply of quality logs to our customers. 

Our Purpose

OPS develop tailored Supply Programs for select customers which provide their business with
an ongoing, reliable, and competitive supply of Australian native hardwood saw logs.

In developing these Supply Programs, OPS contribute to growing export markets for the Australian
forestry industry while assisting landowners to generate income from the forested areas of their
properties.


Supply Chain
Supply Programs developed for our customers includes the following aspects;
- Landowners – OPS continually work to source and secure resource from private and state forests.
- Harvesting – OPS work with professional harvesting teams to develop harvesting plans that align with forestry standards and customer specifications.
- Haulage – OPS partner with trucking companies to deliver logs from the forest to container packing yard.
- Packing Yard – OPS work closely with Packing Yards managing quality and coordinating delivery to align with shipping requirements.
- Shipping Agent – coordinating ship bookings and shipping documents.

In Viet Nam, our main tissue's brands are Paseo, Livi... which are selling in MT, GT and AFH channels.

APP Overview 
As one of the world’s largest pulp and paper companies, Asia Pulp and Paper Group (APP) is responsible for delivering quality products to meet the growing global demand for tissue, packaging and paper. On any given day, our products find their way into the hands of consumers in various branded forms from all over the world.

Started in 1972 with Tjiwi Kimia producing caustic soda, now we run operations across Indonesia and China with an annual combined pulp, paper, packaging product and converting capacity of over 19 million tons per annum. Today, APP markets its products in more than 120 countries across six continents.

Over the years, we have expanded our operations significantly through the acquisition and expansion of several of our pulp and paper mills. It’s our commitment to customer satisfaction that enables us to grow our share in paper sales worldwide and broaden our presence through offices in many countries. We believe ‘tradition and modernity go hand in hand’ which means we value long term relationships as part of our Eastern traditions, while we also are eager to embrace the modern values of innovation and efficiency.

Maintaining the integrity of our supply chain is also crucial to APP’s operations as well as our commitment to our Sustainability Roadmap Vision 2020. 

* Market Position:
- No.1 largest pulp & paper integrated producer in Asia.
- No.2  worldwide in terms of production capacity (combined Indonesia & China).
- 70% sales exported  worldwide.
- Markets in more than 150 countries in five continents.

Name: VitaForst International Management of Forest & Landscape e. K. Sven Bung
Description:
Unsere Forstingenieure bieten maßgeschneiderte Beratung und Dienstleistungen in der Forstwirtschaft. Von der Holzernte, über Aufforstung bis hin zu Wald- und Landschaftspflege sind Ihnen mit uns als Forstdienstleister keine Grenzen gesetzt. Unsere beiden Standorte in Zülpich (NRW) und Bayern (München) ermöglichen einen flexiblen, überregionalen Einsatz in allen Bereichen. Besonderes Augenmerk legen wir in letzter Zeit auf Neophytenbekämpfung, die Bekämpfung invasiver Pflanzenarten.

Zur nachhaltigen Waldbewirtschaftung setzen wir bei der Aufforstung auf hochwertiges Saatgut und Forstpflanzen aus den besten Forstbaumschulen. Unser Fokus liegt auf robusten Baumarten, die den Herausforderungen des Klimawandels standhalten. Mit fachlicher Expertise und Blick auf aktuelle Förderungen unterstützen wir Waldbesitzer bei der Bestandspflege und Jungbestandspflege. VitaForst - für die gesunden Wälder von morgen.

Auch urbanes Grün ist uns wichtig. Mit professioneller Baumpflege inklusive fachkundigen Baumgutachten sorgen wir für gesunde, sichere Stadtbäume. Unsere erfahrenen Mitarbeiter beurteilen den Zustand, erkennen frühzeitig Schäden und leiten gezielte Maßnahmen ein. Dabei steht die nachhaltige Entwicklung und Bestandserhaltung stets im Vordergrund – für vitale, langlebige Bäume und gesunde Ökosysteme. Setzen Sie auf unser umfassendes Know-how rund um Baumschutz und -management.

Als ganzheitlicher Partner für Dachbegrünung und -pflege gestalten wir extensive und intensive Gebäudebegrünungen, die sowohl ästhetisch sind, als auch Eingriffs-Ausgleichs-Vorgaben erfüllen. Durch gezielte Förderungen und gesplittete Abwassergebühren sparen Sie Kosten. Unsere sorgfältige Auswahl an Pflanzen und der fachgerechte Aufbau schützen vor Witterungsschäden und fördern Nachhaltigkeit.

Nachhaltiges Management von Forst und Landschaft ist unsere Leidenschaft: Wir legen größten Wert auf ökologisches und nachhaltiges Wirtschaften - für eine gesunde, grüne Umwelt. Heute genauso wie morgen.

• Le support d’enroulement pour papier, ouate, film plastique, textile, adhésif, etc.

• Le calage pour cristallerie, verrerie, machine à laver, pied de palette, etc.

• L’emballage pour poster, affiche, protection pour transport et messagerie (tubes bouchons), packaging pour alcools et spiritueux (Canisters), etc.

• La PLV (publicité sur les lieux de vente) pour la promotion des ventes.
En carton recyclé et recyclable, les tubes Allpack Tupack de 1 à 10 mm d’épaisseur, contribuent à la protection de l’environnement. Solides et économiques, précis et qualitatifs, ces tubes en carton confirment que cette matière est un vrai vecteur d’économie durable.

ALLPACK TUPACK procède au recyclage de l’ensemble de ses déchets carton. Tous les tubes ALLPACK TUPACK sont fabriqués avec des cartons recyclés et sont recyclables. Les colles, encres, utilisées sont respectueuses de l’environnement. Elle propose à ses clients des solutions de valorisation de ses produits par des filières de recyclage appropriées.
Notre système éprouvé permet de travailler avec de nombreux grands comptes selon les normes ISO.

La recherche de la performance demeure permanente afin de toujours offrir le meilleur produit, conforme à l’attente du client.

ALLPACK TUPACK est rompue à la souplesse et à la réactivité. Elle peut bénéficier, en cas de besoin, de l’appui technique de la cellule recherche et développement de TUPACK GROUPE.

Elle se fait un devoir d’être ou de devenir votre partenaire, celui de votre performance globale.

Description:

At Évolys, we’re dedicated to turning biomass into metallurgical biocarbon. Our breakthrough technology not only gives a second life to residues from the wood industry but also captures carbon, creating a cleaner, greener future.

Name: MechLog
Description:
Mechanised Logging Pty Limited (MechLog) has a clear mission – to be Australia’s leading environmentally responsible forestry company. MechLog endeavours to lead by example; to employ the best people; to exceed the expectations of their clients; and to act fairly and honestly with all stakeholders. From an operational perspective, this translates into harvesting plantation timber using the most efficient equipment and latest technology, to meet the needs of their clients.
By maintaining a clear focus on their mission, MechLog is arguably one of Australia’s premier provider of harvesting services to the forestry industry.
MechLog commenced operations in 1994. Since that time, the company has established its brand and its ‘Forestry with Care’ approach to industry practices as a respected services provider to the sector. Over the years, MechLog has kept pace with the latest technology and forestry practices. By embracing the changes within the industry, adopting new technologies, and maintaining a fleet of modern equipment, MechLog has built a successful sustainable business, and created greater efficiencies and productivity to meet the requirements of their clients and the demands of the end-users.
MechLog attribute a great part of its success to its team of 37 employees, most of whom have been employed by the company for over a decade.
The company remains a family-owned business; and it is due to this direct day-to-day operational involvement; and the combined experience of the directors that it is recognised as a successful, Australian-owned, forestry enterprise.
MechLog’s senior management team is tasked with ensuring the safety and security of the growing number of forestry teams across the country. Their specific attention to quality control, environmental management, and customer service, sets the company apart as a progressive, sustainable, forestry enterprise.

Name: Corbitt Manufacturing
Description:
Corbitt Manufacturing was founded in 1964 and the corporate office is based in the heart of Tidewater Red Cypress country. The business began as a primary manufacturer of specialty cypress lumber, beams, shingles, and shakes. Restoration projects were our specialty and our cypress shakes and shingles have been specified on numerous restoration projects all over the country including: The Association for the Preservation of Virginia Antiquities, Bacon's Castle in Surry, Virginia, The Rising Sun Tavern in Fredericksburg, Virginia, and numerous buildings in Williamsburg, Virginia.

Cypress Shingles manufactured by Corbitt are on the Appomattox Courthouse where General Lee surrendered to General Grant and on summer cottages once owned by such notables as the Rockefeller's, Carnegie's, and the Vanderbilt's. We supplied huge cypress beams for the complete reconstruction of Lake Erie - Michigan Canal Lock System. In addition, we were chosen to supply lumber that went into the construction of the space shuttle.

In the past 25 years, our product has migrated to the Lawn and Garden side, specifically; ground cover mulches. Over these years, in an effort to perfect our manufacturing process, we created a unique product, one which had properties unlike any other mulch in the market. And, because of our unusual process our product, is the ONLY natural mulch ever AWARDED A U.S. PATENT". It is packaged under the NoFloat label, and does exactly as the name implies. WHEN APPLIED ACCORDING TO THE DIRECTIONS PRINTED ON THE BAG, EVEN UNDER ADVERSE CONDITIONS, IT WILL NOT FLOAT AWAY. No other natural wood mulch performs like NoFloat.

Our products are shipped to forty-six states, the Caribbean, South America, Central America, Saipan and Guam. We have a reputation in the industry for consistently fine products and service second to none.

Name: Modern Paper
Description:
With over 47 years of experience and over a thousand sales points across the UK, Modern PAPER continues making significant investments and advancements in the paper industry.
Modern Paper has been shaping the paper industry globally since 1978 by continously evolving and innovating to meet the expectations of our customers and stakeholders. In 2020 first converting facility in UK established in Erith, London. Modern Paper continued to grow and took one more step forward by acquiring Natsons Packaging Ltd in 2022 to increase production capacity with gaining more than 30 years market know-how at the same time. Eren Holding committed to expand it’s operations with Shotton Mill in Wales by directly investing more than £1 Billion in UK for building state-of-the-art high capacity paper mills. This huge investments are creating the base for adding more converting lines in the near future. Alongside with our current two converting plants, Phase 1 total converting capacity is targeted as 70,000 tonnes per year. This strategic plan is strengthening our capability to serve and compete by managing the whole production process from pure cellulose to an end-user roll.

With our brands, very well concentrated on market dynamics and consumer needs, we are not just diversifying our portfolio. We are setting new standards for a better and sustainable future in the paper industry.

Name: Kendrick Forest Products (KFP)
Description:
Kendrick Forest Products is the most productive hardwood producer in the state of Iowa.  Located in the heart of NE Iowa, KFP logs from a mixed hardwood forest heavy in Walnut, Ash, Red Oak, White Oak, Hickory, Red Elm, Grey Elm, Cherry, and Maples. The yard, sawmill and dry kiln produce hardwood veneer logs, lumber, ties, pallet stock, mulch, sawdust, mulch and firewood year round.

KFP's walnut is known worldwide for uniform color and grain found in this beautiful region.  KFP loggers, sawmill, dry kiln and office team members are trained in safety, quality, and LEAN systems for the benefit of our customers, employees, owners, and vendors.

Kendrick Forest Products is 1 of 5 companies under the Kendrick, Inc. Brand of family businesses which include - Forever Cabinets by Kendrick, Shimlee, Kendrick Home, The Markket. In 2021 KFP acquired an additional location in Muscatine, with headquarters being in Edgewood.

Name: Eco Indef Ltda.
Description:
Eco Indef Ltda. es una empresa del Grupo Indef que está desarrollando un proyecto de producción de pellets de madera para su uso como combustible. Para llevar a cabo el proyecto se decidió la compra e importación del equipamiento necesario para el proceso de producción desde Estados Unidos de América.
El proyecto tendrá una capacidad de producción de 375 mil ton/año de pellets de calidad domiciliario e industrial, basado en normas internacionales de calidad. Se estima que un 80% de la producción será destinada a exportación y un 20% a mercado nacional.

La planta dispondrá de 3 líneas de producción de 125 ton/año cada una, cuya puesta en marcha está programada para el año 2020, 2021 y 2022 consecutivamente.

La planta se emplaza en un terreno de 15 hectáreas localizado en la provincia del Bio Bio, VIII regiòn, Chile; especìficamente en el sector industrial Laguna Verde, ubicado aproximadamente a 23 Kms al norte de Los Angeles al costado oriente de la ruta 5 sur.

La modalidad de operación de la planta es en regímen continuo los 365 días del año, 24 hrs diarias, lo que permite aprovechar la inercia térmica de los procesos de secado y prensado.

Name: Nuova Complat Srl
Description:
Nuova Complat Srl è un'azienda Italiana fondata negli anni 60 che opera nel mondo del legno dal 1998, in particolare nella produzione di pannelli placcati con essenze di legno e laminati. Il settore specifico cui appartiene l'azienda dei semilavorati di legno ha permesso negli anni di acquisire una notevole esperienza raggiungendo oggi un elevatissimo livello di standard qualitativo.L'espansione nel tempo è avvenuta per gradi scegliendo di servire un mercato sempre più esigente, raffinato e di élite e successivamente rispondendo alle richieste estere con standard elevatissimi e legati alla moda. Questo garantisce la massima valorizzazione del proprio marchio, oggi più che mai un vanto ed una garanzia per il cliente finale, che spinge ed impone a migliorarsi ogni giorno. Tali condizioni hanno spinto l'azienda a cercare sempre i migliori prodotti di gamma, affinando e sviluppando le tecniche produttive e, concentrando la nostra attenzione verso tutte le norme riguardanti il rispetto degli standard di sicurezza, ecologici ed ambientali. 

Nuova Complat Spa is an Italian company founded in the late 1960s which has been manufacturign veneered pannels wit wood essences and laminates. The specific industry sector in which the company operates has allowed us to gain considerable experience over the years, reaching a very high level of quality. The expansion process took place gradually, serving an increasingly demanding, sophisticated market niche, and subsequently responding to requests from around the world with very high standards related to the fashion industry. This ensures ultimate brand enhancement for our clients and a source of pride and a guarantee for the end customer, which requires us to improve every day. These conditions have pushed the company to always look for the best products, which have since been improved by refining and developing our production techniques, and focusing our attention on compliance with safety, ecological and enviromental standards.

Name: Nebraska Paper Trading LLC, Dubai
Description:
Our story of doing business in this paper industry started nearly since 1978 under a general trading company. In 1994, Nebraska Paper Trading Establishment was established to have a full-fledged organization to concentrate on serving the printing presses and paper merchants-based in UAE, GCC countries, Africa, India, etc. In 2008, a professional management joined the company and the legal status of the company was changed into Nebraska Paper Trading LLC. The new management bought the full ownership of the company in 2010 and increased the portfolio of products ranging from different commodity paper ranges to a wide range of specialty papers and boards. At present we have more than 400 different types of papers and boards which gives an advantage of a large selection/choice to select from for our customers.
We work with paper mill who have been our back bones over the years in developing and bringing new and innovative paper products to the market. We try to understand the needs of our customers and the market. And thereby make sure that we cater to all the business recruitment of our customers when it comes to paper. Several years ago, some people predicted that paper would go away when digital technology caught on. While we may not use quite as much, we still use a lot and will continue to do so. We order things more than before, so the use of printing and packaging is actually on the rise. Paper is indefinitely a part of our lives, which means that we will continue to need trees to make it. So we helps our Mother Nature and our future generations.

Can-Am Chains is a manufacturer of a wide variety of premium welded steel, specialty chains and attachments, sprockets and engineered plastics for the forest products and waste water treatment industries. From Pulp and Paper to Saw Mills to Oriented Strand Board and Engineered Wood Products, Can-Am Chains has a reputation for performance and reliability.
Can-Am Chains are designed and constructed to perform in such rugged chain conveyor applications as log-decks, transfer decks, un-scramblers and drive applications of all types. Products include British Standard and American Standard roller chains as well as welded chains such as mill chains, drag chains, malleable chains, power transmission chains and waste water treatment chains.
Whenever chain performance means productivity, Can-Am Chains delivers!
With manufacturing facilities located in Surrey, BC and Portland, Oregon we have a network of branches throughout North America as well as the United Kingdom and Chile to service our foreign markets.

Name: REYES d.o.o. - PAPER STRAWS FACTORY
Description:
REYES has been formed by a group of conscientious individuals and friend companies who are collectively committed to reduce the toxic impact that “unnecessary” single-use plastics have on animals, humans and the environment.

When it was officially announced that the EU and the world were moving into a "fight",to rejecting disposable plastic products, we recognized it as a moment for us, through our business and business decisions, to contribute to that fight for a better tomorrow.

For several months we have been studying the market and consumer habits and have decided to start our own production of PAPER STRAWS as an alternative to plastic ones so far.

With the help of our domestic and foreign friends and partners, and with dozens of business meetings, hundreds of thousands miles, touring about twenty factories ..., we have found suitable and reliable machines that today allow us to complete a  production line to produce the highest quality paper straws in the world  market.

Our products ( paper straws )are made only of food grade materials and as such is safe for use in the food industry, restaurants, households, etc.

This is how we present our factory, production line and products that we can offer you.

 Our factory, production facilities and warehouses are located in Zagreb, the capital of Croatia.

I would like to draw your attention to the fact that we are specialize only in the production of paper straws. It is our main and only product and our attention is focused only on the quality and realization of the demands and wishes of our customers.

Name: Palm Leaf UK
Description:
Reduce Reuse Recycle - is the mantra of today's climate-conscious world. To make it successful, the countries, corporations and people must find ways to Reduce, Reuse, Recycle, as well as find quality eco-friendly alternatives for everyday products.

PALM LEAF  is a family-run small business based in Woking, in the green Surrey, the United Kingdom and we believe in bringing a positive change to the world. The idea started after we witnessed excessive use of single-use-plastic tableware at home, offices, social events, and even faith-based institutions during parties and events.

Palm Leaf eco-friendly disposable tableware is made from naturally shed Areca palm leaves based on a simple idea of using natural resources without harming nature. A whole range of natural design tableware is created using these leaves by heat pressing them, and the process uses no chemicals or waxes. It is 100% natural and no tree is felled in the entire process.

We bring the Eco-friendly tableware to you, our customers, so you can say NO to plastic, without compromising on your culinary experience.

Name: CONFORTCEL
Description:
CONFORTCEL, UMA ALTERNATIVA INTELIGENTE

A Climatização Evaporativa vem se tornando cada vez mais popular no Brasil. Nos últimos 20 anos novas empresas surgiram e o mercado brasileiro se tornou um dos maiores e mais competitivos do mundo. A venda de climatizadores de todos os tamanhos cresce a cada ano e empresas multinacionais têm voltado seu interesse na América Latina.

As empresas brasileiras vêm investindo e crescendo neste lucrativo mercado, mas as dificuldades encontradas na busca por matérias-primas de alta qualidade com preços competitivos sempre foi um desafio. Conhecendo estas dificuldades cristalizamos um sonho, oferecer o melhor produto pelo melhor preço, proporcionando uma real vantagem competitiva para os nossos clientes.

Assim nasceu a Confortcel, já com vários anos de experiência no mercado brasileiro de climatização evaporativa, chegou para ser a alternativa mais inteligente, com tecnologia e matérias primas 100% brasileiras e qualidade de padrão internacional. Uma empresa dedicada a fabricação de painéis evaporativos onde a relação comercial vai além dos limites da negociação, pois buscamos sempre a melhor aplicação do nosso produto para entregar os melhores resultados.

A ConfortCel fabrica painéis evaporativos que garantem as taxas de eficiência e o perfeito funcionamento dos equipamentos instalados nos ambientes, tornando-se a opção mais inteligente em painéis evaporativos.


PAINÉIS EVAPORATIVOS CONFORTCEL

Os Painéis Evaporativos Confortcel foram cuidadosa e extensivamente testados em laboratórios e em equipamentos para garantir que são a solução confiável para os climatizadores evaporativos instalados em ambientes que necessitam de alta eficiência de resfriamento. Fabricados com tecnologia e matérias primas 100% brasileiras, os painéis Confortcel são sinônimo de durabilidade, eficiência, resistência mecânica e alta taxa de conversão.

Introducing SUSTAINOPHERE to our portfolio, we’re now even more focused on sustainability – by the Earth, for the Earth.

Name: Gates Milling, Inc.
Description:
Since 1978, Gates Milling, Inc. has grown into a premier source of Cypress and Poplar products, as well as the nation’s largest producer of Atlantic White Cedar products. From decking and siding to interior moldings and colored mulch, Gates offers a wide range of products to fit any client’s needs.

All the while, Gates has remained committed to quality over quantity. A fully integrated, full-service facility allows Gates to make its products entirely in-house, giving the team – and the client – complete control over the customization process. The result is high-quality, completely customizable products in the quantities that wholesalers and distributors need at competitive prices.

Full-integration matters because client needs change over time. Gates is a market-driven company, able to adapt to changing tastes, styles and regions without altering its unique in-house process. Gates’ experience in the industry allows the company to predict customer needs, and its state-of-the-art, fully integrated production style allows clients to request what they can’t find elsewhere.

Ultimately, the Gates’ formula is simple: Quality people creating quality wood products.

Name: Horizon Bag
Description:
Horizon is a leading European manufacturer of virgin sack kraft paper and paper bags based out of Estonia. We are the only fully integrated pulp, paper and paper bag manufacturer in the Baltics. Our paper products are exported to over 70 countries. We belong to Singapore-based conglomerate Tolaram.

Horizon paper is 100% virgin brown sack kraft paper with long fibers made from Estonian Pine & Spruce. Our paper provides our bags with strength and durability to ensure our paper bags are robust.  Our paper has excellent printability properties and we manufacture customized printed paper bags with high quality print in up to 8 colours.  Our paper is also certified to be in direct contact with food by ISEGA, Germany. 

We manufacture customized printed paper bags for wide end use applications in industrial, retail and Horeca sectors.  

As a fully integrated pulp, paper and paper bag manufacturer, we have complete control on quality and the manufacturing process. Therefore, we can assure customized quality and fast delivery timelines. 

Both our paper and paper bags are FSC certified - our paper and bags are made of material from responsibly managed renewable forests only. Our paper bags are 100% renewable, recyclable, biodegradable & reusable. We are ahead of EU 2030 targets for renewable energy share and GHG emission reduction.

Our company is also certified according to quality management system standard ISO 9001, energy management ISO 50001 and environmental management system ISO standard 140001. We have also been awarded AAA Credit Rating by international credit information company Creditinfo Eesti AS. The award is in recognition of our contribution towards development of Estonian economy and honest business culture in Estonia.

For inquiries, please contact us at info@horizonbag.ee

Name: The Timber and Forestry Foundation
Description:
The Timber & Forestry Foundation (TFF) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit conservation and education organization that promotes the inherent sustainability, carbon sequestration benefits, and beauty of American timber and hardwoods. We believe that with promotional efforts, advocacy campaigns, and educational programs, these widely varied species of timber and hardwoods can thrive like never before.

As the world moves together toward the goal of carbon neutrality, TFF develops modern educational campaigns and outreach programs using innovative digital tools to reach into U.S. and international markets to drive demand for sustainably managed, legally harvested timber and hardwood products. TFF believes that conveying the true nature of timber and hardwoods as sustainable, renewable, green products is essential to influencing buying trends worldwide.

A Nonprofit that Produces Content for the Hardwoods Industry

The Timber & Forestry Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit conservation and education organization. As such, we are capable of partnering with organizations and companies to develop educational and promotional video content that benefits the industry and our members.

TFF serves hardwood, softwood, and lumber companies and organizations by developing educational videos and campaigns that promote sustainability and the health benefits of specifying timber and hardwood of all kinds, highlighting responsible forest management.

Name: Whitney Sawmills
Description:
Based in Herefordshire, Whitney Sawmills is well established as a leading British sawmill. For many years we have supplied fresh sawn Oak and Douglas Fir beams as well as air- and kiln-dried timber including Oak, Ash, Sweet Chestnut, Sycamore, Cherry, Elm, and Poplar. 

We are also renowned for providing unusual and specialist hardwoods and softwoods in demand for particular restoration projects as well as furniture making and house-building. For example, timber from Whitney Sawmills has been selected for restoration work in both HMS Victory and the King’s dining room in Edinburgh Castle - view case studies for more details.

Recently we have become part of the UK charity, Woodland Heritage which is working to improve and promote this country’s whole timber supply chain from tree planting and management, through processing to quality end products. Our aim is to continue to source an increasing amount of our log supplies from well-managed UK woodlands and estates, as well as from Europe, to help promote the sustainability and legacy of our native timber.

Name: Labro Paper Industry Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Labro paper Industry is a small scale industry that manufactures handmade paper. The plant is located at Shrirampur, Ahmednagar Maharashtra. The handmade paper is a traditional way of producing a paper, which can be used in converted into merchantable products. The raw material used for the production is rags (a piece of old cloth, especially one torn from a larger piece).These rags are recovered from the cloths scrape mills. Thus the entire paper production process is an ecofriendly process. The product developed also has the ecofriendly and recyclable Tag. Thus making it one of a kind industry, that can manufacture green products at a commercial level.
 The paper produced is further processed into various products like cover files, hand bags, lawyer’s briefs, wedding cards and decorative items. The products are competing against the cheap and mass produced Plastic products. But, until recent time’s management has notices the sudden increase in green goods consumption. This trend is also influencing industries product demand factor.

Name: BrokenCartons
Description:
Looking for small quantities of paper and envelopes? Want to turn unwanted inventory into profit? BrokenCartons.com is an e-commerce marketplace that helps members BUY & SELL discounted paper and related products using a co-operative and sustainable platform.

BrokenCartons has its roots deeply planted in the paper, printing and recycling industries since the late 60's. After years of struggling with the difficulties of purchasing small quantities of paper and envelopes, we decided a better solution was needed.

Printing papers are usually sold in "full cartons" only. If a job requires a small amount or "broken carton", you may still have to buy a full carton and run the risk of leftovers sitting on the shelve. When forced to purchase more paper than you need, what do you do with your overstock?

BrokenCartons makes business better by helping members buy and sell discounted paper & envelopes, packaging & supplies, parts & equipment and much more. Our strong supplier relationships and growing membership enables us to provide the best products at the best prices.

Pairing our services with respected industry experts provides even greater value to our members. These partnerships allow us to offer the most in-depth and diverse portfolio of products and services within the industry.

Since BrokenCartons works closely with printers, paper merchants and recycling companies, you'll find what you need when you need it. BrokenCartons accepts products commonly used in Commercial & Graphic Arts, Offset & Digital Printing, Large-Format, Packaging and many other industries.

OUR MISSION is to provide members access to discounted paper, envelopes, packaging, and more.

OUR PURPOSE is to fulfill our members needs and enhance their competitive position.

OUR GOAL is to drive meaningful change within the printing industry using a co-operative model.

JOIN NOW!

Name: Arab company for paper products ltd. - ARAPEPCO
Description:
- Services for the Environment:
Owing to its environmentally conscious policy, ARAPEPCO encourages the recycling of paper and cardboard waste rather than burning or burying it.
Accruing from this policy is the additional source of income for hundreds of families in Aleppo, not to mention it is being a drive to save hard currency allocated for the importation of paper products and a boost to the national economy.

- Paper Industry in Aleppo:
Paper manufacturing is an ancient craft flourished in Aleppo. Benefiting from the distinct geographical location of Aleppo on the Silk Road between China and Europe, paper makers in Aleppo learned from the Chinese how to use cotton fibers instead of rice straw. This resulted in the establishment of 13 primitive paper plants in AL-WARRAQA (Paper Makers) Quarter, so named after their trade. Today, embodied in the Arab Company for Paper Products, history is repeating itself. ARAPEPCO has made great strides in this industry.

Focolsa S.A.S es una planta procesadora de madera fundada en 1981 y orientada al aprovechamiento de maderas reforestadas (bosques cultivados) la cual ha evolucionado no solo en el manejo sostenido y mejoramiento productivo del bosque, sino también en el mejoramiento personal y profesional de su equipo de trabajo. 
En el año 2008 establece plantaciones forestales de Pinus pátula, Pinus tecunumani, Pinus Oocarpa con fines comerciales e industriales en el Municipio de Gómez Plata- Antioquia, integrando procesos de reforestación y transformación de especies de bosques plantados, convirtiendo estos en productos comerciales, por medio de una moderna infraestructura para su manipulación y distribución final. 
Dentro de los mayores logros alcanzados, está el desarrollo de productos utilizando como materia prima los excedentes forestales de la industria. Con estas actividades se logra disminuir el impacto ambiental de las industriales actuales. Hoy en dia ha logrado diseñar sistemas adecuados para la disposición de excendentes maderables de la industria en general y de actividades de podas limpias de areas verdes.

Name: TEMELKOV - Pallets & Pellets Production
Description:
Quality and innovation are at the heart of everything we do. Our mission is to provide reliable and secure wooden pallets that guarantee the safe transportation of our customers’ cargo.

TEMELKOV started its operations in 2000 with one clear goal – production of high-quality wooden pallets. We believe that the future of modern trade is unthinkable without standardized and reliable transport packaging.

At the beginning, we worked in a difficult period for the industry – the time when woodworking was perceived as a separate process, and pallets were not at the forefront. Our first products were standard Euro pallets, but soon after we took a more complex path – the production of non-standard solutions, which almost no one else offered on the market.

Today we specialize in the production of non-standard pallets, wooden boxes, crates and pallets with sizes from 0.5 m to 6.5 m. However, standard Euro pallets continue to be an important part of our portfolio. Our products are used in a wide range of industries - chemical, glass, textile, food and beverage and many others.

Name: Associació d'Empresaris Surers de Catalunya - AECORK
Description:
L’Associació d’Empresaris Surers de Catalunya, AECORK, va ser creada l’any 1977 seguint la trajectòria de l’anomenat “Grupo Provincial de la Industria y Comercio del Corcho” creat l’any 1962. 
La indústria surera, els orígens de la qual es remunten al 1750, ha sabut mantenir-se com a sector, en l’elaboració d’un producte tradicional, dotant-lo d’un important valor afegit basat en la qualitat, la normalització, la innovació i les garanties mediambientals. 
És doncs, un model d’indústria catalana sostenible, que dona uns 1.000 llocs de treball a les comarques del Baix Empordà, la Selva i el Gironès, que exporta prop del 50% de la seva producció i que és present als mercats vinícoles més prestigiosos del món.
AECORK ha apostat fermament per la promoció de la qualitat com a factor de competitivitat entre els seus associats. 
Amb la finalitat de satisfer les necessitats de la indústria d’aquest sector, AECORK, va crear l’Institut Català del Suro, l’any 1991, juntament amb la Generalitat de Catalunya, a efectes de vehicular les estratègies del sector mitjançant unes línies directrius d’actuació que posen l’èmfasi en el màxim aprofitament dels avantatges competitius ja existents de qualitat, imatge, escala tecnològica, etc.

Name: Asia Teak
Description:

Teak is widely regarded as one of the most durable, robust and sought-after tropical hardwoods in the world. As well as managing its own sites, AsiaTeak provides expert contract forestry management services for private individuals and corporations who wish to establish their own teak plantations. 

The collective goal of ASIATEAK and its group of companies is to produce the world’s most sought-after and valuable teak trees. This is achieved through expert forestry management policies, an intimate understanding of the marketplace and strong corporate governance. 

These three pillars of efficient and ethical practice provide a solid foundation with which to maintain the consistent growth of the business worldwide and deliver on its contractual obligations to customers and private clients over the medium to long term.

Description:
Purico Group was founded by Professor Nathu Ram Puri in January 1983. Nat Puri arrived in the UK from the Punjab in 1966 with a degree in mathematics before training as a consulting engineer. Purico is a diversified, industrial manufacturing company with interests in:
 Paper manufacture and distribution
Polymers and plastics
IT and communications
Engineering
Trading companies
Hospitality
Real estate and property investments
 
The core competencies of Purico arise from the integration of multiple technologies and the coordination of diverse production skills over a variety of manufacturing companies. Purico is highly proficient at facilitating knowledge transfer; providing portability of skills throughout peoples and geographies.
 
The intersection of these technologies, the portability of skills and knowledge across the globe and across industry sectors, and the ability to exploit market opportunities within these core competencies, gives Purico the capability to launch new businesses in emerging markets. The company excels in the development of these businesses, providing considerable benefit to the local people and communities whilst also achieving significant market share in those product sectors.

Purico is a Private Company and employs over 3,000 people world wide, including: United Kingdom, USA, Germany, Czech Republic, Hungary, India, Mexico, China and Hong Kong. The Company headquarters are in Nottingham, England. The Groups’ annual sales turnover, under the name of Purico or where Purico is the largest shareholder, exceeds US$650million.
 
Purico always looks to work in partnership; with its suppliers, with its customers, with its investors. It is this inclusive approach that sets the company apart and drives its success.

The Teaford Company can offer an energy and drying system for your pellet mill, OSB, MDF or particleboard plant or any other drying application.
The Teaford Company headquarters and fabrication facilities are located in Alpharetta, Georgia. The fabrication capabilities include an 80,000 square foot shop that is equipped to handle any project. The Company is ASME coded with an in house design team and ASME S, U and R stamps to build and repair all types of pressure vessels including steam boilers and thermal oil heaters. Name: LLC "Zhitomir Cardboard Factory"

Description:
Wij zijn Jeroen en Martijn Dekkers en groeiden op als boerenzonen in Lierop, waar we al vroeg leerden praktisch te denken, hard te werken en respect te hebben voor de natuur en milieu. Het idee voor Hulpie ontstond niet aan de tekentafel of op kantoor, maar gewoon in het dagelijks leven. Het begon bij een alledaags probleem. We zagen hoe boodschappentassen scheurden, spullen in de auto omvielen en hoe veel plastic er eigenlijk verspild werd. Toen dachten we: dat moet toch slimmer en duurzamer kunnen? 

Ons antwoord: Hulpie een stevige, FSC-gekeurde draagdoos die keer op keer te gebruiken is. Daarmee besparen klanten (en de ondernemers) plastic, maken ze hun leven praktischer en dragen ze bij aan een duurzamere samenleving. Een simpel hulpmiddel met groot effect: minder afval, meer gemak. Duurzaam, handig en vooral: een klein hulpmiddel dat voor veel mensen een groot verschil maakt. En het mooiste? Dat iets kleins als een doosje, een grote glimlach kan opleveren.

Description:
Il Coordinamento Nazionale delle Imprese Boschive (CONAIBO) è stato fondato nel corso della Prima Conferenza Nazionale delle Imprese Boschive, svoltasi a Barzio (LC) il 29 settembre 2012, e raccoglie oggi complessivamente 11 associazioni e consorzi di imprese forestali.

La principale motivazione alla base della nascita del CONAIBO è stata la volontà di aggregare le associazioni di imprese boschive regionali e provinciali, presenti sul territorio nazionale, al fine di garantirne una rappresentanza univoca del settore imprenditoriale forestale italiano presso enti e istituzioni e far confluire in un solido ed unico rappresentante nazionale tutte le istanze dei boscaioli professionali, superando le problematiche dell’inquadramento amministrativo diversificato delle imprese forestali che ha sempre impedito l’individuazione di soggetti che facciano proprie le specifiche istanze del settore forestale.

Oltre alla rappresentanza a livello nazionale, gli obiettivi fondamentali del CONAIBO sono la crescita professionale delle imprese boschive, la tutela e la valorizzazione della figura dell’impresa boschiva e dell’operatore forestale, oltre che la promozione e lo sviluppo delle utilizzazioni forestali e, più in generale, del settore forestale nazionale.

Name: Skill-For.Action
Description:
The ETN Skill-For.Action consists on founding and training twelve Early Stage Researchers (ESRs) thematically focussing on understanding the carbon fluxes in managed forest systems. The ESRs network will be motivated and trained to deepen the knowledge on adapting forest management regimes in different climates in terms of carbon balance optimization. The main assumption is that an adaptive and integrated forest management can considerably contribute to a low carbon emitting society.
The Network-wide training activities, supported by the academic and non-academic partners, are structured in order to prepare a new generation of ESRs able to innovate forest management in EU towards a carbon-smart forest management based on multidisciplinary expertise.

The non-academic participants of ETN Skill-For.Action are unique in terms of multi-disciplinarily and trans-sectoral representations. Their strong involvement is an efficient way to qualify ESRs in transforming research ideas into products and services.
We will specifically address a “contamination of ideas” between the domains of forest growth (in the meaning of carbon sequestration) and forest operating efficiency (in the meaning of minimizing fuel consumption and carbon emission).

Our societal challenges will focus on 1) understand complex system dynamics of forests in relation to global change and human society; 2) develop decision support systems for multifunctional forest management; and 3) develop intelligent forest operation systems. We represent a unique opportunity to cope with the societal challenge priorities in line with the recommendation of the Forest-based sector by merging the basic sciences with applied sciences.

Name: Aloysius Krenzer GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Wir sind ein familiengeführtes Unternehmen aus Hessen. Im Landkreis Fulda am Fuße der Wasserkuppe in der Rhön fertigen wir Holzpaletten für nationale und internationale Kunden aus verschiedensten Branchen.

Dabei kommt bei uns alles aus einer Hand: Vom Holzeinkauf aus heimischen Wäldern, über die Produktion der Palettenbretter in drei Sägewerken und der Produktion der Paletten, bis zur anschließenden Logistik. Auch der Handel und die Rücknahme von Paletten gehören zu unserem Service.

Unseren Rohstoffbedarf sichern wir primär durch unsere eigenen drei Sägewerke in Abtsroda, Biebergemünd und Dorndorf. Wir stellen zu einem großen Teil Europaletten auf mehreren Fertigungslinien her. Außerdem fertigen wir Chemiepaletten, Glashüttenpaletten, Industriepaletten sowie zahlreiche Sonderpaletten.

Eine große Kapazität an Trockenkammern gewährleistet eine rein thermische Trocknung unserer Paletten, die ohne chemische Behandlung auskommt und den IPPC-Vorschriften entspricht. Die Auslieferung erfolgt durch den eigenen Fuhrpark und durch Logistikpartner deutschlandweit sowie in die europäischen Nachbarländer. Außerdem befindet sich in einem Kilometer Entfernung ein weiteres überdachtes Palettenlager, um flexibel auf kurzfristige Kundenwünsche reagieren zu können.

Name: Indian Laminate Manufacturer's Association
Description:
The Indian Laminate Manufacturers Association (ILMA) is a prominent industry association that represents and supports the laminate manufacturing sector in India. ILMA plays a crucial role in promoting the growth, development, and sustainability of the Indian laminate industry.

Key aspects and information about the Indian Laminate Manufacturers Association (ILMA) include:

Mission: ILMA is dedicated to advancing the interests of the Indian laminate manufacturers by fostering collaboration, promoting innovation, and advocating for the industry's needs.

Objectives: The association aims to provide a platform for knowledge sharing, networking, and business opportunities among its members. It strives to enhance the competitiveness of Indian laminates in domestic and international markets through initiatives focused on quality, design, and sustainability.

Member Base: ILMA consists of a membership base comprising of HPL  manufacturers, The association represents both large-scale manufacturers and smaller enterprises across the country.

Industry Representation: ILMA acts as a unified voice for the Indian laminate industry, representing its interests at various forums, including government bodies, regulatory authorities, trade associations, and other industry platforms.

Advocacy and Policy Engagement: ILMA actively engages with policymakers and governmental bodies to address industry challenges, influence policy decisions, and create a favorable business environment for laminate manufacturers in India.

Knowledge Sharing and Training: ILMA organizes workshops, seminars, and conferences to promote knowledge sharing, technological advancements, and best practices within the laminate industry. These events facilitate collaboration, skill development, and the exchange of ideas among industry professionals.

Name: BIOtouchless, Inc
Description:
BIOtouchless provides sustainability solutions for public restrooms with 100% sustainable bamboo toilet paper and hand towels, as well as the only sustainable toilet paper dispenser in the market today. It reduces paper consumption by an astonishing 55%!  

Sustainablity takes on many forms and conservation of natural resources is a major part of that strategy. If your organization is striving to attain ESG and sustainability goals switching your paper products from wood pulp paper to bamboo paper may be the single largest advancement you could make this year. And no one will know the difference.

Bamboo grows at a rate of up to three feet per day, which is thirty times faster than a tree.  It begins dissolving after just 30 seconds of contact with water.  This means fewer clogs in toilet bowls and pipes, resulting in fewer overflows, cleanups and damage events.

It also is better for humans, as it cointains no BPA's, no dyes and no scents.

Combined with the BIOtouchless Sustainable Dispenser you can implement an impactful solution virtually overnight.

Today we use 31 million trees annually just for toilet paper. Switching to bamboo paper is not an answer. It is THE answer.

Our products portfolio caters to various sectors like Tobacco packaging, Gift wraps, Soap Wrappers, Tissue papers for packaging and decoration, Crepe Tissue for household use and personal hygiene, Insulation papers, Base Papers for One Time Carbon (OTC) paper for computer stationary, Absorbent Kraft, Carry Bag Kraft, Ribbed Kraft and various other speciality grades used for industrial applications. Apart from this, we also deal in pre-consumed imported waste paper used for recycling. 

Having been into the business of trading various grades of papers and paperboards since 1993, EWPL started manufacturing in 2012. With the ban on plastic use in certain segments of the flexible packaging industry and the rise of environment consciousness, there was a need for good quality, high strength coated and uncoated papers suitable for lamination and packaging. 

EWPL rose to the challenges and provided the market and customers with eco-friendly Super-Calendered Papers, Coated Papers, Wet Strength Papers and Thermal Papers to cater to a wide range of applications and industries. 

Currently, we operate on two coating lines suitable to manufacture a mix of products with a total annual production capacity of 12000 MT. We also have four Super Calenders with a total annual capacity of 24000 MT.

Name: Dharma Bumi Berdikari
Description:
Dharma Bumi Berdikari provides and supplies spesific agricultural goods which is Natural Fiber for industries that uses Natural Fiber for their basic material. 

In producing the Natural Fibers, Dharma Bumi Berdikari is working together with the community in several areas such as in Banten, West Java, Central Java, and North Sumatra. From those areas, together with the local farmers, we produce various Natural Fibers such as Abaca Fiber, Kenaf Fiber, Pina Fiber, Ramie Fiber, Palm Fiber, and Kudzu Fiber. 

Dharma Bumi Berdikari is dedicated to provides and supplies Natural Fibers continously for Industries that uses Natural Fibers with certain codeterminated spesification. 

In Dharma Bumi Berdikari, we have objective to increase the usage of Natural Fibers as basic materials of many industries. Because in our organization, we believe that with the increase of demand for Natural Fibers, it will automatically benefits the community especially the farmers. 

We have high confidence in our believe because from our experience, the production/planting of Natural Fibers will not intersect with the cultivating area of the more mainstream crop such as rice or corn. From that experience we are sure that from planting Natural Fibers, we will open up more opportunity for the community and farmers.

Besides the social benefit, we also believe that by increasing the usage of Natural Fibers, it will also gives Enviromental Benefits. In the production process (planting) the Fibers producing plants will absorp CO2. This is the logical consequence that we get from producing Natural Fibers.

We believe that products that is made from Natural Fibers are bio-degradable, thus it made them enviromental friendly and will not pollute the earth in the future.
 
Dharma Bumi Berdikari believes at it’s utmost that through harmonious interaction between the Industries that uses Natural Fibers, the Farmers, and Nature, will gives unlimited benefits for all parties involved.

A Derula Kft. ma több, mint 350 fős munkavállalói létszámmal rendelkezik, gyártási tevékenységet 3 telephelyen végez:

- Szolnokon rétegelt lemez;

Description:
Wood & Lumber. Lumber from the Russian forest. Exports of sawn timber anywhere in the world.

We strictly adhere to all the rules of production and use in their work as local rules and regulations as well as European and international quality standards.
To all our partners, we offer only high quality boards from obtaining them certificates.
We offer lumber of various sizes and different qualities. Accordingly pilomaterialyvariruetsya price, and depends on the quality and characteristics of the timber.
For example, a fresh timber, humidity no more than 35% and treated with an antiseptic is an order of magnitude lower than 14-16% moisture dry (KD).
Accordingly, we find an individual approach and react flexibly to customer requests.
If you want to work with us you can feel free to write to us by mail or leave a request on the website. Our managers will contact you shortly.
And just a few steps of working with us:
1. You determine which timber you need.
2. Quality is determined by the timber, according to the European or Russian standards.
3. Determines the specification (dimensions of lumber and delivery) of lumber.
4. Defines the terms of delivery and place of delivery, as well as the terms of payment.
5. Make us a request by any available means (website, email, or viber vhatsapp).
6. We will prepare you an offer with price and delivery terms.
7. We are negotiating on the terms of the contract and delivery dates, adjust pricing as necessary.
8. Conclude the contract.
9. We supply lumber for you.
We have individual approach to each client and find ways to solve disputes. We are committed to long-term cooperation and are ready for any debate.

Name: Papyrus Junior-Conseil
Description:
Après une courte pause, Papyrus est de retour !
Créée en 1985, Papyrus Junior-Conseil est une association loi 1901, mettant les compétences techniques et scientifiques des élèves ingénieurs de Grenoble INP-Pagora, l'école internationale du papier, de la communication imprimée et des biomatériaux, au service des entreprises. Elle permet à ses membres de développer leurs compétences transversales par la gestion d'une association organisée comme une entreprise et de financer la vie associative de l'école.

Papyrus réalise essentiellement des tests pour des industriels des secteurs du papier, emballages, carton, fibres, biomatériaux, bioraffinerie et de l'industrie graphique.

Voici le type de missions que Papyrus peut réaliser :
- Propriétés de structure de papier
- Propriétés optiques
- Propriétés mécaniques
- Essais MorFi
- Impressions de flyers
 
Nos atouts:
Une prestation de qualité.
Une réponse à vos demandes dans un délai minimum et à des tarifs très compétitifs.
Des offres au cas par cas pour mieux répondre à vos besoins. 

Notons que depuis sa création Papyrus est vigoureusement soutenue par l'école qui offre les précieux conseils du corps professoral ainsi que l'accès au matériel de l'école, pour effectuer tous les tests dans le cadre de normes.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter à pagora.papyrus@grenoble-inp.fr

Name: ecojot
Description:
Our mission here at ecojot is to be a paper company with a cause for literacy and our environment. Our paper products are made by the finest quality of 100% percent post consumer recycled material and we give children in need around the world a workbook and pen to write their way out of poverty and violence.

Founded by brother and sister team Mark and Carolyn Gavin in 2007, ecojot creates eco-friendly stationery, paper goods and custom products that feature whimsical and inspirational designs. Their love for paper, the planet and art has enabled them to create a sustainable brand available in hundreds of locations around the world. As the designer, Carolyn garners her inspiration from different artistic genres found in her travels and varying facets of life. Mark finds his passion through philanthropy and ensuring the quality and sustainability of each item. Ecojot specializes in a variety of journals,  sketchbooks, children's sketchbooks, gift wrap, planners and note cards that make a perfect companion for your thoughts, gifts and daily organizing needs.

Some facts on ecojot stationery:

    100% post consumer recycled paper
    Vegetable inks and adhesives
    Biodegradeable shrink wrap
    All components are sourced within US and Canada
    Designed by Carolyn Gavin
    Manufactured in Canada
    Every product supports the GIVE Program for children in need
    Proudly B-Certified
    Awarded the Ancient Forest Friendly and Order of the Forest Awards by Canopy in 2012

Name: Nano Termal Kağıt
Description:
Nano Termal Kağıt, 75 yıl sektör tecrübesine sahip “Kubuş Isı Cihazları” Türk markası altında kurulmuş küresel alanda rekabet etmeye gayret eden, topluma ve sanayi kollarına öncü ve örnek olma amacıyla aksiyon alan bir grup firmasıdır.

Firmamız, Türkiye’de neredeyse her yerde, alanda tüketimi olan ve tamamı ithal edilen termal sürümlü kağıtların, yerli sermaye ile üretilmesi gayesiyle 2019 yılında İstanbul’da kurulmuş, kuruluşuyla birlikte kurumumuz “Araştırma&Geliştirme” ve kurumsal altyapı faaliyetlerine hız vermiştir.

Bu süreçte; imalat sürecimizden alınan olumlu sonuçlar ve müşterilerimizden gelen olumlu geri dönütler, firmamızın üretim planlamısını ve üretim yerini genişletmesini zorunlu hale getirmiş, gelecek vizyonumuza bağlılığımız ile 2021 yılının başında “Kırıkkale Organize Sanayi Bölgesinde” 10.000 m² kapalı alan üzerine taşınmış ve seri üretim ile sanayileşme yolunda önemli bir adım atmıştır.

Seri üretime geçilmesi ile gerekli teknolojik ekipman parkı oluşturulmuş, hem iç pazara hem de dünya ülkelerine ürünlerimizi tedarik ederek gerekli aksiyonları almaya özen göstererek müşterilerimize en iyi şekilde hizmet etmeye devam ediyoruz.

Nano Termal Kağıt; jumbo bobinler halinde “Termal Sürümlü Kağıtların” imalatında yerli ve milli olarak kurulan öncü bir firmadır. Jumbo Termal kağıtlar, termal kağıt rulolar, termal barkod etiketleri ve baskı ribonları üretim ve satışı ile İç Anadolu Bölgesinde Türk sanayisine ve ekonomisine katkı sağlamakta, bu kapsamda ulusal ve uluslararası standartlara uygun şekilde kurduğu üretim hattı ve teknolojiyi takip eden makinalaşma ile milli ekonomimize önemli bir katkı sağlamanın gururu ve sorumluluğunu taşımaktadır.

Name: Regional Focus Paper R&D Singapore
Description:
Focus Paper R&D - Singapore is a leading manufacturer and supplier of high-quality pulp, paper, and paperboard products, dedicated to innovation, reliability, and sustainability. Established in 2013, our company has grown into a trusted name in the industry, providing customized paper solutions to meet the evolving needs of businesses worldwide.

Our roots trace back to Qingdao Focus Paper Co., Ltd., a distinguished Chinese enterprise founded in the 1990s, specializing in paper production and manufacturing machinery. Drawing from decades of expertise, Focus Paper Singapore was established to meet the growing demand in the Southeast Asian market.

From our headquarters in Singapore, we offer an extensive range of products, including thermal labels, A5, A4 and A3 size paper, and thermal paper rolls for POS and NETS systems. Our production capabilities ensure precision-crafted, durable, and sustainable paper solutions for industries such as retail, finance, logistics, and office supply.

At Focus Paper Singapore, we go beyond manufacturing, working closely with clients to develop tailored paper solutions. Whether specialized labelling, bulk printing, or eco-friendly alternatives, we deliver top-tier quality and efficiency. Our commitment to innovation and excellence drives us to invest in cutting-edge technology, quality control, and sustainability practices, ensuring compliance with global standards while reducing environmental impact.
Dedicated to customer success, we provide full-service support, from consultation and customization to logistics and supply chain solutions. Our expert team guarantees premium paper products with seamless service and reliability.

Learn more: https://focuspaper.com.sg/

Name: ERTE Grupa SIA
Description:
ERTE Grupa ir viens no vadošajiem kokmateriālu produktu ražotājiem Latvijā ar vairāk nekā 15 gadu pieredzi nozarē. Uzņēmums dibināts 2007. gadā, un šobrīd gan ražotne, gan administrācija atrodas Zemgalē – Dobeles novada Gardenē. 

Mūsu galvenais darbības virziens ir apaļkoka pārstrāde tādos augstas kvalitātes koksnes produktos kā koka paletes, palešu dēļi, celtniecības brusas u.c. 

ERTE Grupa pirmsākumos mūsu komanda nodarbojās tieši ar koka palešu un kokmateriālu tirdzniecību. Tomēr jau divus gadus pēc dibināšanas savu darbību paplašinājām, uzsākot arī kokmateriālu ražošanu.

Savas darbības laikā esam no maza vietējā uzņēmuma kļuvuši par vienu no lielākajiem koka palešu un citu koksnes produktu eksportētājiem Baltijas valstīs, ar lepnumu nesot Latvijas vārdu pasaulē. Šobrīd ERTE Grupa kokmateriālu produktus piegādā uz vairāk nekā 25 valstīm Eiropā, Āfrikā, Tuvajos Austrumos un Āzijā. 

Uzņēmuma klienti un sadarbības partneri augstu novērtē mūsu koksnes produktu kvalitāti. Pateicoties tam, mums ir iespēja augt un ik gadu palielināt ražošanas apjomu, kas nodrošina ERTE Grupa stabilu izaugsmi un pozīcijas kokmateriālu tirgū. 

Mūsu ražotnes kapacitāte ļauj gada laikā pārstrādāt vairāk nekā 150 000 m³ apaļkoka pirmās un otrās klases kokmateriālos. Savukārt ERTE Grupa koka palešu ražotnē top ap 500 000 koka palešu gadā, saražojot arī 100 000 m³ zāģskaidas un  180 000 m³ šķeldas.

Colombian teak is a premium natural material because it offers the finest protection and incredible good looks. The natural tendency for Colombian teak is to patina beautifully into a honey-gold look, which develops over time in natural conditions including Sunlight and ambient moisture. The integrity of Colombia Teak wood allows it to weather gracefully, but also maintain its integrity so as not to degrade like other, lesser grades of plantation teak found in the market.

Name: Cidagu Toys Industry and Trade Limited Company

Description:
Kastamonu, one of the two largest groups of Hayat Holding operating on a global scale, was founded in 1969 in Istanbul to manufacture wood-based panels. Our company, which has 100% domestic capital, started production in 1971 at our first plant, Kastamonu Chipboard Factory. We are currently producing in 6 locations domestically: Kastamonu, Gebze, Balikesir, Samsun, Tarsus and Adana. We have production facilities in 6 countries, including Turkey, Romania, Bulgaria, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Russia and Italy. In the US, we have a company in which we manage the procurement and logistics processes of wood chip. We employ approximately 6,300 people in our domestic and international production facilities and offices.
Our facilities have a total production capacity of 5.5 million m³ / year, including 2.4 million m³ / year MDF, 3.1 million m³ / year chipboard, 70 million m² / year laminate flooring. These figures make us the seventh largest producer in the world and the fourth largest in Europe. In MDF, chipboard, laminate flooring, and door panel products based scale, we are one of the forth biggest producers in the world we are located. In Turkey, we have about 30% market share.

Name: Koninklijke Eduard van Leer
Description:
Koninklijke Eduard van Leer BV (KEVL) in Amsterdam was established January 1, 1883 and started as an agency company in several timber products.

In the early 20th century KEVL also added paper agencies to their activities. After the 2nd World War a further growth was created by adding pulp, board and plywood agencies to the product range.

In 1983 Her Majesty Queen Beatrix granted Eduard van Leer the predicate Royal (Koninklijke).

Late 80's a further geographic expansion was launched by starting own sales offices in Western Europe. In the 90's KEVL expanded into an international marketing organization providing commercial, logistic and financial services in the global forest products trade. KEVL continuously integrates both horizontally and vertically in this dynamic market.

In the beginning of the 21st century KEVL started with global sourcing, production and sales of biomass for energy production. During the same period we also developed a patented process to increase the durability of softwood.

Name: LESY Slovenskej republiky, štátny podnik
Description:
- Predmetom činnosti LESY SR, štátny podnik, je spravovanie lesného a iného majetku vo vlastníctve SR.
- Cieľom štátneho podniku je zabezpečenie trvalo udržateľného obhospodarovania lesov na Slovensku, ako aj rešpektovanie princípov ochrany životného prostredia.
Činnosť podniku zahŕňa predovšetkým zakladanie a pestovanie lesných porastov, ich následnú výchovu a ochranu až po ťažbu a následnú obnovu.
- Celá výmera lesných porastov je certifikovaná  podľa schém PEFC a čiastočne FSC.
- Hospodárime  na výmere takmer 880 tisíc ha lesných pozemkov na celom Slovensku.
- Sme významným aktérom na trhu s drevom, dodávky dreva predstavujú cca 50% z celkového objemu obhospodarovateľov v rámci SR.
- Zamestnávame viac ako 3 400 zamestnancov v rámci celého Slovenska.
- V súčasnosti podnik tvorí 12 organizačných zložiek naprieč celým Slovenskom a dve špecializované organizačné zložky.
- Pri obhospodarovaní lesných pozemkov sa uplatňuje aj tzv. prírode blízke obhospodarovanie lesov.

Lesnatosť  na Slovensku v súčasnosti predstavuje viac ako 41% rozlohy našej krajiny. 
Za posledných 170 rokov sa výmera lesných porastov zvýšila o viac ako 13%.
Slovenská republika sa tak radí medzi najvýznamnejšie lesnícke krajiny.

Name: Caliper Forest Products Inc
Description:
History
Growing up with a father in the lumber business for over forty years, Stephen gravitated to the industry naturally. Through a combination of experience, passion, and entrepreneurial ingenuity, Caliper Forest Products was developed. March 2018 Caliper opened its doors and services supplying SPF and Doug-Fir in a variety of grades to customers that reach across North America.

Mission
Our goal at Caliper Forest Products is to provide high quality, reliable lumber products and services. We understand that our customers require timely, dynamic service through the whole value chain, manufacturers and retailers alike. We deliver on these promises through our expertise in procurement, product knowledge, and logistics. A solutions focused company, Caliper appreciates that each of our customers’ businesses are unique and will have specific needs, we strive to take a tailored, adaptive approach with each customer to satisfy these requirements.

Values
Conducting business with transparency, integrity and due diligence
Value Creation – Always adapt with ever-changing market conditions to provide continuous innovative solutions to our customers
Emphasis on efficiency – time, process, customer focused

Name: Kastamonu Russia
Description:
Компания KАСТАМОНУ, одна из двух крупнейших групп Hayat Holding, работающая в мировом масштабе, была основана в 1969 году в Стамбуле для производства древесных плит. Наша компания, имеющая 100% отечественного капитала, начала производство в 1971 году на нашем первом заводе, КАСТАМОНУ завод ДСП. В настоящее время мы производим в 6 локациях внутри страны: Кастамону, Гебзе, Балыкесир, Самсун, Тарсус и Адана. У нас есть производственные мощности в 6 странах, включая Турцию, Румынию, Болгарию, Боснию и Герцеговину, Россию и Италию. В США у нас есть компания, в которой мы управляем процессами закупок и логистики древесной щепы. В наших отечественных и международных производственных объектах и офисах работают около 6300 человек.

Общая производственная мощность наших заводов составляет 5,5 млн. м³/год, в том числе 2,4 млн. м³/год МДФ, 3,1 млн. м³/год ДСП, 70 млн. м²/год ламината. Эти показатели делают нас седьмым крупнейшим производителем в мире и четвертым крупнейшим производителем в Европе. В масштабе МДФ, ДСП, ламината и дверных панелей мы являемся одним из крупнейших мировых производителей в мире. В Турции у нас около 30% рынка.

Name: NorthPac Forestry Group Ltd.
Description:
NorthPac Forestry Group Ltd. is a privately-owned company that was formed in 2018 as a merger between Brinkman Forest Ltd. and Alcan Trading Ltd. Both Brinkman Forest and Alcan Trading were based out of Northwest BC, and both companies have vast experience in all aspects of forestry and sustainable resource development.

NorthPac Forestry Group Ltd. understands the challenges that are often the precursors to great success. We welcome the opportunity to develop different business concepts with our clients and partners to create the models best suited for them.  In today’s ever-changing environment it is important to create business and operational models that work for both our partners, our clients and the industry proponents we seek to bid on opportunities with.

We at NorthPac Forestry Group Ltd. are not here because of an industry boom. We have worked through the boom and bust cycles of the forest sector and are here to stay. We are very proud of our individual contributions to the forest industry in the Northwest.

We are particularly proud of the relationship and business opportunities we have established with First Nations who in a very significant way have contributed greatly to our success and helped us build a strong and meaningful foundation separately and together.

Description:

The following three main points apply to LIGNOTUBEs:
Lightweight construction + ecology + design

This results in a wide range of possible applications in a wide variety of industries, such as furniture, lighting, interiors, packaging, sports equipment or musical instruments.

LIGNOTUBE's vision and goal is to establish the material wood tube as another standard semi-finished product for construction and design and to offer it to customers on an industrial production scale.

Name: simply
Description:

SWEDBOARD AB es una empresa con sede en Suecia que fabrica tableros innovadores y respetuosos con el medio ambiente para la industria global de impresión de gran formato, totalmente libres de PVC que contienen en su mayoría  fibra de papel lo cual le da múltiples beneficios, livianos pero aún muy rígidos, pueden usarse tanto en interiores (SB Fibre) como en exteriores (SB Composite) además otros beneficios como:
100% reciclables.
Un tablero de 16 mm = 98% de fibra de papel.
Emisiones negativas de CO2.
Secuestro de carbono en el bosque = -610 CO2.
Producción y transporte de la fábrica de papel = +227 CO2.
Producción y transporte de tableros = +180 CO2
El tablero de SB Fiber produce una emisión de CO2 negativa.
No se arruga en ninguna dirección, no necesita laminación, se puede utilizar en temperaturas desde -20ºC hasta +120ºC.
Nuevo método de producción libre de polvo en el corte.
Made in Sweden lo cual garantiza todas la condiciones de buenas   prácticas de manufactura, derechos humanos y altos estándares de calidad.

Name: Sutton Timber
Description:
At Sutton Timber we source standing trees of English and European Hardwoods. From Oak to Elm and Ash to Cherry our wood is sourced from privately owned woodlands and government forests across the UK and Europe. By personally purchasing the logs on site, overseeing the milling, kiln drying and end sale Ben is able to be completely confident in the quality of his product and offer a fair and competitive price to his clients

We hold a comprehensive stock of kiln dried and air dried wood ready for immediate delivery. Air dried timber is moved from Helmdon Sawmills in Northamptonshire to our yard at Sotterley Sawmills in Suffolk. This is where Ben’s team takes over production.  We have five high tech kilns to further dry the wood. All our trees are graded and purchased by Ben Sutton.  The logs are sawn at Helmdon Sawmills in Northamptonshire and kilned at Sotterley Sawmills in Suffolk. The sawn wood is then prepared and distributed for sale. 

With a business heritage stretching back over 20 years Ben has decided to further develop and grow his business. The product range has been extended to include engineered flooring a joinery workshop has been opened to offer a bespoke service to customers. Beautiful solid and engineered floors, kitchen worktops, ledge and brace doors and staircases are just part of the range now available as finished products.

Ben’s extensive knowledge of the timber trade and a conscientious team in support, the focus is squarely on giving the customer exactly what he requires.

Name: Ålands Skogsindustrier Ab
Description:
Ålands Skogsindustrier Ab is a privately owned Åland company that works with timber procurement and forest services and invests in a high degree of processing of the timber. Most of the timber purchased on Åland is processed into sawn products, incl. planed and impregnated timber, as well as for cellulose and energy chips. We have about 40 employees of our own and we employ about the same number of forest and truck contractors full time. For us, it is important to collaborate with local actors and contribute to the wheels turning in our society.

Despite the strong local roots, the entire Baltic Sea region is our home market. Our own port and our efficient sea transport means that we can deliver products e.g. to the cellulose industry in Finland and Sweden. We also supply bioenergy outside Åland. When it comes to sawn products, we prioritise the Åland market, but also export a small part, e.g. to Germany and Belgium.

Ålands Skogsindustrier wants to work closely with its suppliers and customers. We want the forests to be sustainably managed for the future, we invest in forest management tools like thinning, and we receive timber from the entire Åland archipelago. We want close and long-term cooperation with our customers and we develop our products for their needs. Ålands Skogsindustrier wants good profitability and growth. The supply of timber on Åland is not unlimited and therefore growth can take place through continued processing of the products, with complementary products and services or by establishing operations outside Åland as well.

Name: Western Wood Products Association
Description:
Western Wood Products Association represents lumber manufacturers in the 12 Western states and Alaska. The largest lumber association in the region, WWPA provides service covering over 8 billion board feet of annual Western lumber production.

Member mills have access and can guide Association activities in all three service areas. In addition, WWPA provides nonmember quality assurance services, including grade inspection, heat-treating, remanufactured wood, and glued products.

WWPA mills yearly produce more than 60% of the lumber manufactured in the West. The Member roster features the top independent lumber companies in North America, with mills that lead the industry in manufacturing technology, operating efficiencies, and sales strategies.

WWPA's headquarters are located in Lake Oswego, OR. The Association's field staff are recognized throughout the sawmilling industry, with each averaging more than two decades of lumber quality control experience. In addition, WWPA technical and product support professionals are acknowledged experts in using Western lumber in construction. Thousands of people seek the statistical and product information created by the Association's staff each year.

Name: Batsford Timber Ltd
Description:
For 25 years the family business of Batsford Timber has been supplying fencing requisites to the professional contractor and public sector.

Having been a fencing contractor since 1978, Bob Clark founded the business in 1989 with a sawmill at the Batsford Estate Yard near Moreton– in–Marsh, Gloucestershire. Based on quality timber and fair prices the business grew and prospered.

The company has since grown and today with 20 employees including Bob’s wife Maureen a fellow director, their son Robin also a director who is charged with business development.

The cornerstone of the business has been sourcing the best timber, 60% of which is UK grown with the balance imported from Scandinavia, Eastern Europe and the Baltic states.

As a former fencing contractor Bob, is only too aware of the importance of the correct wood preservative and its application to ensure the longest possible life of the timber. Bob and Robin have undertaken in-depth research to find the best wood treatments and the differences in quality of such generic terms as ‘creosote.’ In 2012 a state of the art creosote treatment plant was installed at Longleat replacing the old creosote plant. The purchased untreated redwood is then treated with 90% creosote oil imported from Germany. Such high quality contrasts with some imported creosoted timber products where the creosote oil content can vary from 3% to 14%. At the Longleat plant the timber is impregnated with creosote at 100°C. This gives better penetration, is cleaner to handle and gives off less smell. Domestic decking and other timber products are treated with ‘Tanalith E’ to give optimum protection against insects and all forms of wood decay.

Today, Batsford Timber is so much more than just a timber merchant. The extensive shop and retail area is a ‘One stop shop’ for everything to do with fencing; from fixings and wire, tools and safety equipment plus posts, rails, sheds and decking.

Name: AKE
Description:
2003 yılında kurulan AKE Kağıt, kağıt ambalaj sektöründe hizmet ve ürünleriyle müşterilerinin tüm ihtiyaçlarına hızlı ve etkili bir şekilde yanıt vermeyi kendine ilke edinmiştir. Kuruluşumuzun temel değerleri arasında yenilikçilik, gelişim, mükemmeliyet ve güven kavramları yer almaktadır. Bu değerler doğrultusunda AKE Kağıt, müşteri memnuniyetinin her şeyden önemli olduğuna yürekten inanmaktadır.

AKE Kağıt, uzun yıllara dayanan bilgi ve deneyimiyle Türkiye’nin önde gelen kağıt ambalaj firmaları arasında yer almaktadır. Şirketimiz, çalışanlarının güvenliğine ve insan sağlığına büyük önem vermekte, aynı zamanda doğaya saygıyı vazgeçilmez bir prensip olarak görmektedir. Bu değerler, şirketimizin faaliyetlerinin her aşamasında kendini göstermekte ve sürdürülebilir bir iş modeli benimsememizi sağlamaktadır.

AKE Kağıt, geniş bir satış ve dağıtım ağına sahip olup, her zaman müşterilerine en hızlı şekilde ulaşmayı hedeflemektedir. Şirketimiz, üretim alanındaki diğer firmalarla da güçlenerek, sektördeki konumunu daha da sağlamlaştırmaktadır. Nerede olursanız olun, AKE Kağıt size maksimum hızda ve anlayışla hizmet sunmaktadır. Müşteri memnuniyetini en üst seviyede tutmak için sürekli olarak kendimizi yeniliyor ve geliştiriyoruz.

Şirketimiz, ilkeli çalışma prensipleri ile kısa sürede sektörünün öncü kuruluşlarından biri olmayı başarmış olup, yıllardır zincir restoranlar, havayolu şirketleri, oteller ve catering firmalarına hizmet vermektedir. Aynı zamanda, perakende sektöründe de öncü firmalardan biri olarak tanınmaktayız. Bu başarı, sahip olduğumuz BCI (British Certifications Inc.), ISO 22000 ve FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) kalite belgeleriyle de tescillenmiştir. Bu belgeler, ürün ve hizmetlerimizin uluslararası standartlarda olduğunu kanıtlamaktadır.

Bunun yanı sıra, peçete alanında birçok yeniliği sektöre AKE Kağıt olarak biz getirmiş bulunmaktayız. Yenilikçi yaklaşımımız ve kalite anlayışımızla sektörde fark yaratıyoruz.
