Name: C-Pac
Description:
So Who is C-Pac and What Does it Stand For?
Founded in Vancouver, BC in 1983, our company began as the distribution arm of Convert Pac Inc., a US-based paper roll manufacturer. In 1987 we became an independent, privately held, 100% Canadian owned and operated company. C-Pac was coined because well, it's just catchier to say!

Today, C-Pac is much more than just paper. With solid, mature relationships with several of Canada's largest retailers, we now distribute a diverse portfolio including consumer electronics and computer accessories. From headphones to laptop bags, we are continually expanding our product offering and customer base.

Our Philosophy: Make Your Life Simple
Running any business is tough, whether you are a do-it-all entrepreneur or a multi-billion dollar giant. Everyone wants to work 'on' their business everyday but instead end up working 'in' your business. As your Canadian partner, we aim to proactively prevent any 'fires' so you can focus on growing your company.
 
It might be a cliché but it's the truth - with C-Pac you aren't just customer #329493. We build long-term relationships with every customer. Just like any relationship we strive to learn everything about your company's personality and its unique needs. Our team is dedicated to ensure we meet your requirements, no matter how difficult or time-constrained they might appear. We always find a way to get the job done so you can sit back and relax.

Le bois est la matière première sur laquelle repose les activités de la Nouvelle Scierie d’Adzopé. Depuis sa création en 1993 par Monsieur SAHLY Rafic (PCA), la Nouvelle Scierie d’Adzopé a su développer une véritable philosophie du bois.

Fort de cet amour du bois, Monsieur SAHLY Rafic et fils ont mis en place deux unités de transformation du bois en Côte d’Ivoire.

Avec une capacité de production annuelle de 20.000 mètres cube essentiellement destiné à l’export, les activités de la N.S.A se regroupent autour de l’exploitation forestière,du deroulage, du sciage des essences, du séchage du bois, du reboisement de la matière première, mais aussi à travers la production de produits finis et leur commercialisation.

Au dela de la façon dont chaque unité de production remplit ses activités, le succès de l’entreprise repose sur la qualité de leur coordination, mais aussi sur « un savoir faire » notamment dans les domaines suivants :

Le respect et la valorisation de la matière première
La compréhension du marché qu concerne toute les activités s’articulant autour du métier du bois.
La gestion de la relation client : à travers toutes les activités consacrées à une meilleure compréhension des clients, à l’intensification des relations avec eux, et de la capacité de l’entreprise à maîtriser la valeur réelle pour le client et la satisfaction qui en résulte.

Name: MABET S.A.
Description:
Maderera Boliviana Etienne S.A. (MABET S.A.) is a Bolivian Company established on September 5th, 1985. Since its foundation, it has shown a strong dedication to use its forest resources, which extend over more than 400,000 hectares, in an ecologically sustainable, profitable and socially responsible manner.

As of 1993, Mabet began its export operations in the wood sector after making significant investments and strategic alliances. The company quickly entered the European, American and Asian markets and represented a peak market share of 40% of Bolivian Wood Exports.

The main product for export until recent years used to be doors and frames, which were shipped mainly to the USA and Chile. Due to changing market conditions and substitutes in recent years, Mabet's focus increasingly shifted towards the production of processed wood, decking, flooring and rough wood, which are exported to clients all over the world, particularly in Europe and the United States.

Around 2008, Mabet extended its scope and added the Brazil Nut as a new business division. The motivation for this step was to diversify the activities and to use the forest resources more profoundly. 

Initially, the focus of the Brazil Nut activities were limited to the collection and sales of the raw material to local factories. After years of positive experiences and consistent growth, Mabet amplified its scope and today integrates the value chain from collection until export to markets in Europa, America and Asia.

Since starting operations, its paramount for Mabet to do this in a socially responsible way. With the awareness that the core activities provide the main income source for many families of the local communities, Mabet strives for a high degree of involvement through employment in the logging, harvesting and production processes and therewith provides support such as income and healthcare.

Description:
Der Waldbesitzerverband für Thüringen e. V. wurde am 18.09.1990 in Gierstädt gegründet und ist im Vereinsregister in Erfurt unter der Nummer 840 eingetragen. Nach seiner Satzung hat er den Zweck, die berufsständischen, rechtlichen und forstpolitischen Interessen der Besitzer des Nichtstaatswaldes zu vertreten und die Unantastbarkeit des Waldeigentums, die Freiheit seiner Bewirtschaftung und das Recht auf Selbstverwaltung zu bewahren.

Im Vorstand des Waldbesitzerverbandes ist der Kleinprivatwald, der Gemeinschaftswald, der mittlere Privatwald und der Kirchenwald vertreten.

Die Mitgliedsfläche beträgt etwa 125.000 ha Wald. Mitglied sind ca. 300 Forstbetriebsgemeinschaften, Waldgemeinschaften oder -genossenschaften, ca. 100 größere Forstbetriebe, ca. 300 Einzelwaldbesitzer sowie Kirchenwaldungen.

Name: PartyBio
Description:
I nostri prodotti sono realizzati esclusivamente con materiali organici che, attraverso apposito trattamento tecnologico di recupero biologico effettuato senza l'ausilio di additivi chimici, vengono trasformati in piatti. 

Festeggiare un evento importante o fare una cena a casa con gli amici con i nostri prodotti è da oggi ancora più motivante e gratificante.

Essere green rappresenta per tanti uno stato di maturazione, una consapevolezza di vivere in un pianeta dove la maggior parte delle risorse sono finite e dove ognuno nel suo piccolo si deve dare da fare per dare alle generazioni presenti e future un pianeta più abitabile e più giusto. 

Il ciclo di vita del prodotto nella civiltà del consumo è sostanzialmente diviso in tre fasi: produzione, uso/consumo, abbandono. Tutto questo ha un impatto significativo a livello ambientale con la creazione di enormi discariche o di inceneritori altrettanto inquinanti, per non parlare del consumo delle risorse. La cultura del riciclo è circolare e prevede l’utilizzo di un determinato materiale per il medesimo scopo e/o per altri affini o il riadattamento e il riutilizzo in altri ambiti anche talvolta molto diversi.

Name: Houtwarenfabriek Siemerink B.V.
Description:
Siemerink Houtwaren‘s expertise in processing wood and producing stretcher bars since 1932, has made it one of the most reliable manufacturers of artist’ s materials in Europe.

According to a saying, ‘a painting will never be better than its surface’. Siemerink knows this better than anyone else. For three generations the focus has been on sustainable, honest quality, with the sole objective to offer the artist or advanced non-professional the best basis for his or her painting, drawing or aquarelle. The frames, the canvas, the priming and finish - the focus is on quality for each item. Irrespective of whether the artist uses oil, tempera gouache or acrylic paint: Siemerink’ s products are always the best basis for his/her creativity and expression.

Art has no limitations. Siemerink therefore provides stretcher bars and canvasses in various sizes, types and quality. Because artists don’t like conventions and like to explore beyond the beaten track, Siemerink also provides customized solutions. A canvas with a groove? No problem. An extra small corner, an extreme frame size or just a small one? An angled corner or a deep frame? Whatever your demands, we can make it.     

Art is produced at a whim of passion. A painter or artist wants to put his/her fervour and passion onto the canvas as quickly as possible. No problem for Siemerink. Fast and flexible delivery times are things that are standard to us.

Needless to say, Siemerink uses sustainable materials such as wood from sustainable forestry and high quality, pure linen or cotton. And of course our adhesives contain no formaldehyde  or other hazardous substances.

Siemerink offers ‘The base to perfection’ with the combination of flexibility, environmentally friendly production and first class products!

Il processo di Sicem Saga utilizza legno di pioppo da coltivazione  e di  riciclo, ha consumi di acqua inferiori alle BAT  e l’energia è autoprodotta in cogenerazione ad alto rendimento .E’ inoltre stata autorizzata la costruzione e superata l’asta per accedere al bando  PNNR  per  la realizzazione di un  progetto innovativo che otterrà  biometano dalle  acque di processo , compiendo uno step fondamentale per la TOTALE circolarità del processo produttivo

L'Italia vanta una grande esperienza nella coltivazione del pioppo che è conosciuto per l'eccellente qualità e la rapida crescita.
 
La Sicem Saga, prima a produrre pasta chemimeccanica da chips con l'impiego di raffinatori a disco, nel 1961 dopo un anno di produzione ha introdotto un sistema di produzione fortemente innovativo.
 
Tale metodo, continuamente modificato e perfezionato con successivi brevetti, si è dimostrato la chiave per la produzione di nuove paste per carta ad alta resa, di notevole finezza e qualità costante. L'estrema versatilità dell'impianto consente di produrre paste "personalizzate" secondo le esigenze del cliente.

Énoncé de mission
Chez TAG, nous nous engageons à offrir un service et des produits de la plus grande qualité par le truchement de notre quête incessante d’innovation et d’acquisition de savoir.

Vision de l’entreprise
Exploiter notre entreprise de la façon la plus efficiente, efficace et rentable qui soit, tout en respectant une rigoureuse politique en matière d’environnement et de développement durable.

Valeurs de l’entreprise
TAG est guidée par cinq valeurs fondamentales : fiabilité, innovation, intégrité, esprit d’équipe et passion. En définissant ces valeurs, TAG souhaite favoriser un milieu de travail positif et renforcer l’engagement de son équipe. Ces valeurs nous aident à atteindre nos objectifs et à relever de multiples défis, tout en demeurant solides, stables et innovateurs.

Name: Bui Giordano s.n.c.
Description:
La Bui Giordano nasce nel 1962 commercializzando il cartone a nido d’ape prodotto dalle Cartiere di Verona, il cui brevetto viene poi ceduto al sig. Giordano Bui, in accordo con il Commendator Seminari, presidente delle cartiere stesse.
Da allora l’azienda iniziaa produrre il nido d’ape, prima in blocchi, poi in lastre, per facilitare la lavorazione ai falegnami; praticità e buon prezzo lo rendono sempre più richiesto per la produzione di pannelli tamburati.
 
In seguito, grazie all’introduzione delle presse a vapore, diventa possibile fornire lastre calibrate in vari spessori. Con il passare degli anni l’azienda amplia le proprie attività iniziando a produrre carta ondulata per l’imballaggio e a proporre i propri prodotti in versione ignifuga. Nel 1998 l’introduzione dei figli di Giordano, Angelo e Daniele Bui, nella gestione dell’azienda
(da cui la nuova denominazione “Bui Giordano snc di Bui A. & D.”) porta numerose novità, l’ultima delle quali, presentata nel 2011 a Viscom, è l’Honeycomb Panel, ovvero il pannello in cartone alveolare completamente ecologico utilizzabile nei settori dell’arredamento
e della pubblicità.
 
Oggi la Bui Giordano snc vanta un’attrezzatura all’avanguardia, con linee completamente automatizzate capaci di produrre materiale di elevata qualità tecnica certificata da studi compiuti dal Politecnico di Milano.

The Company's Paper segment includes kraft paper produced at the Prince George pulp and paper mill. The Northwood pulp mill is a two-line pulp mill with annual production capacity of approximately 600, 000 tons of Northern Bleached Softwood Kraft (NBSK) pulp. The Intercontinental pulp mill is a single-line pulp mill with annual production capacity of approximately 320, 000 tons of NBSK pulp. The Prince George pulp and paper mill is an integrated two line pulp and paper mill. The Taylor pulp mill is a Bleached Chemi-Thermo Mechanical Pulp (BCTMP) mill located in Taylor, British Columbia with an annual production capacity of approximately 220, 000 tons of BCTMP.

Name: Happy Cat's Litter
Description:
Happy Cat’s Litter was developed for one purpose – to create the world’s best cat litter for both your kitty and the environment. On top of that, the kitty litter also had to be easy on you, which is why our product controls odour, and is biodegradable, organic, compostable and, best of all, cheap!

The team behind Happy Cat’s Litter are unabashed cat lovers, who have managed recycling ventures over many years. We knew there must be a better way for cats to go to the toilet, which is why we’ve created a cat litter from 100% recycled paper, ensuring that clean-up is as easy as flushing the toilet!

Features of Happy Cat’s Litter
In designing Happy Cat’s Litter, we decided that it had to have to have 13 essential features, thereby satisfying our goal of creating a product that is good for your cat, you, and the environment. These are:

- Odour Control
- Eco Friendly
- Biodegradable
- Flushable
- Non Tracking
- Paper Pellet
- Recycled Paper
- Dust Free
- Natural
- Compostable
- Unscented
- Organic
- Cheap

These features all combine to create a natural cat litter that is comfortable for your kitty, easy for you to keep clean and kind to the environment. If you flush it down the toilet, the recycled paper pellets are instantly broken down by the water. If you prefer to put it in the bin, it is biodegradable and compostable, meaning it won’t sit in a landfill and pollute the environment.

It is also unscented, which means it is perfect in terms of odour control—it doesn’t fill your house with the smell of chemicals. And, because it is non tracking, you can rely on it to keep your kitty’s business safely inside the litter tray.

It is dust free so that it won’t affect anyone suffering from allergies and best of all, it’s cheap. We have significant relationships within the recycling world, which means we can purchase high-quality recycled paper at incredible prices. Keeping the costs down is all part of providing a product that works for you.

Name: Nahe Pulp
Description:
NAHE Pulp is building a European network of associated mini-mills for the fully green production of pulps for paper and board.

For decades to come, paper will continue to be one of the utmost commodities in our society. Nowadays, more and more papers are produced out of recycled fiber materials, however new virgin fibres will always be needed as part of a sustainable recycling industry. This virgin pulp is mainly produced from trees in large mega-factories in forest rich countries elsewhere.
Our 3rd generation bio-refineries will not use trees for their raw material but rather they use locally available rest products like straw. Our production process can be qualified as fully green and is non-wood and non-food.

On top of that, we scale our mills to a size that regional / local nature can truly sustain. The raw materials needed for continuous operation have to be reliably sourced from within a relatively small action radius, resulting in relative small refinery operations (mini-mills).

Our keen eye on the environmental burden of logistics combined with the 3rd generation bio technology of the actual operations result in our end product, a pulp for paper and board that nature can sustain.

•	Repurpose recyclable materials to manufactures in which uses them as raw materials

Our mission is to provide recycling solutions that eliminate waste in our communities by being stewards of sustainability and establishing effective waste stream management systems.

EcoCycle also provides secure document destruction services. Customers can use the reliability of our regularly scheduled mobile paper shredding service to set up routine appointments at a time convenient for them.  Whether you have a few boxes of paper or a room full of documents, Eco Cycle offer a one-time purge shredding service.

Eco Cycle provides full service recycling programs that handle paper, plastic, wood, metal, and niche products.  With over 20 years of combined professional experience in the paper, packaging and recycling industry.   We ensure safe and responsible processing of all materials.

Name: IPS Testing
Description:
Based in Appleton, Wisconsin, Integrated Paper Services (IPS Testing), Inc., serves as an independent testing lab for the paper and pulp, nonwovens, healthcare and allied industries.
 
Our laboratory combines physical testing and interpretive data analysis to offer testing services that help improve and ensure the quality of countless products and many household names you have came to trust across the Midwest and United States, North America and internationally.
Grounded in sound processes, the IPS Testing Experts have years of experience in operations and physical testing in both the consumer and supplier environments by performing testing and analyses for more than 250 clients each year.
 
Our U.S. independent test laboratory provides testing data and analyses to leaders in the following industries:

    * Paper, Pulp and Print Materials
    * Medical / Medical Devices
    * Personal Care and Absorbent Products
    * Nonwovens and Consumer Products
    * Fiber Analysis and Analytical Testing
    * Allied Materials

For more information, visit www.ipstesting.com or send InMail to IPS Testing's president, Bruce Shafer.

Name: Michigan Veneer
Description:
Over a quarter century ago, Michigan Veneer, began as a small domestic supplier. Today, our service and reputation have helped us grow into a major exporter of logs and wood veneers.

Michigan Veneer is lining a number of the most impressive conference rooms, business offices, automobiles, hotels and state building throughout the world.

Michigan Veneer features: log storage and cooler facilities, a five acre paved log yard, state-of-the-art grading line and a 40,000 sq. ft. veneer warehouse.

Michigan Veneer supplies a large selection of premium logs and veneer. Most notably: walnut, birds eye maple, curly maple, white oak, maple, cherry, birch, red oak, grey elm, red elm, hickory, ash and many others.

Name: ECOTOPIA TEAK
Description:
We are a certified teak reforestation company, overseeing the entire process—from planting to the processing of our own plantations.

Ecotopia Teak was born when our founder, Alf Johansson, was contacted by a group of banks offering a set of teak plantations that had been declared bankrupt. As soon as he visited the plantations, he saw the business potential, but also the lack of local knowledge in forest economics. Together with a group of investors, they raised the necessary capital to create Ecotopia Teak Incorporated in 2005.

The purpose of Ecotopia Teak is to be a certified reforestation company that manages the entire process, from planting to processing teak trees. Its main goal is the sustainable production of teak wood, a valuable natural resource used in the construction industry and furniture manufacturing.

Name: Ets Pierre Robert & Cie
Description:
Les établissements Pierre Robert & Cie, SAS au capital de 1 200 000 €, ont été créés en 1934 par Gaston ROBERT, le siège social est basé à Ardentes depuis  1950. Notre entreprise est spécialisée dans la production en scierie de débits de chêne.

Le négoce de grumes de chêne et le négoce de bois exotique en provenance du Brésil sont des activités complémentaires de notre établissement, le cœur de notre métier reste la production en scierie.

La scierie permet la production de toutes les catégories de sciages traditionnels. Les grumes sont chargées en début de ligne, écorcées et réduite en pied grâce au récent investissement d’un réducteur de pieds, puis orientées vers l’une des 2 scies de têtes en fonction de leur destination et de leur qualité. Elle est structurée pour permettre l’optimisation des rendements de production à chaque étape du sciage. L’unité de sciage se termine en bout de ligne par la production de pré débits destinés aux entreprises de deuxième transformation. La capacité de séchage est de 500 m3 répartie sur 6 cellules de séchage traditionnel et 2 cellules de séchage sous vide.
L’entreprise dispose pour le fonctionnement de son outil de production de son propre atelier d’affûtage et d’un atelier de maintenance.

L’entreprise réalise elle-même les estimations des lots et coupes en forêts, et sous-traite la totalité de ses activités d’exploitation forestière (abattage, débardage).

Notre entreprise est certifiée PEFC apportant la garantie au consommateur que le produit qu'il achète est issu de sources responsables et, qu'à travers son acte d'achat, il participe à la gestion durable des forêts. Une diligence raisonnée a été mise en place en 2014 dans notre scierie afin de répondre aux exigences du Règlement sur le Bois de l’Union Européenne (RBUE).

Name: Fluid Wood Products
Description:
Fluid Wood Products was founded to market and export value added New Zealand renewable pine timber into offshore projects.

We concentrate on filling orders efficiently whilst making sure everything supplied is suitable for the end use. Our structural grade timber is reliably machine stress tested and verified to meet specific engineering requirements stringent New Zealand Standards. As a result, our customers receive cost efficient designs and high quality timber products.

Using the latest CAD software and engineering experience we optimize designs for all our prefabricated products to ensure our customers not only are supplied with the best value for money, but also that components are easily handled and assembled at the final destination.

Fluid Wood Products has a large base of experience in disaster relief projects, as well as the ability to engineer products to provide an ease of assembly for even the most unskilled of work forces. Our support is available from the initial planning and design phase right through to the completion of projects.

We also supply a large variety of bulk timber options ranging from moulded finishing timbers through to unsawn logs and including everything in between.

All of our processed bulk timber is available in a wide range of chemical treatments to suit specific end applications, and we also offer stress graded timber in standard sizes. Custom milling/treatments are also available.

Fluid Wood Products can meet all of your timber needs.
